Matthew1:1 Uyu ndiwo mudungwe wamazita amadzitateguru aJesu Kristu Mwanakomana waDhavhidhi mwanakomana waAbhurahamu. 
Matthew1:2 Abhurahamu akabereka Isaki; Isaki akaberekawo Jakobho; Jakobho ndokuberekawo Judha; navanun'una vake. 
Matthew1:3 Judha akabereka Faresi naZera; akavabereka naTamari. Faresi akabereka Esiromu; Esiromu akaberekawo Aramu 
Matthew1:4 Aramu akabereka Aminadhabhu; Aminadhabhu akaberekawo Naashoni; Naashoni ndokuberekawo Sarimoni. 
Matthew1:5 Sarimoni ndokuzoberekawo Bhoazi, akamubereka naRahabhu Bhoazi akabereka Obedhi akamuberekawo naRute. Obedhi akazoberekawo Jese" 
Matthew1:6 Jese akabereka mambo Dhavhidhi Dhavhidhi akabereka Soromoni nomukadzi waUria. 
Matthew1:7 Soromoni akabereka Rehobhoamu, Rehobhoamu akaberekawo Abhiya. Abhiya ndokubereka Asafu." 
Matthew1:8 Asafu akabereka Jehoshafati; Jehoshafati akaberekawo Joramu; Joramu ndokubereka Uziya; 
Matthew1:9 Uziya akabereka Jotamu. Jotamu akabereka Ahazi Ahazi akazoberekawo Hezekia 
Matthew1:10 Hezekia akabereka Manase. Manasewo akabereka Amosi. Amosi ndokubereka Josia 
Matthew1:11 Josia akabereka Jokonia navakoma navanun'una vake panguva yavakatapwa kuenda kuBhabhironi. 
Matthew1:12 Mushure mehutapwa ihwohwo kuBhabhironi, Jokonia akabereka Sheatieri Sheatieri akabereka Zerubhabheri." 
Matthew1:13 Zerubhabheri akabereka Abhihudhi; Abhihudhi akaberekawo Eriyakimu; Eriyakimu ndokubereka Azori. 
Matthew1:14 Azori akabereka Zadhoki; Zadhokiwo akabereka Akimu; Akimu akaberekawo Erihudhi. 
Matthew1:15 Erihudhi akabereka Eriazari Eriazari akaberekawo Matani Matani akabereka Jakobho. 
Matthew1:16 Jakobho akabereka Josefi murume waMaria, Maria ndiye akazobereka Jesu anonzi Kristu." 
Matthew1:17 Nezvo zvizvarwa zvose kubvira pana Abhurahamu kusvikira pana Dhavhidhi pane zvizvarwa gumi nezvina. Kubvirawo pana Dhavhidhi kusvikira pautapwa hokuBhabhironi pane zvizvarwa gumi nezvina. Kubvirawo pahutapwa huya hokuBhabhironi kusvika kuna iye Kristu pane zvizvarwa gumi nezvina. 
Matthew1:18 Uku ndiko kuberekwa kwakaitwa Jesu Kristu. Amai vake Maria vakanga vachangoroorwa naJosefi. Vasati vagara vose Maria akaonekwa ava napamuviri nesimba raMweya Mutsvene. 
Matthew1:19 Murume wake Josefi somunhu akanga akarurama, uye pamusana pokusada kumufumura, akafunga zvokumuramba chinyararire." 
Matthew1:20 Paakanga achiri kufunga izvi, hoyo mutumwa waTenzi akazviratidza kwaari mukurota achiti, “Josefi mwanakomana waDhavhidhi usatye zvako kutora Maria mukadzi wako nokuti pamuviri paanapo akapaita nesimba raMweya Mutsvene." 
Matthew1:21 Achapona Mwanakomana waunofanira kutumidza zita rokuti Jesu nokuti achaponesa vanhu vake kuzvitadzo zvavo.” 
Matthew1:22 Zvose izvi zvakaitika kuzadzisa zvakanga zvataurwa naTenzi nomuromo womuporofita uya zvokuti: 
Matthew1:23 “Tarirai, mhandara ichava napamuviri ichizobereka mwana mukomana. Zita rake richazonzi Imanueri” (zvinoreva kuti Mwari Anesu.)" 
Matthew1:24 Josefi paakamuka akaita sokuudzwa kwaakanga aitwa nomutumwa waTenzi. 
Matthew1:25 Akatora mudzimai wake asi haana kuzivana naye kusvikira apona mwana mukomana. Akamutumidza zita rokuti Jesu. 
Matthew2:1 Zvino pakaberekwa Jesu muBheterehemu reJudhea pamazuva amambo Herodhi; havo vazivi vezvenyenyedzi vakabva kumabvazuva, vakauya kuJerusaremu" 
Matthew2:2 vachiti, “Ari kupiko mwana akaberekwa, mambo wavaJudha? Nokuti takaona nyenyedzi yake kumabvazuva zvino tauya kuzomugwadamira.”" 
Matthew2:3 Mambo Herodhi paakanzwa izvi, zvakamunetsa uye neJerusaremu yose." 
Matthew2:4 Akaunganidza vapristi vakuru vose nenyanzvi dzavanhu dzomutemo akavabvunzisisa kuti iye Kristu aizoberekererwa kupi. 
Matthew2:5 Vakamutaurira kuti, “MuBheterehemu yokuJudhea nokuti ndizvo zvakanyorwa nomuporofita zvichinzi," 
Matthew2:6 “ ‘Iwe Bheterehemu munyika yokwaJudha hausiwe muduku wokupedzesera pakati pavatongi vokwaJudha nokuti mauri muchabva mutongi achafudza vanhu vangu vaIsiraeri.’ ” 
Matthew2:7 Herodhi akadaidza vangwaru vaya muchivande akanyatsovabvunzisisa kuti nyenyedzi yakaonekwa rinhi. 
Matthew2:8 Akavaendesa kuBheterehemu achiti, “Endai mundotsvagisisa mwana iyeyo. Kana mamuwana ndiunzireiwo shoko, kuti neniwo ndiende ndindomugwadamira.”" 
Matthew2:9 Pavakapedza kunzwa mambo vakasimudzirazve rwendo rwavo. Nyenyedzi iya yavakanga vamboona kumabvazuva ndiye n'a — a pamberi pavo ichivatungamirira kusvikira yandomira pamusoro penzvimbo yaiva nemwana. 
Matthew2:10 Pavakaona nyenyedzi iya vakafara norufaro rukuru kwazvo. 
Matthew2:11 Pavakapinda mumba imomo vakaona mwana pamwechete naamai vake Maria. Vakasvikoti pasi gwadagwa vachimuremekedza. Vakasunungura upfumi hwavo vachimupa zvipo zvendarama nerusenzi nemura. 
Matthew2:12 Vakati vakayambirwa mukurota kuti vasadzokere nokuna Herodhi, vakadzokera kunyika kwavo neimwe nzira." 
Matthew2:13 Vazivi venyenyedzi vaya pavakaenda, hoyo mutumwa waTenzi akazviratidza kuna Josefi mukurota akati, “Simuka utore mwana naamai vake utizire kuIjipiti ugare ikoko kusvikira ndakutaurira nokuti Herodhi avakuda kutsvaka mwana kuti amuparadze.”" 
Matthew2:14 Josefi akasimuka akatora mucheche naamai vake usiku, akaenda kuIjipiti." 
Matthew2:15 Akagarako kusvikira Herodhi afa. Izvi zvakaitika kuti zvizadzise zvakanga zvamborehwa naTenzi nomuromo womuporofita zvokuti, “Ndakadaidza Mwanakomana wangu kubva kuIjipiti.”" 
Matthew2:16 Herodhi, paakaona kuti akanga abatiswa pasi navazivi vezvenyenyedzi vaya, akaviruka nehasha akatuma vanhu kundouraya vana vakomana vose muBheterehemu nomunharaunda iyoyo yose vakanga vana makore maviri kana makore ari pasi paiwayo maererano nenguva yaakanga ataurirwa navazivi venyenyedzi vaya." 
Matthew2:17 Zvakabva zvazadzisa zvakanga zvataurwa nomuporofita Jeremia zvokuti," 
Matthew2:18 “Izwi rakanzikwa muRama rokuchema nokuungudza kukuru, Rakeri achichema vana vake achiramba kunyaradzwa nokuti vakanga vasisipo.”" 
Matthew2:19 Herodhi paakafa, hoyo mutumwa waTenzi akazvionesa kuna Josefi mukurota ari muIjipiti," 
Matthew2:20 achiti, “Chisimuka utore mwana naamai vake uende kunyika yeIsiraeri nokuti vaya vaida kuuraya mwana vakafa.”" 
Matthew2:21 Josefi akasimuka akatora mwana naamai vake akaenda kunyika yeIsiraeri. 
Matthew2:22 Asi paakanzwa kuti Akerausi ndiye aitonga muJudhea panzvimbo pababa vake Herodhi, akatya kuendako. Paakayambirwa mukurota akabva aenda kuruwa rweGarirea." 
Matthew2:23 Akaenda akandogara muguta rinonzi Nazareti kuti zvakataurwa navaporofita zvizadziswe zvokuti, “Achanzi mugari weNazareti.”" 
Matthew3:1 Pamazuva iwayo kwakauya Johani Muombeki achiparidza murenje reJudhea achiti," 
Matthew3:2 “Pindukai nokuti umambo hwedenga hwaswedera.” 
Matthew3:3 Uyu ndiye akanyorwa nezvake nomuporofita Isaya achiti, “Izwi raanodanidzira mugwenga achiti, ‘Gadzirirai Tenzi mugwagwa. Ruramisai nzira dzake.’ ”" 
Matthew3:4 Johani aipfeka hanzu yakagadzirwa nemvere dzenghamera nebhande reganda muchiuno chake. Chokudya chake chaiva mhashu nouchi homusango. 
Matthew3:5 Jerusaremu neJudhea yose navanhu vomunharaunda yeJorodhani vakabuda vachienda kwaari 
Matthew3:6 vakaombekwa naye murwizi rwaJorodhani vachireurura zvitadzo zvavo. 
Matthew3:7 Paakaona vaFarisei vazhinji navaSadhusei vachiuya kuzoombekwa akati kwavari, “Imi vana venyoka, ndiani akakunyeverai kuti mutize kurangwa kuri kuuya?" 
Matthew3:8 Naizvozvo berekai muchero unowirirana nokupinduka kwenyu. 
Matthew3:9 Regai kuzvifurira muchiti zvatina Abhurahamu sababa vedu muchechetere, nokuti ndinoti kwamuri, Mwari anogona kumutsira Abhurahamu vana kubva kumatombo aya." 
Matthew3:10 Zvino demo ratonanga parinotema midzi yemiti. Naizvozvo muti wose usingabereki muchero wakanaka uchatemwa uchikandwa mumoto. 
Matthew3:11 Hongu ini ndinokuombekai nemvura kuti mupinduke. Asi arikuuya mushure mangu ane simba kupinda ini. Ini handikodzeri kutakura shangu dzake; iye achakuombekai naMweya Mutsvene uye nomoto. 
Matthew3:12 Rusero rwake ruri muruoko rwake kuti aurutse zvapurwa paburiro rake nokuunganidza koroni yake nokuiisa mudura. Asi hundi achaipisa nomoto usingadzimiki.” 
Matthew3:13 Jesu akabva kuGarirea achienda kurwizi rwaJorodhani kwaiva naJohani kundoombekwa naye. 
Matthew3:14 Johani aida kumurambidza achiti, “Ini ndini ndinofanira kuombekwa nemi. Zvino imi ndimi mouya kwandiri here?”" 
Matthew3:15 Jesu akamupindura achiti, “Parizvino rega zvive saizvozvo nokuti zvakanaka kuti tizadzise zvakarurama zvose.”" 
Matthew3:16 Ndipo paakabvuma. Jesu paakangoombekwa akabva abuda mumvura pakarepo ndokubva matenga akazaruka kwaari akaona Mweya waMwari achiburuka akaita senjiva achisvikomhara paari. Hero izwi rakabva kudenga 
Matthew3:17 richiti, “Uyu ndiye Mwanakomana wangu wapamwoyo anondifadza zvikuru.”" 
Matthew4:1 Ipapo Jesu akatungamirirwa naMweya kuenda murenje kundoedzwa naSatani. 
Matthew4:2 Akatsanya siku nesikati kwamazuva makumi mana. Mushure mezvo akabva oziya. 
Matthew4:3 Muedzi akauya akati kwaari, “Kana uri Mwanakomana waMwari iti matombo aya ave chingwa.”" 
Matthew4:4 Asi iye akapindura achiti, “Zvakanyorwa zvichinzi, ‘Munhu haararami nechingwa choga asi neizwi rose rinobuda mumuromo maMwari.’ ”" 
Matthew4:5 Dhiabhori akamutora akaenda naye kuguta dzvene pamusorosoro chaipo peTemberi akati kwaari," 
Matthew4:6 “Kana uri Mwanakomana waMwari zviwisire pasi nokuti zvakanyorwa zvichinzi, ‘Achaudza vatumwa vake kuti vakuchengete, vachakugama mumaoko avo kuti urege kugumburwa rutsoka rwako nebwe.’ ”" 
Matthew4:7 Jesu akati kwaari, “Zvakanyorwazve kuti, ‘Usaedze Tenzi Mwari wako.’ ”" 
Matthew4:8 Dhiabhori akamutorazve akaenda naye kugomo refu — refu akamuratidza umambo noumambo hwapasi pose nembiri yaho. 
Matthew4:9 Satani akati kwaari, “Zvose izvi ndinokupa kana ukati pasi gwadagwa uchindinamata.”" 
Matthew4:10 Jesu akati kwaari, “Ibvapo! Satani nokuti zvakanyorwa zvichinzi, ‘Unofanira kugwadamira uchinamata Tenzi Mwari wako. Iye oga ndiye waunofanira kushandira.’ ”" 
Matthew4:11 Dhiabhori akabva akamusiya. Vatumwa vakabva vauya kuzomushandira. 
Matthew4:12 Jesu paakanzwa kuti Johani akanga asungwa, akaenda kuGarirea." 
Matthew4:13 Akabva kuNazareti akandogara kuKapanaumu padyo negungwa, mudunhu rokwaZabhuroni nerokwaNafutari" 
Matthew4:14 kuti zviya zvakanga zvataurwa nomuporofita Isaya zvizadzikiswe zvokuti," 
Matthew4:15 “Iwe nyika yeZabhuroni newe nenyika yeNafutari iri pedyo negungwa mhiri kwaJorodhani, Garirea yevechirudzi," 
Matthew4:16 vanhu vakanga vagere murima vakaona chiedza chikuru navavo vakanga vagere munyika nomumumvuri worufu chiedza chakavabudira.” 
Matthew4:17 Kubvira nguva iyoyo Jesu akatangisa kuparidza achiti pindukai nokuti umambo hokudenga hwaswedera. 
Matthew4:18 Zvino Jesu akati achifamba pamahombekombe egungwa reGarirea, akaona mukoma nomunun'una, vana Simoni anonzi Pita naAndireya munun'una wake vachikanda usvasvi hwavo mugungwa nokuti vakanga vari vabvuvi vehove." 
Matthew4:19 Akati kwavari, “Nditeverei. Ini ndichakuitai vabvuvi vavanhu.”" 
Matthew4:20 Pakarepo vakabva vasiya usvasvi hwavo vakamutevera. 
Matthew4:21 Akaenda mberi akaona vamwe, mukoma nomunun'una, Jemusi mwanakomana waZebhedhi naJohani munun'una wake vari mugwa navaZebhedhi, baba vavo vachigadzira usvasvi hwavo. Akavadaidza." 
Matthew4:22 Pakarepo vakabva vasiya igwa nababa vavo vakamutevera. 
Matthew4:23 Jesu akafamba neGarirea yose achidzidzisa mumasinagogu avo achiparidza Shoko Rakanaka roumambo uye achirapa zvirwere zvose noundonda hwose pakati pavanhu. 
Matthew4:24 Mukurumbira wake wakapararira neSiria yose. Vakaunza kwaari varwere vose vakanga vachirwara nezvirwere zvakasiyana — siyana namamwewo marwadzo navakanga vakagarwa nemweya yakaipa, navaiva netsviyo navakanga vane mitezo yomuviri yavo yakafa akavarapa." 
Matthew4:25 Gurusvusvu ravanhu rakamutevera richibva kuGarirea nokuDhekaporisi nokuJerusaremu nokuJudhea uye nokumhiri kwaJorodhani. 
Matthew5:1 Jesu akati achiona gurusvusvu riya ravanhu akakwira mugomo. Paakagara pasi vadzidzi vake vakauya kwaari. 
Matthew5:2 Akazarura muromo wake akavadzidzisa achiti: 
Matthew5:3 “Vakakomborerwa zvavo varombo mumweya nokuti umambo hwedenga ndohwavo. 
Matthew5:4 Vakakomborerwa zvavo vanochema nokuti vachanyaradzwa 
Matthew5:5 vakakomborerwa zvavo vakapfava nokuti vachawana nhaka yenyika. 
Matthew5:6 Vakakomborerwa zvavo vane nzara nenyota yoururami nokuti vachagutswa. 
Matthew5:7 Vakakomborerwa zvavo vane tsitsi nokuti vachaitirwawo tsitsi. 
Matthew5:8 Vakakomborerwa zvavo vakachena pamwoyo nokuti vachaona Mwari. 
Matthew5:9 Vakakomborerwa zvavo vawadzanisi nokuti vachanzi vana vaMwari. 
Matthew5:10 Vakakomborerwa zvavo vanotambudzirwa ururami nokuti umambo hwedenga ndohwavo. 
Matthew5:11 Makakomborerwa zvenyu imi kana vanhu vachikushorai nokukutambudzai vachikupomerai zvakaipa zvose zvenhema pamusana pangu. 
Matthew5:12 Farai mufarisise kwazvo nokuti mubayiro wenyu mukuru kudenga. Nokuti ndiko kutambudza kwavakaita vaporofita vakakutangirai. 
Matthew5:13 “Imi muri munyu wapasi. Zvino kana munyu usisavavi unozovaviswa nei? Unenge usisina basa unofanira kutongoraswa zvawo uchitsikwa zvawo navanhu. 
Matthew5:14 “Imi muri chiedza chapasi. Guta rakavakirwa pagomo harivanziki. 
Matthew5:15 Vanhu havatungidzi mwenje vachiukwidibira nedengu asi kuti vanotouisa pachigadzikiro chomwenje uchivhenekera vose vari mumbamo. 
Matthew5:16 Saizvozvowo, chiedza chenyu ngachivhenekere vanhu kuti vaone mabasa enyu akanaka varumbidze Baba venyu vari kudenga." 
Matthew5:17 “Regai kumbofunga zvenyu kuti ndakauya kuzoparadza mutemo kana vaporofita. Handina kuuya kuzozviparadza, asi kuzozvizadzisa." 
Matthew5:18 Nokuti ndinokutaurirai zvechokwadi chaizvo kuti denga napasi zvingapfuure zvazvo asi hapana kana kabhii kana kaga zvako komutemo kachabviswa mumutemo kusvikira zvose zvaitika. 
Matthew5:19 Nezvo ani naani anotyora mumwe wemitemo iyi achidzidzisa vanhu kudaro achanzi mudiki muumambo hwedenga. Asi uyo anoichengeta achiidzidzisa achanzi mukuru muumambo hwedenga. 
Matthew5:20 “Nokuti ndinokutaurirai kuti kana ururami hwenyu hukasadarika ururami hwenyanzvi dzomutemo navaFarisei hamumbopinda muumambo hwedenga. 
Matthew5:21 “Makanzwa kuti zvakanzi kuna vakare, ‘Usauraye. “ ‘Ani naani anouraya achatongwa.’" 
Matthew5:22 Asi ini ndinoti kwamuri munhu wose anoshatirirwa hama yake achatongwa. Ani naani anoti kuhama yake, ‘Uri munhu pasina.’ Achakwidzwa padare. Ani naani anoti, ‘Uri rema romunhu’ anokodzera gomba romoto." 
Matthew5:23 Ipapo kana uchindopira chipo chako paatari, ipapo ukafunga kuti hama yako ine chigumbu newe," 
Matthew5:24 siya chipo chako ipapo pamberi peatari uende utange wayanana nehama yako. Wozouya zvako opira chipo chako. 
Matthew5:25 “Wadzana nomunhu ari kukukwirira dare nokuchimbidza muchiri munzira yokuenda kudare angadaro uyo ari kukukwirira dare akakuisa kumutongi mutongi achizokuisa mumaoko omupurisa, uye uchizoiswa mujeri." 
Matthew5:26 Zvechokwadi ndinokutaurira kuti haumbomubuda kusvikira waripa sendi rokupedzisira. 
Matthew5:27 “Makanzwa kuti zvakanzi, musaite upombwe" 
Matthew5:28 Asi ini ndinoti kwamuri, ‘Ani naani anotarisa mukadzi achimuchiva atoita upombwe naye mumwoyo make.’" 
Matthew5:29 Kana ziso rako rorudyi richikukonzera kutadza risvukunure urikande kwakadaro. Zviri nani kurasikirwa neimwe nhengo yomuviri wako panze pokuti muviri wako wose ukandwe mugomba romoto. 
Matthew5:30 Kana ruoko rwako rworudyi ruchikukonzera kutadza rudimbure urwukande kwakadaro. Zviri nani kurasikirwa neimwe yenhengo dzako panze pokuti muviri wako wose uende kugomba remoto. 
Matthew5:31 “Zvakanziwo uyo anoramba mukadzi wake ngaamupe tsamba yegupuro. 
Matthew5:32 Asi ini ndinoti, ‘Ani naani anoramba mudzimai wake kunze kokunge chikonzero chacho chiri choupombwe, anomuita kuti aite upombwe. Ani naaniwo anoroora mukadzi akarambwa anoita upombwe.’" 
Matthew5:33 “Makanzwawo kuti zvakanzi kuvanhu vakare musapike nhema asi kuti munotofanira kuita zvamakapika kuna Tenzi. 
Matthew5:34 Asi ini ndinoti kwamuri usambopika zvako naTenzi kana nedenga nokuti chigaro choumambo chaMwari; kana kupika nenyika nokuti chitambarariko chetsoka dzake; 
Matthew5:35 kana kupika neJerusaremu nokuti iguta ramambo mukuru. 
Matthew5:36 Usapike nomusoro wako nokuti haugoni kusandura ruvhudzi rwako kuti ruve ruchena kana rutema. 
Matthew5:37 Regai hongu wenyu angova hongu nakwete wenyu angova kwete; zvimwe zvose zvinopfuura ipapa zvinobva kuna wakaipa uya. 
Matthew5:38 “Makanzwa kuti zvakanzi ziso rinofanira kutsiviwa neziso zino richitsiviwa nezino. 
Matthew5:39 Asi ini ndinoti kwamuri, ‘Usadzivise wakaipa.’ Kana munhu akakurova mbama padama rorudyi mutendeudzire rimwezve." 
Matthew5:40 Kana munhu achida kukukwirira dare achida kukutorera bhatye rako ibva wamupa nejasi rako. 
Matthew5:41 Kana munhu akakumanikidza kuti umuperekedze kiromita imwechete, muperekedze kwamakiromita maviri." 
Matthew5:42 Munhu anokukumbira, mupe. Usanyime uyo anoda kukukwereta." 
Matthew5:43 “Makanzwa kuti zvakanzi, ‘Ida mumwe wako uvenge muvengi wako.’" 
Matthew5:44 Asi ini ndinoti kwamuri, ‘Idai vavengi venyu munamatire vanokutambudzai kuti muve vana vaBaba venyu vari kudenga,’" 
Matthew5:45 nokuti ivo vanobudisira zuva ravo vakaipa navakanaka; uye vanonaisira mvura yavo vakarurama navasina kururama. 
Matthew5:46 Ko kana muchida vanokudai, munowana mubayiro wei, ko vateresi havaiti saizvozvo here?" 
Matthew5:47 Kana muchingokwazisa hama dzenyu chete, chii chamunokunda vamwe nacho ipapa? Vechirudzi havaiti zvimwechetezvo here?" 
Matthew5:48 Nezvo imi munofanira kuva vakaruramisisa sezvakangoita Baba venyu vokudenga vakaruramisisa.” 
Matthew6:1 “Ngwarirai kuti murege kuita zvokushamisira pamberi pavanhu kuti vakuonei mukuita kwenyu kwakarurama. Nokuti mukadaro hamuzowana mubayiro unobva kuna Baba venyu vari kudenga. 
Matthew6:2 “Nezvo kana mopa zvipo musaridze hwamanda sezvinoita vanyengedzi mumasinagogu; nomumigwagwa kuti varumbidzwe navanhu. Zvechokwadi chaizvo, ndinoti kwamuri, vakatowana mubayiro wavo kare." 
Matthew6:3 Asi kana mopa zvipo, ruoko rwenyu rworuboshe ngarurege kuziva zviri kuitwa norudyi kuti kupa kwenyu zvipo kuve kwomuchivande," 
Matthew6:4 kuti Baba venyu vanoona muchivande vagokupai mubayiro. 
Matthew6:5 “Kana mava kunamata regai kuita savanyengedzi. Vanoda kumira vachinamata mumasinagogu napamharadzano dzenzira vachiitira kuti vaonekwe navanhu. Chokwadi — chokwadi ndinoti kwamuri vakatowana mubayiro wavo kare. 
Matthew6:6 Asi kana iwe wava kunamata, pinda mumba mako uzarire gonhi rako unamate kuna Baba vako vari muchivande. Ivo Baba vako vanoona zviri muchivande, vachakupa mubayiro." 
Matthew6:7 “Asi imi kana mava kunamata regai kuzavaza sezvinoita vechirudzi nokuti vanofunga kuti vanonzwika nokuda kokuwanda kwamazwi avo. 
Matthew6:8 Musafanane navo, nokuti Baba venyu vanoziva zvamunoda musati mavakumbira." 
Matthew6:9 Nezvo namatai sezvizvi muchiti: ‘Baba vedu muri kudenga zita renyu ngariereswe. 
Matthew6:10 Umambo hwenyu ngahuuye. Kuda kwenyu ngakuitwe pasi sokudenga. 
Matthew6:11 Tipeiwo nhasi kudya kwedu kwezuva nezuva. 
Matthew6:12 Tiregerereiwo zvitadzo zvedu, sokuregerera kwatinoita vanotitadzira" 
Matthew6:13 Musatirege tichipinda muchiedzo. Asi tinunureiwo kune zvakaipa. ’ Nokuti umambo ndowenyu, nesimba nembiri, narini narini. Ameni." 
Matthew6:14 “Kana mukaregerera vanhu zvikanganiso zvavo, Baba venyu vokudenga vanokuregereraiwo zvikanganiso zvenyu." 
Matthew6:15 Kana musingaregereri vanhu zvikanganiso zvavo, Baba venyuwo havakuregererei zvikanganiso zvenyu." 
Matthew6:16 “Kana motsanya musasuruvarise uso sezvinoita vanyengedzi nokuti vanounyanisa kumeso kuti vaonekwe navanhu kuti vari kutsanya. Chokwadi chaizvo ndinoti kwamuri vatogamuchira mubayiro wavo. 
Matthew6:17 “Asi kana imi motsanya, zorai musoro mafuta, mushambe uso hwenyu;" 
Matthew6:18 kuti kutsanya kwenyu kurege kuonekwa navanhu; asi kuti kuonekwe naBaba venyu vari muchivande. Ivo Baba venyu vanoona muchivande vachakupai mubayiro. 
Matthew6:19 “Regai kuzviunganidzira upfumi panyika. Pahunodyiwa nezvipfukuto nengura nehonye, panozopazwa nembavha dzichiba." 
Matthew6:20 Asi zviunganidzirei upfumi kudenga, kusina chipfukuto kana ngura inohudya, kusingapazwi nembavha dzichiba," 
Matthew6:21 nokuti pano upfumi hwako ndipo pano mwoyo wakowo. 
Matthew6:22 “Ziso ndiro mwenje womuviri. Nezvo kana ziso rako rakanaka muviri wako wose uchazara nechiedza. 
Matthew6:23 Asi kana ziso rako risina kunaka muviri wako wose uchazara nerima. Zvino kana chiedza chiri mamuri chava rima, rima racho richava rakakura sei!" 
Matthew6:24 “Hapana munhu angashandire vatenzi vaviri, nokuti anogona kuvenga mumwe achida mumwe, kana kuti anoti kwati kwati nomumwe achizvidza mumwe. Haugoni kuva muranda waMwari nomuranda wemari. “Vimba naMwari kuti anokupa zvinokuraramisa." 
Matthew6:25 Nezvo ndinoti kwamuri musazvidye mwoyo nezvoupenyu hwenyu kuti muchadyei kana kuti muchanwei kana nezvomuviri wenyu kuti muchapfekei. Ihwo upenyu hausi hwakakosha here kupinda chokudya, uye muviri haupfuuri chokupfeka here?" 
Matthew6:26 “Tarisai muone shiri dzedenga hadzidyari kana kukohwa kana kuunganidza mumatura asi Baba venyu vokudenga vanodzipa chokudya. Hamuna kukosha here kupinda idzo? 
Matthew6:27 Ndiani wenyu angarebese upenyu hwake nechidimbu pamusana pokuzvidya mwoyo? 
Matthew6:28 Ko munozvinetsereiko muchifunga nezvokupfeka? Tarisai muone maruva esango kuti anokura sei. Haabati basa kana kuruka. 
Matthew6:29 Asi ndinoti kwamuri kunyange Soromoni pachake nembiri yake yose iya, akanga asina kushongedzwa serimwe raiwaya." 
Matthew6:30 Kana Mwari achishongedza uswa homusango huripo nhasi uno, mangwana hwokandwa muchoto, haasi anokupfekedzai zvakatonyanya here imi vanhu vochitendero chiduku." 
Matthew6:31 Saka musazvidye mwoyo muchiti tichadyei kana kuti tichanwei kana kuti tichapfekei. 
Matthew6:32 Nokuti vechirudzi vanotsvaka zvose izvi asi Baba venyu vokudenga vanoziva kuti zvose izvi munozvida. 
Matthew6:33 Imi, kutangira zvose tsvakai umambo hwake; noururami hwake, zvinhu zvose izvi zvichavawo zvenyu." 
Matthew6:34 “Nezvo musazvidye mwoyo nezvamangwana nokuti mangwana achazvionera oga, zuva roga roga rine nhamo dzaro dzakarikwanira.”" 
Matthew7:1 “Musatonge vamwe, imiwo hamuzotongwi. Matongero amunoita vamwe ndiwo amuchatongwawo nawo." 
Matthew7:2 Mwero wamunoera nawo, ndiwo mwero wamuchaererwawo nawo." 
Matthew7:3 Unotarisireiko kabanzu kari muziso rehama yako asi usingaoni zidanda riri muziso mako 
Matthew7:4 kana kuti ungati sei kune hama yako rega ndikubvise kabanzu kari muziso rako, imo muziso rako muine zidanda." 
Matthew7:5 Iwe munyengedzi, tanga wabvisa danda riri muziso rako. Ipapo unenge wava kunyatsoona kubvisa kabanzu kari muziso rehama yako." 
Matthew7:6 Musape zvinhu zvinoera kuimbwa kana kukanda matombo anokosha amapera pamberi penguruve, dzingadaro dzikaatsika — tsika uye dzodzoka dzokurwisai imi." 
Matthew7:7 “Kumbirai muchapiwa, tsvakai muchawana, gogodzai muchazarurirwa." 
Matthew7:8 Nokuti wose anokumbira anopiwa. Anotsvaka anowana. Uye unogogodza achazarurirwa. 
Matthew7:9 Nokuti ndiani wenyu anoti kana mwana wake amukumbira chingwa, anomupa dombo." 
Matthew7:10 Kana kuti akakumbira hove omupa nyoka? 
Matthew7:11 Zvino kana imi vaipi, muchiziva kupa zvipo zvakanaka kuvana venyu, ko kutozoti Baba venyu vari kudenga, vanopa zvipo zvakanaka sei kuna avo vanovakumbira!" 
Matthew7:12 Zvose zvamungade kuti vanhu vakuitirei, vaitireiwo saizvozvo nokuti uyu ndiwo mutemo navaporofita." 
Matthew7:13 “Pindai napasuo rakamanikana nokuti suo rinotungamira kundoparadzwa rakapamhamha uye nzira yacho inyore, vanopinda napo vakawanda." 
Matthew7:14 Asi isuo rakamanikana uye nzira yacho yakaoma inoendesa kuupenyu, vanoiwana vacho vashoma." 
Matthew7:15 “Ngwarirai vaporofita venhema, vanouya kwamuri vakapfeka matehwe ehwai ivo mukati vari mhumhi dzinorura." 
Matthew7:16 Muchavaziva nemichero yavo; magirepisi angakohwiwa muminzwa here, kana maonde murukato here?" 
Matthew7:17 Nezvo muti wose wakanaka unobereka muchero wakanaka; asi muti wakaipa unobereka muchero wakaipa. 
Matthew7:18 Muti wakanaka haungabereki muchero wakaipa; mutiwo wakaipa haungabereki muchero wakanaka. 
Matthew7:19 Muti wose usingabereki muchero wakanaka unotemwa uchikandwa mumoto. 
Matthew7:20 Nezvo muchavaziva nemichero yavo. 
Matthew7:21 “Havasi vose vanonditi, ‘Tenzi Tenzi’ vachapinda muumambo hwedenga asi uyo anoita kuda kwaBaba vangu vari kudenga." 
Matthew7:22 Pazuva iroro, vazhinji vachanditi, ‘Tenzi Tenzi, hatina here kuporofita muzita renyu, tikadzinga mweya yakaipa muzita renyu, tikaita mabasa anoshamisa muzita renyu?’" 
Matthew7:23 Ipapo ndichavataurira pachena kuti handina kumbokuzivai. Ndibvirei pano imi vaiti vezvakaipa. 
Matthew7:24 “Naizvozvo munhu wose anonzwa mazwi angu aya achiita zvaanoreva, achave somunhu mungwaru akavakira imba yake paruware." 
Matthew7:25 Mvura yanaya, mafashamo akauya; dutu rikavhuvhuta richiroverera pamba iyoyo; asi haina kuwa nokuti yakanga yavakirwa paruware." 
Matthew7:26 Munhu wose anonzwa mazwi angu aya, asingaachengeti, akaita somurume benzi akavakira imba yake pajecha." 
Matthew7:27 Mvura yakanaya, mafashamo akauya. Dutu rakavhuvhuta rikaroverera paimba iyoyo ikawa, kuwa kwayo kwakava kukuru kwazvo.”" 
Matthew7:28 Jesu paakangopedza mashoko aya gungano riya ravanhu rakashamiswa norudzidziso rwake 
Matthew7:29 nokuti akavadzidzisa somunhu ane simba kwete senyanzvi dzavo dzomutemo. 
Matthew8:1 Jesu paakaburuka mugomo muya, vanhu vazhinji zhinji vakamutevera." 
Matthew8:2 Hoyo mumwe munhu akanga ana maperembudzi akauya kwaari akasvikopfugama pamberi pake achiti, “Tenzi, kana muchida zvenyu, munokwanisa kundiporesa muchindichenura.”" 
Matthew8:3 Jesu akatambanudza ruoko rwake akamubata, achiti, “Ndinoda, natswa uchenurwe hako.” Pakarepo akabva anatswa maperembudzi ake." 
Matthew8:4 Jesu akati kwaari, “Usawane waunotaurira. Asi enda undozviratidza kumupristi upire chipo chakatemwa naMosesi, kuti chive chapupu chako kuvanhu.”" 
Matthew8:5 Paakapinda muKapenaumu, mumwe mukuru wezana ramasoja akauya kwaari achimuteterera" 
Matthew8:6 achiti, “Tenzi muranda wangu arere kumba; mitezo yake yatonhora uye ari kurwadziwa zvakanyanya.”" 
Matthew8:7 Jesu akati kwaari, “Ndichauya ndizomurapa.”" 
Matthew8:8 Asi mutungamiri wezana uya akamupindura achiti, “Tenzi handikodzeri kuti mupinde mumba mangu, ingotaurai zvenyu izwi chete, muranda wangu achapora." 
Matthew8:9 Ini ndiri munhu ari pasi pavakuru uye ndina masojawo ari pasi pangu. Ndinoti kuno mumwe, ‘Enda,’ achienda uye kune mumwe, ‘Uya,’ achiuya. Ndinoti kumuranda wangu, ‘Ita ichi,’ achichiita.”" 
Matthew8:10 Jesu paakamunzwa akashamiswa. Akati kuna vaimutevera, “Zvechokwadi ndinoti kwamuri, kunyange muIsiraeri handina kumboona chitendero chakadai." 
Matthew8:11 Ndinokuudzai kuti vazhinji vachabva kumabvazuva nokumadokero vachizogara pakudya naAbhurahamu naIsaki naJakobho muumambo hwedenga," 
Matthew8:12 vana voumambo vachikandwa kurima rokunze. Ikoko vanhu vachachema vachirumanidza mazino.” 
Matthew8:13 Jesu akati kumutungamiri wezana, “Chienda zvako ngazviitike sokutenda kwako.” Muranda uya akabva apora panguva iyoyo." 
Matthew8:14 Jesu paakapinda mumba maPita akaona ambuya vake varere, muviri wavo uchipinda chando." 
Matthew8:15 Akavabata ruoko kurwara kwavo ndokubva kwapera, vakabva vamuka vakamushandira." 
Matthew8:16 Manheru acho, vanhu vakauya kuna Jesu navanhu vazhinji vakanga vakagarwa nemweya yakaipa. Akadzinga mweya iyoyo nokungotaura nomuromo chete. Akaporesawo vose vakanga vachirwara." 
Matthew8:17 Akaita izvi kuti azadzise zvakataurwa nomuporofita Isaya zvokuti, “Akabvisa zvirwere zvedu akatakura matenda edu.”" 
Matthew8:18 Jesu, paakaona gungano guru ravanhu vakanga vamuunganira akati, ngatiyambukei mhiri." 
Matthew8:19 Imwe nyanzvi yomutemo yakauya ikati kwaari, “Mudzidzisi ini ndinoda kukuteverai kose zvako kwamunoenda.”" 
Matthew8:20 Jesu akati kwaari, “Makava ana maguru, shiri dzedenga dzina matendere; asi Mwanakomana womunhu haana pokutsamira musoro wake.”" 
Matthew8:21 Mumwewo akanga ari mudzidzi wake, akati kwaari, “Tenzi regai nditange ndambondoviga baba vangu.”" 
Matthew8:22 Asi Jesu akati kwaari, “Nditevere, rega vakafa vavige vakafa vavo.”" 
Matthew8:23 Jesu paakapinda mugwa, vadzidzi vake vakamutevera." 
Matthew8:24 Hero dutu guru remhepo rakamuka mugungwa zvokuti igwa rakanga rava kuda kunyudzwa namasaisai, asi Jesu akanga akakotsira zvake." 
Matthew8:25 Vadzidzi vakaenda kwaari vakamumutsa vachiti, “Tenzi tiponesei tavakupera.”" 
Matthew8:26 Jesu akati kwavari, “Ko munotyireiko mukadaro? Inga muri vanhu vechitendero chidiki!” Akabva asimuka akatsiura dutu riya negungwa kukabva kwanyatsoti dzikadzika kunyarara." 
Matthew8:27 Vanhu vakashamiswa vakati, “Munhu uyu, munhu rudzii uyu, anototeererwa kunyange nemhepo negungwa?”" 
Matthew8:28 Paakasvika kumhiri kuya, kunyika yavaGadhara. Akasangana navarume vaviri vaiva nemweya yakaipa vachibva mumakuva. Vaityisa zvikuru zvokuti hapana munhu aikwanisa kupfuura nenzira iyoyo." 
Matthew8:29 Vakabva vazhamba vachiti, “Unei nesu, Mwanakomana waMwari. Wauya kuzotirwadzisa here nguva isati yasvika.”" 
Matthew8:30 Zvino pakanga pane danga renguruve dzakawanda dzakanga dzichifura zvadzo dziri chinhambwe navo. 
Matthew8:31 Mweya yakaipa iya yakamukumbira kuti kana watidzinga, tidzingire mudanga renguruve." 
Matthew8:32 Jesu akati, “Endai.” Saizvozvo yakabuda ikandopinda munguruve dziya. Hero danga rose renguruve rakati ware kumhanya. Rakateremuka napamawere echikomo ichocho ndiye mugungwa rororo." 
Matthew8:33 Vafudzi vakati ware kutiza. Pavakandopinda muguta vakataura zvose nezvakanga zvaitika kuna vakanga vakagarwa nemweya yakaipa. 
Matthew8:34 Hero guta rose rakabuda kundosangana naJesu. Pavakamuona vakamukumbira kuti abve zvake munharaunda yavo. 
Matthew9:1 Jesu paakapinda mugwa, akayambuka ndokusvika kuguta rake." 
Matthew9:2 Havo vamwe vanhu vakauya nomunhu akanga akatonhora mitezo akati rabada pabonde rake! Jesu paakaona chitendero chavo akati kune munhu uya akatonhora mitezo, “Tsunga mwoyo mwanangu, zvitadzo zvako zvaregererwa.”" 
Matthew9:3 Ipapo dzimwe nyanzvi dzomutemo dzakati, nechomumwoyo, “Munhu uyu ari kushonha Mwari.”" 
Matthew9:4 Zvino Jesu zvaaiziva zvavaifunga akati; “Munofungirei zvakaipa mumwoyo yenyu. 
Matthew9:5 Ko chakareruka ndechipi kuti, ‘Zvitadzo zvako zvaregererwa.’ Kana kuti, ‘Simuka ufambe?’" 
Matthew9:6 Zvino kuti muzive kuti Mwanakomana womunhu ane simba panyika rokuregerera zvitadzo” akati kune munhu uya akanga akatonhora mitezo, “Simuka utore bonde rako uende kumusha.”" 
Matthew9:7 Akasimukawo akaenda kumusha. 
Matthew9:8 Gungano riya parakazviona rakatya rikarumbidza Mwari akanga apa simba rakadaro kuvanhu. 
Matthew9:9 Jesu paakabva ipapo avakuenda, akaona mumwe murume anonzi Mateu agere pahofisi yomutero. Akati kwaari, “Nditevere.” Iye akabva asimuka omutevera." 
Matthew9:10 Paakanga akagara pakudya mumba, vateresi vazhinji navatadzi vakauya vakagara pasi vachidya naJesu navadzidzi vake." 
Matthew9:11 VaFarisei pavakazviona vakati kuna vadzidzi vake, “Sei mudzidzisi wenyu achidya navateresi navatadzi?”" 
Matthew9:12 Paakazvinzwa akati; “Vakukutu havadi chiremba asi vanorwara. 
Matthew9:13 Endai munodzidza izvi kuti zvinorevei zvokuti, ‘Ndinoda tsitsi kwete chibayiro’ nokuti handina kuuya kuzodaidza vakarurama asi vatadzi.”" 
Matthew9:14 Vadzidzi vaJohani vakauya kwaari vachiti, “Ko isu navaFarisei tinotsanya sei asi vadzidzi venyu havatsanyi?”" 
Matthew9:15 Jesu akati kwavari, “Vanhu vanenge vakokwa kumuchato vangasuwa here muwani vachinaye? Mazuva achauya pachabviswa muwani pavari. Ndipo pavachatsanya." 
Matthew9:16 Hakuna munhu anosonerera chiremo chejira idzva pahanzu tsaru. Chigamba chinotobvarura hanzu tsaru iya. Ichitobva yanyanya kubvaruka. 
Matthew9:17 Uye waini itsva haiiswi muzvigubhu zvamatehwe zvitsaru. Zvikaitwa saizvozvo, zvigubhu zvinoputika waini ichirasika zvoparara. Aiwa itsva inofanira kuiswa muzvigubhu zvitsva. Saizvozvo zvose zvinobva zvachengeteka.”" 
Matthew9:18 Jesu paakanga achiri kutaura kwavari mumwe mutungamiri akapinda akapfugama pamberi pake achiti, “Mwanasikana wangu afa iye zvino izvi. Uyai muzoisa ruoko rwenyu paari, achararama.”" 
Matthew9:19 Jesu akasimuka akamutevera pamwechete navadzidzi vake. 
Matthew9:20 Pakabva pauya mumwe mudzimai akanga aine chirwere chokubuda ropa kwamakore gumi namaviri. Akauya necheshure kwake akabata mupendero wehanzu yake 
Matthew9:21 nokuti akazviti nechemumwoyo, “Ndikangobata chete hanzu yake ndichava wadi.”" 
Matthew9:22 Jesu akatendeuka akamuona akati, “Tsunga mwoyo mukunda, chitendero chako chakuponesa.”" 
Matthew9:23 Jesu paakasvika kumba kwomutungamiri uya, akaona vokuridza nyere negungano ravanhu richiita mhere mhere." 
Matthew9:24 Iye akati, “Budai nokuti musikana haana kufa, akakotsira.” Vakamuseka." 
Matthew9:25 Chikwata chavanhu pachakaburitswa, Jesu akapinda akamubata ruoko. Musikana ndokubva amuka." 
Matthew9:26 Mukurumbira wake wakapararira mudunhu iroro rose. 
Matthew9:27 Jesu paakabva ipapo, varume vaviri vaiva mapofu vakamutevera vachidaidzira zvikuru vachiti, “Tinzwireiwo tsitsi, Mwanakomana waDhavhidhi.”" 
Matthew9:28 Paakapinda mumba mapofu aya akauya kwaari. Jesu akati kwaari, “Munotenda kuti ndinokwanisa kuita izvi here?” Vakati kwaari, “Hongu Tenzi.”" 
Matthew9:29 Akabata maziso avo akati, “Ngazviitwe kwamuri sokutenda kwenyu.” Maziso avo akabva azaruka." 
Matthew9:30 Jesu akavakohomedza achiti, “Ngwarirai kuti pasave nomunhu anozviziva.”" 
Matthew9:31 Asi vakaenda vakaparadzira mukurumbira wake mudunhu rose iroro. 
Matthew9:32 Pavakabva ipapo, pakauiswa munhu aiva mbeveve akagarwa nomweya wakaipa." 
Matthew9:33 Mweya wakaipa pawakaburitswa, mbeveve iya yakataura. Gungano rakashamiswa richiti, “Hakuna kumboonekwa zvakadai muIsiraeri.”" 
Matthew9:34 Asi vaFarisei vakati, “Anodzinga mweya yakaipa nesimba rejinda roMweya yakaipa.”" 
Matthew9:35 Jesu akafamba nomumaguta ose nomumisha achidzidzisa mumasinagogu avo achiparidza Shoko Rakanaka roumambo achirapa zvirwere zvose namatenda ose. 
Matthew9:36 Paakaona gungano ravanhu, akavanzwira tsitsi nokuti vaitambura vasina chingavabatsire sehwai dzisina mufudzi." 
Matthew9:37 Ipapo akati kuna vadzidzi vake, “Zvinoda kukohwiwa zvakawanda asi vakohwi vashoma," 
Matthew9:38 naizvozvo, namatai kuna Tenzi wezvinoda kukohwiwa kuti atumire vakohwi mumunda wake unoda kukohwiwa.”" 
Matthew10:1 Jesu akadaidza kwaari vadzidzi vake gumi navaviri akavapa simba pamusoro pemweya yetsvina kuti vaidzinge nesimba rokurapa zvirwere zvose namatenda ose. 
Matthew10:2 Mazita avapositori gumi navaviri ndaaya: wokutanga ndiSimoni anonzi Pita nomunun'una wake Andireya, kouya Jemusi mwanakomana waZebhedhi naJohani munun'una wake. Kozouya Firipi naBhatoromeo" 
Matthew10:3 kwoti Tomasi naMateu, muteresi, kwozoti Jemusi mwanakomana waArifeosi naTadheo." 
Matthew10:4 Kwozotiwo Simoni muKenani naJudhasi Isikarioti uya akazomupandukira. 
Matthew10:5 Jesu akatuma vane gumi navaviri ava achivakomera achiti, “Musaende kune vechirudzi uye musapinde muguta ravaSamaria" 
Matthew10:6 asi endai kuhwai dzakarasika dzemba yaIsiraeri muparidze 
Matthew10:7 pamunenge muchifamba muchiti, ‘Umambo hwokudenga hwavapedyo.’" 
Matthew10:8 Rapai vanorwara, mutsai vakafa, murape vana maperembudzi mudzinge mweya yakaipa. Makapiwa pachena, imi ipaiwo pachena." 
Matthew10:9 Musatakure mari yendarama kana yesirivha kana yekopa muzvikwama zvenyu," 
Matthew10:10 kana tsapo yeparwendo kana hembe mbiri kana shangu kana tsvimbo nokuti mushandi anokodzera kupiwa zvokudya. 
Matthew10:11 “Guta riri rose ramunopinda kana musha uri wose wamunopinda bvunzai kuti ndiani anokodzera mauri. Garai naye kusvikira mabvamo. 
Matthew10:12 Pamunopinda imomo kwazisai vomumbamo. Kana imba iyoyo ichikodzera, rugare rwenyu ngaruende pairi." 
Matthew10:13 Asi kana isingakodzeri, rugare rwenyu ngarudzokere kwamuri." 
Matthew10:14 Kana munhu asingadi kukugamuchirai kana kuteerera mazwi enyu, gumai guruva retsoka dzenyu pamunenge mava kubva pamba ipapo kana guta iroro." 
Matthew10:15 Zvechokwadi chaizvo ndinoti kwamuri, ‘Pazuva rokutongwa zvicharerukira nyika yeSodhomu neGomora kupinda guta iroro.’" 
Matthew10:16 “Tarirai, ndinokutumai sehwai mukati memhumhi, nezvo ngwarai senyoka asi makarurama senjiva." 
Matthew10:17 Ngwarirai vanhu, nokuti vachakukwirirai matare vachikurovai mumasinagogu avo." 
Matthew10:18 Muchakwekweretserwa kuvatongi namadzimambo, pamusana pangu, kuti mupe uchapupu pamberi pavo nokune vechirudzi." 
Matthew10:19 Kana vakukwirirai musazvinetse kuti muchataura sei kana kuti muchataurei 
Matthew10:20 nokuti zvamuchataura muchazvipiwa panguva iyoyo, nokuti hamusirimi munenge muchitaura asi Mweya waBaba venyu anenge achitaura nemamuri." 
Matthew10:21 “Mukoma nomunun'una vachakwirirana kumatare kusvikira pakuuraisana. Babawo vachakwirira mwana wavo. Vana vachamukira vabereki kuti vauraiwe 
Matthew10:22 uye muchavengwa navose pamusana pezita rangu asi uyo anotirira kusvika pamugumo achaponeswa. 
Matthew10:23 Kana vakakutambudzai mune rimwe guta, tizirai kune rimwe. Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri hamumbopedza kuenda mumaguta ose eIsiraeri, Mwanakomana womunhu asati auya." 
Matthew10:24 Mudzidzi haasi mukuru pane mudzidzisi wake nomurandawo haasi mukuru pana tenzi wake. 
Matthew10:25 Zvinenge zvatoita zvazvo, kana mudzidzi akava somudzidzisi wake, kana kuti murandawo akaita satenzi wake. Kana vakatumidza saimba kuti Bheerizabhuri ko vanganyomba zvakadii avo vemhuri yake?" 
Matthew10:26 “Naizvozvo musavatye. Hapana chakafukidzwa chisingazoburitswa pachena kana chakavandika chisingazozivikanwa. 
Matthew10:27 “Zvandinokutaurirai murima zvitaurei masikati machena, zvamunonzwa nakazevezeve zviparidzei muri pamusoro pemba." 
Matthew10:28 Musatye avo vanouraya muviri asi vasingagoni kuuraya mweya asi ityai uyo anogona kuuraya mweya nomuviri mugomba romoto. 
Matthew10:29 Tushiri tudiki tuviri hatutengeswi nesendi here? Asi hapana kamwe katwo kanowira pasi, kusiri kuda kwaBaba venyu." 
Matthew10:30 Kana murimi zvenyu, kunyange vhudzi romusoro wenyu rose rakaverengwa." 
Matthew10:31 Saka musatye; munotokosha kupinda tushiri tuzhinji. 
Matthew10:32 “Nezvo munhu anondibvuma pamberi pavanhu ndichamubvumawo pamberi paBaba vangu vari kudenga. 
Matthew10:33 Asi munhu anondiramba pamberi pavanhu, ini ndichamurambawo pamberi paBaba vangu vari kudenga." 
Matthew10:34 “Regai kufunga kuti ndakauya kuzounza rugare panyika. Handina kuuya kuzounza rugare asi hondo yebakatwa 
Matthew10:35 nokuti ndakauya kuzorwisanisa baba nomwanakomana vake, mwanasikana achapesanawo naamai vake, muroorawo achapesana navamwene vake." 
Matthew10:36 Mhandu dzomunhu dzichava dzomumba make. 
Matthew10:37 “Munhu anoda baba namai kupinda ini haakodzeri kuva wangu. Uyo anoda mwanakomana kana mwanasikana wake kupinda ini haakodzeri kuva wangu. 
Matthew10:38 Aninaani asingatore muchinjikwa wake achinditevera haakodzeri kuva wangu. 
Matthew10:39 Uyo anoda kuchengetedza upenyu hwake acharasikirwa nahwo. Uyo anorasikirwa noupenyu hwake, pamusana pangu, achahuchengetedza." 
Matthew10:40 “Uyo anogamuchira imi anogamuchirawo ini. Anogamuchira ini anogamuchirawo uyo akandituma. 
Matthew10:41 Anogamuchira muporofita pamusana pokuti muporofita anowanawo mubayiro womuporofita. Uyowo anogamuchira munhu akarurama pamusana pokuti munhu wakarurama achagamuchirawo mubayiro womunhu wakarurama. 
Matthew10:42 Munhuwo anopa kune mumwe wavaduku ava kunyange mukombe wemvura inotonhora nokuda kokuti mudzidzi, zvechokwadi chaizvo ndinoti kwamuri haamborega kuwana mubayiro wake.”" 
Matthew11:1 Jesu paakapedza kudzidzisa vadzidzi vake vane gumi navaviri, akabva ipapo avakundodzidzisa nokuparidza mumaguta avo." 
Matthew11:2 Johani paakanzwa ari mujeri zvinhu zvakanga zvichiitwa naKristu, akatuma vadzidzi vake neshoko kwaari" 
Matthew11:3 rokuti, “Ndimi mainzi muchauya here kana kuti tomirira mumwe?”" 
Matthew11:4 Jesu akavapindura achiti, “Endai mundotaurira Johani zvamuri kunzwa nezvamuri kuona zvokuti," 
Matthew11:5 “Mapofu ari kusvinudzwa. Mhetamakumbo dzavakufamba vana maperembudzi vari kunatswa. Vamatsi vavakunzwa, vakafa vari kumutswa uye varombo vari kuparidzwa Shoko Rakanaka." 
Matthew11:6 Akakomborerwa zvake asingagumburiswi neni.” 
Matthew11:7 Nhumwa dziya padzakanga dzavakuenda, Jesu akatanga kutaura kuruzhinji rwavanhu nezvaJohani, achiti, “Makaenda kurenje kundoonei? Rutsanga runozunguzwa nemhepo here?" 
Matthew11:8 Ko makaenderei? Kundoona munhu akapfeka hanzu dzakapfavirira here? Munoziva kuti vanopfeka hanzu dzakapfavirira vari mudzimba dzamadzimambo. 
Matthew11:9 Ko zvino makaenderei? Kundoona muporofita here? Ndinokutii, ‘Hongu, uye munhu anotopfuura muporofita.’" 
Matthew11:10 Uyu ndiye uya akanyorwa nezvake zvichinzi, “ ‘Tarira ndinotuma nhume yangu; ichafanokugadzirira nzira yako pamberi pako.’" 
Matthew11:11 Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri, kuna vose vakazvarwa navakadzi, hakuna mukuru kupinda Johani Muombeki asi mudiki wokupedzisira muumambo hwedenga mukuru kwaari." 
Matthew11:12 Kubvira pamazuva aJohani Muombeki kusvikira iye zvino, umambo hwedenga hwakapinda mukurwiswa uye vanhu vechisimba vari kuhupamba." 
Matthew11:13 Nokuti vaporofita vose nomutemo zvakaporofita kudzamara pana Johani. 
Matthew11:14 Kana muchida zvenyu kuzvibvuma iye ndiye Eriya uya ainzi achauya. 
Matthew11:15 Ane nzeve dzokunzwa ngaanzwe. 
Matthew11:16 “Ko chizvarwa chino ndingachienzanise neiko? Chakafanana navana vagere pamisika vachidaidzira kuna vamwe vavo vachiti," 
Matthew11:17 ‘Takakuridzirai nyere, asi hamuna kutamba. Takaungudza, asi imi hamuna kuchema;" 
Matthew11:18 nokuti Johani akauya asingadyi kana kunwa asi vanhu vakati ano mweya wakaipa. 
Matthew11:19 Mwanakomana womunhu akauya achidya uye achinwa.’ Vanhu vakati, ‘Tarisai muone munhu uyu ane nhafu uye chidhakwa neshamwari yavateresi navatadzi.’ Asi ungwaru hunopembedzwa namabasa aho.”" 
Matthew11:20 Jesu akatanga kutsiura maguta maakanga aita zvishamiso zvake zvizhinji nokuti havana kutendeuka. 
Matthew11:21 Akati, “Zvichakuwana zvako iwe Korezeini; zvichakuwana iwe Bhetisaidha nokuti dai kuri kuti zvishamiso zvakaitwa mamuri zvakaitwa muTire nomuSidhoni, vangadai vakapinduka kare kare vakatopfeka masaga nokuzvizora madota." 
Matthew11:22 Ndinokutaurirai kuti pazuva rokutongwa, zvichava nyore kuguta reTire nereSidhoni panemi." 
Matthew11:23 Ko iwe Kapenaumu uchasimudzirwa kudenga here? Uchatodzikiswa kunzvimbo yavafi. Dai zvishamiso zvakaitwa mauri zvakaitwa muguta reSodhomu ringadai richimire nanhasi uno. 
Matthew11:24 Chandinokutaurirai ndechokuti, ‘Pazuva rokutongwa, zvichava nyore kunyika yeSodhomu panewe.’ ”" 
Matthew11:25 Ipapo Jesu akati, “Ndinokutendai Baba, Tenzi wedenga napasi kuti makavanza zvinhu izvi kuna vakachenjera navanonzwisisa mukazvizivisa kuvana vaduku." 
Matthew11:26 Hongu Baba, aya madiro enyu." 
Matthew11:27 Zvinhu zvose zvakaiswa mumaoko angu naBaba vangu; uye hakuna anoziva Mwanakomana kusiya Baba uyewo hakuna anoziva Baba kusiya Mwanakomana nouyo anenge asarudzwa zvake naMwanakomana kuti amuzivise kwaari. 
Matthew11:28 “Uyai kwandiri imi mose makaremerwa, makatakura mutoro unorema, ini ndichakuzorodzai." 
Matthew11:29 Torai joko rangu mudzidze kwandiri nokuti ndine mwoyo munyoro uye ndakazvirereka muchazviwanira mwoyo yenyu zororo 
Matthew11:30 nokuti joko rangu rakanaka uye mutoro wangu wakareruka.” 
Matthew12:1 Neimwe nguva Jesu aifamba nomuminda yekoroni nomusi weSabata. Vadzidzi vake vakanga vava nenzara, vakatanga kupurura hura dzekoroni vachidya." 
Matthew12:2 VaFarisei pavakazviona vakati kwaari, “Tarisai muone vadzidzi venyu vari kuita zvisingabvumirwi nomutemo pamusi reSabata.”" 
Matthew12:3 Iye akati kwavari, “Hamuna here kumboverenga zvakaitwa naDhavhidhi paakanga ava nenzara pamwechete nevaakanga ainavo" 
Matthew12:4 kuti akapinda mumba maMwari akadya chingwa chakanga chakasumwa kuna Mwari chaakanga asingabvumirwi, pamutemo, uye navakanga vainaye kuti vadye kusiya vapristi bedzi." 
Matthew12:5 Kana kuti hamuna kuverenga here mubhuku romutemo kuti pamusi weSabata muTemberi, vapristi vanon'oresa Sabata asi vasingapari mhosva." 
Matthew12:6 Asi ndinokutaurirai kuti pano pane zvakakura kupinda Temberi. 
Matthew12:7 Dai zvenyu maiziva zvinoreva izvi zvokuti, ‘Chandinoda ini itsitsi kwete chibayiro, mungadai musina kupa mhosva vasina mhosva" 
Matthew12:8 nokuti Mwanakomana womunhu ndiye Tenzi weSabata.’ ” 
Matthew12:9 Akabvapo akandopinda mune imwe sinagogu yavo. 
Matthew12:10 Imomo maiva nomunhu aiva noruoko rwakakokonyara. Vakamubvunza kuti zviri pamutemo here kuporesa nomusi weSabata kuti vamupe mhosva. 
Matthew12:11 Iye akati kwavari, “Ndiani wenyu angati kana ane hwai imwechete ikawira mugomba nezuva reSabata asingaibati achiiburitsa?" 
Matthew12:12 Ko munhu anokosha zvakadii kupinda hwai? Ipapo zviri pamutemo kuita zvakanaka pamusi weSabata.” 
Matthew12:13 Akabva ati kumurume uya, “Tambanudza ruoko rwako.” Iye akabva arutambanudza ndokubva rwatwasanuka pakare rwave rutano sorumwe." 
Matthew12:14 Asi vaFarisei vakabuda vakandoita bangano rokuti vangamuparadze sei. 
Matthew12:15 Jesu paakaziva izvi, akabva abva ikoko. Vanhu vazhinji vakamutevera akavarapa vose." 
Matthew12:16 Akavakohomedza kuti vasamuzivise kuvanhu. 
Matthew12:17 Izvi zvakaitika kuti zvizadzise zviya zvakataurwa nomuporofita Isaya zvokuti," 
Matthew12:18 “Tarirai muone muranda wangu wandakasarudza, wangu chaiye wapamwoyo wandinofarira. Ndichaisa Mweya wangu paari iye achaparidza kutonga kwakarurama kune vechirudzi." 
Matthew12:19 Haazoiti gakava kana kudaidzira hapana achanzwa izwi rake mumigwagwa. 
Matthew12:20 Rutsanga runenge rwatyoka haarudimburi, rambi rine tambo ine kamoto kanoti roi roi haaridzimi, kusvikira ruenzaniso rwakunda" 
Matthew12:21 muzita rake vechirudzi vachava netariro.” 
Matthew12:22 Kwakauiswa kwaari bofu raive mbeveve rine mweya wakaipa akariporesa zvokuti mbeveve iya yakataura ikakwanisa kuona. 
Matthew12:23 Vanhu vose vakashamiswa vakati, “Uyu angave mwana waDhavhidhi here uyu?”" 
Matthew12:24 VaFarisei pavakazvinzwa vakati, “Munhu uyu anodzinga mweya yakaipa nesimba raBherizebhuru chete jinda remweya yakaipa.”" 
Matthew12:25 Jesu pamusana pokuziva pfungwa dzavo akati kwavari, “Umambo hupi nohupi hunozvirwisa hunoparara. Hakunawo guta kana imba inozvirwisa ingagone kumira." 
Matthew12:26 Zvino Satani kana achidzinga Satani, ari kutozvirwisa iye pachake. Umambo hwake hungamire sei?" 
Matthew12:27 “Kana ndichidzinga mweya yakaipa nesimba raBherizebhuru, ko vanhu venyu vanoidzinga nesimba raani? Ivo ndivo vachakukonesai." 
Matthew12:28 Zvino kana ndichidzinga mweya yakaipa noMweya waMwari, saka umambo hwaMwari hwatosvika pamuri." 
Matthew12:29 Kana kuti zvingaitike sei kutoti munhu angapinde mumba merume rine simba achipamba zvinhu zvaro, asi kuti atanga arisunga, ndokuzopamba zvemba yaro." 
Matthew12:30 “Uyo asineni, ari kurwisana neni; asingaunganidzi neni, anoparadza." 
Matthew12:31 Naizvozvo ndinokutaurirai kuti, chitadzo chipi nechipi zvacho nokushonha Mwari kupi nokupi zvako kunoregererwa vanhu, asi kushonha Mweya hakuregererwi." 
Matthew12:32 Uyo anotaura chinhu chakaipa nezvoMwanakomana womunhu acharegererwa asi uyo anotaura zvakaipa nezvaMweya Mutsvene haaregererwi, muupenyu huno kana muupenyu huchauya." 
Matthew12:33 “Itai kuti muti uve wakanaka, muchero wawo uchavawo wakanaka; itai kuti muti uve wakaipa muchero wawo uchavawo wakaipa, nokuti muti unozivikanwa nomuchero wawo." 
Matthew12:34 Imi vana venyoka, mungataure sei zvakanaka imi makaipa, nokuti muromo unotaura zvinenge zvichitofashukira mumwoyo." 
Matthew12:35 Munhu wakanaka anoburitsa zvinhu zvakanaka zvichibva muupfumi hwake hwakanaka. Munhu wakaipa anoburitsawo mudura rake rouipi. 
Matthew12:36 Ndinokutaurirai kuti pazuva rokutongwa, vanhu vachazvidavirira izwi rimwe nerimwe ravanotaura zvisina mwero" 
Matthew12:37 nokuti mazwi ako ndiwo achakupembedza uye mazwi ako ndiwo achakubatisa nemhosva.” 
Matthew12:38 Dzimwe nyanzvi dzomutemo navaFarisei vakati kwaari, “Mudzidzisi tingade kuona chiratidzo chinobva kwamuri.”" 
Matthew12:39 Asi iye akavapindura achiti, “Chizvarwa chakaipa uye chenzenza chinotsvaka chiratidzo, asi hapana chiratidzo chachichapiwa kusiya kwaJona sechiratidzo." 
Matthew12:40 Sezvakangoita Jona akagara mazuva matatu nousiku hutatu ari mudumbu mezihove, ndizvozvowo zvichaita Mwanakomana womunhu, achava pasi penyika siku nesikati kwamazuva matatu." 
Matthew12:41 Pazuva rokutongwa, vanhu veNinivhe vachasimuka vachipa mhosva chizvarwa ichi vachichibata nemhosva nokuti vakatendeuka pakaparidza Jona. Asi onai pano pane chakakura kupinda Jona." 
Matthew12:42 Pazuva rokutongwa Mambokadzi wokumaodzanyemba achasimuka achipa mhosva chizvarwa ichi achichibata nemhosva nokuti iye akabva kwakaperera nyika kuzonzwa ungwaru hwaSoromoni asi pano pano mukuru kupinda Soromoni. 
Matthew12:43 “Kana mweya wakaipa wabuda mumunhu, unopfuura nomunzvimbo dzisina mvura uchitsvaka pokuzororera, asi unopashaya." 
Matthew12:44 Zvino unozoti, regai ndidzokere kumba kwangu kwandakabva. Kana wasvika unosvikoiwana isina chirimo yakatsvairwa yakanyatsorongedzwa." 
Matthew12:45 Ipapo unobva waenda wondounza mimwe mweya minomwe yakaipa kupinda iwo. Inopinda yogara imomo. Mhedziso yomunhu iyeyo inoipa kupinda pokutanga. Ndizvo zvichaitika kuchizvarwa chino ichi chakaipa.” 
Matthew12:46 Paakanga achiri kutaura kugungano riya ravanhu, amai vake navakoma navanun'una naye vakanga vatomira panze vachikumbira kutaura naye. [" 
Matthew12:47 Naizvozvo mumwe munhu akamutaurira kuti, “Amai venyu navakoma navanun'una venyu vamire panze, vari kukumbira kutaura nemi.”]" 
Matthew12:48 Jesu akapindura munhu akanga amuudza achiti, “Ko amai vangu ndiani vakoma navanun'una vangu ndavanani?”" 
Matthew12:49 Akatambanudza ruoko kuna vadzidzi vake achiti, “Ava ndivo amai vangu navakoma navanun'una vangu!" 
Matthew12:50 Nokuti aninaani anoita kuda kwaBaba vangu vari kudenga ndiye mukoma nomunun'una neni nehanzvadzi naamai vangu.” 
Matthew13:1 Nezuva iroro Jesu akabva mumba muya akandogara pamahombekombe egungwa. 
Matthew13:2 Akaunganirwa nechita chikuru chavanhu zvokuti akatozokwira mugwa ogaramo. Gungano rose ndokuti chechetere kumira pamahombekombe. 
Matthew13:3 Akavataurira zvinhu zvizhinji nemienzaniso achiti: “Mukushi akaenda kundokusha mbeu. 
Matthew13:4 Paakanga achikusha kudaro, dzimwe mbeu dzakandowira munzira. Shiri dzakauya dzikadzidya." 
Matthew13:5 Dzimwe dzakawira parukangarahwe padzisina kuwana ivhu rakadzika. Dzakabva dzakurumidza kumera nokuti dzakanga dzisina ivhu rakawanda. 
Matthew13:6 Kuzoti zuva rakwira dzakatsva. Sezvo dzakanga dzisina midzi; dzakashwauruka. 
Matthew13:7 Dzimwe dzakandowira muminzwa. Minzwa yakakura ikadzivhunga. 
Matthew13:8 Dzimwe dzakawira muvhu rakanaka dzikabereka mbesa. Dzimwe dzakaita zana, dzimwe makumi matanhatu. Dzimwe makumi matatu." 
Matthew13:9 Ane nzeve dzokunzwa ngaanzwe.” 
Matthew13:10 Vadzidzi vakazouya kwaari vakati, “Munotaurirei kwavari nemienzaniso?”" 
Matthew13:11 Iye akavapindura achiti, “Imi makapiwa ruzivo rwezvakavandika zvoumambo hwokudenga. Asi ivo havana kuzvipiwa" 
Matthew13:12 nokuti uyo anazvo achawedzerwa zvimwe achitova nezvakawandisa. Asi uyo asina, kunyange chaanacho achachitorerwa." 
Matthew13:13 Ndokusaka ndichitaura kwavari nemienzaniso: “Nokutarisa vanotarisa zvavo asi vasingaoni uye kunzwa vanonzwa zvavo; asi havateereri kana kunzwisisa. 
Matthew13:14 Kwavari zvinobva zvazadziswa zvakataurwa nomuporofita Isaya achiti, ‘Zvokuteereresa regaika zvenyu kuteerera handiti mungadaro mukazonzwisisa, kana zvokutarisa regai zvenyu kutarisisa mungadaroka mukazonyatsoona." 
Matthew13:15 Nokuti mwoyo yavanhu ava yakasindimara, vakatyorera zvimiti munzeve, vakatsinzinya maziso nokuti vangadaro vakaona nameso avo; vakanzwa nenzeve dzavo uye vangadaro vakanzwisisa mumwoyo mavo vakazopindukira kwandiri ndikavaponesa.’" 
Matthew13:16 “Akakomborerwa zvawo maziso enyu nokuti anoona nenzeve dzenyu nokuti dzinonzwa. 
Matthew13:17 Zvechokwadi chokwadi ndinoti kwamuri vaporofita vazhinji navanhu vakarurama vaisuwira kuona zvamuri kuona asi havana kuzviona uye kunzwa zvamuri kunzwa asi havana kuzvinzwa. 
Matthew13:18 “Chinzwisisai muenzaniso uya womukushi. 
Matthew13:19 Kana munhu akanzwa mashoko oumambo uhu asinganzwisisi, muipi anouya obvuta zvinenge zvadyarwa mumwoyo make. Ndivo vakadyarwa munzira." 
Matthew13:20 Yakadyarwa parukangarahwe, ndiye uya anonzwa shoko obva arigamuchira norufaro" 
Matthew13:21 asi haana mudzi maari anotirira kwechinguva. Kana nhamo namatambudziko zvamuka pamusana peshoko, anobva atsauka." 
Matthew13:22 Yakadyarwa muminzwa ndouyo anonzwa izwi asi kuzvidya mwoyo nezvapanyika nokutorwa mwoyo noupfumi, zvinovhunga izwi, rokundikana kubereka muchero." 
Matthew13:23 Asi yakadyarwa muvhu rakanaka, ndouyo anonzwa shoko achirinzwisisa uye anobereka muchero achikohwa mumwe zana, mumwewo makumi matanhatu mumwe makumi matatu.”" 
Matthew13:24 Akavataurira mumwe muenzaniso achiti, “Umambo hwedenga hungafananidzwe nomunhu akadyara mbeu yakanaka mumunda make." 
Matthew13:25 Asi vanhu vakarara, muvengi wake akauya akadyara sawi mukati mekoroni akabva aenda." 
Matthew13:26 Padzakabuda dzikatumbuka sawi rakaonekwawo.” 
Matthew13:27 Vashandi vepamba ipapo vakauya vakati kwaari, “Changamire, hamuna kudyara mbeu yakanaka here mumunda menyu? Ko sawi rakazobva kupi?”" 
Matthew13:28 Iye akati kwavari, “Muvengi ndiye akaita izvi.” Vashandi vakati kwaari, “Mungade here kuti tindoridzura?”" 
Matthew13:29 Asi iye akati, “Kwete, mungadaro mukadzipurirana nekoroni pamunenge muchidzura sawi." 
Matthew13:30 Regai zvikurirane pamwechete kusvikira panguva yokukohwa. Panguva yokukohwa ndichataurira vakohwi kuti, ‘Tangai kuunganidza sawi murisunge muzvisumbu kuti zvipiswe muunganidze koroni muitutire mudura rangu.’ ”" 
Matthew13:31 Akavataurira mumwe muenzaniso achiti, “Umambo hwedenga hwakaita setsanga yemasitadhi yakatorwa nomunhu akaidyara mumunda make." 
Matthew13:32 Ndiyo tsanga dukuduku pane dzimwe tsanga dzose. Asi kana ichinge yakura inoita gwenzi guru kupinda mamwe ose, ichizova muti, zvokuti shiri dzedenga dzinouya dzichizoita matendere adzo mumapazi awo.”" 
Matthew13:33 Jesu akavataurira mumwe muenzaniso achiti, “Umambo hwedenga hwakaita sembiriso yakatorwa nomumwe mudzimai akaisanganisa nezviereso zvitatu zvoupfu hwekoroni kusvikira mukanyiwa wose wafuta.”" 
Matthew13:34 Jesu akataura zvose izvi kugungano ravanhu nemienzaniso. Hapana zvaaimbovataurira asingashandisi mienzaniso. 
Matthew13:35 Izvi zvaizadzisa zvakambotaurwa nomuporofita zvokuti, “Ndichazarura muromo wangu ndichitaura nemienzaniso. Ndichadudzira zvakavandika zvapasichigare.”" 
Matthew13:36 Akabva pagungano ravanhu akapinda mumba. Vadzidzi vake vakauya kwaari vachiti, “Titsanangurirei muenzaniso wesawi romumunda.”" 
Matthew13:37 Jesu akapindura achiti, “Anodyara mbeu yakanaka ndiye Mwanakomana womunhu." 
Matthew13:38 Munda wacho ndiyo nyika. Mbeu yakanaka ndivo vana voumambo. Sawi ndivo vana vomuipi. 
Matthew13:39 Muvengi akaridyara ndiDhiabhori. Kukohwa ndiko kuguma kwapasi. Vakohwi ndivo vatumwa. 
Matthew13:40 Sokuunganidzwa kunoitwa sawi richipiswa nomoto ndizvo zvichaitwawo pakuguma kwapasi. 
Matthew13:41 Mwanakomana womunhu achatuma vatumwa vake. Vachaunganidza vagobvisa muumambo hwake vose vanokonzera vanhu kutadza navose vanoita zvakaipa 
Matthew13:42 vachivakanda muvira romoto. Ikoko vanhu vachachema vachirumanidza mazino. 
Matthew13:43 Vakarurama vachapenya sezuva muumambo hwababa vavo. Ane nzeve dzokunzwa ngaanzwe. 
Matthew13:44 “Umambo hwodenga hwakaita soupfumi hwakavigwa mumunda hunoti kana munhu ahuwana anohuvigazve. Pamusana pokufara, anoenda ondotengesa zvose zvaanazvo otenga munda iwoyo." 
Matthew13:45 “Uyewo umambo hwedenga hwakaita somunhu anoshava matombo amapera anokosha 
Matthew13:46 anoti kana awana pera rimwechete rinokosha kwazvo, anoenda ondotengesa zvose zvaanazvo oritenga." 
Matthew13:47 “Umambo hwedenga hwakafananazve nousvasvi hwakakandwa mugungwa hukakukudza hove dzorudzi norudzi. 
Matthew13:48 Pahwakanga hwazara, vakahukwevera pamahombekombe. Vakagara pasi vachisarudza dzakanaka vachiisa mumidziyo vachirasa dzakaipa." 
Matthew13:49 Ndizvozvo zvichaitwawo pakuguma kwapasi. Vatumwa vachabuda vachindokamura vakaipa kubva muna vakarurama 
Matthew13:50 vachivakanda mubisiro romoto. Imomo vanhu vachachema vachirumanidza mazino. 
Matthew13:51 “Manyatsonzwisisa here zvose izvi?” Ivo vakati kwaari, “Hongu.”" 
Matthew13:52 Iye akati kwavari, “Sokudaro nyanzvi yose yomutemo yakanyatsodzidziswa zvomutemo woumambo hwedenga, yakafanana nasaimba anoburitsa mudura rake zvitsva nezvitsaru.”" 
Matthew13:53 Jesu paakapedza mienzaniso iyi, akabvapo oenda." 
Matthew13:54 Paakasvika kunyika yokwake, akavadzidzisa musinagogu mavo zvokuti vakashamiswa vachiti, “Munhu uyu akawanepi ungwaru uhu nezvishamiso izvi?" 
Matthew13:55 Haasiri iye here mwanakomana womuvezi? Amai vake handivo here vanonzi Maria? Ko vana Jemusi naJosefi naSimoni naJudhasi havasi mukoma nomunun'una naye here? 
Matthew13:56 Inga hanzvadzi dzake dzose tinadzo wani. Ko munhu uyu, zvose izvi akazviwana kupi?”" 
Matthew13:57 Vakagumbuka naye. Jesu akati kwavari, “Muporofita anoremekedzwa kumwe kose kusiya munyika make nomumusha make.”" 
Matthew13:58 Haana kukwanisa kuita zvishamiso zvizhinji ikoko nokuda kokusatenda kwavo. 
Matthew14:1 Panguva iyoyo Herodhi, mumwe wavatongi vana akanzwa zvomukurumbira waJesu akati kumakurukota ake," 
Matthew14:2 “Uyu ndiJohani Muombeki akamutswa muvafi, ndokusaka achigona kuita zvishamiso izvi”" 
Matthew14:3 nokuti Herodhi akanga abata Johani akamusunga ndokumuisa mujeri pamusana paHerodhiasi mudzimai womunun'una wake Firipi. 
Matthew14:4 Chikonzero ndechokuti Johani akanga amuti, “Hazvibvumirwi, pamutemo, kuti agare naye.”" 
Matthew14:5 Kunyange zvazvo aida kumuuraya aitya vanhu nokuti vaimutora somuporofita. 
Matthew14:6 Asi pakasvika zuva rokupemberera kuberekwa kwaHerodhi, mukunda waHerodhiasi akatamba pamberi pechikwata chose chavanhu akafadza Herodhi" 
Matthew14:7 zvokuti akatsidza nemhiko kumupa chose zvacho chaangakumbire. 
Matthew14:8 Asokwa mashoko naamai vake akati, “Ndipei, musoro waJohani Muombeki mudhishi iye zvino.”" 
Matthew14:9 Mambo zvakamutambudza mwoyo asi nokuda kwemhiko dzake uye pamusanawo pavaenzi vake akati ngaapiwe. 
Matthew14:10 Akatuma munhu kuti andodimura musoro waJohani mujeri. 
Matthew14:11 Musoro wake wakaunzwa uri mudhishi ukapiwa kumusikana. Iyewo akaenda nawo kuna amai vake. 
Matthew14:12 Vadzidzi vaJohani vakauya vakatora chitunha ichocho vakachiviga. Vakaenda vakandotaurira Jesu. 
Matthew14:13 Jesu paakanzwa izvi, akabva ipapo negwa akaenda kunzvimbo isina vanhu, kwake oga. Voruzhinji rwavanhu pavakazvinzwa vakatevera ikoko netsoka vachibva mumaguta." 
Matthew14:14 Paakabuda mugwa pamahombekombe, akaona chita chikuru chavanhu. Akavanzwira tsitsi akaporesa varwere vavo." 
Matthew14:15 Zuva parakanga rava kuda kudoka, vadzidzi vake vakauya kwaari vakati, “Muno murenje uye kwava kudoka. Dai machiendesa vanhu vaende mumisha vandozvitengera zvokudya.”" 
Matthew14:16 Jesu akati, “Havafaniri kuenda. Vapei iyemi zvokudya.”" 
Matthew14:17 Vakati kwaari, “Pano tinongova nezvingwa zvishanu nehove mbiri chete.”" 
Matthew14:18 Iye akati, “Uyai nazvo kuno kwandiri.”" 
Matthew14:19 Akati vanhu ngavagare pasi pauswa. Akatora zvingwa zviya zvishanu nehove mbiri. Akatarisa kudenga, ndokukomborera, ndokumedura, akapa zvingwa zviya kuvadzidzi. Vadzidzi vakazvipa kuvanhu." 
Matthew14:20 Vose vakadya vakaguta. Vakaunganidza tswanda gumi nembiri dzizere dzezvimedu zvakasara. 
Matthew14:21 Vanhu vakadya vaiva zviuru zvishanu zvavarume tisingaverengi zvedu vakadzi navana. 
Matthew14:22 Pakarepo akagombedzera vadzidzi kuti vakwire mugwa kuti vafanotungamira kumhiri; iye oonekana negungano riya ravanhu. 
Matthew14:23 Paakapedza kuonekana negungano riya ravanhu akakwira mugomo ari oga kundonamata. Paakanga ava madeko, akanga arimo ari oga." 
Matthew14:24 Asi igwa, panguva iyoyo, rakanga rava makiromita akawanda kubva kumahombekombe richiitwa suku nasai namafungu nokuti mhepo yakanga yakanangana navo." 
Matthew14:25 Kuzoti yava nguva yomurirakamwe akauya kwavari achifamba pamusoro pegungwa. 
Matthew14:26 Asi vadzidzi pavakamuona achifamba pamusoro pegungwa vakatya zvikuru vachiti, “Idzimudzangara.” Vakaridza mhere nokutya." 
Matthew14:27 Pakarepo Jesu akabva ataura kwavari achiti, “Tsungai mwoyo, ndini. Musatye.”" 
Matthew14:28 Ipapo Pita akati, “Tenzi kana murimi, itii ndiuye kwamuri ndichifambawo pamusoro pemvura.”" 
Matthew14:29 Iye akati, “Uya.” Pita akabuda mugwa akafamba napamusoro pemvura achienda kuna Jesu." 
Matthew14:30 Pita paakaona mhepo, akatya. Akatangisa kunyura ndokudaidzira achiti, “Tenzi ndiponesei.”" 
Matthew14:31 Pakarepo Jesu akabva atambanudza ruoko rwake akamubata achiti kwaari, “Inga une chitendero chiduku. Wakahadzikireiko.”" 
Matthew14:32 Pavakakwira mugwa, mhepo yakabva yanyarara." 
Matthew14:33 Vaya vaiva mugwa vakamugwadamira vachiti, “Zvechokwadi imi muri Mwanakomana waMwari.”" 
Matthew14:34 Zvino kuzoti vayambuka mhiri, vakasvika kuGenezareti." 
Matthew14:35 Varume voko pavakamuziva, vakatuma nhume kunharaunda iyoyo yose vakaunza kwaari vose vairwara." 
Matthew14:36 Vakamukumbirisa kuti vangobatawo mupendero wehanzu yake. Vose vakaibata vakaporeswa. 
Matthew15:1 Kwakazouya vaFarisei nenyanzvi dzomutemo kuna Jesu vachibva kuJerusaremu vachiti," 
Matthew15:2 “Sei vadzidzi venyu vachidarika tsika dzamagamuchidzanwa dzamadzitateguru? Nokuti havashambi maoko avo pavanodya.” 
Matthew15:3 Jesu akavapindura achiti, “Ko imi munodarikirei mutemo waMwari nokuda kwamagamuchidzanwa enyu?" 
Matthew15:4 Nokuti Mwari, akati, ‘Remekedza Baba naamai vako uye kuti munhu anotaura zvakaipa nezvababa kana amai vake anofanira kuti afe.’" 
Matthew15:5 Asi imi munoti, kana munhu akataurira baba vake kana amai vake achiti, ‘Zvandakanga ndichigona kuzokubatsirai nazvo ndazvipira kuna Mwari, haazosungirwa kuremekedza baba vake.’" 
Matthew15:6 Saizvozvo nokuda kwamagamuchidzanwa enyu, makaita kuti shoko raMwari rishaye maturo." 
Matthew15:7 Imi vanyengedzi, Isaya akaporofita zvechokwadi nezvenyu paakati," 
Matthew15:8 “ ‘Vanhu ava vanondikudza zvapamuromo chete asi mwoyo yavo iri kure neni. 
Matthew15:9 Kundinamata kwavo ndekwenhando vachidzidzisa, sechokwadi, mitemo yavanhu.’ ”" 
Matthew15:10 Jesu akadaidza vanhu ndokuti kwavari, “Teererai munzwisise, “Munhu haan'oreswe nezvinopinda mukanwa make" 
Matthew15:11 asi zvinobuda mukanwa make ndizvo zvinon'oresa munhu.” 
Matthew15:12 Vadzidzi vake vakauya vakati kwaari, “Munoziva here kuti vaFarisei vakagumbuka pavakanzwa zvamakataura zviya.”" 
Matthew15:13 Iye akati, “Chose chisina kudyarwa naBaba vangu chichadzipurwa." 
Matthew15:14 Varegei vakadaro, mapofu avatungamiri. Zvino kana bofu, rikatungamirira rimwe bofu vachawira vose mugomba.”" 
Matthew15:15 Asi Pita akati kwaari, “Titsanangurirei muenzaniso uyu.”" 
Matthew15:16 Jesu ndokuti, “Nemiwo hamunzwisise nhai?" 
Matthew15:17 Hamuoni here kuti chinhu chose chinopinda mukanwa chinopfuura nomudumbu chichizobva chorasirwa kunze. 
Matthew15:18 Asi chinobuda mukanwa momunhu chinobva mumwoyo, ndicho chinon'oresa munhu." 
Matthew15:19 Nokuti mumwoyo ndimo munobva pfungwa dzakaipa dzinoti, umhondi noupombwe nokufeva nokuba nokurevera vamwe nhema uye kutaura zvakaipa nezvavamwe." 
Matthew15:20 Izvi ndizvo zvinon'oresa munhu asi zvokudya usina kushamba maoko hazvin'orese munhu.” 
Matthew15:21 Jesu akabvapo akaenda kudunhu reTire neSidhoni. 
Matthew15:22 Hoyo mumwe mudzimai wechiKanani, womudunhu iroro, akauya achichema achiti, “Ndinzwireiwo tsitsi, Tenzi, Mwanakomana waDhavhidhi; mwanasikana wangu akagarwa zvakanyanya nomweya wakaipa.”" 
Matthew15:23 Asi Jesu haana chaakamupindura. Vadzidzi vake vakauya vakamukumbira vachiti, “Mutaurirei aende nokuti ari kutitevera achichema.”" 
Matthew15:24 Iye akapindura achiti, “Ini ndakatumwa kuhwai dzakarasika dzemba yaIsiraeri.”" 
Matthew15:25 Asi mudzimai uya akauya akapfugama pamberi pake achiti, “Tenzi, ndibatsirei zvenyu.”" 
Matthew15:26 Jesu akamupindura achiti, “Hazvina kunaka kutora chingwa chavana uchichikanda kuimbwa.”" 
Matthew15:27 Mudzimai uya akati, “Hongu zvazvo Tenzi; asi kunyange mbwanana dzinodya tumedu tunodonha pateburu yavatenzi vadzo.”" 
Matthew15:28 Jesu akamupindura achiti, “Iwe mudzimai chitendero chako chikuru! Ngazviitwe sokuda kwako.” Mwanasikana wake akabva anaya pakarepo." 
Matthew15:29 Jesu akabva ikoko akazopfuura achitevedza gungwa reGarirea. Akakwira muchikomo ndokugara pasi imomo. 
Matthew15:30 Zvita zvavanhu zvakawanda zvakauya kwaari. Vakaungana kwaari nemhetamakumbo navakaremara namapofu nembeveve navamwe vakadaro. Vakavaisa patsoka dzake. Iye akavaporesa 
Matthew15:31 zvokuti gurusvusvu riya ravanhu rakashamiswa, pavakaona mbeveve dzichitaura, zvirema zvaita zvakanaka nemhetamakumbo dzavakufamba namapofu avakuona. Vakarumbidza Mwari wavaIsiraeri." 
Matthew15:32 Jesu akadaidza vadzidzi vake akati, “Ndine urombo kwazvo negungano ravanhu iri nokuti vanga vaneni kwamazuva matatu aya zvino havachisina chokudya. Handide kuvaendesa nenzara vangadaro vakaziya panzira.”" 
Matthew15:33 Vadzidzi vakamubvunza kuti, “Tingawane kupi chingwa chinokwana kugutsa gungano guru ravanhu rakadai murenje muno?”" 
Matthew15:34 Jesu akati kwavari, “Mune zvingwa zvingani?” Ivo vakati, “Tine zvinomwe netuhove tushoma.”" 
Matthew15:35 Akati vanhu vagare pasi. 
Matthew15:36 Akatora zvingwa zviya zvinomwe nehove. Akatenda, ndokuzvimedura ozvipa kuvadzidzi. Vadzidzi vakazvipawo kuvanhu." 
Matthew15:37 Vose vakadya vakaguta. Vakanhongerera zvimedu zvakasara zvikazadza tswanda nomwe. 
Matthew15:38 Vakadya vacho vaiva zviuru zvina zvavarume tisingaverengi zvedu vakadzi navana. 
Matthew15:39 Jesu akazoendesa vanhu ndokukwira mugwa woenda kudunhu reMagadhani. 
Matthew16:1 VaFarisei navaSadhusei vakauya kuna Jesu vachikumbira chiratidzo chinobva kudenga kuri kumuedza zvavo. 
Matthew16:2 Iye akavapindura achiti, “Kumanheru munoti, ‘Kunze kuchange kwakanaka nokuti denga rinenge rakatsvukirira.’" 
Matthew16:3 Kumangwanani munoti, ‘Nhasi kuchaita dutu nokuti denga rakatsvuka uye riri kutozezesa.’ Munoziva kutsanangura zvinoreva kutarisika kunenge kwakaita kunze, asi hamukwanisi kutsanangura zvinoreva zviratidzo zvenguva dzino." 
Matthew16:4 Muri chizvarwa chakaipa chenzenza chinotsvaka chiratidzo. Hapana chiratidzo chichapiwa kusiya chiratidzo chaJona.” Akabva avasiya oenda. 
Matthew16:5 Vadzidzi pavakayambukira kumhiri kuya, vakanga vakanganwa kutakura chingwa." 
Matthew16:6 Jesu akati kwavari, “Chenjerai mungwarire mbiriso yavaFarisei navaSadhusei.”" 
Matthew16:7 Vakazvikurukura pachavo vachiti, “Hatina kuuya nechingwa.”" 
Matthew16:8 Jesu akazviziva akati, “Inga muri vanhu vechitendero chidiki. Ko munogokurukurirana zvokuti hamuna chingwa sei?" 
Matthew16:9 Nazvino hamusati mavakunzwisisa? Hamuyeuki here zvezvingwa zvishanu zvezviuru zvishanu zvavanhu? Uye kuti makaunganidza tswanda ngani? 
Matthew16:10 Ko nezvezvingwa zvinomwe zvezviuru zvina zvavanhu? Makaunganidza tswanda ngani? 
Matthew16:11 Ko munotadza nei kunzwisisa kuti handisi kutaura nezvechingwa. Chenjererai mbiriso yavaFarisei navaSadhusei.” 
Matthew16:12 Ipapo vakabva vanzwisisa kuti akanga asingavataurire kuchenjerera mbiriso yechingwa asi yedzidziso yavaFarisei neyavaSadhusei. 
Matthew16:13 Jesu paakasvika kudunhu reSezariafiripi, akabvunza vadzidzi vake achiti, “Vanhu vanoti Mwanakomana womunhu ndiani?”" 
Matthew16:14 Vakati, “Vamwe vanoti ndiJohani Muombeki vamwewo vachiti ndiEriya, vamwewo vachiti ndiJeremiya kana kuti mumwe wavaporofita.”" 
Matthew16:15 Akazoti kwavari, “Ko imi, munoti ndini ani?”" 
Matthew16:16 Simoni Pita akapindura achiti, “Ndimi Kristu chaiye Mwanakomana waMwari mupenyu.”" 
Matthew16:17 Jesu akamupindurawo achiti, “Zvako wakakomborerwa Simoni mwanakomana waJona, nokuti haasi munhu ane nyama neropa akakuzivisa izvi asi Baba vangu vari kudenga." 
Matthew16:18 Zvino ini ndinoti kwauri ndiwe Pita uye paruware urwu ndichavakira sangano rangu. Masimba erufu haachazorikuriri. 
Matthew16:19 Ndichakupa kii dzoumambo hwedenga. Chose chauchasunga pasi pano chichabva chasungwawo kudenga. Chose chauchasunungura pasi pano chichabva chasunungurwawo kudenga.” 
Matthew16:20 Ipapo Jesu akatsindidza vadzidzi vake kuti vasataurire kana munhu zvake kuti ndiye Mesia. 
Matthew16:21 Kubvira nguva iyoyo Jesu akatangisa kuratidza vadzidzi vake kuti anofanira kuenda kuJerusaremu achindotambudzika zvikuru zvichibva kuvakuru vakuru navapristi vakuru nenyanzvi dzomutemo ozouraiwa achizomutswa nezuva retatu. 
Matthew16:22 Pita akamutora ndokutanga kumutsiura achiti, “Mwari haangadaro Tenzi. Hazvimbofa zvakaitika kwamuri izvi.”" 
Matthew16:23 Jesu akatendeuka akati kuna Pita, “Ndibvirepo, Satani! Uri chipinganidzo, nokuti hausiri kudivi kwaMwari, asi kudivi kwavanhu.”" 
Matthew16:24 Jesu akataurira vadzidzi vake achiti, “Kana munhu achida kunditevera ngaazvirambe atakure muchinjikwa wake anditevere," 
Matthew16:25 nokuti uyo anoda kuponesa upenyu hwake acharasikirwa nahwo. Uyo anorasikirwa noupenyu hwake pamusana pangu achahuwana. 
Matthew16:26 Nokuti zvinobatsirei munhu kuwana zvinhu zvapasi pose, iye achirasikirwa noupenyu hwake. Kana kuti angabvisei chokutsinhanisa noupenyu hwake?" 
Matthew16:27 Nokuti Mwanakomana womunhu achauya navatumwa vake mumbiri yaBaba vake achizopa munhu nomunhu mubayiro wezvaakaita. 
Matthew16:28 Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri, kuna vamwe vamire pano vasingambofi vakaona rufu, vasati vaona Mwanakomana womunhu achiuya noumambo hwake.”" 
Matthew17:1 Mushure memazuva matanhatu, Jesu akatora Pita naJemusi naJohani munun'una wake akavatungamirira mugomo refu vari pachavo." 
Matthew17:2 Iye akasandurwa pamberi pavo. Uso hwake hwakapenya sezuva. Hanzu dzake dzakati mbuu kuchena sechiedza. 
Matthew17:3 Ndokubva Mosesi naEriya vaonekwa vachitaura naJesu. 
Matthew17:4 Pita akati kuna Jesu, “I — i, Tenzi, hakusi kunaka kwazvakaita ikoko kuti tive pano! Kana muchida zvenyu regai ndivake misasa mitatu pano. Mumwe wenyu mumwe waMosesi nomumwe waEriya.”" 
Matthew17:5 Achiri kutaura kudaro, hero gore rinopenya rakavafukidza; izwi rakabva mugore richiti, “Uyu ndiye Mwanakomana wangu wapamwoyo wandinofadzwa naye, zvikuru, munzwei.”" 
Matthew17:6 Vadzidzi pavakanzwa izvi vakati kota kota pasi nouso vabatwa nokutya kukuru. 
Matthew17:7 Asi Jesu akauya akavabata achiti, “Simukai musatye.”" 
Matthew17:8 Pavakazosimudza uso havana wavakaona kunze kwaJesu oga. 
Matthew17:9 Pavakanga vachiburuka mugomo, Jesu akavatsindidza kuti vasataurire munhu nezvechiratidzo ichocho, kusvikira Mwanakomana womunhu amutswa kuvakafa." 
Matthew17:10 Vadzidzi vakamubvunza kuti, “Ko pamusana pei nyanzvi dzomutemo dzichiti Eriya anofanira kutanga auya?”" 
Matthew17:11 Iye akati, “Hongu Eriya anofanira kuuya, achizodzorera zvinhu zvose pakare." 
Matthew17:12 Asi ndinokutaurirai kuti Eriya akatouya nechekare; asi havana kumuziva. Vakaita paari madiro avo. Saizvozvowo Mwanakomana womunhu achatambudzika ari mumaoko avo.” 
Matthew17:13 Vadzidzi vakabva vanzwisisa kuti aireva Johani Muombeki. 
Matthew17:14 Pavakasvika kumhomho yavanhu, mumwe murume akauya kwaari akapfugama pamberi pake" 
Matthew17:15 achiti, “Tenzi nzwirai tsitsi mwanakomana wangu nokuti anorwara netsviyo uye anotambura zvikuru. Kazhinji kaanowira mumoto uye kazhinji kaanowira mumvura." 
Matthew17:16 Ndamuunza kuna vadzidzi venyu asi havana kugona kumurapa.” 
Matthew17:17 Jesu akapindura achiti, “Aiwaiwa rudzi rusingatendi uru! Rudzi rwakarasika zvarwo. Ndichange ndinemi kusvikira rini? Ndichaita mwoyo murefu nemi kusvikira rini? Uyai naye kuno kwandiri.”" 
Matthew17:18 Jesu akamukarira, mweya wakaipa ukabva wabuda maari. Mukomana akabva arapwa pakarepo." 
Matthew17:19 Vadzidzi vakauya kuna Jesu vari pachavo voga. Vakati, “Ko isu tatadza nei kuudzinga?”" 
Matthew17:20 Iye akati kwavari, “Pamusana perudaviro rwenyu rwudiki nokuti zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri dai muine chitendero chakaita setsanga yemastadhi, maigona kuti kugomo iri ibva apo uende apo richibva rabva. Hapana chamainge musingakwanisi.”" 
Matthew17:21 *** 
Matthew17:22 Pavakanga vari pamwechete muGarirea Jesu akati kwavari, “Mwanakomana womunhu achaiswa mumaoko avanhu." 
Matthew17:23 Vachamuuraya asi mushure memazuva matatu achamutswa.” Vakabva vasuruvara zvikuru. 
Matthew17:24 Pavakasvika kuKapenaumu, vabhadharisi vomutero wehafu yemari yeshekeri vakaenda kuna Pita vakati, “Mudzidzisi wenyu haabhadhari mutero uyu here?”" 
Matthew17:25 Iye akati, “Hongu.” Paakadzoka kumba, Jesu ndiye akatanga kutaura kwaari achiti, “Unofunga kuti kudii Simoni? Ndavapi vanobvisiswa mutero nomuripo namadzimambo panyika? Vana vavo here kana kuti vamwe zvavo?”" 
Matthew17:26 Pita paakati vamwe zvavo. Jesu akati kwaari, “Saka vana havabhadhari, handiti?" 
Matthew17:27 Asi kuti tirege kuvagumbura enda kugungwa undokandamo chirauro utore hove yokutanga inenge yabatwa. Paunozarura muromo wayo uchawana shekeri. Ritore undobhadharira ini newe.” 
Matthew18:1 Nenguva iyoyo vadzidzi vakauya kuna Jesu vakati, “Ndiani mukuru kupinda vose muumambo hwedenga.”" 
Matthew18:2 Jesu akatora mwana akamuisa pakati pavo 
Matthew18:3 akati, “Chokwadi chaizvo ndinoti kwamuri kana mukasapinduka muchiva savana vaduku hamumbopinda muumambo hwedenga." 
Matthew18:4 Ani naani wose anozvirereka somwana uyu, ndiye mukuru kupinda vamwe vose muumambo hwedenga." 
Matthew18:5 Ani naani wose anogamuchira mwana muduku akaita souyu muzita rangu anogamuchira ini. 
Matthew18:6 “Aninaani anofurira mumwe wavaduku ava vanotenda mandiri kutadza, zvinotova nani kwaari kuti asungirirwe guyo mumutsipa make agonyudzwa pasi pasi pegungwa." 
Matthew18:7 Nhamo ndeyayo nyika pamusana pekufurira kwainoita! Kufuririka kunototi kuitike asi nhamo ndeyake munhu uyo anoita kuti vamwe vafuririke. 
Matthew18:8 “Kana ruoko rwako kana kuti rutsoka rwako ruchikukonzera kutadza rudimbure urwurase. Zviri nani kwauri kuti upinde muupenyu wakaremara kana kuti uri mhetamakumbo pano kukandwa mumoto usingadzimuki narini uina maoko maviri kana kuti tsoka mbiri. 
Matthew18:9 Kana ziso rako richikurasisa risvukunure urirase. Zviri nani kwauri kupinda muupenyu neziso rimwechete pano kukandwa mugomba romoto una maziso maviri. 
Matthew18:10 “Nyatsoonai kuti hamushori mumwe wevaduku ava nokuti ndinokutaurirai kuti kudenga vatumwa vavo vanogara vachiona uso hwaBaba vangu vari kudenga. 
Matthew18:11 *** 
Matthew18:12 “Munofungei, ngatitii munhu ane zana rehwai. Imwe yadzo ikarasika, haasii here dzimwe makumi mapfumbamwe ane pfumbamwe dziri mumakomo achienda kundotsvaka iya yakarasika?" 
Matthew18:13 Kana akaiwana, zvechokwadi ndinokutaurirai kuti anoifarira kupinda makumi mapfumbamwe ane pfumbamwe dzisina kumborasika." 
Matthew18:14 Saizvozvo Baba vangu vari kudenga havadi kuti mumwe wavadiki ava arasike. 
Matthew18:15 “Kana hama yako ikakutadzira, enda undotaurirana naye mhosva yake muri moga. Akakuteerera, watodzora hama yako." 
Matthew18:16 Asi akaramba kukuteerera, enda kwaari nomumwe kana vaviri kuti zvose zvamunotaura zvitsigirwe noumbowo hwezvapupu zviviri kana zvitatu." 
Matthew18:17 Kana akaramba kuvateerera, pira nyaya iyoyo kusangano. Kana akaramba kuteerera kunyange sangano, mutorei somuhedheni nomuteresi." 
Matthew18:18 “Zvechokwadi ndinoti kwamuri, chose chamuchasunga pasi pano chichasungwawo kudenga. Uye chose chamuchasunungura pasi pano nokudenga chichasunungurwawo." 
Matthew18:19 Chimwezve chandinokutaurira, ndechokuti, kana vaviri venyu panyika pano vakawirirana kukumbira chimwe chinhu vachachiitirwa naBaba vangu vari kudenga." 
Matthew18:20 Nokuti panenge paungana vaviri kana vatatu muzita rangu, ini ndiri pakati pavo.”" 
Matthew18:21 Pita akauya akati kuna Jesu, “Tenzi hama yangu ingandikanganisire kangani ndichiiregerera; tingati kanomwe here?”" 
Matthew18:22 Jesu akati kwaari, “Handikuti kanomwe asi makumi manomwe akapetwa kanomwe.”" 
Matthew18:23 Saizvozvo umambo hwedenga hungafananidzwe namambo akanga achida kupedzerana navaranda vake vaiva nezvikwereti naye. 
Matthew18:24 Paakatangisa kutaura nezvezvikwereti izvozvo, pakauiswa mumwe kwaari akanga aine chikwereti naye chegumi rezviuru zvemari yamatarenda." 
Matthew18:25 Nokuda kokuti akanga asingakwanisi kubhadhara, tenzi wake akati ngaatengeswe pamwechete nomudzimai wake navana nezvose zvaaiva nazvo kuti chikwereti chiripwe." 
Matthew18:26 Nezvo muranda uya akagwadama pasi achimuteterera achiti, “Tenzi ndiitireiwo mwoyo murefu. Ndichakudzorerai zvose zvazvo.”" 
Matthew18:27 Tenzi womuranda uyu akamunzwira tsitsi ndokubva amuti aende zvake ndokumuregerera chikwereti chake chiya. 
Matthew18:28 Asi muranda mumwecheteyo paakanga avakubuda, akasangana nomumwe mushandi pamwe naye, akanga ane chikwereti kwaari chezana remari yamadhenari. Akabva amuti dzvi pahuro, achiti, “Ndibhadhare chikwereti changu.”" 
Matthew18:29 Mumwe muranda uya mumwe wake akati pasi gwadagwa achimuteterera achiti, “Ingondiitirawo mwoyo murefu ndinokudzorera.”" 
Matthew18:30 Asi iye akaramba ndokuenda ondomuisa mujeri kusvikira abhadhara chikwereti. 
Matthew18:31 Vamwe vake, varandawo pamwe naye, pavakaona zvakanga zvaitika, zvakavatsamwisa kwazvo. Vakaenda vakandotaurira tenzi wavo zvose zvakanga zvaitika." 
Matthew18:32 Ipapo tenzi wake akamudaidza, akati kwaari, “Iwe muranda wakaipa, ndakakuregerera chikwereti chose chiya nokuti wakanditeterera." 
Matthew18:33 Wanga usingafaniriwo here kunzwira urombo muranda pamwe newe sokukunzwira tsitsi kwandakakuitira?” 
Matthew18:34 Tenzi wake akashatirwa akamuendesa kuvarangi mujeri, “Kusvikira abhadhara chikwereti chake chose." 
Matthew18:35 Ndizvo zvichaitawo Baba vangu vari kudenga kuno mumwe nomumwe wenyu kana musingaregererani nemwoyo wose.” 
Matthew19:1 Jesu paakapedza kutaura zvinhu izvi, akabva kuGarirea akaenda mudunhu reJudhea mhiri kwaJorodhani." 
Matthew19:2 Gurumwandira ravanhu rakamutevera akavaporesa ikoko. 
Matthew19:3 Zvino vamwe vaFarisei vakauya kwaari. Vakamuedza nokumubvunza vachiti, “Zvinobvumirwa here kuramba mukadzi wako pamusana pechikonzero chipi nechipi zvacho?”" 
Matthew19:4 Jesu akavapindura achiti, “Hamuna kuverenga here kuti iye akavasika kubvira pakutanga, akavasika vari murume nomukadzi" 
Matthew19:5 akati, ‘Nechikonzero ichochi murume achasiya baba naamai vake achiva akabatanidzwa nomukadzi wake.’ Vaviri ivavo vachiva nyama imwechete." 
Matthew19:6 Naizvozvo havachisiri vaviri asi vava nyama imwechete. Naizvozvo chinenge chabatanidzwa naMwari ngachirege kuparadzaniswa nomunhu.” 
Matthew19:7 Ivo vakati kwaari, “Ko Mosesi akazoitirei kuti murume anofanira kupa mukadzi wake tsamba yokumurambisa nayo achibva amuramba.”" 
Matthew19:8 Iye akati kwavari, “Pamusana pemwoyo yenyu yakaoma, Mosesi akakubvumirai kuramba vakadzi venyu. Asi kubvira pakutanga zvakanga zvisina kudaro." 
Matthew19:9 Uye ini ndinoti kwamuri, ani naani anoramba mukadzi wake kunze kokunge aita upombwe achizoroora mumwe anoita upombwe.”" 
Matthew19:10 Vadzidzi vakati kwaari, “Kana ari iwo mamiriro akaita zvinhu pane zvomurume nomukadzi zviri nani kusaroora.”" 
Matthew19:11 Asi iye akati kwavari, “Havasi vose vanogona kuzvitambira izvozvo asi avo chete vanenge vakatozvipiwa." 
Matthew19:12 Nokuti kune vamwe vanoita utsvimborume kubvira chiberekerwo chavo. Vamwe vanoitiswa tsvimborume navanhu. Navamwewo vanosarudza kuva tsvimborume pamusana poumambo hwedenga. Uyo anokwanisa kugashira izvi ngaazvigashire.” 
Matthew19:13 Zvino vamwe vanhu vakauisa vana kuna Jesu kuti aise maoko ake pavari achivanamatira. Vadzidzi vakarambidza vanhu ivavo. 
Matthew19:14 Asi Jesu akati, “Regai vana vaduku vauye kwandiri musavarambidze nokuti umambo hokudenga ndehwevakaita saivava.”" 
Matthew19:15 Akaisa maoko ake pamusoro pavo ndokubva aenda. 
Matthew19:16 Mumwe murume akauya kwaari achiti, “Mudzidzisi chii chakanaka chandingaite kuti ndiwane upenyu husingaperi?”" 
Matthew19:17 Jesu akati kwaari, “Unondibvunzireiko kuti chakanaka chii? Akanaka ariko mumwechete. Kana uchida kupinda muupenyu, chengeta mitemo.”" 
Matthew19:18 Iye akati, “Ipi yacho?” Jesu akati, “Inoti, usauraye, usaite upombwe, usabe, usaite uchapupu hwenhema." 
Matthew19:19 Remekedza baba naamai vako ugoda mumwe wako sokuda kwaunozviita iwe pachako.” 
Matthew19:20 Jaya riya rakati kwaari, “Yose iyi ndakaichengeta. Chimwe chandisina chii.”"
