Matthew19:21 Jesu akati kwaari, “Kana uchida kuva munhu akaruramisisa, enda undotengesa zvose zvaunazvo upe kuvarombo. Uchava noupfumi kudenga, ugouya wonditevera.”" 
Matthew19:22 Jaya riya parakazvinzwa rakaenda rasuruvara nokuti rakanga riine zvinhu zvakawanda. 
Matthew19:23 Jesu akati kuna vadzidzi vake, “Zvechokwadi ndinoti kwamuri, ‘Zvichaoma zvikuru kuti mupfumi apinde muumambo hwedenga.’" 
Matthew19:24 Ndinotizve kwamuri, zvirinyore kuti nghamera ipinde napaburi retsono panokuti mupfumi apinde muumambo hwaMwari.”" 
Matthew19:25 Vadzidzi pavakanzwa izvi vakashamiswa zvikuru vachiti, “Ko zvino ndiani angagone kuponeswa?”" 
Matthew19:26 Jesu akavatarisa akati kwavari, “Kuvanhu, izvi hazvigoneki asi pana Mwari zvinhu zvose zvinogoneka.”" 
Matthew19:27 Ipapo Pita akapindura achiti, “Tarisai muone, isu takasiya zvose tikakuteverai. Zvino tichawanei?”" 
Matthew19:28 Jesu akati kwavari, “Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri, ‘Pakumutsurudzwa kwezvinhu patsva, Mwanakomana womunhu paanenge ogara pachigaro chake chembiri, imi makanditevera muchagarawo pazvigaro gumi nezviviri muchitonga madzinza gumi namaviri eIsiraeri." 
Matthew19:29 Munhu wose akasiya dzimba kana vakoma navanun'una kana hanzvadzi kana baba kana amai kana vana kana minda pamusana pezita rangu, achagamuchira zvakapetwa kazana uye achizowana upenyu husingaperi." 
Matthew19:30 Asi vazhinji vokutanga vachava vokupedzisira, vokupedzisira vachava vokutanga.’ ”" 
Matthew20:1 Umambo hwedenga hwakaita sasamusha akafumoenda kundotsvaka vashandi vokushanda mumunda wake wamagirepisi. 
Matthew20:2 Akawirirana navashandi mari yapazuva yedhenari, ndokuvatuma kumunda wake wamagirepisi." 
Matthew20:3 Akazobudazve paawa yechipfumbamwe mangwanani akaona vamwe vakamira zvavo pamusika. 
Matthew20:4 Akavati, “Imi endaiwo mumunda wamagirepisi. Ndichakupaiwo zvinokodzera.”" 
Matthew20:5 Saizvozvo vakaenda. Akazobudazve paawa yegumi nembiri masikati neawa yechitatu masikati akaita zvimwechetezvo. 
Matthew20:6 Panguva inenge yechishanu zuva ravakuda kudoka akabuda akaona vamwe vakamira zvavo. Iye akati kwavari, “Ko munodarirei kungomira zvenyu kudai zuva rose musina chamuri kuita?”" 
Matthew20:7 Vakati kwaari, “Nokuti hapana atitora kuti atipewo basa.” Iye akati, “Nemiwo endaiwo mumunda wamagirepisi.”" 
Matthew20:8 Kumanheru muridzi womunda wamagirepisi akati kuno mutariri wake, “Chidaidza vashandi uvape mibayiro yavo utangise novokupedzisira uchigumisira nevokutanga.”" 
Matthew20:9 Vaya vakapiwa basa paawa yechishanu manheru pavakauya, mumwe nomumwe wavo akagamuchira mubayiro wapazuva uya wedhenari." 
Matthew20:10 Vokutanga vaya pavakauyawo, vakafunga kuti vachagamuchira yakawanda, asi mumwe nomumwe wavo akagamuchira dhenari." 
Matthew20:11 Pavairigamuchira vakanyunyutira saimba uya 
Matthew20:12 vachiti, “Ava vokupedzisira vashanda kweawa imwechete chete asi imi mavaenzanisa nesu, isu tabinduka zuva rose tichipiswa nezuva.”" 
Matthew20:13 Asi iye akapindura mumwe wavo achiti, “Shamwari, handisi kukutadzira. Hauna kubvumirana neni here mubayiro wemari yedhenari?" 
Matthew20:14 Iwe ingotora yako uende. Ndini ndasarudza zvangu kupa uyu wokupedzisira yakaenzana neyandakupa. 
Matthew20:15 Handibvumirwi here kuita madiro nezvinhu zvangu kana kuti une shanje nemwoyochena wangu here? 
Matthew20:16 Saizvozvo vokupedzisira vachava vokutanga, vokutangawo vachava vokupedzisira.”" 
Matthew20:17 Jesu paakanga achikwira kuJerusaremu akatora vadzidzi gumi navaviri pachavo voga. Vari panzira akati kwavari," 
Matthew20:18 “Chinzwai, tavakukwira kuJerusaremu. Mwanakomana womunhu achaturirwa mumaoko avapristi vakuru nenyanzvi dzomutemo. Vachamutongera rufu," 
Matthew20:19 vachimuisa mumaoko evechirudzi kuti anyombwe nokurohwa zvakanyanya achizorovererwa pamuchinjikwa asi iye achamutswa nezuva retatu.” 
Matthew20:20 Amai vavanakomana vaZebhedhi vakauya kwaari nevanakomana vavo vakapfugama pamberi pake vakaisa chichemo chavo. 
Matthew20:21 Jesu akavati, “Munodeiko?” Ivo vakati kwaari, “Itai kuti, muumambo hwenyu, vanakomana vangu ava vaviri vagare vakati mumwe kurudyi rwenyu mumwe kuruboshwe rwenyu.”" 
Matthew20:22 Jesu akapindura achiti, “Hamuzivi zvamuri kukumbira. Munogona here kunwa mukombe wamatambudziko wandichanwa.” Vakati kwaari, “Tinogona.”" 
Matthew20:23 Iye akati kwavari, “Kunwa mukombe wandichanwa, muchaunwa, asi zvokugara kurudyi rwangu nokuruboshe rwangu handisini ndinozvipa, asi ndokweavo vakakugadzirirwa naBaba vangu.”" 
Matthew20:24 Vamwe gumi vaya pavakazvinzwa vakashatirirwa mukoma nomunun'una vaya. 
Matthew20:25 Jesu akavadaidza akati kwavari, “Munozviziva imi kuti vatongi vechirudzi, pakutonga, vanoita zvomukundo uye vakuru vakuru vavo vanoita zvechisimba." 
Matthew20:26 Asi pakati penyu hazvifaniri kudaro. Asi uyo anenge achida kuva mukuru pakati penyu ngaave mushandiri wenyu. 
Matthew20:27 Uye ani naani anoda kuva wokutanga pakati penyu, anofanira kuva muranda wenyu." 
Matthew20:28 Kunyange Mwanakomana womunhu, haana kuuya kuzoshandirwa, asi kuzoshandira vamwe uye kuzopira upenyu hwake sorudzikinuro rwavazhinji.”" 
Matthew20:29 Jesu navadzidzi vake pavakanga vavakubuda muJeriko vakateverwa negurumwandira ravanhu. 
Matthew20:30 Havo varume vaviri vaiva mapofu vakanga vagere parutivi rwenzira, pavakanzwa kuti Jesu ari kupfuura nepo vakadaidzira vachiti, “Tinzwireiwo tsitsi, Mwanakomana waDhavhidhi.”" 
Matthew20:31 Vanhu vazhinji vaya vakavatsiura vachivataurira kuti vanyarare, asi ivo vakatonyanya kudaidzira vachiti, “Tenzi Mwanakomana waDhavhidhi tinzwireiwo tsitsi.”" 
Matthew20:32 Jesu akamira akavadaidza achiti, “Chii chamunoda kuti ndikuitirei?”" 
Matthew20:33 Ivo vakati kwaari, “Tenzi, itai kuti maziso edu azaruke.”" 
Matthew20:34 Jesu akavanzwira tsitsi akabata maziso avo. Pakarepo, ndokubva vava kuona vakamutevera." 
Matthew21:1 Zvavakanga vavakusvika pedyo neJerusaremu, vakasvika kuBhetifage, pagomo reMiorivhi. Jesu akatuma vadzidzi vaviri achiti kwavari," 
Matthew21:2 “Endai mumusha wakatarisana nemi muchasvikowana dhongi rakasungirirwa nomwana waro Asunungurei muuye nawo kwandiri. 
Matthew21:3 Kana mumwe munhu akataura chinhu kwamuri, mutaurirei kuti, ‘Tenzi anoada uye achaadzosa nokukurumidza.’ ”" 
Matthew21:4 Izvi zvakaitika kuti zvizadzise zvakataurwa nomuporofita achiti," 
Matthew21:5 “Taurirai mukunda, guta reZioni, kuti, tarira uone Mambo wako ari kuuya kwauri akazvininipisa, akatasva padhongi, padhongwana mwana wedhongi.”" 
Matthew21:6 Vadzidzi vakaenda vakandoita sezvavakanga vataurirwa naJesu. 
Matthew21:7 Vakaunza dhongi nemwana waro. Vakawaridza hanzu dzavo pamadhongi aya, Jesu akabva atasva." 
Matthew21:8 Vanhu vazhinji vegurumwandira riya vakawaridza hanzu dzavo mumugwagwa. Vamwe vakakwanhura masanzu emiti vachiawarira mumugwagwa. 
Matthew21:9 Gurusvusvu ravanhu vaiva mberi nevaimutevera vaidaidzira vachiti, “Hosana kuMwanakomana waDhavhidhi, ngaarumbidzwe iye anouya muzita raTenzi. Hosana kumusorosoro.”" 
Matthew21:10 Paakapinda muJerusaremu, guta rose rakanyanduka richiti, “Ndiani uyu?”" 
Matthew21:11 Vanhu vazhinji vakati, “Uyu ndiye muporofita Jesu wokuNazareti yokuGarirea.”" 
Matthew21:12 Jesu akapinda muTemberi yaMwari akadzinga vakanga vachitengesa nokutenga muTemberi. Akapidigurira pasi tafura dzavanhu vokutsinhanisa mari nezvigaro zvaavo vaitengesa hangaiwa. 
Matthew21:13 Akati kwavari zvakanyorwa zvichinzi, “Imba yangu ichanzi imba yokunamatira. Asi imi muri kuiita bako ramakororo.”" 
Matthew21:14 Mapofu nemhetamakumbo vakauya kwaari muTemberi akavarapa. 
Matthew21:15 Vapristi vakuru nenyanzvi dzomutemo pavakaona zvinaniso zvaakaita navana vaduku vaidaidzira muTemberi vachiti, “Hosana kuMwanakomana waDhavhidhi” vakashatirwa." 
Matthew21:16 Vakati kwaari, “Uri kunzwa here zviri kutaurwa navava.” Jesu akati kwavari, “Hongu, asi hamuna kumboverenga here kuti: “ ‘Mumiromo yavapwere navanoyamwa, makaburitsa kurumbidza kwakanakisisa.’ ”" 
Matthew21:17 Jesu akavasiya akabuda muguta akaenda kuBhetania akagarako. 
Matthew21:18 Mangwanani paakanga ava kudzokera kuguta kuya, akanzwa nzara." 
Matthew21:19 Paakaona muonde parutivi penzira akaenda pauri. Hapana chaakawana pauri kunze kwamashizha chete. Akati kwauri, “Usazombofa wakabereka muchero zvakare.” Muonde wakabva wauna pakarepo." 
Matthew21:20 Vadzidzi pavakazviona vakashamiswa vachiti, “Ko muonde uyu wauna sei pakare pakarepo kudai?”" 
Matthew21:21 Jesu ndokuvapindura achiti, “Zvechokwadi ndinoti kwamuri, ‘Kana muine chitendero uye musingakahadziki hamuiti chete zvaitika kumuonde asi kunyange mukati kugomo iri simudzwa ukandwe munyanza zvichaitwa." 
Matthew21:22 Chipi nechipi chamunokumbira mumunamato, muchazvigashira kana muine chitendero.’ ”" 
Matthew21:23 Paakapinda muTemberi, vapristi vakuru navakuru vakuru vavanhu vakauya kwaari paakanga achidzidzisa, vakati: “Unoita zvinhu izvi nesimba raani uye ndiani akakupa simba irori?”" 
Matthew21:24 Jesu akavapindura achiti, “Kana neniwo ndinoda kukubvunzai mubvunzo. Kana mukandipa mhinduro, ini ndinobva ndakutauriraiwo kuti ndinoita izvi nesimba raani." 
Matthew21:25 Ruombeko rwaJohani rwakabvepi, kudenga here kana kuvanhu?” Vakataurirana vachiti, “Kana tikati rwakabva kudenga, iye achati kwatiri ko makaregerei kutenda kwaari?" 
Matthew21:26 Kana tikati rwakabva kuvanhu tinotya uzhinji hwavanhu. Nokuti vose vanoti Johani aiva muporofita.” 
Matthew21:27 Saka vakapindura Jesu vachiti, “Hatizivi.” Iye akati kwavari, “Kana neniwo handikutaurirei kuti ndinoita izvi nesimba raani." 
Matthew21:28 “Munofunga kuti kudii? Mumwe murume aiva navanakomana vaviri, akaenda kuna wokutanga wacho akati, ‘Mwanangu, enda nhasi undoshanda mumunda wamagirepisi.’" 
Matthew21:29 Iye akapindura achiti, ‘Handidi,’ asi pashure akazozvidzora akaenda." 
Matthew21:30 Akaenda kune wechipiri akataura zvimwechetezvo. Mwanakomana akapindura achiti, ‘Ndinoenda changamire,’ asi haana kuenda." 
Matthew21:31 Pakati pavaviri ava ndoupi akaita zvaidiwa nababa vake?” Ivo vakati, “Wokutanga.” Jesu akati kwavari, “Zvechokwadi, ndinoti kwamuri, vateresi nepfambi vachakutangirai kupinda muumambo hwaMwari." 
Matthew21:32 Nokuti Johani akakuunzirai gwara roururami asi imi hamuna kutenda maari asi vateresi nepfambi vakatenda maari. Kunyange pamakazviona hamuna kutendeuka muchitenda kwaari. 
Matthew21:33 “Teererai munzwe mumwe muenzaniso. Kwaiva nomumwe saimba akarima munda wamagirepisi ndokuukomberedza noruzhowa. Akacheramo guvi rokusvinira waini. Akavakawo nharire ndokuupa kuna vamwe varimi vokuushandisa vachimubhadhara, iye ndokuenda zvake kune imwe nyika." 
Matthew21:34 Nguva yomuchero payakanga yava kusvika, akatuma varanda vake kuna vaya vaishandisa munda wake kuti awanewo muchero wake." 
Matthew21:35 Vaishandisa munda wake vaya vakabata varanda vake, mumwe vakamurova, mumwe vakamuuraya, mumwe vakamutaka namabwe." 
Matthew21:36 Akatumazve vamwe varanda, vakatowanda kupinda vokutanga vaya. Vakaita zvimwechetezvo kwavari." 
Matthew21:37 Mushure mezvo akatuma mwanakomana wake kwavari achiti, ‘Vacharemekedza mwanakomana wangu.’" 
Matthew21:38 Vaya vaishandisa munda pavakaona mwanakomana uya vakati pachavo, ‘Uyu ndiyeka mugari wenhaka, uyai timuuraye tizotora nhaka yake.’" 
Matthew21:39 Vakamutora vakamukanda kunze kwomunda wamagirepisi vakamuuraya. 
Matthew21:40 Saizvozvo, kana muridzi womunda wamagirepisi akauya achaitei kune vokushandisa munda wake vaya?” Ivo vakati kwaari," 
Matthew21:41 “Achaparadza vanhu vakaipa ava norufu rwakaipisisa, achazopa munda wamagirepisi iwoyo kuna vamwe vokuti vaushandise vachimubhadhara vachimupa michero panguva yayo.”" 
Matthew21:42 Jesu akati kwavari, “Hamuna kumboverenga here muMagwaro Matsvene kuti, ‘Dombo rakarambwa navavaki ndiro rakazova romusimboti rapakona? Uku kuita kwaTenzi uye kunotishamisa zvikuru.’" 
Matthew21:43 Naizvozvo, ndinoti kwamuri umambo hwaMwari muchahutorerwa huchipiwa kuno rudzi runobereka muchero yaho.”" 
Matthew21:44 *** 
Matthew21:45 Vapristi vakuru navaFarisei pavakanzwa mienzaniso yake, vakazviona kuti aireva ivo." 
Matthew21:46 Vaida kuti vamusunge asi vakatya uzhinji hwavanhu nokuti vaimutora somuporofita. 
Matthew22:1 Jesu akataurazve kwavari nemienzaniso achiti," 
Matthew22:2 “Umambo hwedenga hungafanidzwe namambo akaitira mwanakomana wake mabiko omuchato. 
Matthew22:3 Akatuma varanda vake kundodaidza avo vakanga vakokwa kumabiko omuchato; asi havana kuda kuuya. 
Matthew22:4 Akatumazve vamwe varanda achiti indotaurirai vakakokwa vaya kuti, ‘Onai, ndagadzirira mabiko angu, ndabaya mombe, ndikabaya zvimhuru zvangu zvakakora. Zvose zvagadzirirwa. Chiuyai kumabiko omuchato.’" 
Matthew22:5 Asi ivo havana kumboita hanya nazvo, vakabva vatoenda zvavo, mumwe kupurazi yake, mumwe kushawo yake." 
Matthew22:6 “Vamwewo vakatobata varanda vake vakavafumura vakavauraya. 
Matthew22:7 Mambo akashatirwa akatumira masoja ake akaparadza mhondi idzodzo. Akapisa guta ravo. 
Matthew22:8 Akazoti kuvaranda vake, ‘Muchato wagadzirirwa asi vaya vakakokwa vanga vasina kukodzera." 
Matthew22:9 Saka endai pamharadzano dzemigwagwa mundokoka kumabiko omuchato vose vamunenge makwanisa kuwana.’ 
Matthew22:10 Varanda vaya vakafamba nemigwagwa vakakokorodza vose vavakakwanisa kuwana, vakanaka navakaipa. Saizvozvo zimba romuchato rakazara navakanga vakokwa." 
Matthew22:11 “Mambo paakauya kuzoona vaeni, akaona imomo mumwe munhu akanga asina hanzu yomuchato." 
Matthew22:12 Akati kwaari, ‘Shamwari, wapinda seiko muno usina hanzu yomuchato?’ Akabva aomerwa nerokutaura." 
Matthew22:13 Mambo akati kuna vashandi vake, ‘Musungei maoko namakumbo mumukande murima rokunze.’ ” Ikoko vanhu vachachema nokurumanidza mazino." 
Matthew22:14 Nokuti vazhinji vanodaidzwa asi vashoma ndivo vanosarudzwa. 
Matthew22:15 VaFarisei vakaenda vakandoita musangano kuti vangamubate sei mukutaura kwake. 
Matthew22:16 Vakatuma kwaari vadzidzi vavo pamwechete nevechikwata chokwaHerodhi vachiti, “Mudzidzisi, tinoziva kuti muri munhu ari pachokwadi uye kuti munodzidzisa gwara raMwari zviri pachokwadi musingatyi munhu nokuti hamunei nechigaro chino munhu." 
Matthew22:17 Saka tiudzei kuti munofungei, zviri pamutemo here kutera mutero kuna Siza kana kuti kwete?”" 
Matthew22:18 Jesu akaziva uipi hwavo akati, “Munondiedzereiko nhai imi vanyengedzi?" 
Matthew22:19 Ndiratidzei mari yacho yamunotera nayo mutero.” Vakamuunzira mari chena yainzi dhenari. 
Matthew22:20 Jesu ndokuti kwavari, “Ko mufananidzo uyu norunyoro urwu ndezvani?”" 
Matthew22:21 Vakati, “NdezvaSiza.” Iye ndokuvati, “Ipai zvaSiza kuna Siza, mupewo zvaMwari kuna Mwari.”" 
Matthew22:22 Pavakazvinzwa zvakavashamisa vakamusiya voenda zvavo. 
Matthew22:23 Pazuva rimwechetero, vaSadhusei vakauyawo kwaari. Ndivo vaya vanoti zvokumuka kwavakafa hakuna. Vakamubvunza vachiti," 
Matthew22:24 “Mudzidzisi, Mosesi akati kana murume akafa asina vana munun'una wake anofanira kumugara nhaka kuti aberekere mukoma vana." 
Matthew22:25 Zvino pakati pedu kwaiva navarume, mukoma nomunun'una vanomwe. Wokutanga akaroora akafa asina kuita vana. Akasiya mukadzi wake kumunun'una wake." 
Matthew22:26 Ndizvozvowo zvakaitika kune wechipiri newechitatu kusvika kune wechinomwe. 
Matthew22:27 Mushure mavo vose, mukadzi uya akafa." 
Matthew22:28 Ko zvino pakumuka kwavakafa achava mukadzi woupi pavanomwe ivava nokuti akambova wavo vose zvavo?” 
Matthew22:29 Jesu akavapindura achiti, “Munokanganisa, nokuti hamuzivi Magwaro Matsvene uye simba raMwari." 
Matthew22:30 Nokuti pakumuka kwavanhu kubva kuvafi, havazoroori kana kuroorwa. Asi vanenge vaita savatumwa vokudenga." 
Matthew22:31 Pane zvokumuka kwavakafa hamuna kuverenga here zvakataurwa naMwari kwamuri achiti," 
Matthew22:32 ‘Ndini Mwari waAbhurahamu naMwari Isaki, naMwari Jakobho. Haasi Mwari wavakafa asi Mwari wavapenyu?’ ”" 
Matthew22:33 Uuzhinji hwavanhu pahwakazvinzwa hwakashamiswa nechidzidziso chake. 
Matthew22:34 VaFarisei pavakanzwa kuti akapwisa vaSadhusei, vakaungana." 
Matthew22:35 Mumwe wavo aiva, gweta, akamubvunza mubvunzo wokumuedza achiti," 
Matthew22:36 “Mudzidzisi ndoupi murao mukuru mumutemo?” 
Matthew22:37 Jesu akati kwaari, “Ida Tenzi Mwari wako nomwoyo wako wose nomweya wako wose nepfungwa dzako dzose." 
Matthew22:38 Iwoyu ndiwo mutemo mukuru uye wokutanga. 
Matthew22:39 Wechipiri wakafanana naiwo unoti, ‘Ida mumwe wako sokuda kwaunozviita iwe pachako.’" 
Matthew22:40 Mirao miviri iyoyi ndiyo misimboti yemitemo yose navaporofita.” 
Matthew22:41 VaFarisei pavakanga vakaungana, Jesu akavabvunza mubvunzo" 
Matthew22:42 achiti, “Munofungei nezvaKristu? Mwanakomana waani?” Vakati kwaari, “Mwana waDhavhidhi.”" 
Matthew22:43 Iye akati kwavari, “Ko sei Dhavhidhi, afemerwa naMweya Mutsvene, anomuti Tenzi paanoti," 
Matthew22:44 “ ‘Tenzi akati kuna tenzi wangu gara kurudyi rwangu, kusvikira ndaisa vavengi vako pasi petsoka dzako?’" 
Matthew22:45 Ko zvino kana Dhavhidhi achimuti, ‘Tenzi,’ ko angave Mwana wake sei?”" 
Matthew22:46 Hapana akagona kumupindura kana izwi zvaro. Uyewo kubvira pazuva iroro hapana akazofemerazve kumubvunza mibvunzo mimwe. 
Matthew23:1 Jesu akati kuhuzhinji hwavanhu uye kuna vadzidzi vake," 
Matthew23:2 “Nyanzvi dzomutemo navaFarisei vagere pachigaro chaMosesi 
Matthew23:3 saka itai nokuchengeta zvose zvavanokuudzai asi kwete zvavanoita nokuti ivo havaiti zvavanoparidza. 
Matthew23:4 Vanotakudza vanhu mitoro isingatakuriki vachiisa pamafudzi avanhu asi ivo pachavo havadi kuibata kana nomune wavo zvawo. 
Matthew23:5 Zvavanoita zvose, vanozviita kuti vaonekwe navanhu nokuti vanopamhamisa tubhokisi twavo twemitemo nokurebesa mhaswa dzapahanzu dzavo." 
Matthew23:6 Vanoda nzvimbo dzapamusoro pamabiko nezvigaro zvakanakisisa mumasinagogu," 
Matthew23:7 nokukwaziswa pamisika nokudaidzwa navanhu kuti mudzidzisi. 
Matthew23:8 Musadaidzwe kunzi mudzidzisi nokuti mune mudzidzisi mumwechete, uye imi mose munongova hama nehama." 
Matthew23:9 “Musadaidze munhu kuti baba vako panyika nokuti muna Baba mumwechete ari kudenga. 
Matthew23:10 Musadaidzwe kunzi murairidzi nokuti mune murairidzi mumwechete, Kristu." 
Matthew23:11 Mukuru pakati penyu ndiye achava mushandiri wenyu. Uyo anozvikudza achadukupiswa. 
Matthew23:12 Uyewo anozvidukupisa achakudzwa. 
Matthew23:13 “Zvichakuwanai zvenyu imi nyanzvi dzomutemo nemi vaFarisei, vanyengedzi nokuti munopfigira vanhu umambo hwedenga. Imi hamupindemo uye hamubvumiri vanenge vachida zvavo kupindamo." 
Matthew23:14 *** 
Matthew23:15 Zvichakuwanai imi nyanzvi dzomutemo nemi vaFarisei, vanyengedzi, munoyambuka makungwa muchidimuranisa masango kundopindutsa munhu mumwechete oga. Kana apinduka munomuita kuti ave munhu wokumoto muzhinji kakatopetwa kaviri kupinda imi." 
Matthew23:16 Zvichakuwanai zvenyu, imi mapofu avatungamiri, munoti, ‘Kana munhu akapika neTemberi, hazvina mhosva, asi munhu akapika nendarama yomuTemberi anosungirwa kuchengeta chitsidzo chake.’" 
Matthew23:17 Mazirema zvawo amapofu. Ko chikuru chiiko ipapa, ndarama kana kuti Temberi inoita kuti ndarama ive chinhu chinoera?" 
Matthew23:18 Uye munoti, ‘Kana munhu akapika neatari, hazvina mhosva asi munhu akapika nechipo chiri paatari anosungirwa kuchengeta chitsidzo chake!’" 
Matthew23:19 Mapofu avanhu! Chii chikuru chipo kana kuti atari inoita kuti chipo chive chinoera? 
Matthew23:20 Saizvozvo uyo anopika neatari anopika nayo uye nazvose zviri pairi; 
Matthew23:21 uye munhu anopika neTemberi anopika nayo uye anopikawo nouyo anogara mairi. 
Matthew23:22 Uyowo anopika nedenga, anopika nechigaro chaMwari choumambo uye anopikawo naiye anogara pachiri." 
Matthew23:23 “Zvichakuwanai imi nyanzvi dzomutemo nemi vaFarisei imi, vanyengedzi, nokuti munobvisa chegumi chetunhu tunonhuwirira tudikidiki twemindi nedhiri nekamini asi muchisiya zvinhu zvikuru zvomutemo, nezvoruenzaniso nezvetsitsi nechitendero. Izvi ndizvo zvamaifanira kuita musingaregi zvenyu zvimwe izvozvo." 
Matthew23:24 Mapofu avatungamiriri! Munotsutsa unyunyu asi muchimedza ngamera. 
Matthew23:25 “Zvichakuwanai zvenyu imi nyanzvi dzomutemo nemi vaFarisei, imi vanyengedzi, munosuka mukombe nendiro kunze asi mukati muzere nezvinhu zvokupamba nezvoudyire." 
Matthew23:26 “Iwe bofu romuFarisei, tanga washambidza mukati momukombe nendiro kuti kunze kuve kwakachenawo." 
Matthew23:27 “Zvichakuwanai imi nyanzvi dzomutemo nemi vaFarisei, imi vanyengedzi, makafanana namakuva akadzururwa kuti mbuu nesuko. Anoratidzika zvakanakisa kunze asi mukati muzere mapfupa avanhu vakafa nokuora kose." 
Matthew23:28 Nemiwo, kunze, munotaridzika savanhu vakarurama kuvanhu asi mukati muzere nokubata vanhu kumeso uye uipi." 
Matthew23:29 Zvichakuwanai imi nyanzvi dzomutemo navaFarisei, imi vanyengedzi, munovaka makuva avaporofita muchishongedza zvifananidzo zvavanhu vakarurama." 
Matthew23:30 Muchiti, ‘Dai takanga tiri vapenyu pamazuva amadzibaba edu, tingadai tisina kubatana navo mukudeura ropa ravaporofita.’" 
Matthew23:31 Naizvozvo muri kutopa umboo hunokurovererai kuti imi muri vana vemhondi dzakauraya vaporofita. 
Matthew23:32 Saka chipedzisaika musvike paiva neshungu dzamadzibaba enyu. 
Matthew23:33 Imi nyoka dzavanhu navana venyoka, muchapunyuka sei kutongerwa moto muzhinji?" 
Matthew23:34 Nokudaro ndichakutumirai vaporofita navachenjeri nenyanzvi dzomutemo. Vamwe muchauraya zvenyu nokuroverera pamuchinjikwa. Vamwe vavo muchavarova zvikuru mumasinagogu muchivatambudza muguta neguta," 
Matthew23:35 kuti mupfukirwe neropa rose ravakarurama rakadeurwa pasi pose kubvira kuropa risina mhaka raAbhero kusvika kuropa raZakaria mwanakomana waBharakiya wamakauraya pakati penzvimbo inoera neatari. 
Matthew23:36 Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri, ‘Zvose izvi zvichawira chizvarwa chino ichochi.’" 
Matthew23:37 “Jerusaremu, Jerusaremu iwe, unouraya vaporofita uye uchitaka namabwe avo vanenge vatumwa kwauri nhai. Kangani kandainge ndichida kuunganidza vana vako pamwechete sokuvhumbamira kunoita huku hukwana dzayo mumapapiro ayo, asi makaramba." 
Matthew23:38 Chiona imba yako yasiiwa yava dongo. 
Matthew23:39 Nokuti ndinokutaurira kuti hauchambondionazve kusvikira pauchazoti, ‘Ngaarumbidzwe iye anouya muzita raTenzi.’ ”" 
Matthew24:1 Jesu paakanga achibva muTemberi avakuenda, vadzidzi vake vakauya kwaari vachimunongedzera dzimba dzeTemberi." 
Matthew24:2 Asi iye akapindura achiti, “Muri kuona zvose izvi handiti, zvechokwadi ndinoti kwamuri hapachazosara dombo riri pamusoro perimwe risingazokoromotserwa pasi.”" 
Matthew24:3 Paakanga akagara pagomo roMuorivhi, vadzidzi vakauya kwaari vari voga pachavo vachiti, “Tiudzei, zvichaitika rinhi izvi uye chii chicharatidza kuti mavakuuya, uyewo kuti nyika yava kuguma?”" 
Matthew24:4 Jesu akavapindura achiti, “Chenjerai kuti murege kurasiswa naani zvake." 
Matthew24:5 Nokuti kuna vazhinji vachauya nomuzita rangu vachiti ndini, ‘Kristu.’ Vacharasisa vazhinji." 
Matthew24:6 Muchanzwa zvehondo namarehwarehwa ehondo. Musanyanye kutya zvenyu. Izvi zvinofanira kuti zviitike asi magumo anenge asati asvika. 
Matthew24:7 Rudzi ruchamukirana norumwe rudzi noumambo huchamukirana nohumwe humambo. Kuchava nedzinzara nokundengendeka kwapasi munzvimbo dzakasiyana — siyana. 
Matthew24:8 Iri rinenge riri romoromo chete ramatambudziko okusununguka. 
Matthew24:9 Vachakupinzai mudambudziko vachikuurayai. Muchavengwa namarudzi ose pamusana pezita rangu. 
Matthew24:10 Vazhinji vachakoromoka pakutenda kwavo. Vachacherana vachivengana. 
Matthew24:11 Pachamuka vaporofita venhema vachizorasisa vanhu nzira. 
Matthew24:12 Nokuda kokuti uipi hunenge hwawanda, rudo rwavazhinji ruchatonhora." 
Matthew24:13 Asi uyo anotsungarara kusvikira kumagumo achaponeswa. 
Matthew24:14 Shoko iri Rakanaka roumambo richaparidzwa pasi pose souchapupu kumarudzi ose. Ndipo panozouya kuguma. 
Matthew24:15 “Naizvozvo kana moona chiya choumharadzi chinon'oresa chakarehwa nomuporofita Dhanieri chamira munzvimbo inoera (anoverenga ngaanzwisise.) 
Matthew24:16 Ipapo vari muJudhea ngavatizire kumakomo. 
Matthew24:17 Uyo anenge ari pamusoro pemba ngaarege kuburikira pasi kuti andotora zviri mumba make. 
Matthew24:18 Anenge ari kumunda ngaarege kudzokera kundotora jasi rake. 
Matthew24:19 Hameno zvavo vanenge vaina pamuviri navavo vanenge vachiri kuyamwisa pamazuva iwayo. 
Matthew24:20 Namatai kuti kutiza kwenyu kusave panguva yechando kana kuti pazuva reSabata. 
Matthew24:21 Nokuti kuchava nenhamo huru isati yamboitika kubvira pakutanga kwapasi kusvikira pari zvino uye hazvichazombofa zvakaitikazve. 
Matthew24:22 Dai kuri kuti mazuva iwayo haana kutapudzwa, hapana munhu aiponeswa, asi pamusana pavakasarudzwa, mazuva iwayo achatapudzwa." 
Matthew24:23 “Ipapo kana ani zvake akati kwamuri, ‘Tarisai houno Kristu kana kuti ari koko,’ musazvidavire" 
Matthew24:24 nokuti kuchamuka vana Kristu vamanyepo navaporofita venhema vachiratidza zviratidzo zvikuru nezvishamiso kuti vatsautse, kana zvakwanisika, kunyange vasarudzwi." 
Matthew24:25 Chionai kuti ndakutaurirai zvisati zvaitika. 
Matthew24:26 Naizvozvo kana vakati kwamuri, ‘Hoyo ari murenje, musabude muchiendako. Kana vakati ari mudzimba dzomukati’ musazvitenda." 
Matthew24:27 Sokuvaima kunoita mheni kubva kumabvazuva kusvika kumadokero ndiko kuuya kuchaita Mwanakomana womunhu. 
Matthew24:28 Pane chitunha, magora ndipo paanoungana." 
Matthew24:29 “Nhamo yamazuva iwayo ichangobva mukupera, zuva richaora, mwedzi uchisvipa uye nyenyedzi dzichadonha kubva mudenga. Masimba omumatenga achazungunutswa." 
Matthew24:30 Ndipo pachaonekwa mudenga chiratidzo choMwanakomana womunhu. Marudzi apasi pose achaungudza. Vachaona Mwanakomana womunhu achiuya ari mumakore edenga aine simba nembiri huru. 
Matthew24:31 Iye achatuma vatumwa vake nehwamanda inorira kwazvo. Vachakokorodza vasarudzwi vake kubva kumativi mana enyika, kubvira kwakaperera nyika kusvikawo kwayakaperera rumwe rutivi." 
Matthew24:32 “Dzidzai chidzidzo chinobva kumuonde. Kana bazi rawo rotunga, pfumvudza yobuda, munobva maziva kuti zhizha rava pedyo." 
Matthew24:33 Naizvozvo imiwo kana moona izvi zvose, zivai kuti iye ava padyo, atova pamusuo chaipo." 
Matthew24:34 Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri chizvarwa ichi hachimbopfuuri, zvinhu izvi zvisati zvaitika." 
Matthew24:35 Denga napasi zvichapera asi mazwi angu haambopfuuri. 
Matthew24:36 “Asi zvezuva iroro nenguva yacho hapana anozviziva kunyange vatumwa vedenga, kanawo Mwanakomana asi Baba voga." 
Matthew24:37 Sezvazvakanga zvakaita pamazuva aNowa, ndizvozvowo zvazvichaita pakuuya kwoMwanakomana womunhu." 
Matthew24:38 Sapamazuva iwayo, mafashamo emvura asati auya, vanhu vaidya nokunwa vachiroora nokuroorwa kusvikira pazuva rakapinda Nowa mungarava." 
Matthew24:39 Havana kuziva kusvikira mafashamo auya akavatsvaira vose. Ndizvo zvazvichaita pakuuya kwoMwanakomana womunhu. 
Matthew24:40 Pavarume vaviri vanenge vari mumunda, mumwe achatorwa mumwe achisiiwa." 
Matthew24:41 Vakadzi vaviri vanenge vari paguyo vachikuya pamwechete, mumwe achatorwa mumwe achisiiwa." 
Matthew24:42 Nezvo rindirai nokuti hamuzivi kuti Tenzi wenyu anouya zuva ripi. 
Matthew24:43 Asi zivai izvi zvokuti dai saimba aiziva nguva yousiku ichauya nayo mbavha aigaririra. Haairega imba yake ichipazwa. 
Matthew24:44 Saizvozvo nemiwo garai makagadzirira nokuti Mwanakomana womunhu anouya nenguva yamusingamutarisiri. 
Matthew24:45 “Ndoupi zvino muranda wakatendeka uye akangwara anoiswa pabasa natenzi wake rokutarira vomumusha make kuti avape zvokudya zvavo nenguva kwayo? 
Matthew24:46 Akakomborerwa muranda uyo anoti kana tenzi wake wouya anomuwana achiita saizvozvo. 
Matthew24:47 Zvechokwadi, ndinoti kwamuri achamuita mukuru wezvose zvaanazvo." 
Matthew24:48 Asi kana muranda uya akaipa, achizviti mumwoyo, ‘Tenzi wangu anonoka,’" 
Matthew24:49 iye wotanga kurova vamwe varanda naye, achidya nokunwa nezvidhakwa;" 
Matthew24:50 tenzi womuranda uyu achauya pazuva raasingamutarisiri uye panguva yaasingazivi," 
Matthew24:51 omuranga achimuisa pamwechete navanyengedzi, ikoko vanhu vachachema vachirumanidza mazino." 
Matthew25:1 “Umambo hwedenga huchafananidzwa navasikana vane gumi vakatora marambi avo vakaenda kundochingura muwani. 
Matthew25:2 Vashanu vavo vakanga vasina kungwara, vamwe vashanuwo vakanga vakangwara." 
Matthew25:3 Vakanga vasina kungwara vaya, pavakatora marambi avo, havana kutakura mamwe mafuta." 
Matthew25:4 Asi vakachenjera vakatakura zvigubhu zvamafuta pamwechete namarambi avo. 
Matthew25:5 Muwani paakanonoka vakanzwa hope ndokubva vakotsira. 
Matthew25:6 Pakati pousiku pakaridzwa mhere yokuti, ‘Muwani wouya, budai mumuchingure.’" 
Matthew25:7 Vasikana vaya vose vakamuka vakabatidza marambi avo. 
Matthew25:8 Vasina kungwara vakati kuna vakangwara, ‘Tipungurireiwo mafuta enyu nokuti marambi edu ava kuda kudzima.’" 
Matthew25:9 Asi vakangwara vakapindura vachiti, ‘Pamwe haangazotikwanira isu nemi. Zvirinani kuti muende kuna vanotengesa mundozvitengera.’" 
Matthew25:10 Pavakanga vaenda kundotenga, muwani ndiye vhu kusvika. Vaya vakanga vakagadzirira vakapinda naye mumabiko omuchato. Gonhi ndiye dhwa kuzarirwa." 
Matthew25:11 Mushure mezvo, vamwe vasikana vaya vakauya vachiti, ‘Tenzi, Tenzi tizarurireiwo.’" 
Matthew25:12 Asi iye akapindura achiti, ‘Zvechokwadi ndinoti kwamuri handikuzivii." 
Matthew25:13 Naizvozvo garirirai nokuti hamuzivi zuva kana nguva yacho.’ 
Matthew25:14 “Ndinodaro nokuti umambo hwedenga huchaita somunhu akanga ava kuenda kurwendo akadaidza varanda vake akaturira kwavari zvinhu zvake. 
Matthew25:15 Akapa mumwe wavo mari yematarenda mashanu, mumwe maviri, mumwe rimwechete, munhu nemunhu achipiwa maererano nezvaaikwanisa kuita. Ndokubva aenda zvake." 
Matthew25:16 Uya akagamuchira mari yamatarenda mashanu akabva aenda pakarepo akandoita mhindu nayo, akaita mari yamamwe matarenda mashanu." 
Matthew25:17 Ndizvozvowo zvakaita akapiwa mari yamatarenda maviri, akawana imwe mari yamatarenda maviri." 
Matthew25:18 Asi uya akagamuchira mari yetarenda rimwechete akaenda akandoricherera pasi akaviga mari yatenzi wake. 
Matthew25:19 Mumashure menguva ndefu, tenzi wavaranda vaya akauya akagadzirisana nezvemari yake navo." 
Matthew25:20 Uya akagamuchira mari yamatarenda mashanu, akauya kwaari namamwe matarenda mashanu achiti, ‘Changamire, makandipa mari yamatarenda mashanu, haano matarenda mamwe mashanu andakashava.’" 
Matthew25:21 Tenzi wake akati kwaari, ‘Hauchionaka muranda wakanaka wakatendeka. Wakatendeka mune zvidiki, ndavakukuita mutariri wezvakawanda. Saka chiuya tifare pamwechete neni tenzi wako.’" 
Matthew25:22 Uya akapiwa mari yamatarenda maviri akauyawo achiti, ‘Changamire, makandipa mari yamatarenda maviri heino imwe mari yematarenda maviri yandakashava.’" 
Matthew25:23 Tenzi wake akamuti, ‘Hauchionaka muranda wakanaka, wakatendeka. Wakatendeka mune zvidiki ndavakukuita mutariri wezvakawanda. Saka chiuya tifare pamwechete neni Tenzi wako.’" 
Matthew25:24 Uyawo akagamuchira mari yetarenda rimwechete akauyawo akati, ‘Changamire, ndakazviziva kuti muri munhu akaoma. Imi munokohwa pamusina kudyara. Munounganidza pamusina kumbokusha." 
Matthew25:25 Ndakatya, naizvozvo ndakaenda ndikandoviga mari yenyu pasi. Hei mari yenyu.’" 
Matthew25:26 Tenzi wake akamupindura achiti, ‘Iwe uri muranda wakaipa, nyope yomunhu. Heya waitozviziva zvako kuti ndinokohwa pandisina kurima, ndichiunganidza pandisina kukusha?" 
Matthew25:27 Saka waifaniraka iwe kunge wakaisa mari yangu muBhangi. Pandainge ndauya ndaizowana mari yangu nemari yayainge yabereka. 
Matthew25:28 Saka mutorerei mari iyoyo yetarenda muipe kune ane gumi remari yamatarenda. 
Matthew25:29 Nokuti uyo anazvo anotopamhidzirwa zvimwe achitova nezvakatowanda — wanda asi uyo asina, kunyange chaanenge anacho achatorerwa." 
Matthew25:30 Uye muranda uya asina maturo mukandei kunze kurima. Ikoko vanhu vachachema vachirumanidza mazino.’ 
Matthew25:31 “Kana Mwanakomana womunhu wouya nembiri yake pamwechete navatumwa vose, achagara pachigaro chake choumambo chinembiri." 
Matthew25:32 Marudzi ose avanhu achaunganidzwa pamberi pake. Iye achaparadzanisa vanhu, mumwe nomumwe, sokuparadzanisa kunoita mufudzi hwai nembudzi." 
Matthew25:33 Achaisa hwai kurudyi rwake, mbudzi achidziisa kuruboshwe." 
Matthew25:34 “Ipapo Mambo achati kuna vari kurudyi rwake, ‘Uyai imi makakomborerwa naBaba vangu, muwane nhaka youmambo yamakagadzirirwa kubvira pakutangisa kwapasi" 
Matthew25:35 nokuti ndakanga ndiine nzara mukandipa chokudya. Ndakanga ndiine nyota mukandipa chokunwa. Ndakanga ndiri muenzi mukandigamuchira. 
Matthew25:36 Ndakanga ndisina chokupfeka mukandipfekedza. Ndakanga ndichirwara mukandishanyira. Ndaiva mujeri mukauya kwandiri?’ 
Matthew25:37 “Vakarurama vachamupindura vachiti, ‘Tenzi ndirini watakakuonai muine nzara tikakupai chokudya kana kuti muine nyota tikakupai chokunwa?" 
Matthew25:38 Ndirini watakakuonai muri muenzi tikakugamuchirai kana kuti musina chokupfeka tikakupfekedzai? 
Matthew25:39 Ndirini watakakuonai muchirwara kana kuti muri mujeri tikakushanyirai?’ 
Matthew25:40 “Mambo achavapindura achiti, ‘Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri pamakaitira izvi kune mumwe wavaduku vehama dzangu idzi, makatoitira ini.’" 
Matthew25:41 “Ipapo achati kuna vari kuruboshwe rwake, ‘Ibvai kwandiri imi makarengererwa rushambwa mupinde mumoto usingaperi wakagadzirirwa Dhiabhori navatumwa vake," 
Matthew25:42 nokuti ndakanga ndiine nzara mukasandipa chokudya. 
Matthew25:43 Ndakanga ndiine nyota mukasandipa chokunwa. Ndaiva mweni mukasandigamuchira. Ndakanga ndisina chokupfeka mukasandipa chokupfeka. Ndairwara uye ndaiva mujeri asi hamuna kundishanyira.’ 
Matthew25:44 “Ivo vachapindurawo vachiti, ‘Tenzi ndirini watakakuonai muine nzara kana kuti muine nyota kana muri mweni kana musina chokupfeka kana kuti muchirwara kana kuti muri mujeri tikasakuitirai chinhu.’" 
Matthew25:45 Iye achavapindura achiti, ‘Zvechokwadi chaizvo zvamusina kuzviita kuno mumwe wavadiki ava, hamuna kuzviita kwandiri?’" 
Matthew25:46 “Ava vachaenda kuchirango chisingaperi asi vakarurama vachienda kuupenyu usingaperi.” 
Matthew26:1 Jesu paakapedza kutaura zvose izvi akati kuna vadzidzi vake," 
Matthew26:2 “Munoziva kuti mumashure memazuva maviri, Pasika iri kusvika. Mwanakomana womunhu achaturirwa kuti arovererwe pamuchinjikwa.”" 
Matthew26:3 Vapristi vakuru navakuru vakuru vavanhu vakaungana mumuzinda womupristi mukuru ainzi Kaifasi. 
Matthew26:4 Vakaita bangano rokuti vasunge Jesu zvomuchivande vagomuuraya 
Matthew26:5 asi vakati kwete pamazuva makuru nokuti pangadaro pakaita bongozozo pakati pavanhu. 
Matthew26:6 Jesu paakanga ari kuBhetania ari mumba maSimoni wamaperembudzi. 
Matthew26:7 Kwakauya mumwe mukadzi nechinu chamafuta okuzora anokosha kwazvo chearabhasita. Akadururira mafuta acho mumusoro maJesu paakanga agere pakudya. 
Matthew26:8 Vadzidzi pavakazviona vakagumburwa nazvo vachiti, “Kurasa mari kudai!”" 
Matthew26:9 Nokuti mafuta aya angadai atengeswa nemari yakawanda kwazvo ikapiwa kuvarombo. 
Matthew26:10 Jesu achizviziva, akati kwavari, “Ko munonetserei mukadzi uyu? Inga aita chinhu chakanakisisa wani kwandiri." 
Matthew26:11 Varombo munavo nguva dzose wani asi ini hamuneni nguva dzose. 
Matthew26:12 Nokudira kwaaita mafuta aya pamuviri wangu, aita izvi kundigadzirira kuvigwa kwangu." 
Matthew26:13 Zvechokwadi chaizvo ndinoti kwamuri, kwose kuchaparidzwa shoko rakanaka iri, pasi pose, zvaaita zvichataurwa sechinhu chokumuyeuka nacho.”" 
Matthew26:14 Zvino mumwe wavane gumi navaviri ainzi Judhasi Isikarioti akaenda kuvapristi vakuru 
Matthew26:15 akati, “Muchandipa chii kana ndikamuturira kwamuri.” Vakamubhadhara makumi matatu emari yesirivha." 
Matthew26:16 Kubvira ipapo Judhasi akanga achitsvaka nguva yokuti amutengese nayo. 
Matthew26:17 Pazuva rokutanga rechingwa chisina mbiriso, vadzidzi vakauya kuna Jesu vachiti, “Ndokupi kwamungade kuti tindokugadzirirai kuti mudyire Pasika?”" 
Matthew26:18 Iye akati, “Endai muguta panhingi mundoti kwaari, Mudzidzisi ati, ‘Nguva yangu yasvika. Pamba pako ndipo pandichadyira Pasika navadzidzi vangu.’ ”" 
Matthew26:19 Vadzidzi vakaita sokutaurirwa kwavakanga vaitwa naJesu. Vakagadzirira Pasika. 
Matthew26:20 Ava manheru, Jesu akagara pakudya navadzidzi gumi navaviri." 
Matthew26:21 Pavakanga vachidya akati, “Zvechokwadi ndinoti kwamuri mumwe wenyu achanditengesa.”" 
Matthew26:22 Vakabva vasuruvara kwazvo vakatanga mumwe nomumwe kutaura kwaari vachiti, “Ndini here Tenzi?”" 
Matthew26:23 Jesu akavapindura achiti, “Uyo aseva mundiro neni, ndiye achanditengesa.”" 
Matthew26:24 Mwanakomana womunhu anoenda sokunyorwa kwazvakaitwa nezvake asi zvichamuwana munhu uyo anotengesa Mwanakomana womunhu. Zvaitova nani dai munhu iyeyo asina kuzvarwa zvake. 
Matthew26:25 Judhasi, uyo akazomutengesa akati, “Ndini here mudzidzisi?” Jesu akati kwaari, “Inga wazvireva oga wani.”" 
Matthew26:26 Zvavakanga vari pakudya, Jesu akatora chingwa akatenda ndokuchimedura akachipa kuvadzidzi vake achiti, “Torai mudye, uyu muviri wangu.”" 
Matthew26:27 Akatorawo mukombe akatenda ndokuupa kwavari achiti," 
Matthew26:28 “Unwei mose nokuti iri iropa rangu rechitenderano chitsva rinodeurirwa vazhinji kuti varegererwe zvitadzo. 
Matthew26:29 Ndinokutaurirai kuti handichazonwazve waini yomugirepisi kusvikira pazuva randinozonwa waini itsva nemi muumambo hwaBaba vangu.” 
Matthew26:30 Kuzoti vaimba rumbo vakabuda vakaenda kugomo roMuorivhi. 
Matthew26:31 Jesu akati kwavari, “Mucharasiswa mose pamusana pangu usiku huno nokuti zvakanyorwa zvichinzi, ‘Ndicharova mufudzi danga rehwai rigopararira.’" 
Matthew26:32 Asi kana ndamutswa ndichafanokutungamirirai kuGarirea.” 
Matthew26:33 Pita akamupindura achiti, “Vamwe vose vangarasiswe zvavo pamusana penyu asi ini handimborasika.”" 
Matthew26:34 Jesu akati kwaari, “Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwauri ihwo usiku hwanhasi uno uchandiramba katatu jongwe risati rakukuridza.”" 
Matthew26:35 Pita akati kwaari, “Kunyange zvikanzi ndife nemi handimbokurambai.” Ndizvo zvakataurwawo navamwe vadzidzi vose." 
Matthew26:36 Jesu akaenda navo kune imwe nzvimbo inonzi Getsemani, akati kuvadzidzi vake, “Garai pano ini ndimboenda uko ndimbondonamata.”" 
Matthew26:37 Akatora Pita navanakomana vaviri vokwaZebhedhi akabva atanga kudumbirwa nokutambura. 
Matthew26:38 Akazoti kwavari, “Ini ndadumbirwa zvikuru zvokunge ndichafa. Sarai pano murindire pamwechete neni.”" 
Matthew26:39 Jesu akaenda mberi zvishoma ndokubva awira pasi nouso akanamata achiti, “Baba vangu, kana zvichigoneka, mukombe uyu wamatambudziko ngaundipfuure asi kurege kuva kuda kwangu asi kuda kwenyu.”" 
Matthew26:40 Akadzokera kuna vadzidzi akavawana vatokotsira. Jesu akati kuna Pita, “Saka matadzaka imi kurindira neni kweawa imwechete?" 
Matthew26:41 Rindirai munamate kuti murege kupinda mukuedzwa. Mweya unoda zvawo asi nyama yaneta.” 
Matthew26:42 Jesu asudurukazve akanamata achiti, “Baba vangu, kana mukombe uyu usingakwanisi kundipesa ndichifanira kuunwa, kuda kwenyu ngakuitwe.”" 
Matthew26:43 Akauyazve akavawana vakotsira nokuti hope dzakanga dzavabata zvikuru. 
Matthew26:44 Jesu akavasiyazve, akaenda akandonamata rwechitatu achitaura mazwi mamwechetewo." 
Matthew26:45 Akadzokazve kuna vadzidzi vake akati kwavari, “Muchiri kungokotsira zvenyu muchitozorora nhai? Tarirai muone kuti nguva yatosvika yavakuturirwa Mwanakomana womunhu mumaoko avatadzi." 
Matthew26:46 Chisimukai tiende, houno anonditengesa wavakusvika.”" 
Matthew26:47 Paakanga achiri kutaura, Judhasi, mumwe wavane gumi navaviri akasvika, nechikwata chikuru chavanhu vaine mapakatwa netsvimbo vachibva kuvapristi vakuru navakuru — vakuru vavanhu." 
Matthew26:48 Mutengesi uya akanga avapa chiratidzo chokuti uyo wandinenge ndatsvoda ndiyeyo, mubatei." 
Matthew26:49 Judhasi akabva auya pana Jesu akati, “Tikukwaziseika, Mudzidzisi,” akabva amutsvoda." 
Matthew26:50 Jesu akati kwaari, “Shamwari, ingoita zvawavinga.” Vakabva vauya vakati Jesu dzvi kumubata." 
Matthew26:51 Ipapo mumwe wavakanga vaina naJesu akatambanudza ruoko rwake ndiye bakatwa rake wee ndokuvaura kudimura nzeve yomuranda womupristi mukuru. 
Matthew26:52 Jesu akamuti, “Dzosera bakatwa rako panzvimbo paro nokuti vose vanoshandisa bakatwa vanofa nebakatwa." 
Matthew26:53 Unofunga here kuti handikwanisi kukumbira Baba vangu, vachinditumira pakarepo zvikwata zvavatumwa zviuru gumi nezviviri." 
Matthew26:54 Ko zvino Magwaro Matsvene anozozadzikiswa sei anoti zvinofanira kuti zvive saizvozvo?” 
Matthew26:55 Panguva iyoyo Jesu akati kuzvikwata zviya zvavanhu, “Nhaimi, mauya kuzondibata segororo, muina mapakatwa netsvimbo? Zuva nezuva ndaigara muTemberi ndichidzidzisa asi hamuna kundibata." 
Matthew26:56 Asi izvi zvaitika kuti Magwaro Matsvene avaporofita azadziswe.” Ipapo vadzidzi vose vakamusiya votiza. 
Matthew26:57 Vaya vakabata Jesu vakaenda naye kuna Kaifasi, mupristi mukuru, kwakanga kwaunganwa nenyanzvi dzomutemo navakuru — vakuru." 
Matthew26:58 Asi Pita akamutevera ari chinhambwe kusvikira paruvanze rwomupristi mukuru. Akapinda akagara pamwechete namapurisa kuti aone pazvinoperera. 
Matthew26:59 Vapristi vakuru nedare rose vakatsvaka uchapupu hwenhema hokunenedzera Jesu kuti vamuuraye 
Matthew26:60 asi vakahushaya kunyange zvazvo vazhinji vakamupupurira zvenhema. Pokupedzisira vaviri vakauya mberi vakati," 
Matthew26:61 “Munhu uyu akati ndinokwanisa kupaza Temberi yaMwari ndichiivaka namazuva matatu.” 
Matthew26:62 Ipapo mupristi mukuru akasimuka akati, “Hauna mhinduro here? Ko mhosva dzaurikupomerwa navanhu ava ndedzei?”" 
Matthew26:63 Asi Jesu akaramba akanyarara. Mupristi mukuru akati kwaari, “Ini ndinoti pika naMwari mupenyu utiudze kuti ndiwe Mesia here Mwanakomana waMwari?”" 
Matthew26:64 Jesu akati kwaari, “Ko inga matozvireva kare moga wani uye ndinokutaurirai kuti kubvira zvino muchatoona Mwanakomana womunhu agere kurudyi rwaSamasimbaose achiuya ari pamakore okudenga.”" 
Matthew26:65 Ipapo mupristi mukuru akabvarura hanzu dzake ashatirwa achiti, “Ashonha Mwari. Tichadirei zvapupu? Manzwa moga kushonha kwake Mwari." 
Matthew26:66 Ko munoti kudii nazvo?” Vakapindura vachiti, “Anofanira kufa.”" 
Matthew26:67 Vakamusvipira mate kumeso, vachimurova. Vamwe vakamurova nembama vachiti," 
Matthew26:68 “Porofitaka tinzwe nhai iwe Mesia kuti akurova ndiani.” 
Matthew26:69 Pita akanga agere panze muruvanze, mumwe musikana webasa akauya kwaari akati, “Newewo wanga uina Jesu wokuGarirea.”" 
Matthew26:70 Asi Pita akazviramba pamberi pavo vose achiti, “Handizivi zvauri kutaura.”" 
Matthew26:71 Paakaenda kumusuo woruvanze, mumwewo musikana webasa akamuona. Akati kune vakanga vamirepo, “Murume uyu akanga ana Jesu weNazareti.”" 
Matthew26:72 Akazvirambazve achitopika achiti, “Handizivi munhu uyu.”" 
Matthew26:73 Kwapera chinguvana, vakanga vamirepo vakauya vakati kuna Pita, “Zvechokwadi iwe uri mumwe wavo nokuti mutauriro wako unokubatisa.”" 
Matthew26:74 Pita akatanga kuzvirengerera rushambwa achitopika achiti, “Handizivi munhu uyu.” Pakarepo jongwe rakabva rakukuridza." 
Matthew26:75 Pita akayeuka zvakanga zvarehwa naJesu zvokuti, “Uchandiramba katatu jongwe risati rakukuridza.” Pita akabuda panze akahwihwidza kuchema zvinosiririsa." 
Matthew27:1 Kuzoti kwaedza vapristi vakuru vose navakuru — vakuru vavanhu vakaita bangano rokuti vauraye Jesu. 
Matthew27:2 Vakamusunga ndokuenda naye vakandomuturira kuno mutongi Pirato. 
Matthew27:3 Judhasi, uya akamutengesa, paakaona kuti Jesu atongerwa rufu akatendeuka akadzorera mari iya yesirivha makumi matatu kuvapristi vakuru navakuru — vakuru achiti," 
Matthew27:4 “Ndakatadza nokutengesa kwandakaita ropa risina mhaka.” Ivo vakati, “Ko isu tinei nazvo. Ndezvako izvo.”" 
Matthew27:5 Judhasi akakanda mari iya yesirivha muTemberi akabva aenda ondozvisungirira. 
Matthew27:6 Asi vapristi vakuru vakatora mari iya yesirivha vakati, “Hazvisi pamutemo kuti tiise mari iyi mudura remari yomuTemberi nokuti imari yeropa.”" 
Matthew27:7 Saizvozvo vakarangana vakatenga nayo munda womuumbi wehari kuti vagosivigamo vatorwa. 
Matthew27:8 Naizvozvo munda iwoyo unonzi “Munda weropa.” Nanhasi uno. 
Matthew27:9 Ndipo pakazadzikiswa zvakataurwa nomuporofita Jeremiya achiti, “Vakatora mari yesirivha makumi matatu waiva mutengo wakatemwa navaIsiraeri wokumutenga nawo." 
Matthew27:10 Ndiyo mari yavakatenga nayo munda womuumbi wehari sokunditaurira kwakaita Tenzi.” 
Matthew27:11 Jesu akamira pamberi pomutongi. Mutongi akamubvunza kuti, “Ndiwe mambo wavaJudha here?” Jesu akati, “Inga matozvireva kare wani.”" 
Matthew27:12 Asi paakapomerwa mhosva navapristi vakuru navakuru — vakuru, haana kupindura." 
Matthew27:13 Ipapo Pirato akati kwaari, “Hausikunzwa here kuwanda kwezvinhu zvavari kukupomera?”" 
Matthew27:14 Asi iye haana kumupindura kunyange mhosva imwechete zvayo zvokuti mutongi zvakamukatyamadza zvikuru. 
Matthew27:15 Zvino pamazuva makuru aya mutongi aiva netsika yokusunungurira vanhu musungwa mumwechete wavainge vada. 
Matthew27:16 Ipapo vakanga vaino musungwa aive nomukurumbira ainzi Bharabhasi. 
Matthew27:17 Saizvozvo vanhu pavakanga vaungana, Pirato akati kwavari, “Ndiani wamunoda kuti ndikusunungurirei, Bharabhasi here kana kuti Jesu anonzi Kristu?”" 
Matthew27:18 Akadaro nokuti aiziva kuti vakanga vaturira Jesu kwaari pamusana peshanje. 
Matthew27:19 Chimwezve ndechokuti paakanga agere pachigaro chokutonga, mudzimai wake akatumira shoko kwaari achiti, “Siyanai nomunhu uyo wakarurama nokuti nhasi ndatambudzika naye zvikuru kuhope.”" 
Matthew27:20 Vapristi vakuru navakuru — vakuru vakagombedzera vanhu kuti vakumbire Bharabhasi asi Jesu aparadzwe. 
Matthew27:21 Mutongi akatizve kwavari, “Pavaviri ava ndiani wamunoda kuti ndikusunungurirei?” Ivo vakati, “Bharabhasi.”" 
Matthew27:22 Pirato akati kwavari, “Ko ndoitei naJesu anonzi Kristu?” Vose vakati, “Ngaarovererwe pamuchinjikwa.”" 
Matthew27:23 Pirato akati, “Nemhaka yei? Akapara mhosva yei? Akatadzei?” Asi vakabva vatonyanya kudaidzira vachiti, “Ngaarovererwe pamuchinjikwa.”" 
Matthew27:24 Pirato paakaona kuti hapana zvazviri kubatsira asi kuti pavakutomuka bongozozo, akatora mvura akageza maoko ake pamberi pemhomho iyoyo achiti, “Handina mhosva paropa romunhu uyu. Chizvionerai moga iyemi.”" 
Matthew27:25 Vanhu vose vakapindura vachiti, “Ropa rake ngaritipfukire isu navana vedu.”" 
Matthew27:26 Akavasunungurira Bharabhasi. Asi ndokurova Jesu zvikuru akamuturira mumaoko avo kuti vamuroverere pamuchinjikwa. 
Matthew27:27 Masoja aPirato akaenda naJesu mumuzinda waGavhuna. Boka rose ramasoja rakamuunganira. 
Matthew27:28 Vakamupfekenura hanzu vakamupfekedza gemenzi dzvuku. 
Matthew27:29 Vakaruka chiremba cheminzwa vakachidzika mumusoro make. Vakamubatisa rutsanga murudyi rwake. Vaipfugama pamberi pake vachimusveeredza vachiti, “Kwaziwaika mambo wavaJudha!”" 
Matthew27:30 Vakamupfira mate vakatora rutsanga ruya vachimurova narwo mumusoro. 
Matthew27:31 Pavakapedza kumuita chiseko, vakamubvisa gemenzi riya vakamupfekedza hanzu dzake ndokuenda naye kundomuroverera pamuchinjikwa." 
Matthew27:32 Pavakanga vakubuda, vakasangana nomumwe murume wokuSairini ainzi Simoni. Vakamanikidza murume iyeyo kutakura muchinjikwa waJesu." 
Matthew27:33 Pavakasvika panzvimbo inonzi Gorogota zvinoreva kuti, “Nzvimbo yedehenya,”" 
Matthew27:34 vakamupa waini yakasanganiswa nenduru kuti anwe. Paakairavira akaramba kuinwa. 
Matthew27:35 Vakati vamuroverera pamuchinjikwa, vakagoverana hanzu dzake vachiita chin'ange." 
Matthew27:36 Vakagara pasi vachimuchengetedza ipapo. 
Matthew27:37 Nechapamusoro vakaisa chiga chemhosva yake chaiti, “UYU NDIJESU MAMBO WAVAJUDHA.”" 
Matthew27:38 Ipapo makororo maviri akarovererwa pamuchinjikwa pamwechete naye, mumwe ari kurudyi mumwe kuruboshe." 
Matthew27:39 Vanhu vaipfuura nepo, vakamuseka vachidzungudza" 
Matthew27:40 musoro vachiti, “Ndiweka unogona kuputsa Temberi uchiivaka namazuva matatu, chizviponeseka kana uri Mwanakomana waMwari buruka pamuchinjikwa.”" 
Matthew27:41 Vapristi vakuru nenyanzvi dzomutemo navakuru vakuru vakamunyombawo vachiti," 
Matthew27:42 “Akaponesa vamwe asi haaagoni kuzviponesa. Ndiyeka mambo wavaIsiraeri. Ngaaburuke pamuchinjikwa iye zvino tigotenda maari. 
Matthew27:43 Anovimba naMwari. Ko iye Mwari ngaachimuponesaka kana achimuda nokuti akati, ‘Ndiri Mwanakomana waMwari.’ ”" 
Matthew27:44 Kunyange makororo aya akanga akarovererwa naye akamunyombawo nenzira imwecheteyo. 
Matthew27:45 Kubvira paawa yegumi nechipiri, masikati nyika yose yakati rima tiba kusvikira paawa yechitatu masikati." 
Matthew27:46 Neawa inenge yechitatu masikati Jesu akadaidzira nezwi guru achiti, “Eri Eri rama sabhakitani” zvinoreva kuti, “Mwari wangu Mwari wangu mandisiireiko.”" 
Matthew27:47 Vamwe vakanga vakamirapo pavakazvinzwa vakati, “Munhu uyu ari kudaidza Eriya.”" 
Matthew27:48 Mumwe wavo, pakarepo, akamhanya akatora chifovefove ndokuchinyika muwaini inovava kusvika chazara. Akachibairira parutsanga akamupa kuti anwe." 
Matthew27:49 Asi vamwe vakati, “Mirai tione kuti Eriya achauya kuzomuponesa here.”" 
Matthew27:50 Jesu akadaidzira zvakare nezwi guru ndokubva afa. 
Matthew27:51 Hero jira romuTemberi rokudzikatirisa rakabva rabvaruka napakati kubvira kumusoro kusvika pasi. Nyika yakandengendeka; matombo akatsemuka. 
Matthew27:52 Makuva akazaruka. Vanhu vazhinji vakafa vatsvene vakamutswa. 
Matthew27:53 Vakabuda mumakuva mushure mokumuka kwake. Vakapinda muguta dzvene vakaonekwa navazhinji. 
Matthew27:54 Mutungamiriri wezana ramasoja navaakanga ainavo vachichengetedza Jesu, vakaona kundengendeka nezvakanga zvaitika vakabatwa nokutya kukuru vakati, “Zvechokwadi uyu anga ari Mwanakomana waMwari.”" 
Matthew27:55 Pakangawo paina madzimai mazhinji ipapo akanga akatarisa ari chinhambwe, akanga atevera Jesu kubva Garirea achimushandira." 
Matthew27:56 Pakati pavo paiva naMaria Maghadharena naMaria amai Jemusi naJosefi namai vavanakomana vaZebhedhi. 
Matthew27:57 Ava manheru kwakauya mumwe murume mupfumi aibva kuArimatia ainzi Josefi aivawo mudzidzi waJesu," 
Matthew27:58 akaenda kuna Pirato akakumbira chitunha chaJesu. Pirato akati ngachipiwe kwaari. 
Matthew27:59 Josefi akatora chitunha ndokuchiputira mufuko rakachena. 
Matthew27:60 Akachiradzika muguva rake idzva raakanga azvichezera mudombo. Akakungurutsira dombo guru pamusuo weguva iroro ndokuenda zvake. 
Matthew27:61 Maria Magadharena nomumwe Maria uya vakanga varipo vakagara pakatarisana neguva iroro. 
Matthew27:62 Ramangwana racho, ndiro zuva romushure mezuva rokugadzirira Sabata, vapristi vakuru navaFarisei vakaungana kuna Pirato vakati," 
Matthew27:63 “Changamire, tinoyeuka kuti munyengedzi uya paakanga achiri mupenyu akati, ‘Mushure memazuva matatu ndichamukazve.’" 
Matthew27:64 Naizvozvo itii guva richengetedzwe kusvika pazuva retatu. Vadzidzi vake vangadaro vakaenda vakamuba vakazotaurira vanhu kuti amuka muvakafa. Kunyengedza kokupedzisira uku kungazova kwakatoipa kupinda kokutanga.” 
Matthew27:65 Pirato akati kwavari, “Ko inga muna masoja wani. Endai mundochengetedza sokuziva kwenyu.”" 
Matthew27:66 Saizvozvo vakaenda vakanyatsochengetedza guva iroro vakaisa micherechedzo padombo iroro wokuti harina kubatwa — batwa nomunhu ndokuisa vokupachengetedza. 
Matthew28:1 Zvino kuzoti Sabata rapfuura, mambakwedza ezuva rokutanga revhiki, Maria Magadharena nomumwe Maria uya vakaenda kuguva." 
Matthew28:2 Heko kundengendeka kukuru kwenyika kwakaitika nokuti mutumwa waMwari akaburuka kubva kudenga. Akauya akakungurutsa dombo riya ndokugara pamusoro paro. 
Matthew28:3 Aitarisika semheni, hanzu dzake dzakachena kuti mbuu samazaya echando." 
Matthew28:4 Mapurisa aya akadedera nokumutya vakati papata sokunge vafa. 
Matthew28:5 Asi mutumwa akati kumadzimai, “Imi musatye henyu nokuti ndinoziva kuti murikutsvaka Jesu akaroverwa pamuchinjikwa." 
Matthew28:6 Haapo pano nokuti amuka sezvaakareva. Uyai muone paanga arere. 
Matthew28:7 Zvino chiendai nokukurumidza mundoudza vadzidzi vake kuti amuka muvafi. Arikufanokutungamirirai kuGarirea. Muchamuona ikoko. Hezvoka ndakutaurirai.” 
Matthew28:8 Nokudaro vakabva paguva nokukurumidza zvabatana nokutya nokufara kukuru. Vakamhanya kundoudza vadzidzi vake. 
Matthew28:9 Jesu akabva asangana navo akati, “Kwaziwai” ivo vakauya kwaari vakabata tsoka dzake vachimugwadamira." 
Matthew28:10 Jesu akati kwavari, “Musatye. Chiendai mundotaurira hama dzangu kuti dziende kuGarirea. Ndiko kwavachandiona ikoko.”" 
Matthew28:11 Madzimai aya pavakanga vachienda, mamwe mapurisa aya akaenda muguta akataurira vapristi vakuru zvose zvakanga zvaitika." 
Matthew28:12 Vakaita dare navakuru vakuru ndokuita zano rokupa masoja chitsama chakati kuti chemari 
Matthew28:13 vachiti, “Taurirai vanhu kuti vadzidzi vake vakauya usiku vakamuba isu takakotsira.”" 
Matthew28:14 Izvi zvikanzwika munzeve dzagavhuna, isu ndisu tichapedzerana naye kuti murege kuva nechinokutambudzai." 
Matthew28:15 Saizvozvowo vakatora mari iya vakaita sezvavakanga vataurirwa. Rungano urwu rwakaparidzirwa muvaJudha kusvika pari nhasi. 
Matthew28:16 Vane gumi nomumwechete vakaenda kuGarirea, kugomo ravakanga vataurirwa naJesu." 
Matthew28:17 Pavakamuona vakamugwadamira asi vamwe vakanga vasina chokwadi nazvo. 
Matthew28:18 Jesu akauya akati kwavari, “Simba rose pasi nokudenga rakapiwa kwandiri." 
Matthew28:19 Naizvozvo endai mundodzidzisa marudzi ose avanhu muvaombeke muzita raBaba neroMwanakomana neraMweya Mutsvene 
Matthew28:20 muchivadzidzisa kuchengeta zvose zvandakuudzai. Uye tarisai muone, ndinemi nguva dzose kusvikira kuguma kwapasi.”" 
Mark1:1 Uku ndiko kutanga kweShoko Rakanaka raJesu Kristu, Mwanakomana waMwari," 
Mark1:2 sokunyorwa kwazvakaitwa muna Isaya muporofita zvichinzi, “Chiona, ndinotuma nhume yangu pamberi pako, ichagadzirira nzira yako." 
Mark1:3 Izwi reanodaidzira ari murenje, achiti, ‘Gadzirirai mugwagwa waTenzi, ruramisai nzira dzake.’ ”" 
Mark1:4 Kurenje kwakazova naJohani aiombeka, achiparidza ruombeko rwokuti vanhu vapinduke varegererwe zvitadzo zvavo." 
Mark1:5 Nyika yose yeJudhea navanhu vose veJerusaremu vakakotonokera kwaari vakaombekwa naye murwizi rwaJorodhani vachireurura zvitadzo zvavo. 
Mark1:6 Johani aipfeka nguwo yemvere dzengamera, aine bhande reganda muchiuno chake. Aidya hwiza nouchi hwomusango." 
Mark1:7 Aiparidza achiti, “Mushure mangu muri kuuya ane simba kupinda ini. Ini handikodzeri kukotama ndichisunungura rukanda rweshangu dzake." 
Mark1:8 Ini ndakuombekai nemvura asi iye achakuombekai naMweya Mutsvene.” 
Mark1:9 Zvino pamazuva iwayo Jesu akauya achibva kuNazareti yokuGarirea akaombekwa naJohani muna Jorodhani. 
Mark1:10 Achangoti budei mumvura, akaona matenga achizaruka naMweya achiburukira pamusoro pake senjiva." 
Mark1:11 Izwi rakabva kudenga richiti, “Iwe ndiwe Mwanakomana wangu wapamwoyo, anondifadza zvikuru.”" 
Mark1:12 Pakarepo Mweya akamuendesa kurenje. 
Mark1:13 Akagara murenje mazuva makumi mana achiedzwa naSatani. Imomo aingova nemhuka dzomusango, asi vatumwa vakanga vachimushandira." 
Mark1:14 Kuzoti Johani asungwa, Jesu akaenda Garirea kundoparidza Shoko Rakanaka raMwari" 
Mark1:15 achiti, “Nguva iya yazokwana zvino, umambo hwaMwari hwava pedyo. Chipindukai mutendhe Shoko Rakanaka.”" 
Mark1:16 Jesu akati achipfuura napagungwa reGarirea akaona Simoni naAndireya munun'una wake vachikanda usvasvi mugungwa nokuti vaiva vabvuvi vehove. 
Mark1:17 Jesu akati kwavari, “Nditeverei, ndigokuitai kuti muve vabvuvi vavanhu.”" 
Mark1:18 Pakarepo vakasiya usvasvi hwavo, vakamutevera." 
Mark1:19 Kuzoti angoti fambe — fambei zvishoma, akaona Jemusi mwanakomana waZebhedhi naJohani munun'una wake vari mugwa ravo vachigadzira usvasvi." 
Mark1:20 Pakarepo Jesu akavadaidza; ivo vakasiya baba vavo Zebhedhi navashandi vari mugwa, vakatevera Jesu." 
Mark1:21 Zvino vakazosvika muKapenaumu. Zvarakanga ravaSabata, Jesu akapinda musinagogu akadzidzisamo." 
Mark1:22 Vanhu vakashamiswa kwazvo norudzidziso rwake nokuti aidzidzisa somunhu ane chiremera, kwete senyanzvi dzoMutemo." 
Mark1:23 Ipapo musinagogu mavo maiva nomunhu aiva nomweya wetsvina. Akazhamba 
Mark1:24 achiti, “Ko, tinei newe Jesu weNazareti? Wauya kuzotiparadza here? Ndinokuziva kuti ndiwe ani, ndiwe Mutsvene waMwari.”" 
Mark1:25 Jesu akaukarira achiti, “Nyarara, buda maari!”" 
Mark1:26 Mweya wetsvina uya wakamupfurupfutisa ndokuridza mhere uchibva wabuda maari. 
Mark1:27 Vanhu vose vakashamiswa kwazvo zvokuti vakabvunzana vachiti, “Ko, chiiko ichi? Chidzidziso chitsvasu! Anotaurira kunyange mweya yetsvina ichimuteera.”" 
Mark1:28 Mukurumbira wake wakabva wapararira kwose kwose, munharaunda yose yeGarirea." 
Mark1:29 Zvino ivo pakarepo vakabva vabva pasinagogu vakandopinda mumba mavanaSimoni naAndireya vaina Jemusi naJohani. 
Mark1:30 Zvino vambhuya vaSimoni vakanga varere muviri wavo wakanga uchipinda chando. Vakabva vataurira Jesu nezvavo. 
Mark1:31 Jesu akaenda akavabata ruoko ndokuvasimudza, denda ndokubva ravasiya, ivo ndokuvashandira." 
Mark1:32 Zvino kuzoti ava manheru, zuva ravira, vanhu vakauya kuna Jesu navose vakanga vachirwara kana vakanga vakagarwa nemweya yakaipa." 
Mark1:33 Guta rose rakaungana pamusuo. 
Mark1:34 Jesu akaporesa vazhinji vaiva namatenda akasiyana — siyana, achidzingawo mweya yakaipa mizhinji; akanga asingabvumiri mweya yakaipa iyoyo kuti itaure chinhu nokuti yakanga ichimuziva." 
Mark1:35 Mangwanani — ngwanani, kuchiri kutema, Jesu akamuka akabuda achienda kunzvimbo isina vanhu kwaakandonamata ikoko." 
Mark1:36 Simoni navamwe vaiva naye vakazotevera vachimutsvaka. 
Mark1:37 Kuzoti vamuwana, vakati kwaari, “Vanhu vose vari kukutsvakai.”" 
Mark1:38 Ipapo Jesu akati kwavari, “Handeyi kumwe, kuna maguta ari pedyo ndigondoparidzawo ikoko, nokuti izvi ndizvo zvandakavinga.”" 
Mark1:39 Nokudaro akafamba neGarirea yose achiparidza mumasinagogu avo, achidzingawo mweya yakaipa." 
Mark1:40 Kwakazouya kwaari munhu aiva namaperembudzi achimuteterera, akapfugama achiti, “Kana muchida henyu munogona kundiporesa nokundichenura.”" 
Mark1:41 Zvino Jesu akamunzwira tsitsi ndokutambanudza ruoko rwake kwaari omubata, ndokuti kwaari, “Ndinoda, chipora uchenurwe.”" 
Mark1:42 Pakarepo maperembudzi ake akabva apera, akabva achenurwa." 
Mark1:43 Zvino Jesu akamutsindidza akamuendesa pakarepo 
Mark1:44 achiti kwaari, “Uone kuti usataurire kana ani zvake; asi enda undozviratidza kumupristi, upe chipo chokuchenurwa kwako sezvakatemwa naMosesi, kuti chive chapupu kuvanhu.”" 
Mark1:45 Asi munhu uya paakangoti budei, akatangisa kuparidzira zvinhu pachena achimwaya kwose kwose nyaya iya zvokuti Jesu haana kuzokwanisa kupinda zviri pachena muguta ripi zvaro. Akatenge ogara kunzvimbo dzisina vanhu, asi vanhu vakauya kwaari vachibva kumativi ose." 
Mark2:1 Kwakangoti pfuurei mazuva akati kuti, akapindazve muKapenaumu. Zvakazonzwika kuti ave pamba." 
Mark2:2 Vanhu vazhinji vakaungana zvokuti pakanga pasisina kana nekanzvimbo kose kakasara, kunyange napamusuo pose; iye akanga achivaparidza shoko." 
Mark2:3 Vamwe vanhu vakauya kwaari nomunhu akanga akatonhora mitezo akatembedzanwa navarume vana. 
Mark2:4 Sezvo vakanga vasingagoni kusvika naye paari, pamusana pokuwanda kwavanhu, vakaita buri padenga remba nechapamusoro pake. Pavakanga vaita gwanza vakadzikisa uvato huya hwakanga hurere munhu akatonhora mitezo." 
Mark2:5 Jesu, paakaona chitendero chavo, akati kumunhu akatonhora mitezo, “Mwanangu, zvitadzo zvako zvaregererwa.”" 
Mark2:6 Ipapo dzimwe nyanzvi dzoMutemo dzakanga dzigeremo dzakazviti nechomumwoyo. 
Mark2:7 “Ko, seiko uyu achitaura achidai? Ari kushonha Mwari! Ndiani angagone kuregerera zvitadzo kunze kwaMwari oga?”" 
Mark2:8 Pakarepo, Jesu zvaakazviziva kuti vaifunga zvakadai mukati mavo, akavati, “Ko munofungireiko zvinhu zvakadai mumwoyo menyu?" 
Mark2:9 Chakareruka ndechipi kuti kumunhu akatonhora mitezo, ‘Zvitadzo zvako zvaregererwa.’ Kana kuti, ‘Simuka utore uvato hwako ufambe.’" 
Mark2:10 Zvino kuti muzive kuti Mwanakomana womunhu ane simba pasi pano rokuregerera zvitadzo.” Akati kuno munhu akatonhora mitezo uya," 
Mark2:11 “Ndinoti kwauri, ‘Simuka utore rukukwe rwako uende kumusha.’ ”" 
Mark2:12 Pakarepo munhu uya akati kwanyanu kusimuka, akatora rukukwe rwake akabuda vose vachiona, zvokuti vose vakashamiswa, vakarumbidza Mwari vachiti, “Aiwaiwa, hatisati tamboona zvakadai kwete.”" 
Mark2:13 Zvino Jesu akabvapo oendazve pedyo negungwa, gungano ravanhu rakauya kwaari akavadzidzisa." 
Mark2:14 Zvino akati achipfuura, akaona Revhi, mwanakomana waArifeo agere pahofisi yomutero akati kwaari, “Nditevere.” Iye akasimuka ndokumutevera." 
Mark2:15 Zvino paakanga agere pakudya mumba maRevhi, vateresi vazhinji navatadzi vakauya vakagara pasi vachidya naJesu navadzidzi vake nokuti vaimutevera vakanga vakawanda." 
Mark2:16 Dzimwe nyanzvi dzoMutemo dzebato ravaFarisei padzakamuona achidya navatadzi navateresi, dzakati kuvadzidzi vake, “Seiko mudzidzisi wenyu achidya navateresi navatadzi?”" 
Mark2:17 Jesu paakazvinzwa akati kwavari, “Vakukutu havadi chiremba, asi vanorwara. Handina kuuya kuzodaidza vakarurama, asi vatadzi.”" 
Mark2:18 Zvino vadzidzi vaJohani navaFarisei vakanga vachitsanya. Vanhu ndokuuya kwaari ndokuti, “Seiko vadzidzi vaJohani navadzidzi vavaFarisei vachitsanya asi vadzidzi venyu vasingatsanyi?”" 
Mark2:19 Jesu akati kwavari, “Mungati vanhu vari pamuchato ngavatsanye here iye muwani vachinaye? Kana muwani vachinaye chete havatsanyi." 
Mark2:20 Asi mazuva achauya achabviswa muwani pavari, pazuva iroro ndipo pavachazotsanya." 
Mark2:21 Hakuna munhu anosonerera chiremo chejira idzva pahanzu tsaru; kana akadaro, chiremo chitsva chinobvarura hanzu tsaru, ikabva yanyanya kubvaruka." 
Mark2:22 Hakuna munhu anodira waini itsva muzvigubhu zvamatehwe zvitsaru, nokuti kana akadaro waini inoputisa zvigubhu, waini inorasika, zvigubhu zvichiparara; asi waini itsva inofanira kudirwa muzvigubhu zvitsva.”" 
Mark2:23 Zvino Jesu akati achipfuura nomuminda yekoroni uri musi weSabata; vadzidzi vake, vachifamba kudaro, vakatangisa kupurura hura dzekoroni." 
Mark2:24 VaFarisei vakati kwaari, “Tarisai muone! Ko, vanoitireiko zvisingabvumirwi nomusi weSabata?”" 
Mark2:25 Akavapindura achiti, “Hamuna kumboverenga here zvakaitwa naDhavhidhi, zviya zvaakanga asina chokudya, oziya nenzara iye navaiva naye," 
Mark2:26 kupinda kwaakaita mumba yaMwari, apo Abhiyatari akanga ari mupristi mukuru akadya zvingwa zvakasumwa kuna Mwari, zvisingabvumirwi kudyiwa naani zvake kunze kwavapristi voga akapawo vaaiva navo?”" 
Mark2:27 Jesu ndokuti kwavari, “Sabata rakaitirwa munhu, munhu haana kusikirwa Sabata, kwete." 
Mark2:28 Saka Mwanakomana womunhu ndiMambo kunyange weSabatawo.” 
Mark3:1 Zvino Jesu akapindazve musinagogu; imomo maiva nomunhu aiva noruoko rwakakokonyara. 
Mark3:2 Vaivamo vakamutarisisa vachida kuona kuti achamuporesa here nomusi weSabata kuti vamupe mhosva. 
Mark3:3 Ipapo Jesu akati kumunhu woruoko rwakakokonyara, “Simuka, umire apa,”" 
Mark3:4 ndokuvati, “Ko, zvinobvumirwa here nomusi weSabata kuita zvakanaka kana kuita zvakaipa; kuponesa munhu kana kuuraya?” Ivo vakati zi — i kunyarara." 
Mark3:5 Zvino iye akaringa — ringa achivatarisa nehasha, achisiririswa nokuomarara mwoyo kwavo, ndokuti kumunhu uya, “Tambanudza ruoko rwako.” Iye ndokutambanudza, ruoko rwake rukabva rwatwasanuka." 
Mark3:6 VaFarisei vakabudamo kundomurangana pakarepo neveboka rokwaHerodhi kuti vangamuuraye sei. 
Mark3:7 Jesu akabvapo navadzidzi vake oenda kugungwa; chitawo chikuru chavanhu vaibva kuGarirea chakatevera uyewo vanhu vakauya kwaari vachibva kuJudhea 
Mark3:8 neJerusaremu, neIdhumia; nokumhiri kwaJorodhani nokunharaunda yeTire neyeSidhoni, chita chikuru chavanhu vakanga vanzwa zvose zvaaiita." 
Mark3:9 Jesu akaudza vadzidzi vake kuti vafanomugadzirira igwa duku kuti arege kuzomanikwa nouzhinji hwavanhu. 
Mark3:10 Sezvo akanga aporesa vazhinji, vose vakanga vaine zvirwere vaitsikinyidzana vachida kumubata." 
Mark3:11 Uye mweya yakaipa payaingomuona yaizviwisira pasi pamberi pake ichidaidzira ichiti, “Iwe, uri Mwanakomana waMwari.”" 
Mark3:12 Asi Jesu aiikohomedza kuti irege kuzivisa vanhu kuti iye ndiani. 
Mark3:13 Zvino Jesu akakwira mugomo ndokudaidza vaaida, ivo ndokuenda kwaari." 
Mark3:14 Akasarudza gumi navaviri kuti vagochigara naye achivatuma kundoparidza," 
Mark3:15 uyezve kuti vave nesimba rokudzinga mweya yakaipa. 
Mark3:16 Vaiti, Simoni, waakapa rimwe zita rokuti Pita," 
Mark3:17 kwouya Jemusi mwana waZebhedhi naJohani munun'una waJemusi vaakapa zita rokuti Bhoanerigesi, zvinoreva kuti vanaKutinhirasemheni" 
Mark3:18 kwozoti Andireya, naFiripi, kwouyawo Bhatoromeo, naMateu, kwozoti Tomasi, naJemusi, mwana waArifeo, uyewo Tadheusi naSimoni muKananai Nyashungu," 
Mark3:19 uyewo ndokuzoti Judhasi Isikarioti uya akazomupandukira. 
Mark3:20 Jesu akaenda kumba; gurumwandira ravanhu ndokubva ramuunganirazve, zvokuti vakatadza kana kudya chaiko." 
Mark3:21 Zvino hama dzake padzakazvinzwa, dzakauya kuzomutora nokuti zvainzi, “Wava kupenga.”" 
Mark3:22 Uyezve nyanzvi dzoMutemo dzakabva Jerusaremu dzaiti, “Akagarwa naBheerizebhuri, uye kuti anodzinga mweya yakaipa nesimba rejinda remweya yakaipa.”" 
Mark3:23 Ipapo Jesu akadaidza vanhu ndokutaura kwavari nemienzaniso, achiti, “Nhaimi, Satani angadzinge Satani seiko?" 
Mark3:24 Kana umambo hwavakuzvirwisa, umambo ihwohwo haungagoni kumira." 
Mark3:25 Kana vemba imwechete vorwisana pachavo, imba iyoyo haigoni kumira." 
Mark3:26 Zvino kana iye Satani ava kuzvirwisa, haangagoni kumira, asi kuti avakutoenda kumagumo ake." 
Mark3:27 Hakuna munhu angapinde mumba merume rine simba kuti aripambe zvinhu zvaro kusatoti atanga arisunga ndokuzopamba zvemba yaro. 
Mark3:28 “Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri, zvitadzo zvose nokushonha Mwari kwose kunoregererwa vanhu." 
Mark3:29 Asi ani naani anoshonha Mweya Mutsvene haachazomboregererwa chitadzo chake; achava nemhosva yechitadzo chinoramba chiripo narini wose.” 
Mark3:30 Akadaro nokuti vakati, “Ane mweya wakaipa.”" 
Mark3:31 Zvino amai vake uye vakoma navanun'una vake vakauya vakamira panze ndokutumira munhu kundomudaidza. 
Mark3:32 Vanhu vazhinji vakanga vagere pasi vakamukomberedza, vakati kwaari, “Amai venyu uye vakoma navanun'una venyu vari panze vari kukudai.”" 
Mark3:33 Iye akavapindura achiti, “Ko, amai vangu navakoma navanun'una vangu ndavanaani?”" 
Mark3:34 Ndokuringa — ringa vaya vakanga vagere vakamukomberedza, ndokuti, “Ava ndivo amai vangu navakoma navanun'una vangu." 
Mark3:35 Ani naani anoita kuda kwaMwari ndiye mukoma nomunun'una neni, ndiye hanzvadzi naamai vangu.”" 
Mark4:1 Jesu akatangazve kudzidzisa ari pedyo negungwa. Mhomho huru yavanhu yakamuunganira, zvokuti akatokwira mugwa ogaramo iro riri mugungwa kudaro. Gungano rose ndokuti chechetere pamucheto wegungwa." 
Mark4:2 Akavadzidzisa zvinhu zvakawanda nemienzaniso. Achinokuvadzidzisa kudaro akati kwavari," 
Mark4:3 “Teererai munzwe, Mukushi akaenda kundokusha mbeu." 
Mark4:4 Paakanga achikusha dzimwe mbeu dzakandowira munzira, shiri ndokuuya dzikadzidya." 
Mark4:5 Dzimwe dzakandowira parukangarahwe padzakashaya ivhu rakadzika; dzakabva dzakurumidza kumera nokuti dzakanga dzisina ivhu rakadzika. 
Mark4:6 Kuzoti zuva rakwira dzakapiswa nezuva, sezvo dzakanga dzisina midzi, dzakashwauruka." 
Mark4:7 Dzimwe mbeu dzakandowira muminzwa; minzwa yakakura ikadzivhunga dzikasaita vana. 
Mark4:8 Dzimwewo dzakandowira muvhu rakanaka dzikamera dzikakura ndokuberekana, dzimwe ndokuita makumi matatu, dzimwe makumi matanhatu dzimwewo zana.”" 
Mark4:9 Akazoti, “Ane nzeve dzokunzwa ngaanzwe.”" 
Mark4:10 Kuzoti ava oga, vakanga vanaye pamwechete navane gumi navaviri vakamubvunza nezvemienzaniso." 
Mark4:11 Iye ndokuti kwavari, “Imi makapiwa zvakavanzika zvoumambo hwaMwari asi kune vokunze zvose zvinopiwa nemienzaniso, kuti," 
Mark4:12 “Kutarisisa vatarisise zvavo asi vasina zvavanoona. Kuteerera vateererese zvavo asi vasinganzwisisi nokuti vangadaro vakapinduka vakazoregererwa.” 
Mark4:13 Ipapo Jesu akati kwavari, “Ko, hamuna kunzwisisa muenzaniso uyu here? Ko zvino muchazonzwisisa sei mienzaniso yose." 
Mark4:14 Mukushi anomwaya izwi. 
Mark4:15 Vari munzira munokushwa izwi, ndivo vaya vanoti kana vanzwa, pakarepo Satani anouya obvisa izwi rakushwa mavari." 
Mark4:16 Ndizvozvo zvimwechete navakakushwa parukangarahwe, vanoti kana vanzwa izwi vanobva varigamuchira pakarepo norufaro;" 
Mark4:17 asi havana midzi mavari, vanongovapo kwechinguvana chete. Zvino kana dambudziko nokushushirwa izwi zvauya vanobva vatsauka pakarepo." 
Mark4:18 Vanokushwa muminzwa ndivo vaya vanonzwa izwi," 
Mark4:19 asi kuzvidya mwoyo nezvapasi pano nokutorwa mwoyo noupfumi, uyezve ruchiva rwezvimwe zvinhu, zvinopinda zvovhunga izwi, rokundikana kubereka michero." 
Mark4:20 Vakakushwa muvhu rakanaka ndivo vaya vanonzwa shoko nokurigamuchira nokubereka michero, dzimwe makumi matatu, dzimwe makumi matanhatu, dzimwe zana.”" 
Mark4:21 Akatizve kwavari, “Ko mwenje unounzirwa kuti ukwidibirwe nedengu here kana kuti uiswe pasi pomubhedha here? Handiti kuti ugoiswa pachidzimikiro?" 
Mark4:22 Chinhu chose chakavanzika chakavanzirwa kuti chizoburitswa pachena; hakunawo chinhu chakavigwa chisingazobudi pachena. 
Mark4:23 Ane nzeve dzokunzwa ngaanzwe.” 
Mark4:24 Akati kwavari, “Nyatsochenjerai zvamuri kunzwa: chiereso chamunoera nacho, ndicho chamuchaererwawo nacho, uye muchapamidzirwa." 
Mark4:25 Nokuti uyo anazvo achawedzerwa, nouyo asina, kunyange chaanacho achachitorerwa.”" 
Mark4:26 Akatizve, “Umambo hwaMwari hwakadaizvi, hwakaita somunhu anomwaya mbeu muvhu." 
Mark4:27 Angavate zvake usiku, masikati achimukawo, asi mbeu iya inomera ichitokura, iye asingambozivi kuti zvinoitika sei." 
Mark4:28 Zvinongoitika pachazvo zvoga kuti ivhu rinobereka zvirimwa, pokutanga nhungo, teverei hura, ndokuzouya koroni yakakora pahura dziya." 
Mark4:29 Zvino kana koroni yaibva, anobva apinza jeko kuicheka, nokuti kukohwa kwasvika.”" 
Mark4:30 Akatizve, “Umambo hwaMwari tingauenzanise neiko? Uye tingahufananidze nomuenzanisoiko?" 
Mark4:31 Hwakaita setsanga yamasitadhi yokuti painodyarwa muvhu, inenge iri duku duku pane mbeu dzose dzapasi pose." 
Mark4:32 Asi kana yadyarwa inokura kwazvo kudarika magwenzi ose. Inoita mapazi makuru, zvokuti shiri dzedenga dzinogona kuvaka matendere adzo mumumvuri wayo.”" 
Mark4:33 Nemienzaniso mizhinji yakadai aivataurira izvi maererano nezvavaikwanisa kubata. 
Mark4:34 Haaimbotaura kwavari asingashandisi mienzaniso. Asi pavainge vava voga aizotsanangura zvose kuvadzidzi vake. 
Mark4:35 Kuzoti ava manheru ezuva rakarero akavati, “Ngatichiyambukirai mhiri.”" 
Mark4:36 Vakasiya vanhu vazhinji vaya, vakamutora voenda naye ari mugwa sezvaakanga arimo nakare. Kwakanga kuina mamwe magwa aiva naye." 
Mark4:37 Ipapo dutu guru rakamuka, mafungu akaroverera pagwa achipindamo zvokuti igwa rakanga rotoda kuzara nemvura." 
Mark4:38 Asi iye akanga ari mugwa necheshure akakotsira akatsamira pamutsago. Vadzidzi vake vakumumutsa vachiti kwaari, “Mudzidzisi hamuna hanya here kuti tava kupera?”" 
Mark4:39 Jesu akamuka akakarira dutu achiti kugungwa, “Nyarara! Udzikame!” Dutu rakati zi — i kunyarara, kukabva kwanyatsoti dzikadzika." 
Mark4:40 Zvino Jesu akati kwavari, “Sei muchitya kudai? Hamuna chitendero here?”" 
Mark4:41 Ivo vakabatwa nokutya kukuru, ndokutaurirana vachiti, “Ko uyu ndianiko uyu anoteererwa kunyange nemhepo negungwa?”" 
Mark5:1 Vakazosvika mhiri kwegungwa, kudunhu ravaGerasa." 
Mark5:2 Jesu achingobuda mugwa, akasangana nomunhu aiva nomweya wakaipa, achibva kumakuva." 
Mark5:3 Munhu uyu aigara mumakuva. Pakanga pasisina kana nomunhu zvake aigona kumusunga kunyange nengetani," 
Mark5:4 nokuti aimbosungwa namajoti nengetani kazhinji, asi aidambura ngetani nokuita majoti udimbu — udimbu. Naizvozvo kwakanga kusisina aigona kumudzikamisa." 
Mark5:5 Nguva dzose, siku nesikati, ainge ari ikoko kumakuva nomumakomo achingozhambarara uye achizvicheka — cheka namabwe." 
Mark5:6 Paakaona Jesu achiri chinhambwe, akamhanyira kwaari akamupfugamira," 
Mark5:7 ndokuzhamba nezwi guru achiti, “Unei neni, Jesu Mwanakomana waMwari Wokumusorosoro. Ndinoti nezita raMwari rega, kunditambudza.”" 
Mark5:8 Nokuti Jesu akanga amuti, “Iwe mweya wetsvina, buda mumunhu uyu.”" 
Mark5:9 Jesu akamubvunza kuti, “Zita rako ndiani?” Iye akapindura achiti, “Zita rangu ndinonzi Hondo nokuti takawanda.”" 
Mark5:10 Akateterera Jesu chaizvo kuti arege kuidzingira kunze kwedunhu iroro. 
Mark5:11 Ipapo paiva nedanga guru renguruve dzakanga dzichifura zvadzo mujinga megomo. 
Mark5:12 Mweya iya yakamuteterera ichiti, “Titumirei zvedu munguruve kuti tipinde madziri.”" 
Mark5:13 Akaibvumidza. Mweya yakaipa yakabuda ikandopinda munguruve dziya. Danga rose renguruve dzaikarosvitsa zviuru zviviri dzakati ware dzoteremuka napamawere ndokunoti rove — rove mugungwa kunyuramo. 
Mark5:14 Vafudzi vadzo ndokutiwo ware kutiza vakandotaurira vanhu veguta nevemumaruwa. Vanhu vakauya kuzoona zvakanga zvaitika. 
Mark5:15 Pavakasvika pana Jesu vakaona munhu uya aipoterwa nemweya yakaipa agere zvake, akatosimirawo, pfungwa dzake dzatodzikama, iye uya aiva nehondo yemweya yakaipa, vakabva vatya." 
Mark5:16 Vaya vakanga vazviona vakarondedzera vanhu zvakanga zvaitika kumunhu akanga akapoterwa nemweya yakaipa nezvakaitikawo kunguruve. 
Mark5:17 Ivo vakatanga kukumbira Jesu kuti abve zvake mudunhu ravo. 
Mark5:18 Paakanga ava kupinda mugwa, munhu uya akambenge akapoterwa nemweya yakaipa akamuteterera kuti aende naye." 
Mark5:19 Asi Jesu haana kumubvumira, akatomuti, “Chienda kumusha kwako, kuhama dzako, undodziudza zvawaitirwa naTenzi nokukunzwira tsitsi kwaaita.”" 
Mark5:20 Munhu uya akabvapo ndokutanga kuparidza mudunhu reDhekapori zvinhu zvaakaitirwa naJesu. Vanhu vose vakashamiswa kwazvo nazvo. 
Mark5:21 Zvino kuzoti Jesu ayambukirazve mhiri kwegungwa negwa, vanhu vazhinji vakamuunganira. Akanga ari padyo negungwa." 
Mark5:22 Zvino mumwe wavatungamiri vesinagogu, ainzi Jairosi akasvikapo. Pakuona kwakaita Jesu, akazviwisira patsoka dzake." 
Mark5:23 Akamuteterera kwazvo achiti, “Mwanasikana wangu muduku atova kutandadza. Uyai, muise maoko enyu paari aporeswe, ararame.”" 
Mark5:24 Jesu akaenda naye. Gurusvusvu ravanhu rakamutevera richidzvinyirirana naye. 
Mark5:25 Zvino paiva nomumwe mukadzi aiva nechirwere chebaro kwamakore gumi namaviri. 
Mark5:26 Akanga aona nhamo mudzin'anga dzakawanda maaifamba, maakanga apedzera zvinhu zvake zvose asi pasina kana chiyamuro; akatenge otonyanya kurwara." 
Mark5:27 Zvaakanga anzwa nezvaJesu akauya necheshure kwake, ari mukati moruzhinji, ndokusvikobata hanzu yake," 
Mark5:28 nokuti aiti, “Kana ndikangobata kunyange hanzu dzake bedzi, ndichabva ndapora.”" 
Mark5:29 Pakarepo ropa rakabva raganhuka kubuda, akabva azvinzwa mumuviri wake kuti chirwere charapwa." 
Mark5:30 Pakarepowo Jesu akabva aziva nechomumwoyo kuti simba rabuda maari; akatendeukira mukati megurusvusvu ravanhu achiti, “Ndiani abata hanzu yangu?”" 
Mark5:31 Ipapo vadzidzi vake vakati kwaari, “Muri kuona gurusvusvu ravanhu richidzvinyirirana nemi, asi imi moti, ‘Ndiani andibata?’ ”" 
Mark5:32 Akaringa — ringa achida kuona kuti akanga aita izvi ndiani. 
Mark5:33 Mukadzi uya, achiziva zvakanga zvaitika kwaari, zvakanga zvoti kutya, zvikati kungwenda ndokuuya ozviwisira mberi kwake omuudza chokwadi chizere." 
Mark5:34 Iye ndokumuti, “Mukunda, chitendero chako chakuporesa; chienda hako norugare, uyezve chirwere chako ngachipere uve wadi.”" 
Mark5:35 Achiri kutaura kudaro, vamwe vakabva kumba kwomutungamiri wesinagogu uya vachiti, “Mwanasikana wenyu atofa. Muchiri kunetserei mudzidzisi?”" 
Mark5:36 Jesu paakazvinzwa, akati kumutungamiri wesinagogu, “Regai henyu kutya ingotendai bedzi.”" 
Mark5:37 Haana kubvumira vamwe vose kumutevera kusiya Pita, naJemusi, naJohani munun'una waJemusi." 
Mark5:38 Zvino pavakasvika kumba kwomutungamiri wesinagogu, akawana paine mhere mhere kwazvo yokuchema nokuungudza kukuru." 
Mark5:39 Paakapinda akati kwavari, “Seiko muchiita mhere mhere muchichema kudai? Mwana haana kufa kwete, asi akakotsira.”" 
Mark5:40 Ivo vakamuseka. Zvino akaburitsa vose panze, akatora baba vomwana naamai vake navaya vaaiva navo, ndokupinda maiva nomwana." 
Mark5:41 Akamubata ruoko ndokuti kwaari, “Tarita kumi,” zvinoreva kuti, “Musikana, ndinoti kwauri muka.”" 
Mark5:42 Pakarepo musikana uya akasimuka, ndokufamba (sezvo akanga ava namakore gumi namaviri). Vanhu vose vakabva vashamiswa zvikuru kwazvo." 
Mark5:43 Jesu akavakohomedza kuti zvirege kuzivikanwa kana nomunhu zvake ndokuvaudza kuti vape musikana chokudya. 
Mark6:1 Jesu akabvapo akaenda kudunhu rokwake; vadzidzi vake vakamutevera. 
Mark6:2 Kuzoti wava musi weSabata, akatanga kudzidzisa musinagogu. Vazhinji vakamunzwa vakashamiswa kwazvo vachiti, “Ko nhaimi, uyu akawanepiko zvinhu izvi? Ko ungwaru hworudziiko hwakapiwa kune munhu uyu? Naizvoka zvishamiso zvaanoita namaoko ake!" 
Mark6:3 Ko handiye muvezi here uyu, mwana waMaria, mukomanomunun'una nanaJemusi naJosesi naJudhasi naSimoni. Ko hanzvadzi dzake hadzisi pano nesu here?” Vakabva vamugumbukira." 
Mark6:4 Jesu ndokuti kwavari, “Hakuna kwaasingaremekedzwi muporofita kusara kwomudunhu rokwake, nomukati mehama dzake nomukati mevemba yake.”" 
Mark6:5 Haana kuzogona kuita kana nechishamiso zvacho ikoko; akangoisa maoko ake pamisoro yavarwere vashomanana akavaporesa. 
Mark6:6 Akashamiswa kwazvo nokusadavira kwavo. Akapota nemisha achidzidzisa. 
Mark6:7 Akadaidza vane gumi navaviri kwaari ndokutanga kuvatuma vari vaviri vaviri achivapawo simba pamusoro pemweya yetsvina. 
Mark6:8 Akavaudza kuti varege kutakura chinhu parwendo rwavo kusiya tsvimbo chete, varege kutakura chingwa kana tsapo kana mari zvayo mumindya yavo." 
Mark6:9 Shangu vangapfeka zvavo, asi vagorega kupfeka hanzu mbiri." 
Mark6:10 Akatizve kwavari, “Kwose kwose kwamunopinda mumba, garai imomo kusvikira mazobvako." 
Mark6:11 Panzvimbo ipi neipi pavasingakugamuchirei kana pavasingakuteererei, pakubvapo kwenyu, gumai guruva retsoka dzenyu kuti rive chapupu kwavari.”" 
Mark6:12 Nokudaro vakaenda vakandoparidza kuti vanhu vapinduke. 
Mark6:13 Vakadzinga mweya yakaipa mizhinji, vakazorawo varwere vazhinji mafuta, vachivaporesa." 
Mark6:14 Zvino mambo Herodhi akanzwa zvose izvi, nokuti zita raJesu rakanga rava nomukurumbira. Vamwe vaiti, “Johani Muombeki akamutswa muvafi, ndosaka ana masimba akadai maari okuita zvishamiso.”" 
Mark6:15 Asi vamwe vaiti ndiEriya, vamwewo vachiti, “Muporofita akangofananawo navamwe vaporofita vakare.”" 
Mark6:16 Asi Herodhi, paakanzwa izvi, akati, “Johani uya wandakadimbura musoro ndiye akamutswa.”" 
Mark6:17 Nokuti Herodhi uyu akanga atuma vanhu kundobata Johani akamuisa mujeri pamusana paHerodhiasi, mudzimai waFiripi, munun'una wake waakatora." 
Mark6:18 Nokuti Johani aiti kuna Herodhi, “Hazvibvumirwi kuti iwe ugare nomukadzi womunun'una wako.”" 
Mark6:19 Ipapo Herodhiasi aiva nedaka naJohani, achida kumuuraya, asi akakoniwa." 
Mark6:20 Pamusana pokuti Herodhi aitya Johani nokuti aiziva kuti munhu wakarurama, mutsvene, aimudzivirira. Zvaimutambudza kwazvo kunzwa zvaaireva asi zvaimufadza kuteerera zvaaitaura." 
Mark6:21 Zvino zuva rakanga rakamirirwa naHerodhiasi rakazosvika nomusi wokupemberera kuberekwa kwaHerodhi. Pazuva iroro, Herodhi akaitira mabiko vakuru — vakuru vehurumende yake navatungamiriri vehondo navakuru — vakuru veGarirea." 
Mark6:22 Mwanasikana waHerodhiasi akapinda akatamba akafadza Herodhi navakanga vagere pakudya naye. Ipapo mambo akati kumusikana, “Ndikumbire hako chero chaunoda ndinokupa.”" 
Mark6:23 Uyezve akatopika kwaari achiti, “Ukandikumbira chipi nechipi zvacho ndinokupa, kunyange chikava chikamu chepakati nepakati chezvoushe hwangu.”" 
Mark6:24 Zvino musikana uya akabuda panze akabvunza amai vake achiti, “Chii chandingakumbire?” Ivo vakati, “Musoro waJohani anoombeka.”" 
Mark6:25 Musikana akabva apinda makare nokuchimbidza kuna Mambo ndokukumbira achiti, “Ndinoda kuti mundipe iye zvino, mudhishi, musoro waJohani Muombeki.”" 
Mark6:26 Mambo zvakamurwadza chaizvo, asi nokuda kwemhiko dzake dzaakanga aita, uye pamusana pavaenzi vake, haana kuda kuramba." 
Mark6:27 Pakarepo mambo akatuma musoja wokuchengetedza mambo achimuti auye nomusoro waJohani. Iye akaenda akandomudimura musoro mujeri muya," 
Mark6:28 ndokuuya nawo uri mudhishi, akaupa kumusikana; musikana ndokuupawo kuna amai vake." 
Mark6:29 Zvino vadzidzi vaJohani zvavakazvinzwa, vakaenda, vakatora chitunha chake ndokuchiviga muguva." 
Mark6:30 Zvino vapositori vakadzoka kuna Jesu vachimurondedzera zvose zvavakanga vaita nezvavakanga vadzidzisa. 
Mark6:31 Ipapo iye akati kwavari, “Chiuyai imi muri moga tiende kunzvimbo isina vanhu mumbozorora.” Nokuti vanhu vazhinji vakarambouya nokuenda zvokuti vakanga vachishaiswa kunyange nenguva yokudya." 
Mark6:32 Vakabvapo negwa ndokuenda pachavo vari voga kunzvimbo isina vanhu. 
Mark6:33 Vanhu vazhinji vakavaona vachienda vakabva vavaziva ndokumhanyirako netsoka vachibva mumaguta ose, vakavatangira kusvikako."
