Mark6:34 Kuzoti Jesu asvikako akaona kuwanda kwavanhu ndokubva avanzwira tsitsi nokuti vakanga vakaita sehwai dzisina mufudzi, ndokutanga kuvadzidzisa zvinhu zvizhinji." 
Mark6:35 Kuzoti zvino zuva rarereka, vadzidzi vake vakauya kwaari voti, “Ino inzvimbo isina vanhu uye zuva rarereka iri," 
Mark6:36 chiitai kuti vanhu vaende kumaruwa nokumisha yakapoteredza vandozvitengera zvokudya.” 
Mark6:37 Asi iye akavapindura achiti, “Vapei, iyemi, zvokudya.” Ivo ndokuti kwaari, “Mungati tiende tingondotenga zvingwa zvamazana maviri amadhenari kuti tigozovapa vadye here?”" 
Mark6:38 Iye ndokuvati, “Ko mune zvingwa zvingani? Endai mundotarisa.” Kuzoti vazviona, vakati, “Zvishanu nehove mbiri.”" 
Mark6:39 Iye akati vanhu vose vagariswe pasi pauswa hunyoro vakaita zvikwata — zvikwata. 
Mark6:40 Vakabva vagara pasi vakaita mapato — mapato, mamwe ezana mamwe emakumi mashanu." 
Mark6:41 Zvino akatora zvingwa zviya zvishanu nehove mbiri akatarisa kudenga ndokukomborera akamedura zvingwa zviya ozvipa kuvadzidzi kuti vape vanhu. Akavagoverawo vose hove dziya mbiri. 
Mark6:42 Vose vakadya; vakaguta. 
Mark6:43 Vakaunganidza zvimedu zvakasara zvezvingwa nezvehove zvikazadza matengu gumi namaviri. 
Mark6:44 Vakadya zvingwa zviya vaiva varume zviuru zvishanu. 
Mark6:45 Pakarepo akagombedzera vadzidzi vake kuti vakwire mugwa vafanoenda mhiri kuBhetisaidha iye achimboonekana negungano ravanhu riya. 
Mark6:46 Kuzoti apedza kuonekana navo, akakwira mugomo kundonamata." 
Mark6:47 Kuzoti ava madeko, igwa rakanga rava nechapakati pegungwa; iye achiri pavhu pakaoma oga." 
Mark6:48 Akazviona kuti vaishingaira kwazvo nokukwasva, nokuti mhepo yakanga yakanangana navo. Panguva inenge yomurirakamwe akauya kwavari achifamba pamusoro pegungwa, akaita soopfuurira." 
Mark6:49 Zvavakamuona achifamba pamusoro pegungwa, vakafunga kuti idzimudzangara, ndokubva varidza mhere;" 
Mark6:50 nokuti vose vakamuona vakatya kwazvo. Pakarepo akabva ataura navo achiti, “Tsungai mwoyo. Ndini. Musatye.”" 
Mark6:51 Akakwira mugwa muya mavaiva, mhepo ndokubva yanyarara. Vadzidzi vake vakashamiswa zvikuru," 
Mark6:52 nokuti havana kunge vanzwisisa nezvezvingwa zviya pamusana pokuti mwoyo yavo yakanga yakaomarara. 
Mark6:53 Zvino kuzoti vayambuka mhiri, vakasvika kudunhu reGenesareti ndokusungirira igwa pamahombekombe." 
Mark6:54 Vakati vachibuda mugwa riya vanhu vakabva vangomuziva. 
Mark6:55 Vanhu vakamhanyidzana mudunhu iroro rose. Vakatanga kutakura varwere pauvato hwavo vachienda navo kwose kwavainge vanzwa kuti ndokwaari. 
Mark6:56 Kuri kwose kwaakapinda mumisha, nomumaguta, nomumaruwa, vanhu vaivanzarika varwere pamisika vachimukumbirisa kuti varwere vabate kana mupendero zvawo wehanzu yake. Vose vakaubata vakaporeswa." 
Mark7:1 Zvino vaFarisei vakaunganira Jesu pamwechete nedzimwe nyanzvi dzoMutemo dzakanga dzabva kuJerusaremu. 
Mark7:2 Vakaona kuti vamwe vavadzidzi vake vaidya chingwa namaoko ane tsvina, zvinoreva kuti, asina kushambwa," 
Mark7:3 nokuti vaFarisei navaJudha vose havadyi chinhu vasina kunyatsoshamba maoko avo vachitevedza magamuchidzanwa etsika dzamadzitateguru avo 
Mark7:4 nokuti kana vachinge vabva kumusika havambodya chinhu vasina kushamba. Dziripo dzimwe tsika zhinji dzavakatora kumadzitateguru avo dzavanochengeta sokuti kusuka komichi, nehari, nemidziyo yekopa (nemibhedha)." 
Mark7:5 Ipapo vaFarisei nenyanzvi dzoMutemo vakamubvunza vachiti, “Ko vadzidzi venyu vanoregererei kuchengeta tsika dzamagamuchidzwanwa dzamadzitateguru, zvavanodyazve chingwa namaoko ane tsvina?”" 
Mark7:6 Akavapindura achiti, “Inga muporofita Isaya akataura chokwadi nezvenyu, imi vanyengedzi, sokunyorwa kwazvakaitwa zvichinzi: “ ‘Vanhu ava vanondikudza zvapamuromo chete asi mwoyo yavo iri kure neni." 
Mark7:7 Kundinamata kwavo ndokwonhando nokuti vanodzidzisa sechokwadi chaicho, zvinhu zvakatemwa zvavo navanhu.’" 
Mark7:8 “Munokanda pasi murao waMwari kuti muti dzvemere namagamuchidzanwa etsika dzavanhu.” 
Mark7:9 Akatizve kwavari: “Makanyatsozviwanira nzira yokunzvenga nayo murao waMwari kuti muwane machengetero amagamuchidzanwa etsika dzenyu,”" 
Mark7:10 nokuti Mosesi akati, “Kudza baba vako naamai vako uye anotuka baba vake kana amai vake anofanira kutofa.”" 
Mark7:11 Asi imi munoti, “Kana munhu akati kuna baba kana kuna amai vake, ‘Chinhu chandingadai ndakuyamurai nacho chave Korobhani’ (zvichireva kuti chipo chasumwa kuna Mwari)," 
Mark7:12 hamuzomubvumira kuyamura baba vake kana amai vake. 
Mark7:13 Nokudaro munoita kuti shoko raMwari rive chinhu pasina, pamusana pamagamuchidzanwa etsika dzenyu amunogamuchidzana; munoitawo zvimwe zvizhinji zvakafanana nezvizvi.”" 
Mark7:14 Akadaidza zvakare chita chavanhu ndokuti kwavari, “Nditeererei munzwe mose munzwisise." 
Mark7:15 Hapana chinhu chinobva kunze kwomunhu chichipinda maari chinogona kumun'oresa asi zvinobva mumunhu ndizvo zvinomun'oresa. 
Mark7:16 (Ane nzeve dzokunzwa ngaanzwe.)” 
Mark7:17 Paakanga apinda mumba, abva zvino pavanhu, vadzidzi vake vakamubvunza nezvomuenzaniso uyu." 
Mark7:18 Iye ndokuti kwavari, “Heya kana nemiwo hamunzwisisi nhai? Hamuoni here kuti chinhu chinopinda mumunhu chichibva kunze hachigoni kumun'oresa" 
Mark7:19 nokuti hachipindi mumwoyo make, asi mudumbu make chichizobva chorasirwa kunze?” (Nokudaro akachenura zvokudya zvose.)" 
Mark7:20 Ipapo akati, “Zvinobuda mumunhu ndizvo zvinomun'oresa." 
Mark7:21 Nokuti imomo mumwoyo yavanhu, ndimo munobva pfungwa dzakaipa, nounzenza, nokuba, nokuuraya," 
Mark7:22 noupombwe, noruchiva nomwoyo wakaipa, nounyengedzi nokusazvibata, neshanje, nokushonha Mwari nokuzvikudza noupenzi." 
Mark7:23 Zvakaipa zvose izvi zvinobva mukati, uye zvinon'oresa munhu.”" 
Mark7:24 Jesu akazobvapo akaenda kudunhu reTire neSidhoni akapinda mune imwe imba asingadi kuti zvizivikanwe nomunhu, asi haaigona kuvanzika." 
Mark7:25 Asi kutoti pakarepo mumwe mudzimai aiva nomwana wake musikana muduku akanga ano mweya wakaipa, akanzwa nezvake akauya ndokuzviwisira patsoka dzake." 
Mark7:26 Mudzimai uyu aiva muGiriki worudzi rweSirofonikia. Akamukumbira kuti adzinge mweya wakaipa waiva mumwanasikana wake. 
Mark7:27 Iye ndokuti kwaari, “Regai vana vatange vaguta; nokuti hazvina kunaka kutora chingwa chavana uchichikandira imbwanana.”" 
Mark7:28 Asi iye akamupindura achiti, “Hongu zvazvo Tenzi, inga wani kunyange imbwanana dziri pasi petafura dzinodya hurubvurubvu hwechingwa chavana.”" 
Mark7:29 Iye ndokumuti, “Pamusana pezvawataura izvi chienda zvako; mweya wakaipa watobva mumwanasikana wako.”" 
Mark7:30 Mudzimai uya akabva aenda kumba kwake akasvikowana mwana avete pamubhedha mweya wakaipa wabva maari. 
Mark7:31 Zvino Jesu akabva mudunhu reTire akapfuura nomuSidhoni achinanga kugungwa reGarirea; akaenda napakati penyika yeDhekaporisi. 
Mark7:32 Vanhu vakauya kwaari nomunhu akanga ari matsi asingagoni kunyatsotaura. Vakamuteterera kuti aise ruoko rwake paari. 
Mark7:33 Iye akamutora parutivi kubva kuruzhinji rwavanhu voenda pavo voga. Akapinza minwe yake munzeve dzake; akapfira mate ndokubata rurimi rwake. 
Mark7:34 Ipapo akatarisa kudenga ndokutura befu oti kwaari, “Efata,” zvichireva kuti, “Dziuka.”" 
Mark7:35 Pakarepo nzeve dzake dzakabva dzadziuka, kadzita korurimi rwake rakabva kasununguka, ndokubva ava kugona kutaura zvakanaka." 
Mark7:36 Akavatsindidza kuti vasataurire izvi kuna ani zvake. Asi sokunyanya kutsindidza kwaakavaita, vakabva vatonyanyawo kuzviparidzira." 
Mark7:37 Vanhu vakashamiswa chaizvo vachiti, “Akaita zvakanaka zvinhu zvose zvaakaita. Anoita kuti kunyange vamatsi vanzwe nembeveve dzitaure.”" 
Mark8:1 Namazuva iwayo gungano guru ravanhu parakaungana zvakare, uye vakanga vasisina chokudya akadaidza vadzidzi vake akati kwavari," 
Mark8:2 “Ndine urombo kwazvo negungano ravanhu iri nokuti vanga vaneni kwamazuva matatu aya, zvino havachisina chokudya." 
Mark8:3 Kana ndikavaendesa kumisha yavo vaine nzara vachaziya panzira nokuti vamwe vavo vabva kure.” 
Mark8:4 Vadzidzi vake vakamupindura vachiti, “Pane angawane zvingwa mugwenga muno here zvingagutse vanhu ava?”" 
Mark8:5 Akavabvunza kuti, “Mune zvingwa zvingani?” Ivo vakati, “Zvinomwe.”" 
Mark8:6 Zvino akati vanhu ngava gare pasi. Akatora zvingwa zvinomwe zviya akatenda, ndokuzvimedura ozvipa vadzidzi vake kuti vape vanhu. Ivo ndokuzvipa kuvanhu." 
Mark8:7 Uye vakanga vane tuhove tushoma. Akatukomborera akati, “Kunyange itwotwu tupihwe vanhu.”" 
Mark8:8 Vanhu vakadya vakaguta, vakazonhongerera zvimedu zvakasara zvikazadza nhengwana nomwe." 
Mark8:9 Pakanga paine zviuru zvinenge zvina zvavanhu. Akazoonekana navanhu," 
Mark8:10 pakarepo ndokubva akwira mugwa navadzidzi vake akaenda kudunhu reDharimanuta. 
Mark8:11 Zvino vaFarisei vakauya kwaari, vakatanga kuitirana nharo naye, vachitsvaka kwaari chiratidzo chinobva kudenga, kuri kumuedza." 
Mark8:12 Akashungurudzika mumwoyo make akati, “Chizvarwa ichi chinotsvakireiko chiratidzo? Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri, ‘Hakuna chiratidzo chichapiwa kuchizvarwa ichi.’ ”" 
Mark8:13 Akabva avasiya, ndokukwirazve mugwa oyambukira mhiri." 
Mark8:14 Zvino vakanga vakanganwa kutakura chingwa, kunze kwechimwechete chavakanga vanacho mugwa." 
Mark8:15 Jesu akavayambira achiti, “Chenjerai mungwarire mbiriso yavaFarisei neyaHerodhi.”" 
Mark8:16 Vakakurukurirana pachavo vachiti, “Hatina chingwa.”" 
Mark8:17 Jesu akazviziva akavati, “Nemhaka yei muchitaurirana kuti hamuna chingwa? Hamusati maziva kana kunzwisisa here, mwoyo yenyu mikukutu kanhi?" 
Mark8:18 Mune meso, asi hamuoni nhai? Mune nzeve asi hamunzwe nhai? Hamuyeuke here" 
Mark8:19 zviya zvandakamedurira zviuru zvishanu zvavanhu, zvingwa zvishanu; makaunganidza matengu mangani azere ezvimedu?” Vakati kwaari, “Gumi namaviri.”" 
Mark8:20 “Ko paya pandakamedurira zviuru zvina zvavanhu zvingwa zvinomwe, makaunganidza nhengwana dzizere ngani dzezvimedu?” Vakati kwaari, “Nomwe.”" 
Mark8:21 Iye ndokuti kwavari, “Hamusati mavakunzwisisa nanhasi here?”" 
Mark8:22 Vakazosvika kuBhetisaidha, vamwe vanhu vakauya kwaari nomunhu akanga ari bofu. Vakakumbira Jesu kuti amubate." 
Mark8:23 Akamubata ruoko oenda naye kunze kwomusha. Akapfira mate pamaziso ake, akaisa maoko ake paari ndokumubvunza kuti, “Pane chaunoona here?”" 
Mark8:24 Akatarisa akati, “Ndiri kuona vanhu asi vanotarisika semiti iri kufamba.”" 
Mark8:25 Akaisazve maoko ake pamaziso pake, iye ndokuramba akangoti ndee kutarisisa, ndokubva aporeswa. Akabva avakuona zvakanaka zvinhu zvose." 
Mark8:26 Jesu akamuendesa kumba kwake achiti, “Usamboenda zvako nomumusha umu.”" 
Mark8:27 Jesu akaenda navadzidzi vake kumisha yokuSezariafiripi. Vachiri munzira, akabvunza vadzidzi vake achiti, “Vanhu vanoti ndini ani?”" 
Mark8:28 Vakamupindura vachiti, “Johani Muombeki, vamwewo vanoti, ndiEriya, vamwewo vachiti, mumwe wavaporofita.”" 
Mark8:29 Akazovabvunza achiti, “Ko imi, munoti ndini ani?” Pita akapindura achiti, “Imi ndimi Kristu chaiye.”" 
Mark8:30 Jesu akatsindidza kuti vasambozviudza ani naani zvake nezvake. 
Mark8:31 Akazotangisa kuvadzidzisa kuti Mwanakomana womunhu anofanira kutambudzika zvikuru, agorambwa navakuru vakuru, navapristi vakuru, nenyanzvi dzoMutemo, ozouraiwa; asi agomukazve mushure memazuva matatu." 
Mark8:32 Akataura izvi pachena. Ipapo Pita akamutora parutivi ndokutanga kumutsiudza. 
Mark8:33 Jesu akatendeuka akaona vadzidzi vake ndokubva atsiudza Pita achiti, “Ndibvirepo, Satani womunhu! Mafungiro akadai haasi aMwari asi avanhu.”" 
Mark8:34 Akazodaidza chita chavanhu pamwechete navadzidzi vake akati kwavari, “Kana munhu achida kunditevera, ngaazvirambe, atakure muchinjikwa wake anditevere." 
Mark8:35 Nokuti ani naani anoda kuchengetedza upenyu hwake acharasikirwa nahwo; asi ani naani anorasikirwa noupenyu hwake pamusana pangu napamusana peShoko Rakanaka achahuponesa. 
Mark8:36 Nokuti zvinobatsirei munhu kuwana zvinhu zvose zvapasi pose asi iye achirasikirwa noupenyu hwake? 
Mark8:37 Nokuti chiiko munhu chaangabvise kuti adzikinure upenyu hwake? 
Mark8:38 Ani naani anondinyara kana kunyara mazwi angu pakati pechizvarwa ichi chenzenza dzavanhu nechavatadzi, Mwanakomana womunhu achamunyarawo musi waanouya aine mbiri yaBaba vake pamwe navatumwa vatsvene.”" 
Mark9:1 Akazoti kwavari, “Zviro kwazvo ndinoti kwamuri, kune vamwe vamire pano vasingambofi vasati vaona umambo hwaMwari hwatouya nesimba.”" 
Mark9:2 Mushure memazuva matanhatu Jesu akatora Pita naJemusi naJohani ndokuvatungamirira mugomo refu vari pachavo voga. Akasanduka pamberi pavo. 
Mark9:3 Hanzu dzake dzakapenya dzikachena kuti mbu — u chaizvo zvokuti hapana musuki pasi pano angagone kudzichenesa kudaro. 
Mark9:4 Ipapo vakabva vaona Eriya naMosesi vachitaurirana naJesu. 
Mark9:5 Zvino Pita akabva ataurawo kuna Jesu achiti, “I — i, mudzidzisi, zvakanaka sei kuti tive pano! Ngatichivakai matumba matatu, rimwe renyu, rimwe raMosesi, rimwe raEriya.”" 
Mark9:6 Akanga asingazivi zvaaitaura nokuti vakanga vabatwa nokutya kukuru kwazvo. 
Mark9:7 Gore rakavafukidza, izwi rikabva mugore richiti, “Uyu ndiye Mwanakomana wangu wapamwoyo, munzwei.”" 
Mark9:8 Pakarepo vakazoti ringe — ringei, wanei hapachisina wavachamboona kunze kwaJesu chete aiva navo." 
Mark9:9 Pavakanga vachiburuka mugomo akavatsindidza kuti vasataurire munhu zvavakanga vaona kusvikira Mwanakomana womunhu amuka kuvafi. 
Mark9:10 Vakachengetedza zvinhu izvi mumwoyo mavo, vakachizvibvunza kuti, “Kumuka kuvafi kunorevei.”" 
Mark9:11 Vakazomubvunza vachiti, “Ko, pamusana pei nyanzvi dzoMutemo dzichiti, ‘Eriya anofanira kutanga kuuya?’ ”" 
Mark9:12 Akati kwavari, “Hongu zvazvo Eriya achafanouya achizodzorera zvinhu pakare asi sei zvakanyorwa nezvoMwanakomana womunhu kuti anofanira kutambudzika zvikuru nokushorwa?”" 
Mark9:13 Asi zvandinokutaurirai ndezvokuti, “Eriya akauya, vakaita zvavaida naye sokunyorwa kwazvakaitwa nezvake.”" 
Mark9:14 Kuzoti vadzokera kuna vamwe vadzidzi, vakaona vakaunganirwa negungano guru ravanhu; nyanzvi dzoMutemo dzichiitirana nharo navo." 
Mark9:15 Gungano riya rose parakangomuona rakashamiswa kwazvo, rakamhanyira kwaari, ndokumukwazisa." 
Mark9:16 Jesu akavabvunza achiti, “Ko muri kuitirana nharo dzei?”" 
Mark9:17 Mumwe wegungano riya akamupindura achiti, “Mudzidzisi ndauya nemwanakomana wangu kwamuri ane mweya wakaipa wembeveve." 
Mark9:18 Kwose kwose kwaunomubata unomuwisira pasi womupupisa furo achirumanidza mazino, obva ati papata kuoma. Zvino ndakumbira vadzidzi venyu kuti vaudzinge asi vakoniwa.”" 
Mark9:19 Akavapindura achiti, “A! Rudzi rusingatendi urwu! Ndichange ndiinemi kusvikira rini? Ndichaita mwoyo murefu nemi kusvikira rini? Muunzei kwandiri.”" 
Mark9:20 Vakauya nomukomana uya kwaari, mweya pawakaona Jesu wakabva wapfurupfutisa mukomana uya, akawira pasi akaumburuka achipupa furo kumuromo." 
Mark9:21 Jesu akabvunza baba vake achiti, “Ava nenguva yakadii achidai?” Ivo vakati, “Kubvira paupwere hwake." 
Mark9:22 Wakamuwisira kazhinji mumoto, nomumvura uchida kumuparadza. Kana pane chamunogona kuita tinzwireiwo tsitsi mutibatsire.”" 
Mark9:23 Jesu akati kwaari, “Kana pane chamunogona! Zvose zvinogoneka wani kumunhu anotenda.”" 
Mark9:24 Pakarepo baba vomwana vakabva vadaidzira vachiti, “Ndinotenda, ndibatsireiwo pandinokundika pakusatenda kwangu.”" 
Mark9:25 Jesu achiona kuti gungano ravanhu rava kuti wiri — wiri kuungana, akatsiura mweya wetsvina achiti, “Iwe mweya wembeveve newematsi ndiri kukuudza kuti, ‘Buda maari, uye usazopindazve maari.’ ”" 
Mark9:26 Mweya ndokuzhamba, uchimupfurupfutisa ndokubuda maari; sarei mukomana oita seafa, zvokuti voruzhinji vakati afa." 
Mark9:27 Asi Jesu akabata ruoko rwake achimusimudza, iye ndokubva asimuka." 
Mark9:28 Kuzoti Jesu apinda mumba, vadzidzi vake vakamubvunza vari pachavo vachiti, “Ko isu tatadza nei kuudzinga?”" 
Mark9:29 Akavapindura achiti, “Rudzi rwemweya uyu haruna madzingiro, asi nokunamata chete.”" 
Mark9:30 Zvino vakabva ipapo vakapfuura nomuGarirea asi akanga asingadi kuti zvizivikanwe naani zvake; 
Mark9:31 nokuti aidzidzisa vadzidzi vake achiti kwavari, “Mwanakomana womunhu achaiswa mumaoko avanhu vachizomuuraya. Kana auraiwa achamukazve mushure memazuva matatu.”" 
Mark9:32 Asi havana kunzwisisa zvaakataura, uye vakatya kumubvunza." 
Mark9:33 Zvino vakasvika Kapenaumu. Vava mumba akavabvunza achiti, “Manga muchiitirana nharo dzei munzira?”" 
Mark9:34 Vakaramba vanyerere, nokuti munzira vakanga vachiitirana nharo dzokuti ndiani mukuru kupinda vose." 
Mark9:35 Akati agara pasi, akadaidza vane gumi navaviri akati kwavari, “Kana munhu achida kuva wokutanga anofanira kuva okupedzisira pana vose; agove mushandiri wavose.”" 
Mark9:36 Akazotora mwana muduku; akamuisa pakati pavo, akamugumbatira mumaoko akati kwavari," 
Mark9:37 “Ani naani anogamuchira mumwe wavana vaduku vakadai muzita rangu anogamuchira ini. Uye ani naani anondigamuchira haasi kugamuchira ini asi anogamuchira, uyo akandituma.”" 
Mark9:38 Johani akati kwaari, “Mudzidzisi takaona munhu achidzinga mweya yakaipa muzita renyu tikamurambidza nokuti akanga asiri wenzira imwechete nesu.”" 
Mark9:39 Asi Jesu akati, “Musamurambidze nokuti hakuna munhu anoita zvishamiso muzita rangu pedzepo ogona kutaura zvakaipa nezvangu;" 
Mark9:40 nokuti munhu asingapikisane nesu ndowedu. 
Mark9:41 Ani naani anokupai mukombe wemvura yokunwa pamusana pokuti muri vanhu vaKristu, zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri, haazorasikirwa nomubayiro wake kwete.”" 
Mark9:42 Ani naani anofurira mumwe wavana vaduku ava vanotenda mandiri kutadza zvinotova nani kwaari kuti asungirirwe ziguyo mumutsipa wake agokandwa mugungwa. 
Mark9:43 Kana ruoko rwako ruchikukonzera kuti utadze rudimure. Zviri nani kuti upinde muupenyu uri wakaremara pano kupinda mugehena, muvira romoto usingadzimiki, uina maoko maviri." 
Mark9:44 *** 
Mark9:45 Kana tsoka yako ichikonzera kuti utadze, idimure, nokuti zviri nani kuti upinde muupenyu wakaremara pano kukandwa mugehena uine tsoka mbiri." 
Mark9:46 *** 
Mark9:47 Kana ziso rako richikurasisa, risvukunure, zviri nani kuti upinde muumambo hwaMwari une ziso rimwechete pano kukandwa mugomba romoto, uina maziso maviri," 
Mark9:48 mune honye dzavo dzisingafi nemoto usingadzimiki. 
Mark9:49 Munhu wose anofanira kunatswa nomoto. 
Mark9:50 Munyu wakanaka; asi kana washapa unozovaviswa nei? Ivai vanhu vakarungwa vanowadzana. 
Mark10:1 Zvino Jesu akabvapo ndokuenda kudunhu reJudhea nokumhiri kwaJorodhani. Mapoka avanhu akamuunganira zvakare akavadzidzisazve sezvaaigaroita. 
Mark10:2 Zvino vaFarisei vakazouya kwaari vakamubvunza, kuri kumuedza zvavo vachiti, “Murume anobvumirwa here kuramba mukadzi wake?”" 
Mark10:3 Jesu akavapindura achiti, “Ko Mosesi akakutemerai zvipi?”" 
Mark10:4 Ivo vakati, “Mosesi akatibvumira kuti murume anyorere mukadzi tsamba yegupuro obva amudzinga.”" 
Mark10:5 Asi Jesu akati kwavari, “Akakunyorerai mutemo wakadai pamusana poukukutu hwemwoyo yenyu." 
Mark10:6 Asi kubva pakutanga kwokusikwa kwezvinhu, Mwari wakavasika vari munhurume nomunhukadzi." 
Mark10:7 Nechikonzero ichochi murume anosiya baba naamai vake, achibva abatanidzwa nomukadzi wake." 
Mark10:8 Vaviri ava vachiva muviri mumwechete. Naizvozvo havachisiri vaviri asi vava nyama imwechete. 
Mark10:9 Naizvozvo chabatanidzwa naMwari ngachirege kuparadzaniswa nomunhu.” 
Mark10:10 Kuzoti vava kumba vadzidzi vakamubvunza zvakare nezvenyaya iyi. 
Mark10:11 Akati kwavari, “Ani naani anoramba mukadzi wake achiroora mumwe, anoita upombwe uye achimutadzira." 
Mark10:12 Mukadziwo akaramba murume wake achitorana nomumwe murume anoita upombwe.” 
Mark10:13 Kwakazouya vamwe vanhu navana vaduku kwaari kuti aise maoko pamusoro pavo asi vadzidzi vakavarambidza. 
Mark10:14 Asi Jesu paakazviona akatsamwa ndokuti kwavari, “Regai vana vaduku vauye kwandiri musavarambidze nokuti umambo hwaMwari ndehwevakaita saivava." 
Mark10:15 Chokwadi chaizvo, ndinokuudzai kuti ani naani asingagamuchiri umambo hwaMwari somwana muduku haazombohupinda.”" 
Mark10:16 Iye ndokuvafungatira mumaoko, achivakomborera, achiisa maoko ake pavari." 
Mark10:17 Kuzoti ava kupinda munzira, mumwe munhu akamumhanyira ndokusvikopfugama mberi kwake omubvunza achiti, “Mudzidzisi wakanaka, ndingaitei kuti ndiwane nhaka youpenyu husingaperi?”" 
Mark10:18 Jesu akamupindura achiti, “Seiko uchinditi ndakanaka? Hakuna wakanaka kunze kwaMwari oga." 
Mark10:19 Unoziva wani mitemo inoti; usauraye, usaite upombwe, usabe, usaite uchapupu hwenhema, usanyengedze, remekedza baba naamai vako.”" 
Mark10:20 Iye akatiwo kwaari, “Mudzidzisi, yose iyi ndakaichengeta kubvira pauduku hwangu.”" 
Mark10:21 Jesu akamutarisa akamuda, ndokumuti, “Une chimwechete chausina; chokuti enda undotengesa zvose zvaunazvo upe kuvarombo, uchava noupfumi kudenga; ugouya wonditevera.”" 
Mark10:22 Shoko iri rakamusvibisa mwoyo akabvapo woenda akasuruvara nokuti akanga aine upfumi hwakawanda. 
Mark10:23 Jesu akaringa — ringa akati kuvadzidzi vake, “Zvakaoma sei kuti vanoupfumi vapinde muumambo hwaMwari!”" 
Mark10:24 Vadzidzi vakashamiswa kwazvo namazwi ake. Asi Jesu akataurazve achiti kwavari, “Vakomana, zvakaoma sei kupinda muumambo hwaMwari." 
Mark10:25 Zviri nyore kuti ngamera ipinde napaburi retsono pano kuti mupfumi apinde muumambo hwaMwari.” 
Mark10:26 Ivo vakashamiswa zvikuru kwazvo vakataurirana vachiti, “Ndiani zvino angagone kuponeswa?”" 
Mark10:27 Jesu akavatarisa akati, “Izvi hazvigoneki kuitwa navanhu asi naMwari. Kuna Mwari zvose zvinogoneka.”" 
Mark10:28 Pita ndipo pakazoti kwaari, “Tarisai muone isu takasiya zvinhu zvose tikakuteverai.”" 
Mark10:29 Jesu akati, “Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri hakuna munhu akasiya musha, kana vakomanavanun'una, kana hanzvadzi, kana amai, kana baba, kana vana, kana minda pamusana pangu napamusana peShoko Rakanaka," 
Mark10:30 asingazowana zvakapetwa kazana iye zvino munguva ino, misha, vakoma navanun'una, nehanzvadzi, nanaamai, navana, neminda pamwe nokutambudzwa panguva ino noupenyu husingaperi panguva ichauya." 
Mark10:31 Asi vazhinji vokutanga vachava vokupedzisira, vokupedzisirawo vachiva vokutanga.”" 
Mark10:32 Zvino vari munzira, vachikwira kuJerusaremu, Jesu aifamba ari mberi kwavo. Zvakavashamisa kwazvo. Vaitevera vakatya. Akazotorazve vane gumi navaviri akatanga kuvaudza zvaizoitika kwaari achiti," 
Mark10:33 “Chinzwai, tava kukwira kuJerusaremu; Mwanakomana womunhu achaiswa mumaoko avapristi vakuru nenyanzvi dzoMutemo; vachamutongera rufu; vachimuisawo mumaoko evechirudzi;" 
Mark10:34 vachamunyomba; vachimusvipira mate nokumurova zvakanyanya; vozomuuraya. Asi mushure memazuva matatu achamukazve.” 
Mark10:35 Jemusi naJohani vanakomana vaZebhedhi vakauya kuna Jesu vakati, “Mudzidzisi tinoda kuti mutiitirewo chero chatinenge takukumbirai.”" 
Mark10:36 Akati kwavari, “Munoda kuti ndikuitireiko?” Ivo vakati kwaari," 
Mark10:37 “Tibvumirei kuti, mumbiri yenyu, tizogara takati mumwe kurudyi rwenyu mumwe kuruboshwe rwenyu.”" 
Mark10:38 Jesu akavapindura achiti, “Hamuzivi zvamurikukumbira. Munogona here kunwa mukombe wandinonwa ini kana kuombekwa noruombeko rwandinoombekwa narwo ini?”" 
Mark10:39 Ivo vakati kwaari, “Tinogona.” Jesu akati kwavari, “Hongu mukombe wandinonwa ini, muchanwa noruombeko rwandinoombekwa narwo muchaombekwawo narwo;" 
Mark10:40 asi zvokugara kurudyi rwangu kana kuti kuruboshwe rwangu handisirini ndinozvipa, ndokweavo vakakugadzirirwa.”" 
Mark10:41 Zvino vamwe gumi vaya, pavakazvinzwa vakatsamwira vana Jemusi naJohani." 
Mark10:42 Jesu akavadaidza akavati, “Munoziva kuti kune vechirudzi vanonzi vatongi vaya, pakutonga vanoita zvechisimba uye vakuru vakuru vavo vanoita zvomukundo." 
Mark10:43 Asi pakati penyu hazvifaniri kudaro. Asi uyo anenge achida kuva mukuru pakati penyu ngaave mushandiri wenyu. 
Mark10:44 Uye ani naani anoda kuve wokutanga pakati penyu anofanira kuve muranda wavose. 
Mark10:45 Nokuti kunyange Mwanakomana womunhu haana kuuya kuzoshandirwa asi kuzoshandira vamwe, uye kuzopira upenyu hwake sorudzikinuro rwavazhinji.”" 
Mark10:46 Vakazosvika kuJeriko. Kuzoti ava kubuda muJeriko navadzidzi vake negurumwandira ravanhu, Bhatimeusi mwana waTimeo, mupemhi aiva bofu akanga agere parutivi pomugwagwa." 
Mark10:47 Paakanzwa kuti ndiJesu weNazareti, akatanga kudaidzira achiti, “Jesu Mwanakomana waDhavhidhi ndinzwireiwo tsitsi.”" 
Mark10:48 Vazhinji vakamutsiura vachiti anyarare, asi iye ndipo paakatonyanya kudaidzira achiti, “Mwanakomana waDhavhidhi ndinzwireiwo tsitsi.”" 
Mark10:49 Jesu akamira akati, “Mudaidzei.” Vakadaidza bofu riya vachiti kwaari, “Tsunga mwoyo; simuka; ari kukudaidza.”" 
Mark10:50 Akakanda jasi rake pasi, ndokukwakuka ouya kuna Jesu." 
Mark10:51 Jesu ndokuti kwaari, “Chii chaunoda kuti ndikuitire?” Bofu rakati kwaari, “Mudzidzisi itai kuti ndione.”" 
Mark10:52 Jesu akati kwaari, “Chienda zvako, chitendero chako chakuponesa.” Pakarepo akabva avakuona, akatevera Jesu munzira." 
Mark11:1 Zvavakanga vava kusvika pedyo neJerusaremu, vakasvika kuBhetifage neBhetania pagomo reMiorivhi; akatuma vamwe vavadzidzi vake vaviri" 
Mark11:2 achivati, “Endai mumusha wakatarisana nemi. Muchangopindamo muchawana gondora redhongi, rakasungirirwa, risina kumbotasvwa nomunhu. Risunungurei muuye naro." 
Mark11:3 Kana munhu akakutii, ‘Muri kuzviitirei?’ Muudzei kuti Tenzi ari kurida; acharidzosa nokukurumidza.”" 
Mark11:4 Vakaenda, vakandowana gondora redhongi rakasungirirwa pamusuo nechapanze pedyo nomugwagwa, vakarisunungura." 
Mark11:5 Vamwe vakanga vamirepo vakati kwavari, “Ko ndochii chamavakuita, kusunungura gondora iri redhongi?”" 
Mark11:6 Vakavaudza zvakanga zvataurwa naJesu, ndokubva vovarega vachienda zvavo." 
Mark11:7 Zvino vakaenda negondora redhongi riya kuna Jesu vakawarira hanzu dzavo pamusoro paro akabva aritasva. 
Mark11:8 Vazhinji vakawarira hanzu dzavo munzira, vamwe vakawarira mapazu anamashizha avakatemha muminda." 
Mark11:9 Zvino vaifamba vari mberi navaimutevera vakadaidzira vachiti; “Hosana, ngaarumbidzwe iye anouya muzita raTenzi." 
Mark11:10 Ngahurumbidzwe umambo hwababa vedu Dhavhidhi. Huri kuuya. Hosana kumusorosoro.” 
Mark11:11 Zvino Jesu akapinda muJerusaremu ndokundopinda muTemberi. Paakapedza kuongorora zvinhu zvose; akabuda oenda Bhetania pamwechete navane gumi navaviri, nokuti kunze kwakanga kwaenda." 
Mark11:12 Fume ramangwana, zvavakanga vachibva kuBhetania akanzwa nzara." 
Mark11:13 Ari chinhambwe akaona muonde una mashizha akaenda ikoko kuti zvimwe angawane chinhu pauri. Akasvika pauri asi hapana chaakawana kunze kwamashizha chete, nokuti yakanga isiri nguva yamaonde." 
Mark11:14 Ndokubva ati kwauri, “Pasazove nomunhu anodya muchero wako narini.” Vadzidzi vake vakazvinzwa." 
Mark11:15 Vakazosvika kuJerusaremu. Akapinda muTemberi, ndokutangisa kudzinga vanhu vaitengesera muTemberi navaitengamo. Akapidigurira pasi tafura dzavanhu vokutsinhanisa mari, nezvigaro zvaavo vaitengesa hangaiwa." 
Mark11:16 Uye haana kubvumira munhu kuti apfuure nomuTemberi akatakura chinhu. 
Mark11:17 Akavadzidzisa achiti, “Hazvina kunyorwa here zvichinzi; “ ‘Imba yangu ichanzi imba yokunamatira, yamarudzi ose avanhu, asi imi makaiita bako ramakororo.’ ”" 
Mark11:18 Vapristi vakuru nenyanzvi dzoMutemo vakazvinzwa, vakatsvaka nzira yokumupfuudza nayo, nokuti vaimutya pamusana pokuti vanhu vazhinji vakanga vachishamiswa norudzidziso rwake." 
Mark11:19 Kuzoti ava manheru, vakabuda muguta." 
Mark11:20 Fume mangwana, vakapfuura napamuonde uya, vakaona wakaoma nemidzi yose." 
Mark11:21 Pita akayeuka ndokuti, “Mudzidzisi tarisai! Muonde uya wamakarengerera rushambwa wakaoma.”" 
Mark11:22 Jesu ndokuvapindura achiti, “Ivai nechitendero muna Mwari." 
Mark11:23 Zvirokwazvo ndinokuudzai kuti, ‘Ani naani anoti kugomo iri simudzwa ukandwe mugungwa,’ asingakahadziki mumwoyo make asi achitenda kuti zvinhu zvaareva zvichaitika, achazviitirwa." 
Mark11:24 Naizvozvo ndinoti kwamuri, ‘Chipi nechipi chamunokumbira mumunamato tendai kuti matochipiwa, chichava chenyu." 
Mark11:25 Nguva dzose pamunomira muchinamata, kana pano mumwe wamuine chigumbu naye, muregererei, kuti Baba venyu vari kudenga vakuregerereiwo zvikanganiso zvenyu.’ ”" 
Mark11:26 *** 
Mark11:27 Vakasvika zvakare Jerusaremu. Zvaakanga achifamba muTemberi, vapristi vakuru nenyanzvi dzoMutemo navakuru vakuru vavaJudha vakauya kwaari" 
Mark11:28 vakati kwaari, “Unoita izvi nesimba raani? Ndiani akakupa simba rokuita izvi?”" 
Mark11:29 Jesu akati kwavari, “Ndombokubvunzaiwo mubvunzo mumwechete; mundipindure, ndozokuudzaiwo kuti ndinoita izvi nesimba raani." 
Mark11:30 Ruombeko rwaJohani rwakabva kudenga here kana kuvanhu? Ndipindurei” 
Mark11:31 Ipapo vakataurirana pachavo vachiti, “Kana tikati, ‘Rwakabva kudenga;’ achati, ‘Ko makaregerei kutenda kwaari?’" 
Mark11:32 Asi toti here, ‘Rwakabva kuvanhu? Vakanga vachitya vanhu nokuti vose vaiti Johani muporofita chaiye.’ ”" 
Mark11:33 Saka vakapindura Jesu vachiti, “Hatizivi.” Jesu ndokuvati, “Kana neniwo handikutaurirei kuti ndinoita izvi nesimba raani.”" 
Mark12:1 Zvino akatanga kutaura kwavari nemienzaniso achiti, “Mumwe munhu akasima munda wake wamagirepisi, ndokuukomberedza noruzhowa. Akacherawo gomba rokusvinira waini, nokuvaka nharire ndokuupa kuna vamwe varimi vokuushandisa vachimubhadhara, iye ndokuenda zvake kune imwe nyika." 
Mark12:2 Panguva yomuchero akatuma muranda wake kuvarimi vaya kundopiwa chikamu chomuchero womunda wamagirepisi. 
Mark12:3 Ivo vakamubata ndokumurova vakamudzosa asina chinhu. 
Mark12:4 Akatumazve mumwe muranda kwavari. Iyeyu vakamutema mbonje vakamunyadzisa. 
Mark12:5 Akazotumazve mumwe muranda; uyu vakamuuraya. Akatumazve vamwe vazhinji, vamwe vacho vaivarova, vamwe vachivauraya." 
Mark12:6 Asi akanga achino mumwechete, mwanakomana wake wapamwoyo. Pokupedzisira akamutuma kwavari achiti, ‘Vacharemekedza mwanakomana wangu.’ ”" 
Mark12:7 Asi varimi ivavo vakataurirana vachiti, “Uyu ndiyeka mugari wenhaka uyu, uyai timuuraye, nhaka igova yedu.”" 
Mark12:8 Vakamubata, vakamuuraya, ndokumukanda kunze kwomunda wamagirepisi." 
Mark12:9 Ko zvino muridzi womunda wamagirepisi achaitei? Achauya agoparadza vokushandisa munda vaya ava nokupa munda uyu wamagirepisi kuna vamwe. 
Mark12:10 Hamuna kumboverenga here Rugwaro Dzvene paya panoti, “Dombo rakarambwa navavaki iroro ndiro rakazova dombo rakakoshesesa rapakona yemba?" 
Mark12:11 Izvi zvakaitwa naTenzi, uye zvinotishamisa kwazvo kuzviona?”" 
Mark12:12 Vakazviona kuti ataura muenzaniso uyu akananga ivo; nezvo vakaedza kuti vamusunge asi vakatya vanhu. Naizvozvo vakamusiya voenda. 
Mark12:13 Vakazotuma kwaari vamwe vavaFarisei navamwe vebato rokwaHerodhi kuti vamubate mukutaura kwake. 
Mark12:14 Vakasvikoti kwaari, “Mudzidzisi, tinoziva kuti muri munhu ari pachokwadi, uye kuti hamunei nezvokuti uyu ndiani zvakare hamunei nezvokuti akamira sei, asi munodzidzisa gwara raMwari zviri pachokwadi. Ko, zviri pamutemo here kutera mutero kuna Siza, kana kuti kwete? Totera here kana kuti torega kutera?”" 
Mark12:15 Asi iye akaziva unyengedzi hwavo akati kwavari, “Ko munondiedzereiko? Ndiunzirei dhenari kuti ndirione.”" 
Mark12:16 Ivo ndokuriunza. Iye akavabvunza achiti, “Ko mufananidzo uyu norunyoro urwu ndezvani?” Ivo vakati kwaari, “NdezvaSiza.”" 
Mark12:17 Jesu akavati, “Ipai zvaSiza kuna Siza, zvaMwari kuna Mwari.” Vakashamiswa naye zvikuru." 
Mark12:18 Kwakazouyawo vaSadhusei kwaari. Ndivo vaya vanoti zvokumuka muvafi hakuna, vakamubvunza vachiti;" 
Mark12:19 “Mudzidzisi, Mosesi akatinyorera kuti kana mukoma womunhu akafa achisiya mukadzi asina mwana waasiya, munun'una wake ngaagare nhaka mukadzi wake kuti amutsire mukoma wake vana." 
Mark12:20 Kwaiva navakomana vanomwe, mukomanomunun'una. Dangwe ravo rakaroora mukadzi. Parakafa harina kusiya mwana." 
Mark12:21 Wechipiri akatorana naye ndokufawo asina kusiya mwana kunze. Wechitatu akadarowo. 
Mark12:22 Vari vanomwe kudaro havana kusiya mwana kunze. Pakupedzisira mukadzi uya akafawo. 
Mark12:23 Ko zvino pakumuka kwavakafa (kana vomuka) mudzimai achazova woupi nokuti vose vari vanomwe akambova mukadzi wavo?” 
Mark12:24 Jesu akati kwavari, “Hazvisizvo here zvinoita kuti murasike zvokuti hamuzivi Magwaro kana simba raMwari?" 
Mark12:25 Nokuti pakumuka kwavanhu kuvafi havacharoori kana kuroorwa asi kuti vachagara savatumwa vari kudenga. 
Mark12:26 Kana zviri zvokumutswa kwavakafa, hamuna kuverenga here muGwaro raMosesi paya pezvegwenzi riya, zvokuti Mwari akamutaurira achiti, ‘Ini ndini Mwari waAbhurahamu, naMwari waIsaki, naMwari waJakobho?’" 
Mark12:27 Haasi Mwari wavakafa asi wavapenyu. Munokanganisa chaizvo.” 
Mark12:28 Zvino mumwe wenyanzvi dzoMutemo akasvika akavanzwa vachiitirana naye nharo. Zvaakaona kuti Jesu avapindura nomazvo akamubvunza achiti, “Ko mutemo wechiposhi — poshi pane mitemo yose ndoupi?”" 
Mark12:29 Jesu akapindura achiti, “Mutemo wechiposhi — poshi ndouyu unoti; “ ‘Chinzwa Isiraeri, Tenzi Mwari wedu ndiye Tenzi mumwe chete oga." 
Mark12:30 Uye ida Tenzi Mwari wako nomwoyo wako wose, nomweya wako wose, nepfungwa dzako dzose, nesimba rako rose.’" 
Mark12:31 “Wechipiri ndouyu, “ ‘Ida mumwe wako sokuda kwaunozviita iwe pachako.’ Hakuna mutemo mukuru pana iyoyi.”" 
Mark12:32 Zvino nyanzvi yoMutemo iya yakamuti, “Ndizvozvo chaizvo, Mudzidzisi, mataura sezvazviri kuti kuna Mwari mumwe chete, kunze kwake hakuna mumwezve." 
Mark12:33 Kwouya kuti kumuda nomwoyo wose, nepfungwa dzose, nesimba rose, nokuda mumwe wako sokuda kwaunozviita iwe pachako, zvinokunda zvibayiro zvose zvechinhu chinopiswa chose zvacho nemipiro.”" 
Mark12:34 Jesu paakanzwa kuti apindura noungwaru akamuti, “Hausiri kure noumambo hwaMwari.” Kubva ipapo hapana naakazoshinga kumubvunza kana mumwe mubvunzo zvawo." 
Mark12:35 Jesu zvaakanga achidzidzisa muTemberi akati, “Seiko nyanzvi dzoMutemo dzichiti, ‘Kristu Mwanakomana waDhavhidhi?’" 
Mark12:36 Iye Dhavhidhi pachake, afemerwa naMweya Mutsvene, akati, “ ‘Tenzi akati kuna Tenzi wangu, gara kurudyi rwangu kusvikira ndaisa vavengi vako pasi petsoka dzako.’" 
Mark12:37 “Dhavhidhi pachake anomuti, ‘Tenzi,’ ko zvino angagova mwana wake sei?” Voruzhinji vaifarira kumuteerera." 
Mark12:38 Mukudzidzisa kwake Jesu akati, “Ngwarirai nyanzvi dzoMutemo, vanhu vanoda kufamba vakapfeka magemenzi marefu nokukwaziswa navanhu pamisika." 
Mark12:39 Vanodawo zvigaro zvakanaka mumasinagogu nezvigaro zvavakuru — vakuru pamabiko. 
Mark12:40 Vanodya twemba dzechirikadzi, uye vanoita minamato mirefu yokungobata zvavo vanhu kumeso. Vachatemerwa chirango chakaremesesa.”" 
Mark12:41 Kuzoti Jesu agara pasi akatarisana nenzvimbo yaichengeterwa upfumi hweTemberi. Akaongorora uzhinji hwavanhu hwaikanda mari maichengeterwa upfumi hweTemberi. Vapfumi vazhinji vakakanda mari zhinji. 
Mark12:42 Pakazosvikawo imwe chirikadzi, murombo, yakakandawo tumari tuduku tuviri twekopa twaisvitsa sendi." 
Mark12:43 Jesu akadaidza vadzidzi vake ndokuti kwavari, “Zviro kwazvo ndinokuudzai kuti chirikadzi iyi murombo, yaisa, munochengeterwa upfumi hweTemberi zvinopfuura zvakandwa navamwe vose," 
Mark12:44 nokuti ivo vose vaisa zvabva mune zvakawanda zvavanazvo. Asi iyo nourombo hwayo yaisa zvose zvinoiraramisa.” 
Mark13:1 Paaibuda muTemberi, mumwe wavadzidzi vake akati kwaari, “Mudzidzisi tarisai muone kunaka kwamatombo aya nedzimba dzacho.”" 
Mark13:2 Jesu akamupindura achiti, “Uri kuona here mazimba mahombe aya? Hapachazosara dombo riri pamusoro perimwe, risingazokoromotserwa pasi.”" 
Mark13:3 Paakanga akagara pasi pagomo reMiorivhi rakatarisana neTemberi, Pita naJemusi naJohani naAndrea vakamubvunza vari pachavo vachiti," 
Mark13:4 “Tiudzeiwo kuti izvi zvichaitika rini uye kuti chiratidzo chokuti zvose izvi zvava kuda kuitika chichava chei?” 
Mark13:5 Ipapo Jesu akatanga kuvaudza achiti, “Chenjerai kuti murege kurasiswa naani zvake." 
Mark13:6 Kuna vazhinji vachauya muzita rangu vachiti, ‘Ini ndini iye,’ vachirasisa vazhinji." 
Mark13:7 Kana monzwa zvehondo namarehwarehwa ehondo musanyanye kutya. Izvi zvinofanira kuti zviitike, asi magumo anenge asati asvika." 
Mark13:8 Rudzi ruchamukirana norumwe rudzi noumambo huchamukirana nohumwe umambo; kuchava nokudengendeka kwapasi, munzvimbo dzakasiyana — siyana; kuchava nedzinzara. Iri rinenge riri romoromo chete ramatambudziko okusununguka." 
Mark13:9 Asi imi zvingwarirei nokuti vachakukwidzai pamatare, uye mucharohwa mumasinagogu; muchamira pamberi pavatongi namadzimambo pamusana pangu kuti chive chapupu kwavari." 
Mark13:10 Shoko Rakanaka rinofanira kuti ritange raparidzwa kumarudzi ose. 
Mark13:11 Kana voenda nemi, vava kundokukwidzai pamatare, musazvinetse nezvokuti muchazondotaurei; asi zvamunenge mapiwa panguva iyoyo, taurai izvozvo, nokuti hamusirimi munenge motaura asi Mweya Mutsvene." 
Mark13:12 Mukoma kana munun'una vachacherana kuti mumwe auraiwe, baba vachadarowo kumwana wavo, vana vachamukira vabereki vavo vachivauraisa" 
Mark13:13 Uye muchazovengwa navanhu vose pamusana pangu. Uyo anotsungarara kusvikira kumagumo ndiye achaponeswa. 
Mark13:14 “Asi kana moona chiya choumharadzi chinon'oresa chomira pachisingafaniri kumira, anoverenga ngaanzwisisewo, saka vari Judhea ngavatizire kumakomo." 
Mark13:15 Anenge ari pamusoro pemba, ngaarege kuburukira pasi kuti apinde mumba make kundotora chinhu." 
Mark13:16 Anenge ari kumunda ngaarege kudzokera kundotora jazi rake. 
Mark13:17 Hameno zvavo vanenge vane pamuviri navavo vanenge vachiri kuyamwisa pamazuva iwayo. 
Mark13:18 Namatai kuti zvisaitike panguva yechando. 
Mark13:19 Nokuti pamazuva iwayo pachava nenhamo isati yamboitika kubvira pakutanga kwokusikwa kwezvinhu zvakasikwa naMwari kusvika pari nhasi, uye hazvichazomboitikazve." 
Mark13:20 Dai kuri kuti Tenzi haana kutapudza zvake mazuva iwayo, hapana munhu airarama, asi pamusana pavasarudzwi vaakasarudza akatapudza mazuva acho." 
Mark13:21 “Panguva iyoyo kana ani zvake akati kwamuri, ‘Tarisai houno Kristu! Kana kuti ari koko!’ Musazvitende." 
Mark13:22 Kuchamuka vana kristu venhema navaporofita venhema vachionesa zviratidzo namashura kuti vatsautse vasarudzwi, kana zvichigoneka." 
Mark13:23 Asi, imimi chichenjerai, ndafanokuudzai zvinhu zvose." 
Mark13:24 “Asi mumazuva iwayo, mushure menhamo iyoyo zuva richaora, mwedzi ucharega kuvhenekera," 
Mark13:25 uye nyenyedzi dzichadonha kubva mudenga, uye masimba omudenga achazungunutswa." 
Mark13:26 Ndipo pavachaona Mwanakomana womunhu achiuya ari mumakore aine simba guru nembiri. 
Mark13:27 Zvino iye achazotuma vatumwa vake kundokokorodza vasarudzwi vake kubva kumativi mana enyika, kubvira kwakaperera nyika yose kusvika kwakaperera denga." 
Mark13:28 “Dzidzai chidzidzo chinobva kumuonde. Kana bazi rawo rotunga, pfumvudza yobuda, munobva maziva kuti zhizha rava pedyo." 
Mark13:29 Naizvozvo imiwo kana moona izvi zvoitika, zivai kuti iye ava pedyo, atova pamusuo chaipo." 
Mark13:30 Zviro kwazvo ndinoti kwamuri chizvarwa ichi hachimbopfuuri zvinhu izvi zvose zvisati zvaitika. 
Mark13:31 Denga napasi zvichapera zvazvo asi mazwi angu haachapfuuri. 
Mark13:32 “Asi zvezuva iroro nenguva yacho hapana anozviziva kunyange vatumwa vari kudenga, kanawo Mwanakomana, asi Baba voga." 
Mark13:33 Chenjerai mugaririre, nokuti hamuzivi kuti nguva yacho ichasvika rini." 
Mark13:34 Izvi zvakafanana nomunhu ari parwendo, anoti kana obva pamba, anosiya aturira imba yake mumaoko avaranda vake mumwe nomumwe aine basa rake. Anoudza mutariri wapasuo guru kugaririra." 
Mark13:35 Naizvozvo rindirai nokuti hamuzivi kuti saimba anouya rini, kumanheru here, pakati pousiku kana kuti nguva yomurirakamwe kana kuti mangwanani." 
Mark13:36 Angadaro akayerekana asvika okuwanai makakotsira. 
Mark13:37 Zvandiri kukutaurirai ndiri kutaurira vose, rindirai.”" 
Mark14:1 Zvino kwanga kwangosara mazuva maviri kuti Pasika namazuva makuru eZvingwa Zvisina Mbiriso zvisvike. Vapristi vakuru nenyanzvi dzoMutemo vakanga vachitsvaka nzira yokumusunga nayo zvisina tsarukano kuti vagomuuraya. 
Mark14:2 Vaiti, “Kwete pamazuva makuru, nokuti pangadaro pakaita bongozozo ravanhu.”" 
Mark14:3 Zvino Jesu zvaakanga agere pakudya mumba maSimoni wamaperembudzi kuBhetania, kwakauya mumwe mukadzi nechinu chomunyakwe wearabhasita, chiine mafuta okuzora aiva enadhi chaiyo, anokosha kwazvo. Akabedura chinu chiya akadira mafuta mumusoro maJesu." 
Mark14:4 Pakava navamwe vakanyunyuta nazvo vachiti, “Mafuta aya atambisirweiko kudai?" 
Mark14:5 Mafuta aya angadai atengeswa madhenari anodarika mazana matatu, mari yacho ichipiwa varombo.” Vakapopotera mukadzi." 
Mark14:6 Asi Jesu akati, “Siyanai naye; munomunetserei? Inga aita chinhu chakanakisa wani kwandiri." 
Mark14:7 Varombo munavo nguva dzose wani. Pamunenge madira zvenyu munogona kuvaitira zvakanaka asi ini hamuneni nguva dzose. 
Mark14:8 Aita zvaagona; afanozora muviri wangu mafuta kuitira kuvigwa kwangu. 
Mark14:9 Zvechokwadi chaizvo ndinoti kwamuri, kwose kwose kuchaparidzwa shoko iri rakanaka pasi pose, zvaaita zvichataurwawo sechinhu chokumuyeuka nacho.”" 
Mark14:10 Zvino Judhasi Isikarioti, mumwe wavane gumi navaviri akaenda kuvapristi vakuru kuti amutengese kwavari." 
Mark14:11 Pavakazvinzwa vakafara vakavimbisa kumupa mari. Akatsvaka nguva yakanaka yokumutengesa nayo. 
Mark14:12 Pazuva rokutanga reChingwa Chisina Mbiriso, musi wavaibaya hwayana yePasika, vadzidzi vake vakati kwaari, “Ndokupi kwamunoda kuti tiende kundokugadzirirai kuti mudyire Pasika?”" 
Mark14:13 Akatuma vadzidzi vake vaviri, achiti kwavari, “Endai muguta. Muchasanganidzana nomurume akatakura chirongo chemvura. Muteverei." 
Mark14:14 Maanenge apinda imomo bvunzai muridzi wemba kuti zvanzi nomudzidzisi, ‘Ko imba yavayeni mandichadyira Pasika navadzidzi vangu iripi?’ ”" 
Mark14:15 Iye achakuratidzai imba huru yapamusoro makanyatsorongedzwa yakagadzirwa. Tigadzirirei imomo. 
Mark14:16 Vadzidzi vaya vakaenda. Vakasvika muguta vakasvikowana sezvaakanga avataurira, ndokugadzirira Pasika." 
Mark14:17 Ava manheru akauya navane gumi navaviri. 
Mark14:18 Pavakanga vagere pakudya Jesu akati, “Zvechokwadi ndinoti kwamuri mumwe wenyu ari kudya neni, achanditengesa.”" 
Mark14:19 Vakatanga kusuruvara. Mumwe nomumwe akati kwaari, “Ndini here?”" 
Mark14:20 Iye ndokuti kwavari, “Ndomumwe wavane gumi navaviri wandiri kuseva naye mundiro.”" 
Mark14:21 Nokuti, zvechokwadi, Mwanakomana womunhu anoenda sokunyorwa kwazvakaitwa nezvake. Asi zvichamuwana munhu uyo anotengesa Mwanakomana womunhu, zvaitova nani dai munhu iyeyo asina kuzvarwa zvake." 
Mark14:22 Zvino zvavakanga vari pakudya, akatora chingwa akatenda ndokuchimedura akachipa kwavari achiti, “Gamuchirai; uyu muviri wangu.”" 
Mark14:23 Akatorawo mukombe akatenda, ndokuupa kwavari, vakanwa vose." 
Mark14:24 Akazoti kwavari, “Iri iropa rangu rechitenderano, rinodeurirwa vazhinji." 
Mark14:25 Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri, handichazonwizve waini yomugirepisi kusvikira zuva randichanwa yava waini itsva muumambo hwaMwari.”" 
Mark14:26 Kuzoti vaimba rumbo vakabuda voenda kugomo reMiorivhi. 
Mark14:27 Jesu akazoti kwavari, “Mucharasiswa mose nokuti zvakanyorwa zvichinzi, ‘Ndicharova mufudzi, hwai dzigopararira.’" 
Mark14:28 Asi mushure mokunge ndamutswa ndichafanokutungamirirai kuGarirea.” 
Mark14:29 Pita akati kwaari, “Kunyange vamwe vose vangarasiswe zvavo asi ini kwete.”" 
Mark14:30 Jesu ndokuti kwaari, “Zviro kwazvo ndinoti kwauri ihwo usiku hwanhasi, iwe uchandiramba katatu jongwe risati rarira kaviri.”" 
Mark14:31 Asi iye akabva atosimbisisa kwazvo achiti, “Kana zvazvo ndikanzi ndife nemi handimbokurambai.” Vamwe vose vakadarowo." 
Mark14:32 Vakaenda panzvimbo inonzi Getsemani. Jesu akati kuvadzidzi vake, “Garai pano, ini ndimbonamata.”" 
Mark14:33 Akatora Pita, naJemusi naJohani. Akatanga kubatwa nokutya kukuru nokusuruvara." 
Mark14:34 Akati kwavari, “Ini ndadumbirwa zvokunge ndichafa zvangu. Sarai pano murindire.”" 
Mark14:35 Akaenda mberi zvishoma ndokubva awira pasi akanamata kuti kana zvichigoneka zvaizoitika nguva iyi zvimupfuure zvake. 
Mark14:36 Akati, “Abba, baba, kwamuri zvose zvinogoneka, bvisai mukombe wamatambudziko uyu pandiri, asi kusave kuda kwangu, asi kuda kwenyu.”" 
Mark14:37 Akadzoka akavawana vatokotsira ndokuti kuna Pita, “Nhai Simoni watokotsira zvako here? Watadza kugarira kweawa imwechete?" 
Mark14:38 Rindirai munamate kuti murege kupinda mukuedzwa. Mweya unoda zvawo asi muviri wakarukutika.” 
Mark14:39 Akasudurukazve, akanamata achitaura mazwi mamwecheteyo." 
Mark14:40 Akadzokazve ndokuvawana vakotsira nokuti hope dzakanga dzavabata zvikuru uye vakashaya chokumupindura. 
Mark14:41 Akadzokazve kechitatu akati kwavari, “Muchiri kungokotsira zvenyu nokuzorora nhai? Zvakwana. Nguva yatosvika. Mwanakomana womunhu ava kuzoiswa mumaoko avatadzi." 
Mark14:42 Simukai tiende, houno anondipandukira wava kusvika.”" 
Mark14:43 Pakarepo paakanga achiri kutaura, Judhasi mumwe wavane gumi navaviri akabva asvika aine chikwata chavanhu vakanga vaina mapakatwa netsvimbo, vachibva kuvapristi vakuru nenyanzvi dzoMutemo navakuru vakuru." 
Mark14:44 Zvino mupanduki uya akanga avapa chiratidzo chokuti, “Wandinotsvoda ndiyeyo, mubatei muende naye makamuchengetesa.”" 
Mark14:45 Naizvozvo kuzoti asvika akabva aenda kwaari oti, “Tikukwaziseika Mudzidzisi,” ndokumutsvoda." 
Mark14:46 Vakabva vati Jesu dzvi, kumubata." 
Mark14:47 Zvino mumwe wavakanga vamirepo akati bakatwa rake wee ndokuvaura nzeve yomuranda womupristi mukuru, akamudimura nzeve." 
Mark14:48 Jesu akati kwavari, “Nhaimi inga matouya namapakatwa netsvimbo sokunge muri kuzobata gororo?" 
Mark14:49 Zuva nezuva ndainge ndinemi muTemberi ndichidzidzisa asi hamuna kundibata? Regai Magwaro azadzikiswe.” 
Mark14:50 Vose vakabva vamusiya votiza. 
Mark14:51 Mumwe mukomana akamutevera akafuka jira rerineni chete pamuviri wake. Vakamubata," 
Mark14:52 asi akasiya jira riya rerineni otiza asina chaakapfeka. 
Mark14:53 Vakaenda naJesu kumupristi mukuru. Vapristi vakuru vose, navakuru vakuru nenyanzvi dzoMutemo vakanga vatounganako." 
Mark14:54 Pita akamutevera ari chinhambwe kudzamara paruvanze rwomupristi mukuru. Akagara namapurisa achidziya moto. 
Mark14:55 Vapristi vakuru nedare rose vakatsvaka uchapupu hwemhosva yavangape Jesu kuti vamuuraye. Asi vakahushaya. 
Mark14:56 Nokuti vazhinji vakamupupurira zvenhema. Uchapupu hwavo hwakatadza kuwirirana. 
Mark14:57 Vamwe vakasimuka vakamurevera nhema vachiti," 
Mark14:58 “Takamunzwa achiti, ‘Ndichapaza Temberi iyi yakavakwa namaoko, ndigovaka, namazuva matatu, imwe isina kuvakwa namaoko.’ ”" 
Mark14:59 Asi kunyange zvakadaro uchapupu hwavo hauna kuwirirana. 
Mark14:60 Ipapo mupristi mukuru akasimuka pamberi pavo akabvunza Jesu achiti, “Hauna mhinduro here panazvose zvavari kukupomera? Ko mhosva dzauri kupomerwa navanhu ava ndedzei?”" 
Mark14:61 Asi Jesu akaramba akanyarara, haana kumbopindura chinhu. Mupristi mukuru akamubvunza zvakare achiti, “Ndiwe Mesia here, Mwanakomana waNyakurumbidzwa?”" 
Mark14:62 Jesu akati, “Hongu ndini; muchaona Mwanakomana womunhu agere kurudyi rwaSamasimbaose achiuya ari mumakore edenga.”" 
Mark14:63 Ipapo mupristi mukuru akabvarura hanzu dzake akati, “Tichadireizve zvapupu?" 
Mark14:64 Manzwa kushonha kwake Mwari. Munotii nazvo?” Vose vakati, “Ane mhosva, anofanira kuti afe.”" 
Mark14:65 Vamwe vakatanga kumupfira mate vachimufukidza kumeso, nokumurova nembama vachiti, “Porofita.” Mapurisawo akamugama nembama." 
Mark14:66 Izvozvo Pita akanga ari nechapasi, paruvanze. Mumwe musikana webasa womupristi mukuru akasvikapo." 
Mark14:67 Zvaakaona Pita achidziya moto, akamutarisa akati, “Newewo wanga una Jesu weNazareti.”" 
Mark14:68 Asi iye akazviramba achiti, “Handizivi, kana kunzwisisa zvauri kutaura.” Akabvapo akaenda kusuo guru." 
Mark14:69 Zvakare musikana webasa uya zvaakamuona akatangazve kutaurira vakanga vamirepo achiti, “Murume uyu mumwe wavo.”" 
Mark14:70 Asi iye akazvirambazve. Kwapera chinguvana chidukuduku vaya vakanga vamirepo vakatizve kuna Pita, “Zvechokwadi uri mumwe wavo iwe nokuti uri wokuGarirea.”" 
Mark14:71 Ipapo Pita akatanga kuzvirengerera rushambwa achipika achiti, “Handimuzivi munhu uyu wamuri kutaura.”" 
Mark14:72 Pakarepo jongwe rakabva rakukuridza kechipiri. Ipapo Pita akayeuka zvakanga zvataurwa naJesu zvokuti, “Jongwe risati rarira kaviri uchandiramba katatu.” Akabva atanga kuchema zvinosiririsa." 
Mark15:1 Kuzoti kwangoedza, vapristi vakuru vakagara dare navakuru vakuru vavaJudha nenyanzvi dzoMutemo neDare guru rose. Vakasunga Jesu, ndokuenda naye kundomuturira kuna Pirato." 
Mark15:2 Pirato akamubvunza achiti, “Ndiwe Mambo wavaJudha here?” Iye akapindura achiti, “Inga matozvireva wani.”" 
Mark15:3 Vapristi vakuru vakamupomera mhosva zhinji. 
Mark15:4 Pirato akamubvunzazve achiti, “Ko hauna chaunopindura here? Inzwa kuti vanokupomera mhosva dzakawanda sei?”" 
Mark15:5 Asi Jesu haanazve chaakapindura kwete, zvokuti Pirato akashamiswa." 
Mark15:6 Nguva dzose, pamazuva makuru aya, Pirato aivasunungurira musungwa mumwechete wavainge vakumbira." 
Mark15:7 Mukati mavapanduki vaiva mujeri, vakanga vauraya munhu muchimurenga, maiva nomumwe murume ainzi Bharabhasi." 
Mark15:8 Kuzoti mhomho yavanhu yakwira kwaPirato, yakatanga kumukumbira kuti avaitire zvaaisimbovaitira." 
Mark15:9 Zvino Pirato akavabvunza achiti, “Ko munoda kuti ndikusunungurirei mambo wavaJudha here?”" 
Mark15:10 Nokuti akanga azviona kuti vapristi vakuru vakanga vaturira Jesu kwaari pamusana peshanje. 
Mark15:11 Asi vapristi vakuru vakapesvera vanhu kuti avasunungurire zvavo Bharabhasi. 
Mark15:12 Pirato akapindurazve achiti, “Ko ndoitei nowamunoti mambo wavaJudha?”" 
Mark15:13 Vakadaidzirazve vachiti, “Muroverei pamuchinjikwa.”" 
Mark15:14 Pirato ndokuti kwavari, “Nemhaka yeiko? Akapara mhosva yei?” Vakabva vatonyanya kudaidzira vachiti, “Muroverei pamuchinjikwa.”" 
Mark15:15 Zvino Pirato zvaaida kufadza mhomho yavanhu akavasunungurira Bharabhasi. Asi mushure mokurova Jesu akamuturira kwavari kuti aroverwe pamuchinjikwa. 
Mark15:16 Masoja akaenda naJesu munhandare, mumuzinda womutongi wacho wainzi (Pretoriumu,) vakaunganidza boka rose ramasoja." 
Mark15:17 Vakazomupfekedza hanzu yoruvara rwohute ndokuruka chiremba cheminzwa vakachidzika paari. 
Mark15:18 Vakazotanga kumukwazisa vachiti, “Kwaziwaika mambo wavaJudha!”" 
Mark15:19 Vaimurova musoro norutsanga, vachimupfira mate nokumupfugamira vachimukudza." 
Mark15:20 Pavakapedza kumuita chiseko, vakamubvisa hanzu yoruvara rwohute iya vomupfekedza hanzu dzake ndokuenda naye kundomurovera pamuchinjikwa." 
Mark15:21 Vakamanikidza mumwe murume aipfuura naipapo achibva kumaruwa, ainzi Simoni wokuSairini, baba vaArekizanda naRufusi, kuti atakure muchinjikwa wake." 
Mark15:22 Vakasvika naJesu kunzvimbo inonzi Gorogota, zvinoreva kuti nzvimbo yeDehenya," 
Mark15:23 vakamupa waini yakasanganiswa nemura asi akaramba kuinwa. 
Mark15:24 Vakamurovera pamuchinjikwa vakagoverana hanzu dzake vachiita chin'ange kuti vaone kuti mumwe nomumwe wavo achatorei. 
Mark15:25 Yakanga iri awa yechipfumbamwe yamangwanani pavakamurovera pamuchinjikwa. 
Mark15:26 Chikwangwani chechiga chemhosva yaakapomerwa chaiti, “MAMBO WAVAJUDHA.”" 
Mark15:27 Pakanga pakaroverwa pamwepo naye makororo maviri, akati rimwe kurudyi rimwe kuruboshwe rwake." 
Mark15:28 *** 
Mark15:29 Vanhu vaipfuura nepo vakamuseka vachidzungudza musoro vachiti, “Aha ndiweka unopaza Temberi uchiivakazve namazuva matatu," 
Mark15:30 chizviponesaka, uburuke pamuchinjikwa ipapo!”" 
Mark15:31 Saizvozvowo vapristi vakuru nenyanzvi dzoMutemo vakamusveeredza vachitaurirana vachiti, “Akaponesa vamwe asi haagoni kuzviponesa iye pachake." 
Mark15:32 Kristu! Mambo wavaIsiraeri! Ngaaburuke iye zvino pamuchinjikwa kuti tione tigotenda.” Navaya vakanga vakaroverwa pamuchinjikwa pamwe naye vakamunyombawo. 
Mark15:33 Zvino paawa yegumi nechimbiri yamasikati nyika yose yakati rima tiba kusvikira paawa yechitatu yamasikati. 
Mark15:34 Neawa yechitatu yamasikati Jesu akadaidzira nezwi guru achiti, “Eroi, Eroi, rama sabhakitani?” Zvinoreva kuti, “Mwari wangu, Mwari wangu, mandisiyireiko?”" 
Mark15:35 Zvino vamwe vakanga vamirepo vachizvinzwa vakati, “Inzwai, ari kudaidza Eriya.”" 
Mark15:36 Ipapo mumwe akamhanya akanyika chifovefove muwaini inovava dzamara chazara ndokuchitungirira parutsanga ndokumupa kuti anwe vachiti, “Mirai tione kana Eriya achiuya kuzomuburutsa.”" 
Mark15:37 Ipapo Jesu akadaidzira nezwi guru ndokubva afa. 
Mark15:38 Zvino jira rokudzikatirisa romuTemberi rakabvaruka napakati kubvira kumusoro kusvikira pasi. 
Mark15:39 Kuzoti mutungamiri wezana akanga amirepo akatarisana naye aona kufa kwaakaita akati, “Zvechokwadi munhu uyu anga ari Mwanakomana waMwari.”" 
Mark15:40 Pakangawo paina madzimai akanga akatarira ari chinhambwe. Vamwe vaiva mukati mavo ndavana Maria Magadharena, naMaria amai vaJemusi muduku naJosesi, naSarome," 
Mark15:41 vaimutevera achiri kuGarirea, vachimushandira, namamwe madzimai mazhinji akanga akwira naye kuJerusaremu." 
Mark15:42 Zvino kuzoti ava manheru, zvarakanga riri zuva rokugadzirira, ndiko kuti zuva rapamberi peSabata," 
Mark15:43 kwakauya Josefi weArimatia, aiva mumwe wamakurukota airemekedzwa. Iyewo pachake aimirira umambo hwaMwari. Akatsunga mwoyo ndokuenda kuna Pirato, akamukumbira chitunha chaJesu." 
Mark15:44 Pirato akashamiswa kuti atofa kare. Akadana mutungamiri wezana akamubvunza kuti afa here kare? 
Mark15:45 Paakazvinzwa, zvichibva kumutungamiri wezana kuti Jesu afa, akabvumira Josefi kutora chitunha." 
Mark15:46 Josefi akatenga fuko rerineni, akaturunura Jesu omuputira nefuko riya rerineni ndokumuradzika muguva rakanga rakacherwa mudombo. Akazokungurutsirawo dombo pamusuo weguva." 
Mark15:47 Zvino vana Maria Magadharena, naMaria amai vaJosesi vakanyatsoona paakaradzikwa." 
Mark16:1 Kuzoti Sabata rapfuura, vanaMaria Magadharena naMaria amai vaJemusi naSarome vakatenga mafuta anonhuwira kuti vandomuzora nawo." 
Mark16:2 Mangwanani — ngwanani omusi weSvondo vakafumoenda kuguva zuva rabuda. 
Mark16:3 Vaibvunzana vachiti, “Ko ndiani achandotikungurutsira dombo riya pamusuo weguva?”" 
Mark16:4 Zvino vakatarira vakaona kuti dombo riya rakanga ratokungurutswa; rakanga riri guru kwazvo. 
Mark16:5 Pavakapinda muguva vakaona Jaya rigere nechokurudyi, rakapfeka gemenzi jena, vakabva vavhunduka kwazvo." 
Mark16:6 Jaya ndokuvati, “Regai kuvhunduka, muri kutsvaka Jesu weNazareti akarovererwa pamuchinjikwa. Amuka, haasisimo muno. Tarisai muone nzvimbo yavakamuradzika." 
Mark16:7 Chiendai mundoudza vadzidzi vake naPita kuti Jesu anofanokutungamirirai kuGarirea; ikoko ndiko kwamuchandomuona sezvaakambokutaurirai.” 
Mark16:8 Vakabuda ndokutiza paguva paya nokuti vakanga vava kudedera uye vakashamiswa kwazvo. Hapana wavakaudza chinhu, nokuti vakanga vava kutya." 
Mark16:9 Kuzoti amuka muvafi mangwanani nomusi weSvondo akazviratidza pokutanga kuna Maria Magadharena, uya waakabvisa mweya yakaipa minomwe." 
Mark16:10 Maria akaenda kundoudza vaya vaiva naye, vakanga vari mukuchema nokuungudza" 
Mark16:11 Asi pavakanzwa kuti Jesu mupenyu uye kuti aonekwa naye havana kutenda. 
Mark16:12 Shure kwaizvozvo Jesu akazviratidza neimwe nzira kuna vaviri vachifamba kuenda kumaruwa. 
Mark16:13 Naivavawo vakadzokera vakandoudza vamwe vose asi kunyange ivava havana kuvatenda. 
Mark16:14 Pashure Jesu akazviratidza kuna vane gumi nomumwechete vari pakudya. Akavashora pamusana pokusatenda kwavo napamusana poukukutu hwomoyo yavo nokuti havana kutenda vakanga vamuona mushure mokumuka kwake. 
Mark16:15 Akati kwavari, “Endai kunyika dzapasi pose mundoparidza Shoko Rakanaka kuzvisikwa zvose." 
Mark16:16 Anenge atenda akaombekwa achaponeswa, asi uyo asingatendi achapiwa mhosva." 
Mark16:17 Hezvino zviratidzo zvichava navanotenda: 
Mark16:18 Vachadzinga mweya yakaipa nezita rangu. Vachataura nendimi itsva, vachabata nyoka namaoko. Kunyange vakanwa chinouraya hachizovakuvadzi kwete. Vachaisa maoko pavarwere, vachibva vapora.”" 
Mark16:19 Kuzoti Jesu apedza kutaura kwavari akakwidzwa kudenga kwaakandogara kurudyi rwaMwari. 
Mark16:20 Ivo vakaenda vakandoparidza kwose kwose, Tenzi achivabatsira achitsinhira shoko ravo nezviratidzo zvairisimbisa. Ameni." 
Luke1:1 Sezvo vazhinji vakaita basa rokunyora rondedzero yezvinhu zvakaitika pakati pedu," 
Luke1:2 sokuzvigamuchidzwa kwatakaitwa navaya vakanga vazviona nemeso kubvira pakutanga kwazvo, uyezve vari vaparidzi veshoko," 
Luke1:3 neniwo, mushure mokunyatsotsvagisisa zvinhu zvose nemazvo, kubvira kumavambo azvo, ndakazviona chiri chinhu chakanaka kuti, ndikunyorerei rondedzero yazvo yakakwana, imi vaTeofiro vanoremekedzwa," 
Luke1:4 kuti munyatsoziva idi rezvinhu zvamakadzidziswa. 
Luke1:5 Pamazuva aHerodhi, mambo weJudhea, kwaiva nomumwe mupristi ainzi Zakariya wegovero raAbhiya. Aiva nomudzimai akanga ari wedzinza raAroni, zita rake ainzi Erizabheti." 
Luke1:6 Vakanga vakarurama pamberi paMwari vose vari vaviri, vasina chinoshoreka pakutevedza zviri pamitemo nepamirao yaTenzi." 
Luke1:7 Asi vakanga vasina mwana nokuti Erizabheti akanga ari mhanje, uyezve, vose vari vaviri vakanga vachembera." 
Luke1:8 Zvino Zakariya zvaakanga achiri kuita basa roupristi pamberi paMwari," 
Luke1:9 janha regovero rovokwake, samaitiro avapristi, ndivo vakabatwa nomujenya wokuti vapinde munzvimbo Inoera yeTemberi kundopisa rusenzi." 
Luke1:10 Gurumwandira ravanhu rakanga richinamata kunze panguva yokupisira rusenzi. 
Luke1:11 Pakarepo mutumwa waTenzi akazviratidza kwaari akamira nechokurudyi rweatari yorusenzi. 
Luke1:12 Zakariya zvaakamuona akavhunduka, akabatwa nokutya." 
Luke1:13 Asi mutumwa waTenzi akati kwaari, “Rega zvako kutya, Zakariya, nokuti munamato wako wakanzwika. Mudzimai wako, Erizabheti achakuberekera mwana mukomana wauchatumidza zita rokuti Johani." 
Luke1:14 “Iwe uchazofara nokupembera, vazhinji vachazofarirawo kuberekwa kwake," 
Luke1:15 nokuti achava mukuru pamberi paTenzi; haachazonwi waini kana doro rinodhaka, achazadzwa naMweya Mutsvene kubvira achiri munhumbu maamai vake." 
Luke1:16 Achazodzorera vazhinji vavaIsiraeri kuna Tenzi Mwari wavo. 
Luke1:17 Achafamba pamberi paTenzi aina mweya nesimba raEriya kuti awadzanise madzibaba navana vavo; nokudzorera vasingateereri kuhungwaru hwavakarurama, kuti nhadzirire Tenzi vanhu vakamugadzirira.”" 
Luke1:18 Zakariya akati kumutumwa, “Ndingazive seiko zvinhu izvi? Ini ndakwegura uye mudzimai wangu achembera?”" 
Luke1:19 Mutumwa akamuti, “Ndini Gabhurieri, ndinomira pamberi paMwari, ndatumwa naTenzi kuti nditaure newe nokukuparidza shoko iri rakanaka." 
Luke1:20 “Chinzwa, uchava chimumumu, usingagoni kutaura kusvikira musi wazvichaitika, nokuti hauna kutenda zvandakuudza, izvo zvichazoitika nenguva yazvo.”" 
Luke1:21 Izvozvo vanhu vakanga vakangomirira Zakariya, votoshamiswa kwazvo kuti chii chamunonotsa kudai muTemberi." 
Luke1:22 Zvino akati abuda, haana kugona kutaura kwavari. Vanhu ndokubva vaziva kuti aona chiratidzo muTemberi. Akatoita zvokuvaninira maoko, ndokuramba angove chimumumu." 
Luke1:23 Kuzoti mazuva ebasa rake apera, akadzokera kumusha kwake." 
Luke1:24 Shure kwaizvozvi, mudzimai wake Erizabheti akava napamuviri akazvivanza kwemwedzi mishanu, achiti," 
Luke1:25 “Ndozvandakaitirwawo naTenzi pamazuva aakandiringa kuti andibvise nyadzi pamberi pavanhu.” 
Luke1:26 Nomwedzi wechitanhatu, Mwari akatuma mutumwa Gabhurieri kuguta reGarirea rinonzi Nazareti," 
Luke1:27 kumhandara yakanga ichangoroorwa nomurume ainzi Josefi, wemba yaDhavhidhi; zita remhandara iyi rainzi Maria." 
Luke1:28 Mutumwa akauya kwaari akati, “Kwaziwa iwe wakakomborerwa, Tenzi anewe.”" 
Luke1:29 Zvakamukangaidza zvikuru kunzwa zvakadai, akashamiswa nazvo kuti kwaziso iyi inoreveyi." 
Luke1:30 Mutumwa waMwari ndokupindura oti, “Usatye zvako Maria, nokuti Mwari afadzwa zvake newe." 
Luke1:31 Chinzwa, uchava napamuviri pauchapona mwana mukomana wauchatumidza zita rokuti Jesu." 
Luke1:32 Iye achava mukuru — mukuru uye achanzi Mwanakomana woWokumusorosoro. Tenzi Mwari achamupa chigaro choumambo chababa vake Dhavhidhi. 
Luke1:33 Achatongawo imba yaJakobho narini narini.” Uyezve umambo hwake hauchazogumi. 
Luke1:34 Maria akati kumutumwa, “Izvi zvichazoitika sei zvandisingazivani nomurume?”" 
Luke1:35 Mutumwa ndokumupindura achiti, “Mweya Mutsvene achakuburukira, simba roWokumusorosoro richakufukidza. Naizvozvo mwana wauchapona achanzi mutsvene, Mwanakomana waMwari." 
Luke1:36 Chiona kuti kana hama yakowo Erizabheti, kunyange zvake achembera atova napamuviri pomwana mukomana; mwedzi uno watove mwedzi wechitanhatu kune munhu wainzi imhanje." 
Luke1:37 Nokuti pana Mwari hapana chisingagonekwi.” 
Luke1:38 Maria akati, “Onai ndiri murandakadzi waTenzi, ngazviitwe kuneni sokureva kwenyu.” Mutumwa ndokubva omusia oenda zvake." 
Luke1:39 Namazuva iwayo Maria akasimuka, akakurumidza kuenda kunyika yamakomo, kune rimwe guta rokwaJudha." 
Luke1:40 Akapinda mumba maZakariya, akakwazisa Erizabheti. Erizabheti, paakanzwa kukwazisa kwaMaria, mwana akabva akwakuka mudumbu make." 
Luke1:41 Erizabheti akabva azadzwa naMweya Mutsvene," 
Luke1:42 ndokutaura nezwi riri pamusoro achiti, “Makakomborerwa pana vakadzi vose, akakomborerwawo mwana wemimba yenyu." 
Luke1:43 Ko, zvandibvira nepikowo kuti ndishanyirwe kudai naAmai vaTenzi wangu." 
Luke1:44 Chionaika kuti pandangonzwa izwi rokundikwazisa kwenyu, mwana abva akwakuka norufaro rukuru mudumbu mangu." 
Luke1:45 “Makakomborerwa zvenyu, nokuti makatenda kuti zvakataurwa kwamuri, zvichibva kuna Tenzi, zvichazoitika.”" 
Luke1:46 Maria ndokubva atiwo; 
Luke1:47 “Ini ndinokurumbidzai, Tenzi, nemwoyo wangu wose, mweya wanguwo unopembera norufaro Mwari Muponesi wangu." 
Luke1:48 Nokuti akarangarira iniwo zvangu murandanhando wake. Chionai kuti kubvira zvino, zvizvarwa zvose zvavanhu zvichanditi; ‘Wakakomborerwa,’" 
Luke1:49 nokuti iye Samasimba akandiitira zvinhu zvikuru, zita rake rinoera." 
Luke1:50 Anonzwira tsitsi vanomutya, kubvira kuchizvarwa nechizvarwa." 
Luke1:51 Akaita zvina masimba noruoko rwake, akaparadza vanozvikudza mundangariro dzemwoyo yavo." 
Luke1:52 Akabvisa vatongi pazvigaro zvavo zvoushe, achisimudzira pamusoro vakazvirereka." 
Luke1:53 Vane nzara akavagutsa nezvinhu zvakanaka, vapfumi akavaendesa vasina chavanacho." 
Luke1:54 Akarangarira tsitsi dzake akabatsira Isiraeri muranda wake. 
Luke1:55 Sokutaura kwaakamboita kumadzitateguru edu, kuna Abhurahamu nezvizvarwa zvake, nokusingaperi.”" 
Luke1:56 Maria akazogara naErizabheti kwemwedzi inenge mitatu, ndokuzodzokera hake kumusha kwake." 
Luke1:57 Zvino mazuva okuti Erizabheti asununguke zvaakakwana, akapona mwana mukomana." 
Luke1:58 Kuzoti vavakidzani vake nehama dzake vanzwa kuti Tenzi akamuitira tsitsi dzakawanda kudai, vakafara kwazvo pamwechete naye." 
Luke1:59 Nezuva rorusere vakauya kuzodzingisa mwana. Vakanga vachida kumutumidza zita rababa vake rokuti Zakariya," 
Luke1:60 asi amai vake vakati, “Kwete, ngaanzi Johani.”" 
Luke1:61 Vanhu vakati kuna amai vake, “Hakuna mumwe wehama dzenyu anodaidzwa nezita iri.”" 
Luke1:62 Ipapo vakaninira baba vake vachida kuziva kuti vangade kuti anzi ani. 
Luke1:63 Iye akakumbira chinyorero, akanyora kuti, “Zita rake ndiJohani.” Vose vakashamiswa zvikuru." 
Luke1:64 Pakarepo muromo Zakariya wakabva wazaruka, rurimi rwake rukabva rwasununguka, ndokubva avakutotaura achirumbidza Mwari." 
Luke1:65 Pakave nokutya mukati mavavakidzani vavo, nyaya dzezvinhu izvi dzakafamba kwose kwose munyika yamakomo yeJudhea." 
Luke1:66 Vose vakazvinzwa vakazvipfundira mumwoyo yavo vachiti, “Ko, mwana uyu achazova munhu akaita sei chaizvo?” Nokuti ruoko rwaTenzi rwakanga rwuri paari." 
Luke1:67 Zvino baba vake Zakariya, vakazadzwa naMweya Mutsvene vakaporofita vachiti," 
Luke1:68 “Ngaarumbidzwe Tenzi Mwari wavaIsiraeri, nokuti akashanyira vanhu vake, akavanunura;" 
Luke1:69 akatimutsira Muponesi ane simba mumba maDhavhidhi muranda wake," 
Luke1:70 sokutaura kwaakaita nemiromo yavaporofita vake vatsvene vakare," 
Luke1:71 kuti atinunure kumhandu dzedu, nomumaoko avose vanotivenga," 
Luke1:72 kuri kuratidza tsitsi sokutsidza kwaakamboita kumadzitateguru edu, nokuyeukawo Chitenderano chake chitsvene," 
Luke1:73 nechitsidzo chaakaita kuna baba vedu Abhurahamu," 
Luke1:74 chokuti kana tanunurwa mumaoko emhandu dzedu, timushandire tisingatyi," 
Luke1:75 tichiita mabasa edu tiri vatsvene vakarurama pamberi pake mazuva edu ose. 
Luke1:76 “Iwe mwana, uchanzi muporofita woWokumusorosoro, nokuti uchafanoenda mberi kwaTenzi kundomugadzirira nzira dzake," 
Luke1:77 kupa vanhu vake ruzivo rworuponeso ruri mukuregererwa kwezvitadzo zvavo," 
Luke1:78 pamusana petsiye nyoro dzaMwari wedu, apo tichabudirwa neZuva richibva kumusoro," 
Luke1:79 kuzovhenekera vagere murima nomumumvuri worufu, nokutungamirira tsoka dzedu munzira yorugare.”" 
Luke1:80 Mwana akazokura akasimba mumweya. Aigara murenje kusvikira zuva raakazviratidza kuvaIsiraeri. 
Luke2:1 Namazuva iwayo kwakatemwa chirevo chakabva kuna Siza Agusuto, chokuti vanhu vapasi pose vanyorwe mazita avo." 
Luke2:2 Uku ndiko kwaiva kunyorwa kwamazita kwokutanga kwakaitwa Kwiriniosi ari mutongi weSiria. 
Luke2:3 Vanhu vose vakaenda kundonyorwa mumwe nomumwe kuguta rokwake. 
Luke2:4 Zvino Josefi akabvawo Garirea muguta reNazareti achikwira kuJudhea kuguta raDhavhidhi rinonzi Bheterehemu, nokuti aiva wemba nowedzinza raDhavhidhi." 
Luke2:5 Akaenda kundonyorwa iye naMaria waakanga achangobva mukuroora, akangawo ava napamuviri." 
Luke2:6 Vachiri ikoko, mazuva ake okuti asununguke akakwana." 
Luke2:7 Akasununguka dangwe rake, romwana mukomana waakaputira namachira ndokumuradzika muchidyiro chezvipfuwo, nokuti vakanga vashaya nzvimbo muimba yavaeni." 
Luke2:8 Mudunhu iroro makanga muina vafudzi kumafuro vairindira zvipfuwo zvavo usiku. 
Luke2:9 Zvino mutumwa waTenzi akazviratidza kwavari. Kupenya kwaTenzi kukavakomberedza vakabva vabatwa nokutya kukuru. 
Luke2:10 Asi mutumwa akati kwavari, “Regai henyu kutya nokuti ndakuunzirai shoko rakanaka rorufaro rukuru ruchava rwavanhu vose." 
Luke2:11 Nokuti nhasi uno, muguta raDhavhidhi, mazvarirwa Muponesi, ndiye Kristu Tenzi." 
Luke2:12 Chiratidzo chamuchamuziva nacho ndechichi chokuti muchandowana mucheche akaputirwa namachira akaradzikwa muchidyiro chezvipfuwo.” 
Luke2:13 Pakarepo boka guru rehondo yedenga rakamira pamwe nomutumwa vachirumbidza Mwari vachiti," 
Luke2:14 “Mbiri kuna Mwari kumusorosoro, pasi pano rugare ruve kuvanhu vaanofarira.”" 
Luke2:15 Kuzoti vatumwa vaye vabva pavari, vachienda kudenga, vafudzi vakataurirana vachiti, “Handei kuBheterehemu tindoona zvaitika izvi zvataziviswa naTenzi.”" 
Luke2:16 Vakaenda vachikurumidza vakasvikowana Maria naJosefi, uyezve mucheche arere muchidyiro chezvipfuwo." 
Luke2:17 Kuzoti vafudzi vaona mwana vakatanga kurondedzera zvavakanga vataurirwa nezvemwana uyu. 
Luke2:18 Vose vakanzwa izvi vakashamiswa kwazvo nezvavakataurirwa navafudzi. 
Luke2:19 Asi Maria akapfundira zvinhu zvose izvi mumwoyo make achinyatsozvifungisisa. 
Luke2:20 Vafudzi vakadzokera vachikudza nokurumbidza Mwari pamusoro pazvose zvavakanga vanzwa nezvavakaona sokuudzwa kwavakaitwa. 
Luke2:21 Mushure memazuva masere, pakadzingiswa mwana, akatumidzwa zita rokuti Jesu, ndiro zita riya raakapiwa nomutumwa, amai vake vasati vava napamuviri pake." 
Luke2:22 Kuzoti nguva yokuchenurwa kwavo yakwana, vakakwira nomwana kuJerusaremu kundomusuma kuna Tenzi sezvaidikanwa nomutemo waMosesi." 
Luke2:23 Sezvazvakanyorwa muMutemo waTenzi kuti, “Dangwe rose rechikomana rinotanga kubuda mudumbu raamai varo richanzi rakaturirwa Tenzi.”" 
Luke2:24 Vakaendawo kundopira mupiro wechibayiro chenjiva mbiri kana hangaiwa mbiri diki sokurehwa kwazvakaitwa nomutemo waTenzi. 
Luke2:25 Zvino muJerusaremu maiva nomumwe murume ainzi Simeoni. Akanga ari munhu akarurama anotya Mwari, uye akanga achitarisira kunyaradzwa kweIsiraeri. Mweya Mutsvene akanga ari paari." 
Luke2:26 Munhu iyeyu akanga aziviswa naMweya Mutsvene, kuti haazofi asati aona Mesia waTenzi." 
Luke2:27 Afemerwa naMweya, akapinda muTemberi. Vabereki zvavakauisa mwana Jesu kuzomuitira zviya zvaigaroitwa zviri muMutemo" 
Luke2:28 akatora mwana akamubata mumaoko, akarumbidza Mwari achiti;" 
Luke2:29 “Tenzi mungachirega muranda wenyu zvino achienda norugare, sokureva kwenyu," 
Luke2:30 nokuti meso angu aona ruponeso rwenyu," 
Luke2:31 rwamakagadzirira kuti ruonekwe nendudzi dzose dzavanhu. 
Luke2:32 Mwenje wokuvhenekera vechirudzi nomukurumbira wavanhu venyu vaIsiraeri.” 
Luke2:33 Baba vake naamai vake vakashamiswa vachinzwa zvakataurwa nezvake. 
Luke2:34 Zvino Simeoni akavakomborera ndokuti kuna Maria amai vake, “Chinzwai, mwana uyu akasarudzirwa kuputsika nokumuka kwavazhinji muIsiraeri nokuvazve chiratidzo chichapikiswa.”" 
Luke2:35 Chichaita kuti pfungwa dziri mumwoyo yavazhinji dzizivikanwe. Nemiwo mwoyo wenyu uchabaiwa nebakatwa. 
Luke2:36 Kwaivawo nomumwe muporofitakadzi ainzi Ana, mwanasikana waFanuero, wedzinza raAsheri. Iye akanga atokwegura. Akangogara nomurume wake kwamakore manomwe chete kubvira umhandara hwake," 
Luke2:37 ndokuzogara sechirikadzi kusvikira ava namakore makumi masere ana mana. Haaisiyana neTemberi, maaishandira Mwari siku nesikati, nokutsanya nokunamata." 
Luke2:38 Akauyawo nenguva yakareyo akatenda Mwari ndokutaura nezvomwana uyu kuna vose vaimirira kununurwa kweJerusaremu. 
Luke2:39 Zvino kuzoti vapedza kuita zvose zvaidiwa noMutemo waTenzi vakadzokera Garirea kuguta ravo reNazareti. 
Luke2:40 Mwana uyu akakura akasimba, akazara noungwaru, nechikomborero chaMwari chaive chiri paari." 
Luke2:41 Gore negore vabereki vake vaienda kuJerusaremu kumazuva makuru ePasika. 
Luke2:42 Kuzoti Jesu ava namakore gumi namaviri, vakakwirako samaitiro avo." 
Luke2:43 Zvino kuzoti mazuva makuru ePasika apera, vodzokera kumusha, mukomana Jesu akasara kuJerusaremu. Vabereki vake havana kuzviziva." 
Luke2:44 Vakafamba rwendo rwomuswere wezuva vachifunga kuti ari mukati mavamwe vavaifamba navo. Vakazomutsvaga mukati mehama neshamwari dzavo. 
Luke2:45 Zvavakamushaya vakadzokera Jerusaremu vachimutsvaka. 
Luke2:46 Nezuva rechitatu vakazomuwana ari muTemberi agere pakati pavadzidzisi achiteerera zvavaitaura achivabvunzawo mibvunzo. 
Luke2:47 Vose vakamunzwa vakashamiswa nokunzwisisa kwake nemhinduro dzake. 
Luke2:48 Vabereki vake, pavakamuona vakashamiswa kwazvo. Ipapo amai vake vakati, “Nhai mwanangu, wakaitireiko zvinhu zvakadai kwatiri? Tarisa uone Baba vako neni takatambudzika kwazvo tichikutsvaka.”" 
Luke2:49 Iye akavapindura achiti, “Chakaita kuti munditsvake kumwe kwese chii? Makanga musingazive here kuti ndinofanira kuva muimba yaBaba vangu?”" 
Luke2:50 Asi ivo havana kunzwisisa zvaakavataurira. 
Luke2:51 Akadzika navo akasvika kuNazareti, kwaakagara navo achivateerera. Amai vake vakapfundira zvinhu zvose izvi mumwoyo mavo." 
Luke2:52 Zvino Jesu akakura muungwaru, nomumhu wake, nomukudiwa naMwari navanhu." 
Luke3:1 Mugore regumi nerechishanu roumambo hwaSiza Tibheriasi, Pontio Pirato ari mutongi weJudhea, Herodhi ari mutongi weGarirea, munun'una wake Firipi ari mutongi wedunhu reIturea neTirakonitisi naRisaniasi ari mutongi weAbhirini," 
Luke3:2 Anasi naKaifasi vari vapristi vakuru, shoko raMwari rakasvika kuna Johani mwanakomana waZakariya, ari mugwenga." 
Luke3:3 Johani akapoteredza nenyika iri mhiri nemhiri kweJorodhani achiparidza ruombeko rwokuti vanhu vapinduke varegererwe zvitadzo zvavo. 
Luke3:4 Sokunyorwa kwazvakaitwa mubhuku ramazwi aIsaya muporofita zvichinzi, “Izwi reanodaidzira ari mugwenga achiti: ‘Gadzirirai mugwagwa waTenzi, ruramisai nzira dzake." 
Luke3:5 Nhika dzose ngadzifusirwe, makomo nezvikomo zviparadzirwe; pakakombama paruramiswe nzira dzina magadhi dzinzi chechetere." 
Luke3:6 Vanhu vose vachaona ruponeso rwaMwari.’ ” 
Luke3:7 Naizvozvo akati kuhuzhinji hwavanhu vaiuya kwaari kuzoombekwa naye, “Imi vana venyoka, ndianiko akakunyeverai kuti mutize chirango chirikuuya?" 
Luke3:8 Naizvozvo berekai michero inowirirana nokupinduka kwenyu, uye musavambe kuzviti, ‘Tina Abhurahamu sababa vedu, nokuti ndinoti kwamuri, Mwari anogona kumutsira Abhurahamu vana kubva kumatombo aya." 
Luke3:9 Zvino demo ratonangiswa parinotema midzi yemiti; naizvozvo muti wose usingabereki muchero wakanaka unotemwa uchikandwa mumoto.’ ” 
Luke3:10 Ruzhinji rwavanhu rwakamubvunza rwuchiti, “Zvino toiteiko?”" 
Luke3:11 Akavapindura achivati, “Ane hanzu mbiri ngaagoveranewo naasina, naane zvokudya ngaaitewo zvimwechetezvo.”" 
Luke3:12 Vateresi vakauyawo kuzoombekwa vachiti, “Mudzidzisi, ko isu toiteiwo?”" 
Luke3:13 Iye akati kwavari, “Musaterese vanhu kupfuura pamakatemerwa.”" 
Luke3:14 Masoja akamubvunza achiti, “Ko isu, toiteiwo?” Iye akati kwavari, “Musatore zviro zvavanhu muchiita zvokupamba kana nokuvarevera nhema asi gutsikanai nemibayiro yenyu.”" 
Luke3:15 Zvino vanhu zvavakanga vava nechitarisiro, vose vachizvibvunza nechemumwoyo yavo nezvaJohani, vachifunga kuti zvimwe angadaro ari iye Mesia," 
Luke3:16 Johani akavapindura vose achiti; “Hongu, ini ndinokuombekai nemvura, asi ane simba kupfuura ini ari kuuya. Ini handikodzeri kusunungura rukanda rweshangu dzake. Iye achakuombekai naMweya Mutsvene uye nomoto." 
Luke3:17 “Rusero rwake ruri muruoko rwake kuti aurutse zvapurwa paburiro rake, nokuunganidza koroni achiisa mudura rake, asi hundi achaipisa nomoto usingadzimiki.”" 
Luke3:18 Nokudaro Johani akavaparidza Shoko Rakanaka achivakurudzira nenzira dzakasiyana — siyana. 
Luke3:19 Asi Herodhi, mumwe wavatongi vana, zvaakatsiudzwa naJohani pamusana paHerodhiasi mukadzi womunun'una wake uye napamusana pezvakaipa zvose zvaakanga aita," 
Luke3:20 akatowedzera zvakare pamusoro paizvozvi zvose nokuisa kwaakaita Johani mujeri. 
Luke3:21 Vakati zvino vanhu vose vaombekwa, Jesu akaombekwawo. Achingunonamata denga rakazaruka," 
Luke3:22 Mweya Mutsvene, aine muviri unenge wenjiva, akaburukira paari; izwi ndokubva kudenga richiti, “Iwe ndiwe Mwanakomana wangu wapamwoyo ndiwe unondifadza zvikuru.”" 
Luke3:23 Zvino, iye Jesu panguva yaakatanga kuita basa rake akanga ana makore makumi matatu. Pakufunga kwavanhu vaiti mwanakomana waJosefi, mwanakomana waHeri," 
Luke3:24 mwanakomana waMatati, mwanakomana waRevhi, mwanakomana waMeriki, mwanakomana waJonai, mwanakomana waJosefi," 
Luke3:25 mwanakomana waMatatiasi, mwanakomana waAmosi, mwanakomana waNahumi, mwanakomana waEsiri, mwanakomana waNagai," 
Luke3:26 mwanakomana waMaati, mwanakomana waMatatiasi, mwanakomana waSemeini, mwanakomana waJoseki, mwanakomana waJodha," 
Luke3:27 mwanakomana waJoanani, mwanakomana waResa, mwanakomana waZerubhabheri, mwanakomana waSheatieri, mwanakomana waNeri," 
Luke3:28 mwanakomana waMeriki, mwanakomana waAdhi, mwanakomana waKosamu, mwanakomana waErimadhamu, mwanakomana waEri," 
Luke3:29 mwanakomana waJoshuwa, mwanakomana waEriezeri, mwanakomana waJorimu, mwanakomana waMatati, mwanakomana waRevhi," 
Luke3:30 mwanakomana waSimeoni, mwanakomana waJudha, mwanakomana waJosefi, mwanakomana waJonamu, mwanakomana waEriyakimu," 
Luke3:31 mwanakomana waMerea, mwanakomana waMena, mwanakomana waMatata, mwanakomana waNatani, mwanakomana waDhavhidhi," 
Luke3:32 mwanakomana waJese, mwanakomana waObhedhi, mwanakomana waBhoasi, mwanakomana waSara, mwanakomana waSarimoni, mwanakomana waNashoni," 
Luke3:33 mwanakomana waAminadhabhu, mwanakomana waAdhimini, mwanakomana waArini, mwanakomana waHezironi, mwanakomana waPerezi, mwanakomana waJudha," 
Luke3:34 mwanakomana waJakobho, mwanakomana waIsaka, mwanakomana waAbhurahamu, mwanakomana waTera, mwanakomana waNahori," 
Luke3:35 mwanakomana waSerugi, mwanakomana waReu, mwanakomana waPeregi, mwanakomana waEbheri, mwanakomana waShera," 
Luke3:36 mwanakomana waKainani, mwanakomana waArifakisadhi, mwanakomana waSemu, mwanakomana waNowa, mwanakomana waRameki," 
Luke3:37 mwanakomana waMetusera, mwanakomana waEnoki, mwanakomana waJaredhi, mwanakomana waMaharareri, mwanakomana waKainani," 
Luke3:38 mwanakomana waEnosi, mwanakomana waSeti, mwanakomana waAdhamu, mwanakomana waMwari." 
Luke4:1 Zvino Jesu, azere naMweya Mutsvene, akadzoka achibva kuna Jorodhani. Akatungamirirwa naMweya mugwenga" 
Luke4:2 kwamazuva makumi mana achiedzwa naSatani. Pamazuva iwayo haana chaakadya; zvino pakupera kwawo akaziya nenzara. 
Luke4:3 Satani akati kwaari, “Kana uri Mwanakomana waMwari iti ibwe iri rive chingwa.”" 
Luke4:4 Jesu akamupindura achiti, “Zvakanyorwa zvichinzi, ‘Munhu haararami nechingwa choga.’ ”" 
Luke4:5 Satani akamutungamidza oenda naye pakakwirira akamuratidza umambo noumambo hwapasi pose nakanguva kadukuduku," 
Luke4:6 akachimuti; “Ndichakupa umambo hwose uhwu nomukurumbira wahwo nokuti zvakaturirwa kwandiri, uyezve ndinozvipa kune wandinenge ndichida." 
Luke4:7 Naizvozvo, iwe ukandipfugamira zvose zvichava zvako.”" 
Luke4:8 Jesu akamupindura achiti, “Zvakanyorwa zvichinzi, ‘Unofanira kugwadamira uchinamata Tenzi Mwari wako, umushandire iye oga.’ ”" 
Luke4:9 Akamutungamidzazve oenda naye Jerusaremu akandomumisa pachisuvi cheTemberi ndokumuti, “Kana uri Mwanakomana waMwari, zviwisire pasi uchibva pano," 
Luke4:10 nokuti zvakanyorwa zvichinzi; ‘Mwari achaudza vatumwa vake kuti vakuchengete vachikudzivirira,’ uyezve" 
Luke4:11 ‘Vachakugama namaoko avo kuti urege kugumburwa tsoka yako nebwe.’ ” 
Luke4:12 Jesu akamupindura achiti, zvakanzi, “Usaedze Tenzi Mwari wako.”" 
Luke4:13 Kuzoti Satani apedza mitoo yose yokumuedza nayo akambomusiya kusvikira pane imwe nguva. 
Luke4:14 Zvino Jesu akadzokera Garirea ava nesimba raMweya; mukurumbira wake ukapararira kwose kwose munharaunda iyoyo. 
Luke4:15 Akadzidzisa mumasinagogu avo achirumbidzwa navanhu vose. 
Luke4:16 Zvino Jesu akauya kuNazareti kwaakanga arerwa. Akapinda musinagogu nomusi weSabata, samaitiro ake. Akasimuka kuti averenge" 
Luke4:17 ndokupiwa bhuku romuporofita Isaya. Akati aripetenura akawana pakanyorwa kunzi," 
Luke4:18 “Mweya waTenzi uri pandiri nokuti akandizodza kuti ndiparidze shoko rakanaka kuvarombo. Akandituma kuti ndizivise nhapwa zverusununguko rwadzo namapofu zvekusvinudzwa kwawo, nokupa rusununguko kuna vakadzvinyirirwa," 
Luke4:19 uyezve kuparidza gore renyasha dzaTenzi.” 
Luke4:20 Akazarira bhuku riya ndokuridzorera kumutariri, ogara pasi. Maziso avose avanhu vakanga vari musinagogu akaramba akamutarisa." 
Luke4:21 Zvino akatanga kutaura kwavari achiti, “Nhasi uno, gwaro dzvene iri ramazvinzwira nenzeve dzenyu razadziswa.”" 
Luke4:22 Vose vakataura zvakanaka nezvake, uye vakashamiswa namazwi anotora mwoyo akabuda mumuromo make. Vakati, “Ko uyu haazi mwanakomana waJosefi here?”" 
Luke4:23 Iye ndokuvati, “Ndine chokwadi chokuti munoda kundiitira tsumo iyi inoti, ‘N'anga zvirape.’ Muchindiudzawo kuti zviya zvatakanzwa, zvawakaita kuKapenaumu, zviitewo muno munyika mako.”" 
Luke4:24 Uye ndokuti, “Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri, hakuna muporofita anogamuchirwa munyika make." 
Luke4:25 Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri muIsiraeri makanga muine chirikadzi zhinji pamazuva aEriya, panguva iya yakapfigwa denga kukasanaya kwamakore matatu nemwedzi mitanhatu, kukava nenzara huru munyika yose," 
Luke4:26 asi Eriya haana kutumwa kune imwe yadzo kusiya chete kune mukadzi aive chirikadzi kuZarefati munyika yeSidhoni. 
Luke4:27 Uyezve muIsiraeri maiva navazhinji vaiva namaperembudzi panguva yomuporofita Erisha asi hakuna nomumwe wavo akabviswa maperembudzi akachenurwa, kunze kwaNaamani muSiria.”" 
Luke4:28 Pakunzwa izvi, vose vakanga vari musinagogu vakazadzwa nehasha." 
Luke4:29 Vakasimuka vakabva vamudzingira kunze kweguta, vakandosvika naye pamusoro pegomo, pakanga pakavakirwa guta ravo, kuti vamusaidzire kumawere." 
Luke4:30 Asi iye akapfuura napakati pavo, ndokuenda zvake." 
Luke4:31 Jesu wakazodzika Kapenaumu, guta reGarirea, kwaakadzidzisa vanhu pamusi weSabata." 
Luke4:32 Vakashamiswa kwazvo nokudzidzisa kwake nokuti zvaaitaura zvaiva nechiremera. 
Luke4:33 Musinagogu imomo maiva nomunhu aiva nomweya wakaipa wetsvina. Akazhamba nezwi guru achiti; 
Luke4:34 “Aa! Ko tinei newe Jesu weNazareti? Wauya kuzotiparadza here? Ndinokuziva; kuti ndiwe ani; ndiwe Mutsvene waMwari.” 
Luke4:35 Jesu akaukarira achiti, “Chibva wanyarara ubude maari.” Kuzoti mweya wakaipa uya wambomurigira pasi, vose vachizviona; wakabuda maari usina kumbomukuvadza." 
Luke4:36 Vanhu vose vakashamiswa kwazvo, vakataurirana vachiti, “Ishokoi iri? Nokuti anoudza mweya yakaipa nechiremera nesimba, ichibva yabuda.”" 
Luke4:37 Mukurumbira wake wakanzwika mudunhu iro rose. 
Luke4:38 Jesu akazosimuka obva pasinagogu ndokundopinda mumba maSimoni. Vambuya vaSimoni vakanga vachirwara kwazvo, muviri wavo uchipinda chando zvikuru. Vakavakumbirira kuna Jesu." 
Luke4:39 Iye akandomira pedyo navo ndokutaurira denda kuti ribve mavari. Denda ndokubva ravasiya. Pakarepo vakabva vasimuka vakavashandira. 
Luke4:40 Kuzoti zuva rovira, vose vaiva navarwere vana matenda akasiyana — siyana, vakauya navo kwaari, iye ndokuisa maoko ake pamusoro pomumwe nomumwe wavo, akavaporesa."
