Luke4:41 Mweya yakaipa yakabuda muvazhinji ichidaidzira ichiti, “Iwe, ndiwe Mwanakomana waMwari.” Asi Jesu akaikarira asingaibvumiri kutaura nokuti yaiziva kuti iyeyu ndiye Kristu wacho." 
Luke4:42 Kuzoti kwaedza Jesu akabvako oenda kunzvimbo isina vanhu. Uzhinji hwavanhu hwakamutsvaka. Vakauya kwaari vachiedza kumudzivisa kuti asabve kwavari. 
Luke4:43 Asi Jesu akati kwavari, “Ndinofanira kuparidzawo shoko rakanaka roumambo hwaMwari kuna mamwe maguta nokuti ndizvo zvandakatumirwa.”" 
Luke4:44 Ndokubva aparidza mumasinagogu eJudhea. 
Luke5:1 Vanhu zvavakanga vachiti unga — unga padyo naJesu vachida kunzwa shoko raMwari, iye akanga akamira pamahombekombe egungwa reGenesareti." 
Luke5:2 Akaona magwa maviri ari kumucheto kwegungwa asi vabvuvi vakanga vabuda maari, vava kusuka usvasvi hwavo." 
Luke5:3 Jesu akapinda mune rimwe igwa raiva riri raSimoni, akamukumbira kuti asuduruke abve kumucheto zvishoma. Zvino akagara mugwa muya akadzidzisa vanhu vazhinji arimo." 
Luke5:4 Kuzoti apedza kutaura, akati kuna Simoni, “Enda kwakadzika, mudzikise usvasvi hwenyu mubate hove.”" 
Luke5:5 Simoni akapindura akati, “Mudzidzisi, tabinduka usiku hwose, tikasabata chinhu, asi pamusana pokuti mazvitaura ndichadzikisa usvasvi mumvura.”" 
Luke5:6 Vakati vaita izvozvo, vakakukuzva hove zhinji, usvasvi hwavo hukatenge hoda kubvaruka." 
Luke5:7 Zvino vakaninira vamwe vavo, vaiva mune rimwe igwa, kuti vauye kuzovabatsira. Vakauya, vakazadza magwa ose ari maviri zvokuti akanga oda kutonyura." 
Luke5:8 Zvino Simoni Pita akati aona izvi, akazviwisira pasi pamabvi aJesu achiti, “Tenzi, ibvai henyu kwandiri, nokuti ndiri mutadzi.”" 
Luke5:9 Nokuti iye, navose vaaiva navo, vakanga vashamiswa nokuwanda kwehove dzavakanga vabata." 
Luke5:10 Ndizvo zvakaitawo vana Jemusi naJohani, vanakomana vaZebhedhi vaiita mushandirapamwe naSimoni. Ipapo Jesu akati kuna Simoni, “Usatye hako, kubvira zvino uchava mubvuvi wavanhu.”" 
Luke5:11 Pavakasvitsa magwa avo pamahombekombe, vakasiya zvose vakamutevera." 
Luke5:12 Akati ari mune rimwe guta hoyo mumwe murume akanga ana maperembudzi muviri wose akati achiona Jesu, akazviwisira pasi nouso ndokumukumbira achiti, “Tenzi, kana muchida henyu munogona kundinatsa muchindichenura nokundirapa.”" 
Luke5:13 Ipapo Jesu akatambanudza ruoko rwake ndokumubata achiti, “Ndinoda, chichenurwa uporeswe hako.” Pakarepo maperembudzi ake akabva apera." 
Luke5:14 Jesu akamukohomedza kuti asaudze munhu. Asi akati, “Enda, undozviratidza kumupristi, upe chipo chokuchenurwa kwako, sokutemwa kwazvakaitwa naMosesi, kuti chive chapupu kuvanhu.”" 
Luke5:15 Asi mukurumbira wake wakatopararira kwose kwose. Uzhinji hwavanhu hwakaungana kuzomunzwa nokuporeswa matenda avo. 
Luke5:16 Asi Jesu aimbobva achienda kunzvimbo isina vanhu kundonamata. 
Luke5:17 Rimwe zuva Jesu paakanga achidzidzisa, paiva navaFarisei navadzidzisi voMutemo, vakanga vagerepo vaibva mumisha yose yeGarirea neyeJudhea nokuJerusaremu. Simba raTenzi rokuporesa rakanga riinaye." 
Luke5:18 Havo vamwe varume vakauya vakatakura pabanda, munhu akanga akatonhora mitezo, vakada kupinda naye nokumuisa pamberi paJesu." 
Luke5:19 Pavakatadza kupinda naye pamusana pokuwanda kwavanhu vakakwira pamusoro pemba, vakabvisa mafendefa edenga remba, ndokumudzikisa ari pauvato pamberi paJesu mukati mavanhu." 
Luke5:20 Zvino paakaona chitendero chavo, Jesu akati, “Hama zvitadzo zvako zvaregererwa.”" 
Luke5:21 Nyanzvi dzoMutemo navaFarisei vakatanga kufunga vachiti, “Ndianiko uyu anotaura achishonha Mwari? Ndiani angagone kuregerera zvitadzo kunze kwaMwari oga?”" 
Luke5:22 Asi Jesu akaona pfungwa dzavo akavapindura achiti, “Munofungireiko zvakadai mumwoyo menyu?" 
Luke5:23 Chakareruka ndechipi, kuti, ‘Waregererwa zvitadzo zvako,’ kana kuti, ‘Simuka ufambe?’ ”" 
Luke5:24 Zvino kuti muzive kuti Mwanakomana womunhu ane simba pasi pano rokuregerera zvitadzo, akati kuno munhu akanga akatonhora mitezo, “Ndinoti kwauri, simuka, utore uvato hwako, uende kumusha.”" 
Luke5:25 Pakarepo munhu uya akabva asimuka vose vachizviona, ndokutora chaakanga avete chiya ndokuenda kumusha achirumbidza Mwari." 
Luke5:26 Vanhu vose zvakavakatyamadza kwazvo, vakarumbidza Mwari, uye vakaputirwa nokutya vachiti, “Nhasi taona zvinoshamisa.”" 
Luke5:27 Shure kwaizvozvo Jesu akabuda, ndokuona muteresi ainzi Revhi, agere pahofisi yomutero, ndokuti kwaari, “Nditevere.”" 
Luke5:28 Iye akasiya zvose, akasimuka ndokumutevera." 
Luke5:29 Revhi akagadzirira Jesu mabiko makuru mumba make. Vateresi vazhinji navamwe vanhu vakagara navo pakudya. 
Luke5:30 VaFarisei nenyanzvi dzoMutemo vakanyunyutira vadzidzi vake, vachiti, “Munodyireiko navateresi navatadzi, muchinwa navo?”" 
Luke5:31 Jesu akavapindura achiti, “Vakukutu havadi chiremba asi vanorwara." 
Luke5:32 Handina kuuya kuzodaidza vakarurama kwete, asi vatadzi kuti vapinduke.”" 
Luke5:33 Vanhu vakati kwaari, “Vadzidzi vaJohani vanotsanya kazhinji, vachiita minamato, navadzidzi vavaFarisei vanodarowo, asi venyu vanodya nokunwa.”" 
Luke5:34 Jesu akati kwavari, “Mungaite kuti vanhu vari pamuchato vatsanye, iye muwani vachinaye here?" 
Luke5:35 Asi mazuva achauya avachatorerwa muwani. Pamazuva iwayo ndipo pavachazotsanya.” 
Luke5:36 Akavataurirazve nomuenzaniso achiti, “Hakuna munhu anobvarura jira rechigamba pahanzu itsva achichisonerera pahanzu tsaru. Kana akadaro achabvarura hanzu itsva, uyezve chigamba chehanzu itsva hachipindirani nehanzu tsaru." 
Luke5:37 Hakuna munhu angadururire, waini itsva muzvigubhu zvamatehwe zvitsaru. Kana akadaro, waini itsva inoputitsa zvigubhu izvozvo, waini ichadeuka nezvigubhu zvichaparadzika." 
Luke5:38 Asi waini itsva inofanira kudirwa muzvigubhu zvitsva. 
Luke5:39 Uye hakuna munhu anoti kana anwa waini yakare angazoda itsva, nokuti anoti, ‘Yakare ndiyo yakanaka.’ ”" 
Luke6:1 Zvakazoitika kuti nomumwe musi weSabata Jesu aifamba napakati peminda yekoroni, vadzidzi vake vaipurura hura dzekoroni vachidzipukutira mumaoko vachidya." 
Luke6:2 Vamwe vavaFarisei vakati, “Munoitirei zvisingabvumirwi nomusi weSabata?”" 
Luke6:3 Jesu akavapindura akati, “Hamuna kurava here zvakaitwa naDhavhidhi musi uya waakanga oziya iye navanhu vaaiva navo," 
Luke6:4 kuti akapinda mumba yaMwari akatora zvingwa zvakasumwa kuna Mwari akazvidya akapawo vaaiva navo kunyange zvisingabvumirwi kudyiwa naani zvake kusiya vapristi voga?” 
Luke6:5 Ndokuti kwavari, “Mwanakomana womunhu ndiMambo weSabata.”" 
Luke6:6 Zvakaitikazve kuti nerimwe Sabata Jesu akapinda musinagogu akadzidzisa, imomo maiva nomunhu akanga anoruoko rworudyi rwakakokonyara." 
Luke6:7 Nyanzvi dzoMutemo navaFarisei vakanyatsomutarisisa vachida kuona kuti angaporese here nezuva reSabata, kuti vawane mhosva yokumubata nayo." 
Luke6:8 Asi iye akaziva zvavaifunga ndokuti kumunhu uya akanga ano ruoko rwakakokonyara, “Simuka umire apa.” Munhu uya ndiye kwanyanu, omira." 
Luke6:9 Zvino Jesu akati kwavari, “Ndinoda kumbokubvunzai, zvinobvumirwa here, pamusi weSabata, kuita zvakanaka kana kuita zvakaipa, kuponesa upenyu hwomunhu kana kuti kuhuparadza?”" 
Luke6:10 Akaringa — ringa achitarisa vose ndokuti kumunhu uya, “Tambanudza ruoko rwako.” Akabva aita saizvozvo; ruoko rwake rukabva rwatasamuka." 
Luke6:11 Asi ivo vakashatirwa zvikuru chaizvo vakarangana kuti vangaitei naJesu. 
Luke6:12 Pamazuva iwayo Jesu akabuda akaenda kugomo kundonamata. Akapedza usiku hwose achinamata kuna Mwari. 
Luke6:13 Kuzoti kwaedza, akadana vadzidzi vake akasarudza pakati pavo gumi navaviri, vaakatumidza zita rokuti vapositori." 
Luke6:14 Kunoti Simoni waakatumidza zita rokuti Pita, naAndireya munun'una wake, kwoti Jemusi, naJohani, kwozoti Firipi, naBhatoromeo," 
Luke6:15 tevere Mateu, naTomasi, kwouya Jemusi mwana waArifeo, naSimoni muZiroti," 
Luke6:16 Ndokuzouyawo Judhasi mwana waJemusi, naJudhasi Isikariyoti uya akazova mupanduki." 
Luke6:17 Zvino akaburuka navo akandomira panzvimbo yakati chechetere aina vadzidzi vake vazhinji nechita chikuru chavanhu vakabva muJudhea yose nomuJerusaremu nomunyika yeTire neSidhoni iri pedyo negungwa," 
Luke6:18 vakanga vauya kuzonzwa zvaaitaura nokuporeswa matenda avo. Uye vakanga vachitambudzwa nemweya yakaipa vakaporeswa. 
Luke6:19 Vanhu vose vaivapo vaivavarira kumubata nokuti simba rakanga richibuda maari richiporesa vose. 
Luke6:20 Zvino Jesu akatarisa vadzidzi vake ndokuti, “Makakomborerwa zvenyu imi varombo nokuti umambo hwaMwari ndohwenyu." 
Luke6:21 “Makakomborerwa zvenyu imi mune nzara zvino nokuti muchazogutswa. Makakomborerwa imi munochema zvino nokuti muchazoseka. 
Luke6:22 “Makakomborerwa zvenyu imi kana vanhu vachikuvengai, vasingadi kufambidzana nemi, vachikunyombai vachiipisa zita renyu, sechinhu chakaipa, pamusana poMwanakomana womunhu!" 
Luke6:23 Farai pazuva iroro, muchipembera nokuti mubayiro wenyu mukuru kudenga. Ndinodaro nokuti ndizvozvowo zvakaita madzibaba avo kuna vaporofita." 
Luke6:24 “Asi zvichakuwanai imi vapfumi nokuti kugarika kwamunako ndikoko kwese kwamatowana. 
Luke6:25 “Zvichakuwanai imi munamaguta zvino nokuti muchazova nenzara. Zvichakuwanai imi munoseka zvino nokuti muchasuruvara nokuchema. 
Luke6:26 “Zvichakuwanai imi kana vanhu vose vachitaura zvakanaka nezvenyu nokuti ndizvozvowo zvakaita madzitateguru avo kuna vaporofita venhema. 
Luke6:27 “Asi kunemi makateerera ndinoti, Idai mhandu dzenyu, itirai zvakanaka vanokuvengai." 
Luke6:28 Komborerai vanokurengererai rushambwa. Namatirai vanokunyombai. 
Luke6:29 Kune anenge akurova padama mutendeudzirezve rimwe; munhu anokutorera bhachi rako usamurambire kana hembe yako. 
Luke6:30 Ani naani anokukumbira chinhu mupe; uye anokutorera zvinhu zvako rega kunozvireva kwete. 
Luke6:31 Zvamunoda kuti vamwe vakuitirei vaitireiwo saizvozvo. 
Luke6:32 “Kana muchingoda vanokudai, munokodzera chitusoi? Nokuti kana vatadziwo vanoda vanovada." 
Luke6:33 Uye kana muchiitira zvakanaka vanokuitirai zvakanaka munokodzera chitusoi? Nokuti kunyange vatadzi vanodarowo. 
Luke6:34 Kana muchikweretesa vamunofunga kuti vanozokudzorerai munokodzera chitusoi? Kana vatadzi vanokweretesa vamwe vatadzi kuti vagodzorerwa zvakaenzana. 
Luke6:35 Asi imi idai vavengi venyu, muvaitire zvakanaka, mukweretese musingatarisire kuti muchadzorerwa, ipapo mubayiro wenyu uchazova mukuru uye muchazova vana voWokumusorosoro nokuti iye ano mwoyochena kuna vasingatendi nokuna vakaipa." 
Luke6:36 Ivai netsitsi saBaba venyu vane tsitsi. 
Luke6:37 “Musatonge vamwe, nemi hamuzotongwi, musape vanhu mhosva, nemi hamuzopihwawo mhosva. Regereranai, nemi mucharegererwawo." 
Luke6:38 Ipai, nemi muchapiwa, muchadirirwa pamakumbo mwero wakanaka, wakatsindirwa, wakazunguzirwa, unomupfumvumvu; nokuti chiereso chamunoeresa nacho ndicho chamuchaererwa nacho.”" 
Luke6:39 Akazovataurirawo muenzaniso achiti, “Ko bofu ringatungamirire rimwe bofu here? Haangawire mugomba ose ari maviri here?" 
Luke6:40 Mudzidzi haasi mukuru panomudzidzisi wake. Asi kana munhu wose achinge anyatsodzidziswa anoita somudzidzisi wake. 
Luke6:41 Ko unotarisireiko kabanzu kari muziso rehama yako asi usingaoni danda riri muziso mako. 
Luke6:42 Kana kuti ungagone sei kuti kuhama yako, ‘Hama, rega ndikubvise kabanzu kari muziso mako, iwe pachako usingaoni danda riri muziso mako?’ Iwe munyengedzi, tanga wabvisa danda riri muziso mako, kuti unyatsoona kubvisa kabanzu kari muziso rehama yako." 
Luke6:43 “Muti wakanaka haubereki muchero wakaipa. Uyewo muti wakaipa haungabereki muchero wakanaka. 
Luke6:44 Muti mumwe nomumwe unozivikanwa nomuchero wawo. Vanhu havatanhi maonde paminzwa kana magirepisi parukato. 
Luke6:45 Munhu akanaka anobudisa zvakanaka zvichibva muupfumi hwakanaka hwemwoyo wake. Nomunhuwo akaipa anobudisa zvakaipa zvichibva muupfumi hwakaipa hwemwoyo wake nokuti muromo unotaura zvinenge zvichibva mune zvizere mumwoyo make. 
Luke6:46 “Seiko muchinditi, ‘Tenzi, Tenzi,’ imi musingaiti zvandinoreva?" 
Luke6:47 Munhu wose anouya kwandiri, achinzwa mazwi angu, achita zvaanoreva, ndichakuratidzai kuti akaita saani." 
Luke6:48 Akafanana nomunhu akati avaka imba, akachera zvakadzama kwazvo, ndokuvakira ugaro hwayo paruware. Pakauya mafashafasha emvura, rukova rwukaroverera pamba iyoyo rukatadza kuizunguza nokuti yakanga yakanyatsovakwa." 
Luke6:49 Asi uyo anonzwa mashoko angu asingaaiti, akafanana nomunhu akavakira imba yake pavhu, isina ugaro. Rukova rwakaroverera pairi, ikawa pakarepo, kuparara kwemba iyoyo kukava kukuru kwazvo.”" 
Luke7:1 Kuzoti Jesu apedza kutaura mashoko ake ose kuvanhu vakanga vakateerera, akapinda muKapenaumu." 
Luke7:2 Zvino mumwe mutungamiri wezana aiva nomuranda waaida chaizvo. Muranda uyu akanga achirwara; ava kutoda kufa. 
Luke7:3 Kuzoti mutungamiri wezana anzwa nezvaJesu, akatuma vakuru vakuru vavaJudha kwaari achikumbira kuti auye kuzoporesa muranda wake." 
Luke7:4 Pavakasvika kuna Jesu, vakamukumbirisa vachiti, “Anokodzera kuti mumuitire izvi," 
Luke7:5 nokuti anoda rudzi rwedu; ndiyezve akativakira sinagogu yedu.” 
Luke7:6 Jesu akaenda navo. Kuzoti ava padyo neimba iyoyo, mutungamiriri wezana akatuma shamwari kwaari achiti, “Tenzi musazvinetse henyu, nokuti handikodzeri kuti mupinde mumba mangu," 
Luke7:7 ndosakawo ndazviona ndiri asingakodzeri kuuya kwamuri. Asi ingotaurai izwi chete, muranda wangu achapora," 
Luke7:8 nokuti ndiri munhu ari pasi pavakuru uye ndina masojawo pasi pangu. Ndinoti kune mumwe, ‘Enda,’ achienda, kuno mumwe: ‘Uya,’ achiuya. Kumuranda wangu ndinoti, ‘Ita ichi,’ achichiita.”" 
Luke7:9 Jesu paakazvinzwa, akashamiswa naye, akatendeukira kuchita chavanhu chakanga chichimutevera, akati, “Ndinoti kwamuri, kunyange muIsiraeri handisati ndamboona chitendero chakadai.”" 
Luke7:10 Vakanga vatumwa vaya pavakadzokera kumba kuya vakandowana muranda uya ave wadi. 
Luke7:11 Kubvezvo Jesu akaenda kune rimwe guta rainzi Naini; vadzidzi vake negurumwandira ravanhu vakaenda naye. 
Luke7:12 Kuzoti ava kusvika pasuo guru reguta iroro, houno munhu akanga akatembedzanwa, akafa, mwana mukomana aive ari ndiye mwana mumwechete oga waamai vake, uye amai ava vaiva chirikadzi. Vanhu vazhinji veguta iroro vaivaperekedza." 
Luke7:13 Tenzi paakaona amai ava, akasiririswa navo ndokuti kwavari, “Chiregai zvenyu kuchema,”" 
Luke7:14 ndokuswedera obata hwanyanza; vainge vakatakura chitunha ndokumira. Jesu ndokuti, “Jaya, ndinoti kwauri, muka!”" 
Luke7:15 Muchakabvu akamuka, ndokugara, ndokutanga kutaura. Iye ndokumupa kuna amai vake." 
Luke7:16 Vanhu vose vakabatwa nokutya, vakarumbidza Mwari vachiti, “Muporofita mukuru akamutswa mukati medu, Mwari azoshanyira vanhu vake.”" 
Luke7:17 Nyaya iyi yaitaura nezvake yakapararira muJudhea yose nomumatunhu ose akapoteredza. 
Luke7:18 Johani akaudzwa zvinhu zvose izvi navadzidzi vake, ndokudana vadzidzi vake vaviri," 
Luke7:19 akavatuma kuna Tenzi kundoti, “Ndimi mainzi muchauya here kana kuti tomirira mumwe?”" 
Luke7:20 Varume ava zvavakasvika kwaari vakati, “Johani Muombeki atituma kwamuri, achibvunza kuti, ‘Ko ndimi here uya akanzi achazouya kana kuti tomirira mumwe?’ ”" 
Luke7:21 Nenguva yakareyo Jesu aiporesa vazhinji vaiva nezvirwere namatenda, achidzinga mweya yakaipa; achisvinudzawo mapofu mazhinji." 
Luke7:22 Jesu akavapindura achiti, “Endai mundoudza Johani zvamaona nezvamanzwa, zvokuti mapofu avakusvinudzwa, mhetamakumbo dzavakufamba, vana maperembudzi vavakunatswa, vamatsi vavakunzwa, vakafa vavakumutswa, varombo vavakuparidzwa shoko rakanaka." 
Luke7:23 Akakomborerwa munhu asingagumburwi neni.” 
Luke7:24 Nhume dzaJohani dzakati dzabva, Jesu akatanga kutaurira ruzhinji rwavanhu nezvaJohani achiti; “Makaenda kurenje kundoonei? Rutsanga runozunguzwa nemhepo here?" 
Luke7:25 Zvino makaenda kundooneiko? Munhu akapfeka hanzu dzakapfavirira here? Inga wani munoziva kuti avo vanopfeka hanzu dzinokosha nokugara upenyu hwomutambaratede vari mumizinda yaMadzimambo. 
Luke7:26 Ko zvino makaenda kundoonei? Muporofita here? Hongu, uyezve ndinoti kwamuri, munhu anotopfuura muporofita." 
Luke7:27 Uyu ndiye uya akanyorwa nezvake zvichinzi, “ ‘Tarira ndinotuma nhume yangu mberi kwako, ichafanogadzirira nzira yako pamberi pako.’" 
Luke7:28 “Ndinoti kwamuri, pavanhu vose vakazvarwa navakadzi hakuna mukuru kupinda Johani. Zvakadaro zvazvo muduku wokupedzisira muumambo hwaMwari mukuru kwaari.”" 
Luke7:29 Pakunzwa izvi, vanhu vose navateresiwo vakapembedza ururami hwaMwari nokuombekwa kwavakanga vaitwa noruombeko rwaJohani." 
Luke7:30 Asi vaFarisei nenyanzvi dzoMutemo nokusaombekwa kwavo naJohani, vakaramba zvakarongwa naMwari pamusoro pavo." 
Luke7:31 “Ko vanhu vechizvarwa chino ndingavaenzanise neiko? Uye vakafanana neiko? 
Luke7:32 Vakafanana navana vagere pamusika vachidaidzirana vachiti, “ ‘Takakuridzirai nyere asi hamuna kutamba, takaungudza asi hamuna kuchema.’" 
Luke7:33 “Nokuti Johani Muombeki akauya asingadyi chingwa kana kunwa waini, imi mukati, ‘Ane mweya wakaipa.’" 
Luke7:34 Mwanakomana womunhu akauya achidya uye achinwa, moti munhu uyu ane nhafu uye chidhakwa neshamwari yavateresi navatadzi.”" 
Luke7:35 Kudaro ungwaru hunoratidzwa kuti ndohwechokwadi navose vanohugamuchira. 
Luke7:36 Mumwe wavaFarisei akamukoka kuti azodya naye. Jesu akapinda mumba yomuFarisei uyu ndokugara pakudya. 
Luke7:37 Zvakaitika kuti mumwe mukadzi womugutamo aiva mutadzi paakanzwa kuti Jesu agere pakudya mumba yomuFarisei uya, akauya nechinu chomunyakwe wearabhasita chiina mafuta okuzora." 
Luke7:38 Akasvikomira nechokumashure kwaJesu kutsoka dzake achisvimha misodzi, ndokutanga kunyorovesa tsoka dzake nemisodzi yake achidzipukuta nevhudzi romusoro wake, uye akatsvoda tsoka dzake, nokudzizora namafuta aye." 
Luke7:39 Pakuona izvi, muFarisei uya akanga amukoka, akazviti nechomumwoyo, “Dai munhu uyu anga ari muporofita, angadai aziva kuti mukadzi uyu anomubata ndiani, uye kuti mukadzi worudzii, nokuti mutadzi.”" 
Luke7:40 Jesu ndokudavira akati, “Simoni, ndine zvandinoda kutaura kwauri.” Simoni ndokumuti, “Taurai henyu, Mudzidzisi.”" 
Luke7:41 “Mumwe mukweretesi aiva navakwereti vaviri. Mumwe akakwereta mazana mashanu amadhenari mumwewo makumi mashanhu. 
Luke7:42 Sezvavakanga vasisagoni kudzorera, akavaregerera vose vari vaviri. Ko, ndoupi pavanhu ava achamuda kupinda mumwe?”" 
Luke7:43 Simoni akamupindura achiti, “Ndinofunga kuti ndouya akaregererwa zvizhinji.” Jesu ndokumuti, “Wapindura zvazviri.”" 
Luke7:44 Zvino akatendeukira kumukadzi uya ndokuti kuna Simoni, “Unoona mukadzi uyu? Ndapinda mumba mako, hauna kundipa mvura yokugeza tsoka dzangu asi iye anyorovesa tsoka dzangu nemisodzi yake akadzipukuta nevhudzi rake." 
Luke7:45 Iwe hauna kunditsvoda asi iye kubvira zvandapinda muno haana kurega kutsvoda tsoka dzangu. 
Luke7:46 Iwe hauna kuzora musoro wangu namafuta asi iye azora tsoka dzangu namafuta anonhuhwirira. 
Luke7:47 Ndinoti kwauri, zvitadzo zvake zvizhinji zvaregererwa nokuti aratidza rudo rukuru; asi uyo anoregererwa zvishoma anoratidza rudo rushoma.”" 
Luke7:48 Jesu ndokuti kumukadzi uya, “Zvitadzo zvako zvaregererwa.”" 
Luke7:49 Ipapo vaya vakanga vagere naye pakudya vakatanga kuzviti, “Uyu ndianiko anoregererawo kunyange zvitadzo?”" 
Luke7:50 Iye ndokuti kumukadzi, “Chitendero chako chakuponesa, chienda zvako murugare.”" 
Luke8:1 Mushure maizvozvi Jesu akaenda nomumaguta nomumisha achiparidza nokushumaira Shoko Rakanaka roumambo hwaMwari. Akanga aina vane gumi navaviri vaya 
Luke8:2 pamwechete namamwe madzimai akanga aponeswa kumweya yakaipa nokuzvirwere. Paiti Maria ainzi Magadharena akabviswa mweya yakaipa minomwe 
Luke8:3 naJoana mudzimai waKusa, mushandi waHerodhi naSuzana navamwe vazhinji vaivariritira nezvinhu zvavo pachavo." 
Luke8:4 Pakati paunganwa nechita chikuru chavanhu vachibva muguta neguta vachiuya kwaari, akavataurira nomuenzaniso uyu achiti:" 
Luke8:5 “Mukushi akaenda kundokusha mbeu yake. Paakanga achikusha, dzimwe dzakawira munzira dzikatsikwatsikwa netsoka dzikadyiwa neshiri dzedenga." 
Luke8:6 Dzimwe dzakawira parukangarahwe, asi padzakamera dzakaoma nokuti dzakanga dzisina unyoro." 
Luke8:7 Dzimwe dzakawira muminzwa. Minzwa yakakurirana nadzo pamwechete ikadzivhunga. 
Luke8:8 Dzimwe dzakawira muvhu rakanaka dzikakura dzikabereka zvakapetwa kazana. Paaitaura izvi akadaidzira achiti, ‘Ane nzeve dzokunzwa ngaanzwe!’ ”" 
Luke8:9 Vadzidzi vake pavakamubvunza kuti muenzaniso uyo unorevei," 
Luke8:10 iye akati, “Imi zvenyu makapiwa ruzivo rwezvakavandika zvoumambo hwaMwari asi kuna vamwe inongova mienzaniso kuti kutarisa vatarise zvavo asi vasingaoni, uye kunzwa vanzwe zvavo asi vasinganzwisisi.”" 
Luke8:11 Izvi ndizvo zvinorehwa nomuenzaniso uyu: Mbeu ndiro izwi raMwari. 
Luke8:12 Dziya dzaparutivi penzira ndivo vaya vakanzwa izwi asi Satani anouya wobvisa izwi iroro mumwoyo mavo kuti varege kudavira uye kuti varege kuponeswa. 
Luke8:13 Dzakawira parukangarahwe ndivo vaya vanoti vakanga vanzwa izwi vanorigamuchira norufaro asi ava havana midzi. Vanodavira kwechinguvana asi panguva yezviedzo vanobva vahedhuka. 
Luke8:14 Dziya dzakawira mukati meminzwa ndivo vaya vanonzwa asi pavanoenda vanovhungwa nokuzvidya mwoyo noupfumi namafaro oupenyu. Zvibereko zvavo hazvisviki. 
Luke8:15 Dziya dzakawira muvhu rakanaka, ndivo vaya vanoti kana vanzwa shoko vanoribatisisa zviri pachokwadi nemwoyo wakanaka. Vanobereka zvibereko nokutsungirira." 
Luke8:16 Hakuna munhu anoti kana atungidza mwenje anoukwidibira nomudziyo kana kuisa pasi pomubhedha asi anotouisa pachidzimikiro chomwenje kuti vanopinda vaone chiedza. 
Luke8:17 Hapana chakavigwa chisingazoburitswa pachena kana chii zvacho chakavanzika chisingazozivikanwa chichiiswa pachena. 
Luke8:18 Naizvozvo chenjererai manzwiro amunoita nokuti uyo anazvo achawedzerwa zvimwe uye asina achatorerwa kunyange chaanofunga kuti anacho. 
Luke8:19 Kwakazouya amai vake navakoma navanun'una vake asi havana kukwanisa kusvika paari pamusana pechita chavanhu. 
Luke8:20 Akataurirwa kuti amai venyu navakoma navanun'una naye vamire panze. Vanoda kukuonai. 
Luke8:21 Asi iye akati kwavari amai vangu navakoma navanun'una vangu ndavavo vanonzwa shoko raMwari vachiita zvarinoreva. 
Luke8:22 Rimwe zuva Jesu akapinda mugwa navadzidzi vake. Akati kwavari ngatiyambukirei kumhiri kwegungwa. Nezvo vakatangisa kuenda. 
Luke8:23 Pavakanga vachienda kudaro Jesu akakotsira. Kwakauya dutu richivhuvhuta mugungwa. Igwa rakanga ravakuzara nemvura. Vakanga vava munjodzi. 
Luke8:24 Vakaenda vakandomumutsa vachiti, “Tenzi, Tenzi tava kuparara.” Akamuka akatsiura mhepo namasaisai namafungu anotyisa. Zvakabva zvaganhuka kukabva kwati dzika — dzika." 
Luke8:25 Akavati, “Chitendero chenyu chiripi?” Vakabva vava kutya uye vakakatyamadzwa. Vakataurirana vachiti, “Ko uyu ndiani uyu anotoudza kunyange mhepo nemvura zvichimuteerera.”" 
Luke8:26 Vakazosvika kunyika yavaGerasini yakatarisana neGarirea. 
Luke8:27 Paakangoti achiti budei mugwa akasangana nomunhu aibva muguta iroro aiva nomweya wakaipa. Kwenguva ndefu akanga asingapfeki hanzu. Akanga asingagari mumba asi aigara kumakuva. 
Luke8:28 Paakaona Jesu akazhamba akawira pasi pamberi pake ndokudaidzira achiti, “Unei neni Jesu, Mwanakomana waMwari Wokumusorosoro? Ndinokukumbirisa zvangu kuti usandirwadzise.”" 
Luke8:29 Chikonzero ndechokuti Jesu akanga ati mweya wetsvina ubude mumunhu iyeyo nokuti kazhinji mweya wakaipa waimugara. Aigara akatochengetedzwa akasungwa nengetani namajoti asi aidambura zvisungo izvozvo achitinhirwa kurenje nomweya wakaipa. 
Luke8:30 Ipapo Jesu akamubvunza kuti, “Zita rako ndiani?” Iye akati, “Ndinonzi Hondo” nokuti mweya yakaipa yakawanda yakanga yapinda maari." 
Luke8:31 Yakamuteterera kuti asaiendese kugomba rakadzikisisa. 
Luke8:32 Zvino ipapo paiva nedanga renguruve dzakawanda dzaifura zvadzo mujinga megomo. Yakamukumbira kuti ipinde madziri. Akaibvumidza. 
Luke8:33 Mweya yakaipa yakabuda mumunhu uya ikapinda munguruve dziya. Danga riya rakati ware roteremuka napamawere marefu ndiye rove rove mugungwa kunyura. 
Luke8:34 Vafudzi pavakaona zvakanga zvaitika, ndokuti warewo kutiza; vakandotaura muguta nomumaruwa zvakanga zvaitika." 
Luke8:35 Vanhu vakabuda kundoona zvakanga zvaitika. Vakauya kuna Jesu vakawana munhu uya makanga mabuda mweya yakaipa, akagara pasi patsoka dzaJesu akatopfekawo uye pfungwa dzake dzava pamwechete. Vakatya." 
Luke8:36 Avo vakanga vazviona vakavataurira kuti uya akanga akagarwa nemweya yakaipa akaporeswa sei. 
Luke8:37 Zvino vanhu vose vemunharaunda yenyika yeGerasini vakamukumbira kuti abve zvake kwavari nokuti vakabatwa nokutya kukuru. Nokudaro Jesu akapinda mugwa ndokubva adzokera. 
Luke8:38 Murume uya akabviswa mweya yakaipa akakumbira kuti arambe ainaye, asi Jesu akamuti aende zvake achiti," 
Luke8:39 “Dzokera kumusha kwako undorondedzera kuti Mwari akakuitira zvakadii.” Nokudaro akaenda achiparidza nomuguta rose kuti Jesu akanga amuitira zvakadii. 
Luke8:40 Jesu paakadzoka, chita chavanhu chakamugamuchira nokuti vose vakanga vakamumirira." 
Luke8:41 Hoyo mumwe murume anonzi Jairosi akanga ari mutongi wesinagogu akauya. Akazviwisira patsoka dzaJesu akamukumbirisa kuti auye kumba kwake 
Luke8:42 nokuti aiva nomwanasikana mumwechete oga aiva namakore anenge gumi namaviri akanga avakuda kufa. Paakanga achiendako, vanhu vakanga vakamukomberedza vakanga vachidzvinyirirana naye." 
Luke8:43 Mumwe mukadzi aiva nechirwere chebaro kwamakore gumi namaviri, akanga apedzera zvose zvaimuraramisa kun'anga asi hapana akakwanisa kumurapa." 
Luke8:44 Akauya neshure kwake akabata mupendero wehanzu yake. Pakarepo ropa rakabva raganhuka kubuda. 
Luke8:45 Jesu akati, “Ndiani andibata?” Vose zvavakaramba, Pita “Tenzi, gurusvusvu ravanhu rakakutenderedzai uye riri kudzvinyirirana nemi!”" 
Luke8:46 Asi Jesu akati, “Pane mumwe andibata nokuti ndanzwa kuti simba rabuda mandiri.”" 
Luke8:47 Mukadzi uya paakaona kuti haana kuvandika, akauya achidedera akawira pasi pamberi pake akadura pachena pamberi pavanhuvose, kuti akanga amubatirei, uye kuti akabva aporeswa sei, pakare pakarepo." 
Luke8:48 Jesu akati kwaari, “Mukunda, kutenda kwako kwakuponesa chienda zvako norugare.”" 
Luke8:49 Paakanga achiri kutaura mumwe munhu akabva kumba kwomutungamiriri uya, akauya achiti, “Mwanasikana wenyu atofa chiregai kunge muchanetsa zvenyu mudzidzisi.”" 
Luke8:50 Asi Jesu paakanzwa izvi akapindura achiti, “Usatye tenda chete achaponeswa.”" 
Luke8:51 Pavakasvika pamba hapana waakabvumira kupinda naye kusiya Pita naJemusi naJohani naBaba naamai vomwana iyeyo. 
Luke8:52 Vose vakanga vachimuungudza vachimuchema asi iye akati, “Musachema nokuti haana kufa, akakotsira.”" 
Luke8:53 Vakamuseka nokuti vaiziva kuti afa. 
Luke8:54 Akabata musikana uya ruoko akadaidzira achiti, “Musikana muka.”" 
Luke8:55 Mweya wake wakadzoka akamuka pakarepo. Jesu akati ngaapiwe chimwe chinhu chokudya. 
Luke8:56 Vabereki vake vakashamiswa zvikuru asi akavakohomedza kuti vasawane wavanotaurira zvakanga zvaitika. 
Luke9:1 Jesu akadaidza vane gumi navaviri akavapa simba noukuru pamusoro pemweya yose yakaipa nesimba rokurapa zvirwere. 
Luke9:2 Akavatuma kundoparidza umambo hwaMwari uye kundoporesa. 
Luke9:3 Akati kwavari, “Musatakure zvinhu zverwendo zvinoti tsvimbo kana nhava kana chingwa kana mari. Musave nehembe mbiri." 
Luke9:4 Imba ipi neipi yamunosvikira garai imomo kusvikira pamunobvapo. 
Luke9:5 Kose kwavasingakugamuchirei, kana mobva muguta iroro gumai guruva retsoka dzenyu rive uchapupu kwavari.”" 
Luke9:6 Vadzidzi vakaenda nomumisha vachiparidza shoko vachiporesa kose kose. 
Luke9:7 Herodhi mumwe wavatongi vana akanzwa zvose zvakanga zvaitwa zvakamupazanisa musoro nokuti zvainzi navamwe, ndiJohani akamutswa kuvakafa," 
Luke9:8 vamwewo vachiti ndiEriya akazvionesa. Vamwewo vaiti mumwe wavaporofita vakare akanga amuka. 
Luke9:9 Herodhi akati, “Johani ndakamudimbura musoro. Ko uyu ndiani wandinonzwa zvinhu zvakadai nezvake.” Naizvozvo aitsvaga kuti angamuone sei." 
Luke9:10 Vapositori pavakadzoka vakamurondedzera zvavakanga vaita. Akavatora akaenda navo kwavo voga kuguta rinonzi Bhetisaidha. 
Luke9:11 Voruzhinji pavakazvinzwa vakamutevera. Akavagamuchira akataura kwavari nezvoumambo hwaMwari. Akarapa vakanga vachida kurapwa. 
Luke9:12 Zuva parakanga rodeuka vane gumi navaviri vakauya vakati kwaari, “Dai machiendesa vanhu mumamisha nomuruwa ruri munharaunda ino kuti vandorara nokuwana zvokudya nokuti matiri muno murenje.”" 
Luke9:13 Asi iye akati kwavari, “Vapei iyemi zvokudya.” Ivowo vakati tinongova nezvingwa zvishanu nehove mbiri chete kunze kokunge tatondotengera vanhu ava vose chokudya." 
Luke9:14 Izvozvo pakanga paine varume vainge zviuru zvishanu. Jesu akati kuvadzidzi vake, “Itai kuti vanhu vagare pasi muzvikwata zvavanhu vanenge makumi mashanu pachikwata choga choga.”" 
Luke9:15 Vakaita saizvozvo. Vakagarisa vanhu vose pasi. 
Luke9:16 Jesu akatora zvingwa zviya zvishanu nehove mbiri dziya akatarisa kudenga ndozvikomborera ndokuzvimedura akazvipa kuvadzidzi kuti vazvipe kuvanhu. 
Luke9:17 Vanhu vose vakadya vakaguta. Vakanongera zvakanga zvasara zvikazadza tswanda gumi nembiri. 
Luke9:18 Zvakaitika kuti zvaakanga achinamata oga, vadzidzi vakanga vanaye. Akavabvunza kuti, “Ko vanhu vanonditi ndini ani?”" 
Luke9:19 Ivo vakapindura vachiti, “Vamwe vanoti ndimi Johani Muombeki; vamwewo vachiti, ndimi Eriya vamwewo vachiti, muri mumwe wavaporofita vakare wakamuka.”" 
Luke9:20 Iye ndokuti kwavari, “Ko imi munoti ndini ani?” Pita akapindura achiti, “Ndimi Kristu waMwari.”" 
Luke9:21 Akavatsindidza achivaudza kuti vasambotaurira izvi kana munhu zvake achiti," 
Luke9:22 “Mwanakomana womunhu anofanira kutambudzika zvikuru agorambwa navakuru vakuru navaPristi vakuru nenyanzvi dzomutemo ozouraiwa achizomutswa nezuva retatu.” 
Luke9:23 Jesu akati kuna vose, “Kana munhu achida kunditevera, ngaazvirambe atakure muchinjikwa wake zuva nezuva achinditevera." 
Luke9:24 Nokuti uyo anoda kuponesa upenyu hwake acharasikirwa nahwo nouyo anorasikirwa noupenyu hwake pamusana pangu, achahuponesa." 
Luke9:25 Nokuti zvinobatsireiko munhu kuwana zvinhu zvapasi pose asi achizvirasa achizviparadza iye pachake. 
Luke9:26 Ani naani anondinyara kana kunyara mazwi angu, Mwanakomana womunhu achamunyarawo kana wouya mumbiri yake nomumbiri yaBaba neyavatumwa vatsvene." 
Luke9:27 Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri pane vamwe vamire pano vasingambozoravira rufu vasati vaona umambo hwaMwari.” 
Luke9:28 Mushure memazuva masere Jesu ataura izvi, akatora Pita naJohani naJemusi vakakwira mugomo kundonamata." 
Luke9:29 Paakanga achinamata, uso hwake hwakasanduka, hanzu dzake dzikachena zvokungarikira kwazvo." 
Luke9:30 Ndiye pakarepo varume vaviri, Mosesi naEriya vakanga vava kutaura naye," 
Luke9:31 kutarisika kwavo kwaipenya. Vaitaura nezvokutisiya kwake kwaaizozadzisa kuJerusaremu. 
Luke9:32 Zvino Pita navamwe vaaiva navo vakanga vabatwa kwazvo nehope. Pavakati pepu vakaona kupenya kwake navaviri vaya vamire naye. 
Luke9:33 Varume vaya pavakanga vavakuparadzana naye, Pita akati kuna Jesu, “Tenzi, zvatinakira kuti tive pano. Regai tiite matumba matatu rimwe renyu, rimwe raMosesi nerimwe raEriya.” Akanga asingachazivi zvaaitaura." 
Luke9:34 Paaitaura izvi, gore rakauya rikavafukidza vakabatwa nokutya pavaipinda mugore iroro." 
Luke9:35 Izwi rakabuda mugore richiti, “Uyu ndiye Mwanakomana wangu musarudzwa wangu, munzwei.”" 
Luke9:36 Izwi riya parakanga rapedza kutaura, Jesu akazongoonekwa ava oga. Vakazvinyarara, hapana wavakataurira pamazuva iwayo pane zvavakanga vaona." 
Luke9:37 Pazuva rakatevera racho, pavaiburuka mugomo, gungano guru rakasangana naye." 
Luke9:38 Hoyo mumwe murume akadaidzira mugungano iroro achiti, “Mudzidzisi ndapota ndionereiwo mwanakomana wangu anongova ndiye mwana wangu mumwechete oga." 
Luke9:39 Zvino mweya unongomubata obva ava kuzhamba uchimugwigwinisa kusvikira ava kupupa furo. Unomurwadzisa usingambomusiya. 
Luke9:40 Ndakumbira vadzidzi venyu kuti vaudzinge asi havana kukwanisa.” 
Luke9:41 Jesu akapindura achiti, “Aiwaiwa rudzi urwu, rudzi rusingatendi! Rudzi rwakarasika zvarwo, ndichava nemi kusvikira rinhiko ndichikuitirai mwoyo murefu? Chiuyai nomwana wenyu kuno.”" 
Luke9:42 Paakanga achiuya, mweya wakaipa wakamurigira pasi ukamupfurupfutisa. Jesu akatsiura mweya wetsvina akaporesa mukomana uya akamupa kuna baba vake." 
Luke9:43 Vose vakakatyamadzwa noukuru hwaMwari. Pavakanga vachiri kushamiswa kudaro nezvose zvaakaita akati kuna vadzidzi vake. 
Luke9:44 Regai mazwi aya anyatsopinda munzeve dzenyu okuti, “Mwanakomana womunhu anofanira kuiswa mumaoko avanhu.”" 
Luke9:45 Asi ivo havana kuzvinzwisisa zvaakataura kwavari. Zvakanga zvakavanzwa kwavari kuti varege kuzvinzwisisa uye vaitya kumubvunza zvaaitaura izvi. 
Luke9:46 Pakamuka nharo pakati pavo yokuti ndiani mukuru kupinda vose. 
Luke9:47 Jesu paakaona pfungwa dzaiva mumwoyo mavo akatora mwana muduku akamuisa parutivi pake. 
Luke9:48 Akati kwavari, “Ani naani anogamuchira mwana uyu muzita rangu anogamuchira ini uyewo ani naani anondigamuchira anogamuchirawo uyo akandituma nokuti uyo anenge ari muduku wokupedzisira pakati penyu mose ndiye mukuru iyeyo.”" 
Luke9:49 Johani akadavirawo woti, “Tenzi takaona munhu achidzinga mweya yakaipa muzita renyu tikamurambidza nokuti haasi wenzira imwechete nesu.”" 
Luke9:50 Jesu akati kwaari, “Musamurambidze nokuti munhu asingapikisani nemi ari kudivi kwenyu.”" 
Luke9:51 Mazuva paakanga osvika okuti Jesu achikwidzwa kudenga, akananga kuJerusaremu." 
Luke9:52 Akatuma nhume pamberi pake dzakaenda dzikapinda munomumwe musha wavaSamaria kuti vamugadzirire. 
Luke9:53 Asi vanhu ivavo havana kuda kumugamuchira nokuti akanga akananga kuJerusaremu. 
Luke9:54 Vadzidzi vake, vana Jemusi naJohani pavakazviona vakati, “Tenzi munoda here kuti titi moto utozomoke kudenga uvaroromese?”" 
Luke9:55 Asi akatendeuka akavatsiura 
Luke9:56 vakabva vaenda kunomumwe musha. 
Luke9:57 Pavainge vachifamba nenzira, mumwe murume akati kwaari, “Ndinoda kukuteverai kose zvako kwamunoenda.”" 
Luke9:58 Jesu akati kwaari, “Makava ana maguru uye shiri dzedenga dzina matendere asi Mwanakomana womunhu haana kana pokutsamira musoro wake.”" 
Luke9:59 Akatiwo kunomumwe, “Nditevere.” Asi iye akati, “Tenzi regai nditange ndambondoviga baba vangu.”" 
Luke9:60 Asi iye akamuti, “Rega vafi vavige vakafa vavo. Chako iwe kuenda kundoparidza umambo hwaMwari.”" 
Luke9:61 Mumwewo akati, “Ndichakuteverai, Tenzi, asi regai nditange ndambondoonekana nevari kumusha kwangu.”" 
Luke9:62 Jesu akati kwaari, “Hakuna munhu anobata gejo asi iye achicheuka shure angakodzere umambo hwaMwari.”" 
Luke10:1 Mushure maizvozvi Tenzi akasarudza vamwe makumi manomwe akavatuma pamberi pake achivaita vaviri vaviri kuguta riri rose nenzvimbo dzose dzaainge iye achazoshanyira. 
Luke10:2 Akavati kukohwa kwakawanda, asi vakohwi vashoma. Naizvozvo namatai kuna Tenzi wezvinoda kukohwiwa kuti atumire vakohwi mubasa rake rokukohwa." 
Luke10:3 Chiendai. Tarisai, ndiri kukutumai sehwayana mukati memhumhi." 
Luke10:4 Regai kutakura chikwama kana nhava kana shangu. Musakwazise munhu panzira. 
Luke10:5 Imba yose yamanopinda tangai mati, “Rugare ngaruve muimba ino.”" 
Luke10:6 Kana munhu wepo ari worugare, rugare rwenyu ruchava paari. Kana asiri worugare, rugare rwenyu ruchadzokera kwamuri." 
Luke10:7 Garai muimba imwecheteyo, muchidya nokunwa zvavanokupai nokuti mushandi anokodzera mubayiro wake. Musatevedze nedzimba." 
Luke10:8 Kana mukapinda muguta ripi zvaro vakakugamuchirai idyai zvavanokuperekerai. 
Luke10:9 Rapai vanorwara mariri, muti kwavari umambo hwaMwari hwasvika pedyo nemi." 
Luke10:10 Kanawo mukapinda muguta ripi zvaro, vakasakugamuchirai endai mumigwagwa yaro muti;" 
Luke10:11 “Kunyange guruva reguta renyu rakanamatira patsoka dzedu tinorikuhumurira imi, zvakadaro zvazvo zivai izvi zvokuti umambo hwaMwari hwaswedera.”" 
Luke10:12 Ndinokutaurirai kuti pazuva guru rokutongwa zvichava nyore kuSodhomu pane kune guta iroro. 
Luke10:13 Zvichakuwana zvako iwe Korozeini. Zvichakuwana iwe Bhetisaidha nokuti dai kuri kuti zvishamiso zvakaitwa mamuri zvakaitwa muTire nomuSidhoni, vangadai vakapinduka kare kare. Vangadai vakatopfeka masaga vakagara pamadota." 
Luke10:14 Zvichava nyore pazuva rokutongwa kune guta reTire nereSidhoni panemi. 
Luke10:15 Ko iwe Kapenaumu, uchasimudzirwa kudenga nhai? Uchatodzikiswa kunzvimbo yavafi." 
Luke10:16 Anokuteererai anoteererawo ini; anokurambai ari kutoramba ini. Uyo anoramba ini anorambawo uyo akandituma. 
Luke10:17 Vadzidzi makumi manomwe vakadzoka norufaro vachiti, “Tenzi, kunyange mweya yakaipa yava pasi pedu muzita renyu.” Asi Jesu akati kwavari, “Ndakaona Satani achiwa semheni inobva mudenga." 
Luke10:18 Chionai ndakakupai simba kuti mutsiketsike nyoka namarize 
Luke10:19 nokukunda simba rose romuvengi uye hapana chichakukuvadzai. 
Luke10:20 Zvakadaro zvazvo musafarire izvi zvokuti mweya yava pasi penyu asi farirai kuti mazita enyu akanyorwa kudenga.” 
Luke10:21 Panguva imwecheteyo Jesu akafara kwazvo aina Mweya Mutsvene akati, “Ndinokutendai, Baba, Tenzi wedenga napasi kuti makavanza zvinhu izvi kuna vakachenjera navanonzwisisa mukazvizivisa kuvana vaduku. Hongu Baba aya madiro enyu akanakisa." 
Luke10:22 Zvinhu zvose zvakaiswa mumaoko angu naBaba vangu. Hakuna anoziva Mwanakomana kusiya Baba kana anoziva kuti Baba ndiani kusiya kwoMwanakomana nouyo anenge asarudzwa zvake naMwanakomana kuti amuzivise kwaari.” 
Luke10:23 Akazotendeukira kuvadzidzi akavataurira zvepachavo achiti, “Akakomborerwa zvawo maziso anoona zvamuri kuona." 
Luke10:24 Ndinokutaurirai kuti vaporofita namadzimambo mazhinji vaida kuona zvamuri kuona asi havana kuzviona uye kunzwa zvamuri kunzwa asi havana kuzvinzwa.” 
Luke10:25 Heyo nyanzvi yomutemo yakasimuka kuti imuedze ichiti, “Mudzidzisi ndingaiteiko kuti ndiwane nhaka youpenyu husingaperi.” Jesu akati kwaari," 
Luke10:26 “Ko mumutemo makanyorwa kuti kudii? Chii chaunoonamo pakuverenga kwako?” 
Luke10:27 Iye akapindura achiti, munoti “Ida Tenzi Mwari wako nomwoyo wako wose nemweya wako wose nesimba rako rose nepfungwa dzako dzose uye ida mumwe wako sokuda kwaunozviita iwe pachako.”" 
Luke10:28 Iye akati kwaari, “Wapindura zvakanaka, chiita saizvozvo, uchararama.”" 
Luke10:29 Nokuda kuzviita munhu kwaye akati kuna Jesu, “Mumwe wangu ndiani?”" 
Luke10:30 Jesu akapindura achiti, “Mumwe murume aidzika kuJeriko achibva kuJerusaremu. Akawira mukati memakororo. Vakamubvisa hanzu dzake vakamurova vakaenda vachisiya ava kuda kufa." 
Luke10:31 Zvakaitika kuti mupristi aidzika nomugwagwa iwoyo. Paakamuona akamunyenyeredza nokoko. 
Luke10:32 Ndizvo zvimwechetezvo nomuRevhi, paakasvikapo akamuona akamunyenyeredzawo nokoko." 
Luke10:33 Asi mumwe muSamaria aifambawo rwendo. Akasvikawo paakanga ari. Paakamuona, akamunzwira tsitsi." 
Luke10:34 Akaenda paari akasunga maronda ake achiadira mafuta newaini. Akamukwidza pachipfuo chake akaenda naye kuhotera akamupepa. 
Luke10:35 Mangwana acho akabvisa mari chena mbiri dzamadhenari akapa muridzi wehotera achiti, ‘Mupepei. Mari yamunenge mazoshandisa pamusoro peiyi, ndichakubhadharai kana ndodzoka.’ ”" 
Luke10:36 “Ndiani pakati pavatatu ava waunofunga kuti akaratidza kuti mumwe wouyo akawira mukati memakororo?” 
Luke10:37 Iye akati, “Ndouyo akamunzwira tsitsi.” Jesu akamuti, “Chiendawo unoita zvimwechetezvo.”" 
Luke10:38 Pavakanga vachifamba rwendo rwavo, vakapinda mune mumwe musha. Mumwe mukadzi ainzi Marita akamugamuchira mumba make." 
Luke10:39 Akanga ane munun'una ainzi Maria akagara pasi patsoka dzaTenzi achiteerera kuzvidzidziso zvake. 
Luke10:40 Asi Marita akanga achikangaidzwa nokushanda kwakanyanya kwaaiita. Akaenda kuna Jesu akati, “Nhai Tenzi, hamuna hanya nazvo here zvokuti munun'una wangu ari kundirega ndichishanda ndoga. Mutaurirei andibatsire.”" 
Luke10:41 Tenzi akamupindura achiti, “Marita, Marita iwe, unozvidya mwoyo nokuzvinetsa nezvakawanda." 
Luke10:42 Chinhu chimwechete chinodiwa. Maria asarudza chakanaka chacho chaasingazombotorerwa.” 
Luke11:1 Zvakaitika kuti Jesu ainamata pane imwe nzvimbo. Paakapedza kunamata, mumwe wavadzidzi vake akati kwaari, “Tenzi tidzidziseiwo kunamata sokudzidzisa kwaiita Johani vadzidzi vake.”" 
Luke11:2 Iye akavati, “Kana mava kunamata, itii, “ ‘Baba zita renyu ngariyereswe umambo hwenyu ngahuuye.’" 
Luke11:3 Tipeiwo chokudya chedu chezuva nezuva. 
Luke11:4 Mutiregerereiwo zvitadzo zvedu. Nokuti isu pachedu tinoregererawo vose vanotitadzira. Musatitungamirire mukuedzwa.” 
Luke11:5 Jesu akati kwavari, “Ndiani wenyu ane shamwari inouya kwaari pakati pousiku yoti kwaari, ‘Shamwari, ndikweretesewo zvingwa zvitatu" 
Luke11:6 nokuti imwe shamwari yangu iri parwendo yasvika, zvino handina chokumuperekera.’" 
Luke11:7 Achapindura nechomukati achiti, ‘Usandinetse, gonhi rakiiwa; vana vangu neni tatovata; handichagoni kumuka kuti ndiwane chokukupa.’" 
Luke11:8 Ndinokuudzai kuti angarege zvake kumuka achimupa chinhu pamusana pokuti ishamwari yake asi pamusana pokugwavarira kwake anotomuka achimupa zvose zvaanoda. 
Luke11:9 Ndinokutaurirai kuti, “ ‘Kumbirai muchapiwa Tsvakai muchawana Gogodzai muchazarurirwa" 
Luke11:10 nokuti wose anokumbira anopiwa anotsvaka anowana uye anogogodza achazarurirwa.’ 
Luke11:11 “Ndibaba vapi pakati penyu vanoti kana mwana wavo avakumbira hove vanomupa nyoka panze pokumupa hove. 
Luke11:12 Uye kuti kana akumbira zai vomupa rize. 
Luke11:13 Zvino kana imi vaipi kudai muchiziva kupa zvipo zvakanaka kuvana venyu; ko kutozoti Baba vokudenga, vanopa zvakadii Mweya Mutsvene kuna vanomukumbira.”" 
Luke11:14 Jesu paaidzinga mumwe mweya wakaipa waiva mbeveve mweya wakaipa uya pawakabuda, mbeveve iya yakataura uye vanhu vakashamiswa." 
Luke11:15 Asi vamwe vavo vakati anodzinga mweya yakaipa naBherizebhuru jinda romweya yakaipa. 
Luke11:16 Vamwewo vachida kumuedza vaitsvaka kwaari chiratidzo chinobva kudenga. 
Luke11:17 Asi iye pamusana pokuziva zvaiva mupfungwa dzavo akati kwavari, “Umambo hupi nohupi hunenge huchizvirwisa hunoparara. Imba inenge ichizvirwisa inoputsika." 
Luke11:18 Zvino kana Satani achizvirwisa, umambo hwake hunopamira sei. Nokuti imi murikuti ndinodzinga mweya yakaipa naBherizebhuru." 
Luke11:19 Kana ndichidzinga mweya yakaipa naBherizebhuru ko, vanhu venyu vanoidzinga nesimba raani. Ivo ndivo vachakukonesai." 
Luke11:20 Zvino kana ndichidzinga mweya yakaipa nomunwe waMwari umambo hwaMwari hwasvika pamuri. 
Luke11:21 “Kana murume akasimba achichengetedza muzinda wake, zvinhu zvake zvinochengetedzeka." 
Luke11:22 Asi mumwe ane simba kukunda iye akamurwisa akamukurira anomutorera zvombo zvake zvokurwisa zvaaivimba nazvo achigova zvaanenge apamba. 
Luke11:23 “Asineni ari kurwisana neni uyo asingaunganidzi neni anoparadza. 
Luke11:24 “Kana mweya wakaipa wabuda mumunhu unopfuura nomunzvimbo dzisina mvura uchitsvaka pokuzororera. Kana washaya nzvimbo unoti, ndichadzokera kumba kwangu kwandakabva." 
Luke11:25 Kana wasvika unowana yakatsvairwa yakanyatsorongedzwa. 
Luke11:26 Ipapo unobva waenda wondounza mimwe mweya minomwe yakaipa kupinda iwo. Inopinda yogaramo. Mhedziso yomunhu iyeyo inoipa kupinda pokutanga.” 
Luke11:27 Paaitaura izvi mumwe mukadzi akadaidzira gungano ravanhu achiti kwaari, “Yakakomborerwa zvayo nhumbu yakakuberekai namazamu amakayamwa.”" 
Luke11:28 Asi Jesu akati, “Ehe zvazvo, asi vakanyanyokomborerwa avo vanonzwa Shoko raMwari vachirichengeta.”" 
Luke11:29 Gungano ravanhu parakanga richimuti ungaunga akatangisa kuti, “Chizvarwa ichi chizvarwa chakaipa. Chinotsvaka chiratidzo asi hapana chiratidzo chachichapiwa kunze kwechiratidzo chaJona." 
Luke11:30 Nokuti sezvakaita Jona kuva chiratidzo kuvanhu veNinivhe, ndizvozvo zvichaita Mwanakomana womunhu kuchizvarwa ichi." 
Luke11:31 Mambokadzi wokuMaodzanyemba achasimuka achipa mhosva varume vechizvarwa ichi nokuti akabva kwakaperera nyika kuzonzwa ungwaru hwaSoromoni asi pano pane mukuru kupinda Soromoni. 
Luke11:32 Varume veNinivhe vachasimuka padare vachimirisana nechizvarwa ichi vachichipa mhosva nokuti vakapinduka asika pano pane mukuru kupinda Jona. 
Luke11:33 “Hakuna munhu anoti kana abatidza mwenje anouisa mudura kana kuukwidibira netswanda asi anouisa pachigadzikiro kuti vanopinda vaone chiedza. 
Luke11:34 Ziso rako ndiro mwenje womuviri wako, zvino kana ziso rako rakanaka muviri wako wose uzere chiedza. Kana risinawo kunaka muviri wako uzere nerima." 
Luke11:35 Ipapo ngwarira kuti chiedza chako chirege kuva rima. 
Luke11:36 Zvino kana muviri wako wose uzere chiedza usina pane rima unenge wakajeka wose zvawo sezvinoita rambi rinokupa chiedza nemwenje waro.” 
Luke11:37 Paakanga achiri kutaura, mumwe muFarisei akamukoka kundodya naye. Naizvozvo akaenda akandogara naye pakudya." 
Luke11:38 MuFarisei akashamiswa kuona kuti Jesu haana kutanga ashamba asati adya. 
Luke11:39 Tenzi akati kwaari, “Imi vaFarisei, munosuka mukombe nendiro kunze asi mukati menyu muine upambi nouipi." 
Luke11:40 Imi mapenzi, iye akaita kunze haana kuitawo mukati here?" 
Luke11:41 Ipai zvipo zvenyu zvichibva mukati menyu, zvose zvichava zvakachena kwamuri." 
Luke11:42 Asi zvichakuwanai imi vaFarisei nokuti munobvisa chegumi patunhuwo zvatwo twakaita semindi neru netumirio asi imi musina hanya noruenzaniso norudo naMwari. Izvi ndizvo zvamaifanira kunge muchiita musingarege zvenyu kuita zvimwe. 
Luke11:43 Zvichakuwanai zvenyu imi vaFarisei nokuti munoda chigaro chapamusoro mumasinagogu uye kukwaziswa pamisika. 
Luke11:44 Zvichakuwanai zvenyu nokuti makaita samakuva asingaoneki, vanhu vanofamba pamusoro pawo vasingazivi.”" 
Luke11:45 Rimwe gweta rakati kwaari, “Mudzidzisi mukutaura izvi muri kutotitukawo.”" 
Luke11:46 Iye akati, “Zvichakuwanaiwo iyemi nyanzvi dzomutemo nokuti munotakudza vanhu mitoro inorema kutakura asi imi pachenyu hamutakuri mitoro iyoyo kunyange nomunwe wenyu chaiwo." 
Luke11:47 Zvichakuwanai zvenyu nokuti munovaka makuva avaporofita vakauraiwa namadzibaba enyu. 
Luke11:48 Nezvo muri zvapupu uye munobvumirana nezvakaitwa namadzibaba enyu nokuti ivo vakavauraya; imi munovaka makuva avo. 
Luke11:49 Saizvozvo, Mwari, noungwaru hwake, akati, ‘Ndichavatumira vaporofita navapositori.’ Vamwe vachavauraya vachivatambudza" 
Luke11:50 kuti ropa ravaporofita vose rakadeurwa kubvira pamavambo enyika ripfukire chizvarwa chino," 
Luke11:51 kubvira kuropa raAbhero kusvika kuropa raZakariya akauraiwa pakati peatari nenzvimbo inoera. Ndizvozvo chaizvo, zvandinokutaurirai, richapfukira chizvarwa chino." 
Luke11:52 Zvichakuwanai imi magweta nokuti makabvisa kii yoruzivo. Imi hamuna kupinda uye makadziviridza vaida kupinda.” 
Luke11:53 Paakanga ava kubva ipapo nyanzvi dzomutemo navaFarisei vakatanga kumuomesera kuti vamunzwe mukanwa panezvinhu zvakawanda," 
Luke11:54 vakamuhwandira kuti vamubate pane chimwe chezveanenge ataura. 
Luke12:1 Panguva yose iyoyo; pakanga paungana zviuru zvakati kuti zvegungano ravanhu zvokutotsikirirana, akatanga kutaura kuvadzidzi vake achiti, “Chenjererai mbiriso yavaFarisei, zvinoreva unyengedzi." 
Luke12:2 Hapana chakafukidzwa chisingazoburitswi pachena kana chakavanzika chisingazozivikanwi. 
Luke12:3 Naizvozvo zvose zvamunotaura murima zvichanzwikwa pachena uye zvamakataura nakazevezeve mudzimba dzomukati muchivande, zvichaparidzirwa pamatenga edzimba." 
Luke12:4 “Ndinokutaurirai shamwari dzangu kuti, ‘Musatye avo vanouraya muviri asi mushure macho vasina chavanokwanisa kuita.’" 
Luke12:5 Asi ndichakuyambirai wamunofanira kutya. Ityai uyo anoti kana auraya ane simba rokukanda munhu mugehena. Zvechokwadi, ndinokutaurirai kuti mutyei." 
Luke12:6 Tushiri tudiki tushanu hatutengeswi namasendi maviri here? Asi hapana kana kamwe katwo kanokanganikwa naMwari? 
Luke12:7 Inga wani kunyange vhudzi romusoro wenyu rakaverengwa. Musatye. Munokosha kupinda tushiri tuzhinji. 
Luke12:8 “Ndinokutaurira kuti, ‘Munhu wose anondibvuma pamberi pavanhu, Mwanakomana womunhu achamubvumawo pamberi pavatumwa vaMwari.’" 
Luke12:9 Asi uyo anondiramba pamberi pavanhu, acharambwawo pamberi pavatumwa vaMwari." 
Luke12:10 Munhu wose anotaura zvakaipa nezveMwanakomana womunhu acharegererwa. Asi uyo anoshonha Mweya Mutsvene haaregererwi. 
Luke12:11 “Kana vakakukwidzai matare omumasinagogu kana kumatare enyika kana kuvakuru vakuru venyika, musazvitambudze kuti muchapindura sei kana kuti muchapindurei kana kuti muchataurei;" 
Luke12:12 nokuti mweya Mutsvene achakudzidzisai panguva iyoyo zvamunofanira kutaura.” 
Luke12:13 Mumwe wegungano riya ravanhu akati kwaari, “Mudzidzisi taurirai mukoma wangu kuti agovane nhaka neni.”" 
Luke12:14 Asi Jesu akati kwaari, “Nhaiwe, ndiani akandiita mutongi kana mugovanisi wenyu?”" 
Luke12:15 Akavati, “Chenjerai mungwarire ruchiva rwose nokuti upenyu womunhu hausi mukuwanda kwezvaanazvo.”" 
Luke12:16 Akazobva ovataurira mumwe muenzaniso achiti, “Munda womumwe mupfumi wakapa zvakawanda kwazvo.”" 
Luke12:17 Akafunga nechomumwoyo make achiti, “Ndichaita sei nokuti handina mokuchengetera mbesa dzangu.”" 
Luke12:18 Akati, “Zvandichaita ndezvizvi. Ndichapaza matura angu ndivake makuru ndigochengetera mbesa dzangu dzose imomo nezviro zvangu." 
Luke12:19 Ipapo ndichazviti kumweya wangu, mweya une zvinhu zvakawanda zvichachengeteka kwamakore mazhinji. Nyatsogara zvako udye uchinwa uchinyatsofara zvako.”" 
Luke12:20 Asi Mwari akati kwaari, “Iwe benzi, ihwo usiku huno uchanzi tipe kuno mweya wako. Zvinhu zvawakazvigadzirira zvacho zvichava zvaani." 
Luke12:21 Ndizvozvo zvina munhu anozvichengetera upfumi iye asiri mupfumi kuna Mwari.” 
Luke12:22 Jesu akati kuvadzidzi vake nezvo ndinokutaurirai kuti, “Musazvidye mwoyo nezvoupenyu hwenyu kuti muchadyei kana nezvomuviri wenyu kuti muchapfekei" 
Luke12:23 nokuti upenyu hukuru pane chokudya uye muviri mukuru pane chokupfeka. 
Luke12:24 Chimbofungai nezvamakunguwo. Haadyari kana kukohwa. Haana hozi kana dura asi Mwari anoapa chokudya. Ko imi munokosha zvakadii kupfuura shiri? 
Luke12:25 Iye ndiani wenyu angarebese upenyu hwake nechidimbu pamusana pokuzvidya mwoyo. 
Luke12:26 Zvino kana musingakwanisi kuita kanhu kadikidiki kakadai ko, munozvidyirei mwoyo nezvimwe zvose izvi?" 
Luke12:27 Chimbofungai nezvamaruva amariri kuti anokura sei. Haabinduki nebasa kana kuruka; asi ndinokutaurirai kuti kunyange Soromoni nembiri yake yose iya akanga asina kushongedzwa serimwe raiwaya. 
Luke12:28 Zvino kana Mwari achipfekedza uswa hupenyu musango nhasi uno asi mangwana acho huchikandwa muchoto, ko kutozoti imi! Anokupfekedzai zvakadii, inga muri vanhu vechitendero chidiki!" 
Luke12:29 “Regai kuti mwoyo yenyu irambe iri pakutsvaka zvokudya, kuti muchadyei kana kuti muchanwei kana kuzvitambudza mwoyo." 
Luke12:30 Marudzi ose apasi pano ndizvo zvavanotsvaka izvozvo. Baba venyu vanozviziva kuti munozvida. 
Luke12:31 Asi imi tsvakai umambo hwake zvinhu izvozvi zvichavawo zvenyu. 
Luke12:32 “Musatye henyu imi veboka diki nokuti Baba venyu vanotoda kwazvo kukupai umambo. 
Luke12:33 Tengesai zvamuinazvo mupe zvipo kuvarombo. Zviitirei zvikwama zvisingasakari noupfumi kudenga husingaperi kusina mbavha inosvika kana chipfukuto chinoparadza," 
Luke12:34 nokuti panenge pane upfumi hwako ndipo pane mwoyo wakowo. 
Luke12:35 “Garai makakunyira nguwo dzenyu muchiuno makabatidza mwenje yenyu 
Luke12:36 makaita savanhu vakamirira tenzi wavo kudzoka kumusha achibva kumuchato kuti vamuzarure pakarepo kana auya achigogodza. 
Luke12:37 Vakakomborerwa varanda avo vanowanikwa naTenzi vakasvinura paanouya. Ndinokutaurirai zvechokwadi kuti achakunya nguwo dzake ovati vagare pakudya iye wouya achivaperekera; 
Luke12:38 pangave pakati pousiku paanouya kana kuti nenguva yomurirakamwe chero achingovawana vakadaro vakakomborerwa zvavo varanda ivavo. 
Luke12:39 Asi zivai izvi zvokuti dai kuri kuti saimba aiziva nguva inouya mbavha nayo angadai aigara akasvinura haairega imba yake ichipazwa. 
Luke12:40 Nemiwo munofanira kugara makagadzirira nokuti Mwanakomana womunhu anouya nenguva yamusingatarisiri.” 
Luke12:41 Pita akati, “Tenzi, muri kuitira muenzaniso uyu isu kana kuti muri kuuitira vanhu vose here?”" 
Luke12:42 Tenzi akati, “Ndoupi, zvino, mutariri akatendeka uye akangwara anoiswa natenzi pabasa rokutarira vomumusha make kuti avape mugove wavo wechokudya nenguva kwayo?" 
Luke12:43 Akakomborerwa muranda uyo anoti kana Tenzi wake wouya anomuwana achiita saizvozvo. 
Luke12:44 Zvechokwadi ndinoti kwamuri achamuita mukuru wezvose zvaanazvo. 
Luke12:45 Asi muranda uyo akazviti, Tenzi, wangu anonoka kuuya. Iye wotangisa kurova varanda vechirume nevechikadzi achidya nokunwa achiraradza" 
Luke12:46 tenzi womuranda iyeyo achauya pazuva raasingamutarisiri uye panguva yaasingazivi. Achamuranga achizomuisa kuna vasingatendeki. 
Luke12:47 Muranda uyo anoziva zvinodiwa natenzi wake asi asina kugadzirira kana kuita zvinodiwa naTenzi wake acharohwa zvikuru. 
Luke12:48 Asi uyo akaita zvinokodzera kuti arohwe, acharohwa hake zvishoma. Munhu wose anopiwa zvakawanda, kwaari kunotarisirwawo zvakawanda. Kunouyo akaturirwa zvizhinji vanotarisirawo kwaari zvakatowandisa." 
Luke12:49 “Ndakauya kuzokanda moto panyika. Ndinodisisa seiko kuti dai wakatobatira. 
Luke12:50 Ndine ruombeko rwandinofanira kuombekwa narwo uye kuti ndinodisisa seiko kuti dai rwaitwa. 
Luke12:51 Regai kufunga kutoti ndakauya kuzounza rugare panyika. Ndinokutaurirai kuti kwete asi kuti ndakaunza kuparadzanisa. 
Luke12:52 Kubvira zvino mumba mumwechete muchava navashanu vakapararana. Vatatu vachipesana navaviri. Vaviri vachipesana navatatu. 
Luke12:53 Baba vachapesana nomwanakomana, mwanakomana achipesana nababa. Amai vachapesana nemwanasikana. Mwanasikanawo achapesana naamai vake. Vamwene vachapesana nomuroora; muroora achipesanawo navamwene vake.”" 
Luke12:54 Jesu akati kuruzhinji rwavanhu, “Kana mukaona gore richikwira richibva kumadokero munobva mati kuchanaya." 
Luke12:55 Izvo zvichibva zvaitikawo. Kana mukaona mhepo yokumaodzanyemba ichivhuvhuta munoti kuchapisa zvakanyanya, zvichibva zvaitika." 
Luke12:56 Imi vanyengedzi, munoziva kududzira mamiriro anenge akaita kunze panyika nomudenga asi sei musingazivi kududzira zvenguva ino?" 
Luke12:57 “Munoregerei kuzvifungirawo pachenyu zvakanaka. 
Luke12:58 Pamunenge muchienda kudare neanenge akukwirira dare edza kuyanana naye muchiri munzira nokuti angadaro akakukwekweretsera kumutongi; mutongi achizokuisa mumaoko omupurisa, mupurisa achizokuisa mujeri." 
Luke12:59 Ndinokuudza kuti haumbofa wakabuda kusvikira wabhadhara sendi rokupedzisira.” 
Luke13:1 Panguva iyoyo pane vamwe vakanga varipo vakataurira Jesu nezvavaGarirea vane ropa rakasanganiswa nezvibayiro zvavo naPirato. 
Luke13:2 Akavapindura achiti, “Munofunga kuti vaGarirea ivavo vakanga vari vatadzi kupfuura vamwe vaGarirea vose here zvavakatambudzika kudaro?" 
Luke13:3 Ndinoti, ‘Kwete.’ Asi imi mukarega kutendeuka muchapararawo mose saizvozvo." 
Luke13:4 Kana vaya gumi navasere vakawirwa neshongwe yomuSirowamu ikavauraya; munofunga kuti vakanga vari vatadzi kupinda vamwe vose vaigara muJerusaremu here? 
Luke13:5 Ndinokutii, ‘Kwete.’ Asi imi, mukasatendeuka muchapararawo mose saizvozvo.”" 
Luke13:6 Jesu akavataurira muenzaniso uyu, achiti, “Mumwe munhu akanga ane muonde wakasimwa mubindu rake ramagirepisi. Akauya achitsvaka muchero pauri akaushaya.”" 
Luke13:7 Akati kumurimi wamagirepisi. “Tarisa uone, kwamakore matatu aya ndakauya ndichitsvaka muchero pamuonde uyu asi hapana chandinowana. Uteme. Ungatambisirei zvawo ivhu.”" 
Luke13:8 Iye akamupindura achiti, “Chimbouregai zvenyu, changamire, kwegore rinozve, kusvikira ndautimbira uye ndauisa mupfudze." 
Luke13:9 Kana ukabereka muchero gore rinouya zvakanaka; kana usina moutema zvenyu.” 
Luke13:10 Jesu akanga achidzidzisa mune imwe sinagogu musi weSabata. 
Luke13:11 Maiva nomumwe mudzimai aiva nomweya wakamuitisa ndonda kwamakore gumi namasere. Akanga akakombama asingagoni kuzvitwasanudza. 
Luke13:12 Jesu paakamuona akamudaidza akati kwaari, “Mai masunungurwa paurwere hwenyu.”" 
Luke13:13 Akaisa maoko ake paari. Pakarepo akatwasanudzwa. Akabva arumbidza Mwari. 
Luke13:14 Asi mukuru wapasinagogu zvakamugumbura nokuti Jesu akanga arapa pazuva reSabata. Akati kuvanhu, “Kuna mazuva matanhatu anogona kuitwa basa, uyai pamazuva iwayo muzorapwa, kwete musi weSabata.”" 
Luke13:15 Tenzi akamupindura achiti, “Imi vanyengedzi, mose zvenyu, hamusununguri here mombe yenyu kana dhongi renyu kubva mokudyira pamusi weSabata muchiritungamirira kundomwa mvura." 
Luke13:16 Ko zvino mudzimai uyu, mwanasikana waAbhurahamu akasungwa naSatani kwamakore gumi namasere, haafaniri kusunungurwa here mumusungo uyu pamusi weSabata?”" 
Luke13:17 Paakataura izvi mhandu dzake dzose dzakanyadziswa asi vanhu vose vakafara nezvinhu zvose zvino mukurumbira zvaakaita. 
Luke13:18 Jesu akazoti, “Umambo hwaMwari hungafananidzwe nei, ndingauenzanise neiko?" 
Luke13:19 Hwakaita setsanga yemasitadhi yakatorwa nomunhu akandoidyara mubindu rake. Yakakura ikava muti. Shiri dzedenga dzakaita matendere mumapazi awo.” 
Luke13:20 Akatizve umambo hwaMwari ndingahauenzanise nei? 
Luke13:21 Hwakaita sembiriso yakatorwa nomudzimai akakanya muzviero zvitatu zvoupfu kusvikira zvatutuma. 
Luke13:22 Jesu akafamba nomumaguta nomumisha achidzidzisa ari parwendo rwake rwokuenda kuJerusaremu. 
Luke13:23 Pano mumwe akati kwaari, “Tenzi, vachaponeswa vashoma here?” Iye akati kwavari," 
Luke13:24 “Vavarirai kupinda napamusuo wakamanikana, nokuti ndinokutaurirai kuti, vazhinji vachaedza kupinda asi vachakundikana." 
Luke13:25 Muridzi wemba akangosimuka chete akazarira musuo muchatangisa kumira kunze muchigogodza muchiti, ‘Tenzi tizarurireiwo.’ Achakupindurai achiti, ‘Handikuzivei kwamunobva.’" 
Luke13:26 Ipapo muchatanga kuti, ‘Inga taidya nokunwa nemi uye maidzidzisa mumigwagwa yedu wani,’" 
Luke13:27 asi iye achati ndinokuudzai kuti, ‘Handikuzivei kwamunobva. Ndibvirei pano imi vaiti vezvakaipa.’" 
Luke13:28 Ikoko vachachema vachirumanidza mazino kana moona Abhurahamu naIsaki naJakobho navaporofita vose vari muumambo hwaMwari asi imi madzingirwa kunze. 
Luke13:29 Vanhu vachauya vachibva kumabvazuva nokumadokero uye vachibva kuchamhembe nokumaodzanyemba vachizogara pakudya muumambo hwaMwari. 
Luke13:30 Chinzwai, kuno vamwe vari vokupedzisira vachava vokutanga. Vamwewo vokutanga vachazova vokupedzisira.”" 
Luke13:31 Panguva iyoyo vamwe vaFarisei vakauya vakati kwaari, “Chibvai kuno nokuti Herodhi ari kuda kukuurayai.”" 
Luke13:32 Iye akati kwavari, “Endai mundotaurira gava iroro kuti, ‘Ndiri kudzinga mweya yakaipa ndichaporesa nhasi namangwana, pazuva retatu ndobva ndapedza basa rangu.’" 
Luke13:33 Izvo zviri izvowo zvokuti ndinofanira kumbofamba parwendo rwangu nhasi namangwana nezuva ramangwana acho nokuti hazviite kuti muporofita apararire kunze kweJerusaremu.” 
Luke13:34 “Jerusaremu, Jerusaremu iwe, unouraya vaporofita uchitaka namabwe avo vanenge vatumwa kwauri nhai! Kangani kandainge ndichida kuunganidza vana vako sokuvhumbamira kunoita huku hukwana dzayo mumapapiro ayo asi wakaramba." 
Luke13:35 Chiona, imba yako yasiiwa yava dongo. Ndinokutaurira kuti hauchambondionazve kusvikira pauchazoti, ‘Ngaarumbidzwe iye anouya muzita raTenzi.’ ”" 
Luke14:1 Nerimwe zuva reSabata, Jesu paakaenda kune imwe imba yomumwe mutongi aive webato ravaFarisei. Vakanga vachiongorora zvaachaita." 
Luke14:2 Hezvo pakava nomumwe murume aiva nechirwere chemhuka. 
Luke14:3 Jesu akataura kunyanzvi dzomutemo navaFarisei achiti, “Zviri pamutemo here kana kuti kwete kuporesa nomusi weSabata?”" 
Luke14:4 Asi vakaramba vanyerere. Ipapo akamutora akamuporesa akamuti aende zvake. 
Luke14:5 Akati kwavari, “Ndiani wenyu angati ane mwanakomana wake kana mombe yake inenge yawira mutsime asingabva aikwevera kunze nezuva reSabata.”" 
Luke14:6 Havana kukwanisa kupindura izvi. 
Luke14:7 Akapa muenzaniso kune vakakokwa paakanga aona vachisarudza zvigaro zvavakuru vakuru achiti kwavari," 
Luke14:8 “Kana uchinge wakokwa nani zvake kumabiko omuchato, rega kugara pachigaro chavakuru vakuru. Pangadaro pakakokwa munhu mukuru kupfuura iwe." 
Luke14:9 Zvino iye akukokai mose angauye oti kwauri chipa nzvimbo yako kune munhu uyu. Ndipo paunozotangisa, kundogara pachigaro chevepasi pasi uchinyara." 
Luke14:10 Asi kana wakakokwa enda undogara panzvimbo yapasi pasi kuitira kuti uya akukoka akauya, ati kwauri, ‘Shamwari kwira kumusoro.’ Unobva waremekedzwa pamberi pavanhu vose vagere pakudya newe," 
Luke14:11 nokuti munhu wose anozvikudza achaninipiswa. Nouyo anozvininipisa achakudzwa.” 
Luke14:12 Akataurirawo munhu akanga amukoka achiti, “Kana wagadzira chokudya kana mabiko, rega kukoka shamwari dzako kana vakoma navanun'una vako, kana hama dzako kana kuti vavakidzani vako vapfumi nokuti vangadaro vakazokukokawo uchizoripwa." 
Luke14:13 Asi kana waita mabiko, koka varombo nezvirema nemhetamakumbo, namapofu." 
Luke14:14 Uchakomborerwa nokuti havagoni kuzokudzorerawo. Unozodzorerwa pakumuka kwavakarurama.” 
Luke14:15 Mumwe munhu akanga agere naye pakudya paakanzwa izvi, akati kwaari, “Akakomborerwa zvake achadya zvokudya muumambo hwaMwari.”" 
Luke14:16 Asi Jesu akati kwaari, “Mumwe munhu akaita mabiko makuru, akakoka vanhu vakawanda.”" 
Luke14:17 Panguva yamabiko akatuma varanda vake kune vakanga vakokwa vaya achiti, “Chiuyai, zvinhu zvose zvino zvagadzirwa;" 
Luke14:18 asi zvimwechetezvo, vose zvavo, vakatanga kupa zvikonzero. Wokutanga akati, ‘Ndatenga purazi, ndinofanira kundoiona, ndinokumbira kuti mundiregererewo.’" 
Luke14:19 Mumwewo akati, ‘Ndatenga zvipani zvamadhonza zvishanu, ndinofanira kuenda ndimbondoaedza. Ndinokumbirai kuti mundiregererewo.’" 
Luke14:20 Mumwewo akati, ‘Ndaroora mudzimai nezvo handigoni kuuya.’" 
Luke14:21 Saizvozvo muranda akauya akataurira izvi kuna tenzi wake. Saimba akashatirwa akati kumuranda wake, ‘Kurumidza kuenda kumigwagwa yeguta nomumikoto yaro uunze varombo navakaremadzwa namapofu navakaremara.’" 
Luke14:22 Muranda akati, ‘Changamire zvamati zviitwe zvaitwa asi nzvimbo ichiripo.’" 
Luke14:23 Tenzi akati kumuranda, ‘Enda kumigwagwa nomumaheji ugombedzere vanhu kupinda kuti imba yangu izare." 
Luke14:24 Nokuti ndinokutaurirai kuti hapana kana nomumwechete waavo vakakokwa acharavira mabiko angu.’ ” 
Luke14:25 Vanhu vazhinji — zhinji vaifamba pamwechete naJesu. Akatendeuka akati kwavari," 
Luke14:26 “Kana munhu akauya kwandiri iye asingabvisi mwoyo wake pana baba naamai vake nomudzimai wake navana vake navakomanavanun'una nehanzvadzi dzake uye ndinototi kunyange upenyu hwake, haakwanisi kuva mudzidzi wangu." 
Luke14:27 Ani naani asingatakuri muchinjikwa wake achinditevera haakwanisi kuva mudzidzi wangu. 
Luke14:28 Ndiani wenyu anenge achida kuvaka shongwe asingatangi agara pasi achiverenga mari yaingadye kuti ane inokwana kuipedza here? 
Luke14:29 Zvingaitike kuti iye achera ugaro hwayo wotadza kuipedza. Vose vanoiona vanotanga kumuseka vachiti," 
Luke14:30 ‘Murume uyu akatangisa kuvaka asi akatadza kupedza.’ 
Luke14:31 Kana kuti ndoupi mambo anenge ava kuda kuenda kundorwisana nomumwe mambo, asingatangi agara pasi achimbobvunza mazano kuti angagone here nezviuru gumi kundorwisana neane zviuru makumi maviri?" 
Luke14:32 Kana zvisingagoneki, mumwe uya achiri kure, iye anotumira mumiriri wokukumbira zvokuti pave norunyararo." 
Luke14:33 Naizvozvo aninani asingasiyi zvose zvaanazvo haakwanisi kuva mudzidzi wangu.” 
Luke14:34 Munyu wakanaka. Asi kana munyu warungunduka unozovaviswa nei. 
Luke14:35 Unenge usisina basa kumunda, kana pamupfudze. Vanhu vanourasa. Uyo ane nzeve dzokunzwa ngaanzwe." 
Luke15:1 Zvino vateresi navatadzi vakanga vachiungana vose kuti vamunzwe. 
Luke15:2 VaFarisei nenyanzvi dzomutemo vakanyunyuta vachiti munhu uyu anogamuchira vatadzi achidya navo. 
Luke15:3 Nokudaro Jesu akavataurira muenzaniso uyu achiti," 
Luke15:4 “Ndoupi munhu pakati penyu anenge ane zana rehwai, akarasa imwechete yadzo, asingasiyi makumi mapfumbamwe ane pfumbamwe kumafuro achienda kundotsvaka yakarasika iya kusvikira aiwana?" 
Luke15:5 Kana aiwana anoitakura pamafudzi ake achifara. 
Luke15:6 Paanosvika kumusha anodaidza shamwari dzake navavakidzani vake ovati, ‘Farai pamwechete neni nokuti ndawana hwai yangu yakanga yarasika.’" 
Luke15:7 Naizvozvowo ndinokuudzai kuti pachava nomufaro mukuru kudenga wokufarira mutadzi mumwechete anopinduka kupfuura kufarirwa kunoitwa makumi mapfumbamwe ana vapfumbamwe avanhu vakarurama vasina chavangadire kupinduka. 
Luke15:8 “Kana kuti ndoupi mudzimai anenge ane mari chena yamadhirakima gumi, akarasa rimwechete rawo; haabatidzi mwenje here achitsvaira imba nokutsvagisisa mari iyoyo kusvikira aiwana?" 
Luke15:9 Kana aiwana anodaidza shamwari dzake navavakidzani vake achiti, ‘Farai neni nokuti ndawana mari yandakanga ndarasa.’" 
Luke15:10 Saizvozvowo ndinokutaurirai, kuti pachava nokufara kukuru pakati pavatumwa vaMwari kokufarira mutadzi mumwechete anotendeuka.”" 
Luke15:11 Akatizve, “Kwaiva nomumwe murume aiva navanakomana vaviri." 
Luke15:12 Muduku akati kuna Baba vake, ‘Baba, chindipai mugove wenhaka yangu.’ Baba vakakamuranisa zvinhu zvavo zvavairarama nazvo pavanakomana vaya." 
Luke15:13 Kusati kwambopera mazuva akawanda, munun'una akaunganidza zvinhu zvake zvose ndokupinda murwendo rwokuenda kunyika iri kure kure. Ikoko akandoparadza zvinhu zvake zvose zviya muupenyu hwounzenza." 
Luke15:14 Paakapedza kudya zvose, kwakamuka nzara huru munyika iyoyo. Naiyewo akatanga kushaiwa." 
Luke15:15 Akaenda akandozvipereka mumaoko omumwe mugari wenyika iyoyo. Iye akamutumira kuminda yake kuti apote achipa nguruve chokudya. 
Luke15:16 Angadai akatofara kudya mateko aidyiwa nenguruve asi hapana kana akamupa kana chinhu zvacho. 
Luke15:17 Paakazobengenuka akazviti, ‘Vangani vashandi vababa vangu vane chokudya chakakwana vachitosia zvavo asi ini ndichifa nenzara kuno.’" 
Luke15:18 Ndichasimuka ndiende kuna Baba vangu ndigondoti kwavari, ‘Baba ndakatadzira denga uye ndatadzawo kwamuri." 
Luke15:19 Handichakodzeri kuti ndinzi mwana wenyu. Chindibatai somumwe wavashandi venyu.’ 
Luke15:20 Akasimuka akaenda kuna baba vake. Asi iye achiri chinhambwe, baba vake vakamuona vakanzwa tsitsi. Vakamhanya ndokusvikomuti mbunde vakamutsvoda." 
Luke15:21 Mwana uya akati kwavari, ‘Baba, ndakatadzira Wedenga uye ndakakutadzirai. Handichakodzeri kuti ndinzi mwana wenyu.’" 
Luke15:22 Asi baba vakati kuvashandi vavo, ‘Kurumidzai kuuya negemenzi rakanakisisa mumupfekedze; muise ringi mumunwe wake neshangu mumakumbo," 
Luke15:23 muuyewo nemhuru iya yakakodzwa muibaye, tidye tichifara" 
Luke15:24 nokuti mwana wangu uyu akanga afa ava mupenyu zvakare, akanga arasika zvino awanikwa.’ Ndokubva vatanga zvavo kufara zvikuru." 
Luke15:25 “Izvozvo mwanakomana wavo mukuru akanga ari kumunda. Paakanga achiuya ava kusvika pedyo nemba akanzwa mumhanzi nokutamba. 
Luke15:26 Akadaidza mumwe mushandi akamubvunza kuti chaiva chii. 
Luke15:27 Akamuti, ‘Munun'una wenyu wauya. Baba venyu vabaya mhuru iya yakakodzwa nokuti vamugamuchirazve ari mutano.’" 
Luke15:28 Asi iye akashatirwa akaramba kupinda. Baba vake vakauya vakamuteterera. 
Luke15:29 Asi iye akapindura baba vake achiti, ‘Tarirai muone kuti kwamakore mazhinji aya ndakakushandirai asi handina kumboramba kukutererai zvamaindiudza. Asi imi hamuna kana kumbondipa kana kambudzana zvako kokuti ndifare neshamwari dzangu." 
Luke15:30 Asi pangouya mwana wenyu uyu akapedza zvinhu zvenyu zvinokuraramisai nepfambi, mabva mamubaira mhuru yakakodzwa.’" 
Luke15:31 Baba vakati kwaari, ‘Mwanangu uneni nguva dzose uye zvangu zvose ndezvako." 
Luke15:32 Zvanga zvakanaka kuti tipembere kwazvo tichifara nokuti munun'una wako uyu akanga afa zvino ava mupenyu, akanga arasika zvino awanikwa.’ ”" 
Luke16:1 Jesu akatiwo kuvadzidzi vake. “Kwaiva nomumwe murume mupfumi aiva nomutariri. Akacherwa kwaari kuti murume uyu akanga achimuparadzira zvinhu zvake. 
Luke16:2 Akamudaidza akamuti, ‘Chii ichi chandiri kunzwa nezvako? Ndipire nezveutariri hwako ndinzwe nokuti hauchavi mutaririzve.’" 
Luke16:3 Mutariri uya akazviti ndichaita sei Tenzi wangu zvaava kundibvisa pautariri? Simba rokutimba handina uye kukumbira ndinonyara. 
Luke16:4 Ndafunga zvokuita kuti vanhu vazondigamuchira mudzimba dzavo pandinenge ndabviswa pautariri. 
Luke16:5 Akadaidza vaiva nezvikwereti naTenzi wake mumwechete mumwechete. 
Luke16:6 Akati kune wokutanga, ‘Une chikwereti chakadii kuna Tenzi wangu?’ Iye akati, ‘Ndine zana remigomo yamafuta.’ Akati kwaari, ‘Tora katsamba kechikwereti chako ugare pasi nokuchimbidza unyore makumi mashanu.’" 
Luke16:7 Akatiwo kune mumwe, ‘Ko iwe unechikwereti chakadii?’ Iye akati, ‘Mabhagidhi zana ekoroni.’ Akamuti, ‘Tora katsamba kako kechikwereti unyore makumi masere.’" 
Luke16:8 Tenzi akarumbidza mutariri asina kutendeka uya nokuti vanhu vapanyika pano vanoziva mano avanoitirana nevechizvarwa chavo kukunda vana vechiedza. 
Luke16:9 Ndinokutii, ‘Itai ushamwari muchishandisa mari isina zvayo kururama kuti kana yopera vakugamuchirei mudzimba dzokugara nokusingaperi." 
Luke16:10 Munhu anovimbika mune zvidiki anovimbika mune zvikuru. Uyowo asingavimbiki mune zvidiki haavimbikiwo mune zvikuru. 
Luke16:11 Zvino kana usingavimbiki munezvemari isina kururama zvayo, ndiani angakuchengetese upfumi hwechokwadi?" 
Luke16:12 Zvino kana usina kuvimbika nechinhu chomumwe ndiani angakupe zvako pachako?’ 
Luke16:13 “Hapana muranda anogona kushandira vatenzi vaviri nokuti anogona kuvenga mumwe achida mumwe kana kuti kwati kwati nomumwe achishora mumwe wacho. Haugoni kushandira Mwari uye mari.” 
Luke16:14 VaFarisei vaidisa mari, vakanzwa zvose izvi vakamuseka." 
Luke16:15 Asi akati kwavari, “Imika ndimi munozviita vakanaka pamberi pavanhu asi Mwari anoziva mwoyo yenyu nokuti chinorumbidzwa navanhu chinosemesa pana Mwari." 
Luke16:16 “Mutemo navaporofita zvaivapo kusvikira pana Johani. Kubvirawo ipapo Shoko Rakanaka roumambo hwaMwari rinoparidzwa, munhu wosewo ari kuita zvokumanikidzira kupindamo." 
Luke16:17 Asi zviri nyore kuti denga napasi zvipfuure panokuti kabhii kadikidiki zvako koMutemo kashaye basa. 
Luke16:18 Ani naani anoramba mukadzi wake achiroora mumwe anoita upombwe. Nouyowo anoroora mukadzi akarambwa nomurume wake anoita upombwe. 
Luke16:19 “Kwaiva nomumwe murume mupfumi aipfeka hanzu dzoruvara rwehute nedzerineni yakanakisisa achidyiririra zvikuru zuva nezuva. 
Luke16:20 Asi pasuo rake guru paigara pakanzi rabada nomumwe murume murombo ainzi, Razaro akanga ari maronda oga oga." 
Luke16:21 Aida kudya zvaidonha pateburu yomupfumi, uye imbwawo dzaiuya dzichimunanzva maronda ake." 
Luke16:22 Murombo uya akafa akatakurwa navatumwa kunzvimbo yepedyo pedyo nechipfuva chaAbhurahamu. 
Luke16:23 Mupfumi uya akafawo akandovigwa. Ari munzvimbo yavakafa achirwadziwa, akasimudza musoro akaona Abhurahamu ari kure kure aina Razaro pedyo pedyo nechipfuva chake." 
Luke16:24 Akadanidzira achiti, ‘Baba Abhurahamu ndinzwirei tsitsi mutume Razaro kundonyika muromo womunwe wake mumvura atonhodze rurimi rwangu nokuti ndiri kurwadziwa murimi iri romoto.’" 
Luke16:25 Abhurahamu akati, ‘Mwanangu yeuka kuti panguva youpenyu hwako wakagamuchira zvinhu zvakanaka. Ndizvozvowo zvimwechetezvo naRazaro, akawana zvakaipa; asi zvino ari kunyaradzwa kuno iwe uri mukurwadziwa." 
Luke16:26 Handizvo chete, pakati pedu nemi pakaiswa zigoronga kuti vanoda kuyambukira kwamuri vachibva kuno vakundike uye kuti pashaye anoyambuka achibva ikoko achiuya kwatiri.’" 
Luke16:27 Akati, ‘Saka ndinokukumbirai baba, kuti mutume Razaro kumba kwababa vangu" 
Luke16:28 nokuti ndine vakoma navanun'una vashanu kuti andovayambira nokuti vangadaro vakauyawo kunzvimbo ino yokurwadziwa.’ 
Luke16:29 Abhurahamu akati, ‘Vana Mosesi navaporofita, ngavateerere ivavo.’" 
Luke16:30 Iye akati, ‘Kwete Baba, Abhurahamu. Asi kana mumwe munhu akaenda kwavari achibva kune vakafa vanopinduka.’" 
Luke16:31 Abhurahamu akati kwaari, ‘Kana vakarega kunzwa Mosesi navaporofita havambotendi kana mumwe munhu akamuka achibva kuvafi.’ ”" 
Luke17:1 Jesu akati kuvadzidzi vake, “Zvinokonzera vamwe kuita zvakaipa hazvimborega kuvapo. Asi zvichamuwana iye anozviunza." 
Luke17:2 Zvaitova nani kuti asungirirwe guyo mumutsipa make achindokandwa munyanza panze pokuti akonzere mumwe wavaduku ava kuti atadzire Mwari. 
Luke17:3 Zvichenjererei imi pachenyu; kana hama yako ikakutadzira, itsiure. Kana ikapfidza iregerere." 
Luke17:4 Uye kana akakutadzira kanomwe pazuva akauya kwauri kanomwe achiti ndapfidza. Unofanira kumuregerera.” 
Luke17:5 Vapositori vakati kuna Tenzi, “Tiwedzereiwo chitendero chedu.”" 
Luke17:6 Tenzi akati, “Dai muine chitendero chakaita setsanga yemasitadhi, maigona kuti kumuonde uyu dzipuka undosimwa mugungwa uchikuteererai." 
Luke17:7 “Pane mumwe wenyu here ano muranda anenge achirima kana kufudza hwai, angati kwaari kana abva kumunda, ‘Chibva wauya ugare pakudya?’" 
Luke17:8 Haasi anototi here, ‘Ndigadzirire chokudya chamanheru upfeke undiperekere, kusvikira ndadya ndikanwa, iwe wozodyawo nokunwa mushure macho?’" 
Luke17:9 Anotenda muranda here nokuti aita zvaaudzwa? 
Luke17:10 Nemiwo, kana maita zvamunenge maudzwa itii, ‘Tiri varanda vasingakodzeri. Tangoita zvatinofanira kuita.’ ”" 
Luke17:11 Ari parwendo rwokuenda kuJerusaremu akapfuura napakati peSamaria neGarirea. 
Luke17:12 Paakapinda mune mumwe musha, akasangana navanhu gumi vaiva namaperembudzi vakamira nechekure" 
Luke17:13 vakadaidzira vachiti, “Jesu, Tenzi tinzwireiwo tsitsi.”" 
Luke17:14 Paakavaona akati kwavari, “Endai mundozviratidza kuvapristi.” Pavaienda vakabva vaporeswa." 
Luke17:15 Zvino mumwechete wavo paakaona kuti arapwa, akadzoka achirumbidza Mwari nezwi riri pamusoro." 
Luke17:16 Akazviwisira pasi nouso patsoka dzaJesu achimutenda. Zvino murume uyu aiva muSamaria. 
Luke17:17 Jesu akati, “Ko vanatswa havasi gumi here? Ko vamwe vapfumbamwe varipi?" 
Luke17:18 Hapana kuwanikwa adzoka kuzorumbidza Mwari kusiya mutorwa uyu oga.” 
Luke17:19 Akati kwaari, “Chisimuka uenda zvako. Chitendero chako chakuponesa.”" 
Luke17:20 Jesu paakabvunzwa navaFarisei kuti umambo hwaMwari huchasvika rini, akavapindura achiti, “Umambo hwaMwari hausi kuuya nezviratidzo zvinoonekwa." 
Luke17:21 Hakuna munhu achati, ‘Hohuno huri pano kana kuti huri apo, nokuti izvozvi umambo hwaMwari huri pakati penyu.’ ”" 
Luke17:22 Akazoti kuna vadzidzi vake, “Mazuva ari kuuya pamuchasuwira kuona rimwe ramazuva oMwanakomana womunhu asi hamumboriona." 
Luke17:23 Vamwe vachati kwamuri, ‘Ari kokoko kana kuti ari pano apa.’ Musaendeko kana kuvatevera." 
Luke17:24 Nokuti sokuvaima kunoita mheni ichivhenekera denga kubvira kunorumwe rutivi kusvika kunorumwe, ndizvozvowo zvichaita Mwanakomana womunhu pamazuva ake." 
Luke17:25 Asi anofanira kutanga atambudzika zvakanyanya agorambwa nechizvarwa ichi. 
Luke17:26 Sezvazvakanga zvakaita pamazuva aNowa, ndizvozvowo zvazvichaita pamazuva oMwanakomana womunhu." 
Luke17:27 Vanhu vaidya nokumwa vachiroora nokuroorwa kusvikira pazuva rakapinda Nowa mungarava. Mafashamo akauya akavaparadza vose. 
Luke17:28 Naizvozvowo zvakaitika pamazuva aRoti; vanhu vaidya vachinwa vachitenga nokutengesa vachidyara nokuvaka. 
Luke17:29 Asi pazuva rakabuda Roti muSodhomu, moto nesarufa zvakanaya zvichibva kudenga zvikavaparadza vose." 
Luke17:30 Ndizvozvowo zvazvichaita pazuva richaoneswa Mwanakomana womunhu. 
Luke17:31 Pazuva iroro anenge ari pamusoro pemba aine zvinhu zvake mumba, ngaarege kuburukira kuzozvitora." 
Luke17:32 Ndizvo zvimwechetezvo naari kumunda, ngaarege kudzokera. Yeukai mudzimai waRoti." 
Luke17:33 Uyo anotsvaka kuzviponesa upenyu acharasikirwa nahwo. Asi uyo anorasikirwa noupenyu hwake anohuchengetedza. 
Luke17:34 Ndinokuudzai kuti usiku ihoho vaviri vanenge vakarara pamubhedha mumwechete, mumwe achatorwa mumwe achisara." 
Luke17:35 Vakadzi vaviri vanenge vari paguyo vachikuya pamwechete, mumwe achatorwa, mumwe achisiiwa.” [" 
Luke17:36 Vamwe vanenge vari mumunda, mumwe achatorwa mumwe achisiiwa.]" 
Luke17:37 Vakati kwavari, “Kuri kupiko ikoko nhai Tenzi?” Iye akati, “Pane chitunha magora ndipo panoungana.”" 
Luke18:1 Jesu akavataurira mumwe muenzaniso wokuti vanofanira kunamata nguva dzose vasingarasi mwoyo. 
Luke18:2 Akati, “Mune rimwe guta maiva nomutongi akanga asingatyi Mwari kana kuzeza munhu." 
Luke18:3 Maivawo neimwe chirikadzi muguta iroro yaingoramba ichiuya kwaari ichiti, ‘Ndienzanisireiwo nyaya yangu nomuvengi wangu.’" 
Luke18:4 Kwechinguva chakati kuti akamboramba. Mushure mezvo akazozviti, ‘Kunyange zvazvo ndisingatyi Mwari kana kuzeza munhu" 
Luke18:5 asi pamusana pokuti chirikadzi iyi inondinetsa, regai ndiienzanisire nyaya yayo; ingandisvote nokuramba kwayo ichingouya.’ ”" 
Luke18:6 Tenzi akati, “Inzwai zviri kutaurwa nomutongi asina kururama." 
Luke18:7 Mwari haangadzivirire here vasarudzwi vake vanochema kwaari siku nesikati. Angavanonokere kwenguva ndefu here? 
Luke18:8 Ndinokutaurirai kuti achavadzivirira nokuchimbidza. Kunyange zvakadaro zvazvo, pachauya Mwanakomana womunhu, achasvikowana panyika pane chitendero here?”" 
Luke18:9 Jesu akavataurirawo muenzaniso uyu kune vamwe vaizvikudza vachizviona savakarurama kupinda vamwe vachishora vamwe. 
Luke18:10 “Vamwe varume vaviri vakaenda muTemberi kundonamata. Mumwe wavo aiva muFarisei, mumwe ari muteresi." 
Luke18:11 MuFarisei akamira akanamata nechomumwoyo achiti, ‘Mwari ndinokutendai nokuti handina kuita savamwe vanhu, vapambi, vasina ruenzaniso, nemhombwe kana somuteresi uyu." 
Luke18:12 Ndinotsanya kaviri pasvondo. Ndinopa chegumi chezvose zvandinowana.’ 
Luke18:13 Asi muteresi akamira nechokure asingatomboda kusimudza maziso ake kudenga. Akazvibata pachifuva achizvininipisa achiti, ‘Mwari, ndinzwirewo tsitsi ini mutadzi.’" 
Luke18:14 Ndinokutaurirai kuti murume uyu akaenda kumba kwake aruramiswa panze pomumwe uya. Nokuti munhu wose anozvikudza achadukupiswa asi uyo anozvidukupisa anokudzwa.” 
Luke18:15 Vanhu vakanga vava kuunza kunyange vacheche kwaari kuti avabate. Vadzidzi vake pavakazviona, vakavarambidza." 
Luke18:16 Asi Jesu akadaidzira achiti, “Regai vana vaduku vauye kwandiri musavarambidze nokuti umambo hwedenga ndehwevakaita savava." 
Luke18:17 Chokwadi chaizvo ndinokuudzai kuti ani naani asingagamuchiri umambo hwaMwari somwana muduku haambohupinda.” 
Luke18:18 Mumwe mutongi akabvunza Jesu achiti, “Mudzidzisi wakanaka. Ndingaitei kuti ndiwane upenyu husingaperi?”" 
Luke18:19 Jesu akati kwaari, “Sei uchinditi ndakanaka? Hakuna wakanaka asi Mwari woga." 
Luke18:20 Inga unoziva wani mitemo, inoti usaite upombwe, usauraye, usabe, usaite uchapupu hwenhema remekedza baba naamai vako.”" 
Luke18:21 Iye akati, “Yose iyi ndakaichengeta kubvira paudiki hwangu.”" 
Luke18:22 Jesu paakazvinzwa akati kwaari, “Pane chinhu chimwechete chausina. Tengesa zvose zvaunazvo uzvigovere kuvarombo. Uchava noupfumi kudenga; ugouya ozonditevera.”" 
Luke18:23 Paakanzwa izvi akasuruvara nokuti akanga akapfuma zvikuru. 
Luke18:24 Jesu akamutarisa akati, “Zvakaoma sei kuti vano upfumi vapinde muumambo hwaMwari." 
Luke18:25 Zviri nyore kuti ngamera ipinde napaburi retsono panokuti mupfumi apinde muumambo hwaMwari.” 
Luke18:26 Avo vakazvinzwa vakati, “Kana zvakadaro ndiani angaponeswe.”" 
Luke18:27 Asi iye akati, “Zvisingagoneki navanhu zvinogoneka naMwari.”" 
Luke18:28 Pita akazoti, “Tarisai muone, isu takasiya misha yedu tikakuteverai.”" 
Luke18:29 Iye akati kwavari, “Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri, ‘Hakuna munhu akasiya musha kana mukadzi kana vakoma kana vaunun'una kana vabereki kana vana pamusana poumambo hwaMwari" 
Luke18:30 asingazowani zvakapetwa kakawanda kupinda izvozvo panguva ino uye upenyu husingaperi munguva ichauya.’ ” 
Luke18:31 Jesu akatora vane gumi navaviri akati kwavari, “Chinzwai, tavakukwira kuJerusaremu. Zvose zvakanyorwa navaporofita nezveMwanakomana womunhu zvichazadziswa." 
Luke18:32 Nokuti achandoiswa mumaoko evechirudzi, achasveeredzwa achiitirwa zvinonyadzisa nokusvipirwa mate." 
Luke18:33 Vachamurova zvakanyanya vozomuuraya asi achizomuka pazuva retatu.” 
Luke18:34 Pazvinhu izvi hapana chavakanzwisisa. Zvaakataura izvi zvakanga zvakavanzwa kwavari. Havana kubata zvaaireva. 
Luke18:35 Paakaswedera kuJeriko, rimwe bofu rakanga rigere parutivi rwenzira richipemha" 
Luke18:36 parakanzwa mhomho yavanhu ichipfuura, rakabvunza kuti, “Kwauyei?”" 
Luke18:37 Vakati kwaari, “Jesu weNazareti ari kupfuura nepo.”" 
Luke18:38 Iye akashevedzera achiti, “Jesu Mwanakomana waDhavhidhi ndinzwireiwo tsitsi.”" 
Luke18:39 Vakanga vari mberi vakamutsiura vachimuti anyarare asi iye akatoshevedzera zvakatonyanya achiti, “Mwanakomana waDhavhidhi ndinzwireiwo tsitsi.”" 
Luke18:40 Jesu akamira akati ngaauiswe kwaari. Paakasvika pedyo, akamubvunza achiti," 
Luke18:41 “Chii chaunoda kuti ndikuitire.” Akati, “Tenzi itai kuti ndione.”" 
Luke18:42 Jesu akati kwaari, “Chiona zvako. Chitendero chako chakuponesa.”" 
Luke18:43 Pakarepo akabva avakuona akatevera Jesu achirumbidza Mwari. Vanhu vose pavakazviona vakarumbidza Mwari. 
Luke19:1 Akapinda muJeriko achipfuura nomo. 
Luke19:2 Maiva nomumwe murume ainzi Zakeo. Aiva mukuru mukuru wavateresi uye ari mupfumi.
