Luke19:3 Aida kuona zvakaita Jesu asi haana kukwanisa nokuda kwegurumwandira ravanhu nokuti iye akanga akapfupika. 
Luke19:4 Ipapo akafanomhanyira mberi ndokukwira mumuonde kuti amuone nokuti akanga achizopfuura nepo. 
Luke19:5 Jesu paakasvika panzvimbo iyoyo, akatarisa mudenga akamuti, “Zakeo kurumidza kuburuka nokuti ndinofanira kundogara kumba kwako nhasi.”" 
Luke19:6 Saizvozvo akakurumidza kuburuka akamugamuchira norufaro. 
Luke19:7 Vanhu pavakazviona, vose vakanyunyuta vachiti aenda kundogara mumba momutadzi." 
Luke19:8 Zakeo akamirawo achiti kuna Tenzi, “Chionai Tenzi ini ndichapa kuvarombo hafu yezvinhu zvangu. Kana ndakabiridzira munhu chinhu ndichamudzorera kakapetwa kana.”" 
Luke19:9 Jesu akati kwaari, “Nhasi uno ruponeso rwauya kumba ino nokuti murume uyu mwanakomanawo waAbhurahamu" 
Luke19:10 nokuti Mwanakomana womunhu akauya kuzotsvaka nokuponesa chakarasika.” 
Luke19:11 Pavakanga vakateerera zvinhu izvi, akaenderera mberi achivapa muenzaniso nokuti akanga ava pedyo neJerusaremu uye nokuti vakanga vachifunga kuti umambo hwaMwari hwakanga hwava kuda kutoonekwa." 
Luke19:12 Naizvozvo akati, “Mumwe murume wokumbahuru akaenda kune imwe nyika iri kure kundopiwa umambo achizodzoka." 
Luke19:13 Akashevedza varanda vake gumi akavapa gumi repondo, achiti kwavari, ‘Itai mhindu nayo kusvikira ndauya.’" 
Luke19:14 Asi vanhu vake vaimuvenga. Vakatumira nhume dzokumutevera dzichiti, ‘Hatidi kuti munhu uyu atitonge.’" 
Luke19:15 Paakadzoka apiwa umambo huya akati varanda vake vaakanga apa mari iya vadaidzwe kwaari kuti azive kuti mumwe nomumwe akanga awanei nemhindu. 
Luke19:16 Wokutanga akauya kwaari achiti, ‘Changamire pondo yenyu yakabereka dzimwe pondo gumi pamusoro.’" 
Luke19:17 Iye akati kwaari, ‘Hauchionaka muranda wakanaka! Pamusana pokuti wakatendeka muzvinhu zvidikidiki kudai uchatonga maguta gumi.’" 
Luke19:18 Wechipiri akauyawo achiti, ‘Tenzi pondo yenyu yakabereka pondo shanu.’" 
Luke19:19 Iye akati kwaari, ‘Iwewo uchatonga maguta mashanu.’" 
Luke19:20 Mumwe akauya achiti, ‘Tenzi pondo yenyu iyi ini ndakaipfundira muhengechepfu," 
Luke19:21 nokuti ndaikutyai nokuti muri munhu akaomarara. Munonhonga chamusina kuisa pasi, muchikohwa chamusina kudyara.’" 
Luke19:22 Akati kwaari, ‘Ndinokupa mhosva nezvabva mumuromo mako, iwe muranda akaipa. Heya waitoziva zvako kuti ndiri munhu akaomarara anonhonga chaasina kuisa pasi nokukohwa paasina kudyara," 
Luke19:23 ko zvino wakaregererei kuisa mari yangu mubhangi. Pandainge ndauya ndaizoitora yabereka.’ 
Luke19:24 Akati kuna vakanga vakamira pedyo, ‘Mutorerei pondo iyoyo muipe kune ane gumi repondo.’" 
Luke19:25 Vanhu vakati kwaari, ‘Tenzi, inga ane gumi repondo wani.’" 
Luke19:26 Ndinokutaurirai kuti munhu wose anazvo achawedzerwa zvimwe asi uyo asina, kunyange chaanenge anacho achachitorerwa." 
Luke19:27 “Asi zvemhandu dzangu dziya dzaisada kuti ndidzitonge dziunzei pano mudziuraye ndakatarisa.” 
Luke19:28 Paakapedza kutaura izvi, akatungamira vachikwira kuJerusaremu." 
Luke19:29 Paakanga ava kusvika kuBhetifage nokuBhetania kugomo rinonzi Orivheti, akatuma vadzidzi vake vaviri achiti," 
Luke19:30 “Endai mumusha wakatarisana nesu wamunoti kana mavakupindamo muchaona chigondora chedhongi chakasungirirwa chisati chambotaswa nomunhu. Chisinungurei muuye nacho kuno. 
Luke19:31 Kana munhu akakubvunzai kuti, ‘Muri kuchisunungurirei?’ Munomuti, ‘Tenzi anochida.’ ”" 
Luke19:32 Saizvozvo vaya vakatumwa vakaenda vakawana zvakangoita sokuvataurira kwaakanga aita. 
Luke19:33 Pavakanga vavakuchisunungura varidzi vacho vakati kwavari, “Muri kuchisunungurirei?”" 
Luke19:34 Ivo vakati, “Tenzi vari kuchida.”" 
Luke19:35 Vakauya nacho kuna Jesu. Vakawaridza hanzu dzavo pachigondora chiya. Vakakwidza Jesu pachiri. 
Luke19:36 Paaifamba kudaro vakawaridza hanzu dzavo munzira. 
Luke19:37 Paakanga ava kuda kusvika kumateru eGomo reMiorivhi mhomho yose yavadzidzi vake yakatanga kupembera ichirumbidza Mwari ichidaidzira, ichirumbidza Mwari nokuda kwamabasa makuru avakanga vaona" 
Luke19:38 vachiti, “Ngaarumbidzwe Mambo anouya muzita raTenzi. Rugare ngaruve kudenga nembiri ive kumusorosoro.”" 
Luke19:39 Vamwe vaFarisei vaiva mumhomho iyoyo vakati kwaari, “Mudzidzisi tsiurai vadzidzi venyu.”" 
Luke19:40 Iye akapindura achiti, “Ndinokuudzai kuti kana ava vakanyarara, matombo chaiwo achadanidzira.”" 
Luke19:41 Paakanga ava kuda kusvika, akatarisa guta akarichema," 
Luke19:42 achiti, “Dai wanga uchiziva nhai zvinhu zvinounza rugare asi zvino zvakavanzwa kwauri." 
Luke19:43 Mazuva achakuvinga zvako, mhandu dzako padzichaita mazidhunduru muberere rako kukutenderedza vachikukomberedza kumativi ose." 
Luke19:44 Vachakupwatitsira pasi, iwe navana vako vari mauri. Havachazosiya rimwe dombo riri pamusoro perimwe dombo mauri nokuti hauna kuziva nguva yokushanyirwa kwako.”" 
Luke19:45 Jesu akapinda muTemberi akatangisa kudzinga vaitengesa 
Luke19:46 achiti kwavari, “Zvakanyorwa zvichinzi, ‘Imba yangu ichanzi imba yokunamatira asi imi makaiita bako ramakororo.’ ”" 
Luke19:47 Aidzidzisa mazuva ose muTemberi. Vapristi vakuru nenyanzvi dzomutemo navakuru vakuru vavanhu vaitsvaka zvokumuparadza 
Luke19:48 asi havana kuwana chavakagona kuita, nokuti vanhu vose vanga vangoti kwati kwati kumashoko ake." 
Luke20:1 Nerimwe zuva Jesu paaidzidzisa vanhu muTemberi achiparidza Shoko Rakanaka, vapristi vakuru nenyanzvi dzomutemo navakuru vakuru, vakauya vakati kwaari," 
Luke20:2 “Tiudze kuti unoita zvinhu izvi nesimba raani kana kuti ndiani akakupa simba irori?” 
Luke20:3 Akavapindura achiti, “Kana neniwo ndinoda kukubvunzai mubvunzo." 
Luke20:4 Nditaurirei, ruombeko rwaJohani rwaibva kudenga here kana kuvanhu?”" 
Luke20:5 Vakambokurukurirana pachavo vachiti, “Kana tikati rwakabva kudenga iye achati ko makaregererei kutenda kwaari." 
Luke20:6 Kana tikati runobva kuvanhu, vanhu vose vachatitaka namabwe nokuti vanobvuma kuti Johani aiva muporofita.”" 
Luke20:7 Ipapo vakapindura vachiti, “Hatizivi kuti rwaibva kupi.”" 
Luke20:8 Jesu akati kwavari, “Kana neniwo handikutaurirei kuti ndinoita izvi nesimba raani.”" 
Luke20:9 Akatanga kutaurira vanhu muenzaniso uyu achiti, “Mumwe munhu akarima munda wamagirepisi akaupa kuna vamwe vanhu vokuushandisa vachimubhadhara ndokuenda kune imwe nyika kwenguva ndefu." 
Luke20:10 Nguva payakasvika, akatuma muranda kuna vaya vaishandisa munda wake kuti vamupewo mimwe michero womunda wamagirepisi, asi vaishandisa munda vaya vakamurova vakamuendesa asina chaanacho." 
Luke20:11 Akatumira mumwe muranda; naiyewo vakamurova vakamuitira zvinonyadzisa uye vakamuendesa asina chaanacho. 
Luke20:12 Akatumirazve wechitatu. Uyu vakamukuvadza vakamukanda kunze. 
Luke20:13 Muridzi womunda akati, ‘Ndoita sei? Ndichatumira mwanakomana wangu wapamwoyo zvimwe vangamuremekedze.’" 
Luke20:14 Asi vaya vaishandisa munda pavakamuona vakataurirana pachavo vachiti, ‘Uyu ndiye mugari wenhaka; uyai timuuraye kuti nhaka ive yedu.’" 
Luke20:15 Vakamukanda kunze kwomunda wamagirepisi vakamuuraya. Muridzi womunda achaitei kwavari? 
Luke20:16 Achauya agoparadza vaya vokushandisa munda vaya achizopa munda wamagirepisi uya kuna vamwe.” Pavakanzwa izvi vakati, “Hazvidi kudaro.”" 
Luke20:17 Jesu akavatarisa akati, “Ko izvi zvakanyorwa zvinorevei zvinoti, “ ‘Dombo rakarambwa navavaki iroro ndiro rakava dombo rakakoshesesa rapakona.’" 
Luke20:18 “Munhu wose anowira padombo iroro anobva adanzurwa danzurwa. Asi rikawira munhu rinomupwanya.” 
Luke20:19 Nyanzvi dzomutemo navapristi vakuru vakaedza kumubata panguva iyoyo asi vakatya vanhu nokuti vakanga vazviona kuti akanga ataura muenzaniso uyu akananga ivo. 
Luke20:20 Saizvozvo vainyatsomutarisisa. Vakatumira vasori vaiita sevakatendeka vachiitira kuti vamubate pakutaura kwake kuti vamuturire kuvakuru vakuru nomumaoko agavhuna. 
Luke20:21 Vakamubvunza vachiti, “Mudzidzisi, tinoziva kuti munotaura nokudzidzisa zvazviri uye hamusaruri asi munodzidzisa nzira yaMwari zviri pachokwadi." 
Luke20:22 Zviri pamutemo here kubvisa mutero kuna Siza kana kuti kwete?” 
Luke20:23 Asi iye akaona unyengedzi hwavo akati kwavari," 
Luke20:24 “Ndiratidzei mari chena imwechete yemadhenari. Ine mufananidzo norunyoro rwaani?” Vakati, “NdezvaSiza.”" 
Luke20:25 Iye akati kwavari, “Nezvo ipai kuna Siza zvaSiza mupewo kuna Mwari zvaMwari.”" 
Luke20:26 Havana kugona kumubata pane vanhu mune zvaakataura. Vakangoshamiswa nemhinduro yake vakanyarara. 
Luke20:27 Kwakauya kwaari vaSadhusei, vaya vanoti hapana zvokumuka kwavakafa. Vakabvunza Jesu mubvunzo vachiti," 
Luke20:28 “Mudzidzisi, Mosesi akatinyorera kuti, ‘Kana mukoma womunhu akafa iye ane mudzimai asi pasina vana, munun'una wake anofanira kutora mudzimai agoberekera mukoma wake vana.’" 
Luke20:29 Zvino, paiva navanhu vaiva mukomanomunun'una vanomwe. Wokutanga akaroora mudzimai akafa asina vana." 
Luke20:30 Wechipiri newechitatu vakamutorawo," 
Luke20:31 ndizvo zvimwechete navose vari vanomwe, havana kusiya vana." 
Luke20:32 Mushure macho, mudzimai uya akazofawo." 
Luke20:33 Ko zvino pakumuka kwavakafa achava mudzimai waani nokuti vose vari vanomwe akava mudzimai wavo?” 
Luke20:34 Jesu akati kwavari, “Vanhu varizvino vanoroora uye vanoroorwa." 
Luke20:35 Asi avo vanokodzera kusvika mune ramangwana uye pakumuka kwavakafa, havazoroori kana kuroorwa" 
Luke20:36 nokuti havachafazve pamusana pokuti vanenge vaita savatumwa uye vanenge vava vana vaMwari uye vanenge vava vanhu vokumuka kuvafi. 
Luke20:37 Asi zvokuti vakafa vanomutswa, kunyange Mosesi akazviratidza mundima iya yegwenzi raipfuta moto maanoti Tenzi ndiMwari waAbhurahamu naMwari waIsaki naMwari waJakobho." 
Luke20:38 Zvino haasi Mwari wavakafa asi Mwari wavapenyu nokuti kwaari vose vapenyu.” 
Luke20:39 Dzimwe nyanzvi dzomutemo dzakapindura dzichiti, “Mudzidzisi mataura zvakanaka.”" 
Luke20:40 Havana kuzoita chivindi chokumubvunza mumwe mubvunzo. 
Luke20:41 Jesu akati kwavari, “Nhai imi, ko vanhu vanoti, ‘Kristu Mwanakomana waDhavhidhi seiko?’" 
Luke20:42 Inga iye Dhavhidhi pachake mubhuku renziyo anoti, “ ‘Tenzi akati kuna Tenzi wangu, Gara kurudyi rwangu" 
Luke20:43 kusvikira ndaita mhandu dzako chitambarariko chetsoka dzako.’ ” 
Luke20:44 Dhavhidhi anomuti, “Tenzi saizvozvi, ko anogova mwana wake sei?”" 
Luke20:45 Jesu akataurira vadzidzi vake, vanhu vose vachinzwa." 
Luke20:46 Akati, “Ngwarirai nyanzvi dzomutemo, vanhu vanoda kufamba vakapfeka magemenzi marefu, vanoda kukwaziswa pamisika nokuwana zvigaro zvakanaka mumasinagogu nenzvimbo dzapamusoro dzavakuru vakuru pamabiko." 
Luke20:47 Vanodya twemba dzechirikadzi; uye vanoita minamato mirefu yokungobata zvavo vanhu kumeso. Vachatemerwa chirango chakaremesa.” 
Luke21:1 Akasimudza musoro akaona vapfumi vachiisa zvipo zvavo munzvimbo yaichengeterwa upfumi. 
Luke21:2 Akaonawo chirikadzi yaiva murombo ichiisa tumari tuviri twekopa. 
Luke21:3 Jesu akati, “Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri chirikadzi iyi murombo yaisa zvinopfuura vose nokuti ivo vaisa zvabva mune zvakawanda zvavainazvo." 
Luke21:4 Asi iyo nourombo hwayo, yaisa zvose zvainorarama nazvo.”" 
Luke21:5 Vamwe pavaitaura nezveTemberi kuti yakashongedzwa zvakadii namatombo akakosha nezvipo, Jesu akati," 
Luke21:6 “Zvamuri kuona izvi, mazuva ari kuuya hapazosara dombo riri pamusoro perimwe, risingazokoromotserwa pasi.”" 
Luke21:7 Vakamubvunza kuti, “Nhai mudzidzisi izvi zvichaitika rinhi uye kuti chiratidzo chokuti zvava kuda kuitika chichava chipi?”" 
Luke21:8 Iye akati, “Chenjerai kuti murege kurasikiswa nokuti kuna vazhinji vachauya muzita rangu vachiti, ‘Ini ndini iye.’ Uye vachati, ‘Nguva yasvika.’ Imi musavatevere." 
Luke21:9 Kana monzwa zvehondo namanyongori, musatye nokuti izvi zvinofanira kutanga zvaitika asi kuguma hakubva kwangova pakare pakarepo.”" 
Luke21:10 Akazoti kwavari, “Rudzi ruchamukirana norumwe rudzi noumambo huchamukirana nohumwe umambo." 
Luke21:11 Kuchava nokundengendeka kwapasi kukuru, munzvimbo dzakasiya — siyana muchava nedzinzara nezvirwere, kuchava nezvinotyisa nezviratidzo zvikuru zvichibva kudenga." 
Luke21:12 Asi izvi zvose zvisati zvaitika vachakusungai vachikutambudzai vachakuturirai kumasinagogu nokukuisai mumajeri. Muchaunzwa pamberi pamadzimambo namagavhuna nokuda kwezita rangu. 
Luke21:13 Iyi inenge iri nguva yokupa kwenyu umbowo. 
Luke21:14 Nokudaro nyatsozvibatisisai mumwoyo menyu kuti musafunge kuti tichapindura sei. 
Luke21:15 Ndichakupai unyanzvi hokutaura noungwaru zvokuti hapana kana mhandu yenyu ichazokwanisana nemi kana kupokana nemi. 
Luke21:16 Muchakwidzwa matare kunyange navabereki venyu kana navakoma navanun'una nehama neshamwari. Vachauraya vamwe venyu. 
Luke21:17 Muchavengwa navose pamusana pezita rangu. 
Luke21:18 Asi hapana kana ruvhudzi rwomusoro wenyu ruchatsakatika. 
Luke21:19 Kutsungirira kwenyu kuchakuwanirai upenyu hwenyu. 
Luke21:20 “Kana moona Jerusaremu yakomberedzwa nehondo. Ibvai maziva kuti kuparadzwa kwayo kwava pedyo. Vanenge vari muJudhea ngavatizire kumakomo. Vanenge vari muguta ngavabvemo. 
Luke21:21 Vanenge vari kunze kumaruwa ngavarege kupinda mariri 
Luke21:22 nokuti iwaya anenge ari mazuva okutsividza kuzadzisa zvose zvakanyorwa. 
Luke21:23 Hameno zvavo vanenge vakazvitakura navavo vanenge vachiyamwisa pamazuva iwayo nokuti pachava nenhamo huru panyika nokurangwa kwavanhu ava. 
Luke21:24 Vachaparadzwa nehondo yebakatwa vachitapwa mukati memarudzi ose. Jerusaremu ichatsokodzerwa nevechirudzi; kusvikira nguva yevechirudzi yazadziswa. 
Luke21:25 “Kuchava nezviratidzo kuzuva nokumwedzi nokunyenyedzi. Panyika pachava nokutambura kwamarudzi; vachashaiswa mazano nokutinhira kwegungwa namasaisai. 
Luke21:26 Vanhu zvichavapedza simba nokutya nokufunga zvichavawira panyika nokuti masimba omudenga achazungunutswa. 
Luke21:27 Ndipo pavachaona Mwanakomana womunhu achiuya ari mumakore aine simba nembiri huru. 
Luke21:28 Zvino kana izvozvo zvoitika, tarirai kudenga musimudze musoro nokuti kununurwa kwenyu kunenge kwava pedyo.”" 
Luke21:29 Akavataurira mumwe muenzaniso achiti, “Tarisai muonde nemiti yose" 
Luke21:30 kana yopfumvudza munobva mangozvionera uye munobva maziva kuti zhizha ravakusvika. 
Luke21:31 Naizvozvo kana moona zvinhu izvi zvavakuitika, munobva maziva kuti umambo hwaMwari hwava pedyo." 
Luke21:32 Zviro kwazvo ndinoti kwamuri chizvarwa ichi hachimbopfuura kusvika zvose izvi zvaitika. 
Luke21:33 Denga napasi zvichapera asi mashoko angu haaperi. 
Luke21:34 “Zvingwarirei kuti musaodzwe mwoyo noupenyu husina paho nokuraradza nokuzvidya mwoyo nezvinhu zvoupenyu huno, zuva iroro richizoyerekana rakusvikirai" 
Luke21:35 seriva nokuti richasvikira munhu wose anogara pamusoro payo nyika yose. 
Luke21:36 Ngwarirai nguva dzose muchinamata kuti muwane simba rokupunyuka zvose izvi zvichaitika uye kuti mukwanise kuzomira pamberi peMwanakomana womunhu.” 
Luke21:37 Mazuva ose, Jesu aidzidzisa muTemberi asi usiku aienda wondorara kugomo rinonzi Orivheti." 
Luke21:38 Mangwanani vanhu vose vaizouya kwaari muTemberi kuti vamunzwe. 
Luke22:1 Zvino zuva guru rechingwa chisina mbiriso rinonzi Pasika rakanga ravakuda kusvika. 
Luke22:2 Vapristi vakuru nenyanzvi dzomutemo vakanga vachitsvaka kuti vangamuuraye sei nokuti vaitya vanhu. 
Luke22:3 Zvino Satani akapinda muna Judhasi ainzi Isikarioti, aiva mumwe wavane gumi navaviri." 
Luke22:4 Akaenda akandorangana navavakuru namapurisa kuti angamuturire sei kwavari. 
Luke22:5 Vakafara vakatsidza kumupa mari. 
Luke22:6 Iye akabvuma, akatsvaka nguva yakanaka yokumuturira kwavari nayo pasina vanhu vakawanda." 
Luke22:7 Zuva guru reChingwa Chisina mbiriso rakazosvika rayiitwa hwayana yePasika chibayiro. 
Luke22:8 Ipapo Jesu akatuma Pita naJohani achivati, “Endai mundotigadzirira Pasika kuti tigoidya.”" 
Luke22:9 Vakati kwaari, “Munoda kuti tindoigadzirira kupi.”" 
Luke22:10 Iye akati kwavari, “Pamunongoti pindei muguta muchasanganidzana nomurume akatakura chirongo chemvura. Muteverei muimba yaanondopinda" 
Luke22:11 mugotaurira muridzi wemba iyoyo kuti, ‘Mudzidzisi ari kuti kwamuri, ko imba yavayeni mandichadyira Pasika navadzidzi vangu iripi?’" 
Luke22:12 Iye achakuratidzai imba huru yapamusoro makanyatsorongedzwa. Imomo ndomomotigadzirira.” 
Luke22:13 Vakaenda vakasvikowana sezvaakanga avataurira, ndokugadzirira Pasika." 
Luke22:14 Nguva yacho payakasvika, akagara pakudya pamwechete navapositori." 
Luke22:15 Akati kwavari, “Ndaidisisa kwazvo kudya chirariro ichi nemi ndisati ndatambudzika" 
Luke22:16 nokuti, ndinokuudzai kuti handichazochidya kusvikira chazadziswa muumambo hwaMwari.”" 
Luke22:17 Akatora mukombe akatenda ndokuti, “Torai mukombe uyu mugoverane pakati penyu" 
Luke22:18 nokuti ndinokuudzai kuti kubvira zvino handizonwazve muchero womugirepisi kusvikira umambo hwaMwari hwasvika.” 
Luke22:19 Akatorawo chingwa akatenda ndokuchimedura akachipa kwavari achiti, “Uyu muviri wangu unopirirwemi. Itai izvi mugochindiyeuka nazvo.”" 
Luke22:20 Akaita zvimwechetezvo nomukombe mushure mechirariro achiti, “Mukombe uyu unoteurirwemi, chitenderano chitsva muropa rangu." 
Luke22:21 “Asi chinzwai, achandipandukira ari kuseva neni mundiro." 
Luke22:22 Mwanakomana womunhu anoenda zvake nenzira yaakatemerwa. Asi zvichamuwana munhu uyo anomutengesa.” 
Luke22:23 Vakatanga kubvunzana kuti, “Ndiani wavo akanga achazoita izvozvo.”" 
Luke22:24 Pakamuka nharo pakati pavadzidzi dzokuti ndiani anofanira kutorwa somukuru wavo vose. 
Luke22:25 Iye akati kwavari, “Madzimambo evechirudzi vanoita zvechisimba kuvanhu vavo. Uye vakuru vakuru vavo vanozviti vanasamwoyochena." 
Luke22:26 Asi kwamuri hazvifaniri kudaro, mukuru pakati penyu ngaave iye somudiki. Uye mutungamiri aite somushandiri." 
Luke22:27 Nokuti ndiani mukuru, agere pakudya here kana kuti muperekeri? Handiti ndouyo agere pakudya? Asika ndiri pakati penyu somuperekeri." 
Luke22:28 “Imi ndimi makaramba muineni mumatambudziko angu," 
Luke22:29 sokundipa kwakaita Baba umambo ini ndinohupawo kwomuri 
Luke22:30 kuti muzodya nokumwa patafura neni muumambo hwangu makagara pazvigaro zvokutonga muchitonga madzinza gumi namaviri eIsiraeri. 
Luke22:31 “Simoni, Simoni, tarisa uone Satani akumbira kuti akuzungurei sekoroni." 
Luke22:32 Asi ndakunamatira kuti chitendero chako chirege kukundika. Kana uchinge wazotendeukazve simbisa hama dzako.” 
Luke22:33 Pita akati, “Tenzi ndakagadzirira kuenda nemi kuJeri kana kurufu chaiko.”" 
Luke22:34 Iye akati kwaari, “Ndinokuudza Pita kuti, iye nhasi uno uchandiramba katatu jongwe risati rakukuridza.”" 
Luke22:35 Jesu akati kwavari, “Pandakakutumai musina chikwama kana tsapo kana shangu, pane chamakashaiwa here?” Vakati, “Hapana.”" 
Luke22:36 Iye akati kwavari, “Asi parizvino, uyo ane chikwama ngaachitore; ndizvo zvimwechetezvo neane tsapo. Uyowo asina bakatwa ngaatengese bhachi rake atenge bakatwa." 
Luke22:37 Nokuti ndinokutaurirai kuti Magwaro Matsvene aya anofanira kuzadziswa mandiri anoti, ‘Akaverengerwa mukati mavatadzi nokuti zvakanyorwa nezvangu zvinofanira kuzadziswa.’ ”" 
Luke22:38 Ivo vakati, “Tarisai Tenzi, haano mapakatwa maviri.” Iye akavati, “Zvakwana.”" 
Luke22:39 Akabuda akaenda, samaitiro ake kugomo reMiorivhi. Vadzidzi vake vakamutevera." 
Luke22:40 Paakasvika panzvimbo iyoyo akati kwavari, “Namatai kuti murege kupinda mukuedzwa.”" 
Luke22:41 Iye akasudurukana navo chinhambwe chingasvike dombo kana rapotserwa. Akapfugama akanamata achiti," 
Luke22:42 “Baba kana muchida henyu bvisai mukombe wenhamo uyu kwandiri asi kusave kuda kwangu asi kuda kwenyu ngakuitwe.” [ 
Luke22:43 Mutumwa akabva kudenga akazviratidza kwaari achimusimbaradza. 
Luke22:44 Jesu achirwadziwa zvakanyanya kudaro, akatonyanya kunamata. Dikita rake rakaita samadonhwe makuru eropa achidonhera pasi.]" 
Luke22:45 Paakasimuka paainamata, akauya kuvadzidzi akavawana vakakotsira nemhaka yokusuwa." 
Luke22:46 Akati kwavari, “Sei muchikotsira, mukai munamate kuti murege kupinda mukuedzwa.”" 
Luke22:47 Paakanga achiri kutaura kudaro, kwakauya chikwata chavanhu nomumwe murume ainzi Judhasi mumwe wavane gumi navaviri achivatungamirira. Akaswedera kuna Jesu akamutsvoda." 
Luke22:48 Asi Jesu akati kwaari, “Judhasi unotengesa Mwanakomana womunhu nokumutsvoda here?”" 
Luke22:49 Vakanga vakamupoteredza pavakaona zvakanga zvavakuda kuitika vakati, “Tenzi totema namapakatwa here?”" 
Luke22:50 Mumwe wavo akabva atema muranda womupristi mukuru achimudimbura nzeve yake yokurudyi. 
Luke22:51 Jesu akati, “Imi siyanayi nazvo izvi” akabata nzeve yake ndokumurapa." 
Luke22:52 Jesu akataura kuvapristi vakuru namapurisa apaTemberi navakuru vakuru vakanga vauya kuzomusunga achiti, “Mauya namapakatwa netsvimbo sokunge muri kuvinga gororo." 
Luke22:53 Asi pandaiva nemi zuva nezuva muTemberi imi hamuna kundisunga. Ino inguva yenyu nenguva yamasimba erima.” 
Luke22:54 Vakabata Jesu vakaenda naye. Vakaenda naye kuimba yomupristi mukuru. 
Luke22:55 Pita akatevera ari chinhambwe. Pavakakuhwidza moto pakati penhandare vakagara pasi pamwechete, Pita akagarawo pakati pavo." 
Luke22:56 Mumwe musikana webasa paakamuona akagara pane chiedza akamunan'anidza akati, “Murume uyu anga ainayewo uyu.”" 
Luke22:57 Asi Pita akaramba achiti, “Mukadzi iwe, ini handimuzivi.”" 
Luke22:58 Mushure mechinguvana mumwewo munhu akamuona akati kwaari, “Newewo uri mumwe wavo iwe.” Asi Pita akati, “Murume iwe handisini.”" 
Luke22:59 Mumashure mechinhambo chinoita awa imwechete, mumwezve akasimbisisa achiti, “Chokwadi chokwadi munhu uyu anga ainaye nokuti muGarirea.”" 
Luke22:60 Pita akati, “Murume iwe, handizivi zvauri kutaura.” Pakare pakarepo achiri kutaura kudaro jongwe ndokubva rakukuridza." 
Luke22:61 Tenzi akacheuka akatarisa Pita. Pita akayeuka shoko raTenzi zvaakanga ati kwaari, “Jongwe risati rakukuridza nhasi uno uchandiramba rutatu.”" 
Luke22:62 Akabuda akahwihwidza kuchema zvinosiririsa. 
Luke22:63 Zvino varume vakanga vakachengetedza Jesu vakamunyomba vachimurova. 
Luke22:64 Vakamusunga kumeso vachimubvunza vachiti, “Porofitaka. Ndiani akurova.”" 
Luke22:65 Vakataura mamwe mazwi mazhinji vachimushonha. 
Luke22:66 Kwaedza, gungano ravakuru — vakuru vavanhu rakaungana, vapristi vakuru nenyanzvi dzomutemo vakaenda naye kudare ravo vakati," 
Luke22:67 “Kana uriwe Kristu tiudze.” Asi iye akati kwavari, “Kana ndikakuudzai zvangu hamutendi." 
Luke22:68 Uye kana ndikakubvunzai hamundipinduri 
Luke22:69 asi kubvira zvino Mwanakomana womunhu achagara ari kurudyi rwaMwari Samasimbaose.” 
Luke22:70 Vose vakati, “Saka uri Mwana waMwari nhai?” Iye akati kwavari, “Inga imi matozvireva wani. Kuti ndini iye”" 
Luke22:71 Ivo vakati, “Tichadirei humwe humbowo. Tazvinzwira iyesu achitaura nomuromo wake.”" 
Luke23:1 Chita chose chiya chavanhu chakasimuka chikaenda naye kuna Pirato. 
Luke23:2 Vakatanga kumupa mhosva vachiti, “Takawana munhu uyu achipandutsa rudzi rwedu achitirambidza kubvisa mutero kuna Siza achizviti iye pachake ndiKristu mambo.”" 
Luke23:3 Pirato akamubvunza achiti, “Ndiwe mambo wavaJudha here?” Iye akamupindura achiti, “Inga matozvireva kare wani.”" 
Luke23:4 Pirato akati kuvapristi vakuru nemhomho yavanhu, “Handisi kuwana mhosva ine mhunhu uyu.”" 
Luke23:5 Vakatobva vasimbisisa kuti, “Anomutsa nyonganyonga muvanhu, achidzidzisa muJudhea yose kubvira kuGarirea kusvikira kuno.”" 
Luke23:6 Pirato paakanzwa izvi akabvunza kuti munhu uyu akanga ari wokuGarirea here. 
Luke23:7 Paakaziva kuti ndowekudunhu raHerodhi akamutumira kuna Herodhi akanga ari muJerusaremu panguva iyoyo. 
Luke23:8 Herodhi paakaona Jesu akafara kwazvo nokuti kwenguva ndefu aidisisa kumuona nokuti akanga anzwa nezvake uye akanga achitarisira kuona chimwe chiratidzo chaiitwa naye. 
Luke23:9 Saizvozvo akamubvunza kwenguva ndefu asi haana kupindura. 
Luke23:10 Vapristi vakuru nenyanzvi dzomutemo vakamirawo vachimupa mhosva zvakaomarara. 
Luke23:11 Herodhi namasoja ake vakamudadira vachimuseka. Vakamupfekedza hanzu yakanakisisa akamudzorera kuna Pirato. 
Luke23:12 Herodhi naPirato vakava shamwari neshamwari pazuva iroro nokuti vaimbenge vachivengana. 
Luke23:13 Pirato akazodaidza vapristi vakuru navatongi navanhu," 
Luke23:14 akati kwavari, “Maunza munhu uyu kwandiri somunhu anga achipandutsa vanhu asi pandamuongorora pamberi penyu, handina kuwana munhu uyu aine mhosva dzamurikumupomera" 
Luke23:15 kunyangewo Herodhi nokuti amudzorera kwatiri. Tarisai muone kuti hapana chaakaita chinokodzera rufu. 
Luke23:16 Naizvozvo ndichamurova shure kwaizvozvo ndigomuregera achienda zvake.” [ 
Luke23:17 Nokuti Pirato aifanira kuvasunungurira munhu mumwechete pamazuva makuru.] 
Luke23:18 Asi vose vakadaidzira pamwechete vachiti, “Ngaapfuudzwe munhu uyu mutisunungurire Bharabhasi”" 
Luke23:19 Bharabhasi murume akanga aiswa mujeri pamusana penyonganyonga yakanga yamuka muguta uye nokuuraya munhu. 
Luke23:20 Pirato akashevedzerazve kwavari achida kusunungura Jesu. 
Luke23:21 Asi ivo vakadaidzira vachiti, “Ngaarovererwe pamuchinjikwa! Ngaarovererwe pamuchinjikwa!”" 
Luke23:22 Rwechitatu akati kwavari, “Nemhaka yei? Atadzei? Handina kuwana maari mhosva inokodzera kufa. Naizvozvo ndichamurova chaizvo ndigomurega aende zvake.”" 
Luke23:23 Asi vakangoramba vachivavarira vachidaidzira kwazvo vachiti, “Anofanira kurovererwa pamuchinjikwa.” Zvavaizhambira ndizvo zvakazoitwa." 
Luke23:24 Saizvozvo Pirato akatonga kuti zvavaida zviitwe. 
Luke23:25 Akasunungura murume uya wavakanga vakumbira akanga aiswa mujeri nokuda kwenyonganyonga nokuuraya munhu; asi akaisa Jesu mumaoko avo kuti vaite zvavanoda naye. 
Luke23:26 Zvavakanga vachimutungamidza, vakabata Simoni wekuKurini aibva kuruwa vakamutakudza muchinjikwa uya mumashure maJesu." 
Luke23:27 Akateverwa negurusvusvu ravanhu namadzimai vachiridza mhere vachimuchema. 
Luke23:28 Jesu akatendeukira kwavari akavati, “Vakunda veJerusaremu musandicheme ini; asi zvichemei imi navana venyu." 
Luke23:29 Tarirai mazuva ari kuuya pavachati vakakomborerwa zvavo vasina mbereko nemimba dzisina kumbobereka namazamu asina kumboyamwisa. 
Luke23:30 Ndipo pavachatangisa kuti kumakomo, ‘Tiwirei’ uye kuzvikomo, ‘Tifugidzei’" 
Luke23:31 nokuti kana vachiita izvi kumuti munyoro, ko kutozoti kuno muti wakaoma.”" 
Luke23:32 Vamwewo vaviri vaiva vapari vedzimhosva vakaendwawo navo kundouraiwa pamwechete naye. 
Luke23:33 Pavakasvika panzvimbo inonzi yeDehenya ipapo ndipo pavakamuroverera pamuchinjikwa navapari vedzimhosva vaya vaviri mumwe ari kurudyi mumwe ari kuruboshwe. 
Luke23:34 Jesu akati, “Baba varegererei nokuti havazivi zvavari kuita.” Vakakanda mijenya kuti vagovane hanzu dzake." 
Luke23:35 Vanhu vakanga vakamira pedyo vachitarisa. Asi vatongi vakamusveeredza vachiti, “Akaponesa vamwe ko ngaazviponesewoka kana ari iye Mesia waMwari musarudzwi wake.”" 
Luke23:36 Masoja akamutsvinyirawo, vachiuya vachimupa waini inovava vachiti," 
Luke23:37 “Kana uriwe Mambo wavaJudha zviponese.” 
Luke23:38 Nechapamusoro pake pakanga pane chikwangwani chakanyorwa kuti, “UYU NDIYE MAMBO WAVAJUDHA.”" 
Luke23:39 Mumwe mupari wedzimosva akanga akarembedzwa akamushonha achiti, “Hausiwe Mesia here? Zviponeseka utiponesewo.”" 
Luke23:40 Asi mumwe uya akamutsiura achiti, “Hautyi Mwari here? Inga une chirango chimwechetecho naye." 
Luke23:41 Kwatiri isu zvakakodzera nokuti tiri kuwana zvakakodzerana nezvatakaita. Asi uyu haana zvaakatadza.” 
Luke23:42 Ndokubva ati, “Jesu mundiyeukewo kana masvika muumambo hwenyu.”" 
Luke23:43 Jesu akati kwaari, “Zvechokwadi ndinoti kwauri, uchava neni muparadhiso iye nhasi uno.”" 
Luke23:44 Ipapo yakanga yenge awa yegumi nechipiri uye nyika yose yakati rima tiba kusvikira paawa yechitatu masikati. 
Luke23:45 Chiedza chezuva chakadzima; jira rokudzikatirisa romuTemberi rikabvaruka napakati. 
Luke23:46 Jesu akadaidzira nezwi guru akati, “Baba ndinoisa mweya wangu mumaoko enyu.” Apedza kutaura kudaro akabva afa." 
Luke23:47 Mutungamiriri wezana ramasoja paakaona zvakanga zvaitika akarumbidza Mwari akati, “Zvechokwadi munhu uyu anga akarurama.”" 
Luke23:48 Gurumwandira rose ravanhu vakanga vaungana kuzoona zvaiitika, pavakaona zvakanga zvaitika, vakadzokera vangogumbata maoko nazvo." 
Luke23:49 Vose vaizivana naye namadzimai ainge amutevera achibva kuGarirea vakamira vari chinhambwe vakaona zvinhu izvi. 
Luke23:50 Kwaiva nomumwe murume ainzi Josefi aibva kuguta ravaJudha reArimatia aiva nhengo yedare guru uye ari munhu akanaka akarurama. 
Luke23:51 Iye haana kunge awirirana navamwe pazvinangwa zvavo napane zvavakaita. Iye aitsvaga umambo hwaMwari. 
Luke23:52 Murume uyu akaenda kuna Pirato akakumbira chitunha chaJesu. 
Luke23:53 Akachidzikisa akachiputira mufuko rejira rerineni. Akamuradzika muguva rakanga raitwa zvokuchezerwa mudombo makanga musati mamboradzikwa munhu. 
Luke23:54 Zvaraiva zuva rokugadzirira Pasika uye Sabata rakanga ravakutanga 
Luke23:55 vakadzi vakanga vauya naye vachibva kuGarirea vakatevera vakaona guva racho uye kuti chitunha chakanga charadzikwa sei. 
Luke23:56 Vakadzokera vakandogadzirira tunonhuwirira namafuta. Pazuva reSabata vakazorora sezvaidiwa nomutemo. 
Luke24:1 Pazuva rokutanga revhiki, mambakwedza chaiwo, vakaenda kuguva vakatakura tunonhuwirira twuya twavakanga vagadzirira." 
Luke24:2 Vakawana dombo riya rakungurutswa kubva paguva. 
Luke24:3 Asi pavakapinda havana kuwana chitunha. 
Luke24:4 Vachiri mukukangaidzwa naizvozvi, havo varume vaviri vakaerekana vamira pavaiva vaine hanzu dzaipenya zvikuru." 
Luke24:5 Zvavakanga vavakutya zvikuru vakamira vakatsikitsira uso pasi. Varume vaya vakati kwavari, “Munotsvakireiko vapenyu mukati mavakafa." 
Luke24:6 Yeukai zvaakakuudzai achiri kuGarirea 
Luke24:7 zvokuti, ‘Mwanakomana womunhu anofanira kuiswa mumaoko avatadzi agorovererwa pamuchinjikwa asi agozomuka nezuva retatu.’ ”" 
Luke24:8 Vakayeuka mazwi ake. 
Luke24:9 Pavakadzoka kumakuva vakataurira zvose izvi kuna vane gumi nomumwe nokuna vamwe vose. 
Luke24:10 Vakataurira vapositori zvose izvi, ndiMaria Magadharena naJoana naMaria amai vaJemusi navamwe vadzimai vavaiva navo." 
Luke24:11 Mashoko aya, kwavari, akaita sezvinhu zvisina maturo saka havana kuatenda. [" 
Luke24:12 Asi Pita akasimuka akamhanyira kuguva. Akakotama akadongorera mukati. Akaona machira erineni ari pawo oga. Akaenda kumba achishama nezvakanga zvaitika.] 
Luke24:13 Zuva rakarero vamwe vavo vaviri vaienda kunomumwe musha wainzi Emausi waiva makiromita gumi nerimwechete kubva kuJerusaremu," 
Luke24:14 vachitaurirana nezvezvinhu izvi zvose zvakanga zvaitika. 
Luke24:15 Pavakanga vachitaura vachikurukurirana Jesu pachake akaenda pedyo akafamba navo. 
Luke24:16 Asi vakaita chidzimira vakatadza kumuziva. 
Luke24:17 Jesu akati kwavari, “Ko chii chamuri kutaurirana muchifamba kudai?” Vakamira kuti mbikiti vakati surududu." 
Luke24:18 Mumwe wavo ainzi Kiropasi akamupindura achiti, “Ndiwe woga here muenzi wemuJerusaremu, asingazivi zvinhu izvi zvakaitikamo mazuva ano aya?”" 
Luke24:19 Iye akati kwavari, “Zvinhuiko izvozvo.” Ivo vakati kwaari, “ZvaJesu weNazareti, aiva muporofita, ane simba guru muzviito nomushoko pamberi paMwari napamberi pavanhu vose" 
Luke24:20 uye kuti vapristi vakuru navatongi vakamukwirira dare kuti atongerwe rufu vakamuroverera pamuchinjikwa. 
Luke24:21 Asi taivimba kuti ndiye aizonunura Isiraeri. Chimwewo ndechokuti zvino atova mazuva matatu zvaitika. 
Luke24:22 Chimwezve ndechokuti mamwe madzimai echikwata chedu vatikangaidza. Vaenda kuguva mangwananingwanani 
Luke24:23 vakashaya chitunha chake. Vadzoka vavakuti vaona chiratidzo chavatumwa vari kuti mupenyu. 
Luke24:24 Vamwe vedu vatangatinavo vaendawo kuguva, vakaona zvinhu zvakaita sokutaura kwanga kwaitwa namadzimai, asi iye havana kumuona.”" 
Luke24:25 Jesu ndokuti kwavari, “Oo, inga muri mazirema chaiwo avanhu! Munechinono chaicho kutenda zvose zvakataurwa navaporofita." 
Luke24:26 Zvakanga zvisingafaniri here kuti iye Kristu atambudzike saizvozvi achizopinda mumbiri yake?” 
Luke24:27 Ndipo paakatangisa nokuna Mosesi navaporofita vose achivatsananungurira muMagwaro Matsvene ose zvinhu zvakanangana naiye pachake. 
Luke24:28 Pavakanga vava kuda kusvika pamusha wavaienda, akaita seavakupfuurira." 
Luke24:29 Asi vakamugombedzera vachiti, “Garai nesu nokuti kwava kuda kuvira zuva rapera.” Saka akapinda kundogara navo." 
Luke24:30 Paakanga ari pakudya navo, akatora chingwa akachikomborera ndokuchimedura akachipa kwavari." 
Luke24:31 Maziso avo akabva azaruka vakabva vamuziva, asi iye akabva anyangarika kwavari." 
Luke24:32 Vakataurirana vachiti, “Mwoyo yedu haina kunge yava kutopisirira here mukati medu paanga achitaura kwatiri munzira; paya paanga achitizarurira Magwaro Matsvene?”" 
Luke24:33 Vakabva vasimuka nguva yakareyo vakadzokera kuJerusaremu. Vakasvikowana vane gumi nomumwechete vaya vakaungana navamwe vavaiva navo," 
Luke24:34 vakati, “Tenzi wamuka zvechokwadi uye azviratidza kuna Simioni.”" 
Luke24:35 Ivowo vakavataurira zvakanga zvaitika panzira uye kuti vakamuziva sei pakumedura chingwa. 
Luke24:36 Pavakanga vachiri kutaura izvi. Iye Jesu pachake akamira pakati pavo (akati kwavari, “Rugare ngaruve nemi”)." 
Luke24:37 Vakavhunduka vakatya vachifunga kuti vari kuona dzangaradzimu. 
Luke24:38 Iye akati kwavari, “Ko muri kunetseka mumwoyo menyu neiko? Ko mibvunzo iri kumukireiko mumusoro menyu?" 
Luke24:39 Tarisai maoko angu netsoka dzangu muone kuti ndini chaiye. Ndibatei muone nokuti dzimudzangara harina nyama namapfupa sezvamuri kuona ndiinazvo.” 
Luke24:40 Ataura izvi akavaratidza maoko ake netsoka dzake. 
Luke24:41 Vachiri kupokana kudaro pamusana pokufara uye vachikatyamadzwa akati kwavari, “Mune chokudya here pano?”" 
Luke24:42 Vakamupa hove yakagochwa 
Luke24:43 akaitora akaidya pamberi pavo. 
Luke24:44 Akazovataurira achiti, “Aya ndiwo mazwi angu andakakutaurirai ndichinemi ndichiti, ‘Zvose zvakanyorwa nezvangu mumutemo waMosesi nomuvaporofita nomunziyo zvaifanira kuzadzikiswa.’ ”" 
Luke24:45 Akavazarura pfungwa kuti vanzwisise Magwaro Matsvene. 
Luke24:46 Akati kwavari, “Zvakanyorwa zvichinzi, ‘Kristu aifanira kutambudzika uye kuti amuke kuvafi nezuva retatu" 
Luke24:47 uyewo kuti kutendeuka nokuregererwa kwezvitadzo kuparidzwe muzita rake kumarudzi ose, zvichitangira kuJerusaremu." 
Luke24:48 Imi ndimi zvapupu zvezvinhu izvi. 
Luke24:49 Chinzwai, ndichatumira pamuri chipikirwa chababa vangu. Asi imi garai muguta rino, kusvikira mapiwa simba rinobva kumusoro.’ ”" 
Luke24:50 Akavatungamirira kusvika kuBhetania. Akasimudza maoko ake akavakomborera. 
Luke24:51 Paakanga achivakomborera akabva pavari akakwidzwa kudenga. 
Luke24:52 Vakadzokera kuJerusaremu norufaro rukuru; 
Luke24:53 vairamba vari muTemberi vachirumbidza Mwari. 
John1:1 Pakutanga Izwi akanga atovapo; Izwi iyeyo akanga ari pamwechete naMwari; Izwi akangawo ari Mwari. 
John1:2 Kubvira pakutanga, iye akanga ari pamwechete naMwari." 
John1:3 Zvinhu zvose zvakaitwa nemaari; hapana chisikwa chisina kusikwa naiye. 
John1:4 Maari makanga muino upenyu; upenyu ihwohwo hwakanga huri chiedza chavanhu 
John1:5 chiedza chinovhenekera murima uye rima harina kuchikurira. 
John1:6 Kwakazova nomunhu akatumwa naMwari, zita rake ainzi Johani." 
John1:7 Uyu akauya kuzopa uchapupu achipupurira chiedza, kuti vanhu vose vatende maari." 
John1:8 Iye akanga asiri chiedza, asi akauya kuzopupurira chiedza achiti" 
John1:9 chiedza chechokwadi, chinovhenekera munhu wose, chiri kuuya pasi pano." 
John1:10 10 Iye akava pasi pano uye pasi pakasikwa nemaari asi pasi hapana kumuziva. 
John1:11 Akauya kunyika yokwake vokwake havana kumugamuchira. 
John1:12 Asi vose vakamugamuchira vakatenda muzita rake akavapa simba rokuva vana vaMwari 
John1:13 vasina kuberekwa nokuda kwoukama hweropa kana kuti nezvinodiwa nenyama. Kana nechido chomurume asi nokuda kwaMwari. 
John1:14 Izwi akava munhu anenyama akagara pakati pedu azere nyasha nechokwadi. Takaona mbiri yake inokodzerana nomwana oga waBaba. 
John1:15 15 Johani akamupupurira akadaidzira achiti, “Uyu ndiye wandaiti, ‘Uyo achauya mushure mangu, mukuru kwandiri nokuti akavapo ndisati ndavapo.’ ”" 
John1:16 Kubva mumafashafasha enyasha dzake, takapiwa tose nyasha pamusoro pedzimwe nyasha." 
John1:17 Mutemo wakapiwa nokuna Mosesi nyasha nechokwadi zvikauya nokuna Jesu Kristu. 
John1:18 Hakuna akamboona Mwari asi Mwanakomana mumwechete waMwari iye wapamwoyo paBaba ndiye akaita kuti vazivikanwe kuvanhu. 
John1:19 Uhu ndihwo uchapupu hwaJohani, vaJudha pavakatuma vapristi navaRevhi kwaari vachibva kuJerusaremu kundomubvunza kuti: “Ndiwe ani?”" 
John1:20 Akataura pachena; haana kuvanza; akataura pachena achiti, “Ini handisini Kristu.”" 
John1:21 Vakamubvunza vachiti, “Ko zvino, ndiwe Eriya here?” “Handisini iye. Ndiwe muporofita uya airehwa here?” Iye akati, “Handisini.”" 
John1:22 Zvino vakati kwaari, “Ko ndiwe ani tinoda mhinduro kwauri yokupa vatituma; unozviti ani iwe?”" 
John1:23 Akati: “Ndini izwi rouya anodanidzira murenje richiti, ‘Ruramisai nzira yaTenzi sokutaura kwomuporofita Isaya.’ ”" 
John1:24 Zvino vakanga vatumwa vaya vaibva kuvaFarisei," 
John1:25 vakamubvunza kuti, “Ko zvino uri kuombekerei kana usiriwe Kristu kana Eriya kana muporofita uya?”" 
John1:26 Johani akavapindura kuti, “Ndinoombeka nemvura asi pakati penyu pane mumwe wamusingazivi." 
John1:27 Iyeyo anouya mushure mangu, ini handikodzeri kusunungura tambo dzeshangu dzake.”" 
John1:28 Izvi zvakaitika kuBhetania iri kumhiri kwaJorodhani kwaiombeka Johani. 
John1:29 Ramangwana acho, Johani akaona Jesu achiuya kwaari akati, “Tarisai muone hwayana yaMwari inobvisa chitadzo chapasi." 
John1:30 Uyu ndiye wandaitaura nezvake ndichiti, ‘Mushure mangu muchauya munhu mukuru kupinda ini nokuti akanga aripo ini ndisati ndavapo.’" 
John1:31 Ini handina kunge ndichimuziva; asi ndizvo zvandakavinga ndichiombeka nemvura, kuti aziviswe kuIsraeri.”" 
John1:32 Johani akapa umboo uhu hwokuti, “Ndakaona Mweya achiburuka kudenga senjiva akasvikogara paari." 
John1:33 Ini pachezvangu ndakanga ndisingamuzivi asi uyo akandituma kuti ndiombeke nemvura akanditi, ‘Uyo waunoona Mweya achiburukira paari, achigara paari iyeyo ndiye anoombeka naMweya Mutsvene.’" 
John1:34 Ini ndakazviona uye ndinopupura kuti uyu Mwanakomana waMwari.” 
John1:35 Ramangwana rachozve Johani akanga amire navadzidzi vake vaviri; 
John1:36 akatarisa Jesu achifamba akati, “Tarisai muone Hwayana yaMwari.”" 
John1:37 Vadzidzi vaviri vaya vakamunzwa achitaura izvi vakabva vatevera Jesu. 
John1:38 Jesu akatendeuka akavaona vachitevera akavati, “Muri kutsvakeiko?” Ivo vakati kwaari, “Rabhi,” (zvinoreva kuti mudzidzisi) “Munogara kupiko?”" 
John1:39 Iye akati kwavari, “Uyai muzoona.” Vakauya vakaona paaigara vakagara naye zuva iroro, izvozvo yakanga iri awa yechigumi." 
John1:40 Andireya munun'una waSimoni Pita ndiye mumwe wavadzidzi vaviri vaya vakanzwa Johani achitaura vakamutevera. 
John1:41 Akatanga kuwana Simoni akamuti, “Tawana Mesia zvinoreva kuti Kristu.”" 
John1:42 Akauya naye kuna Jesu. Jesu akamutarisa akati, “Iwe unonzi Simoni Mwanakomana waJohani zvino uchanzi Kefasi,” (zvinoreva kuti Pita)." 
John1:43 Ava mangwana Jesu akafunga zvokuenda kuGarirea ndokuwana Firipi akamuti, “Nditevere.”" 
John1:44 Zvino Firipi aibva kuBhetisaidha guta ravanaAndireya naPita. 
John1:45 Firipi akawana Natanieri akati kwaari, “Taona munhu uya akanyorwa nezvake naMosesi muMutemo noMuvaporofita, anonzi Jesu anobva kuNazareti mwanakomana waJosefi.”" 
John1:46 Natanieri akamuti, “Chiiwo chakanaka chingabve kuNazareti?” Firipi akati kwaari, “Uyaka uone.”" 
John1:47 Jesu akaona Natanieri achiuya kwaari akataura nezvake achiti, “Houno muIsiraeri chaiyeiye, asina unyengedzi maari.”" 
John1:48 Natanieri akati, “Ko mandiziva sei?” Jesu akamupindura achiti, “Firipi asati akudaidza, zviya uri pasi pomukuyu ndatenge ndakuona.”" 
John1:49 Natanieri akamupindura achiti, “Rabhi imi ndimi Mwanakomana waMwari, ndimi mambo weIsiraeri.”" 
John1:50 Jesu akamupindura achiti, “Watenda pamusana pezvandati ndakuona uri pasi pomukuyu uchaona zvinhu zvikuru kupinda izvi.”" 
John1:51 Akati kwaari, “Zvirokwazvo, zvirokwazvo, ndinoti kwamuri muchaona denga rakazaruka vatumwa vaMwari vachikwira nokuburuka nechapamusoro pomwanakomana womunhu.”" 
John2:1 Pazuva retatu kwakava nomuchato kuKana yokuGarirea. Amai vaJesu vakanga variko. 
John2:2 Jesu akakokwawo kumuchato iwoyo pamwechete navadzidzi vake. 
John2:3 Waini payakapera, amai vaJesu vakati kwaari, “Vanhu vapererwa newaini.”" 
John2:4 Jesu akati kwavari, “Nhai amai, ko isu tinei nazvo, nguva yangu haisati yasvika.”" 
John2:5 Amai vake vakati kuvashandi, “Itai zvose zvaanenge akutaurirai.”" 
John2:6 Zvino ipapo pakanga paina mazigate matanhatu amabwe maererano netsika yavaJudha yokuzvichenura. Rimwe nerimwe rawo raiita marita makumi manomwe anamashanu kusvika kuzana ramarita rina marita gumi namashanu. 
John2:7 Jesu akati kwavari, “Zadzai makate aya nemvura.” Ivo vakaazadza kuti tuba." 
John2:8 Akazovati, “Zvino chicherai imwe muendese kuna samukuru womuchato.” Saizvozvo vakaenda nayo." 
John2:9 Samukuru uya paakaravira, mvura iya yakanga yatova waini asi iye akanga asingazivi kwayakanga yabva. Asi Vashandi vaya vakanga vachera mvura ndivo vaizviziva. Samukuru womuchato akadaidza muwani" 
John2:10 akati kwaari, “Vanhu vose vanotanga vapa vanhu waini yakanaka. Kana vachinge vanyatsonwa zvavo ndokwakuzovapa isina kunaka asi iwe wachengeta waini yakanaka kusvikira iye zvino.”" 
John2:11 Ichi ndicho chiratidzo chaJesu chokutanga chaakaita kuratidza mbiri yake. Achiita ari kuKana yokuGarirea. 
John2:12 Mushure maizvozvi akadzika kuKapenaumu naamai vake navakomanavanun'una vake navadzidzi vake vakagarako kwamazuva mashoma. 
John2:13 Pasika yavaJudha zvayakanga yavapedyo, Jesu akakwira kuJerusaremu." 
John2:14 Akasvikoona vanhu vachitengesa muTemberi, mombe nehwai nehangaiwa navaiva mushishi yokutengeserana mari." 
John2:15 Akaita tyava nemikosi akadzingira vose kunze kweTemberi, pamwechete nehwai nemombe. Akawodzvorera pasi mari chena yavaitengeserana mari nokupidigurira pasi mateburu avo." 
John2:16 Akataurira vainge vachitengesa hangaiwa kuti, “Bvisai zvinhu izvi muno. Hamufaniri kuita imba yaBaba vangu musika.”" 
John2:17 Vadzidzi vake vakayeuka kuti zvakanyorwa kunzi, “Kudisisa kwandinoita imba yenyu kuchandipedza.”" 
John2:18 VaJudha vakabva vati kwaari, “Tipe chiratidzo chemvumo yezvawaita izvi.”" 
John2:19 Jesu akavapindura achiti, “Pazai Temberi iyi, ini ndigoivakazve namazuva matatu.”" 
John2:20 VaJudha ndokuti, “Zvakatora makore makumi mana anamatanhatu kuvaka Temberi iyi iwe ndipo paungaimise namazuva matatu here?”" 
John2:21 Asi Temberi yaaitaura waiva muviri wake. 
John2:22 Saizvozvo paakamutswa muvafi vadzidzi vake vakarangarira kuti akambozvitaura vakatenda chinyorwa nezwi rakanga rataurwa naJesu. 
John2:23 Paakanga ari muJerusaremu kumazuva makuru ePasika vazhinji vakatenda muzita rake pavakaona zviratidzo zvaaiita. 
John2:24 Asi Jesu haana kuvimba navo nokuti aiziva vanhu vose. 
John2:25 Akanga asina chaangaudzwe nomumwe munhu nezvomunhu nokuti iye pachake aiziva zviri mumunhu. 
John3:1 Kwaiva nomumwe munhu webato ravaFarisei ainzi Nikodhimasi, mumwe wedare ravaJudha." 
John3:2 Murume uyu akauya kuna Jesu nousiku akati kwaari, “Rabhi tinoziva kuti muri mudzidzisi wakabva kuna Mwari nokuti hakuna anogona kuita zviratidzo zvamunoita kunze kwokuti Mwari ainaye.”" 
John3:3 Jesu akamuti, “Zvirokwazvo zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwauri, ‘Kana munhu asina kuzvarwa patsva haangaoni umambo hwaMwari.’ ”" 
John3:4 Nikodhimasi akati kwaari, “Ko iye munhu angazvarwe sei iye avamukuru, anogona here kupinda kechipiri munhumbu maamai vake achizozvarwa?”" 
John3:5 Jesu akapindura achiti, “Zvirokwazvo zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwauri, ‘Kana munhu akasazvarwa nemvura naMweya haangapindi muumambo hwaMwari." 
John3:6 Chinenge chazvarwa nenyama inyama chinenge chazvarwa naMweya mweya 
John3:7 usashamisike nezvandati unofanira kuzvarwa patsva. 
John3:8 Mhepo inovhuvhuta kwainoda, unonzwa kuvhuvhuta kwayo asi hauzivi kwainobva kana kwainoenda. Ndizvo zvimwechetezvo nomunhu wose anoberekwa naMweya.’ ”" 
John3:9 Nikodhimasi akamupindura achiti, “Izvi zvingaitike sei?” Jesu akamupindurawo achiti," 
John3:10 “Iwe uri mudzidzisi weIsiraeri kudai haunzwisisi zvinhu izvi sei? 
John3:11 Zvirokwazvo zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwauri tinotaura zvatinoziva uye tinopupura zvatakaona asi hamugamuchiri uchapupu hwedu. 
John3:12 Kana ndikakutaurira nezvepasi hamutendi mungatende sei kana ndikataura nezvokudenga. 
John3:13 Hapana akambokwira kudenga kusiya iye akaburuka achibva kudenga, mwanakomana womunhu.”" 
John3:14 Sokusimudzira nyoka mudenga kwakaita Mosesi murenje saizvozvo Mwanakomana womunhu anofanira kusimudzwawo," 
John3:15 kuti munhu wose anotenda maari awane upenyu husingaperi. 
John3:16 Mwari akada pasi zvikuru zvokuti akapa Mwanakomana wake mumwechete kuti munhu wose anotenda maari arege kufa, asi kuti awane upenyu husingaperi." 
John3:17 Nokuti Mwari haana kutumira Mwanakomana wake pasi kuzopa pasi mhosva asi kuti pasi paponeswe naye. 
John3:18 Anotenda maari haapihwi mhosva asi asingatendi maari atova nemhosva nokuti haana kutenda muzita roMwanakomana mumwechete oga waMwari. 
John3:19 Mhosva yacho ndeyiyi yokuti chiedza chakauya pasi pano asi vanhu vakada rima panze pokuda chiedza, nokuti mabasa avo akanga akaipa." 
John3:20 Nokuti munhu wose anoita zvakaipa anovenga chiedza uye haauye kuchiedza kuitira kuti mabasa ake arege kuburitswa pachena. 
John3:21 Asi anoita zvechokwadi anouya kuchiedza kuti zvionekwe pachena kuti mabasa ake akaitwa muna Mwari. 
John3:22 Mushure maizvozvi Jesu navadzidzi vake vakaenda kunyika yeJudhea. Akambogarako navo achiombeka. 
John3:23 Johani aiombekawo ari kuAinoni pedyo neSarimu nokuti ikoko kwaiva nemvura zhinji. Vanhu vaiuya vachiombekwa. 
John3:24 Izvozvi Johani akanga asati aiswa mujeri. 
John3:25 Pakamuka nharo pakati pavadzidzi vaJohani nomumwe muJudha pamusoro pezvokuchenurwa. 
John3:26 Vakauya kuna Johani vakati, “Rabhi munhu uya wamaiva naye kumhiri kwaJorodhani wamakapupurira uya hoyo wavakuombeka, vanhu vose vavakuenda kwaari.”" 
John3:27 Johani akapindura achiti, “Hakuna munhu angawane chinhu kusiya chaanenge atopiwa chichitobva kudenga." 
John3:28 “Imi pachenyu mungatondipupurirawo kuti ndakati: handisini iye Kristu asi ndakatumwa kufanouya mberi kwake. 
John3:29 “Mwenga achichata ndewemuwani. Shamwari yomuwani inomira ichiteerera achitaura; inofara zvikuru kunzwa izwi romuwani. Saizvozvo rufaro rwanguwo rwazara kuti tuba. 
John3:30 Iye anofanira kukwirira ini ndinofanira kuderera. 
John3:31 “Iye anobva kumusoro ari pamusoro pavose. Wapanyika ndewapanyika uye anotaura nezvapanyika; uyo anobva kudenga ari pamusoro pavose. 
John3:32 Zvaakaona nezvaakanzwa ndizvo zvaanopupura asi uchapupu hwake ihwohwo hauna anohugamuchira. 
John3:33 Munhu anogamuchira uchapupu hwake ihwohwo anotsinhira kuti, Mwari ari pachokwadi." 
John3:34 Nokuti akatumwa naMwari anotaura mazwi aMwari nokuti Mwari haana kumupa Mweya achiita zvokuera. 
John3:35 Baba vanoda Mwanakomana uye vakaisa zvinhu zvose mumaoko ake. 
John3:36 Anotenda muna Mwanakomana anoupenyu husingaperi uyo asingateereri Mwanakomana haamboona upenyu asi hasha dzaMwari dzichanangana naye.” 
John4:1 Jesu paakaziva kuti vaFarisei vakanga vanzwa kuti Jesu ari kuwana vadzidzi vazhinji uye kuti ari kuombeka vadzidzi vakawanda kupinda Johani 
John4:2 kunyange zvazvo Jesu pachake akanga asingaombeki asi vadzidzi vake. 
John4:3 Akabva abva kuJudhea akaendazve kuGarirea. 
John4:4 Aifanira kutopfuura nomuSamaria. 
John4:5 Nezvo akasvika nomuguta reSamaria rinonzi Sukari riri pedyo nomunda wakapa Jakobho kuna Josefi mwana wake. 
John4:6 Ipapo paiva netsime raJakobho naizvozvo Jesu zvaakanga aneta nerwendo rwake akagara pedyo netsime iroro. Yakanga iri nguva yokunge zuva rorova panhongonya. 
John4:7 Pakauya mumwe mukadzi wechiSamaria? Ipapo kuzoteka mvura. Jesu akati kwaari, “Ndipewo mvura yokunwa.”" 
John4:8 Izvozvo vadzidzi vake vakanga vaenda muguta kundotenga chokudya. 
John4:9 Mukadzi uya wechiSamaria akati kwaari, “Zvauya sei kuti imi muJudha mukumbire mvura yokunwa kuneni mukadzi wechiSamaria.” Aidaro nokuti vaJudha havadyidzani navaSamaria." 
John4:10 Jesu akamupindura achiti: “Dai wanga uchiziva kuti Mwari ari kuda kukupei uye kuti ndiani ari kukuti ndipewo mvura yokunwa, ungatodai uriwe wamukumbira iye achikupa mvura mhenyu.”" 
John4:11 Mukadzi uya akati kwaari, “Changamire inga hamuna chokuchera nacho wani uye tsime rakadzika iyo mvura mhenyu yacho munoiwanepi?" 
John4:12 Muri mukuru here pana Baba vedu Jakobho akatipa tsimwe iri naivoo pachavo vakanwa mariri navana vavo nezvipfuwo zvavo?” 
John4:13 Jesu akati kwaari, “Munhu anonwa mvura iyi achava nenyotazve." 
John4:14 Asi munhu wose anonwa mvura yandinomupa, haambofa akaita nyotazve, mvura yandichamupa ichava chisipiti chemvura maari inoramba ichibvinina kusvikira kuupenyu husingaperi.”" 
John4:15 Mukadzi akati kwaari, “Changamire ndipeiwo zvangu mvura iyoyo, kuti ndirege kuva nenyota zvakare kana kuzouya kuno kuzoteka mvura.”" 
John4:16 Jesu akamuti, “Enda undodana murume wako uuye kuno.”" 
John4:17 Mukadzi akamupindura achiti, “Handina murume ini.” Jesu akati kwaari, “Wataura zvakanaka kuti, ‘Handina murume,’" 
John4:18 nokuti wakamboita varume vashanu uye wauinaye zvino haasi murume wako. Apo wataura chokwadi. 
John4:19 Mukadzi ndokuti kwaari, ‘Changamire ndaona kuti muri muporofita.’" 
John4:20 Madzitateguru edu akanamata pagomo rino iri asi imi munoti: ‘MuJerusaremu ndimo munzvimbo munofanira kunamatirwa vanhu vari.’ ” 
John4:21 Jesu akati kwaari, “Mukadzi iwe tenda zvandiri kutaura, nguva iri kuuya yamusingazonamati Baba mugomo rino iri kana muJerusaremu." 
John4:22 Imi munonamata chamusingazivi. Asi isu tinonamata chatinoziva nokuti ruponeso runobva kuvaJudha. 
John4:23 Asi nguva iri kuuya uye yatosvika ichanamatwa Baba navanamati vechokwadi vanomunamata muMweya nomuchokwadi nokuti Baba vanotsvaka vakadai kuti vavanamate. 
John4:24 Mwari mweya; saizvozvo, vanomunamata vanofanira kumunamata muMweya nomuchokwadi.”" 
John4:25 Mukadzi uya akati kwaari, “Ndinoziva kuti Mesia ari kuuya iye anonzi Kristu. Kana auya achatiratidza zvinhu zvose.”" 
John4:26 Jesu akati kwaari, “Iyeni ndiri kutaura kwauri ndini iye.”" 
John4:27 Ipapo ndipo pakabva pauya vadzidzi vake. Vakashamiswa kuti aitaura nomunhukadzi. Asi hapana akati, “Munodei kwaari?” Kana kuti, “Munotaurirei naye?”" 
John4:28 Naizvozvo mukadzi uya akasiya chirongo chake akaenda muguta akati kuvanhu," 
John4:29 “Uyai muone munhu anditaurira zvose zvandakaita. Angave iye Kristu here?” 
John4:30 Vanhu vakabuda muguta vachienda kwaari. 
John4:31 Izvozvo vadzidzi vake vakanga vachimunyengetedza vachiti, “Rabhi chimbodyai.”" 
John4:32 Asi iye akavati, “Ndine chokudya chamusingazivi.”" 
John4:33 Naizvozvo vadzidzi vakataurirana vachiti, “Pane amuunzira chokudya here?”" 
John4:34 Jesu akati kwavari, “Zvokudya zvangu kuita zvinodiwa naiye akandituma uye kupedza basa rake." 
John4:35 Handiti munoti, ‘Kwasara mwedzi mina kukohwa kwobva kwauya?’ Asi ini ndinoti kwamuri, ‘Simudzai musoro muone kuti minda yatsvuka, yoda kukohwiwa." 
John4:36 Mukohwi ava kuwana mubayiro wake uchaunganidza muchero wokuupenyu husingaperi zvokuti mudyari nomukohwi vafare pamwechete.’ 
John4:37 Pano apa tsumo iya inotaura chokwadi inoti, ‘Mumwe mudyari, mumwe mukohwi.’" 
John4:38 Ndakakutumai kundokohwa zvamusina kushandira; vamwe ndivo vakashanda; imi mukapinda mumubayiro webasa ravamwe.” 
John4:39 VaSamaria vazhinji vaibva muguta iroro vakatenda maari pamusana pouchapupu hwomudzimai uya akati “Wanditaurira zvose zvandakaita.” 
John4:40 Naizvozvo vaSamaria pavakauya kwaari vakamukumbira kuti ambogara navo. Akagaramo kwamazuva maviri. 
John4:41 Vamwe vazhinjiwo vakatenda nokuda kwamazwi ake. 
John4:42 Vakati kumudzimai uya, “Zvino hatitendi pamusana pamazwi ako nokuti isu tazvinzwira toga. Tavakuziva kuti zvechokwadi uyu ndiye Muponesi wapasi pose.”" 
John4:43 Mushure memazuva maviri aya akaenda kuGarirea. 
John4:44 Iye Jesu pachake akanga ambopupurawo kuti, “Muporofita haaremekedzwi munyika make.”" 
John4:45 Paakasvika kuGarirea, vaGarirea vakamugamuchira nokuti vakanga vaona zvose zvaakaita kuJerusaremu pamazuva makuru nokuti naivowo vakanga vaenda kumazuva makuru iwayo." 
John4:46 Akaendazve kuKana yokuGarirea kwaakanga asandura mvura ikava waini. KuKapenaumu kwaiva negurukota rairwarirwa nomwana mukomana. 
John4:47 Murume uyu paakanzwa kuti Jesu akanga auya kuGarirea achibva kuJudhea akaenda akandomukumbira kuti auye azoporesa mwanakomana wake nokuti akanga avapedyo nokufa. 
John4:48 Saizvozvo akati kwaari, “Kana musina kuona zviratidzo nezvishamiso hamutendi.”" 
John4:49 Gurukota riya rakati kwaari, “Changamire uyai mwana wangu asati afa.”" 
John4:50 Jesu akati, “Chiendai zvenyu mwana wenyu achararama.” Murume uya akadavira zvaakaudzwa naJesu akabva aenda." 
John4:51 Paakanga avakudzika vashandi vake vakasangana naye vakamuudza kuti, “Mwana wake akanga ararama.”" 
John4:52 Naizvozvo akabvunza nguva yaakatangisa kuita zvakanaka. Vakati kwaari, “Denda rakamusiya nezuro panguva dzahwani masikati. ”" 
John4:53 Baba ava vakabva vazviziva kuti ndiyo nguva iya Jesu yaakataura kuti Mwana wenyu achararama. Naizvozvo iye pamwechete nevemhuri yake yose, akatenda." 
John4:54 Ichi ndicho chiratidzo chechipiri chakaitwa naJesu paakabva kuJudhea achiuya kuGarirea. 
John5:1 Mushure maizvozvi kwakaita zuva guru ravaJudha, Jesu akakwira kuJerusaremu." 
John5:2 Zvino muJerusaremu mune dziva riri pedyo neSuwo guru reHwai rinonzi Bhetisaidha muchiHebheru, rine maperere mashanu." 
John5:3 Mumaperere imomo maiva navarwere; vaiti mapofu nemhetamakumbo navakafa mitezo. 
John5:4 *** 
John5:5 Ipapo paiva nomumwe murume akarwara kwamakore makumi matatu ana masere. 
John5:6 Jesu paakamuona akati rabada uye achiziva kuti akanga akadai kwenguva ndefu, akamuti, “Unoda kuporeswa here?”" 
John5:7 Murwere akamupindura achiti, “Changamire ini handina anondiisawo mudziva kana mvura yabvongodzwa. Pandinenge ndoti ndichipindawo mumwe anobva anditangira.”" 
John5:8 Jesu akati kwaari, “Chisimuka utore rukukwe rwako ufambe.”" 
John5:9 Pakarepo munhu uya akabva aporeswa. Akatora rukukwe rwake akabva afamba. Musi iwoyo wakanga uri musi weSabata. 
John5:10 Ipapo vaJudha vakati kumunhu akanga aporeswa, “Nhasi iSabata, haubvumirwi kuti utakure rukukwe rwako.”" 
John5:11 Asi iye akavapindura achiti, “Munhu andiporesa ndiye andiudza kuti, ‘Tora rukukwe rwako ufambe.’ ”" 
John5:12 Vakamubvunza kuti, “Ndiani munhu iyeyo akutaurira kuti tora rukukwe rwako ufambe?”" 
John5:13 Asi munhu uya akaporeswa haana kuziva kuti ndiani nokuti Jesu akanga anyangarika sezvapanga paina manyoremanyore avanhu. 
John5:14 Mushure mezvo Jesu akamuwana paTemberi akamuti, “Tarisa uone kuti wapora; usatadzezve kuti urege kuwirwa nezvakapinda izvi.”" 
John5:15 Murume uya akabva aenda akandotaurira vaJudha vaya kuti Jesu ndiye akanga amuporesa. 
John5:16 Ndizvo zvakaita kuti vaJudha vaonese Jesu nhamo nokuti akaita zvinhu zvakadai nomusi weSabata. 
John5:17 Asi Jesu akavapindura achiti, “Baba vangu vanoshanda nazvino neniwo ndinofanira kushanda.”" 
John5:18 Ndokusaka vaJudha vakatonyanya kuda kumuuraya nokuti haana kungotyora chete mutemo weSabata, asi kuti akatiwo Mwari ndiBaba vake pachake achizvienzanisa naMwari." 
John5:19 Jesu akati kwavari, “Zvirokwazvo zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri, Mwanakomana haakwanisi kuita chinhu nokwake pachake asi kuita zvaanoona Baba vachiita nokuti zvavanoita ndizvowo zvaanoita." 
John5:20 Nokuti Baba vanoda Mwanakomana uye vanomuratidza zvose zvavanenge vachiitawo pachavo uye vachamuratidza mabasa makuru kupinda iwaya kuti mushamiswe. 
John5:21 Nokuti sezvinongoita Baba kumutsa vakafa vachivapa upenyu, saizvozvo Mwanakomana anopawo upenyu kune waanenge ada." 
John5:22 Baba havatongi munhu, asi vakapa kutonga kwose kumwanakomana" 
John5:23 kuti vose varemekedze mwanakomana sokuremekedza kwavanoita Baba. Asingaremekedzi Mwanakomana haaremekedzi Baba vakamutuma. 
John5:24 Zvirokwazvo Zvirokwazvo ndinoti kwamuri anonzwa izwi rangu uye achitenda akandituma anoupenyu husingaperi haagadzwi dare; asi atobva kurufu achienda kuupenyu. 
John5:25 Zvechokwadi chaizvo ndinoti kwamuri nguva iri kuuya uye yatosvika yokuti vakafa vanzwe izwi roMwanakomana waMwari. Avo vacharinzwa vachava vapenyu. 
John5:26 Sezvo Baba vari dzinde roupenyu saizvozvo vakaitawo kuti Mwanakomana ave nedzinde roupenyu maari," 
John5:27 vakamupa ukuru kuti atonge nokuti ndiye Mwanakomana womunhu. 
John5:28 Musashamisike nezvizvi zvokuti nguva iri kuuya yokuti vose vari mumakuva vachanzwa izwi rake vagobudamo. 
John5:29 Vakaita zvakarurama vachimukira upenyu, vanenge vakaita zvakaipa vachimukira kutongwa." 
John5:30 Hapana chandinogona kuita nokwangu ndoga. Sokunzwa kwandinenge ndaita kuna Baba ndiwo matongero andinoita; uye kutonga kwangu kwakarurama nokuti handitsvaki kuita kuda kwangu, asi kuda kwaiye akandituma." 
John5:31 Ndikazvipupurira, kupupura kwangu hakusi kwechokwadi." 
John5:32 Kune mumwe anondipupurira uye ndinoziva kuti kundipupurira kwake ndekwechokwadi. 
John5:33 Makatuma nhume kuna Johani akapupurira chokwadi. 
John5:34 Zvisingarevi zvazvo kuti ini ndinovimba nouchapupu hwomunhu. Asi ndinotaura izvi kuti imi muponeswe. 
John5:35 Akanga ari rambi rinopfuta uye rinopenya imi mukafarira kuva muchiedza chake kwekanguva. 
John5:36 Asi uchapupu hwandinahwo hukuru kupinda hwaJohani nokuti mabasa andakapiwa naBaba kuti ndiapedze, mabasa iwayo andiri kuita anondipupurira kuti Baba ndivo vakandituma." 
John5:37 Ivowo Baba vakandituma vanondipupurira. Izwi ravo hamusati mamborinzwa chimiro chavo hamusati mambochiona. 
John5:38 Uyewo izwi ravo harigari mamuri nokuti hamudaviri uyo wavakatuma. 
John5:39 Munotsvagatsvaga muMagwaro Matsvene nokuti munofunga kuti maari munowana upenyu husingaperi Magwaro iwayo ndiwo anotondipupurira. 
John5:40 Asi imi munoramba kuuya kwandiri kuti muwane upenyu. 
John5:41 Ini handitsvagi kuwana mbiri inobva kuvanhu. 
John5:42 Asi sokukuzivai kwandinoita, rudo rwaMwari mamuri hamuna." 
John5:43 Ndakauya ini muzita raBaba vangu asi hamundigamuchiri asi mumwewo akauya muzita rake iyeyo ndiye wamunogamuchira. 
John5:44 Mungatenda sei imi munofarira kurumbidzana, musingatsvaki mbiri inobva kuna Mwari mumwechete." 
John5:45 Musafunge kuti ini ndini ndichakupai mhosva panaBaba asi Mosesi wamunovimba naye, ndiye achakupai mhosva." 
John5:46 Dai maidavira muna Mosesi maidavirawo mandiri nokuti akanyora nezvangu. 
John5:47 Zvino kana musingatendi zvaakanyora mungatenda sei mashoko angu.” 
John6:1 Mushure maizvozvo Jesu akaenda kumhiri kwegungwa reGarirea kana kuti gungwa reTibheriasi. 
John6:2 Gurumwandira ravanhu rakamutevera nokuti vakanga vaona zviratidzo zvaakaita pavarwere. 
John6:3 Jesu akakwira mugomo ndokugara pasi navadzidzi vake. 
John6:4 Izvozvo mazuva makuru avaJudha ePasika akanga ava pedyo. 
John6:5 Jesu paakasimudza musoro akaona manyoramanyore avanhu achiuya kwaari. Akati kuna Firipi, “Tichatenga kupi chingwa chokuti vanhu ava vadye.”" 
John6:6 Izvi akataura kuri kumuedza zvake. Nokuti iye aiziva zvaaizoita. 
John6:7 Firipi akamupindura achiti, “Mazana maviri emari yemadhenari haigoni kutenga chingwa chinokwana kuti mumwe nomumwe awane kachidimbu.”" 
John6:8 Mumwe wavadzidzi vake ainzi Andireya, munun'una waSimoni Pita akati kwaari," 
John6:9 “Pane mukomana ari pano ane zvingwa zvishanu zvebhari nehove mbiri asi zvingabatsirei panavanhu vakawanda kudai.” 
John6:10 Jesu akati itii vanhu vagare pasi. Ipapo pakanga paine uswa hwakawanda. Varume vakagara pasi vainge zviuru zvishanu. 
John6:11 Jesu ndokutora zvingwa zviya otenda Mwari ndokuzvigovera kuvanhu vakanga vakagara pasi. Akaita zvimwechetezvo nehove dziya. Akavapa pamadiro avo. 
John6:12 Pavakanga vaguta akati vadzidzi vake vaunganidze zvimedu zvakasara kuitira kuti pashaye nechinoraswa. 
John6:13 Saizvozvo vakazviunganidza vakazadza tswanda gumi nembiri nezvimedu zvezvingwa zvebhari zvishanu zvakasiiwa navakadya vaya. 
John6:14 Vanhu pavakaona chiratidzo chaakanga aita, vakati chokwadi uyu ndiye muporofita uya ainzi ari kuuya pasi pano." 
John6:15 Zvino Jesu paakazviona kuti vakanga vavakuuya kuzomumanikidza kumuita mambo, Jesu akabva abvazve pavari akaenda kumakomo ari oga zvake pachake." 
John6:16 Ava madeko, vadzidzi vake vakadzika kugungwa" 
John6:17 vakapinda mugwa vakatangisa kuyambuka gungwa vachienda kuKapenaumu. Izvozvo kwakanga kwasviba. Uye Jesu akanga asati auya kwavari. 
John6:18 Gungwa rakanyanduka nokuda kwemhepo yaivhuvhuta nesimba. 
John6:19 Vadzidzi pavakanga vakwasva kwamakiromita mashanu kana kuti matanhatu vakaona Jesu achifamba pamusoro pegungwa achiuya pedyo negwa. Vakabva vabatwa nokutya. 
John6:20 Asi iye akati kwavari, “Ndini, musatye zvenyu.”" 
John6:21 Naizvozvo vakabva vafara kumugachira mugwa. Pakarepo igwa rakabva rasvika kumahombekombe ekwavaienda. 
John6:22 Ramangwana racho, vanhu vaya vakasara kumhiri kwegungwa, vakazviona kuti pakanga pane igwa rimwechete chete ipapo. Uye kuti Jesu haana kunge apinda muigwa iroro pamwechete navadzidzi vake asi kuti vadzidzi vake vakanga vaenda voga." 
John6:23 Asi pane magwa akabva kuTibheriasi akasvikawo pedyo nenzvimbo yavakadya chingwa chiya mushure mokunge Tenzi ambotenda. 
John6:24 Zvino vanhu pavakaona kuti Jesu akanga asipo pamwechete navadzidzi vake, ivo pachavo vakapinda mumagwa aye vakaenda kuKapenaumu kundotsvaka Jesu." 
John6:25 Pavakamuwana kumhiri kuya kweGungwa, vakati kwaari, “Rabhi makauya kuno riniko?”" 
John6:26 Jesu akavapindura achiti, “Chokwadi chaizvo ndinoti kwamuri hamusi kunditsvaka nokuti makaona zviratidzo asi nokuti makadya zvingwa mukaguta." 
John6:27 Musashandire chokudya chinopera asi chokudya chinogara kusvikira kuupenyu husingaperi chamunopiwa noMwanakomana womunhu, nokuti Mwari Baba vakaisa rupawo rwavo paari.”" 
John6:28 Ivo ndokuti kwaari, “Chii chatingaite kuti tishande mabasa aMwari?”" 
John6:29 Jesu akavapindura achiti, “Basa raMwari nderiri rokuti: Imi munofanira kutenda muna iye waakatuma.”" 
John6:30 Saka vakati kwaari, “Ko zvino iwe chiratidzoi chaungaite kuti tione tigotenda mauri; chii chaungaite?" 
John6:31 Madzibaba edu vakadya mana murenje sokunyorwa kwazvakaitwa zvichinzi akavapa chingwa chakabva kudenga kuti vadye.” 
John6:32 Jesu akati kwavari: “Chokwadi chaizvo ndinoti kwamuri, haasi Mosesi akakupai chingwa chinobva kudenga. Baba vangu ndivo vanokupai chingwa chechokwadi chinobva kudenga." 
John6:33 Nokuti chingwa chaMwari ndechiya chinobva kudenga uye chinopa upenyu kunyika.” 
John6:34 Vakati kwaari, “Tenzi tipei chingwa ichocho nguva dzose.”" 
John6:35 Jesu akati kwavari, “Ini ndini chingwa choupenyu; anouya kwandiri haaiti nzara uye anotenda mandiri haambofa akanzwa nyota." 
John6:36 Asi imi, sezvandambokuudzai munondiona zvenyu asi hamutendi." 
John6:37 Chose chandinopiwa naBaba chinouya kwandiri uye anenge auya kwandiri handimurasiri kunze. 
John6:38 Nokuti ndakauya ndichibva kudenga kwete kuzoita kuda kwangu asi kuda kwewakandituma. 
John6:39 Kuda kwewakandituma ndokuku kwokuti handifaniri kurasikirwa nechose zvacho chaanenge andipa asi kutochimutsa pazuva remhedziso. 
John6:40 Uku ndiko kuda kwababa vangu kokuti wose anoona mwanakomana achitenda maari awane upenyu husingaperi uye ndichamumutsa nezuva remhedziso.” 
John6:41 VaJudha vakabva vamunyunyutira nokuti akati, “Ndini chingwa chakabva kudenga.”" 
John6:42 Vakati, “Uyu handiye here Jesu Mwanakomana waJosefi watinoziva baba naamai vake. Zvino angagoti sei ndakaburuka kudenga.”" 
John6:43 Jesu akavapindura achiti, “Musanyunyute pakati penyu." 
John6:44 “Hapana angauye kwandiri kana Baba vakandituma vasina kutomukweva. Iniwo ndichazomumutsa nezuva rokupedzisira. 
John6:45 Zvakanyorwa muvaporofita kuti, ‘Vose vachadzidziswa naMwari. Munhu wose anoteerera Baba nokudzidza kwavari anouya kwandiri.’" 
John6:46 Hazvirevi kuti pana akamboona Baba kusiya iye akabva kuna Mwari ndiye akaona Baba. 
John6:47 Chokwadi chaizvo ndinoti kwamuri anotenda anoupenyu husingaperi. 
John6:48 Ndini chingwa choupenyu. 
John6:49 Madzitateguru enyu akadya mana murenje asi vakafa. 
John6:50 Ichi ndicho chingwa chakaburuka chichibva kudenga chokuti anenge achidya haazofa. 
John6:51 Ini ndini chingwa chipenyu chakaburuka kubva kudenga. Munhu wose anodya chingwa ichi, achararama nokusingaperi. Chingwa chandichapa kuti chive upenyu hwapasi pose, inyama yangu pachangu.”" 
John6:52 VaJudha vakaitirana nharo pachavo vachiti, “Munhu uyu angatipe sei nyama yake kuti tidye?”" 
John6:53 Naizvozvo Jesu akati kwavari, “Zvechokwadi chaizvo, ndinoti kwamuri mukasadya nyama yoMwanakomana womunhu nokunwa ropa rake hamuna upenyu mamuri." 
John6:54 Anodya nyama yangu nokunwa ropa rangu ano upenyu husingaperi uye ndichazomumutsa nezuva rokupedzisira. 
John6:55 Nokuti nyama yangu kudya chaiko uye ropa rangu kunwa chaiko. 
John6:56 Anodya nyama yangu nokunwa ropa rangu anogara mandiri neniwo maari. 
John6:57 Sokutumwa kwandakaitwa naBaba vapenyu uye kuti ndinoraramiswa naBaba ndizvozvowo zvinoita vanondidya vachararamiswa neni. 
John6:58 Ichi ndicho chingwa chakaburuka chichibva kudenga chisina kufanana nechakadyiwa, namadzitateguru enyu vakafa. Anodya chingwa ichi achararama nokusingaperi.”" 
John6:59 Izvi akazvitaura musinagogu paaidzidzisa kuKaperinaumu. 
John6:60 Vamwe vadzidzi vake vazhinji pavakazvinzwa vakati, “Zviri kutaurwa izvi zvakaoma, ndiani angateerera zvakadai.”" 
John6:61 Asi Jesu paakazviziva nechomumwoyo kuti vadzidzi vake vari kunyunyuta nazvo, akati kwavari, “Zvakugumburai here izvi?" 
John6:62 Ko maiita sei dai kuri kuti munotoona Mwanakomana womunhu achikwira kwaaiva kare. 
John6:63 “Mweya ndiwo anopa upenyu; nyama haina maturo. Mazwi andataura kwamuri, mweya noupenyu." 
John6:64 “Asi pane vamwe venyu vasingadaviri. Chaimupa kudaro ndechokuti Jesu aiziva kubvira pokutanga kuti ndavanani vakanga vasingatendi uye kuti ndiani aizomupandukira.” 
John6:65 Akatizve ndokusaka ndakutaurirai kuti, “Hapana angauye kwandiri kana asina kuzvipiwa naBaba.”" 
John6:66 Mushure maizvozvo vazhinji vavadzidzi vake vakamusiya vakasazofambazve naye. 
John6:67 Jesu akati kune vanegumi navaviri vaya, “Kana imi mava kudawo kuenda here?”" 
John6:68 Simoni Pita akamupindura achiti, “Tenzi tingaende kuna aniko, imi ndimi muna mazwi oupenyu husingaperi." 
John6:69 Takadavira uye tinoziva kuti imi ndimi Mutsvene waMwari.” 
John6:70 Jesu akapindura achiti, “Ndakakusarudzai muri gumi navairi handiti? Asi mumwe wenyu ndiDhiabhori.”" 
John6:71 Aitaura nezvaJudhasi mwana waSimoni Isikarioti. Nokuti iyeyu, mumwe chaiye wavanegumi navaviri ndiye aizomutengesa." 
John7:1 Mushure maizvozvi, Jesu aingotenderera ari muGarirea asingadi kuenda kuJudhea nokuti vaJudha vaida kumuuraya." 
John7:2 Izvozvo, mazuva makuru avaJudha amatumba akanga ava pedyo." 
John7:3 Naizvozvo vakomanavanun'una vake vakati kwaari, “Dai mabva kuno muende kuJudhea kuti vadzidzi venyu vaone mabasa amuri kuita." 
John7:4 Nokuti hapana munhu anoita zvomuchivande kana achida kunyatsozivikanwa. Kana muchitoita mabasa akadai zviratidzei kunyika. 
John7:5 Asi ivowo, vakoma navanun'una vake vakanga vasingatendi maari.”" 
John7:6 Jesu akavati, “Nguva yangu haisati yasvika asi kwamuri chero nguva inguva kwayo." 
John7:7 Imi nyika haikuvengei asi ini inondivenga nokuti ndinoidurira kuti zvainoita zvakaipa. 
John7:8 Imimi endai zvenyu kumazuva makuru iwayo ini handisati ndoenda kumazuva makuru iwaya nokuti nguva yangu haisati yanyatsokwana.” 
John7:9 Akataura izvi ndokubva asara zvake kuGarirea. 
John7:10 Vakoma navanun'una vake pavakaenda kumazuva makuru aya iye akazoenda zvechiverevere, zvisingaonekwi navanhu." 
John7:11 VaJudha vakanga vachimutsvaka pamazuva makuru iwayo vachiti, “Ko ari kupiko?”" 
John7:12 Pakanga pachiitwa chizevezeve kwazvo nezvake mukati mavanhu. Vamwe vaiti, “Munhu wakanaka;” vamwewo vachiti, “Kwete, ari kurasisa vanhu kusiri iko.”" 
John7:13 Asi pamusana pokutya vaJudha hapana aitaura pachena nezvake. 
John7:14 Pava pakati pamazuva makuru iwayo Jesu akaenda muTemberi akatangisa kudzidzisa. 
John7:15 VaJudha vakashamiswa nazvo vachiti, “Ko munhu uyu akawanepiko ruzivo rwaanarwo iye asina kudzidza?”" 
John7:16 Jesu akapindura achiti, “Zvandinokudzidzisai hazvisi zvomusoro wangu asi zvinobva kunaiye akandituma." 
John7:17 Kana munhu ane chido chokuita zvinoda Mwari anobva aziva kuti rudzidziso urwu runobva kuna Mwari here, kana kuti ndiri kutaura zvomusoro wangu." 
John7:18 Kana munhu achitaura zvomusoro wake anotsvaka mbiri yake asi munhu anotsvaka mbiri youyo anenge amutuma ari pachokwadi uye maari hamuna unyengedzi. 
John7:19 Mosesi akakupai Mutemo handiti? Asi hapana kana mumwe anochengeta mutemo iwoyo. Munoda kundiurairei?” 
John7:20 Vanhu vakamupindura vachiti, “Une mweya wakaipa iwe! Ndiani arikuda kukuuraya?”" 
John7:21 Jesu akavapindurawo achiti, “Ndakangoita chiitiko chimwechete mose mukabva mashamiswa." 
John7:22 Mosesi akakutii muite dzingiso (zvisingarevi zvazvo kuti zvakabva kuna Mosesi asi kumadzitateguru enyu) asi imi munodzingisa munhu nezuva resabata. 
John7:23 Kana muchidzingisa munhu nezuva reSabata muchiitira kuti mutemo waMosesi urege kutyorwa. Ko zvino munoshatirirwei kana ndakaporesa munhu zvokupedzeredza pamusi weSabata? 
John7:24 Musatonge chinhu nezvamunoona kunze kwacho tongai nemwero kwawo wokutonga.” 
John7:25 Nezvo vamwe vanhu vokuJerusaremu vakati, “Haasi iye munhu wavari kuda kuuraya here uyu. Hoyu ari kutaura pachena chena;" 
John7:26 asi hapana chavari kutaura kwaari, zvinoreva here kuti vakuru vakuru vava kunyatsoziva kuti uyu ndiye Mesia." 
John7:27 Kunobva munhu uyu tinokuzivaka isu asi kana Mesia ouya hapana anoziva kwaanobva.” 
John7:28 Naizvozvo Jesu akadaidzira achidzidzisa muTemberi achiti, “Heya munotondiziva nokwandinobva kwose nhai? Asi ini handina kungouya zvomusoro wangu ndakatotumwa nouyo ari pachokwadi wamusingazivi imi." 
John7:29 Ini ndinomuziva nokuti ndinobva kwaari, uyewo ndiye akandituma.”" 
John7:30 Naizvozvo vakada kumusunga. Asi hapana akambomubata nokuti nguva yake yakanga isati yasvika. 
John7:31 Zvakadaro zvazvo vanhu vazhinji vakatenda maari vachiti, “Ko iye Kristu kana azouya, achaita zviratidzo zvakawanda kupfuura zvakaitwa nomunhu uyu here?”" 
John7:32 VaFarisei vakanzwa zevezeve raiitwa navanhu nezvake. Naizvozvo vapristi vakuru navaFarisei, vakatuma mapurisa apaTemberi kundomusunga." 
John7:33 Jesu akati, “Ndichangova nemi kwekanguva kadiki; ndozodzokera kune wakandituma." 
John7:34 Muchanditsvaka asi hamundiwani uye kwandinenge ndiri hamukwanisi kuuyako.” 
John7:35 VaJudha vakataurirana vachiti, “Ko munhu uyu ari kuda kuenda kupiko, kwatisingakwanisi kumuwana? Arikuda kuenda kuvaJudha vakapararira kuvaGiriki achindodzidzisa vaGiriki here?" 
John7:36 Ko anoreveiko kana achiti, “ ‘Muchanditsvaka asi hamundiwani uye kwandinenge ndaenda imi hamukwanisi kuuyako.’ ”" 
John7:37 Pazuva rokupedzisa ramazuva makuru aya zuva racho rakanga riri guru kupinda ose zvawo Jesu akasimuka akaparidza achiti, “Aninani ane nyota ngaauye kwandiri anwe." 
John7:38 Aninani anodavira mandiri, sokutaura kunoita Magwaro Matsvene mumwoyo make muchaerera nzizi dzemvura youpenyu.”" 
John7:39 Izvozvo aitaura nezvaMweya aizogamuchirwa navanotenda maari nokuti Mweya akanga asati apiwa kuvanhu nokuti Jesu akanga asati awaniswa mbiri yake. 
John7:40 Vamwe vanhu vaiva mugungano iroro, pavakanzwa mazwi aya vakati, “Uyu ndiye chaiye muporofita uya.”" 
John7:41 Vamwewo vakati, “Uyu ndiye Mesia uyu.” Vamwe vakatiwo, “Mesia anofanira kubva kuGarirea here?" 
John7:42 Handiti Magwaro Matsvene anoti, ‘Mesia anofanira kuva chizvarwa chaDhavhidhi uye kuti anobva kuBheterehemu, musha waigara Dhavhidhi.’ ”" 
John7:43 Saizvozvo pakava nokutsaukana mukati mavanhu pamusana pake. 
John7:44 Vamwe vaitoda kumusunga asi hapana kana neakambomubata zvake. 
John7:45 Mapurisa aya akadzokera kuvapristi vakuru navaFarisei avo vakavati, “Sei musina kuuya naye?”" 
John7:46 Mapurisa akati, “Hapana munhu ati ambotaura somunhu uyu.”" 
John7:47 VaFarisei vakapindura vachiti, “Nemiwo marasiswa nhai?" 
John7:48 Pane mumwe wavakuru — vakuru kana mumwe wavaFarisei akatenda maari here 
John7:49 kusiya vanamunhuwo zvavo ava vasingazivi mutemo uye vane rushambwa ava?” 
John7:50 Nikodhimasi, uya akamboenda kwaari aiva mumwe wavo akati kwavari." 
John7:51 “Zviya, handiti mutemo wedu haupe munhu mhosva asina kutanga ambonzwika uye kuziva zvaanoita?”" 
John7:52 Ivo vakapindura vachiti, “Asi newewo unobva kuGarirea su? Tsvagaka uone zvako kuti hakuna muporofita anobva kuGarirea.”" 
John7:53 Mumwe nomumwe akaenda kumusha kwake. 
John8:1 Asi Jesu akaenda kugomo remuorivhi. 
John8:2 Mangwanani ngwanani, akaendazve kuTemberi. Vanhu vose vakauya kwaari akagara pasi achivadzidzisa." 
John8:3 Nyanzvi dzomutemo navaFarisei vakauya kwaari nomukadzi akanga abatwa achiita upombwe. Vakamumisa pakati vakati kuna Jesu," 
John8:4 “Mudzidzisi mukadzi uyu abatwa ari mukuita upombwe. 
John8:5 Zvino muMutemo, Mosesi akati tinofanira kutaka namabwe munhu akadai. Zvino imi munoti kudii naye?”" 
John8:6 Izvi vakataura vachida kuti vamunzwe kuitira kuti vawane mhosva yokumupa. Jesu akakotama akanyora pasi nomunwe wake. 
John8:7 Pavakaramba vachingomubvunza akati twasu kumira ndokuti kwavari, “Uyo asina chitadzo pakati penyu ngaatange kumukanda dombo.”" 
John8:8 Ndokukotamazve onyora pasi nomunwe wake. 
John8:9 Pavakazvinzwa vakaita rumwerumwe kubuda kuchitanga navakuru vacho. Jesu akasiiwa angova oga nomukadzi uya amire pamberi pake. 
John8:10 Jesu akasimudza musoro akati kwaari, “Nhai mudzimai iwe vari kupi vaya? Hakuna neakupa mhosva here?”" 
John8:11 Iye akati, “Hapana changamire.” Jesu akati, “Kana neniwo handikupi mhosva chienda hako usazotadzazve.”" 
John8:12 Jesu akataurazve kwavari achiti, “Ndini mwenje wapasi anonditevera haafambi murima achave nechiedza choupenyu.”" 
John8:13 VaFarisei vakati kwaari, “Uri kuzvipupurira. Kuzvipupurira kwako hakusi kwechokwadi.”" 
John8:14 Jesu akapindura achiti, “Kunyange zvangu ndichizvipupurira, kuzvipupurira kwangu ndekwechokwadi nokuti ndinoziva kwandinobva uye kwandinoenda, asi imi hamuzive kwandinobva uye kwandinoenda." 
John8:15 Imi munotonga namatongero avanhu, ini hapana wandinotonga ndichidaro." 
John8:16 Kunyange dai ndaitonga zvangu, kutonga kwangu ndekwechokwadi nokuti handitongi nokwangu ndoga, asi pamwechete naiye wakandituma." 
John8:17 Mumutemo wenyu makanyorwa kuti uchapupu hwavaviri ndehwechokwadi. 
John8:18 Ndinozvipupurira uye Baba vakandituma vanondipupurirawo.” 
John8:19 Vakati kwaari, “Ivo Baba vako varipiko?” Jesu akavapindura achiti, “Hamundizivi uye hamuzivi Baba vangu. Dai maindiziva mazivawo Baba vangu.”" 
John8:20 Mazwi aya akaataura ari nechekwaichengeterwa mari achidzidzisa ari muTemberi. Asi hapana akamusunga nokuti nguva yake yakanga isati yasvika. 
John8:21 Akatizve, “Ndava kuenda, imi muchanditsvaka asi muchafira muzvitadzo zvenyu. Kwandiri kuenda, imi hamukwanisi kuuyako.”" 
John8:22 VaJudha ndokuti, “Achazviuraya here zvaari kuti kwandinoenda hamukwanisi kuuyako?”" 
John8:23 Akati kwavari, “Imi munobva pasi, ini ndinobva kumusoro, imi muri vapasi pano, ini handisi wapasi pano." 
John8:24 Ndakutaurirai kuti muchafira muzvitadzo zvenyu kunze kwokunge matotenda kuti, ‘Ndiri iye wandiri.’ ”" 
John8:25 Vakati kwaari, “Iwe ndiwe ani iwe?” Jesu akati kwavari, “Handiti ndizvo zvandambokutaurirai pakutanga." 
John8:26 Ndine zvizhinji zvandingataure nezvenyu, uye ndine zvakawanda zvandingakupei mhosva nazvo. Asi iye akandituma ari pachokwadi saka ndinoparidza pasi pose zvandakanzwa kwaari.”" 
John8:27 Asi havana kunzwisisa kuti aivataurira nezvaBaba. 
John8:28 Naizvozvo Jesu akati kwavari, “Kana masimudza Mwanakomana womunhu ndipo pamuchaziva kuti, ‘Ndiri iye wandiri,’ uye kuti handiiti zvomusoro wangu asi kuti ndinotaura zvandinenge ndatoudzwawo naBaba." 
John8:29 Iye akandituma aneni. Haana kundisiya ndiri ndoga nokuti ndinogaroita zvinomufadza.” 
John8:30 Nokutaura kwaaiita ikoko vazhinji vakatenda maari. 
John8:31 Jesu akati kuna vaJudha vakanga vatenda maari, “Kana mukagara muchichengeta izwi rangu, muri vadzidzi vangu chaivo" 
John8:32 uye muchaziva chokwadi, uyezve chokwadi chichakupai rusununguko.”" 
John8:33 Vakamupindura vachiti, “Isu tiri zvizvarwa zvaAbhurahamu hatisati tambova varanda vomumwe munhu. Zvino ungagotaura sei uchiti muchawana rusununguko?”" 
John8:34 Jesu akavapindura achiti, “Zvechokwadi chaizvo, ndinoti kwamuri, munhu wose anopara chitadzo muranda wechitadzo." 
John8:35 Mumhuri, muranda mupfuuri chete, asi mwana ndewemo nokusingaperi." 
John8:36 Saizvozvo kana Mwanakomana akakupai rusununguko muchava norusununguko ruzere. 
John8:37 Ndinozviziva kuti muri zvizvarwa zvaAbhurahamu, asi munoda kundiuraya nokuti izwi rangu hariwani nzvimbo mamuri." 
John8:38 Ini ndinotaura zvandakaona kuna Baba vangu. Imiwo munoita zvamakanzwa kunababa venyu.” 
John8:39 Vakamupindurawo vachiti, “Abhurahamu ndivo Baba vedu.” Jesu akavati, “Dai muri vana vaAbhurahamu mungadai muchiita zvaiitwa naAbhurahamu." 
John8:40 Asi zvino munoda kundiuraya; ini ndiri munhu akakutaurirai chokwadi chandakanzwa kuna Mwari. Izvi hazvisirizvo zvaiitwa naAbhurahamu. 
John8:41 Imi munoita zvinoitwa nababa venyu.” Ivo vakati kwaari, “Isu hatisi vana vomusango. Tina Baba mumwechete, iye Mwari pachake.”" 
John8:42 Jesu wakavati, “Dai Mwari ari Baba venyu mungadai muchindida nokuti Mwari ndiye dzinde rokwandinobva. Handina kungouyawo zvomusoro wangu asi iye ndiye akandituma." 
John8:43 Hamunzwisisi sei zvandinotaura? Chikonzero ndechokuti imi hamudi kunzwa zvandinoreva. 
John8:44 Imi muri vana vababa venyu Dhiabhori uye chamakasarudza, kuita zvinodiwa nababa venyu. Iye akanga ari mhondi kubvira pakutanga, uye haanei nechokwadi nokuti maari hamuna chokwadi. Kana achireva nhema, ari kutotaura maererano nezvaari nokuti iye munyepi uye ndibaba wamanyepo." 
John8:45 Pamusana pokuti ndinotaura chokwadi, hamunditendi." 
John8:46 Ndiani pakati penyu anganditi ndine mhosva yechitadzo? Ko zvino kana ndichitaura chokwadi ngei musingatendi mandiri. 
John8:47 Munhu waMwari anonzwa zvinotaurwa naMwari nezvo imi hamuzvinzwi nokuti hamusi vanhu vaMwari.” 
John8:48 VaJudha vakamupindura vachiti, “Hatina kutaura chokwadi here isu kuti iwe uri muSamaria, uye kuti una mweya wakaipa?”" 
John8:49 Jesu akapindura achiti, “Ini handina mweya wakaipa. Ini ndinoremekedza Baba vangu asi imi munondishora." 
John8:50 Asi ini handitsvaki mbiri yangu asi aripo mumwe anonditsvakira iyeyo ndiye achava mutongi. 
John8:51 Zvechokwadi chokwadi ndinoti kwamuri munhu akachengeta shoko rangu haambofa akaona rufu.” 
John8:52 VaJudha vakati kwaari, “Zvino tava kuziva kuti une mweya wakaipa Abhurahamu; akafa vaporofitawo vakafa; asi iwe unoti munhu akachengeta shoko rangu haambofa akaona rufu." 
John8:53 Uri mukuru here pana baba vedu Abhurahamu akafa iwe uye vaporofita vakafa? Unozviti ani iwe?” 
John8:54 Jesu akati, “Ini ndikazvirumbidza mbiri yangu haina maturo, Baba vangu ndivo vanondirumbidza, ivo vamunoti ndivo Mwari wenyu." 
John8:55 Imi hamundizivi asi ini ndinovaziva. Kana ndikati handizivi, ndingatova munyepi semi; asi ini ndinovaziva uye ndinochengeta izwi ravo." 
John8:56 Tateguru venyu Abhurahamu vakafarira kuti dai aizongoonawo nguva yangu akaiona akafara.” 
John8:57 VaJudha vakati kwaari, “Iwe hausati wava namakore makumi mashanu ndopaungati wakaona Abhurahamu iwe?”" 
John8:58 Jesu akavati, “Zvechokwadi chaizvo Abhurahamu asati ambovapo INI NDIRI.”" 
John8:59 Naizvozvo vakanonga matombo kuti vamutake nawo asi Jesu akavanda akabva abuda muTemberi. 
John9:1 Jesu paakanga achipfuura zvake akaona munhu akaberekwa ari bofu. 
John9:2 Vadzidzi vake vakamubvunza vachiti, “Nhai Mudzidzisi ndiani akatadza, munhu uyu kana kuti vabereki vake zvakaita kuti aberekwe ari bofu?”" 
John9:3 Jesu akapindura achiti, “Haasi munhu uyu akatadza kana kuti vabereki vake, asi zvakaitirwa kuti mabasa aMwari aoneswe maari." 
John9:4 “Tinofanira kuita mabasa euyo akandituma kuchakachena. Usiku huri kuuya hwokuti hapana anozokwanisa kushanda. 
John9:5 Kana ndichiri pasi pano ndini chiedza chapasi.” 
John9:6 Paakataura izvi akasvipira pasi, akakanya tudhaka ndokutwuisa pamaziso omunhu uya" 
John9:7 akamuti, “Chienda undoshamba mudziva reSiroamu” (zvinoreva kutumwa.) Ipapo akaenda akashamba akauya avakuona." 
John9:8 Vavakidzani naye navamwe vaimbomuona achipemha vakati, “Uyu haasiri munhu uya here aigara pasi achipemha?”" 
John9:9 Vamwe vakati, “Ndiye.” Vamwewo vakati, “Kwete akangofanana naye.” Asi iye akati, “Ndini.”" 
John9:10 Vakati kwaari, “Ko maziso ako akazarurwa sei?”"
