John9:11 Iye akapindura achiti, “Munhu anonzi Jesu akanya tudhaka akazora maziso angu akanditi, ‘Enda kudziva reSiroamu ushambe.’ Saizvozvowo ndaenda ndikashamba ndikabva ndavakuona.”" 
John9:12 Vakati, “Ko zvino ari kupi?” Iye ndokuti, “Handizivi.”" 
John9:13 Vakaunza kuvaFarisei munhu uya akanga ari bofu. 
John9:14 Zvino waiva musi weSabata Jesu paakakanya tudhaka akamuzarura maziso ake. 
John9:15 VaFarisei vakamubvunzazve kuti aoneswa sei. Iye akavati aisa tudhaka pamaziso angu ndikashamba, zvino ndava kuona." 
John9:16 Vamwe vaFarisei vakati, “Munhu uyu haabvi kuna Mwari nokuti haachengeti Sabata.” Vamwewo vakati, “Zvingaitike sei kuti munhu mutadzi aite zviratidzo zvakadai?” Pakabva pamuka nharo pakati pavo." 
John9:17 Naizvozvo, vakatizve kubofu riya, “Ko iwe unotii nezvake zvaakusvinudza maziso.” Iye akati, “Munhu uyu muporofita.”" 
John9:18 VaJudha havana kudavira kuti akambenge ari bofu. Uye kuti akanga asvinudzwa maziso kusvikira vatodaidza vabereki vomunhu uya akanga asvinudzwa maziso. 
John9:19 Vakavabvunza kuti, “Uyu mwana wenyu here uyu wamungati akaberekwa ari bofu; ko zvaitika sei kuti zvino avakuona?”" 
John9:20 Vabereki vake vakapindurawo vachiti, “Chatinoziva isu ndechokuti, uyu mwanakomana wedu, uye kuti akaberekwa ari bofu." 
John9:21 Asi zvokuti iye zvino ava kuona sei isu hatizvizivi kana kuzivawo kuti ndiani wamusvinudza maziso. Mubvunzei iye, inga abve zero wani. Anozvidavirira.”" 
John9:22 Vabereki vake vakadaro pamusana pokuti vaitya vaJudha nokuti vaJudha vakanga vatorangana kuti munhu anenge angoti iye ndiye Mesia anofanira kudzingwa muSinagogu. 
John9:23 Ndokusaka vabereki vake vakati, “Inga abve zero wani, mubvunzei iye.”" 
John9:24 Naizvozvo vakadaidzazve kechipiri munhu uya akaberekwa ari bofu vakamuti, “Iwe remekedza Mwari, isu tinoziva kuti munhu uyu mutadzi.”" 
John9:25 Iye akapindura achiti, “Zvokuti mutadzi ini handizvizivi asi chandinoziva chimwechete chokuti ini ndanga ndiri bofu, zvino ndavakuona.”" 
John9:26 Vakati kwaari, “Chii chaaita kwauri. Akusvinudza maziso ako sei?”" 
John9:27 Iye akavapindura achiti, “Inga ndakutaurirai kare wani, mukaramba kuteerera. Munodirei kuzvinzwa zvakare? Asi mavakudawo kuva vadzidzi vake nhai?”" 
John9:28 Vakabva vamunyomba vachiti, “Iwe ndiwe ungatova mudzidzi wake isu tiri vadzidzi vaMosesi." 
John9:29 Isu tinoziva kuti Mwari akataura kuna Mosesi. Asi zvomunhu uyu, hatizivi kwaanobva.”" 
John9:30 Munhu uya akavapindura achiti, “Apokaapo, izvi zvinoshamisa izvi, heya hamuzivi kwaanobva asi iye andisvinudza maziso angu?" 
John9:31 Tinoziva kuti Mwari haateeri vatadzi, asi kana munhu ari munamati waMwari, uye achiita kuda kwake, Mwari anomunzwa." 
John9:32 Kubvira pakutanga kwapasi, hakuna kumbonzwika kuti pane akambozarura maziso omunhu akazvarwa ari bofu." 
John9:33 Dai munhu uyu anga asingabvi kuna Mwari hapana chaaikwanisa kuita.” 
John9:34 Vakati kwaari, “Iweka iwe, chiberekerwo chako uri mutadzi chaiyeiye. Ndiwe ungade kutidzidzisa iyewe.” Vakabva vamudzinga." 
John9:35 Jesu akazvinzwa kuti vamutandanisa. Paakamuona akamuti, “Unotenda here muna Mwanakomana womunhu?”" 
John9:36 Iye akapindura achiti, “Ndiani iyeyo nhai, changamire kuti nditende maari.”" 
John9:37 Jesu akamuti, “Wamuona, ndini iye uno ari kutaura kwauri.”" 
John9:38 Iye akati, “Tenzi ndinotenda,” akabva amugwadamira." 
John9:39 Jesu ndokubva ati: “Ndakauya kuti vanhu vazvitongese kuti vasingaoni vaone uye kuti vanoona varege kuona.” 
John9:40 Vamwe vaFarisei vakanga vari pedyo naye vakazvinzwa, vakati kwaari, “Nesuwo tiri mapofu here isu?”" 
John9:41 Jesu akati kwavari, “Dai muri mapofu mungadai musina mhosva. Asi zvino zvamunoti tinoona mhosva yenyu inongoramba iripo.”" 
John10:1 Zvechokwadi chokwadi ndinoti kwamuri, “Asingapindi napamusuo pedanga rehwai asi achikwira napamwe munhu iyeyo imbavha negororo." 
John10:2 Asi anopinda napamusuo ndiye mufudzi wehwai. 
John10:3 Muchengeti wapasuo guru, anomuzarurira musuo; uye hwai dzinonzwa izwi rake. Anodaidza hwai dzake namazita achidzitungamirira kunze." 
John10:4 Kana achinge adziburitsa dzose panze, anodzitungamirira uye hwai dzinomutevera nokuti dzinoziva izwi rake." 
John10:5 Mweni hadzimuteveri, asi dzinotomutiza nokuti hadzizivi izwi ravaenzi.”" 
John10:6 Jesu akavashandisira muenzaniso uyu, asi ivo havana kunzwisisa zvaaireva kwavari." 
John10:7 Ipapo Jesu akatizve kwavari, ndinoti kwamuri, “Idi chaizvo ini ndini musuo wehwai." 
John10:8 Vose vakanditangira dzaiva mbavha namakororo asi hwai hadzina kuvateerera. 
John10:9 Ini ndini musuo. Anopinda napandiri achaponeswa; achapinda nokubuda zvake achiwana mafuro. 
John10:10 Mbavha inouya chete kuzoba, nokuzouraya nokuparadza, ini ndakauya kuti vanhu vawane upenyu, uye kuti vawane upenyu huzere." 
John10:11 Ini ndini mufudzi wakanaka mufudzi wakanaka anofira hwai dzake. 
John10:12 Muronzerwi, asiri mufudzi uye asiri muridzi wehwai akaona mhumhi ichiuya anosiya hwai dziya achitiza, mhumhi inobvuta hwai; dzimwe dzigoti mwanda kupararira." 
John10:13 Anotiza nokuti muronzerwi chete uye haana hanya nehwai. 
John10:14 Ini ndini mufudzi wakanaka ndinoziva hwai dzangu uye hwai dzangu dzinondizivawo 
John10:15 sokundiziva kunoita Baba, iniwo ndinoziva Baba, ndokusaka ndichiparadza upenyu hwangu kuitira hwai." 
John10:16 Ndine dzimwe hwai dzisiri dzedanga rino ndinofanira kudziunzawo. Idzo dzichanzwawo izwi rangu saizvozvo kuchava nedanga rimwechete nomufudzi mumwechete. 
John10:17 Baba vanondida pamusana pokuti ndinoparadza upenyu hwangu kuti ndizougamuchirazve. 
John10:18 Hapana anonditorera, kuhuparadza kwandinoita kutoda kwangu zvangu. Ndinesimba rokuhuparadza uye ndinesimba rokuti ndive noupenyu zvakare. Ndizvo zvandakaudzwa kuti ndiite nababa vangu.”" 
John10:19 Pakabva pamuka nharo pakati pavaJudha pamusana pamazwi aya. 
John10:20 Vazhinji vavo vakati, “Ane mweya wakaipa uye anopenga sei muchimuteerera.”" 
John10:21 Vamwewo vakati, “Uku hakusi iko kutaura kwomunhu ane Mweya wakaipa. Mweya wakaipa ungazarure maziso ebofu here?”" 
John10:22 Paiva pazuva rokurangarira zuva guru reChenura kuJerusaremu. Yaiva iri nguva yechando. 
John10:23 Jesu aifamba zvake paTemberi muberere raSoromoni. 
John10:24 Saka vaJudha vakamuunganira vakamuti, “Unoda kuti timirire kusvikira riniko? Kana uriwe Mesia tiudze pachena.”" 
John10:25 Jesu akavapindura achiti, “Ndakakutaurirai asi hamutendi mabasa andinoita muzita raBaba vangu anondipupurira." 
John10:26 Asi imi hamutendi nokuti hamusi hwai dzangu. 
John10:27 Hwai dzangu dzinonzwa izwi rangu, uye ndinodziziva uyewo dzinonditevera." 
John10:28 Iniwo ndinodzipa upenyu husingaperi, saizvozvo hadzimbofa dzakaparara. Hakuna angadzibvute mumaoko mangu." 
John10:29 Baba vangu vakadzipa kwandiri vakuru kupinda ani zvake uye hapana anogona kudzibvuta mumaoko aBaba. 
John10:30 Ini naBaba tiri mumwechete.” 
John10:31 VaJudha vakatorazve matombo kuti vamutake nawo. 
John10:32 Jesu akavapindura achiti, “Ndakakuratidzai mabasa mazhinji akanaka anobva kuna Baba; amunonditakira ndaapi ipapa?”" 
John10:33 VaJudha vakamupindura vachiti, “Hatisi kukutakira basa rakanaka asi kushonha Mwari nokuti iwe uri munhu kudai asi uri kuzviita Mwari.”" 
John10:34 Jesu akavapindura achiti, “Hazvina kunyorwa here mumutemo wenyu zvichinzi, ‘Ndakati muri vanamwari.’" 
John10:35 Kana akavati ndavanamwari vaya vakavingwa nezwi raMwari. Saka Magwaro Matsvene haapikiswi. 
John10:36 Zvino munoti uyo akaitwa mutsvene naBaba, akatumwa pasi pano, uri kushonha Mwari nokuti ndati ndiri Mwanakomana waMwari." 
John10:37 Kana ndisiri kuita mabasa aBaba vangu regai zvenyu kunditenda. 
John10:38 Asi kana ndichiaita kunyange zvenyu musingatendi mandiri tendai mabasa kuti muzive uye munzwisise kuti Baba vari mandiri uye kuti Ini ndiri muna Baba.” 
John10:39 Vakaedzazve kumubata asi akapunyuka mumaoko avo. 
John10:40 Akaendazve kumhiri kwaJorodhani paya paimboombekera Johani pakutanga, akambogarako." 
John10:41 Vanhu vakawanda vakauya kwaari. Vakati, “Johani haana zvake kuita zvishamiso asi zvose zvakataurwa naJohani nezvomunhu uyu ndezvechokwadi.”" 
John10:42 Vazhinji vakabva vadavira maari ipapo. 
John11:1 Kwaiva nomumwe murume airwara ainzi Razaro wekuBhetania, mumusha waigara Maria nomukoma wake Marita." 
John11:2 Maria ndiye uya akambozora Jesu namafuta akapukuta tsoka dzake nevhudzi rake. Ndiye ane hanzvadzi yake Razaro airwara. 
John11:3 Hanzvadzi dzake dzakatuma shoko rokuti, “Tenzi mudikanwi wenyu kuno warwara.”" 
John11:4 Jesu paakazvinzwa akati, “Kurwara uku hakupereri murufu, ndekwekuratidza mbiri yaMwari, kuti Mwanakomana waMwari arumbidzwe nako.”" 
John11:5 Jesu aida Marita nomunun'una wake naRazaro. 
John11:6 Paakanzwa kuti ari kurwara akagara mamwe mazuva maviri kwaakanga ari ikoko. 
John11:7 Mushure maizvozvi akati kuna vadzidzi, “Handei zvakare kuJudhea.”" 
John11:8 Vadzidzi vake vakamuti, “Rabhi vaJudha vaida kutokutakai namabwe, ko zvino modzokerazve here ikoko?”" 
John11:9 Jesu akapindura achiti, “Handiti zuva rina maawa gumi namaviri here? Aninani anofamba masikati haagumburwi nokuti anenge achiona chiedza chapasi." 
John11:10 Asi munhu anofamba murima anoguhunwa nokuti maari hamuna mwenje.” 
John11:11 Akataura izvi ndokubva ati, “Shamwari yedu Razaro yakotsira asi ndinoenda kundomumutsa muhope.”" 
John11:12 Vadzidzi vake vakati kwaari, “Tenzi kana kuri kuti avata achanaya.”" 
John11:13 Ipapo Jesu ainge achitaura nezvorufu rwake. Asi ivo vakafunga kuti aireva kuvata hope chaidzo. 
John11:14 Jesu ndokuzovataurira pachena kuti “Razaro wafa. 
John11:15 Nokuda kwenyu ndinofara kuti ndakanga ndisiko kuti mudavire. Zvino ngatichiendai kwaari.” 
John11:16 Tomasi anonzi, Mapatya akati kuna vamwe vake, vadzidzi “Handeiwo tindofa naye.”" 
John11:17 Jesu paakasvika akawana Razaro atova muguva kwamazuva mana. 
John11:18 Bhetania iri pedyo neJerusaremu, makiromita anenge matatu." 
John11:19 VaJudha vazhinji vakanga vauya kuna Marita naMaria kuzovabata maoko ehanzvadzi yavo. 
John11:20 Marita paakanzwa kuti Jesu avakusvika akaenda kundomuchingura Maria akagara mumba. 
John11:21 Marita akati kuna Jesu, “Tenzi dai makanga muri pano hanzvadzi yangu ingadai isina kufa." 
John11:22 Nyange iye zvino ndinoziva kuti chose chamunokumbira kuna Mwari, Mwari anokupai.”" 
John11:23 Jesu akati kwaari, “Hanzvadzi yako ichamukazve.”" 
John11:24 Marita akati kwaari, “Ndinoziva kuti achamukazve pakumuka, pazuva remhedziso.”" 
John11:25 Jesu akati kwaari, “Ndini kumuka nouupenyu. Anotenda mandiri kunyange akafa achava mupenyu." 
John11:26 Munhu anogara akabatana neni uye anotenda mandiri haazombofa. Unotenda here izvi?” 
John11:27 Akati kwaari, “Hongu, Tenzi chokwadi ndinotenda kuti ndimi Mesia. Mwanakomana waMwari anonzi achauya pasi pano.”" 
John11:28 Paakataura izvi akaenda akadaidza munun'una wake Maria chinyararire achiti, “Mudzidzisi ari pano uye anokudana.”" 
John11:29 Paakazvinzwa akabva asimuka nokukurumidza akaenda kwaari. 
John11:30 Ipapo Jesu akanga asati apinda mumusha iwoyo. Akanga achiri paya paakachingurana naMarita. 
John11:31 Naizvozvo vaJudha vakanga vaina Maria mumba vachimubata maoko, pavakamuona achisimuka nokukurumidza achibuda vakamutevera vachifunga kuti avakuenda kuguva kundochemako." 
John11:32 Maria paakasvika paiva naJesu akamuona akawira pasi patsoka dzake achiti, “Tenzi dai makanga muri pano, hanzvadzi yangu ingadai isina kufa.”" 
John11:33 Jesu paakamuona achichema uye vaJudha vaakauya navo vachichemawo, akashungurudzwa mwoyo akatambudzika." 
John11:34 Akati, “Makandomuradza kupi?” Vakati kwaari, “Tenzi, uyai muone zvenyu.”" 
John11:35 Jesu akachema. 
John11:36 VaJudha vakati, “Tarisai muone kumuda kwaaiita.”" 
John11:37 Vamwewo vakati, “Ko iye akasvinudza bofu maziso aitadza here kudzivirira munhu uyu kufa.”" 
John11:38 Jesu akashungurudzwazve mumwoyo zvakanyanya ndokubva asvika paguva rakanga riri bako rine ibwe pamuromo paro. Jesu akati, “Bvisai ibwe.”" 
John11:39 Marita, hanzvadzi yomufi, yakati kwaari, “Tenzi paari otonhuhwa nokuti atova namazuva mana akafa.”" 
John11:40 Jesu akati kwaari, “Handina here kumbokutaurira kuti ukatenda uchaona mbiri yaMwari.”" 
John11:41 Nokudaro vakabvisa ibwe riya. Jesu akatarisa kudenga akati, “Baba, ndinokutendai nokuti mandinzwa." 
John11:42 Ndinoziva kuti munondinzwa nguva dzose. Asi ndataura izvi kuitira vanhu vamire pano ava, vadavire kuti makandituma.”" 
John11:43 Paakataura izvi akazodaidzira nezwi guru achiti, “Razaro buda!”" 
John11:44 Mufi akabva abuda maoko ake namakumbo akamoneredzwa netumicheka uso hwake hwakanga hwakaputirwa nejira. Jesu akavati, “Musunungurei aende.”" 
John11:45 Naizvozvo vaJudha vazhinji vakanga vauya kuna Maria vakaona zvaakanga aita vakatenda maari. 
John11:46 Asi vamwe vavo vakaenda kuvaFarisei vakavataurira zvakanga zvaitwa naJesu. 
John11:47 Ipapo vakuru vakuru vavapristi navaFarisei vakaunganidza makurukota avo padare vakati, “Toita sei, nokuti munhu uyu anoita zviratidzo zvakawanda." 
John11:48 Tikamurega achidaro vose vachatenda maari, vaRoma vachauya vakaparadza Temberi iyi nerudzi rwedu.”" 
John11:49 Asi mumwe anonzi Kaifasi, aiva ari mupristi mukuru gore iroro akati kwavari, “Inga hamuna nechamunoziva," 
John11:50 hamuzivi kuti zvakanaka kwamuri kuti munhu mumwechete afire vanhu kuti rudzi rwose rwurege kuparara.” 
John11:51 Haana kutaura izvi nokuda kwake oga asi somupristi mukuru wegore iroro aiporofita kuti Jesu anofanira kufira rudzi. 
John11:52 Uye kwete kufira rudzi chete asi kukokorodza pamwechete vana vaMwari vakapararira kwose kwose. 
John11:53 Saizvozvo kubvira pazuva iroro vakarangana kuti vangamuuraye sei. 
John11:54 Naizvozvo Jesu haana kuzofamba pachena mukati mavaJudha. Akabvapo akaenda kunyika iri padyo nerenje kuguta rinonzi Efuremu. Akagara navadzidzi vake ikoko. 
John11:55 Izvozvo Pasika yavaJudha yakanga yava kusvika saka vanhu vazhinji vaibva kumaruwa vachikwira kuJerusaremu pasika isati yasvika vachindozvichenura. 
John11:56 Vaitsvaka Jesu vachitaurirana vamire muTemberi vachiti, “Munofungei nhaimi? Angarege here kuuya kuzuva guru.”" 
John11:57 Zvino vapristi vakuru navaFarisei vakanga vakomera kuti anenge angoziva kwaari anofanira kuvazivisa kuti vamusunge. 
John12:1 Mazuva matanhatu ePasika asati asvika Jesu akaenda kuBhetania kwaiva naRazaro waakanga amutsa muvafi. 
John12:2 Vakamuitira mabiko ikoko Marita ndiye aivashandira. Razaro ainge ari mumwe wavaidya naye pateburu. 
John12:3 Maria akatora hafu yerita yamafuta anokosha enadi chaiyoiyo akazora nawo tsoka dzaJesu akapukuta tsoka dzake nevhudzi rake. Imba yakazara nokunhuwirira kwamafuta iwayo. 
John12:4 Asi Judhasi mumwe wavadzidzi vake, uya akanga achazomupandukira akati:" 
John12:5 “Mafuta aya aregerereiko kutengeswa nemari yesirivha yedhenariusi inoita mazana matatu yapihwa kuvarombo?” 
John12:6 Akataura izvi kwete pamusana pokuti aiva nehanya navarombo asi pamusana pokuti aiva mbavha. Sezvaakanga ari iye sahomwe aipota achitorawo imwe. 
John12:7 Jesu akati, “Muregei henyu, dai anga atoachengetera zvake zuva rokuvigwa kwangu." 
John12:8 Varombo munavo nguva dzose asi ini hamuneni nguva dzose.” 
John12:9 Gungano guru ravaJudha parakanzwa kuti Jesu akanga ariko rakauya kwete pamusana paJesu chete asi kuzoonawo Razaro waakanga amutsa kuvafi. 
John12:10 Naizvozvo vapristi vakuru vakarangana kuurayawo Razaro. 
John12:11 Chikonzero chacho chiri chokuti nokuda kwake vaJudha vazhinji vakanga vavakubva vachinotenda muna Jesu. 
John12:12 Zuva ramangwana racho gungano guru ravanhu rakanga rauya kuzuva guru rakanzwa kuti Jesu ari kuuya kuJerusaremu. 
John12:13 Nokudaro vakakwanhura mapazi omurara vakaenda kundomugamuchira vachidaidzira vachiti, “Hosana, ngaarumbidzwe iye anouya muzita raTenzi ndiye mambo weIsiraeri.”" 
John12:14 Jesu akawona chigondora chedhongi akachitasva sokunyorwa kwazvakaitwa zvichinzi," 
John12:15 “Usatye zvako iwe mukunda weZioni, tarisa uone mambo wako ari kuuya akatasva pachigondora chedhongi.”" 
John12:16 Pakutanga vadzidzi vake, izvi havana kuzvinzwisisa. Asi Jesu paakawana mukurumbira wake ndopavakayeuka kuti izvi zvakambenge zvakanyorwa nezvake uye kuti ndizvo zvakanga zvaitika kwaari." 
John12:17 Chikwata chavanhu chakanga chinaye paakadaidza Razaro muguva akamumutsa muvafi, chakamupupurira." 
John12:18 Chakaendera chikwata ichocho kundomuchingura, ndechokuti vakanga vanzwa kuti akanga aita chiratidzo ichocho." 
John12:19 VaFarisei vakataurirana kuti, “Chitarisaika muone. Hapana chamunombogona kuita. Onai nyika yotomutevera.”" 
John12:20 Pakati pevanhu vakaenda kundonamata kuzuva guru paiva navamwe vaGiriki. 
John12:21 Ivava vakaenda kuna Firipi aibva kuBhetisaidha muGarirea vakati kwaari, “Changamire tinodawo kuona Jesu.”" 
John12:22 Firipi akaenda akandotaurira Andireya. Andireya akaenda naFiripi vakandoudza Jesu. 
John12:23 Jesu akavapindura achiti, “Nguva yasvika yokuti Mwanakomana womunhu zvino achiwana mukurumbira." 
John12:24 Zvechokwadi chaizvo ndinoti kwamuri kusatoti tsanga yekoroni yawira muvhu ikafa inoramba ichingova yoga asi ikafa inobereka muchero wakawanda. 
John12:25 Anoda upenyu hwake anorasikirwa naho, asi uyo anovenga upenyu hwake pasi pano anohuchengeta kusvikira kuhupenyu husingaperi." 
John12:26 Anoda kundishandira, anofanira kunditevera, kwandinenge ndiri, mushandi wangu ndokwaanofanirawo kuva. Munhu akandishandira, Baba vachamukudza." 
John12:27 “Iye zvino ndiri kushushikana mumwoyo Ndoti kudiiko? Baba ndipunyutseiwo kunguva iyi asi aiwa, inga zvenguva iyi ndizvo zvandakavinga wani." 
John12:28 Baba rumbidzai zita renyu.” Ipapo izwi rakabva kudenga richiti, “Ndakarirumbidza uye ndicharirumbidzazve.”" 
John12:29 Chikwata chavanhu chakanga chiripo chakazvinzwa. Vakati, “Kwatinhira,” vamwewo vakati, “Mutumwa waMwari ataura kwaari.”" 
John12:30 Jesu akapindura achiti, “Izwi iri rauyira imi kwete ini.”" 
John12:31 Zvino kutongwa kwapasi pano kwasvika. Zvino mutongi wapasi pano ava kudzingirwa kunze. 
John12:32 Iniwo kana ndarembedzwa pamusoro payo nyika, ndichakwezvera vanhu vose kwandiri." 
John12:33 Akataura izvi achiratidza rufu rwaaizofa narwo. 
John12:34 Gungano rakamupindura richiti, “Isu takanzwa muMutemo kuti Mesia achagara nokusingaperi. Ko zvino ungati sei Mwanakomana womunhu anofanira kuti asimudzwe. Ndianiko Mwanakomana womunhu iyeyo?”" 
John12:35 Jesu akavati, “Mwenje uchinemi kwechinguvana fambai muchine mwenje iwoyo kudai, mungadaro mukawirwa nerima. Anofamba murima haazivi kwaanoenda." 
John12:36 Muchine mwenje kudai tendai mumwenje kuti muve vana vechiedza.” Jesu paakapedza kutaura izvi akabva akandozvivanza kwavari. 
John12:37 Kunyange zvazvo akaita zviratidzo zvizhinji pamberi pavo asi havana kutenda maari. 
John12:38 Zvakaitika kuti zvakataurwa nomuporofita Isaya zvizadziswe zvokuti, “Tenzi ndiani akatenda zvatakataura simba raMwari rakaratidzwa kunaani?”" 
John12:39 Naizvozvo havana kugona kutenda nokuti Isaya anotizve," 
John12:40 “Akavapofomadza maziso akavagomadza mwoyo kuti zvimwe vangadaro vakaona namaziso avo vakanzwisisa nemwoyo yavo vakapindukira kwandiri ndikavaporesa.” 
John12:41 Isaya akataura izvi nokuti akaona mbiri yake akataura nezvake. 
John12:42 Zvakadaro zvazvo vanhu vazhinji, kunyange vakuru vakuru vakadavira maari. Asi pamusana pokutya vaFarisei havana kugona kuzvidura pachena kuri kutya kuti vangadzingwe muSinagogu." 
John12:43 Chikonzero chacho chaiva chokuti vaida kurumbidzwa navanhu kupinda kurumbidzwa naMwari. 
John12:44 Jesu akadaidzira achiti, “Anodavira mandiri haadaviri mandiri asi muna iye akandituma." 
John12:45 Uyo anondiona anoona iye akandituma. 
John12:46 Ndakauya sechiedza pasi pano kuti ani naani anotenda mandiri arege kugara murima. 
John12:47 Ani naaniwo anonzwa zvandinotaura asingazvichengete handimupi mhosva nokuti handina kuuya kuzopa pasi mhosva asi kuzoponesa pasi. 
John12:48 Anondiramba uye asingagamuchiri zvandinotaura ane anomutonga. Zvandakataura izvozvo ndizvo zvichamutonga pazuva remhedziso. 
John12:49 Nokuti handina kutaura zvomusoro wangu. Baba vakandituma ndivo vakanditemera zvandinofanira kutaura nezvandinofanira kureva. 
John12:50 Ndinozivawo kuti mutemo wavo ndiwo upenyu husingaperi, saka zvandinotaura, ndinotaura sokuudzwa kwandakaitwa naBaba.”" 
John13:1 Zuva rePasika risati rasvika Jesu akaziva kuti nguva yake yokusiya pasi achienda kuna Baba yakanga yasvika. Akada vake vakanga vari pasi pano akavada zvokupedzerera. 
John13:2 Zvavakanga vari pakudya kwamauro Dhiabhori akanga atoisa muna Judhasi Isikarioti, mwana waSimoni pfungwa yokumupandukira." 
John13:3 Jesu aizviziva kuti Baba vakanga vaisa zvinhu zvose mumaoko ake, uye kuti akabva kuna Mwari uyezve kuti akanga avakudzokera kuna Mwari." 
John13:4 Naizvozvo akasimuka pakudya akabvisa hanzu yake yepamusoro ndokumonera tauro muchiuno. 
John13:5 Akadira mvura mudhishi akatangisa kushambidza tsoka dzavadzidzi achidzipukuta netauro riya raakanga akazvimonera naro. 
John13:6 Paakasvika pana Simoni Pita, Pita akati kwaari, “Nhai Tenzi ndimi mungashambidze tsoka dzangu here imi?”" 
John13:7 Jesu akamupindura achiti, “Zvandiri kuita haungazvizivi iye zvino asi uchazozvinzwisisa pashure.”" 
John13:8 Pita akati kwaari, “Hamumbofa makashambidza tsoka dzangu.” Jesu akamudaira achiti, “Kana ndisingakushambidze iwe unenge usisina chokuita neni.”" 
John13:9 Simoni Pita akabva ati kwaari, “Tenzi, kwete tsoka dzangu chete asi maoko angu nomusoro wanguwo.”" 
John13:10 Jesu akamuti, “Munhu anenge ashamba muviri haana chaanofanira kushambazve kusiya tsoka dzake bedzi nokuti anenge akachena muviri wose. Imi makachena asi kwete mose.”" 
John13:11 Akadaro nokuti aiziva aizomutengesa. Ndokusaka akati hamusi mose makachena. 
John13:12 Paakapedza kuvashambidza tsoka dzavo akapfeka gemenzi rake riya akagara panzvimbo yake akavati: “Munoziva here zvandaita kwamuri? 
John13:13 Munonditi Mudzidzisi uye Tenzi; ndizvozvo chaizvo nokuti ndizvozvo zvandiri. 
John13:14 Zvino kana ini Tenzi nomudzidzisi wenyu ndakushambidzai tsoka kudai, imi munofanira kushambidzanawo tsoka." 
John13:15 Nokuti ndatokupai muenzaniso izvozvi kuti muitewo zvandakuitirai. 
John13:16 “Chokwadi chokwadi ndinoti kwamuri mushandi haasi mukuru kupfuura waanoshandira kana anotumwa pane anomutuma. 
John13:17 “Kana muchiziva zvinhu izvi muchakomborerwa kana mukazviita. 
John13:18 Handisi kureva mose; ndinoziva ini vandakasarudza kuti vanhui, uku kuti Magwaro Matsvene azadziswe anoti, “ ‘Wandinodya naye mundiro akandimukira.’" 
John13:19 Ndiri kukutaurirai izvi iye zvino zvisati zvaitika kuti kana zvoitika mutende kuti ndini iye ari. 
John13:20 Zvechokwadi chokwadi ndinoti kwamuri, ‘Anogamuchira wandinotuma anogamuchira ini. Anondigamuchirawo anogamuchira akandituma.’ ”" 
John13:21 Jesu paakataura izvi akashushikana mumwoyo akadura pachena achiti, “Zvechokwadi chaizvo ndinoti kwamuri mumwe wenyu achandipandukira.”" 
John13:22 Vadzidzi vake vakatarisana vasingazivi kuti ndiani waaireva. 
John13:23 Mumwe wavadzidzi vake wapamwoyo akanga akazembera pachipfuva chaJesu. 
John13:24 Ipapo Simoni Pita akaninira kwaari kuti, “Tiudze kuti ndiani waari kureva.”" 
John13:25 Akazembera kudai, munyasi mechipfuwa chaJesu, akati kwaari, “Tenzi ndianiko iyeyo?”" 
John13:26 Jesu akapindura achiti, “Ndouyo wandichapa musuva uyu ndauseva.” Saizvozvo akaseva musuva uya akaupa kuna Judhasi mwana waSimoni Isikarioti." 
John13:27 Paakatambira musuva iwoyo Satani akapinda maari Jesu ndokumuti, “Zvauri kuda kuita chikurumidza kuzviita.”" 
John13:28 Kune vaiva pakudya hapana akaziva kuti akataurirei izvi. 
John13:29 Vamwe vakafunga kuti, somunhu, aichengeta tsapo yemari Jesu aimutaurira kuti, “Enda undotenga zvatinoda pazuva guru kana kuti ape chimwe chinhu kuvarombo.”" 
John13:30 Paakangogamuchira musuva uya akabva abuda pakarepo. Hwakanga hwava husiku. 
John13:31 Pakabuda Judhasi, Jesu akati, “Zvino Mwanakomana womunhu awaniswa mbiri uye maari Mwari anowaniswa mbiri." 
John13:32 Kana Mwari awaniswa mbiri maari Mwariwo achamuwanisa mbiri maari iye pachake achibva amuwanisa mbiri iyoyo pakarepo. 
John13:33 Vanangu, ndichinemi kwechinguvana; muchanditsvaka, asi sezvandakataurira vaJudha, ndizvowo zvandinokutaurirai kwandirikuenda, imi hamukwanisi kuuyako." 
John13:34 Asi ndinokupai mutemo mutsva unoti, ‘Idanai.’ Sokukudai kwandakaita, imi idanaiwo." 
John13:35 Naizvozvo vanhu vose vachaziva kuti muri vadzidzi vangu kana muchidanana.” 
John13:36 Simoni Pita akati kwaari, “Tenzi muri kuenda kupi?” Jesu akapindura achiti, “Kwandiri kuenda haugone kunditevera zvino asi uchanditevera zvako gare gare.”" 
John13:37 Pita akati kwaari, “Tenzi ndinotadza nei kukuteverai zvino? Ini ndinosarudza kukufirai.”" 
John13:38 Jesu akapindura achiti, “Heya unosarudza kundifira iwe? Zvechokwadi chokwadi ndinoti kwauri Jongwe rinosara zvaro rokukuridza iwe unenge watondiramba katatu.”" 
John14:1 “Mwoyo yenyu ngairenge kutambudzika tendai muna Mwari mutendewo mandiri. 
John14:2 Mumba maBaba vangu kune dzimba dzakawanda dai kwakanga kusina ndingadai ndakakuudzai. Ndiri kuendako kundokugadzirirai pokugara. 
John14:3 Kana ndandokugadzirirai pokugara ndichauyazve ndozokutorai kuti kwandichange ndiri, imi muvekowo." 
John14:4 Nzira yokwandinoenda munoiziva.” 
John14:5 Tomasi akati kwaari, “Tenzi hatizivi kwamuri kuenda tingazive sei nzira yoko?”" 
John14:6 Jesu akamuti kwaari, “Ndini nzira nechokwadi noupenyu. Hapana anosvika kuna Baba asina kuuya nokwandiri." 
John14:7 Dai maindiziva maizivawo Baba vangu asi kubvira zvino mavakuvaziva uye makavaona.” 
John14:8 Firipi akati, “Tenzi tiratidzei Baba tinobva tagutsikana.”" 
John14:9 Jesu akati kwaari, “Nhai Firipi, ko zvandagarazve nguva ndefu yakadai nemi, nanhasi wose haundizivi? Inga wani akaona ini akaona Baba. Zvino ungagoti seiko tiratidzei Baba?" 
John14:10 Haudaviri here kuti ndiri muna Baba uye kuti Baba vari mandiri. Zvandinotaura kwamuri hazvisi zvomusoro wangu asi kuti Baba vanogara mandiri ndivo vanenge vachiita mabasa avo. 
John14:11 Nditendei kuti ini ndiri muna Baba uye kuti Baba vari mandiri kana kuti nditendei nokuda kwamabasa pachawo. 
John14:12 “Zvechokwadi chokwadi ndinoti kwamuri, anotenda mandiri achaitawo mabasa andinoita uye achaita mabasa akatokura kupinda aya nokuti ndava kuenda kuna Baba." 
John14:13 Chiri chose chamunokumbira muzita rangu ndichachiita kuti Baba varumbidzwe muMwanakomana. 
John14:14 Kana mukakumbira chii zvacho muzita rangu ini ndichachiita. 
John14:15 “Kana muchindida, muchachengeta mitemo yangu." 
John14:16 Iniwo ndichakumbira Baba, ivo vachakupai mumwe Murevereri achava nemi nokusingaperi." 
John14:17 Ndiye uya Mweya wechokwadi iyeyo pasi pano hapagoni kumugamuchira nokuti hapamuoni kana kumuziva; imi munomuziva nokuti anogara nemi uye achava mamuri. 
John14:18 “Handikusiyei muri nherera ndichauyazve kwamuri. 
John14:19 Kwasara chinguvana chiduku, pasi hapazondiona. Asi imi muchandiona zvenyu pamusana pokuti ini ndiri mupenyu imiwo muchava vapenyu." 
John14:20 Ipapo ndipo pamuchaziva kuti ini ndiri muna Baba vangu imi muri mandiri iniwo ndiri mamuri. 
John14:21 Munhu ane mitemo yangu achiichengeta, ndiye munhu anondida; uyo anondida achadidawo naBaba vangu iniwo ndichazviratidza kwaari.”" 
John14:22 Judhasi, kwete Isikarioti, akati kwaari, “Tenzi nemhaka yei muchizviratidza kwatiri musingazviratidzi kunyika.”" 
John14:23 Jesu akamupindura achiti, “Kana munhu achindida anochengeta izwi rangu Baba vangu vachamuda tozobva touya kwaari toita musha wedu maari." 
John14:24 Munhu asingandidi haachengeti mazwi angu, izwi ramuri kunzwa harisi rangu asi kuti nderaBaba vakandituma." 
John14:25 “Zvinhu izvi ndazvitaura kwamuri ndichinemi. 
John14:26 Asi Murevereri uya, Mweya Mutsvene achatumwa naBaba muzita rangu, iye achakudzidzisai zvinhu zvose achikuyeuchidzai zvose zvandakataura kwamuri." 
John14:27 Ndinokusiirai rugare, ndinokupai rugare rwangu. Handikupei sokupa kunoita nyika. Mwoyo yenyu ngairege kutambudzika uye ngairege kutya." 
John14:28 Mandinzwa ndichiti kwamuri ndiri kuenda, ndichauyazve kwamuri. Dai muchindida mungadai matofara kwazvo kuti ndiri kuenda kuna Baba nokuti Baba vakuru kwandiri." 
John14:29 Zvino ndakutaurirai izvi zvisati zvaitika kuti kana zvoitika mutendhe. 
John14:30 Handichataura nemi zvakawanda nokuti mutongi wapasi pano ari kuuya asi hapana chaanondiita. 
John14:31 Asi ini ndinoita zvandakaudzwa naBaba kuti pasi pazive kuti ndinoda Baba. Chisimukai tiende.” 
John15:1 “Ini ndini mugirepisi wechokwadi Baba vangu ndivo murimi. 
John15:2 Bazi rimwe nerimwe risingabereki muchero vanoribvisa. Uye bazi rimwe nerimwe rinobereka muchero, vanoripemhena kuti ribereke muchero wakawanda." 
John15:3 Imi makatonatswa nokupemhenwa nezwi randakakutaurirai. 
John15:4 Garai mandiri neniwo ndichigara mamuri. Bazi zvarisingakwanisi kubereka muchero nokwaro roga risina kubatanidzwa nomugirepisi ndizvozvowo zvinemi hamukwanisi kubereka muchero kana musiri mandiri. 
John15:5 Ini ndini mugirepisi imi ndimi mapazi acho. Anogara mandiri ndichagarawo maari iyeyo ndiye anobereka muchero wakawanda, nokuti musineni hapana chamunogona kuita." 
John15:6 Kana munhu asingagari mandiri akaita sebazi rakadimburwa, rinouna. Mapazi akadai anounganidzwa okandwa mumoto opiswa." 
John15:7 Mukaramba muri mandiri mazwi anguwo akaramba ari mamuri kumbirai zvenyu chamunenge muchida muchachiitirwa. 
John15:8 Baba vangu vanorumbidzwa nezvizvi zvokuti mubereke michero yakawanda muchiratidza nazvo kuti muri vadzidzi vangu. 
John15:9 Sokundida kwakaita Baba ndokukudaiwo kwandakaita. Rambai muri murudo rwangu. 
John15:10 Kana mukachengeta mitemo yangu, mucharamba muri murudo neni sokuchengetawo kwandakaita mitemo yaBaba vangu ndinoramba ndiri murudo navo." 
John15:11 Ndataura izvi kwamuri kuti rufaro rwangu ruve mamuri uyewo kuti rufaro rwenyu ruzare. 
John15:12 “Uyu ndiwo mutemo wangu wokuti: Idanai sokukudai kwandakaita. 
John15:13 Hakuna rudo runopfuura urwu rwokuti munhu anofira shamwari dzake. 
John15:14 Muri shamwari dzangu kana muchiita zvandinokuudzai. 
John15:15 Handicharamba ndichikutii varanda nokuti muranda haazivi zvinoitwa natenzi wake asi ndava kukutii shamwari nokuti ndakakuzivisai zvose zvandakanzwa kuna Baba vangu. 
John15:16 Hamuna kundisarudza, asi ini ndini ndakatokusarudzai ndikakupai basa rokuti muende mundobereka muchero uye kuti muchero wenyu uve unogara kuti chipi nechipi chamunokumbira Baba muzita rangu vakupei." 
John15:17 Mutemo wandinokutemerai ndouyu wokuti, idanai." 
John15:18 “Kana pasi pachikuvengai, zivai kuti pakandivengawo pasati pakuvengai imi." 
John15:19 Dai muri vapasi pano, pasi pangadai pachitokudai savanhu vapo. Asi pamusana pokuti hamusi vapasi pano, uye nokuti ndakakutsaurai kubva pasi pano, ndokusaka pasi pachikuvengai." 
John15:20 Rangarirai izwi randakutaurirai rokuti muranda haasiri mukuru pana tenzi wake. Kana vakandionesa nhamo, vachakuonesaiwo nhamo. Kana vakachengeta izwi rangu vachachengetawo renyu." 
John15:21 Zvose izvozvi vachazviita kwamuri pamusana pangu nokuti akandituma havamuzivi. 
John15:22 Dai ndisina kuuya ndikataura kwavari, vangadai vasina chitadzo; asi mhosva yechitadzo ichocho hapana pavachainzvenge napo." 
John15:23 Anondivenga anovengawo Baba vangu. 
John15:24 Dai ndisina kumboita pakati pavo mabasa asina kumboitwa nani nani zvake, vangadai vasina chitadzo. Asi zvino vakaaona vakabva vatovenga ini pamwechete naBaba vangu." 
John15:25 Izvi zvinozadzisa zvakanyorwa mumutemo wavo zvokuti, ‘Vakandivenga ini ndisina mhosva.’" 
John15:26 Asi Mubatsiri kana auya, wandichatuma kwamuri achibva kuna Baba iyeyo Mweya Wechokwadi anobva muna Baba; iye achandipupurira." 
John15:27 Kana imiwo muri zvapupu nokuti makanga muineni kubvira pakutanga.” 
John16:1 “Ndataura zvose izvi kwamuri kuti murege kurasika. 
John16:2 Vachakudzingai mumaSinagogu. Chokwadi, chokwadi nguva iri kuuya yokuti anokuurayai achafunga kuti ari kutoitira Mwari." 
John16:3 Vachaita izvozvo nokuti havana kuziva Baba kana kuziva ini. 
John16:4 Asi ndataura izvi kwamuri kuti kana nguva yazvo yosvika, muyeuke kuti ndakambokutaurirai nezvazvo. “Handina kunge ndichikutaurirai zvinhu izvi pakutanga nokuti ndanga ndiinemi." 
John16:5 Asi zvino ndavakuenda kuna akandituma. Hapana mumwe wenyu ari kumbondibvunza kuti ko muri kuenda kupi? 
John16:6 Asi pamusana pokuti ndataura izvi kwamuri masuruvara mwoyo zvikuru. 
John16:7 Zvakadaro zvazvo, ndinokuudzai chokwadi, chokuti zvinotokubatsirai kuti ndiende nokuti ndikarega kuenda, Murevereri uya haazouya; asi ndikaenda ndichamutumira kwamuri." 
John16:8 Paanouya achazivisa nyika kuti ine mhosva yechitadzo uye kuti ine mhosva pamafungiro ayo nezvoururami uyewo kuti ine mhosva panezvokutonga. 
John16:9 Panezve chitadzo, nokuti havadaviri mandiri." 
John16:10 Pane zvoururami, nokuti ini ndava kutoenda kuna Baba uye hamuzoramba muchindiona." 
John16:11 “Pane zvokutonga, nokuti mutongi wapasi pano ava kutotongwa." 
John16:12 “Ndine zvizhinji zvandingade kukutaurirai asi parizvino hamungakwanisani nazvo. 
John16:13 Kana Mweya wechokwadi auya achakutungamirirai muchokwadi chose, nokuti anenge asingatauri zvomusoro wake. Zvaanenge anzwa ndizvo zvaanotaura; achakutaurirai zvinhu zvichauya." 
John16:14 Achandiwanisa mukurumbira achitora zvandinotaura achizvitaura kwamuri. 
John16:15 Zvose zvaBaba ndezvangu, ndokusaka ndati achatora zvandinenge ndataura achikutaurirai." 
John16:16 “Kwasara chinguva chiduku imi hamuzondioni kozoita chimwe chinguva chidukuzve mozondiona.” 
John16:17 Vamwe vadzidzi vakataurirana vachiti, “Ko chiiko chaanoti kwatiri kwasara chinguva chiduku imi hamuzondioni uye kozoita chimwe chinguvazve chiduku mozondiona nokuti ndiri kuenda kuna Baba?”" 
John16:18 Vakati, “Anoreveiko nezvaanoti, ‘Kwasara chinguva chiduku.’ Hatizive zvaanoreva.”" 
John16:19 Jesu akaziva kuti vanoda kumubvunza. Naizvozvo akati kwavari, “Muri kubvunzana zvandanga ndichireva here ndichiti, ‘Kwasara chinguva chiduku imi hamuzondioni. Kwozoita chimwe chinguva chidukuzve mozondiona.’" 
John16:20 Chokwadi chokwadi ndinoti kwamuri muchachema nokuungudza asi pasi pari mumafaro. Imi muchasuruvara asi kusuruvara kwenyu kuchasanduka kuchiva kufara. 
John16:21 Kana munhukadzi ava kusununguka anorwadziwa, nokuti nguva yake inenge yasvika asi kana asununguka mwana, haazoyeuka kurwadziwa kuya norufaro rwokuti munyika maberekwa munhu." 
John16:22 Saizvozvo imi muri kusuruvara zvino asi ndichakuonaizve. Ipapo mwoyo yenyu ichafara hapana anozokutorerai rufaro rwenyu. 
John16:23 Panguva iyoyo hapana chamunozombondibvunza; idi chaizvo ndinoti kwamuri, kana mukakumbira chii zvacho kuna Baba muzita rangu vachakupai." 
John16:24 Kusvikira pari zvino hamuna kukumbira chinhu muzita rangu chikumbirai muchapiwa kuti rufaro rwenyu ruzare. 
John16:25 “Ndanga ndichitaura izvi kwamuri namadimikira nguva iri kuuya yandinenge ndisingazotauri kwamuri namadimikira yandinenge ndokutaurirai zviri pachena nezvaBaba. 
John16:26 Pazuva iroro muchakumbira muzita rangu; handiti kwamuri ndichakukumbirirai kuna Baba. 
John16:27 Aiwa! Ivo Baba pachavo vanokudai nokuti imi makandida uye makatenda kuti ndakabva kuna Mwari. 
John16:28 Ini ndakabva kuna Baba ndikauya pasi pano asi zvavapo ndezvokuti ndava kubva pasi ndichienda kuna Baba.” 
John16:29 Vadzidzi vake vakati, “Hamuchionaka! Mavakutaura zviri pachena kwete namadimikira." 
John16:30 Zvino tava kuziva kuti munoziva zvose uye kuti hamumiriri kuti munhu atange akubvunzai; nezvo tava kutenda kuti makabva kuna Mwari.” 
John16:31 Jesu akavapindura achiti, “Zvino mava kutenda nhai?" 
John16:32 Nguva iri kuuya uye yatosvika pamuchati mwarara, mumwe nomumwe achienda kwake muchindisiya ndiri ndoga asi ndinenge ndisiri ndoga nokuti Baba vaneni." 
John16:33 Ndakutaurirai izvi kuti muwane rugare mandiri. Pasi pano muchava namatambudziko asi tsungai mwoyo ndakakunda pasi.” 
John17:1 Jesu paakapedza kutaura izvi akatarisa kudenga akati, “Baba nguva iya yazosvika. Chipai Mwanakomana mukurumbira kuti iyewo Mwanakomana akuwanisei mukurumbira" 
John17:2 nokuti makamupa simba pamusoro pavanhu vose kuti ape upenyu husingaperi kuna vose vamakamupa. 
John17:3 Uhu ndihwo upenyu husingaperi: kuziva imi Mwari mumwechete wechokwadi naJesu Kristu wamakatuma. 
John17:4 Ndakakuwanisai mukurumbira panyika nokupedza kwandakaita basa ramakandipa kuti ndiite. 
John17:5 “Zvino Baba chindipaiwo mbiri mberi kwenyu mbiri iya yandaiva nayo ndiinemi pasi pasati pavapo. 
John17:6 “Ndakakuzivisai kuvanhu vamakandipa panyika; vakanga vari venyu mukavapa kwandiri uye vakachengeta izwi renyu. 
John17:7 Zvino vavakuziva kuti zvose zvamakandipa zvakabva kwamuri. 
John17:8 Nokuti ndakavapa mazwi amakandipa uye vakaagamuchira, vakaziva kuti zvechokwadi ndakabva kwamuri uye vakadavira kuti ndimi makandituma." 
John17:9 Ndiri kuvanamatira, handisi kunamatira pasi asi avo vamakandipa nokuti ndevenyu." 
John17:10 Zvose zvangu ndezvenyu uye zvenyu ndezvangu uyezve ndinowana mbiri mavari. 
John17:11 Zvino handichisiri pasi pano asi ivo vari pasi pano ini ndavakuuya kwamuri. Baba vatsvene, vanhu vamakandipa vachengetei muzita renyu." 
John17:12 Pandakanga ndiinavo vanhu vamakandipa ndakavachengeta muzita renyu. Ndakavachengetedza zvokuti hapana akarasika kusiya uya wekashambwa kokuraswa kuti Magwaro Matsvene azadzikiswe. 
John17:13 Asi zvino ndavakuuya kwamuri ndiri kutaura zvinhu izvi ndichiri pasi pano kuti kufara kwangu kunyatsozara chaizvo mavari. 
John17:14 Inini ndakavapa shoko renyu, pasi pakavavenga nokuti havasi vapasi pano sezvandisiriwo wapasi pano." 
John17:15 Handisi kunamatira kuti muvabvise pasi pano asi kuti muvadzivirire kune wakaipa uya. 
John17:16 Havasi vapasi pano sezvandisiriwo wapasi pano. 
John17:17 Vaitei kuti vave vatsvene muchokwadi izwi renyu ichokwadi. 
John17:18 Sokundituma kwamakaita pasi pano neniwo ndavakuvatuma kupasi pose. 
John17:19 Nokuda kwavo ndinozvipira kuti ivo vazvipirewo kuchokwadi. 
John17:20 “Handinamatire ava bedzi asi ndinonamatira avo vachatenda mandiri pamusana pezwi ravo. 
John17:21 Kuti vose zvavo vave vamwechete sezvakangoita kuti imi Baba muri mandiri ini ndiri mamuri ivowo ngavave matiri kuti pasi padavire kuti imi ndimi makandituma. 
John17:22 Mbiri yamakandipa ndakavapawo kuti vave vamwechete sesu tiri vamwechete. 
John17:23 Ini ndiri mavari imi muri mandiri vanyatsova vamwechete, kuti pasi pazive kuti imi ndimi makandituma mukavada sokundida kwamakaita." 
John17:24 “Baba ndinodawo kuti avo vamakandipa vave kwandinenge ndiri vaonewo mbiri yangu yamakandipa pamusana porudo rwenyu kwandiri pasi pasati pavapo. 
John17:25 Baba makarurama, pasi hapana kukuzivai asi ini ndakakuzivai uye ava vanoziva kuti makandituma." 
John17:26 Ndakaita kuti vazive zita renyu uye ndichaita kuti rizivikanwe kuti rudo rwamakandida narwo ruvewo mavari uyewo kuti iniwo ndive mavari.” 
John18:1 Jesu paakapedza kutaura izvi akabuda navadzidzi vake akayambukira kumhiri kwekakova Kedhironi kwaiva nebindu raakapinda navadzidzi vake. 
John18:2 NaJudhasi, uya akazomumupandukira aizivawo nzvimbo iyoyo, nokuti Jesu aipota achiungana navadzidzi vake ikoko." 
John18:3 Ipapo Judhasi akapiwa boka ramasoja namapurisa avaPristi vakuru navaFarisei. Akaenda nemwenje namazhenje nezvombo zvokurwa. 
John18:4 Sezvo Jesu aiziva zvose zvakanga zvichizoitika kwaari akauya kwavari akavati, “Ndiani wamuri kutsvaka?”" 
John18:5 Vakamupindura vachiti, “Jesu weNazareti.” Jesu ndokuti kwavari, “Ndini, Judhasi, uya akamupandukira akanga amire pamwechete navo.”" 
John18:6 Paakati kwavari, “Ndini” vakabva vadzokera neshure vakawira pasi." 
John18:7 Jesu akavabvunzazve akati, “Ndiani wamuri kutsvaka?” Ivo vakati, “Jesu weNazareti.”" 
John18:8 Jesu akavapindura achiti, “Inga wani ndakutaurirai kuti Ndini. Kana muri kutsvaka ini chiregai ava vaende zvavo.”" 
John18:9 Izvi zvaizadzisa zvaakanga ataura achiti, “Pane vamakandipa hapana wandakarasikirwa naye.”" 
John18:10 Zvino Simoni Pita akanga aine bakatwa akabva ariti wee muhara maraiva ndokutema nzeve yorudyi yomuranda womupristi mukuru akaidimura. Zita romuranda wacho rainzi Marikosi. 
John18:11 Jesu akati kuna Pita, “Dzorera bakatwa rako muhara maro. Handifaniri here ini kunwa mukombe wenhamo wandakapiwa naBaba vangu?”" 
John18:12 Chikwata chamasoja chiya nomutungamiri wacho namapurisa avaJudha chakabata Jesu chikamusunga. 
John18:13 Vakatanga vaenda naye kuna Anasi nokuti aiva tezvara waKaifasi akanga ari Mupristi mukuru gore iroro. 
John18:14 Kaifasi ndiye uya akanga ambopa zano kuvaJudha rokuti zviri nani kuti munhu mumwechete afire vanhu. 
John18:15 Simoni Pita akatevera Jesu nomumwe mudzidzi. Mudzidzi uyu zvaaizivikanwa nomupristi mukuru akapinda muruvanze rwomupristi mukuru pamwechete naJesu. 
John18:16 Izvozvo Pita akamira kunze pasuo guru. Naizvozvo mumwe mudzidzi uya aizivikanwa nomuPristi mukuru akabuda akandotaura nomusikana webasa aichengeta pasuo guru akapinza Pita mukati. 
John18:17 Musikana uya webasa aichengetedza pasuo guru akati kuna Pita, “Iwe hausi mumwe wavadzidzi vomunhu uyu here?” Pita akati, “Handisiri.”" 
John18:18 Ipapo varanda namapurisa vakanga vabatidza moto wamazimbe nokuti kwaitonhora. Ivo vakanga vamire vachidziya moto. Pitawo akanga anavo vakamira achidziya moto. 
John18:19 Mupristi mukuru akabvunza Jesu nezvavadzidzi vake uye nezvedzidziso cyake. 
John18:20 Jesu akamupindura achiti, “Inga ndaitaura pachena kupasi pose, ndaidzidzisa mumasinagogu nomuTemberi munounganwa navaJudha vose. Hapana chandakataura pachivande." 
John18:21 Ko munobvunzirei ini. Dai matobvunza zvenyu vakandinzwa ndichitaura kwavari. Ivo vanoziva zvandaireva kwavari.” 
John18:22 Paakataura izvi mumwe mupurisa akanga amire padyo, akarova Jesu nembama achiti, “Ndiko kupindura kwaungaite mupristi mukuru ikoko?”" 
John18:23 Jesu akamupindura achiti, “Kana pane chandatadza mukutaura kwandaita tiudze chandakanganisa. Ko kana ndataura zvakanaka wagondirovereiko?”" 
John18:24 Anasi akamuendesa akasungwa kuna Kaifasi mupristi mukuru. 
John18:25 Zvino Simoni Pita akanga akamira achidziya moto. Vakamuti, “Hausi mumwe wavadzidzi vake here iwe?” Akaramba achiti, “Handisiri.”" 
John18:26 Mumwe wavaranda vomupristi mukuru, hama yomurume uya akachekwa nzeve naPita akamubvunzawo achiti, “Handina kukuona here iwe uinaye kubindu kuya?”" 
John18:27 Pita akarambazve; ipapo jongwe ndokubva rakukuridza. 
John18:28 Vakazobvisa Jesu kumba kwaKaifasi vachienda naye kumuzinda womutongi wenyika. Aya aiva mangwananingwanani ivo pachavo havana kupinda mumuzinda imomo kuti varege kun'oreswa vachiitira kuti vawane madyiro ePasika. 
John18:29 Naizvozvo Pirato akaenda kwavari akati, “Imhosvaiko yamunoti yakaparwa nomunhu uyu?”" 
John18:30 Vakamupindura vachiti, “Dai munhu uyu anga asina mhosva, tingadai tisina kumuturira kwamuri.”" 
John18:31 Pirato akavati, “Chimutoraika iyemi mundomutonga maererano nomutemo wenyu.” VaJudha vakati kwaari, “Isu hatibvumirwi kuuraya munhu.”" 
John18:32 Izvi zvaiva zvokuzadzisa zvakanga zvambotaurwa naJesu zvokuti aizofa norufu rwakaita sei? 
John18:33 Pirato akapindazve mumuzinda akadaidza Jesu akati kwaari, “Iwe uri mambo wavaJudha here iwe?”" 
John18:34 Jesu akapindura achiti, “Izvi zviri kubva mupfungwa dzenyu here kana kuti matotaurirwa navamwe nezvangu?”" 
John18:35 Pirato akapindura achiti, “Ko ini ndiri muJudha here'ni? Rudzi rwako navaPristi vakuru ndivo vakuturira kwandiri. Chii chawakaita iwe?”" 
John18:36 Jesu akapindura achiti, “Umambo hwangu hausiri hwapasi pano. Dai umambo hwangu huri hwapasi pano, varanda vangu vangadai varwisa kuti ndirege kuiswa mumaoko avaJudha. Zvino umambo hwangu hausi hwapasi pano.”" 
John18:37 Pirato akati kwaari, “Heya uri mambo nhai?” Jesu akapindura achiti, “Inga matozvidudza wani kuti ndiri mambo ndizvo zvandakazvarirwa uye ndizvo zvandakavinga pasi pano kuti ndizopupurira chokwadi. Munhu wose ari pachokwadi anonzwa izwi rangu.”" 
John18:38 Pirato akabva amuti, “Chokwadi chii?” Paakapedza kutaura izvi akaendazve kuvaJudha akavataurira kuti, “Ini handioni mhosva yaanayo" 
John18:39 asi imi munetsika yokuti ndinofanira kukusunungurirai munhu mumwechete paPasika. Munoda here kuti ndikusunungurirei Mambo wavaJudha?” 
John18:40 Vakadaidzirazve vachiti, “Kwete munhu uyu asi Bharabhasi,” zvino Bharabhasi akanga ari gororo." 
John19:1 Pirato akatora Jesu, akati arohwe zvakanyanya." 
John19:2 Masoja akaruka chiremba cheminzwa akachiisa mumusoro make. Akamupfekedza gemenzi roruvara rwohute. 
John19:3 Vaipota vachiuya kwaari vachimukwazisa vachiti, “Kwaziwaika Mambo wavaJudha!” Vachimurova nembama." 
John19:4 Pirato akabudazve akati kwavari, “Chinzwai, ndavakumuburitsa kwamuri kuti muzive kuti ini ndashaya mhosva yaanayo.”" 
John19:5 Saizvozvo Jesu akabuda akapfeka chiremba cheminzwa negemenzi roruvara rwohute. Pirato ndokuti kwavari, “Chitarisai muone munhu uya.”" 
John19:6 Vapristi vakuru namapurisa pavakamuona vakabva vadaidzira vachiti, “Ngaarovererwe pamuchinjikwa. Ngaarovererwe pamuchinjikwa.” Pirato akati kwavari, “Chimutoraika iyemi mundomuroverera pamuchinjikwa nokuti ini ndashaya mhosva yaanayo.”" 
John19:7 VaJudha vakamupindura kuti, “Isu tine mutemo, maererano nomutemo iwoyo anofanira kuti afe nokuti akazviita Mwanakomana waMwari.”" 
John19:8 Pirato paakanzwa mazwi aya akabva anyanya kutya. 
John19:9 Akapindazve mumuzinda akati kuna Jesu, “Iwe unobva kupi iwe.” Asi Jesu haana kupindura." 
John19:10 Naizvozvo Pirato akati kwaari, “Hausikuda kutaura neni here? Hauzivi here kuti ndine simba rokukusunungura nesimba rokukuroverera pamuchinjikwa?”" 
John19:11 Jesu akamupindura achiti, “Hamungavi nesimba pandiri kana musina kutoripiwa richibva kumusoro. Nezvo anditurira kwamuri anechitadzo chikuru kupfuura imi.”" 
John19:12 Nezvizvi Pirato akatsvaka nzira yokumusunungura nayo. Asi vaJudha vakadaidzira vachiti, “Kana mukasunungura munhu uyu, hamusi shamwari yaSiza, nokuti munhu wose anozviita mambo ari kupandukira Siza.”" 
John19:13 Pirato paakanzwa mazwi aya akaburitsa Jesu panze iye ndokugara pachigaro chokutongera panzvimbo inonzi, “Chirongwanamafendefa.” Kana kuti, “Gabhata.” NechiHebheru." 
John19:14 Zvino iri rakanga riri zuva rokugadzirira Pasika yakanga yenge awa yegumi nechipiri masikati. Akati kuvaJudha, “Hoyu mambo wenyu.”" 
John19:15 Vakadaidzira vachiti, “Ngaapfuudzwe, ngaapfuudzwe ngaarovererwe pamuchinjikwa.” Pirato akavati, “Ko ndoroverera mambo wenyu pamuchinjikwa here?” Vapristi vakuru vakapindura vachiti, “Hatina mumwe mambo isu asi Siza oga.”" 
John19:16 Ipapo Pirato akamuisa mumaoko avo kuti arovererwe pamuchinjikwa. Saizvozvo vakatora Jesu 
John19:17 akabuda akaenda akatakura muchinjikwa wake kunzvimbo inonzi, “Dehenya,” kana kuti, “Gorogota.” MuchiHebheru." 
John19:18 Ndipo pavakamuroverera pamuchinjikwa ipapo aina vamwe vaviri vachiti mumwe uku mumwe uku iye ari pakati. 
John19:19 Pirato akanyorawo chiga chemhosva yake akachiisa pamuchinjikwa, chakanga chichiti, “JESU WENAZARETI MAMBO WAVAJUDHA.”" 
John19:20 VaJudha vazhinji vakaverenga chiga chemhosva ichocho nokuti nzvimbo yapakarovererwa Jesu yakanga iri pedyo neguta, uye chakanga chakanyorwa muchiHebheru, nomuchiRatini nomuchiGiriki." 
John19:21 Saka vapristi vakuru vavaJudha vakati kuna Pirato, “Regai kunyora muchiti mambo wavaJudha asi kuti iye ndiye akati ndiri mambo wavaJudha.”" 
John19:22 Pirato akapindura achiti, “Chandanyora ndanyora.”" 
John19:23 Masoja paakaroverera Jesu pamuchinjikwa, akatora hanzu dzake ndokudzikamura mumigove mina, musoja mumwe nomumwe mugove wake. Ndokusara hanzu yomukati. Hanzu iyoyo yakanga isina musono. Yakanga yakarukwa kubva kumusoro kusvika pasi." 
John19:24 Nezvo vakataurirana vachiti, “Ngatiregei kuibvarura asi ngatiitirei chin'ange tione kuti ichava yaani.” Izvi zvakaitika kuti Magwaro Matsvene azadziswe anoti, “Vakagovana hanzu dzangu pakati pavo; zvipfeko zvangu vakazviitira chin'ange.” Saka izvi ndizvo zvakaitwa namasoja." 
John19:25 Izvozvo pedyo nomuchinjikwa waJesu Pakanga pamire amai vake nomunun'una waamai vake Maria mudzimai waKiropasi naMaria Magadharena. 
John19:26 Jesu paakaona amai vake nomudzidzi wake wapamwoyo akamira pedyo, akati kuna amai vake, “Amai mwana wenyu uyu”" 
John19:27 Ndokuti kumudzidzi wake, “Amai vako ava.” Kubvira ipapo mudzidzi uya akavatora akavaisa mumusha make." 
John19:28 Mushure maizvozvi Jesu paakaona kuti zvose zvazadziswa uye kuti Magwaro Matsvene azadziswe akati, “Ndine nyota.”" 
John19:29 Ipapo pakanga paine mudziyo uzere waini inovava. Naizvozvo vakaisa chifovefove chizere waini inovava iya pamushenjere vakachiisa pamuromo pake. 
John19:30 Jesu paakasveta waini iya inovava akati, “Zvapera.” Akakotamisa musoro ndokubva afa." 
John19:31 Zvarakanga riri zuva rokugadzirira Pasika vaJudha vakakumbira Pirato kuti makumbo avo atyorwe uye kuti zvitunha zvibviswe kuti zvitunha zvirege kunge zviri pamuchinjikwa pamusi weSabata nokuti Sabata iroro rakanga riri Sabata guru. 
John19:32 Saizvozvo masoja akaenda akatyora makumbo owokutanga neewechipiri weavo vakanga varovererwa pamwechete naye. 
John19:33 Asi pavakauya kuna Jesu, vakaona kuti atofa havana kumutyora makumbo." 
John19:34 Mumwe musoja akamubaya parutivi pake nepfumo, pakabva pabuda ropa nemvura." 
John19:35 Uyo akazviona nameso anopupura; uchapupu hwake ndehwechokwadi. Uye anoziva kuti anotaura chokwadi kuti nemiwo mutendhe 
John19:36 nokuti zvinhu izvi zvakaitika kuti chinyorwa chitsvene chizadziswe chinoti, “Hapana bvupa rake richatyorwa.”" 
John19:37 Uyezve chimwe chinoti, “Vachatarisa uyo wavakabaya.”" 
John19:38 Mushure maizvozvi Josefi wokuArimatia, mudzidzi waJesu womuchivande pamusana pokutya vaJudha, akakumbira Pirato kuti iye aturure chitunha chaJesu. Pirato akamubvumira. Saizvozvo akauya akaturura mutumbi wake." 
John19:39 Nikodhimasi uya akambouya kwaari nousiku akauyawo namafuta anonhuwira emura negavakava zvairema makirogiramu anenge makumi matatu ane mana. 
John19:40 Vakatora chitunha chaJesu vakachiputira namachira erineni namafuta aya anonhuwirira vachitevedza tsika yechiJudha yokuviga vanhu. 
John19:41 Panzvimbo yaakarovererwa pakanga paine bindu. Mubindu imomo maiva neguva idzva makanga musati mambovigwa munhu. 
John19:42 Naizvozvo, zvaraiva zuva ravaJudha rokugadzirira Pasika uye guva iroro zvaraiva riri padyo kudaro vakaradzika Jesu imomo." 
John20:1 Pazuva rokutanga revhiki Maria Magadharena akafumouya kuguva kuchakasviba. Akaona kuti dombo rakanga rabviswa paguva. 
John20:2 Ipapo akamhanyira kuna Pita nomumwe mudzidzi uya waJesu wapamwoyo akati kwavari, “Vabvisa Tenzi muguva zvino hatizivi kwavamuisa.”" 
John20:3 Pita akabuda pamwechete nomumwe mudzidzi uya vakaenda kuguva kuya. 
John20:4 Vakamhanya vose. Mumwe mudzidzi uya akamhanya zvokusiya Pita akandotanga kusvika kuguva. 
John20:5 Asi akakotama achidongorera akaona machira erineni ari pakadaro asi iye haana kupindamo. 
John20:6 Simoni Pita akazouyawo achimutevera akapinda muguva. Akaonawo machira aya ari pakadaro apo. 
John20:7 Nejira duku raiva kumusoro wake rakanga risiri pano mamwe machira asi rakanga rakapetwa riri paro roga. 
John20:8 Mumwe mudzidzi uya akatanga kusvika paguva, akapindawo akaona akatenda." 
John20:9 Kusvikira ipapo vakanga vasati vanzwisisa Magwaro Matsvene anoti, “Anofanira kumuka kuvakafa.”" 
John20:10 Vadzidzi vakadzokera kumisha yavo. 
John20:11 Asi Maria akamira kunze pedyo neguva achichema. Paaichema kudaro akakotama achitarisa muguva. 
John20:12 Akaona vatumwa vaviri vakapfeka zvichena vakagara pakanga pakaradzikwa Jesu. Mumwe ari kumusoro mumwe ari kumakumbo, vakamuti," 
John20:13 “Nhai, mudzimai iwe uri kuchemeiko?” Iye akavati, “Nokuti vatora Tenzi wangu uye handizivi kwavamuisa.”" 
John20:14 Achingoti taurei izvi akatendeuka ndokuona Jesu akamira asi haana kuziva kuti ndiJesu. 
John20:15 Jesu akati kwaari, “Mudzimai iwe uri kuchemeiko, uri kutsvaga ani?” Zvaakafunga kuti murimi akati kwaari, “Changamire, kana murimi mamubvisa nditaurirei kwamandomuradzika ndindomutora.”" 
John20:16 Jesu akati kwaari, “Maria!” Iye akabva atendeuka akati kwaari nechiHebheru, “Rabhoni” zvinoreva kuti, “Mudzidzisi.”" 
John20:17 Jesu akati kwaari, “Usandibate nokuti handisati ndakwira kuna Baba. Asi enda kuhama dzangu undoti kwavari ndiri kuenda kuna Baba vangu naBaba venyu, kuna Mwari wangu naMwari wenyu.”" 
John20:18 Maria Magadharena akaenda kuvadzidzi akavaparidza kuti, “Ndaona Tenzi uye ataura izvi kwandiri.”" 
John20:19 Manheru ezuva rakarero, zuva rokutanga revhiki Jesu akauya mumba maiva navadzidzi; izvozvo makonhi amavakanga vari akanga akaiswa zvihuri pamusana pokutya vaJudha. Akasvikomira pakati pavo akati kwavari, “Rugare ngaruve nemi.”" 
John20:20 Paakataura izvi akavaratidza maoko ake naparutivi pake. Vadzidzi vakabva vafara pavakaona Tenzi. 
John20:21 Jesu akavatizve, “Rugare ngaruve nemi! Sokundituma kwakaita Baba neni ndinokutumaiwo saizvozvo.”" 
John20:22 Paakapedza kutaura izvi, akafemera pavari akati kwavari, “Gamuchirai Mweya Mutsvene." 
John20:23 Kana mukaregerera vanhu zvitadzo zvavo, zvinobva zvaregererwa. Kana mukaramba kuvaregerera havaregererwi.”" 
John20:24 Tomasi mumwe wavanegumi navaviri ainzi Mapatya, akanga asinavo pakauya Jesu." 
John20:25 Ipapo vamwe vadzidzi vakamutaurira kuti, “Taona Tenzi.” Asi iye akavati, “Kana ndisina kutoona mavanga ezvipikiri mumaoko ake ndikapinza munwe wangu mumavanga iwayo ndikapinzawo chanza changu parutivi pake handitendi.”" 
John20:26 Mushure memazuva masere vadzidzi vake vakanga vari mumba muyazve uye Tomasi akanga ainavo. Makonhi akanga akapfigwa, Jesu akauya akamira pakati pavo akati kwavari, “Rugare ngaruve nemi.”" 
John20:27 Akabva ati kuna Tomasi, “Uya upinze munwe wako umu uone maoko angu. Tambanudza ruoko rwako upinze parutivi pangu. Usave munhu asingatendi asi anotenda.”" 
John20:28 Tomasi akamupindura achiti, “Ndimi Tenzi wangu naMwari wangu.”" 
John20:29 Jesu akati kwaari, “Watenda nokuti wandiona nhai? Vakakomborerwa zvavo vanotenda ivo vasina kundiona.”" 
John20:30 Jesu akaita zvimwe zviratidzo zvizhinji vadzidzi vake vachiona zvisina kunyorwa mubhuku rino iri. 
John20:31 Izvi zvakanyorwa kuti mudavire kuti Jesu ndiye Mesia Mwanakomana waMwari uyewo kuti nokutenda ikoko muve noupenyu muzita rake. 
John21:1 Shure kwaizvozvi Jesu akazviratidzazve kuvadzidzi vake kuGungwa reTibheriasi. Akazviratidza sezvizvi. 
John21:2 Simoni Pita naTomasi anonzi Mapatya naNatanieri wokuKana yokuGarirea navana vaZebhedia navamwe vadzidzi vake vaviri vakanga vari pamwechete. 
John21:3 Simoni Pita akati kwavari, “Ndavakuenda kundobata hove.” Ivowo vakati kwaari, “Handei pamwechete.” Vakabuda vakapinda mugwa asi usiku ihwohwo hapana chavakabata." 
John21:4 Mambakwedza Jesu akamira pamahombekombe asi vadzidzi havana kuziva kuti ndiJesu. 
John21:5 Jesu akati kwavari, “Nhai varume, pane chamabata chokusevesa here?” Vakamupindura vachiti, “Kwete.”" 
John21:6 Akati kwavari, “Kandai usvasvi hwenyu kurudyi rweigwa munodzibata.” Saizvozvo vakahukanda vakabva vavakutadza kuhukakata nokuwanda kwehove." 
John21:7 Mudzidzi uya waJesu wapamwoyo akati kuna Pita, “NdiTenzi wani avo.” Simoni Pita paakazvinzwa kuti ndiTenzi, akapfeka hanzu yake yapamusoro ndokungozvimoneredza nokuti akanga asina chaakapfeka ndokusvetukira mugungwa." 
John21:8 Asi vamwe vadzidzi vaya vakauya vari mugwa vachikakata usvasvi huzere hove, nokuti vakanga vasiri kure namahombekombe; vakanga vari chinhambwe chinenge mamita makumi mapfumbamwe." 
John21:9 Pavakasvika pamahombekombe vakaona moto wamazimbe nehove iri pamusoro pawo nechingwa. 
John21:10 Jesu akati, “Uyai nedzimwe hove dzamabata.”" 
John21:11 Naizvozvo Simoni Pita akadzokerazve mugwa akakwevera usvasvi kumahombekombe hwakanga huzere hove huru dzaiva zana namakumi mashanu nenhatu. Kunyange zvazvo dzakanga dzakawanda kudaro usvasvi hauna kubvaruka. 
John21:12 Jesu akavati, “Chiuyai mudye.” Hapana akamboti regai ndimubvunze kuti ndimi ani. Vaitozviziva kuti ndiTenzi." 
John21:13 Jesu akauya akatora chingwa ndokuchipa kwavari uye akaita zvimwechetezvo nehove. 
John21:14 Aka, kakanga kava kechitatu Jesu achizvionesa kuvadzidzi vake mushure mokunge amutswa muvafi." 
John21:15 Pavakapedza kudya kwamangwanani Jesu akati kuna Simoni Pita, “Nhai Simoni mwana waJohani unondida here kupfuura ava?” Iye akati kwaari, “Hongu Tenzi munoziva wani kuti ndinokudai.” Jesu ndokuti, “Fudza hwayana dzangu.”" 
John21:16 Akamutizve rwechipiri Simoni mwana waJohani, “Unondida here?” Akamuti, “Hongu Tenzi munoziva kuti ndinokudai.” Jesu akamuti, “Fudza hwai dzangu.”" 
John21:17 Akati kwaari kechitatu, “Simoni mwana waJohani unondida here?” Pita zvikati zvamurwadza nokuti akamuti rwechitatu, “Unondida here?” Pita akati kwaari, “Tenzi inga munoziva zvose wani, munoziva imi kuti ndinokudai.” Jesu akamuti, “Fudza hwai dzangu.”" 
John21:18 Zvechokwadi chokwadi ndinoti kwauri, “Pawakanga uchiri mudiki waipfeka uchienda kwaunoda asi kana wachembera uchatambanudza maoko ako mumwe achikusunga achienda newe kwausingadi.”" 
John21:19 (Izvi akazvitaura kuratidza rufu rwaaizorumbidza narwo Mwari). Mushure mezvo akati kwaari, “Nditevere.”" 
John21:20 Pita akatendeuka akaona mudzidzi waJesu wapamwoyo achitevera uya akanga akazembera pachipfuva chake pachirariro, uya uya akati kuna Jesu, “Tenzi ndiani ari kuzokupandukira?”" 
John21:21 Pita paakamuona akati kuna Jesu, “Nhai Tenzi, ko uyuwo uyu?”" 
John21:22 Jesu akati kwaari, “Ko kana ndichida kuti arambe aripo kusvikira ndadzoka zvinei newe. Chako iwe kunditevera.”" 
John21:23 Pakabva pava norunyerekupe munevehama rwokuti mudzidzi iyeyu akanga asingazofa, asi Jesu akanga asina kuti haasi kuzofa asi akanga angoti, “Ko kana ndichida kuti arambe aripo kusvikira ndadzoka, zvinei newe?”" 
John21:24 Iyeyu ndiye mudzidzi ari kupupura zvinhu izvi uye ndiye akanyora zvinhu izvi uyewo tinoziva kuti uchapupu hwake ndehwechokwadi. 
John21:25 Asi pane zvimwewo zvinhu zvizhinji zvakaitwa naJesu. Dai kuri kuti zvainyorwa zvose chimwe nechimwe; ndinofunga kuti nyika yaitopata namabhuku acho aigona kunyorwa. 
Acts1:1 Teofiro, mubhuku rangu rokutanga, ndakanyora nezvose zvakatanga kuitwa nokudzidziswa naJesu" 
Acts1:2 kusvikira pazuva raakakwidzwa kudenga. Ipapo, maiva mushure mokunge ataurira, nokuna Mweya Mutsvene, vapositori vaakanga asarudza, zvinofanira kuitwa." 
Acts1:3 Mushure mokutambudzika kwake akazviratidza kwavari kuti mupenyu nezvinhu zvakawanda zvinoita kuti munhu abvume kuti ichokwadi sezvizvi zvinoti: kuzviratidza kwavari kwamazuva makumi mana uye kutaura nezvoumambo hwaMwari. 
Acts1:4 Paakanga achinavo, akavati vasabve muJerusaremu asi kuti vamirire chitsidzo chaBaba chiya chavakanzwa achiti," 
Acts1:5 “Makandinzwa ndichiti, Johani akaombeka nemvura asi kusati kwapera mazuva mazhinji muchaombekwa naMweya Mutsvene.”" 
Acts1:6 Saizvozvo pavakanga vaungana vakamubvunza vachiti, “Tenzi, panguva ino ndipo here pamuchadzosera pakare umambo kuIsiraeri?”" 
Acts1:7 Iye akati, “Hazvisi zvenyu kuziva misi nenguva dzakatemwa naBaba nesimba ravo." 
Acts1:8 Asi imi muchagamuchira simba kana Mweya Mutsvene auya pamuri uye muchava zvapupu zvangu muJerusaremu nomuJudhea yose nokuSamaria kusvika kwakaperera nyika?” 
Acts1:9 Paakapedza kutaura izvi akasimudzwa vakatarisa kudaro, gore richimukwidza kudenga rikaita kuti asaonekwe kwavari." 
Acts1:10 Vachiri kunan'anidza kudenga, paaienda; havo varume vaviri vakamira pavari vakapfeka magemenzi machena." 
Acts1:11 Vakati, “Ko imi vanhu veGarirea makamirirei makatarira kudenga? Jesu iyeyu atorwa pamuri achienda kudenga achauya nenzira imwecheteyo sokumuona kwamaita achienda kudenga.”" 
Acts1:12 Vakazodzokera kuJerusaremu vachibva kugomo rinonzi Orivheti riri pedyo neJerusaremu, chinhambwe cherwendo rwunobvumirwa pamusi weSabata." 
Acts1:13 Pavakapinda vakaenda kuimba yapamusoro mavaigara. Paiti Pita naJohani kouya Jemusi naAndireya kwoti Firipi naTomasi kwozoti Bhatoromeo naMateu kwozotiwo Jemusi mwana waArifeosi uyewo Simoni Muziroti naJudhasi mwana waJemusi. 
Acts1:14 Vose ivava vakazvipira pakunamata pamwechete namadzimai naMaria amai vaJesu navakoma navanun'una vake. 
Acts1:15 Pamazuva iwayo Pita akasimuka pakati pevehama akataura. Gungano iroro raiva zana namakumi maviri avanhu. Akati," 
Acts1:16 “Hama, Magwaro Matsvene aifanira kuzadziswa akafanotaurwa naMweya Mutsvene nomuromo waDhavhidhi nezvaJudhasi aiva mutungamiri waavo vakandosunga Jesu." 
Acts1:17 Akanga ari mumwe wedu akapiwa mugove wake mubasa iri.” 
Acts1:18 Zvino murume uyu akatenga munda nomubayiro wouipi hwake. Akaputsika akasvikorovera pasi nouso. Vamwe vanoti akazvimba ndokubva aputika napakati ura hwose hukavhazhuka 
Acts1:19 zvikazivikanwa navagari vose vomuJerusaremu. Munda iwoyo wakazodaidzwa kuti Hakeridhama mumutauro wavo zvichireva kuti munda weropa 
Acts1:20 nokuti zvakanyorwa mubhuku reNziyo kuti, “Musha wake ngauve dongo usawane anogaramo. Basa rake routariri ngaritorwe nomumwe.”" 
Acts1:21 Saizvozvo mumwe wavarume vaiva nesu nguva yose, Tenzi Jesu paakanga achiri nesu kutangira paruombeko rwaJohani kusvika pazuva raakatorwa akakwidzwa kudenga," 
Acts1:22 mumwe wavarume ivava anofanira kuva chapupu chokumuka kwake. 
Acts1:23 Naizvozvo vakaisapo vaviri vaiti Josefi anonzi Bhasabhasi ainziwo Jusitusi naMatiasi. 
Acts1:24 Vakanamata vachiti, “Tenzi, muzivi wemwoyo yavanhu vose, tiratidzei pavaviri ava kuti ndiani wamunosarudza" 
Acts1:25 kuti atore nzvimbo yapabasa iri noupositori uhu hwakasiiwa naJudhasi achienda kunzvimbo yake.” 
Acts1:26 Vakavaitira chin'ange, chikabata pana Matiasi ndokubva ava mumwe wavapositori vaya gumi nomumwechete." 
Acts2:1 Zuva rePendekositi parakasvika, vakanga vari panzvimbo imwechete." 
Acts2:2 Pakarepo kwakava nokutinhira kuchibva kudenga kuchinge kuvhuvhuta kwemhepo inesimba kukazadza imba yose yavakanga vagere. 
Acts2:3 Vakaona marimi anenge omoto akapararana achindogara pano mumwe nomumwe wavo. 
Acts2:4 Vakabva vazadzwa vose naMweya Mutsvene vakabva vatangisa kutaura nedzimwe ndimi sokupiwa kwavakaitwa naMweya kuti vataure. 
Acts2:5 Izvozvo muJerusaremu makanga muina vaJudha, vanhu vakanga vakazvipira pakunamata, vakanga vauya kuzombogaramo vaibva kumarudzi ose avanhu enyika dzose dziri pasi pedenga." 
Acts2:6 Nokunzwa kutinhira uku, mhomho yavanhu yakaungana vakashamiswa nokuti mumwe nomumwe akanzwa vachitaura norurimi rwake." 
Acts2:7 Vakakatyamara vakashamiswa vachiti, “Vose vari kutaura ava havasi vokuGarirea here?" 
Acts2:8 Zviri kuitika sei kuti mumwe nomumwe wedu ari kuvanzwa vachitaura norurimi rwake? 
Acts2:9 Panoti vaPatia navaMidhia koti vaEramu navagari vokuMesopatamia nokuJudhea novokuKapadhosia kozoti vokuPondusi neAsia 
Acts2:10 kouyawo vokuFirigia novokuPamufiria kozotiwo vokuIjipiti novokune dzimwe nzvimbo dzeRibhia pedyo neKurini. Kune vaenzi vanobva kuRoma vechiJudha navakapindukira kuchiJudha. 
Acts2:11 Kune vokuKiriti nevokuArabhia. Tiri kuvanzwa vachitaura mundimi dzedu mabasa makuru aMwari.” 
Acts2:12 Vose vakakatyamara vakakangaidzwa vachitaurirana vachiti, “Ko zvinoreveiko izvi?”" 
Acts2:13 Asi vamwe, vachishora, vakati, “Vaguta waini itsva.”" 
Acts2:14 Asi Pita, amire navane gumi nomumwechete vaya, akadaidzira akataura zviri pachena achiti, “Imi varume veJudhea nemi mose mugere muJerusaremu, izvi ngazvizivikanwe kwamuri mumbopawo nzeve kumashoko angu" 
Acts2:15 nokuti vanhu ava havana kudhakwa sezvamuri kufunga nokuti ruchiri rudziyakamwe. 
Acts2:16 Asi izvi ndizvo zvakataurwa nomuporofita Joeri achiti," 
Acts2:17 “ ‘Mumazuva okupedzisira, ndizvo zviri kutaura Mwari, ndichadururira Mweya wangu pamusoro pavanhu vose. Vanakomana venyu navanasikana venyu vachaporofita. Vechidiki venyu vachaona zviratidzo, vakwegura venyu vacharotswa hope." 
Acts2:18 Kunyange pavaranda vangu vechirume navaranda vangu vechikadzi, mumazuva iwayo ndichadururira Mweya wangu ivo vachaporofita." 
Acts2:19 Ndichaita zviratidzo mumatenga'mu nezviratidzo panyika pasi pano, zveropa nemoto nebwititi routsi." 
Acts2:20 Zuva richasandurwa kuva rima, mwedzi ugoita ropa; zuva guru raTenzi risati rasvika, zuva guru, zuva risingaitiki." 
Acts2:21 Zvichaitika kuti ani naani anodana zita raTenzi achaponeswa.’ 
Acts2:22 “Varume, vaIsiraeri teererai mazwi aya anoti Jesu wokuNazareti, munhu akapupurirwa kwamuri naMwari namabasa makuru nezvishamiso nezviratidzo zvakaitwa pakati penyu naMwari nemaari sokuziva kwenyu," 
Acts2:23 Jesu iyeyo, wamakaturirwa maererano nourongwa hwakanyatsoti tsvikiti uye nokufanoziva kwaMwari, imi makamuroverera pamuchinjikwa mukamuuraya muchishandisa vanhu vasina mutemo." 
Acts2:24 Asi Mwari akamumutsa amusunungura marwadzo orufu nokuti zvakanga zvisingagoneki kuti arambe akasungwa narwo. 
Acts2:25 Chikonzero ndechokuti Dhavhidhi achitaura nezvake anoti: “Ndaiona Mwari ari pamberi pangu nguva dzose nokuti ari kurudyi kwangu kuti ndirege kuzunguzwa. 
Acts2:26 Naizvozvo mwoyo wangu unofara uye rurimi rwangu rwakapembera kufara uyezve muviri wangu uchagara uine chitarisiro. 
Acts2:27 Nokuti hamungasii mweya wangu munzvimbo yavafi kana kurega mururami wenyu achiora. 
Acts2:28 Makandizivisa nzira youpenyu muchandizadza norufaro nokuvapo kwenyu.” 
Acts2:29 “Hama, regai ndikutaurirei zviri pachena nezvaTateguru wedu Dhavhidhi kuti akafa akavigwa uye guva rake tinaro nanhasi uno." 
Acts2:30 Nezvo somuporofita, uye zvaaiziva kuti Mwari akapika nechitsidzo kwaari kuti achaisa mumwe wechizvarwa chake pachigaro chake choumambo," 
Acts2:31 akafanoona akataura nezvokumuka kwaMesia achiti, “Haana kusiiwa munzvimbo yavafi uye muviri wake hauna kuora." 
Acts2:32 “Mwari akamutsa iye Jesu iyeyo, isu tose tiri zvapupu zvaizvozvo." 
Acts2:33 Asumudzirwa kurudyi rwaMwari uye agamuchira kubva kuna Baba chitsidzo chaMweya Mutsvene, adururira zvamurikuona nokunzwa izvi." 
Acts2:34 Chiripo ndechokuti Dhavhidhi haana kukwira kudenga asi iye pachake anototi: “Tenzi akati kuna Tenzi wangu, ‘Gara kurudyi kwangu" 
Acts2:35 kusvikira ndaita vavengi vako chitambarariko chetsoka dzako.’ 
Acts2:36 “Naizvozvo imba yose yaIsiraeri ngainyotsoziva kuti Mwari akamuita kuti ave Tenzi naMesia, iye Jesu uyu wamakaroverera pamuchinjikwa.”" 
Acts2:37 Zvino pavakanzwa izvi vakabaiwa mwoyo vakati kuna Pita nokuna vamwe vapositori: “Hama, ko zvino toiteiko?”" 
Acts2:38 Pita akati kwavari, “Pindukai muombekwe mose zvenyu muzita raJesu Kristu kuti muregererwe zvitadzo zvenyu. Munobva magamuchira chipo chaMweya Mutsvene." 
Acts2:39 Nokuti chitsidzo ichocho ndechenyu navana venyu navose vari kure, vose vanodaidzwa naTenzi Mwari wedu kwaari.”" 
Acts2:40 Akapupura namamwe mazwi akawanda achivakurudzira achiti, “Zviponesei kuchizvarwa ichi chakakombama.”" 
Acts2:41 Saizvozvo avo vakagamuchira shoko rake vakaombekwa vakabva vawanziridzwa musi iwoyo navanhu vanosvika zviuru zvitatu. 
Acts2:42 Vakaramba vangoti kwati kwati nezvaidzidziswa navapositori uye vakaramba vakabatana navo nomukumedura chingwa nomukunamata. 
Acts2:43 Vose vakawirwa nokutya uye zvishamiso nezviratidzo zvizhinji zvakaitwa nomuvapositori. 
Acts2:44 Vose vaitenda vaigara pamwechete, zvinhu zvavo zviri zvavo vose." 
Acts2:45 Vaitengesa zvavaiva nazvo nezvinhu zvavo vachizvigovera vose, munhu achipiwa zvaainge asina." 
Acts2:46 Zuva nezuva, nomwoyo mumwechete vaienda pamwechete kuTemberi vachimedura chingwa mudzimba dzavo. Vaidya chokudya nomwoyo unofara nemwoyo unopa" 
Acts2:47 vachirumbidza Mwari vachidiwa navanhu vose. Tenzi vaiwanziridza uwandu hwavo zuva nezuva hwaavo vainge vachiponeswa. 
Acts3:1 Rimwe zuva Pita naJohani vaienda kuTemberi panguva dzokunamata paawa yechitatu masikati. 
Acts3:2 Mumwe murume akanga akaremara kubvira pakuberekwa kwake aitakurwa zuva nezuva achindorariswa pasuo guru rainzi Suorakanaka kuti akumbire rubatsiro kuvanhu vaipinda muTemberi," 
Acts3:3 paakaona Pita naJohani vava kuda kupinda muTemberi, akavakumbira rubatsiro." 
Acts3:4 Pita aina Johani akanyatsomutarisisa akati, “Titarise,”" 
Acts3:5 iye ndokuvanan'anidza achitarisira kugamuchira chimwe chinhu kwavari. 
Acts3:6 Asi Pita akati, “Sirivha kana ndarama handina, asi ndinokupa chandinacho. Muzita raJesu Kristu weNazareti, ‘Chifamba.’ ”" 
Acts3:7 Ndokubva amubata ruoko rworudyi achimusimudza. Pakarepo tsoka dzake nezviziso zvadzo zvakabva zvasimba. 
Acts3:8 Akakwakuka akamira akafamba akapinda muTemberi pamwechete navo achiti pamwe fambei pamwe osvetuka svetuka achirumbidza Mwari. 
Acts3:9 Vanhu vose vakamuona achifamba achirumbidza Mwari 
Acts3:10 vakamuziva kuti ndiye uya aigaririra rubatsiro paSuorakanaka reTemberi. Vakakatyamadzwa vakanana kwazvo nezvakanga zvaitika kwaari. 
Acts3:11 Paakaramba angoti name name naPita naJohani vanhu vose vakati wiri wiri kwavari muberere rinonzi Berere raSoromoni vachishamiswa. 
Acts3:12 Pita paakazviona akataura kuvanhu achiti, “Varume vaIsiraeri munoshamisika sei nezvizvi? Munotinan'anidza sei sokunge isu ndisu taita kuti afambe nesimba nounamati wedu?" 
Acts3:13 Mwari waAbhurahamu naIsaki naJakobho Mwari wamadzitateguru edu akarumbidza muranda wake Jesu wamakaturira mukamuramba panaPirato paakafunga zvokumusungunura. 
Acts3:14 Asi imi makaramba mutsvene nomururami mukakumbira kuti mupiwe mhondi 
Acts3:15 mukauraya muridzi weupenyu, iye akamutswa naMwari kuvafi. Isu tiri zvapupu zvaizvozvo." 
Acts3:16 Munhu uyu wamunoona nokuziva asimbaradzwa pamusana pechitendero chake muzita raJesu. Izita raJesu nechitendero chinobva maari chamupa utano uzere sokuonawo kwamuri kuita mose. 
Acts3:17 “Zvino hama dzangu, ndinoziva kuti makazviita mukusaziva sezvakangoitawo vatongi venyu." 
Acts3:18 Asi Mwari zvaakafanotaura nemiromo yavaporofita vose kuti Mesia wake anofanira kutambudzika. Izvi akazvizadzisa nenzira iyoyi. 
Acts3:19 Nezvo pindukai mutendeuke kuti zvitadzo zvenyu zvipfudzwe kuti nguva iya yokumbofefeterwa nokuvapo kwaTenzi," 
Acts3:20 uye kuti atumire Mesia wamakasarudzirwa, iye Jesu," 
Acts3:21 anofanira kumbochengetedzwa kudenga kusvikira zvinhu zvose zvaitika zvakataurwa naMwari nomuromo wavaporofita vake vatsvene vakare. 
Acts3:22 Mosesi akanyatsotaurawo achiti, ‘Tenzi Mwari achakumutsirai muporofita mukati mehama dzenyu sokumutsa kwaakandiita. Munofanira kumuteerera muna zvose zvaanokutaurirai." 
Acts3:23 Ani naani asingateereri muporofita iyeyo achaparadzwa achibviswa mukati mavanhu. 
Acts3:24 Vaporofita vose vakataura kubvira kuna Samueri navamwe vakazotevera vakaparidza nezvamazuva iwaya. 
Acts3:25 Ndimi vana vavaporofita vacho vanorehwa uye vechitenderano chaakaitwa naMwari namadzibaba enyu achiti kuna Abhurahamu, nokumwana wako mhuri dzose dzapasi pose dzichakomborerwa.’" 
Acts3:26 Mwari paakamutsa muranda wake akamutumira pokutanga kwamuri kuti akukomborerei nokukutendeutsai mose kubva kuuipi hwenyu.” 
Acts4:1 Pavaitaura kuvanhu vapristi nomukuru mukuru wapaTemberi navaSadhusei vakauya pavari. 
Acts4:2 Vakanga vatsamwiswa nokuti mukudzidzisa nokuparidza zvaJesu vaidzidzisa vanhu vachivaparidza zvokumuka kwavakafa. 
Acts4:3 Vakavabata vakavaisa mujeri kusvikira mangwana acho nokuti akanga atova mauro. 
Acts4:4 Asi vazhinji vakanzwa shoko vakatenda. Huwandu hwavarume hwaiita zviuru zvinenge zvishanu. 
Acts4:5 Ava mangwana acho vatongi vavo navakuru vakuru navanyori vakanga vakaungana muJerusaremu 
Acts4:6 naAnasi, mupristi mukuru naKaifasi naJohani naArekizanda navose vokumba yomupristi mukuru." 
Acts4:7 Pavakavaisa pakati vakavabvunza kuti makaita izvi nesimba raani uye nezita raani. 
Acts4:8 Zvino Pita, azere naMweya Mutsvene, akati kwavari, “Imi vatongi vavanhu navakuru vakuru" 
Acts4:9 kana tiri kugadzirwa dare nhasi uno basa rakanaka rakaitwa kumhetamakumbo iyi kuti munhu uyu akarapwa sei," 
Acts4:10 ngazvizivikanwe kwamuri mose uye kuvanhu vose veIsiraeri kuti nezita raJesu Kristu weNazareti wamakarovera pamuchinjikwa akamutswa naMwari kuvakafa pamusana pake munhu uyu amire pamberi penyu akasimba. 
Acts4:11 Iri ndiro dombo rakarambwa nemi vavaki asi rava dombo guru rapakona. 
Acts4:12 Hakuna mumwezve munhu anogona kuponesa nokuti hakuna rimwezve zita pasi pose rakatumidzwa munhu pakati pavanhu ratinofanira kuponeswa naro.” 
Acts4:13 Pavakaona chivindi chaPita naJohani uye vachiona kuti vanhu vasina kudzidza, vachingova vanhuwo zvavo, vakashamiswa. Vakazviona kuti vakambenge vaina Jesu." 
Acts4:14 Asi zvavaiona munhu uya akanga aponeswa akamira padyo navo hapana chavakagona kutaura. 
Acts4:15 Pavakavati vambobva mudare, vakakurukurirana vachiti," 
Acts4:16 “Toita sei navanhu ava nokuti zvokuti chiratidzo chinonyatsoonekwa chaitwa nemavari zviri pachena kuna vagari vose vomuJerusaremu uye hatikwanisi kuzviramba. 
Acts4:17 Asi kuti zvirege kupararira pakati pavanhu ngativayambirei kuti vasambotaurazve kuna ani nani zvake nezita irori.” 
Acts4:18 Nezvo vakavadaidza vakavakomekedza kuti vasambotaura zvavo kana kudzidzisa zvako muzita raJesu. 
Acts4:19 Asi Pita naJohani vakavapindura vachiti, “Chimbopafungaiwo zvenyu kuti zvingaite here, pamberi paMwari, kuteerera imi panokuteerera Mwari." 
Acts4:20 Isu hatigoni kurega kutaura zvatakaona nezvatakanzwa.” 
Acts4:21 Pavakawedzera kuvayambira vakavarega vachienda vashaya pokuvaranga napo pamusana pavanhu nokuti vanhu vose vairumbidza Mwari nezvakanga zvaitika. 
Acts4:22 Chikonzero ndechokuti munhu akaitirwa chiratidzo ichi chokuponeswa akanga ava namakore anopfuura makumi mana. 
Acts4:23 Pavakaregedzwa vakaenda kushamwari dzavo vakavarondedzera zvavakanga vataurirwa navapristi navakuru vakuru. 
Acts4:24 Pavakazvinzwa vakadaidzira pamwechete kuna Mwari vachiti, “Tenzi imi makasika denga napasi negungwa nazvose zvirimo imi naMweya Mutsvene mukati" 
Acts4:25 nomuromo watateguru wedu Dhavhidhi muranda wenyu, “ ‘Ko ivo vechirudzi vanoitireiko bopoto, marudzi avanhu vachiita bangano risina maturo." 
Acts4:26 Madzimambo apasi pose vachinyatsorongana, vatongi vachitoitira Tenzi nomuzodzwa wake bangano.’" 
Acts4:27 “Icho chiri chokwadiwo Herodhi naPontio Pirato nevechirudzi navaIsiraeri vakaungana muguta rino vachirwisa muranda wenyu Mutsvene Jesu wamakazodza 
Acts4:28 kuti zvamakafanoronga nesimba roruoko rwenyu nourongwa hwenyu zviitike. 
Acts4:29 Zvino, Tenzi chitarisai kutyisidzira kwavo, mupe kuti varanda venyu vataure shoko renyu nechivindi chaicho" 
Acts4:30 imi makasimudza ruoko rwenyu kuti rurape uye muitewo kuti zviratidzo nezvishamiso zviitwe nezita romuranda wenyu mutsvene, Jesu.”" 
Acts4:31 Pavakapedza kunamata nzvimbo yavakanga vakaungana yakandengendeka vakabva vazadzwa vose naMweya Mutsvene vakataura izwi raMwari nechivindi. 
Acts4:32 Chikwata chevaitenda vaya vakanga vaine mwoyo mumwechete uye hapana aiti chake ndechake. Zvinhu zvavo zvaiva zvavo vose. 
Acts4:33 Vapositori vakapupurira zvokumuka kwaTenzi Jesu nesimba guru, uye nyasha huru dzaiva pavari vose." 
Acts4:34 Pakati pavo pakanga pasina ane chaaishaya nokuti avo vainge vaine minda kana dzimba dzavo vaizvitengesa 
Acts4:35 vachiuya nemari yacho vachizoiisa mumaoko avapositori zvichizogoverwa kuvanhu maererano nezvaidiwa nomunhu. 
Acts4:36 Saizvozvo Josefi akanga atumidzwa navapositori zita rokuti, Bhanabhasi (zvinoreva kuti, “Mukurudziri”) muRevhi," 
Acts4:37 mugari wenyika yeSaipurasi akatengesa munda wake akauya nemari yacho akaiisa mumaoko avapositori. 
Acts5:1 Asi mumwe murume anonzi Ananiya aiva nomudzimai wake ainzi Safira, akatengesa chimwe chikamu chezvinhu zvake." 
Acts5:2 Akachengeta chimwe chikamu chemari yacho mudzimai wake achizviziva. Akauya nechimwe chikamu chemari iya akaiisa mumaoko avapositori. 
Acts5:3 Asi Pita akati, “Nhai Ananiya wapindwa sei naSatani kudai kuti ureve nhema kuna Mweya Mutsvene uchizvichengetera chimwe chikamu chomutengo womunda?" 
Acts5:4 Pawakanga usati watengeswa wakanga usiri wako here uye pawakanga watengeswa mari yacho yakanga isiri mumaoko ako here? Ko zvaita seiko kuti ufunge kuita izvi mumwoyo mako? Hauna kurevera munhu nhema asi Mwari.” 
Acts5:5 Ananiya paakanzwa mazwi aya akawira pasi akabva afa. Vanhu vose vakazvinzwa vakatya zvikuru. 
Acts5:6 Vechidiki vakasimuka vakamuputira vakamutakura vakandomuviga. 
Acts5:7 Mushure memaawa matatu mudzimai wake akauyamo asingazivi zvakanga zvaitika. 
Acts5:8 Pita akati kwaari, “Ndiudze kuti makatengesa munda uyu nemari iyi here?” Mudzimai akati, “Hongu nemari iyoyo.”" 
Acts5:9 Pita ndokuti kwaari, “Ko matenderana sei kuedza Mweya waMwari? Teerera unzwe tsoka dzavanhu vaviga murume wako dzava pamusuo. Vachakutakura vachikuburitsa kunze.”" 
Acts5:10 Pakarepo akabva ati gwadara kuwira pasi achibva afa. Vechiduku vaya pavakapinda vakamuwana atofa. Vakamutakura vachimuburitsa kunze vakandomuviga pedyo nomurume wake. 
Acts5:11 Sangano rose rakawirwa nokutya kukuru uye vose vakanzwa zvinhu izvi. 
Acts5:12 Zviratidzo zvizhinji nezvishamiso zvakaitwa mukati mavanhu namaoko avapositori. Vaisanganira vose muBerere raSoromoni. 
Acts5:13 Vamwe vanhu vose vaitya kubatana navo asi vanhu vaivaremekedza zvikuru. 
Acts5:14 Asi vatendi vairamba vachingowedzerwa kuna Tenzi, varume navakadzi vazhinji" 
Acts5:15 zvokuti vamwe vaitotakura varwere vachivaisa mumigwagwa vachivaradzika pamibhedha napahukwe kuti Pita paainge opfuura nepo kana mumvuri wake chaiwo ungopfuura napana vamwe vavo. 
Acts5:16 Vanhu vakaunganawo vachibva mumaguta akapoteredza Jerusaremu vachiuya navarwere vakanga vachitambudzwa nemweya yakaipa. Vose vakaporeswa. 
Acts5:17 Asi mupristi mukuru akamuka navose vechikwata chake vebato revaSadhusei. Pamusana pokuzara neshanje 
Acts5:18 vakasunga vapositori vakavaisa muJeri ravanhu vose. 
Acts5:19 Asi usiku mutumwa waMwari akazarura makonhi ejeri akavaburitsa ndokuvati," 
Acts5:20 “Endai mundomira muTemberi mutaure kuvanhu mazwi ezveUpenyu uhwu.” 
Acts5:21 Vakateerera zvavakataurirwa izvi vakandopinda muTemberi mangwanani vakadzidzisa. Zvino mupristi mukuru akauya nevaaiva navo ndokuunganidza dare namakurukota ose avaIsiraeri. Vakatuma vanhu kuJeri kundovatora. 
Acts5:22 Asi mapurisa pavakasvika, havana kuvawana muJeri. Vakadzokera vakavataurira vakati," 
Acts5:23 “Tasvikowana Jeri rakanyatsokiiwa. Vachengeti vapaJeri vakamira pamisuo asi patarizarura hapana watawana mukati.” 
Acts5:24 Zvino mukuru wapaTemberi navapristi vakuru pavakanzwa mashoko aya zvakavakangaidza vachishama kuti zvichaperera kupi. 
Acts5:25 Mumwe munhu akauya akavataurira achiti, “Varume vamakaisa mujeri, vamire muTemberi vari kudzidzisa vanhu.”" 
Acts5:26 Ipapo mukuru wapaTemberi namapurisa vakaenda vakandovatora pasina muchokoto nokuti vaitya kutemwa namatombo navanhu. 
Acts5:27 Pavakauya navo vakavamisa pamberi pedare, mupristi mukuru akavabvunza" 
Acts5:28 achiti, “Takanyatsokuyambirai kuti musadzidzise nezita iri asi imi matozadza Jerusaremu nechidzidziso chenyu uye munoda kuti ropa romunhu uyu ritipfukire.”" 
Acts5:29 Asi Pita navapositori vakapindura vachiti, “Tinofanira kuteerera Mwari panokuteerera vanhu." 
Acts5:30 Mwari wamadzibaba edu akamutsa Jesu wamakauraya nokumurembedza pamuti. 
Acts5:31 Mwari akamusimudzira kurudyi rwake somutungamiri nomununuri kuti Isiraeri ipinduke iregererwe zvitadzo. 
Acts5:32 Isu tiri zvapupu zvezvinhu izvi uyewo Mweya Mutsvene akapiwa naMwari kuna vanomuteerera.” 
Acts5:33 Pavakanzwa izvi vakashatirwa zvikuru kwazvo vakafunga zvokuvauraya. 
Acts5:34 Asi mumwe muFarisei, nhengo yedare ainzi Gamarieri, mudzidzisi womutemo airemekedzwa navanhu vose, akasimuka akati ngavamboburitswa panze." 
Acts5:35 Ndopaakavati, “Vanhu veIsiraeri chenjerai nezvamunoita navanhu ava." 
Acts5:36 Tisati tasvika pane zvanhasi izvi, kwakamuka Tudhasi achizviti ndini pano; chitsama chavarume vanosvika mazana mana chakamutevera asi akauraiwa. Vose vaimutevera vakabva vapararira zvikava chinhu pasina." 
Acts5:37 Mushure make makamuka Judhasi wokuGarirea pamazuva okuverengwa kwavanhu. Akakokorodza vamwe vanhu vakamutevera. Naiyewo akaparara. Vose vaimutevera vakaita rumwe rumwe. 
Acts5:38 Pane zvanhasi izvi, ndinoti kwamuri, siyanai navanhu ava, varegei. Kana urongwa uhu nezvavari kuita zviri zvavanhu zvichakundikana" 
Acts5:39 asi kana zviri zvaMwari hamumbokwanisa kuvaparadza. Pamwe mungatowanikwa mavakurwisana naMwari.” 
Acts5:40 Nokudaro vakatevera zano rake. Pavakadaidza vapositori kuti vapinde, vakavarova vakavakomekedza kuti vasataure muzita raJesu ndokuvarega vachienda." 
Acts5:41 Vakabva mudare vachifara kuti vakaonekwa vakakodzera kuzvidzirwa zita iroro. 
Acts5:42 Zuva nezuva, muTemberi nomudzimba, havana kumira kudzidzisa nokuparidza kuti Jesu ndiye Mesia." 
Acts6:1 Pamazuva iwayo vadzidzi pavakanga vava kuwanda vechiGiriki vakanyunyutira vechiHebheru nokuti chirikadzi dzavo dzaidarikirwa pakugoverwa kwamazuva ose. 
Acts6:2 Vane gumi navaviri vakaunganidza gungano ravadzidzi vakati, “Hazvina kunaka kuti tirege kuparidza shoko raMwari tichipa zvokudya."
