Acts6:3 Naizvozvo hama dzangu sarudzai pakati penyu varume vanomwe vane zita rakanaka vazere naMweya noungwaru vatinogona kupa basa iri. 
Acts6:4 Asi isu tozvipira kubasa rokunamata nokuva vashandiri veShoko.” 
Acts6:5 Zvavakataura zvakafadza gungano rose. Vakasarudza Sitefani murume akanga azere nechitendero naMweya Mutsvene kouya Firipi naPurokorusi naNikanori koti Timoti naPemenasi naNikorausi wokuAndiyoku akapindukira kuchiJudha. 
Acts6:6 Vakavaunza panavapositori. Ivo vakanamata vakaisa maoko avo pavari. 
Acts6:7 Shoko raMwari rakaenderera mberi uye uwandi hwavadzidzi hwakakura zvikuru kwazvo muJerusaremu. Vapristi vazhinji vakagamuchirawo chitendero. 
Acts6:8 Sitefani aiva azere nenyasha nesimba akaita zvishamiso zvikuru nezviratidzo pakati pavanhu. 
Acts6:9 Ipapo vamwe vaiva veSinagogu yavaSununguki sokudaidzwa kwayaiitwa, nevokuSairini nevokuArekizandiria nevakabva Kirikia nokuAsia vakamuka kuitirana nharo naSitefani." 
Acts6:10 Asi havana kukwanisana noungwaru naMweya waaitaura ainaye. 
Acts6:11 Vakasoka vamwe varume kuti vati, “Takamunzwa achitaura manzwi okushonha Mosesi naMwari.”" 
Acts6:12 Vakapinza mweya wokupanduka mukati mavanhu nomukati mavakuru vakuru nomuvanyori vakaenda kwaari vakamubata vakamuunza kudare. 
Acts6:13 Vakamuisira zvapupu zvenhema vakati: “Munhu uyu haambomira kutaura mashoko ukushora nzvimbo ino tsvene uye kushora Mutemo," 
Acts6:14 nokuti takamunzwa achiti, ‘Jesu uyu weNazareti achaparadza nzvimbo iyi uye achasandura tsika dzatakagamuchira kuna Mosesi.’ ”" 
Acts6:15 Dare rose rakanga rigeremo rakanyatsomutarisisa rikaona kuti uso hwake hwakanga hwakaita souso hwomutumwa. 
Acts7:1 Mupristi mukuru akati, “Ndizvo here izvi?”" 
Acts7:2 Sitefani akati, “Hama nemi madzibaba ndinzwei. Mwari wembiri akazviratidza kuna tateguru wedu Abhurahamu paakanga ari kuMesopotamia asati andogara kuHarani akati kwaari," 
Acts7:3 ‘Ibva munyika mako nomuhama dzako uende kunyika yandichakuratidza.’ 
Acts7:4 Akabva kunyika yavaKaradhia akandogara kuHarani. Pakafa baba vake, Mwari akamubvisa ikoko akamuunza munyika ino yamugere iye zvino." 
Acts7:5 Asi haana kumupa nhaka mairi kunyange pokutsika rutsoka zvarwo, asi akatsidza kuti achaipa kwaari kuti ive yake uye kuti ive yezvizvarwa zvake mushure make. Kunyange akanga asina mwana," 
Acts7:6 Mwari akati zvizvarwa zvake zvichava vatorwa munyika yavamwe vachavaita varanda nokuvabata zvakaipa kwamakore mazana mana. 
Acts7:7 Asi Mwari akati, ‘Ndicharanga rudzi irworwo rwavachashandira. Mushure maizvozvo vachabuda vozondinamata munzvimbo ino.’" 
Acts7:8 Akaita naye chitenderano chokudzingiswa. Naizvozvo Abhurahamu akava baba vaIsaki akamudzingisa pazuva rechisere. Isaki akava baba waJakobho. Jakobho akava baba wamadzitateguru gumi namaviri. 
Acts7:9 “Pamusana pokuti mamwe madzitateguru aya akaita shanje naJosefi, akamutengesa kuIjipiti asi Mwari aiva naye." 
Acts7:10 Akamununura munhamo dzake dzose akamuitira nyasha. Akamupa ungwaru pamberi paFarao mambo weIjipiti. Iye Farao akamuitawo mutongi weIjipiti neweimba yake yose. 
Acts7:11 Zvino kwakauya nzara muIjipiti yose neKanani nokutambura kukuru kwazvo. Madzitateguru edu akashaya zvokudya. 
Acts7:12 Jakobho paakanzwa kuti kune zvokudya kuIjipiti akatuma madzibaba edu kokutanga. 
Acts7:13 Parwendo rwechipiri Josefi akazvizivisa kuvakoma vake. Ndokubva mhuri yaJosefi yazivikanwa naFarao. 
Acts7:14 Josefi akavatuma kundodana Jakobho baba vake kwaari nehama dzake dzose dzaisvika makumi manomwe ane vanhu vashanu. 
Acts7:15 Jakobho akadzika kuIjipiti. Iye pachake namadzitateguru edu vakafa. 
Acts7:16 Jakobho akatakurwa achiendeswa kuShikemu akaradzikwa muguva rakanga ratengwa nechitsama chemari kuvana vaHamori kuShikemu. 
Acts7:17 “Nguva yezvakanga zvatsidzirwa Abhurahamu naMwari payakanga yava kusvika, vanhu vakawanda, vakava vazhinji" 
Acts7:18 kusvikira pamuka mumwe mambo akanga asingazivi Josefi. 
Acts7:19 Munhu iyeyo akabata rudzi rwedu noujarijari. Akamanikidza madzitateguru edu kuti vayanike vacheche vavo kuti vafe. 
Acts7:20 Panguva iyoyo ndipowo pakaberekwa Mosesi uye akanga akanaka zvikuru kwazvo pana Mwari. Akarerwa kwemwedzi mitatu mumba mababa vake. 
Acts7:21 Paakazoburitswawo panze mukunda waFarao akamutora akamuita wake ndokumurera somwana wake. 
Acts7:22 Mosesi akadzidziswa ungwaru hose hwavaIjipiti uye akanga ane simba mumazwi ake nomuzviito. 
Acts7:23 “Paakanga ava namakore makumi mana, akaita pfungwa yokushanyira hama dzake vaIsiraeri." 
Acts7:24 Paakaona mumwe wavo achiitirwa zvakaipa akadzivirira aiitirwa zvakaipa. Akamutsividzira nokuponda muIjipiti. 
Acts7:25 Mosesi aifunga kuti hama dzake dzainzwisisa kuti Mwari aida kuvanunura nomumaoko ake asi havana kunzwisisa. 
Acts7:26 Ramangwana racho akasvika pane vamwe vairwa. Akada kuvayananisa achiti varume muri hama nehama munoda kukuvadziranei? 
Acts7:27 Asi murume aiitira mumwe zvakaipa akamusairira kurutivi achiti, ‘Ndiani akakuita mambo nomutongi wedu?" 
Acts7:28 Asi unoda kundiuraya sokuuraya kwawakaita muIjipiti nezuro?’ 
Acts7:29 Mosesi paakanzwa izvi akatiza. Akava mupoteri munyika yavaMidhia kwaakabereka vanakomana vaviri. 
Acts7:30 “Kwakati kwapera makore makumi mana mutumwa akazviratidza kwaari murenje pedyo negomo reSinai murimi romoto mugwenzi. 
Acts7:31 Mosesi paakazviona akashamiswa nezvaakaona. Paakaswedera pedyo kuti anyatsoona, izwi raTenzi rakanzwika richiti," 
Acts7:32 ‘Ndini Mwari wamadzibaba ako, Mwari waAbhurahamu naIsaki naJakobho.’ Mosesi akadedera akatya kutarisa." 
Acts7:33 Tenzi akati kwaari, ‘Bvisa shangu dzako mutsoka dzako nokuti nzvimbo yawakatsika inzvimbo inoera." 
Acts7:34 Ndanyatsoona kutambudzwa kwavanhu vangu vari muIjipiti. Ndanzwa kugomera kwavo; zvino ndaburuka kuzovanunura. Saka zvino chiuya ndikutume kuIjipiti.’ 
Acts7:35 Mosesi uya wavakaramba vachiti, ‘Ndiani akakuita mambo nomutongi?’ Murume iyeyo ndiye akatumwa naMwari samambo somununuri nesimba romutumwa akazviratidza mugwenzi." 
Acts7:36 Akavaburitsa mushure mokunge aita zvishamiso nezviratidzo muIjipiti nokuGungwa Dzvuku nomurenje kwamakore makumi mana. 
Acts7:37 Ndiyeyu Mosesi wacho akati kuvaIsiraeri, ‘Mwari vachakumutsirai muporofita muhama dzenyu sokundimutsa kwaakaita." 
Acts7:38 Iyeyu ndiye aiva negungano murenje nomutumwa akataura kwaari pagomo reSinai uye akataura namadzitateguru edu. Akagamuchira zvirevo zvipenyu zvokutipa.’ 
Acts7:39 “Madzitateguru edu akaramba kumuteerera vakamusairira kwakadaro. Mwoyo yavo yakanga yadzokera kuIjipiti 
Acts7:40 vachiti kuna Aroni tigadzirire vamwari vokutitungamirira. ZvaMosesiwo uyu akatiburitsa munyika yeIjipiti hatizivi zvakaitika kwaari. 
Acts7:41 Pamazuva iwayo vakaumba mhuru vakapira chibayiro kuchiumbwa chokunamata vachipemberera zvakaitwa namaoko avo. 
Acts7:42 Mwari akavafuratirawo ndokuvati chi mukunamata gurusvusvu romudenga sokunyorwa kwazvakaitwa mubhuku ravaporofita zvichinzi: “ ‘Makambopira kwandiri here mhuka dzakauraiwa kana zvibayiro kwamakore makumi mana amaiva murenje nhaimi vaIsiraeri? 
Acts7:43 Handiti makatakura tendhe raMoreki nenyenyedzi yamwari Refani, zvifananidzo zvamakaumba kuti munamate? Ndichakudzingirai kunyika iri mberi kweBhabhironi.’" 
Acts7:44 “Madzibaba edu akanga ane tendhe rechipupuriro murenje raiva rakaita sezvakanga zvataurwa naMwari akataura kuna Mosesi kuti ariite maererano namamiriro aro aakanga amboona. 
Acts7:45 Madzibaba eduwo akarigamuchira akauya naro pamwechete naJoshuwa pavakatorera nyika vechirudzi vaifanodzingirwa madzibaba edu naMwari. Vaiva naro kusvikira pamazuva aDhavhidhi 
Acts7:46 akafadza Mwari. Dhavhidhi akazokumbira kuti atsvakire Mwari waJakobho pokugara. 
Acts7:47 Asi Soromoni ndiye akazomuvakira imba. 
Acts7:48 Asi wokumusorosoro haagari mudzimba dzakaitwa namaoko sokutaura komuporofita achiti," 
Acts7:49 “ ‘Denga chigaro changu choumambo, nyika iri iyo chitambarariko chetsoka dzangu. Imba yorudzii yaungandivakire; ndizvo zvinotaura Tenzi. Ndeipi nzvimbo yandingazororere?" 
Acts7:50 Harusi ruoko rwangu here rwakaita zvose izvi? 
Acts7:51 Imi vanhu vomusoro wakaoma, vanhu vomwoyo isinei naMwari, venzeve dzisingadi kunzwa zvaMwari, vanhu vokurwisana naMweya. Zvaiita madzibaba enyu ndizvowo zvamunongoita.’" 
Acts7:52 “Muporofita upi asina kutambudzwa namadzibaba enyu? Vakauraya vaya vakafanotaura zvokuuya komururami wakamupandukira mukaponda. 
Acts7:53 Imi makagamuchira mutemo sokupiwa kwawakaitwa navatumwa asi hamuna kuuchengeta.” 
Acts7:54 Pavakanzwa zvinhu izvi vakashatirwa kwazvo vakamuchenamira mazino. 
Acts7:55 Asi iye azere naMweya Mutsvene, akatarisisa mudenga akaona mbiri yaMwari, Jesu amire kurudyi rwaMwari" 
Acts7:56 akati, “Tarirai muone, ndiri kuona denga rakazaruka Mwanakomana womunhu akamira kurudyi rwaMwari.”" 
Acts7:57 Asi vakazhamba nezwi repamusoro vakadzivirira nzeve vakamuti momote," 
Acts7:58 ndokumuburitsa kunze kweguta vakamutaka namabwe. Zvapupu zviya zvakaisa magemenzi azvo patsoka dzerimwe jaya rainzi Sauro. 
Acts7:59 Pavaimutaka namatombo Sitefani akanamata achiti, “Tenzi Jesu gamuchirai mweya wangu.”" 
Acts7:60 Akapfugama akadaidzira nezwi guru achiti, “Tenzi, musavape mhosva yechitadzo ichi.” Paakapedza kutaura akabva avata hope dzokupedzisira." 
Acts8:1 Sauro akabvumirana nezvokuuraiwa kwake. Musi iwoyo kutambudzwa kukuru kwesangano kwakamuka muJerusaremu. Vose, kusiya vapositori chete, vakapararira nenyika yeJudhea neSamaria." 
Acts8:2 Vanamati vakaviga Sitefani vakamuchema zvikuru. 
Acts8:3 Asi Sauro paaiedza kuparadza Sangano, aipinda imba nemba achikwekweretsa varume navakadzi achivaisa mujeri." 
Acts8:4 Zvino vaya vakapararira, vakaenda vachiparidza shoko." 
Acts8:5 Firipi akadzika kuguta reSamaria akavaparidza zvaMesia. 
Acts8:6 Chikwata chikuru chavanhu chakateerera nomwoyo mumwechete kune zvaitaurwa naFiripi pavakamunzwa uye pavakaona zviratidzo zvaaiita," 
Acts8:7 nokuti mweya yakaipa yakabuda muna vazhinji vakanga vakapoterwa ichizhamba. Vamwe vazhinji vakanga vakaoma mitezo kana kuremara vakarapwa. 
Acts8:8 Naizvozvo makave norufaro rukuru muguta iroro. 
Acts8:9 Kwaiva nomumwe murume ainzi Simoni aiita mashiripiti muguta iroro, akashamisa vanhu veSamaria achizviti ndini pano." 
Acts8:10 Vose vakamuteerera kubvira kuvaduku kusvika kuvakuru vachiti, “Murume uyu ndiye mumwe mwari uya anonzi Samukurumukuru.”" 
Acts8:11 Nokudaro vaimuteerera nokuti aivashamisa namashiripiti ake kwenguva ndefu. 
Acts8:12 Asi pavakatenda Firipi paaiparidza Shoko Rakanaka nezvoumambo hwaMwari uye zita raJesu Kristu vakaombekwa, varume navakadzi." 
Acts8:13 Kunyange Simoni pachake akadavira. Mushure mokunge aombekwa akaenderera mberi aina Firipi. Paakaona zviratidzo nezvishamiso zvikuru zvakaitwa zvakamukatyamadza. 
Acts8:14 Vapositori vaiva kuJerusaremu pavakanzwa kuti Samaria yakanga yagamuchira Shoko raMwari vakavatumira Pita naJohani. 
Acts8:15 Vakadzika vakavanamatira kuti vagashire Mweya Mutsvene 
Acts8:16 nokuti Mweya Mutsvene akanga asati aburukira panaani zvake wavo; asi vakanga vangoombekwa chete muzita raTenzi Jesu. 
Acts8:17 Vakaisa maoko avo pavari vakagamuchira Mweya Mutsvene. 
Acts8:18 Simoni paakaona kuti Mweya waipiwa nokuiswa kwamaoko avapositori pavanhu akavapa mari achiti," 
Acts8:19 “Ndipeiwo simba irori kuti munhu wose wandinenge ndaisa maoko angu paari agamuchire Mweya Mutsvene.” 
Acts8:20 Asi Pita akati kwaari, “Parara nemari yako iyoyo nokuti wafunga kuti unogona kuwana chipo chaMwari nemari." 
Acts8:21 Hauna nzvimbo kana mugove mune zvinhu izvi nokuti mwoyo wako hauna kururama pamberi paMwari. 
Acts8:22 Saka tendeuka pauipi hwako uhu unamate kuna Tenzi kuti zvimwe pfungwa dzemwoyo wako dziregererwe 
Acts8:23 nokuti ndinoona kuti mwoyo wako uzere nenduru inovava uye uri musungwa wouipi.” 
Acts8:24 Simoni akapindura achiti, “Ndinamatireiwo kuna Tenzi kuitira kuti zvose zvamataura zvirege kundiwira.”" 
Acts8:25 Zvino pavakanga vapa uchapupu hwavo uye vataura shoko raTenzi vakadzokera kuJerusaremu vachiparidza Shoko Rakanaka mumisha yakawanda yevekuSamaria. 
Acts8:26 Mutumwa waMwari akati kuna Firipi, “Simuka uende kumaodzanyemba kunzira inodzika kuGaza ichibva kuJerusaremu.” Nzira iyi inzira yomurenje." 
Acts8:27 Akasimuka akaenda. Hoyo muEtiopia muyuniki aiva gurukota raKandasi mambokadzi wavaEtiopia aiva mukuru mukuru wezvoupfumi hwake hwose, akanga auya kuJerusaremu kuzonamata." 
Acts8:28 Akanga achidzokera agere mungoro yake achiverenga bhuku romuporofita Isaya. 
Acts8:29 Mweya akati kuna Firipi, “Enda undobatana nengoro iyo.”" 
Acts8:30 Firipi akamhanyira kwaari akamunzwa achiverenga Isaya muporofita. Akabvunza kuti, “Muri kunzwisisa here zvamuri kuverenga.”" 
Acts8:31 Iye akati, “Ndingagonzwisisa sei kusatoti mumwe anditsanangurira.” Akakumbirisa Firipi kuti akwire agare naye." 
Acts8:32 Zvino ndima yaMagwaro Matsvene yaaiverenga ndeiyi. “Sehwai iri kuendwa nayo kundouraiwa kana sehwayana iri pamuveuri wayo, haana kumboti muromo bufu." 
Acts8:33 Mukuninipiswa ikoku haana kuitirwa zvaaikodzera Ndiani angatsanangure nezvechizvarwa chake nokuti upenyu hwake hwakabviswa panyika.” 
Acts8:34 Muyuniki akati kuna Firipi, “Nditaurirewo kuti muporofita uyu ari kutaura nezvani, nezvake here kana kuti nezvomumwewo?”" 
Acts8:35 Ipapo Firipi akatangisa kutaura achibvira pandima iyi yaMagwaro Matsvene, akamutaurira zveShoko Rakanaka rezvaJesu." 
Acts8:36 Pavaifamba kudaro munzira vakasvika pane mvura. Muyuniki akati, “Tarisa uone pano pane mvura. Chingandirambidze kuombekwa chii?”" 
Acts8:37 Firipi akati, “Kana uchitenda nemwoyo wose unogona kuombekwa.” Iye akapindura achiti, “Ndinotenda kuti Jesu Kristu Mwanakomana waMwari.”" 
Acts8:38 Muyuniki akati, Ngoro imiswe. Vose vari vaviri vakapinda mumvura iye Firipi nomuyuniki akabva amuombeka." 
Acts8:39 Pavakabuda mumvura Mweya waTenzi wakabvisa Firipi ipapo. Muyuniki haana kuzomuonazve. Asi akaenda rwendo rwake achifara zvikuru. 
Acts8:40 Firipi akazoonekwa ava kuAzotusi. Maaipfuura namo aiparidza Shoko Rakanaka mumaguta ose kudzamara kusvika kuKesaria. 
Acts9:1 Ipapowo Sauro akanga ari moto moto kutyisidzira nokuuraya vadzidzi vaTenzi. Akaenda kumupristi mukuru," 
Acts9:2 akamukumbira matsamba akanyorerwa masinagogu okuDhamasikusi okuti kana akawana ani naani zvake anotevera nzira iyi, vangave varume kana vakadzi, auye navo kuJerusaremu vakasungwa." 
Acts9:3 Zvino zvaaifamba; avakusvika kuDhamasikusi chiedza chakabva kudenga chikayerekana chamupenyera. 
Acts9:4 Akabva aputsikira pasi. Akanzwa izwi richitaura kwaari richiti, “Sauro, Sauro uri kunditambudzireiko?”" 
Acts9:5 Iye akati, “Ko ndimi aniko Tenzi?” Iye akati, “Ndini Jesu wauri kutambudza." 
Acts9:6 Asi chisimuka upinde muguta. Uchataurirwa zvaunofanira kuita.” 
Acts9:7 Varume vaaifamba navo zvakavashaisa romuromo. Vainzwa izvi asi pasina wavari kuona. 
Acts9:8 Sauro akasimuka akazarura maziso ake asi hapana chaaikwanisa kuona. Naizvozvo vakatoita zvokumubata ruoko vachimutungamirira. Vakaenda naye muDhamasikusi. 
Acts9:9 Akaita mazuva matatu asingaoni asingadyi kana kunwa. 
Acts9:10 Imomo muDhamasikusi maiva nomudzidzi ainzi Ananiya. Tenzi akati kwaari, muchiratidzo, “Ananiya,” iye akati, “Ndiri pano Tenzi.”" 
Acts9:11 Tenzi akati kwaari, “Simuka uende kumugwagwa unonzi Sitireti ubvunze pamba paJudhasi mumwe murume wokuTasusi anonzi Sauro. Izvozvi ari kutonamata" 
Acts9:12 uye aoneswa murume anonzi Ananiya achiuya achizoisa maoko ake paari kuti akwanise kuonazve.” 
Acts9:13 Asi Ananiya akapindura achiti, “Tenzi ndakanzwa navazhinji nezvomurume uyu kuti zvakawanda sei zvakaipa zvaakaita kuvatsvene venyu kuJerusaremu." 
Acts9:14 Iko kuno ane simba rinobva kuvapristi vakuru kuti asunge vose vanodaidza zita renyu.” 
Acts9:15 Asi Tenzi akati kwaari, “Enda zvako nokuti iye mudziyo wangu wokutakura zita rangu pamberi pevechirudzi napamberi pamadzimambo napamberi pavaIsiraeri," 
Acts9:16 nokuti ndichamuratidza kuti anofanira kutambudzika zvakadiyi pamusana pezita rangu.” 
Acts9:17 Naizvozvo Ananiya akaenda akasvikopinda muimba iyoyo. Akaisa maoko ake paari akati, “Hama Sauro, Tenzi Jesu akazvionesa panzira yawaiuya nayo andituma kuti ukwanise kuonazve uye kuti uzadzwe naMweya naMutsvene.”" 
Acts9:18 Pakarepo zvimwe zvinenge maranga zvakadonha mumaziso ake, akagona kuonazve. Akasimuka akaombekwa." 
Acts9:19 Akadya akabva asimba. Sauro akagara navadzidzi kuDhamasikusi kwamazuva mazhinji. 
Acts9:20 Pakarepo aiparidza mumasinagogu achiti Jesu Mwanakomana waMwari. 
Acts9:21 Vose vakamunzwa vakakatyamadzwa vachiti, “Ko uyu haasiriye here murume uya akamutsa muchokoto muJerusaremu kuna vavo vanodaidza zita iri uye ndozvaavinga kuno kuti aende navo vakasungwa kuvaPristi vakuru?”" 
Acts9:22 Simba raPauro rakaramba richingowedzera, vaJudha vaigara muDhamasikusi vakazvishaira pazvo avakuratidza pachena kuti Jesu ndiye Mesia." 
Acts9:23 Mushure memazuva mazhinji vaJudha vakapangana kumuuraya. Bangano ravo rakazivikanwa naSauro. 
Acts9:24 Vaigaririra pamisuo mikuru siku nesikati kuti vamuuraye. 
Acts9:25 Asi vadzidzi vake vakamutora nousiku vakamudzikisa ari mutswanda napamusoro porusvingo. 
Acts9:26 Paakasvika kuJerusaremu akaedza kubatana navadzidzi asi vose vaimutya nokuti havana kutenda kuti akanga ava mudzidzi. 
Acts9:27 Asi Bhanabhasi akamutora akaenda naye kuvapositori akavatsanangurira kuti akaona sei panzira, Tenzi akataura naye uye kuti akaparidza muDhamasikusi nechivindi chakadii muzita raJesu." 
Acts9:28 Akagara navo akasununguka muJerusaremu 
Acts9:29 achiparidza akashinga muzita raTenzi. Akataura achipikisana nevechiGiriki asi ivo vaitotsvaka zvokumuuraya. 
Acts9:30 Vehama pavakazviziva vakadzika naye kuSezaria vakamuendesa kuTaso. 
Acts9:31 Nezvo sangano rakava norunyararo muJudhea yose nomuGarirea nomuSamaria. Sangano rakasimbiswa richibatsirwa naMweya Mutsvene, rikakura richigara mukutya Tenzi." 
Acts9:32 Zvino Pita zvaaifamba — famba mukati mavo vose akaendawo kuvatsvene vaigara kuRidha. 
Acts9:33 Ikoko akawana mumwe murume ainzi Eniasi akanga angove wepabonde nokurwara kwamakore masere uye akanga akafa mitezo. 
Acts9:34 Pita akati kwaari, “Eniasi Jesu Kristu ari kukurapa, simuka upete bonde rako.” Akabva asimuka pakarepo." 
Acts9:35 Vagari vose vomuRidha nomuSharoni vakamuona vakatendeukira kuna Tenzi. 
Acts9:36 KuJopa ikoko kwaiva nomudzimai ainzi Tabhita, zvinoreva kuti Dhokasi, akanga azere namabasa akanaka namabasa etsitsi." 
Acts9:37 Pamazuva iwayo akarwara akafa. Pavakanga vamushambidza vakandomurarisa muimba yapamusoro. 
Acts9:38 Zvino Ridha zvayaiva pedyo neJopa, vadzidzi pavakanzwa kuti Pita ariko vakatuma varume vaviri kwaari kundomukumbira vachiti, “Uyai kwatiri nokukasira.”" 
Acts9:39 Naizvozvo Pita akasimuka akaenda navo. Paakasvika, vakaenda naye kuimba yapamusoro. Chirikadzi dzose dzakamira paari dzichichema dzichiratidza mabhachi nehanzu dzakasonwa naDhokasi achinavo." 
Acts9:40 Pita akavaburitsa kunze vose akapfugama achinamata. Akatendeukira kuchitunha akati, “Tabhita muka.” Tabhita akabva asvinura. Paakaona Pita, akamuka akaita zvokugara." 
Acts9:41 Pita akamutambanudzira ruoko akabva amusimudza ndokudaidza vanamati nechirikadzi akamupa kwavari ava mupenyu. 
Acts9:42 Zvakazivikanwa muJopa yose, vanhu vazhinji vakadavira muna Tenzi." 
Acts9:43 Akagara kwamazuva mazhinji naSimoni musuki wamaTehwe. 
Acts10:1 KuSezaria kwaiva nomumwe murume ainzi Koneriasi mutungamiriri wezana ramasoja wechikwata chainzi chikwata chamaTariyana," 
Acts10:2 munhu aitya Mwari pamwechete nemhuri yake yose aiva noruoko rwokupa kwazvo kuvanhu uye aigara achinamata kuna Mwari. 
Acts10:3 Paawa yechitatu yamasikati akanyatsoona muchiratidzo mutumwa waMwari achipinda maaiva achiti, “Koneriasi.”" 
Acts10:4 Akamutarisisa achitya akati, “Chiiko nhai Tenzi?” Mutumwa ndokuti, “Minamato yako nezvipo zvako kuvanhu zvakwira kudenga sechinhu chinoyeukwa pamberi paMwari." 
Acts10:5 Zvino chitumira vanhu kuJopa vauye naSimoni anonzi Pita. 
Acts10:6 Agere pamba paSimoni wamatehwe ane imba iri munyasi megungwa.” 
Acts10:7 Mutumwa uya akataura kwaari paakaenda, akadaidza varanda vake vaviri nomusoja aida zvokunamata pakati pavanhu vaimushandira." 
Acts10:8 Akati avarondedzera zvose akavatuma kuJopa. 
Acts10:9 Ramangwana acho pavakanga vari parwendo rwavo vava kusvika pedyo neguta, Pita akakwira pamusoro pemba kundonamata masikati makuru. Akanzwa nzara akada zvokudya." 
Acts10:10 Asi pavakanga vachiri kugadzira zvokudya, akava mumweya." 
Acts10:11 Akaona denga richizaruka chimwe chinhu chichiburuka chakaita sejira guru richiburutswa pasi richiita serakabatwa namakona aro mana. 
Acts10:12 Mariri makanga mune mhuka dzakasiyana — siyana nezvipuka zvinoita zvokuzvova napasi neshiri dzedenga. 
Acts10:13 Kwakauya izwi kwaari richiti, “Pita simuka uuraye udye.”" 
Acts10:14 Asi Pita akati, “Kwete Tenzi nokuti handisati ndambodya zvinhu zvose zvose kana zvakan'ora.”" 
Acts10:15 Izwi rakauyazve kechipiri kwaari richiti, “Zvinenge zvachenurwa naMwari usazviti zvakan'ora.”" 
Acts10:16 Izvi zvakaitika katatu chinhu chacho chikabva chatorwa pakarepo chikaendeswa kudenga. 
Acts10:17 Pita paakanga achiri kukangaidzwa mumwoyo kuti chiratidzo chaakanga aona chinorevei, havo varume vaya vakatumwa naKoneriasi vakanga vatomira pasuo guru nokuti vakanga vabvunza nezvemba yaSimoni." 
Acts10:18 Vakadaidzira kuti vabvunze kuti Simoni anonzi Pita ari kugarapo here. 
Acts10:19 Pita paakanga achifungisisa nezvechiratidzo, Mweya akati kwaari, “Chinzwa varume vatatu vari kukutsvaka." 
Acts10:20 Simuka udzike uende navo pasina zvokukahadzika nokuti ndini ndavatuma.” 
Acts10:21 Pita akadzikawo kwaiva navarume vaya akati, “Ndini wamuri kutsvaka. Mavingei?”" 
Acts10:22 Ivo vakati, “Koneriasi, mutariri wezana ramasoja munhu ari pachokwadi, munhu anotya Mwari uye anorumbidzwa norudzi rwose rwechiJudha akatungamirirwa nomutumwa anoera kuzokudaidzai kuti muuye kumba kwake kuti anzwe zvamungataure.”" 
Acts10:23 Ipapo akavapa pokurara. Ramangwana acho, akamuka akaenda navo. Vamwe vehama vokuJopa vakaendawo naye." 
Acts10:24 Pazuva rinotevera racho vakapinda muSezaria. Koneriasi anga achivatarisira uye, akanga atodaidza hama neshamwari dzake dzapamwoyo." 
Acts10:25 Pita paakapinda, Koneriasi akamuchingura akagwadama patsoka dzake akamupfugamira." 
Acts10:26 Pita akamusimudza achiti, “Simukai ini ndiri munhuwo?”" 
Acts10:27 Paaitaura naye akapinda akawana vanhu vazhinji vakaungana 
Acts10:28 akati kwavari, “Imi munozviziva pachenyu kuti zvinorambidzwa nomutemo zvakadii kuti muJudha afambidzane kana kushanyira ani zvake worumwe rudzi asi Mwari wandiratidza kuti handifaniri kuti ani zvake haakodzeri kana kuti akan'ora." 
Acts10:29 Saizvozvo pakauya vanhu kuzondikoka, ndakauya pasina zvokuramba. Nezvo ndinokubvunzai kuti mandidaidzirei.”" 
Acts10:30 Koneriasi akati, “Mazuva mana apfuura panguva yakaita saiyo ino ndakanga ndichinamata paawa yechitatu masikati mumba mangu. Ndiye onei munhu amira pamberi pangu akapfeka zvinhu zvichena!" 
Acts10:31 Akati, ‘Koneriasi munamato wako wanzwika uye zvipo zvako kuvarombo zvakayeukwa pamberi paMwari." 
Acts10:32 Tumira nhume kuJopa ubvunze nezvaSimoni anonzi Pita agere paSimoni musuki wamatehwe ane imba iri munyasi megungwa.’ 
Acts10:33 Saizvozvo ndakabva ndatumira nhume kwamuri pakarepo. Imiwo maita zvakanaka kuti mauya. Naizvozvo tiri pano tose pamberi paMwari kuti tinzwe zvamaudzwa naMwari.” 
Acts10:34 Pita akatanga kutaura achiti, “Chokwadi ndiri kuona kuti Mwari haana rusaruro." 
Acts10:35 Asi mumarudzi ose, ani naani anomutya uye anoita zvakarurama anogamuchirika kwaari." 
Acts10:36 Imi munoziva izwi raakatuma kuIsiraeri raiparidza Shoko Rakanaka rorugare zvichiitwa nokuna Jesu Kristu Tenzi wavose. 
Acts10:37 Ndiroro shoko rakaparidzwa muJudhea yose kubvira kuGarirea mushure meruombeko rwaiparidzwa naJohani. 
Acts10:38 Mwari akazodza Jesu weNazareti naMweya Mutsvene uye akamupa simba. Munozivawo kuti akafamba achiita zvakanaka achiporesa vose vainge vari pasi pesimba raDhiyabhori nokuti Mwari aiva naye. 
Acts10:39 Isu tiri zvapupu zvezvinhu zvose zvaakaita munyika yavaJudha neJerusaremu. Vakamuuraya nokumuturika pamuti. 
Acts10:40 Mwari akamumutsa pazuva retatu akamuratidza 
Acts10:41 kwete kuvanhu vose asi kunesu vakasarudzwa naMwari kuva zvapupu isu takadya nokunwa naye mushure mokumuka kwake muvafi; 
Acts10:42 uye akatiti tinofanira kundoparidza vanhu nokupupura kuti ndiye akagadzwa naMwari kuva mutongi wavapenyu navakafa. 
Acts10:43 Vaporofita vose vanomupupurira kuti munhu wose anotenda kwaari anoregererwa zvitadzo zvake muzita rake.” 
Acts10:44 Pita paakanga achiri kutaura, Mweya Mutsvene akaburikira pana vose vakanzwa shoko iri." 
Acts10:45 Vatendi pakati pavakadzingiswa vakanga vauya naPita vakashamiswa, nokuti chipo chaMweya Mutsvene chakanga chadururirwa kunyange pane vechirudzi," 
Acts10:46 nokuti vakanzwa vachitaura nendimi uye vachirumbidza Mwari. 
Acts10:47 Ipapo Pita akati, “Pana angarambidze here kuti vanhu ava vaombekwe nemvura vadai kugashira Mweya Mutsvene sokugamuchira kwatakamuita?”" 
Acts10:48 Akabva ati ngavaombekwe muzita raJesu Kristu. Vakazomukumbira kuti ambogara navo kwamazuva akati kuti. 
Acts11:1 Vapositori navehama vaiva kuJudhea vakanzwa kuti vechirudzi vakanga vagamuchirawo Shoko raMwari. 
Acts11:2 Naizvozvo Pita paakakwira kuJerusaremu vechikwata chevokudzingiswa vakamutsoropodza 
Acts11:3 vachiti, “Makaenderei kuvanhu vasina kudzingiswa muchidya navo?”" 
Acts11:4 Pita akatanga kutsanangura achinyatsovarondedzera zvakaitika, achiti:" 
Acts11:5 “Ndaiva muguta reJopa ndichinamata; ndiri mumweya ndakaona, chiratidzo chechimwe chinhu chaiburuka chaiita sejira guru richidzikiswa richibva kudenga richiita serakabatwa namakona aro mana. Rakaburuka richiuya kwandiri." 
Acts11:6 Pandakanyatsoritarisisa ndakaona mhuka nezvikara zvinodya nyama nezvinozvova napasi neshiri dzedenga. 
Acts11:7 Ndakanzwa izwi richiti kwandiri, ‘Pita simuka uuraye udye.’" 
Acts11:8 Asi ndakati, ‘Kwete, Tenzi, handisati ndambodya, zvisingakodzeri kana zvakan'ora.’" 
Acts11:9 Asi izwi rakapindura kechipiri richibva kudenga richiti, ‘Zvinenge zvachenurwa naMwari usazviti zvakan'ora.’" 
Acts11:10 Izvi zvakaitika katatu. Zvose zvikabva zvasimudzwa zvichiendeswa kudenga. 
Acts11:11 Panguva yakareyo varume vatatu vakasvika pamba pataigara vakanga vatumwa kwandiri vachibva kuSezaria. 
Acts11:12 Mweya akandiudza kuti ndiende navo pasina zvorusaruro. Vehama vatanhatu ava vakaendawo neni. Takapinda mumba momurume iyeyo. 
Acts11:13 Akatirondedzera kuona kwaakaita mutumwa amire mumba make achiti, ‘Tuma vanhu kuJopa vauye naSimoni anonzi Pita." 
Acts11:14 Iye achakutaurira shoko richakuponesa iwe nemhuri yako yose.’ 
Acts11:15 Pandakatangisa kutaura Mweya Mutsvene akaburukira pavari sezvakangoitikawo patiri pakutanga paya. 
Acts11:16 Ndakayeuka shoko raTenzi paakati, ‘Johani aiombeka nemvura asi imi muchaombekwa naMweya Mutsvene.’" 
Acts11:17 Zvino kana Mwari akapa chipo chimwechetecho chaakapa kwatiri patakatenda muzita raTenzi Jesu Kristu. Ko ndiri aniwo zvangu ndaigona kumirisana naMwari.” 
Acts11:18 Pavakanzwa izvi vakapwiswa vakarumbidza Mwari vachiti, “Saka Mwari anoitawo kuti vechirudzi vatendeuke vawane upenyu.”" 
Acts11:19 Zvino vaya vakapararira pamusana pokutambudzwa kwakamuka nokuda kwaSitefani, vakaenda zvokutonosvika kuFonikia neSaipurasi nokuAndiyoku vasingaparidzi shoko kuna ani zvake kusiya kuvaJudha." 
Acts11:20 Asi pane vamwe vavo, varume vokuSaipurasi nokuSairini pavakaenda kuAndiyoku vakataurawo kuvaGiriki vachivaparidza Tenzi Jesu." 
Acts11:21 Ruoko rune simba rwaTenzi rwakanga rwuinavo uye vanhu vazhinji vakadavira vakatendeukira kuna Tenzi. 
Acts11:22 Zvinhu izvi zvakasvika munzeve dzesangano raiva muJerusaremu vakatumira Bhanabhasi kuAndiyoku. 
Acts11:23 Paakasvika akaona nyasha dzaMwari akafara. Akavakurudzira vose kuti varambe vakatendeka vakati kwati kwati nomwoyo wose kuna Tenzi. 
Acts11:24 Bhanabhasi uyu aiva munhu akanaka azere naMweya nechitendero. Chikwata chikuru chakawedzerwa kuna Tenzi. 
Acts11:25 Naizvozvo Bhanabhasi akaenda kuTaso kundotsvaka Sauro. 
Acts11:26 Paakamuwana akauya naye kuAndiyoku. Kwegore rose vaisangana nesangano vachidzidzisa boka guru ravanhu. MuAndiyoku ndimo makatangira vadzidzi kuidaidzwa kunzi vakristu. 
Acts11:27 Pamazuva iwayo vaporofita vakabva kuJerusaremu vachienda kuAndiyoku. 
Acts11:28 Mumwe wavo anonzi Agabhusi akasimuka akafanotaura aina Mweya kuti kuchava nenzara huru pasi pose. Izvi zvakaitikawo pamazuva aKiraudhiosi. 
Acts11:29 Vadzidzi vakatenderana kutumira rubatsiro kune vehama vaigara kuJudhea mumwe nomumwe achipa sokugona kwake. 
Acts11:30 Vakaita saizvozvo. Vakazvitumira kuvakuru vakuru nomumaoko aBhanabhasi naSauro. 
Acts12:1 Pamazuva anenge iwayo mambo Herodhi akatambudza vamwe vaiva vesangano. 
Acts12:2 Akauraya Jemusi mukoma waJohani nebakatwa. 
Acts12:3 Paakaona kuti zvakafadza vaJudha akaenderera mberi nokusungawo Pita. Aya akanga ari mazuva echingwa chisina mbiriso. 
Acts12:4 Paakamubata akamuisa mujeri akamuisa mumaoko ezvikwata zvina zvamasoja kuti zvimuchengetedze achida kuzomuisa kuvanhu mushure mePasika. 
Acts12:5 Ipapo Pita akachengetedzwa ari mujeri. Asi sangano rakamunamatira zvikuru kuna Mwari. 
Acts12:6 Usiku ihwohwo hwokuti mangwana acho Herodhi paaizoda kumuburitsa, Pita akanga avete pakati pamasoja maviri akasungwa nengetani mbiri uye varindi vapajeri vakanga vachichengetedza jeri vari pamberi pemusuo." 
Acts12:7 Hoyo mutumwa waTenzi akaerekana avemo mukapenya chiedza muchitokisi chaakanga ari. Akazunguza Pita pabendekete akamumutsa achiti, “Kurumidza kusimuka.” Ngetani dzaiva mumaoko ake dzakabva dzadonhera pasi." 
Acts12:8 Mutumwa akati kwaari, “Pfeka shangu dzako,” iye akaita saizvozvo. Akatizve, “Zvimonerere jasi rako unditevere” akabuda kunze achimutevera." 
Acts12:9 Haana kuziva kuti zvaiitwa nomutumwa zvakanga zviri zvechokwadi. Aifunga kuti ari kuona chiratidzo. 
Acts12:10 Pavakapfuura varindi vokutanga nevechipiri vakasvika kusuo guru resimbi rokupinda naro muguta. Rakangovazarukira roga. Ivo ndokubuda ndokutevedza mumwe mugwagwa, mutumwa akayerekana asisipo." 
Acts12:11 Pita akapengenuka akati zvino ndava nechokwadi kuti Tenzi atuma mutumwa wake akandinunura mumaoko maHerodhi uye kune zvose zvaitarisirwa navaJudha. 
Acts12:12 Paakaziva izvi, akaenda kumba kwaMaria amai vaJohani aiva nerimwe zita rainzi Mako kwakanga kwaunganwa navanhu vazhinji vachinamata." 
Acts12:13 Paakagogodza pagonhi resuo guru, musikana ainzi Rodha akauya kuzonzwa kuti ndiani." 
Acts12:14 Paakaziva kuti izwi iri nderaPita pamusana pokufara haana kuzarura suo guru asi akamhanyira makare akataura kuti, “Pita akamira pasuo guru.”" 
Acts12:15 Vakamuti, “Wavakupenga iwe!” Paakaramba achingoti ndizvo chaizvo, vakati angatova mutumwa wake." 
Acts12:16 Asi Pita akaramba achigogodza. Pavakazarura vakamuona vakashamiswa kwazvo. 
Acts12:17 Asi Pita akavaninira kuti vanyarare. Akavarondedzera kuti Tenzi akamuburitsa sei mujeri. Akatiwo, “Taurirai Jemusi nevehama.” Ndokubva abva akaenda kune imwe nzvimbo." 
Acts12:18 Pakwakaedza rakave besanwa pakati pamasoja kuti chii chakanga chaitika kuna Pita. 
Acts12:19 Herodhi paakamutsvaka akamushaya. Akabvunzisisa varindi akati, “Vanofanira kuurawa.” Herodhi akadzika kuSezaria achibva Judhea akagarako." 
Acts12:20 Herodhi akashatirirwa vanhu veTire neSidhoni zvikuru. Nezvo vakaenda kwaari vari chikwata. Ipapo vakanga vashamwaridzana naBhurasitosi mukuru mukuru wapamba pamambo. Saizvozvo vakakumbira kuti pave norugare nokuti nyika yavo yaitoraramiswa nezvokudya chinobva kunyika yamambo. 
Acts12:21 Pazuva rakanga rasarudzwa, Herodhi akapfeka hanzu dzake dzoumambo ndokugara pachigaro chake choumambo akataura kwavari zvinoyevedza, vanhu vakadaidzira vachiti," 
Acts12:22 “Inga izwi romumwe mwari chaiye kwete romunhu.” 
Acts12:23 Pakarepo mutumwa waTenzi akamurova nokuti haana kupa mbiri yacho kuna Mwari. Akadyiwa nehonye akafa. 
Acts12:24 Asi Shoko raMwari rakaramba richikura richiwanda. 
Acts12:25 Bhanabhasi naSauro vakadzoka vachibva kuJerusaremu pavakapedza zvavakanga vafambira vakauya naJohani aiva nerimwe zita rainzi Mako. 
Acts13:1 Musangano rokuAndiyoku maiva navaporofita navadzidzisi vaiti Bhanabhasi naSimeoni ainzi Mutema kouya Rusiasi wokuSairini naManaeni (akarerwa naHerodhi mutetiraki) naSauro. 
Acts13:2 Pavainamata Tenzi uye vachitsanya, Mweya Mutsvene akati nditsaurirei Bhanabhasi naSauro kuti vaite basa randavasarudzira." 
Acts13:3 Mushure mokutsanya nokunamata vakaisa maoko avo pavari vakavaendesa. 
Acts13:4 Sokutumwa kwavakaitwa naMweya Mutsvene vakadzika kuSerusia. Vakazobva ikoko vakaenda kuSaipurasi nengarava. 
Acts13:5 Pavakasvika kuSaramisi vakaparidza Shoko raMwari mumasinagogu avaJudha uye vaiva naJohani wokuvabatsira. 
Acts13:6 Pavakafamba nechitsuwa ichocho chose kusvika kuPafosi, vakasvika panomumwe munhu wamashiripiti, muporofita wechiJudha wenhema ainzi Bha Jesu." 
Acts13:7 Aiva naSejiusi Pauro gavhuna, munhu aiva nouchenjeri akadaidza Bhanabhasi naSauro achida kunzwa Shoko raMwari." 
Acts13:8 Asi Erimasi munhu wamashiripiti uya, (izvozvi ndizvo zvinoreva zita rake) akavadzivisa achida kuti gavhuna asagamuchire chitendero." 
Acts13:9 Asi Sauro anonziwo Pauro, azere naMweya Mutsvene, akanyatsomutarisisa" 
Acts13:10 akati, “Iwe uzere namanyepo nounyengedzi, mhandu yezvose zvakarurama, dhiabhori womunhu. Hauregi nei kuminamisa nzira dzakati twasa dzaTenzi?" 
Acts13:11 Chinzwa, simba roruoko rwaMwari richakurova. Uchava bofu usingagoni kuona usingaoni zuva kwenguva yakati kuti.” Pakarepo mhute nerima zvakabva zvamukwidibira. Akatsvanzvadzira achitsvaka wokumutungamirira akamubata ruoko." 
Acts13:12 Gavhuna uya akatenda paakaona zvakanga zvaitika nokuti akashamiswa nechidzidziso chaTenzi. 
Acts13:13 Zvino Pauro navamwe vake vakabva nechikepe kuPafosi vakasvika kuPeriga muPamufiria. Johani akavasiya akadzokera kuJerusaremu. 
Acts13:14 Ivo vakapfuurira kubva kuPeriga vakasvika kuAndiyoku yokuPisidhia. Pamusi weSabata vakaenda kusinagogu vakagara pasi. 
Acts13:15 Mushure mokunge bhuku romutemo navaporofita zvaverengwa vakuru vakuru veSinagogu vakatuma shoko vachiti, “Hama kana muna mazwi anokurudzira vanhu ataurei.”" 
Acts13:16 Naizvozvo Pauro akasimuka akaninira namaoko ake akati: “Vanhu veIsiraeri nemi munotya Mwari teererai 
Acts13:17 Mwari wavanhu ava vechiIsiraeri akasarudza madzibaba edu akaita kuti vanhu ivava vave rudzi rukuru panguva yavaigara munyika yeIjipiti akavaburitsa nesimba roruoko rwake. 
Acts13:18 Kwenguva inenge makore makumi mana akavaitira mwoyo murefu murenje. 
Acts13:19 Paakaparadza marudzi manomwe munyika yeKanani akavapa nyika yavo kuti ive nhaka yavo 
Acts13:20 kwamakore mazana mana anamakumi mashanu. Mushure maizvozvo akavapa vatongi kusvika pana muporofita Samueri. 
Acts13:21 Vakazokumbira kuti vave namambo Mwari akavapa Sauro mwana waKishi murume wedzinza raBhenjamini kwamakore makumi mana. 
Acts13:22 Paakamubvisa akamutsa Dhavhidhi kuti ave mambo wavo waakataura pachena achiti, ‘Ndakawana muna Dhavhidhi mwana waJese munhu wapamwoyo pangu achaita zvose zvandinoda.’" 
Acts13:23 Muzvizvarwa zvomunhu uyu, Mwari akaunza kuIsiraeri mununuri Jesu sokutsidza kwaakanga aita." 
Acts13:24 Jesu asati auya Johani akanga achiparidza kuvanhu vose veIsiraeri kuti vapinduke vaombekwe. 
Acts13:25 Johani paakanga ava kupedza basa rake akati, ‘Munofunga kuti ndini ani? Handisini iye. Kwete, asi mushure mangu muri kuuya mumwe, wandisingakodzeri kubvisa shangu patsoka dzake.’" 
Acts13:26 “Hama dzangu, vana vemhuri yaAbhurahamu navamwe vari mukati menyu vanotya Mwari, ndisu takatumirwa shoko roruponeso irworwu." 
Acts13:27 Kuna vavo vanogara muJerusaremu navatongi vavo, vakazadzisa izvozvi nokumupa mhosva pamusana pokuti havana kumuziva kana kunzwisisa zvaitaurwa navaporofita zvinoverengwa paSabata roga roga." 
Acts13:28 Kunyange pakanga pasina mhosva yokumupa yaikodzera rufu asi vakakumbira Pirato kuti auraiwe. 
Acts13:29 Pavakanga vapedza kuita zvose zvakanga zvakanyorwa nezvake, vakamuburutsa pamuti vakamuradzika muguva." 
Acts13:30 Asi Mwari akamumutsa kuvafi. 
Acts13:31 Kwamazuva mazhinji akazviratidza kuna vakakwira naye kubva Garirea vachienda kuJerusaremu zvino vava zvapupu zvake kuvanhu. 
Acts13:32 “Zvino tinokuunzirai Shoko Rakanaka rokuti Mwari zvaakatsidzira kumadzibaba edu 
Acts13:33 izvi akazvizadzisa kwatiri isu vana vavo nokumutsa kwaakaita Jesu sokunyorwawo kwazvakaitwa murwiyo rwechipiri zvichinzi, “ ‘Iwe ndiwe mwanakomana wangu nhasi ndakubereka.’" 
Acts13:34 Zvokuti Mwari akamumutsa uye kuti haachazombodzokerazve mukuora akataura achiti, ‘Ndichakupa zvikomborero zvitsvene zvechokwadi zvaDhavhidhi.’" 
Acts13:35 Nezvo anotaura mune rumwe rwiyo achiti, ‘Hamuregi mutsvene wenyu achiora.’" 
Acts13:36 Nokuti Dhavhidhi paakapedza kuita zvaakanga atarirwa naMwari kuti aite muchizvarwa chake akafa akandovigwa pamwechete namadzitateguru ake akaora. 
Acts13:37 Asi iye akamutswa naMwari, haana kuora." 
Acts13:38 Naizvozvo chizvizivai hama dzangu kuti nokumunhu uyu kuregererwa kwezvitadzo kunoparidzwa kwamuri. 
Acts13:39 Munhu wose anotenda anosunungurwa naye muna zvose zvamakanga musingakwanisi kusunungurwa nomutemo waMosesi. 
Acts13:40 Saka, chenjerai, kuti zvimwe, mungawirwe nezvakataurwa muvaporofita zvinoti:" 
Acts13:41 ‘Chinzwai imi vanyombi dzungairai muparare nokuti ndichaita chimwe chinhu mumazuva enyu chinhu chamusingabvumi kudavira kana munhu akutaurirai.’ ” 
Acts13:42 Pavakanga vava kubuda vanhu vakakumbira kuti vazovataurirazve zvinhu izvi paSabata raitevera. 
Acts13:43 Pakapera musangano wapasinagogu, vaJudha vazhinji navanamati vaMwari vakanga vapindukira kuchiJudha, vakatevera Pauro naBhanabhasi vakataura kwavari vachivakurudzira kuti varambe vari munyasha dzaMwari." 
Acts13:44 Pasabata rakatevera chifo cheguta rose rakaungana kuti vazonzwa shoko raMwari. 
Acts13:45 VaJudha pavakaona manyore manyore avanhu vakazadzwa neshanje vakapikisana nezvaitaurwa naPauro vakamunyomba. 
Acts13:46 Pauro naBhanabhasi vakataura nokushinga vachiti, “Shoko raMwari raifanira kutanga rataurirwa kwamuri. Zvino zvamariramba mukaona kuti hamukodzeri upenyu usingaperi, chinzwai, isu tava kuenda kune vechirudzi." 
Acts13:47 Ndizvo zvatakaudzwa naTenzi kuti tinofanira kuita paakati, “ ‘Inga ndakaita kuti uve chiedza kune vechirudzi kuti ruponeso rwangu rusvike kwakaperera nyika chaiko.’ ”" 
Acts13:48 Vechirudzi pavakazvinzwa, vakafara vakarumbidza Shoko raMwari, vose zvavo vakanga vakasarudzirwa upenyu usingaperi vakatenda." 
Acts13:49 Shoko raMwari rakapararira munyika iyoyo. 
Acts13:50 Asi vaJudha vakamutsa mweya usina kunaka pakati pamadzimai epamusoro, vanamati, navakuru vakuru vechirume vomuguta iroro vakatanga kutambudza Pauro naBhanabhasi vakavadzinga mudunhu ravo." 
Acts13:51 Asi ivo vakazunza guruva patsoka dzavo rokuti vazviparira rushambwa, vakaenda kuIkoniumu." 
Acts13:52 Vadzidzi vakazadzwa norufaro uye naMweya Mutsvene. 
Acts14:1 KuIkoniumu vakapinda vose pamwechete musinagogu yavaJudha vakataura zvokuti boka guru ravaJudha navaGiriki rakatenda. 
Acts14:2 Asi vaJudha vakanga vasingatendi vakaisa mweya wokupanduka mukati mevechirudzi vakavapengesa kuti varwise vehama. 
Acts14:3 Nokudaro vakagara kwenguva ndefu vachitaura nechivindi nezvaTenzi. Iyewo Tenzi, akapupurira Shoko rake renyasha nokupa kwaakaita zviratidzo nezvishamiso kuti zviitwe namaoko avo." 
Acts14:4 Asi vanhu veguta iroro vakanga vakakamukana. Vamwe vaiva kurutivi rwavaJudha vamwe vari divi ravapositori. 
Acts14:5 Vechirudzi navaJudha navatongi vavo pavakanga vachironga kuvatambudza uye kuvataka namabwe," 
Acts14:6 vakazviziva vakatizira kuRisitira nokuDhebhe maguta enyika yeIkoniumu uye kunyika yakatenderedza. 
Acts14:7 Ikoko vakaparidza Shoko Rakanaka. 
Acts14:8 KuRisitira kwaiva nomumwe murume aingogara asingakwanisi kufamba namakumbo ake. Akanga ari mhetamakumbo chizvarirwo chake, asina kana kutombofamba." 
Acts14:9 Akateerera Pauro achitaura. Pauro akanyatsomutarisisa. Paakaona kuti ane chitendero chokuti angaponeswe 
Acts14:10 akataura nezwi riri pamusoro akati, “Simuka umire namakumbo ako.” Iye akakwakuka akafamba." 
Acts14:11 Mhomho yavanhu payakaona zvakanga zvaitwa naPauro yakadaidzira nechiRikaonia vachiti, “Vamwari vaburuka kwatiri vakaita savanhu.”" 
Acts14:12 Bhanabhasi vakamuti ndiZeusi, Pauro, nokuti ndiye aiva mutauri mukuru, vakamuti ndiHeremesi." 
Acts14:13 Mupristi waZeusi aiva neTemberi pamberi peguta, akauya namadhonza uye anamaruva kumisuo mikuru achida kupira chibayiro pamwechete navanhu." 
Acts14:14 Vapositori, vanaBhanabhasi naPauro, pavakazvinzwa vakabvarura nguwo dzavo neshungu. Vakamhanya mumhomho yavanhu vachidaidzira vachiti," 
Acts14:15 “Varume, ko mavakuitireiko izvi? Tiri vanhuwo vakangofanana nemi uye tiri kukuunzirai Shoko Rakanaka tichikutaurirai kuti mutendeuke kune zvinhu izvi zvisina maturo muchienda kuna Mwari mupenyu akasika denga napasi negungwa nazvose zvirimo." 
Acts14:16 Muzvizvarwa zvakapfuura Mwari akabvumira marudzi ose kutevera maitiro avo. 
Acts14:17 Zvakadaro zvazvo haana kukusiyai musina zvinoratidza zvokuvapo kwake munezvinhu zvakanaka zvaanokuitirai. Anokutumirai mvura inobva kudenga, nemwaka yamaguta achikugutsai mwoyo nezvokudya nokufara.”" 
Acts14:18 Kunyange namazwi aya vakange votoda kukundika kurambidza vanhu ava kupira chibayiro kwavari. 
Acts14:19 Asi kwakava navaJudha vakabva kuAndiyoku nokuIkoniumu vakafurira vanhu vakataka Pauro namabwe vakamuzvuvira kunze kweguta vachifunga kuti afa. 
Acts14:20 Vadzidzi pavakaungana paari, akasimuka akapinda muguta. Mangwana acho akaenda naBhanabhasi kuDhebhe." 
Acts14:21 Pavakanga vaparidza Dama Rakanaka muguta iroro vakava navadzidzi vazhinji vakadzokera kuRisitira nokuIkoniumu nokuAndiyoku 
Acts14:22 vachisimbisa vadzidzi vachivakurudzira kuenderera mberi nechitendero. Vaiti, kuti tipinde muumambo hwaMwari tinofanira kutopindamo nomumatambudziko akawanda." 
Acts14:23 Pavakavasarudzira vakuru vakuru musangano rimwe nerimwe vachinamata nokutsanya, vakavakumikidza kuna Tenzi wavakanga vakatenda maari." 
Acts14:24 Vakazopfuura nokuPisidhia vakasvika kuPamufuria. 
Acts14:25 Vakati vaparidza shoko muPeriga vakazodzika kuAtaria. 
Acts14:26 Kubva ipapo vakaenda nechikepe kuAndiyoku kuya kwavakaturirwa kunyasha dzaMwari zvichiitira basa irori ravakanga vachangopedza kuita. 
Acts14:27 Pavakasvika vakaunganidza sangano vakataura zvose zvakaitwa naMwari achivashandisa uye kuti Mwari akanga azarura sei musuo wechitendero kune vechirudzi. 
Acts14:28 Vakagara ikoko navadzidzi kwenguva ndefu. 
Acts15:1 Kwakauya vamwe varume vachibva kuJudhea vachidzidzisa vehama kuti, “Kana musina kudzingiswa zvinoenderana noMutemo waMosesi, hamugoni kuponeswa.”" 
Acts15:2 Pauro naBhanabhasi havana kuwirirana navo uye vakakavadzana navo zvikuru. Pauro naBhanabhasi navamwe vavo vakazosarudzwa kuti vaende kuJerusaremu kuna vapositori navakuru vakuru nezvenyaya iyi. 
Acts15:3 Saizvozvo zvavakatumwa nesangano kuenda rwendo rwavo vakapfuura nomuFonikia nomuSamaria vachirondedzera kutendeuka kwevechirudzi. Izvi zvakafadza kwazvo vose vehama. 
Acts15:4 Pavakasvika Jerusaremu vakagamuchirwa nesangano navapositori navakuru vakuru vakarondedzera zvose zvavakaitiswa naMwari. 
Acts15:5 Asi vamwe vatendi vebato ravaFarisei vakasimuka vakati, “Vanhu ava vanosungirwa kudzingiswa uye kuvaudza kuti vanofanira kuchengeta Mutemo waMosesi.”" 
Acts15:6 Vapositori navakuru vakuru vakaungana kuti vafunge nezvenyaya iyi. 
Acts15:7 Pashure pokunge patauriranwa zvikuru, Pita akasimuka akati kwavari, “Hama, imi munoziva kuti pamazuva okutanga, Mwari akandisarudza pakati penyu kuti vechirudzi vanzwe kubva pamuromo pangu dama reShoko Rakanaka kuti vadavire." 
Acts15:8 Mwari anoziva mwoyo womunhu akazvitsigira nokuvapa Mweya Mutsvene sezvaakangoitawo kwatiri. 
Acts15:9 Haana kumbotisianisa navo asi akachenesa mwoyo yavo nechitendero. 
Acts15:10 Zvino munoedzerei Mwari nokuisa joko pamutsipa yavadzidzi risina kukwanisa kutakurwa namadzibaba edu kana nesu? 
Acts15:11 Asi tinotenda kuti tichaponeswa nenyasha dzaTenzi Jesu sokuponeswa kwavachaitwa.” 
Acts15:12 Gungano rakati zii kunyarara. Vakateerera Bhanabhasi naPauro vachirondedzera zviratidzo nezvishamiso zvakaitwa naMwari nemavari pakati pevechirudzi. 
Acts15:13 Pavakapedza kutaura, Jemusi akapindura achiti, “Varume hama, nditeererei." 
Acts15:14 Simoni atitaurira kuti Mwari akashanyira sei vechirudzi, nokutora vanhu mukati mavo vanodaidzwa nezita rake." 
Acts15:15 Izvi zvinowirirana namashoko avaporofita sokunyorwa kwazvakaitwa zvichinzi," 
Acts15:16 “ ‘Mushure mezvo ndichadzoka ndigovakazve imba yokwaDhavhidhi yadai kuputsika. Ndichagadziridza matongo ayo ndiamutsurudze 
Acts15:17 kuti vamwe vanhu vose vatsvake Tenzi nevechirudzi vose vanodaidzwa nezita rangu. 
Acts15:18 Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi akazivisa zvinhu izvi kubvira pasi chigare.’ 
Acts15:19 “Naizvozvo ini ndinofunga kuti hatifaniri kunetsa vechirudzi vanotendeukira kuna Mwari. 
Acts15:20 Asi ngativanyorerei kuti varege kusvibiswa nezvifananidzo zvokunamata; varege upombwe nenyama isina kusinzwa nomusiya. 
Acts15:21 Nokuti kubvira pazvizvarwa zvokutanga mutemo waMosesi wakaparidzwa muguta roga roga uye unoverengwa mumasinagogu pamaSabata ose ose.” 
Acts15:22 Zvakaonekwa chiri chinhu chakanaka kuvapositori navakuru vakuru nesangano rose kusarudza varume pakati pavo vokutuma kuAndiyoku naPauro naBhanabhasi. Vakatuma Judhasi anonzi Bharisabhasi naSirasi 
Acts15:23 vakanga vari vatungamiri pakati pevehama netsamba iyi: “Ndisu vehama, navapositori navakuru vakuru tinokunyorerai imi vehama vechirudzi muri muAndiyoku nekuSiria nekuSirisia tichikukwazisai." 
Acts15:24 Pamusana pokuti takanzwa kuti kune vamwe vanhu vakabva kwatiri vakakunetsai namashoko vachikudzongodzai mwoyo kunyange tisina kuvatuma. 
Acts15:25 Isu takaungana kudai, uye tawirirana, tazviona zvakanaka, kuti tisarudze varume, tivatume kwamuri pamwechete naBhanabhasi naPauro," 
Acts15:26 varume vakaisa upenyu hwavo parumano nokuda kwaTenzi wedu Jesu Kristu. 
Acts15:27 Naizvozvo tatumira Judhasi naSirasi vachatsinhira pachavo zvimwechetezvo nemiromo yavo. 
Acts15:28 Zvaonekwa zviri zvinhu zvakanaka kuna Mweya Mutsvene nokunesu, kuti tirege kukuremedzai nezvinopfuura izvi chete zvinodiwa," 
Acts15:29 zvokuti: imi musiyane nezvinhu zvakabairwa zvifananidzo zvokunamata, murege musiya nenyama isina kusinzwa uye upombwe. Kana mukarega izvi munoita zvakanaka. Musare zvakanaka.”" 
Acts15:30 Naizvozvo pavakanzi vachienda zvavo vakadzika kuAndiyoku. Vakati vaunganidza vanhu vakavagamuchidza tsamba iya. 
Acts15:31 Pavakaiverenga vakafara nokukurudzirwa ikoko. 
Acts15:32 Judhasi naSirasi vaiva ivo vaporofita vakakurudzira vehama namazwi akawanda vakavasimbisa. 
Acts15:33 Pavakaona vapedza nguva yakati kuti vakavaperekedza kuti vaende norugare kune vakanga vavatuma. Kune vakanga vavatuma. 
Acts15:34 *** 
Acts15:35 Pauro naBhanabhasi vakasara muAndiyoku vachidzidzisa nokuparidza shoko raTenzi pamwechetewo nevamwe. 
Acts15:36 Mushure memazuva akati kuti Pauro akati kuna Bhanabhasi, “Uya tidzokere tindoshanyira vehama muguta rimwe nerimwe matakaparidza shoko raTenzi tione kuti vakadii.”" 
Acts15:37 Asi Bhanabhasi aida kuti vaende pamwechete naJohani anonzi Mako. 
Acts15:38 Asiwo Pauro akanga achifunga kuti zvakanga zvakanaka kurega kuenda nomunhu akanga ambosiyana navo muPamufiria uye munhu akanga asina kuenda navo kubasa iroro. 
Acts15:39 Pakamuka gakava guru zvokuti vakabva vaparadzana. Bhanabhasi, akatora Mako akaenda nechikepe kuSaipurasi." 
Acts15:40 Pauro akasarudza Sirasi. Vakaenda vapedza kukumikidzwa nevehama kunyasha dzaTenzi. 
Acts15:41 Akaenda nokuSiria nokuSirisia achisimbisa masangano. 
Acts16:1 Pauro akasvika kuDhebhe nokuRisitira. Ikoko kwaiva nomumwe mudzidzi ainzi Timoti mwana womumwe mudzimai wechiJudha aiva mutendi, asi baba vake vaiva muGiriki." 
Acts16:2 Vehama vokuRisitira nevokuIkoniumu vaitaura zvakanaka nezvake. 
Acts16:3 Pauro aida kuti Timoti afambe pamwechete naye, nezvo akamutora akamudzingisa pamusana pavaJudha vakanga vari munzvimbo idzodzo nokuti vose vaiziva kuti baba vake vaiva muGiriki." 
Acts16:4 Pavaipfuura nomumaguta vaivaturira zvakanga zvasungwa navapositori navakuru vakuru vaiva kuJerusaremu kuti vatevedze. 
Acts16:5 Naizvozvo masangano akasimbiswa muchitendero uye vatendi vaiwanda zuva nezuva. 
Acts16:6 Vakaenda nokunyika yeFirigia neGaratia pavakanga varambidzwa naMweya Mutsvene kuparidza shoko kuAsia. 
Acts16:7 Pavakasvika pakatarisana neMisia, vakaedza kupinda muBhitinia asi Mweya waJesu haana kuvabvumira." 
Acts16:8 Nezvo vakapfuura nepedyo peMisia vakadzika kuTiroasi. 
Acts16:9 Usiku, Pauro akaona chiratidzo chomunhu wokuMasedhonia akamira achimuteterera achiti, “Uyai kuMasedhonia muzotibatsira.”" 
Acts16:10 Paakaona chiratidzo ichocho, takabva tarongedzera kuenda kuMasedhonia. Takanga taziva kuti Mwari akanga atidaidza kundoparidza Shoko Rakanaka kwavari." 
Acts16:11 Takatangisa rwendo rwedu nechikepe kubva kuTiroasi tikananga kuSamotirasi chaiko. Ramangwana acho takaenda kuNeaporisi. 
Acts16:12 Takabva ikoko tikaenda kuFiripi guta guru renyika yeMasedhonia, nyika yaiva pasi penyika yeRoma. Takagara muguta iroro kwamazuva." 
Acts16:13 Pazuva reSabata, takaenda kunze kwesuo guru kumahombekombe erwizi kwataifunga kuti kunzvimbo yokunamatira. Takagara pasi tikataura namadzimai akanga aungana." 
Acts16:14 Mumwe waavo vakatinzwa aiva mudzimai ainzi Ridhia weguta reTiatira aitengesa machira oruvara rwehute ainge ari munamati waMwari. Tenzi akazarura mwoyo wake kuti atirimuke mwoyo kune zvaitaurwa naPauro. 
Acts16:15 Paakaombekwa pamwechete nemhuri yake, akatiteterera achiti, “Kana maona kuti ndakatendeka kuna Tenzi uyai kumba kwangu muzogara.” Takasvika pokutobvuma." 
Acts16:16 Patakanga tichienda kunzvimbo yokunamatira takasangana nomumwe musikana muranda aiva nemweya wokuuka. Aipfumisa varidzi vake zvikuru nokuuka ikoko. 
Acts16:17 Musikana uyu aitevera Pauro nesu achidaidzira achiti, “Varume ava varanda vaMwari Wokumusorosoro vari kukuparidzai nzira yoruponeso.”" 
Acts16:18 Akaita izvi kwamazuva mazhinji. Pauro akashatirwa nazvo akatendeuka akati kumweya uya, “Ndinokuudza muzita raJesu Kristu kuti ubude maari.” Mweya uya wakabva wabuda pakarepo." 
Acts16:19 Zvino varidzi vake pavakaona kuti chavaivimba nacho kuwana upfumi pakanga pasisina, vakabata Pauro naSirasi vakavakwekweredzera kuvatongi, kunzvimbo yaiungana vanhu veguta iroro." 
Acts16:20 Pavakavaunza kuvatongi vakati: “Varume ava vaJudha uye vari kunyonganisa guta redu. 
Acts16:21 Vari kukurudzira tsika dzisingagamuchiriki kana kuteverwa nesu vechiRoma.” 
Acts16:22 Mhomho yavanhu yakabatana navo mukuvarwisa. Vatongi vaya vakabvarura hanzu dzavo vachidzibvisa pavari. Vakati ngavarohwe neshamhu. 
Acts16:23 Pavakanga vavarova zvakanyanya, vakavaisa mujeri vachiti kune muchengeti wejeri anyatsovachengetedza kwazvo." 
Acts16:24 Paakaudzwa izvi akavaisa mujeri romukatikati akavakachikira makumbo avo mumatanda. 
Acts16:25 Pokunge pava pakati pousiku Pauro naSirasi vainge vachinamata vachikumbira vachiimbira Mwari dzimbo, vasungwa vachivateerera." 
Acts16:26 Pakarepo pakave nokundengendeka kukuru zvokuti ugaro hweJeri hwakazunguzika. Pakarepo makonhi ose akazaruka. Majoti omunhu oga oga akabva asungunuka. 
Acts16:27 Muchengeti wejeri paakamuka akaona kuti makonhi ejeri akanga akazaruka akazvomora bakatwa rake avakuda kuzviuraya achifunga kuti vasungwa vakanga vapunyuka. 
Acts16:28 Asi Pauro akadaidzira nezwi guru achiti, “Usazvikuvadze zvako nokuti isu tose tiri muno.”" 
Acts16:29 Akadaidzira kuti kuuiwe nemwenje, ndokumhanyira mukati. Akandowira pamberi paPauro naSirasi achidedera nokutya." 
Acts16:30 Akavabudisa akati, “Varume chii chandingaite kuti ndiponeswe?”" 
Acts16:31 Ivo vakati, “Tenda muna Tenzi Jesu uchaponeswa iwe nemhuri yako.”" 
Acts16:32 Vakataura kwaari Shoko raTenzi nokune vose vaiva mumba make. 
Acts16:33 Akavatora panguva iyoyo yousiku akavashambidza maronda avo. Iye akabva aombekwa pakarepo pamwechete nemhuri yake yose. 
Acts16:34 Akakwira navo kumba kwake akavapa chokudya akafara kwazvo nemba yake yose kuti akanga atenda kuna Mwari. 
Acts16:35 Pakwakanga kwaedza vatongi vakatuma mapurisa vachiti, “Regai vanhu vaya vaende zvavo.”" 
Acts16:36 Muchengeti wapajeri akasvitsa shoko kuna Pauro achiti, “Vatongi vatuma shoko rokuti muende zvenyu.” Saizvozvo chibudai muende zvenyu norugare." 
Acts16:37 Asi Pauro akati kwavari, “Vakatirova pazere vanhu, tisina kubatwa nemhosva, isu pamutemo, tiri vaRoma vakatiisa mujeri. Zvino vanoda kutiburitsa muchivande here?” Kwete, ngavatouya ivo pachavo vazotiburitsa." 
Acts16:38 Mapurisa akasvitsa shoko iri kuna vatongi. Vakatya pavakanzwa kuti, pamutemo vanhu ava vaiva vaRoma." 
Acts16:39 Vakauya vakakumbira ruregerero. Vakavaburitsa vakavakumbira kuti vabve muguta iroro. 
Acts16:40 Nokudaro vakabuda mujeri vakashanyira Ridhia. Pavakanga vaona vehama vakavakurudzira vakabva vaenda. 
Acts17:1 Vakati vapfuura nomuAmupfiporisi nokuAporonia vakasvika kuTesaronika kwaiva neSinagogu yavaJudha. 
Acts17:2 Pauro akapindamo, setsika yake, akaitirana nharo navo kwamasvondo matatu achishandisa Magwaro Matsvene" 
Acts17:3 achitsanangura nokuratidza kuti zvaifanirwa kuti Kristu atambudzike uye kuti amuke muvakafa uye achiti Jesu wandinoparidza kwamuri ndiye Mesia iyeyu. 
Acts17:4 Vamwe vavo vakazvibvuma vakabatana naPauro naSirasi sezvakangoitawo vazhinji vechiGiriki vaitya Mwari navadzimai vapamusoro vakawanda. 
Acts17:5 Asi vaJudha vakaita shanje. Vakatora vanhu vakaipa mukati memaswerokuenda avanhu. Vakakokorodza mhomho vakanyandutsa guta iroro. Vakandorwisa mhuri yokwaJasoni vachida kuburitsa Pauro naSirasi kuvanhu. 
Acts17:6 Pavakavashaya vakakwekweredza Jasoni navamwe vehama kuvakuru vakuru veguta vachidaidzira vachiti, “Varume ava vapidigura pasi pose, vauya kunowo." 
Acts17:7 Jasoni avagamuchira uye vose vanoita zvinopesana nezvirevo zvaSiza vachiti kuno mumwe mambo anonzi Jesu.” 
Acts17:8 Vanhu navakuruvakuru veguta zvakavatambudza. 
Acts17:9 Pavakanga vatora mari yorubatso kubva kuna Jasoni nokuna vamwe, vakavaregera kuti vaende zvavo." 
Acts17:10 Pakarepo vehama vakaendesa Pauro naSirasi nousiku kuBherea. Pavakasvikako vakaenda kuSinagogu yavaJudha. 
Acts17:11 VaJudha voko vakanga vachinzwisisa kupinda vaya vokuTesaronika nokuti vakagamuchira shoko nomwoyo unoda kwazvo vachiongorora mazuva ose Magwaro Matsvene kuti zvinhu izvi ndizvo here. 
Acts17:12 Vazhinji vavo vakatenda pamwechete navadzimai vechiGiriki vapamusoro vakawanda pamwechetewo navarume. 
Acts17:13 VaJudha vokuTesaronika pavakanzwa kuti Shoko raMwari riri kuparidzwa kuBherea naPauro, vakaendawo ikoko kundomutsa manyongori nokunyandutsa vanhu." 
Acts17:14 Pakarepo vehama vakabva vapinza Pauro munzira yokuenda kugungwa asi Sirasi naTimoti vakasarako. 
Acts17:15 Vaya vakaperekedza Pauro vakamusvitsa kuAtene. Pavakaudzwa kuti Sairasi naTimoti vanofanira kuti vauye kwaari nokukurumidza, vakabva vaenda." 
Acts17:16 Pauro paaivamirira kuAteni, akadzongodzwa mwoyo paakaona guta iroro rizere nezvifananidzo zvokunamata." 
Acts17:17 Naizvozvo aikurukurirana musinagogu navaJudha navaitya Mwari. Mazuva ose, panzvimbo inoungana vanhu veguta iroro, aikurukura navainge vangouyawo ipapo." 
Acts17:18 Vamwe vebato renyanzvi dzokufunga vechiEpikurieni nevechiSitoiki vakasangana naye. Vamwe vakati, “Ko iye mubvotomoki uyu arikuda kuti kudiiko?” Vamwewo vakati, “Anenge muparidzi wezvavamwari vasingaziikanwi,” nokuti aiparidza Jesu nokumuka muvakafa." 
Acts17:19 Vakamutora vakaenda kuAriopagusi vachiti, “Tingade kuziva kuti chidzidziso chitsva ichi chaunopa ndechei?" 
Acts17:20 Nokuti tiri kukunzwa nenzeve dzedu uchitaura zvisina akambonzwa. Nezvo tinoda kuziva kuti zvinhu izvozvi zvinorevei.” 
Acts17:21 Vanhu vomuAtene vose nevechirudzi vaigaramo vaipedzera nguva yavo vachitaura nokunzwa zvinhu zvitsva. 
Acts17:22 Nokudaro Pauro akamira pakati peAriopagusi akati, “Varume veAteni ndinoona kuti muzvinhu zvose muri vanamati" 
Acts17:23 nokuti zvandafamba neguta ndikaona zvinhu zvamunonamata ndawana imwe atari yakanyorwa kunzi, ‘KUNA MWARI ASINGAZIIKANWI.’ Chamuri kunamata musingazivi ichocho ndicho chandiri kukuparidzai chokuti," 
Acts17:24 ‘Mwari iyeyo ndiye akasika nyika nezvose zvirimo. Ndiye Tenzi wedenga napasi. Haagari muTemberi dzakavakwa navanhu. 
Acts17:25 Haashandirwi namaoko avanhu sokunge ane chimwe chaanoshaya nokuti ndiye anotopa vanhu vose upenyu nemweya wavanofema nawo nezvinhu zvose. 
Acts17:26 Akaita marudzi ose avanhu kubva kumunhu mumwechete kuti vagare pasi pose. Akatema mwaka nemiganho nenyika dzavanogara," 
Acts17:27 uye kuti vatsvage Mwari nechitarisiro chokuti vangangomutsvanzvadzira vagomuwana asi iye haasiri kure kwomumwe nomumwe wedu.’ 
Acts17:28 “Chiripo ndechokuti, ‘Upenyu hwedu huri maari kuti tifambe ndiye uye kuti tivepo ndiye,’ sokutaura kwavanyori venyu venhetembo vachiti, ‘Zvechokwadi tiri vana vake.’" 
Acts17:29 Zvatiri vana vake hatifaniri kufunga kuti Mwari akafanana nendarama kana sirivha kana ibwe zvinongova chifananidzo chakaitwa noumhizha kana zvinongofungwawo navanhu. 
Acts17:30 Nguva dzokusaziva dziya, Mwari haana hanya nadzo. Asi iye zvino anoti munhu wose, kose kose zvako, anofanira kupinduka," 
Acts17:31 pamusana pokuti akatema zuva raachatonga pasi pose noruenzaniso uye nokumunhu waakasarudza. Izvi zvakasimbisiswa kuna vanhu vose nokumumutswa kwaakaita kuvakafa.” 
Acts17:32 Pavakanzwa nezvokumuka kwavafi, vamwe vakashora vamwewo vakati tichada kukunzwazve uchitaura nezvezvizvi." 
Acts17:33 Zvadaro Pauro akabva mukati mavo. 
Acts17:34 Asi vamwe varume vakabatana naye vakatenda. Mumwe wacho ndiDhionisiusi webato reAreopagusi nomumwe mudzimai ainzi Dhamari navamwe vavaiva navo. 
Acts18:1 Mushure mezvo akabva kuAteni akaenda kuKorinde. 
Acts18:2 Akawana mumwe muJudha ainzi Akwira, mugari wokuPondusi, akanga achangobva kuItari, nomudzimai wake anonzi Pirisira, nokuti Kiraudiusi akanga ati vaJudha vose ngavabve muRoma. Saka akaenda kundovaona" 
Acts18:3 pamusana pokuti vaiva vebasa rimwechetero akagara akashanda navo nokuti aiita basa rimwechetero navo rokugadzira matendhe. 
Acts18:4 Pasabata rimwe nerimwe aitaura musinagogu achikurudzira vaJudha navaGiriki. 
Acts18:5 Pakasvika Sirasi naTimoti vachibva kuMasedhonia, Pauro aiva mubasa rokuparidza, achipupura kuvaJudha, kuti Mesia ndiJesu." 
Acts18:6 Pavakapokana naye vachimunyomba akazunza hanzu dzake akati kwavari, “Ropa renyu ngarikupfukirei! Ini mhosva handisisina. Kubvira iye zvino ndavakuenda kune vechirudzi.”" 
Acts18:7 Akabvapo akaenda kumba komumwe ainzi Titosi Jusitusi munhu aitya Mwari. Imba yake yaiva pedyo nesinagogu. 
Acts18:8 Kirisipusi mukuru wapasinagogu akatenda muna Tenzi pamwechete nemhuri yake. Vazhinji vomuKorinde pavakanzwa Pauro vakatenda vakaombekwa. 
Acts18:9 Nohumwe usiku Tenzi akataura kuna Pauro muchiratidzo achiti, “Usatye zvako. Iwe taura chete, usanyarare" 
Acts18:10 nokuti ndinewe uye hapana munhu achakurwisa zvokukuvadza nokuti ndine vanhu vakawanda muguta rino.” 
Acts18:11 Nezvo akagaramo kwegore nemwedzi mitanhatu achidzidzisa Shoko raMwari pakati pavo. 
Acts18:12 Panguva yakanga Gario ari gavhuna weAkaya, vaJudha vakaita rimwe kurwisa Pauro. Vakamuunza kudare" 
Acts18:13 vachiti murume uyu anokurudzira vanhu kunamata Mwari zvisiri pamurao. 
Acts18:14 Pauro paakanga ava kuda kutaura, Gario akati kuvaJudha, “Dai yanga iri mhosva kana kuti kutadza kwakaipisisa, ndaiwana chikonzero chokukuitirai mwoyo murefu, vaJudha imi." 
Acts18:15 Zvino zvairi nyaya yokubvunza pamusoro pezvamazwi nezvamazita uye nezvomutemo wenyu, zvionerei pachenyu. Handidi kuva mutongi mune zvinhu izvi.”" 
Acts18:16 Akabva avadzinga mudare. 
Acts18:17 Vose vakabata Sositeni mukuru wapasinagogu vakamurova pamberi pedare; asi Gario haana kuita hanya nazvo. 
Acts18:18 Mushure mezvo Pauro akagara mamwe mazuva mazhinji ndokuzoonekana nevehama. Akazoenda kuSiria nechikepe pamwechete naPirisira naAkwira. KuKenikirie akaveura vhudzi rake nokuti akanga aita mhiko. 
Acts18:19 Vakasvika kuEfesusi akavasiyako asi iye akamboenda musinagogu akataura kuvaJudha. 
Acts18:20 Pavakamukumbira kuti ambogarazve, akaramba." 
Acts18:21 Paakanga ava kuenda akati, “Ndichadzoka kwamuri kana Mwari achida. Akaenda nechikepe achibva kuEfesusi.”" 
Acts18:22 Paakasvika kuSezaria akakwira akandokwazisa sangano ndokuzodzika kuAndiyoku. 
Acts18:23 Akati apedza chinguva ariko akasimuka akaenda munzvimbo nenzvimbo nomudunhu reGaratia nereFirigia achisimbisa vadzidzi vose. 
Acts18:24 Mumwe muJudha ainzi Aporosi, mugari wokuArekizandiria akauya kuEfesusi. Akanga ari nyanzvi yokutaura, munhu akanga akadzidza kwazvo Magwaro Matsvene." 
Acts18:25 Akanga akadzidziswa nzira yaTenzi uye nemwoyo wake wose aitaura nokudzidzisa nemazvo chaimo zvaJesu kunyange aiziva ruombeko rwaJohani chete. 
Acts18:26 Akatangisa kutaura nechivindi musinagogu. Pirisira naAkwira pavakamunzwa vakamutora vakamutsanangurira nzira dzaMwari nemazvo chaimo. 
Acts18:27 Paakada kuyambukira kuAkaya vehama vakamukurudzira vakatonyora kuna vadzidzi kuti vamugamuchire. 
Acts18:28 Paakasvika, akabatsira kwazvo vakanga vatenda nenyasha dzaMwari nokuti akapwisa vaJudha pachena achiratidza naMagwaro Matsvene kuti Jesu ndiye Mesia." 
Acts19:1 Aporosi paakanga ari kuKorinde, Pauro akapfuura nokunyika yokumusoro akasvika kuEfesusi. Ikoko akawana vamwe vadzidzi." 
Acts19:2 Akavati, “Makagamuchira Mweya Mutsvene here pamakadavira?” Ivo vakati, “Kwete. Hatina kana kutombonzwa kuti kuna Mweya Mutsvene.”" 
Acts19:3 Akavati, “Ko zvino makaombekwa noruombeko rwupi?” Ivo vakati, “Noruombeko rwaJohani.”" 
Acts19:4 Pauro akati, “Johani aiombeka noruombeko rwokuti vanhu vapinduke achitaurira vanhu kuti vatende muno uyo akanga achauya mushure make achireva Jesu.”" 
Acts19:5 Pavakanzwa izvi vakaombekwa muzita raTenzi Jesu. 
Acts19:6 Pauro paakaisa maoko ake pavari, Mweya Mutsvene akaburukira pavari. Vakataura nendimi vakaporofita." 
Acts19:7 Pamwechete vakanga vari varume gumi navaviri. 
Acts19:8 Aipota achipinda musinagogu; kwemwedzi mitatu aitaura asingatyi achidzidzisa zvokuti vabvume zvoumambo hwaMwari. 
Acts19:9 Asi vamwe vakanga vakaomesa mwoyo vasingatendi vakatotaura zvakaipa nezvenzira iyi pamberi peruzhinji. Akabva mukati mavo akatora vadzidzi akadzidzisa pachikoro chaTiranosi zuva nezuva," 
Acts19:10 izvi zvakaitika kwamakore maviri zvokuti vagari vose vokuAsia vakanzwa Shoko raTenzi, vaJudha navaGiriki." 
Acts19:11 Mwari akaita minana inoshamisa kwazvo namaoko aPauro 
Acts19:12 zvokuti mahengechepfu kana maepuroni zvainge zvamboguma pamuviri pake zvaitorwa zvichiendwa nazvo kuvarwere. Matenda aibva, apera mweya yakaipa ichibva mavari." 
Acts19:13 Kune vamwe vaJudha vaiva vadzingi vomweya yakaipa vakanga vasingagari panzvimbo imwechete, vakaedza kudoma zita raTenzi Jesu pane vakanga vane mweya yakaipa vachiti, “Ndinokudzinga naJesu anoparidzwa naPauro.”" 
Acts19:14 Kwaiva navanakomana vanomwe vomupristi mukuru ainzi Sikevha vaiita izvozvo. 
Acts19:15 Asi mweya wakaipa wakapindura uchiti, “Jesu ndinomuziva naPauro ndinomuziva asi imi ndimi vana ani.”" 
Acts19:16 Munhu aiva nomweya wakaipa uya akavasvetukira akavakunda ndokuvakurira vose vari vaviri zvokuti vakatiza mumba imomo vasisina kupfeka uye vakuvara. 
Acts19:17 Izvi zvakazivikanwa navagari vose vokuEfesusi, vose vaJudha navaGiriki. Vose vakawirwa nokutya. Zita raTenzi Jesu rikaremekedzwa." 
Acts19:18 Vazhinji vaiva vatendi vakauya vachireurura nokuburitsa pachena zvavaiita. 
Acts19:19 Chitsama chavanhu vaiita zvoun'anga vakaunganidza mabhuku avo vakaapisa pamberi pavanhu vose. Vakaverenga mutengo wawo ukaita zviuru makumi mashanu ezviuru zvemari yesirivha. 
Acts19:20 Ipapo shoko raTenzi rakakura rikaenderera mberi nesimba. 
Acts19:21 Mushure mezvizvi Pauro akafunga, achibatsirwa naMweya, kuti anofanira kupfuura nokuMasedhonia nokuAkaya achienda kuJerusaremu achiti, “Kana ndamboti garei ikoko ndinofanirawo kundoona Roma.”" 
Acts19:22 Mushure mokunge atumira kuMasedhonia vamwe vabatsiri vake vaviri, vanaTimoti naErasitusi iye pachake akambogara kuAsia chinguva." 
Acts19:23 Panguva inenge iyoyo pakamuka nyonganyonga huru nezvenzira yechikristu. 
Acts19:24 Mumwe murume ainzi Dhemetiriusi, mhizha yezvesirivha aiumba tuTemberi twesirivha tudikidiki twamwari Atemisi twaiwanisa mari yakawanda kune vaitwugadzira." 
Acts19:25 Akaunganidza ivava pamwechete navamwe vebasa rakada kuita sairoro akati, “Varume imi munoziva kuti mubasa iri ndimo matinowana upfumi hwedu." 
Acts19:26 Munozviona uye muri kuzvinzwa kuti kwete muEfesusi chete asi kutenge Asia yose, Pauro uyu ari kukurudzira nokutsautsa vanhu vane chitsama chakati kuti, achiti, ‘Vamwari vakaitwa namaoko havasi vamwari.’" 
Acts19:27 Pane njodzi, kwete chete, yokuti shawo yedu iyi ichatorwa sechinhu pasina asi kutiwo Temberi yamwarikadzi mukuru Atemisi, ichava chinhu pasina uyewo achakoromorwa paukuru hwake, iye anonamatwa neAsia yose uye napasi pose.”" 
Acts19:28 Pavakazvinzwa vakashatirwa zvikuru vakazhamba vachiti, “Atemisi wava Efeso mukuru.”" 
Acts19:29 Nokudaro guta rakazara nenyonganyonga. Vakapitipidzana munhandare yemitambo vachikwekweredza Gaiusi naArisitakusi, vagari vokuMasedhonia vaifamba naPauro." 
Acts19:30 Pauro akanga ava kuda kupinda mukati memhomho iya asi vadzidzi vakaramba. 
Acts19:31 Uyewo vamwe vakuru vakuru vomuAsia vaiva shamwari dzake vakatuma shoko rokuti ngaarege kana kumboedza zvake kupinda munhandare yemitambo. 
Acts19:32 Paiti ava vanodaidzira ichi vamwe vachidaidzirawo ichi nokuti gungano iroro rakanga rangova nyonganyonga. Vazhinji vavo vakanga vasingamboziva kuti vakanga vaunganira chii. 
Acts19:33 Vamwe vemhomho iyoyo vakataurira Arekizanda zvokuita nokuti ndiye akanga aiswa mberi navaJudha. Arekizanda akabva aninira vanhu noruoko achida kuzvidavirira kumhomho iyoyo. 
Acts19:34 Pavakaona kuti muJudha, vakaramba vachidaidzira kwamaawa maviri vachiti, “Dhayana wavaEfeso mukuru.”" 
Acts19:35 Munyori weguta paakanga anyararidza vanhu akati, “Nhaimi vanhu veEfesusi ndiani asingazivi kuti guta ravaEfesusi ndiro muchengeti wetemberi yaAtemisi mukuru mukuru uye muchengeti wedombo dzvene rakadonha mudenga?" 
Acts19:36 Zvamunoona kuti zvinhu izvi hazvina angarambe munofanira kunyarara murege kumhanyirira zvinhu. 
Acts19:37 Mauya navanhu ava asi havasi vapambi veTemberi kana vanhu vanoshonha mwarikadzi wedu. 
Acts19:38 Zvino kana Dhemetiriusi nedzimwe mhizha dzaanadzo vaine chavakatadzirwa nani zvake, matare ariko uye kuna magavhuna. Ngavakwirirane matare." 
Acts19:39 Kana pane zvinopfuura izvozvi zvinotofanira kuenzaniswa nedare riri pamutemo. 
Acts19:40 Tine njodzi yokupihwa mhosva yokumutsa manyongori nhasi nokuti hapana chikonzero chatinogona kupa chinonzwika chenyonganyonga iyi.” 
Acts19:41 Paakapedza kutaura izvi akaparadza ngungano. 
Acts20:1 Mhirizhonga iyi payakapera, Pauro akadaidza vadzidzi akavakurudzira ndokuvaoneka oenda kuMasedhonia." 
Acts20:2 Akapfuura nomunzvimbo idzi achivakurudzira akazosvika kuGirisi," 
Acts20:3 kwaakagara mwedzi mitatu. Pamusana pokuti pakaitwa bangano navaJudha rokumurwisa, panguva yaakanga ava kuda kuenda nechikepe kuSiria, akafunga zvokudzokera nokuMasedhonia." 
Acts20:4 Akaperekedzwa naSopeta wokuBherea, mwanakomana waPirusi, kune vokuTesaronika akaperekedzwa naArisitakusi naSekundusi naGayusi wokuDhebhe naTimoti. VokuAsia vakanga vari Tikikusi naTirofimusi." 
Acts20:5 Ava vakafanotungamira vakatimirira kuTiroasi. 
Acts20:6 Isu takafamba nechikepe kuenda Firipi mushure memazuva echingwa chisina mbiriso. Pashure pamazuva mashanu takasvika kwavari kuTiroasi kwatakagara kwamazuva manomwe. 
Acts20:7 Pazuva rokutanga revhiki, patainge takaungana kuti timedure chingwa, Pauro akataura navo achida kuzosimuka mangwana acho. Akarebesa nhauro yake kusvikira pakati pousiku." 
Acts20:8 Makanga muine mwenje yakawanda muimba yapamusoro matakanga takaungana. 
Acts20:9 Rimwe jaya rainzi Yutikusi rakanga rakagara pawindo, rakabatwa nehope zvikuru Pauro paakaramba achingotaura. Paakakundwa nehope akaputsikira pasi kubva panhurikidzwa yechitatu vakazomutora iye atofa." 
Acts20:10 Pauro akadzika akakotamira paari akamugumbatira akati, “Musazvinetse zvenyu achiri mupenyu.”" 
Acts20:11 Pauro akakwirazve kuimba yokumusoro akamedura chingwa akadya akataura kusvika kunze kwachena. 
Acts20:12 Vakatora mukomana voenda naye ari mupenyu zvikavanyaradza zvikuru. 
Acts20:13 Takafanotungamira kuchikepe tikazosimuka nechikepe tichienda kuAsosi tichida kuzotora Pauro muchikepe ikoko, nokuti ndizvo zvaakanga aronga, iye achida kuenda netsoka." 
Acts20:14 Paakasangana nesu kuAsosi, takamukwidza muchikepe tikaenda kuNitirene." 
Acts20:15 Takabvapo nechikepe. Mangwana acho takasvika pakatarisana neKiosi. Ramangwana acho takapfuura napaSamosi. Ramangwanawo tikasvika kuMiretusi 
Acts20:16 nokuti Pauro akanga afunga kuenda nechikepe achipfuura nokuEfesusi kuti arege kupedza nguva ari kuAsia nokukurumidzira kuva kuJerusaremu, kana zvaigoneka pazuva rePendekosti." 
Acts20:17 Pauro, ari kuMiretusi akatumira nhume kuEfesusi kundodaidza vakuru vakuru vesangano." 
Acts20:18 Pavakasvika kwaari akavati, “Imi pachenyu munoziva kuti ndakagara sei pakati penyu nguva dzose kubvira zuva randakatanga kusvika muAsia," 
Acts20:19 ndichishandira Tenzi nokuzvidukupisa nemisodzi padama nemiedzo zvakandiwira pamusana pamabangano avaJudha. 
Acts20:20 Handina kumbozeza kukutaurirai pachena chose chakanga chiine basa ndichikudzidzisai zviri pachena imba nemba 
Acts20:21 ndichipa uchapupu kuna vaJudha nokuna vaGiriki nezvokutendeukira kuna Mwari uye nezvechitendero muna Tenzi wedu Jesu Kristu. 
Acts20:22 Zvino, chionai ndavakuenda kuJerusaremu ndakabatwa naMweya. Handizivi zvichandiwira ikoko," 
Acts20:23 kusiya kuti Mweya Mutsvene anondiyambira mumaguta ose kuti jeri nenhamo zvakandimirira; 
Acts20:24 asi handiverengi upenyu hwangu sehune maturo kana kuti hwakakosha kwandiri chero ndikapedza chinhanho changu nebasa randakapiwa naTenzi Jesu rokupupurira Shoko Rakanaka renyasha dzaMwari. 
Acts20:25 Zvino, chinzwai, ini ndinoziva kuti imi vandakafamba mukati mavo ndichiparidza umambo uhu, hamuchazoona chiso changu zvakare." 
Acts20:26 Nezvo ndinotaura pachena kwamuri mose nhasi uno kuti ini mhosva handisisina, wafa wafa, wasara wasara" 
Acts20:27 nokuti handina kuteta kukutaurirai pachena zvirongwa zvose zvaMwari. 
Acts20:28 Zvingwarirei imi pachenyu nedanga rose ramakaitwa vatariri varo naMweya Mutsvene kuti muchengete sangano raMwari raakawana neropa roMwanakomana wake pachake. 
Acts20:29 Ndinoziva kuti mushure mokuenda kwangu mhumhi dzinorura dzichauya pakati penyu dzisina tsitsi nokuuraya danga. 
Acts20:30 Kunyange mukati menyu iyemi muchamuka varume vachataura zvakatsauka kuti vakwezvere vadzidzi kwavari. 
Acts20:31 Naizvozvo chenjerai muchiyeuka kuti kwamakore matatu handina kumbomira siku nesikati, kukupai mazano mumwe nomumwe nemisodzi padama." 
Acts20:32 Zvino ndinokukumikidzai kuna Mwari uye kuShoko renyasha dzake rinokwanisa kukuvakai nokukupai nhaka pakati pavakaitwa vatsvene. 
Acts20:33 Handina kuchiva sirivha kana ndarama kana hanzu dzomunhu. 
Acts20:34 Imi pachenyu munozviziva kuti maoko aya ndiwo aindishandira pane zvandaida nezvaidikanwa navandaiva navo. 
Acts20:35 Ndakakuratidzai, muna zvose, kuti nokushingaira kudaro munhu anofanira kubatsira vakarukutika, tichiyeuka mazwi aTenzi Jesu zvaakataura achiti, ‘Chikomborero chikuru kupa pane kugamuchira.’ ”" 
Acts20:36 Paakapedza kutaura izvi akapfugama akanamata navo vose. 
Acts20:37 Vose vakachema vakambundikirana naPauro vakamutsvoda. 
Acts20:38 Vaisuwiswa zvikuru nezwi raakanga ataura rokuti, “Havachazoona uso hwake zvakare.” Vakamuperekedza kuchikepe." 
Acts21:1 Patakanga taparadzana navo tava kuenda nechikepe takangoti tasa kuenda kuKosi. Zuva rakatevera takaenda kuRodzi. Patakabvako takaenda kuPatara. 
Acts21:2 Patakawana chikepe chaiyambukira kuFonisia takachikwira tikaenda. 
Acts21:3 Patakasvika pokunge tava kuona Saipurasi takaisiya kuruboshwe toenda kuSiria tikamira paTire nokuti ipapo chikepe chaifanira kututunura zvachainge chakatakura. 
Acts21:4 Patakatsvaka tikawana vadzidzi, takagarapo mazuva manomwe. Vaina Mweya Mutsvene, vakataurira Pauro kuti arege kunge achaenda kuJerusaremu." 
Acts21:5 Pakapera mazuva edu ikoko, takasimuka tikaenda murwendo rwedu. Vakatiperekedza vose namadzimai avo navana kusvikira kunze kweguta. Takapfugama pamahombekombe egungwa tikanamata ndokuonekana." 
Acts21:6 Takazokwira muchikepe, ivo ndokubva vadzokera kumba." 
Acts21:7 Rwendo rwedu rwokubva kuTire rwakapera nokusvika kwatakaita kuToremaisi. Takakwazisa vehama tikagara navo zuva rimwechete. 
Acts21:8 Ramangwana takasimuka tikasvika kuSezaria tikanopinda mumba maFiripi, muparidzi aiva mumwe wavanomwe vaya, tikagara naye." 
Acts21:9 Akanga ane vanasikana vana vasina kuroorwa vaiporofita. 
Acts21:10 Patakamboti garei kwamazuva akati kuti, mumwe muporofita anonzi Agabhusi akadzika achibva kuJudhea." 
Acts21:11 Paakauya kwatiri akatora bhande raPauro akazvisunga makumbo namaoko akati zvanzi naMweya Mutsvene, “Ndiko kusungwa kuchaitwa, navaJudha vokuJerusaremu, muridzi webhande iri vachizomuturira mumaoko evechirudzi.”" 
Acts21:12 Patakanzwa izvi, isu pamwechete navanhu vaivapo takamukumbira kuti arege kukwira kuJerusaremu" 
Acts21:13 Pauro akapindura achiti, “Ko muri kuiteiko, kuchema muchindibaya mwoyo kudai. Inga wani ndakatogadzirira, kwete chete kusungwa, asi kana kutofira zita raTenzi Jesu kuJerusaremu.”" 
Acts21:14 Paakaramba kudzoreka, takarega kutaura tikati, “Kuda kwaTenzi ngakuitwe.”" 
Acts21:15 Mushure memazuva iwaya takagadzirira tikakwira kuJerusaremu. 
Acts21:16 Vamwe vadzidzi vokuSezaria vakaenda nesu. Vakatisvitsa kumba kwaMunasoni wekuSaipurasi mudzidzi wapakutanga chaipo ane kumba kwataifanira kundogara. 
Acts21:17 Patakasvika kuJerusaremu vehama vakatigamuchira nomufaro. 
Acts21:18 Pazuva rakatevera Pauro akaenda nesu kuna Jemusi uye vakuru vakuru vose vakanga varipo. 
Acts21:19 Pashure pokuvakwazisa akavarondedzera chimwe nechimwe chezvinhu zvakaitwa naMwari pakati pevechirudzi nomubasa rake iye Pauro. 
Acts21:20 Pavakazvinzwa vakarumbidza Mwari. Vakamuti, “Unoona here nhai hama, kuti zviuru zvingani pakati pavaJudha vakatenda, vane shungu noMutemo." 
Acts21:21 Vakataurirwa nezvako zvokuti uri kudzidzisa vaJudha vose vari pakati pevechirudzi kuti vafuratire Mosesi, uchivaudza kuti vasadzingise vana vavo kana kuchengeta tsika dzedu." 
Acts21:22 Zvino zvoitwa sei? Vachazvinzwa kuti wakauya. 
Acts21:23 Iwe chiita zvatinokuudza. Tine varume vana vakaita mhiko! 
Acts21:24 Tora varume ivavo uzvichenure pamwechete navo uvabhadharire kuti vaveure musoro vose. Vanobva vaziva kuti zvavanga vachitaurirwa nezvako hapana zviripo asi kuti iwe pachako muupenyu hwako unochengeta mutemo. 
Acts21:25 Asi kune vechirudzi, vakadavira, takavatumira tsamba ine zvatakatema zvokuti vasiyane nezvinhu zvakabairwa zvifananidzo zvokunamata, varege musiya nenyama isina kusinzwa noupombwe.”" 
Acts21:26 Pauro akatora varume vaya. Zuva rakatevera akazvichenura pamwechete navarume vaya akapinda muTemberi kundotaura kuti mazuva okuzvichenura kwavo anopera rini nechibayiro chinopirirwa mumwe nomumwe wavo. 
Acts21:27 Mazuva manomwe paakanga ava kuda kundopera, vaJudha vanobva kuAsia vakanga vamuona muTemberi vakanyandutsa mhomho yavanhu vakamubata vachidaidzira vachiti," 
Acts21:28 “Varume, vaIsiraeri, uyai tibatsirane uyu ndiye murume ari kudzidzisa vanhu kose kose zvinorwisana navanhu vedu uye zvinorwisana nomutemo wedu nezvinorwisana nenzvimbo ino. Chimwezve ndechokuti akaunza vaGiriki muTemberi uye akan'oresa nzvimbo ino tsvene.”" 
Acts21:29 Vakanga vamboona Tirofimusi muEfeso ainaye muguta, nezvo vakangofunga kuti Pauro akanga amuunza muTemberi." 
Acts21:30 Guta rose rakanyanduka vanhu ndokubva vati unga unga kuungana. Vakabata Pauro vakamukwekwereretsera kunze kweTemberi. Pakarepo misuo mikuru yakabva yazarirwa. 
Acts21:31 Pavakanga vachiedza kumuuraya shoko rakasvika kumukuru mukuru webato ramasoja rokuti Jerusaremu yose yangova nyonganyonga. 
Acts21:32 Pakarepo akabva atora masoja navatungamiri vezana akamhanya kwavari. Pavakaona mukuru mukuru namasoja vakaregedza kurova Pauro. 
Acts21:33 Mukuru mukuru wamasoja uya paakasvika pedyo akamusunga akati anofanira kusungwa necheni mbiri. Akabvunza kuti ndiani uye kuti aiitei. Vamwe mumhomho iyoyo, vaidaidzira vachiti, ava vanotaura izvi avawo vachitaurawo zvimwe." 
Acts21:34 Zvaasina kukwanisa kuziva mamiriro ezvinhu pamusana pemhirizhonga iyi akati ngaaendeswe munzvimbo inogara masoja. 
Acts21:35 Paakasvika pamadanho okupinda mumba akatoita zvokutotakurwa kwazvo namasoja nokuda kwechisimba chakanga choitwa nebvakapfaka riya 
Acts21:36 nokuti mhomho yakanga yotevera ichiti, “Pasi naye.”" 
Acts21:37 Pauro paakanga ava kuda kupinzwa munogara masoja akati kuna mukuru wamasoja, “Ndingataurewo here zvangu nemi.” Mukuru wamasoja akati, “Unoziva chiGiriki here?" 
Acts21:38 Hausiwe here muIjipiti uya akamutsa chimurenga mazuva ano achangopfuura aya akatungamirira varume zviuru zvina zvemhondi kurenje?” 
Acts21:39 Pauro akapindura achiti, “Ini ndiri muJudha anobva kuTasusi kuSirisia, mugari weguta rinozivikanwa. Ndinokutetererai kuti mundibvumirewo kuti nditaure kuvanhu.”" 
Acts21:40 Paakamubvumira, Pauro akaninira ruoko kuvanhu amire pamasitepisi enzvimbo iyoyo. Pakwakanyararwa kuti mwi — i akataura nomutauro wechiHebheru achiti:" 
Acts22:1 “Varume hama, nemi madzibaba, teererai kuzvidavirira kwandinoita pamberi penyu.”" 
Acts22:2 Pavakanzwa kuti aitaura kwavari nechiHebheru vakabva vatonyarara zvikuru. Iye akati," 
Acts22:3 “Ini ndiri muJudha ndakaberekerwa kuTasusi kuSirisia. Asi ndakarerwa muguta rino ndiri mumaoko aGamarieri ndikanyatsodzidziswa kuchengeta nemazvo chaimo mutemo wamadzibaba edu ndiine shungu naMwari sezvamakangoitawo imi nhasi uno. 
Acts22:4 Ndakatambudza venzira iyi kusvika parufu ndichisunga ndichiuisa mujeri varume nevakadzi zvingatopupurirwawo 
Acts22:5 nomupristi mukuru nedare ravakuru vakuru. Ndakatopihwa matsamba navo kune vehama. Ndaienda kuDhamasikusi kuti ndinotora vakanga variko ndichivauisa vakasungwa kuJerusaremu kuti vazorangwa. 
Acts22:6 “Pandakanga ndiri parwendo rwangu, ndavakusvika kuDhamasikusi, kumasikati — sikati, chiedza chikuru chakabva kudenga chikandipoteredza nokupenya kwacho." 
Acts22:7 Ndakawira pasi ndikanzwa izwi richiti kwandiri, ‘Sauro Sauro uri kunditambudzireiko.’" 
Acts22:8 Ini ndakapindura ndichiti, ‘Ndimi aniko Tenzi?’ Iye akati kwandiri, ‘Ndini Jesu weNazareti wauri kutambudza.’" 
Acts22:9 Zvino avo vakanga vaneni vakaona chiedza asi havana kunzwa izwi rewakanga achitaura kwandiri. 
Acts22:10 Ndakati, ‘Ko ndoiteko Tenzi?’ Tenzi akati kwandiri, ‘Chisimuka uende muDhamasikusi. Imomo uchataurirwa zvose zvawakarongerwa kuti uite.’" 
Acts22:11 Sezvandakanga ndisisaone pamusana pokupenya hwechiedza chiya, ndakatoita zvokubatwa ruoko ndichitungamirirwa navandaiva navo ndikapinda muDhamasikusi." 
Acts22:12 “Mumwe munhu anonzi Ananiya, munamati chaiye waMwari maererano nomutemo, aitaurwa zvakanaka nezvake navaJudha vose vaigara ikoko." 
Acts22:13 Akauya kwandiri akasvikomira pandiri akanditi, ‘Hama Sauro chikwanisa kuonazve.’ ” Ndakabva ndava kuona, ndikamuonawo." 
Acts22:14 Iye akati, “Mwari wamadzibaba edu akakusarudza kuti uzive zvaanoda, uye kuti uone Mururami uyewo kuti unzwe izwi rinobva mumuromo make" 
Acts22:15 nokuti uchava chapupu chake kuvanhu vose uchipupurira zvawaona nezvawanzwa. 
Acts22:16 Pane chaungamirire here?” Chisimuka uombekwe ushambidzwe zvitadzo uchidaidza zita rake. 
Acts22:17 “Pandakadzokera kuJerusaremu, pandainamata muTemberi" 
Acts22:18 ndava muMweya, ndakaona Tenzi achiti kwandiri, ‘Kurumidza ubude muJerusaremu nokukasika nokuti havasikuzogamuchira umboo hwako nezvangu.’ ”" 
Acts22:19 Ini ndakati, “Tenzi ivo pachavo vanoziva kuti musinagogu yoga yoga ndaiisa vanhu mujeri ndichirova vaitenda mamuri." 
Acts22:20 Ropa raSitefani chapupu chenyu parakadeurwa ndakanga ndimire pedyo ndichitowirirana nazvo uye ndichitochengeta hanzu dzevakanga vachimuuraya.” 
Acts22:21 Iye akanditi, “Chibva nokuti ndichakutumira kure kure kune vechirudzi.”" 
Acts22:22 Kusvikira ipapa vakamuteerera vakazodaidzira vachiti, “Panyika pano, pasi nomunhu wakadai, nokuti haafaniri kurarama.”" 
Acts22:23 Pavaidaidzira vachivheyesa hanzu dzavo vachitibura huruva," 
Acts22:24 mukuru mukuru wamasoja akati ngaauiswe munzvimbo inogara masoja vamurove kwazvo kuti vaongorore vaone chikonzero chokuti vaJudha vazhambe kwaari zvakadaro.
