Acts22:25 Pavakanga vamusunga netambo, Pauro akati kumutungamiri wezana ramasoja akanga amire pedyo, “Zviri pamutemo here kuti imi murove munhu muRoma musina kumubata nemhosva.”" 
Acts22:26 Mutungamiri wezana paakazvinzwa akaenda kumukuru mukuru wamasoja uya akati kwaari, “Ko chii chamuri kuda kuita ichi. Munhu uyu muRoma.”" 
Acts22:27 Ipapo mukuru mukuru wamasoja akauya akati kwaari, “Ndiudze, uri muRoma here?” Iye akati, “Hongu.”" 
Acts22:28 Mukuru mukuru wamasoja akati, “Ndakatenga uRoma ihwohwo nemari yakawanda kwazvo.” Pauro akati, “Asi ini ndakaberekwa ndiine uRoma ihwohwo.”" 
Acts22:29 Nokudaro vaya vakanga vachida kumuongorora vakabva paari pakarepo. Naiyewo mukuru mukuru wamasoja akanga avakutotyawo nokuti akanga azviziva kuti Pauro akanga ari muRoma uye kuti akanga amusunga kwazvo. 
Acts22:30 Mangwana acho mukuru mukuru wamasoja zvaaida kuziva chikonzero chaicho vaJudha chavaimupira mhosva akamusunungura akati, vapristi namakurukota ose edare aungane ndokuenda naPauro ondomuisa pamberi pavo." 
Acts23:1 Pauro akanyatsotarisana nedare akati, “Hama ndakagara nehana yakachena pamberi paMwari kusvikira pari nhasi.”" 
Acts23:2 Mupristi mukuru Ananiya akati kune vakanga vamire pedyo naye vamurove pamuromo. 
Acts23:3 Pauro akati kwaari, “Mwari achakurova, iwe chidziro zvacho chadzururwa kuchena nesuko. Ndozvawakagarira ipapo kuti unditonge zviri pamutemo asi uchityora mutemo nhai? Uri kuti ndinofanira kurohwa.”" 
Acts23:4 Vakanga vamire padyo naye vakati, “Unoda kushora mupristi mukuru waMwari here?”" 
Acts23:5 Pauro akati, “Handina kuziva, hama dzangu, kuti mupristi mukuru nokuti zvakanyorwa zvichinzi, ‘Haufaniri kutaura zvakaipa nezvemutongi wavanhu vako.’ ”" 
Acts23:6 Pauro, paakaona kuti chimwe chikamu chaiva chiri chavaSadhusei, chimwe chiri chavaFarisei akadaidzira mudare achiti, “Varume hama ini ndiri muFarisei, mwana womuFarisei. Ini ndiri kupinzirwa dare pamusana pechitarisiro uye kumuka kwavakafa.”" 
Acts23:7 Paakataura izvi pakabva pava nokupesana pakati pavaFarisei navaSadhusei. Musangano wakabva wakamukana. 
Acts23:8 Chiripo ndechokuti, vaSadhusei vanoti zvokumuka kwavafi hapana kana mutumwa kana mweya asi vaFarisei vanoti zvose izvozvo zviriko." 
Acts23:9 Pakabva pamuka bopoto guru. Dzimwe nyanzvi dzomutemo webato ravaFarisei vakasimuka vachipikisa vachiti, “Hapana chatinoona chakaipa nomunhu uyu. Ko, zvichida mumwe mweya kana kuti mumwe mutumwa akataura naye!”" 
Acts23:10 Kupikisana uku zvakwakasvika pokuti bata wabata, mukuru mukuru wamasoja, nokutya kuti Pauro angangodamburwa damburwa navo, akati masoja adzike andomutora nechisimba pakati pavo vamuunze munzvimbo inogara masoja." 
Acts23:11 Usiku hwakatevera, Tenzi akamira pedyo naPauro akati, “Tsunga mwoyo, nokuti sokundipupurira kwawaita muJerusaremu unofanira kundopupurawo kuRoma.”" 
Acts23:12 Pakwakachena vaJudha vakaita bangano vakazvisunga nemhiko yokuti havambodya kana kunwa kusvikira vatouraya Pauro. 
Acts23:13 Vakaita bangano iri vaipfuura makumi mana. 
Acts23:14 Vakaenda kuvaPristi vakuru navakuru vakuru vakati tanyatsozvisunga nemhiko kuti hatimbodyi kusvikira tauraya Pauro. 
Acts23:15 Naizvozvo imi pamwe nedare taurirai mukuru mukuru wamasoja kuti amudzikise kwamuri sokunge munoda kunyatsotsvakisisa mhosva yake nemazvo chaimo. Isu takagadzirira kumuuraya asati ambosvika pedyo. 
Acts23:16 Zvino mwana wehanzvadzi yaPauro akanzwa zvokuhwandira kwavo. Nezvo akandopinda munzvimbo yaigara masoja akataurira Pauro. 
Acts23:17 Pauro akadaidza mumwe wavatungamiri vezana akati, “Endai nejaya iri kumukuru mukuru wamasoja nokuti ane zvimwe zvaari kuda kumutaurira.”" 
Acts23:18 Naizvozvo akamutora akaenda naye kumukuru mukuru wamasoja uya akati, “Pauro musungwa uya andidana akandikumbira kuti ndiunze jaya iri kwamuri nokuti rine zvarinoda kutaura kwamuri.”" 
Acts23:19 Mukuru mukuru wamasoja akamubata ruoko akaenda naye parutivi omubvunza muchivande achiti, “Chii chaunoda kunditaurira.”" 
Acts23:20 Iye akati, “VaJudha varangana kuti vakukumbirei kuti mudzikise Pauro kudare mangwana sokunge vanoda kunyatsotsvagisisa mhosva yake nemazvo chaimo." 
Acts23:21 Asi imi musabvume nokuti kune vanhu vavo varume vanopfuura makumi mana vanenge vakamuhwandira vatozvisunga nemhiko yokuti havamboruma chinhu kana kunwa chinhu kusvikira vatouraya Pauro. Iye zvino vatogadzirira. Vangomirira chitsidzo chenyu.” 
Acts23:22 Mukuru mukuru wamasoja akaendesa jaya riya achiriudza kuti risataurire kana munhu zvake kuti ramuudza izvozvi. 
Acts23:23 Akadaidza vatungamiri vezana vaviri akati, “Paawa yechipfumbamwe mauro ano, gadzirirai masoja mazana maviri navarwi vanotasva mabhiza makumi manomwe navanorwa namapfumo mazana maviri vokuenda kuSezaria," 
Acts23:24 muwanisewo Pauro mabhiza okutasva, mumusvitse zvakanaka kuna gavhuna Ferekisi." 
Acts23:25 Akanyora tsamba sezvizvi: 
Acts23:26 “Ini Kiraudiusi Risiasi, ndinokunyorerai imi vanoremekedzwa vaGavhunha Ferekisi ndichikukwazisai." 
Acts23:27 Murume uyu akabatwa navaJudha akanga oda kutouraiwa navo. Pandakavasvikira namasoja ndakamununura ndikanzwa kuti muRoma. 
Acts23:28 Pandainge ndichida kuziva mhosva yavaimupa ndakadzika naye kudare ravo. 
Acts23:29 Ndakaona kuti vaimupa mhosva dzezvemutemo wavo asi hapana mhosva yavaimupa inokodzera rufu kana kuiswa mujeri. 
Acts23:30 Pandakaziviswa kuti pane bangano rakaitirwa iye, ndabva ndamutumira kwamuri pakarepo ndichiudzawo vari kumupa mhosva kuti vataure pamberi penyu zvaakatadza.”" 
Acts23:31 Naizvozvo masoja, sokuudzwa kwavakanga vaitwa, vakaenda naye nousiku vakamusvitsa kuAndipatirisi." 
Acts23:32 Mangwana acho vakadzokera kunzvimbo inogara masoja vosiya varwi vamabhisa kuti vaende naye mberi. 
Acts23:33 Pavakasvika kuSezaria vasvitsa tsamba iya kuna Gavhuna vakaturira Pauro kwaari. 
Acts23:34 Paakaverenga tsamba iya, akabvunza kuti anogara kudunhu ripi. Paakaziva kuti ndeweSirisia" 
Acts23:35 akati, “Ndichakunzwa kana vari kukupa mhosva vasvika.” Akati ngaachengetedzwe mumuzinda waHerodhi." 
Acts24:1 Mushure memazuva mashanu, mupristi mukuru Ananiya akadzika navamwe vakuru vakuru nerimwe gweta rainzi Teturosi. Vakapira nyaya yavo kuna Gavhuna yokupomera Pauro." 
Acts24:2 Paakadaidzwa, Teturosi akatangisa kumupa mhosva akati, “Changamire, vaFerekisi nenzira yokuti nokuda kwenyu tine rugare rukuru uye nokutichengeta kwenyu zvinhu zvizhinji zviri kunatsiridzwa kurudzi rwedu urwu." 
Acts24:3 Nenzira dzose uye kose kose tinogamuchira izvi nokutenda kose. 
Acts24:4 Asi kuti tirege kuramba tichikunonotsai ndinokukumbirai nomutsa wenyu kumbotiteererawo zvenyu muchidimbu. 
Acts24:5 Takaona kuti munhu uyu mupesveri, anomutsa nyonganyonga pakati pavaJudha vose pasi pose uye inhungamiri yekaboka kavaNazarini." 
Acts24:6 Akatomboedza kun'oresa Temberi asi takamubata. 
Acts24:7 *** 
Acts24:8 Nokumuongororawo muchizvinzwirawo imi pachenyu muchaziva kwaari mhosva dzose dzatiri kumupa.” 
Acts24:9 VaJudha vakatsigira kumupa mhosva vachiti ndizvo chaizvo. 
Acts24:10 Gavhuna paakamuninira kuti ataure, Pauro akapindura achiti, “Nokuziva kuti imi, kwamakore mazhinji manga muri mutongi werudzi urwu, ndinozvidzivirira ndichifara." 
Acts24:11 Sezvinhu zvamungatotsvakawo, hakusati kwapera mazuva anopfuura gumi namaviri kubvira pandakaenda kundonamata kuJerusaremu." 
Acts24:12 Havana kumbondiona ndichiitirana nharo naani zvake kana kunyandutsa mhomho yavanhu muTemberi kana mumasinagogu kana muguta. 
Acts24:13 Uyewo havakwanisi kutaura zvingakugutsei kuratidza kuti zvavari kundipomera ndezvechokwadi. 
Acts24:14 Asi izvi ndinobvuma pamuri, kuti ndinonamata Mwari wamadzibaba edu ndichitevera nzira yekavari kuti kaboka. Ndinotenda zvose zvakatemwa nomutemo kana zvakanyorwa navaporofita." 
Acts24:15 Ndine chitarisiro muna Mwari zvinobvumwa naivava kuti kuchava nokumuka kwavafi, vakarurama navakaipa." 
Acts24:16 Saizvozvo ndinoedza kwazvo kuchengetedza hana yangu yakachena kuna Mwari nokuna vanhu. 
Acts24:17 “Kwapera makore akati kuti, ndakauya kuzopa verudzi rwangu zvipo zvomwoyochena wavamwe nemipiro." 
Acts24:18 Pandaiita izvi, vakandiwana muTemberi ndichipedzisa zvokuzvichenura, pasina chikwata chavanhu kana nyonganyonga." 
Acts24:19 Asi vamwe vaJudha vanobva kuAsia, ivavo vaifanira kunge vari pano pamberi penyu vachikupirai mhosva dzacho dzavanondipomera kana vanadzo." 
Acts24:20 Kana kuti varume vari pano ava pachavo, vataure kuti zvandakaita zvakaipa zvavakawana pandakamira pamberi pedare ndezvipi" 
Acts24:21 kusiya izvi zvandakadaidzira ndakamira mukati mavo zvokuti ndakati, ‘Ndiri kupinzirwa dare pamusoro pezvokumuka kwavakafa pamberi penyu nhasi uno.’ ”" 
Acts24:22 Asi Ferekisi, munhu akanga achiziva zvinhu zvizhinji nezveNzira yechikristu, akamisa dare achiti, “Kana Risiasi, mukuru mukuru wamasoja adzika kuno ndipo pandichapedzisa nyaya yako.”" 
Acts24:23 Ipapo akaudza mutungamiri wezana kuti Pauro anofanira kuchengetedzwa ari muusungwa asi aine rusununguko rwakati kuti uye kuti hapana shamwari dzake dzinorambidzwa kumuwanisa zvinomubatsira kurarama. 
Acts24:24 Mushure memazuva akati kuti, Ferekisi akauya nomudzimai wake, Dhurusira akanga ari muJudha. Akadaidza Pauro akamunzwa achitaura nezvechitendero muna Kristu Jesu." 
Acts24:25 Pauro paairondedzera nezvoruenzaniso nezvokuzvibata nezvokutongwa kuchauya, Ferekisi zvakamutyisa akati parizvino chimboenda zvako kana ndawana nguva ndichazokudaidza." 
Acts24:26 Panguva imwecheteyo aitarisira kupiwa pfumbamuromo naPauro, saka aimudaidza kakawanda achitaura naye." 
Acts24:27 Kuzoti makore maviri apera Ferekisi akatsiviwa naPokiusi Fesitusi. Pamusana pokuda kufadza vaJudha Ferekisi akasiya Pauro ari mujeri. 
Acts25:1 Fesitusi paakauya kudunhu rake mushure memazuva matatu akakwira kuJerusaremu achibva kuSezaria. 
Acts25:2 Vapristi vakuru navakuru vakuru vaVaJudha vakamuzivisa nezvemhosva yavaipa Pauro. Vakamukumbirisa," 
Acts25:3 kuti avaitire mutsa wokuti, Pauro aunzwe kuJerusaremu ivo vaine bangano rokumuhwandira kuti vamuuraye panzira." 
Acts25:4 Fesitusi akapindura achiti, “Pauro ari kuchengetedzwa kuSezaria uye kuti iye Fesitusi pachakewo aitoda kuendako mushure mechinguvana.”" 
Acts25:5 Iye akati, “Naizvozvo regai varume vane ukuru pakati penyu vadzike pamwechete neni uye kana pane chakaipa nomunhu uyu mutaure mhosva yaanayo.”" 
Acts25:6 Akati garei mazuva asingapfuuri masere kana gumi, akadzika kuSezaria. Ramangwana acho agara pachigaro chake chokutonga akati Pauro aunzwe." 
Acts25:7 Paakauya, vaJudha vakanga vadzika vachibva kuJerusaremu vakamukomba vachimupomera mhosva zhinji dzakaipisisa dzavakanga vasingagoni kuburitsa chokwadi chadzo." 
Acts25:8 Pauro, achizvidzivirira, akati, “Handina kana kutyora mutemo wavaJudha kana weTemberi kana kutadzira Siza.”" 
Acts25:9 Pamusana pokuda kufadza vaJudha akati kuna Pauro, “Unoda here kuenda kuJerusaremu kundotongwa nemhosva dzamhan'arwa kwandiri idzi?”" 
Acts25:10 Pauro akati, “Ndimire mudare raSiza kwandinofanira kutongwa. Handina kutadzira vaJudha, sokunyatsozviziva kwamunoita." 
Acts25:11 Kana ndiri munhu akakanganisa uye ndakapara mhosva ipi neipi zvayo inokodzera kuti ndife handisi kuda kutsvaga kupunyuka rufu asi pane zvavari kundimhan'arira kana pasina mhosva hapana angakwanise kunditurira mumaoko avo. Ini ndinoda kuti mhosva yangu ichisvitswa kuna Siza.” 
Acts25:12 Ipapo, Fesitusi, mushure mokunge ambobvunzawo makurukota ake akapindura achiti, “Wakumbira kuti mhosva yako isvitswe kuna Siza, kuna Siza ndiko kwauchaenda.”" 
Acts25:13 Kwakati kwapera mamwe mazuva mambo Agiripa akauya naBhenisi kuSezaria kuzogamuchira Fesitusi. 
Acts25:14 Sezvavakagara mazuva mazhinji, Fesitusi akapira mhosva yaPauro pana mambo achiti, “Pane murume akasiiwa ari muusungwa naFerekisi." 
Acts25:15 Zvino pandaiva kuJerusaremu vaPristi vakuru navakuru vakuru vavaJudha vakandizivisa nezvake vachikumbira kuti ndimutonge. 
Acts25:16 Ndakavapindura kuti haisiri tsika yavaRoma kuturira munhu kuti arangwe asati atongesana vakatarisana navakamumhan'arira achiwaniswa nguva yokuzvidavirira nezvemhosva yaanenge achipiwa. 
Acts25:17 Naizvozvo pavakaungana kuno handina kunonoka asi kuti pazuva rakatevera ndakagara pachigaro changu chokutonga ndikati murume wacho auiswe. 
Acts25:18 Vamhan'ari pavakasimuka havana kuunza mhosva panyaya iyi dzine uipi hwandaifunga 
Acts25:19 asi vaiva nezvimwe zvavaikakavadzana nezvechitendero chavo uye nezvaJesu akafa anonzi naPauro mupenyu. 
Acts25:20 Pandakazvishaira pazvo kuti ndobvunza ndichiti kudini, ndakamubvunza kuti angade here kuenda kuJerusaremu kuti andotongwa nezvezvinhu izvi." 
Acts25:21 Pauro paakakumbira kuti achengetwe ari muusungwa kusvikira nyaya yake yapedzwa naSiza ndakati achengetwe kusvikira ndamutumira kuna Siza.” 
Acts25:22 Agiripa akati kuna Fesetusi, “Ndingade ini pachangu kunzwa murume uyu.” Iye akati, “Muchamunzwa mangwana.”" 
Acts25:23 Pazuva ramangwana acho Agiripa naBhenisi vakauya vakashongashonga kwazvo. Vakapinda mumba yedare redzimhosva pamwechete navakuru vakuru vemuhondo navakuru vakuru vomuguta. Pauro akaunzwamo zvataurwa naFesitusi kuti aunzwe. 
Acts25:24 Fesitusi akati, “Mambo Agiripa nemi mose muri pano. Tarisai muone munhu uyu wandakakumbirwa navanhu vose vechiJudha vari Jerusaremu navari kuno vachitodaidzira kuti haambofanira kuramba ari mupenyu." 
Acts25:25 Asi ndakaona kuti hapana chaakaita chinokodzera rufu, uye sokukumbira kwaakaita iye pachake kuti mhosva yake isvitswe pana Mambo mukuru, ndakafunga zvokumutumira ikoko." 
Acts25:26 Asi ini handina chinhu chaicho chokunyora nezvake kuna tenzi wangu. Ndiko kusaka ndamuunza pamberi penyu, zvikuru pamberi penyu imi mambo Agiripa kuti mushure mokunge tamuongorora ndiwane chokunyora" 
Acts25:27 nokuti kwandiri zvinhu zvisina musoro kuti nditumire musungwa ndisina kureva mhosva dzaari kupiwa.” 
Acts26:1 Agiripa akati kuna Pauro, “Unobvumirwa kuzvitaurira.” Pauro akasimudza ruoko rwake akazvidavirira." 
Acts26:2 “Ndinofunga kuti ndine mhanza yakanaka kuti ndizvidavirire nhasi pamberi penyu, imi mambo Agiripa, pane zvose zvandinopomerwa navaJudha" 
Acts26:3 nokuti imi munonyatsoziva tsika namakakatanwa anoitwa navaJudha, saka ndinokukumbirai kuti munditeererewo nemwoyo murefu." 
Acts26:4 “VaJudha vose vanoziva mugariro wangu kubvira pahwana huduku hwangu uye upenyu hwandakagara kubvira pakutanga mukati merudzi rwangu muJerusaremu. 
Acts26:5 Vanondiziva kwenguva ndefu, kana vachida zvavo kuzvipupura, kuti ndakagara somuFarisei, bato rinochengetedza zvechitendero chedu nemazvo chaimo." 
Acts26:6 Zvino ndiri pano ndichitongerwa chitarisiro munezvakatsidzirwa madzitateguru edu naMwari 
Acts26:7 Mambo, zviri kutarisirwa kuwanika namadzinza edu gumi namaviri pavanonamata nemwoyo wose siku nesikati, chitarisiro ichocho ndicho chandiri kupirwa mhosva navaJudha." 
Acts26:8 Sei muchizviona sechinhu chisingagoneki kuti Mwari anomutsa vakafa. 
Acts26:9 “Iniwo pachangu ndaiva nechokwadi chaicho kuti ndinofanira kuita zvinhu zvizhinji zvokurwisa zita raJesu weNazareti. 
Acts26:10 Izvi ndakazviita muJerusaremu. Handina kungozaririra vazhinji vavasarudzwi vaMwari mumajeri ndichishandisa simba randakapiwa navapristi vakuru asi kuti pavaiuraiwa ndairatidza kuwirirana navo. 
Acts26:11 Ndakavaranga kakawanda mumasinagogu ose uye ndakaedza kuti vashonhe Mwari. Ndaivatambudza ndiine hasha dzisingatauriki kusvika kumaguta okunze kwenyika. 
Acts26:12 Ndizvo zvakaita kuti ndiende kuDhamasikusi ndapiwa navapristi vakuru simba nebasa rokuita izvozvo. 
Acts26:13 Zuva rava kurova panhongonya, mambo, ndakaona panzira chiedza chakabva kudenga chichipenya kupinda zuva. Chakapenya chakanditenderedza ini navandaifamba navo." 
Acts26:14 Patakawira pasi tose ndakanzwa izwi richitaura kwandiri mumutauro wechiHebheru richiti, ‘Sauro Sauro uri kunditambudzirei. Zvinokurwadza kupfanha negumbo shamhu.’" 
Acts26:15 Ndakati, ‘Ndimi aniko Tenzi?’ Tenzi akati, ‘Ndini Jesu wauri kutambudza." 
Acts26:16 Asi chisimuka umire namakumbo ako, nokuti izvi ndizvo zvandazviratidzira kwauri kuti ndikusarudze ushande uye kuti uve chapupu chezvawandiona ndiri uye mune zvandicharatidza kwauri" 
Acts26:17 ndichikununura kuvanhu nekune vechirudzi vandichakutumira kwavari 
Acts26:18 kuti uzarure maziso avo vatendeuke kubva murima vachienda muchiedza uye kubva mumaoko aSatani vachienda mumaoko aMwari kuti vawane kuregererwa kwezvitadzo zvavo uye vawane nzvimbo mukati mevavo vakasarudzwa pamusana pechitendero chavo mandiri.’ 
Acts26:19 “Saizvozvo, Mambo Agiripa handairamba kuteerera chiratidzo ichocho chokudenga asi ndakatanga kuzivisa vari" 
Acts26:20 kuDhamasikusi tevere vokuJerusaremu ndokuzouyawo nyika yose yeJudhea nokune vechirudzi kuti vanofanira kupinduka vadzokere kuna Mwari vaite zvinowirirana nokutendeuka kwavo. 
Acts26:21 Pamusana paizvozvi vaJudha vakandibata muTemberi vakaedza kundiuraya. 
Acts26:22 Kusvikira pari nhasi ndakabatsirwa naMwari. Saizvozvo ndimire pano ndichipupura kuvaduku nokuvakuru pasina chimwe chandinotaura kunze kwezvakataurwa navaporofita naMosesi kuti zvichaitika 
Acts26:23 zvokuti Mesia anofanira kutambudzika achiva iye wokutanga kumuka muvafi achizoparidza nazvo chiedza kuvanhu nokune vechirudzi.” 
Acts26:24 Ipapa Pauro achizvidavirira, Fesitusi akadaidzira nezwi guru achiti, “Iwe Pauro wavakupenga iwe. Kudzidza kwako ndiko kwava kukupengesa iwe.”" 
Acts26:25 Pauro akati, “Handisi kupenga, changamire vanoremekedzwa vaFesitusi. Ndiri kutaura chokwadi nepfungwa" 
Acts26:26 dzakakwana nokuti mambo vanoziva zvinhu izvi uye ndinotaura kwavari ndakasununguka ndinonyatsoziva kuti hapana chimwe chezvinhu izvi chaasina kuona nokuti hazvina kuitirwa pachikona. 
Acts26:27 Nhai imi, Mambo Agiripa munotenda vaporofita here? Ini ndinoziva kuti munotenda.”" 
Acts26:28 Agiripa akati kuna Pauro, “Unofunga kuti angandiite muKristu nenguva pfupi yakadai here?”" 
Acts26:29 Pauro akati, “Ingave nguva pfupi kana refu zvayo, ndinotokumbira kuna Mwari, kuti kwete imi moga asi kuti vose vari kundinzwa nhasi uno vave sezvandiri, kunze kwecheni idzi chete.”" 
Acts26:30 Mambo akabva asimuka nagavhuna naBhenisi navavakanga vakagara navo. 
Acts26:31 Pavakanga vabva vakataurirana vachiti, “Munhu uyu hapana chaari kuita chinokodzera rufu kana kuiswa mujeri.”" 
Acts26:32 Agiripa akati kuna Fesutusi, “Munhu uyu angadai asunungurwa zvake dai asina kuti mhosva yake ikwidzwe kuna Siza.”" 
Acts27:1 Pazvakanga zvarongwa kuti tinofanira kuenda kuItari nechikepe, vakaisa Pauro navamwe vasungwa mumaoko aJuriasi aiva mutungamiriri wezana wechikwata chamasoja chokwaAgasitosi." 
Acts27:2 Takakwira chikepe chokuAdhiramitimu chakanga chava kuda kuenda kumaguta okumahombekombe eAsia. Takatangisa kufamba nechikepe tichiperekedzwa naAristakusi mugari wokuMasedhonia aibva kuTesaronika. 
Acts27:3 Pazuva rakatevera takandomisa chikepe paSidhoni. Juriasi akabata Pauro zvakanaka. Akamupa mvumo yokuenda kushamwari dzake kuti dzimuwanise zvokurarama nazvo. 
Acts27:4 Takabvapo tikaenda tiri kurutivi runoenda mhepo rweSaipurasi nokuti mhepo yanga yakatarisana nesu. 
Acts27:5 Patakanga tadimura gungwa riri parutivi peSirisia nePamupfuria takasvika kuMira muRisia. 
Acts27:6 Ikoko mutungamiri wezana akawana chikepe chokuArekizandiria chaienda kuItari akatikwidza machiri. 
Acts27:7 Takafamba nechikepe zvishoma nezvishoma mazuva akati kuti tikasvika, kuKinidhosi zvokutovavarira. Mhepo zvaisina kutibvumira kuenderera mberi, takatofamba tiri kunoenda mhepo kweKiriti tiri pedyo neSarimoni." 
Acts27:8 Takafamba pedyo namahombekombe ayo zvokutovavarira. Takazosvika kune imwe nzvimbo inonzi Maturiroakanaka iri padyo neguta rinonzi Rasea. 
Acts27:9 Sezvatakanga tarasikirwa nenguva yakawanda uye rwendo zvarwakanga ruine njodzi uye nokuti nguva yokutsanya yakanga yapfuura, Pauro akavapa zano achiti," 
Acts27:10 “Madzichangamire, ndirikuona kuti rwendo rwedu ruchava nokukuvara uye nokurasikirwa kukuru kwete nenhumbi nechikepe chete asiwo noupenyu hwedu.”" 
Acts27:11 Asi mutungamiriri wezana akateerera kune zvemutungamiriri wechikepe nomuridzi wechikepe kupinda zvaitaurwa naPauro. 
Acts27:12 Pamusanawo pokuti panomirira zvikepe pakanga pasingaiti kupedzera nguva yechando varipo, ruzhinji rwakasarudza kuti vabvepo vaende, vachiti zvimwe, vangadaro vakakwanisa kusvika kuFonikisi, nzvimbo inomirwa nezvikepe zveKiriti yakatarisa kuchamhembe kwakadziva kumabvazuva uye kumaodzanyemba kwakadziva kumabvazuva kuti tigopedzera nguva yechando tiriko." 
Acts27:13 Pakafefetera kamhepo kanobva kumaodzanyemba vakafunga kuti vawana zvavakanga vachida vakasimudza zvinorema zvokumisisa chikepe vakafambisa chikepe vachitevedza Kiriti vari pedyo namahombekombe. 
Acts27:14 Asi pakarepo dutu rinonzi mhepo yokuchamhembe kwakadziva kumabvazuva yakarova ichidzika ichibva nokuKiriti ikoko. 
Acts27:15 Chikepe chakahwetsurwa chikatadza kukunda mhepo tikabva tangoregerawo zvakadaro ndokubva tavakungoendeswa. 
Acts27:16 Takamhanya tiri kwakadzivirwa mhepo nakatsuwa kanonzi Kaudha. Takakwanisa kusungirira igwa zviri zvokutovavarira kwazvo. 
Acts27:17 Vakarikakatira mukati. Vakaita kuti chikepe chinyatsosimba nokusungirira tambo napasi pacho. Pamusana pokutya kuti vangangopinda mujecha ramahombekombe eSiritisi vakaderedza zvinofambisa chikepe, ndokungosundwa zvachowo." 
Acts27:18 Nenzira yokuti takanga tichitomhotswa — tomhotswa zvinotyisa ramangwana acho vakatangisa kukanda zvinhu panze. 
Acts27:19 Pazuva retatu vakakanda panze namaoko avo, zvimwe zvokushandisa pakufambisa chikepe." 
Acts27:20 Kuzoti kwaita mazuva akawanda pasingambooneka zuva kana nyenyedzi, iro dutu richitivhuvhuta zvakaomarara takanga tangobatira ura mumaoko tongoti ndiko kwavakupera uku." 
Acts27:21 Sezvo vakanga vagara kwenguva ndefu vasina chokudya Pauro akauya mberi pakati pavo akati, “Varume mungadai makanditeerera makarega kubva kuKiriti uye mungadai musina kupinda mukukuvara uku nokurasikirwa uku." 
Acts27:22 Ndinokukurudzirai kuti tsungai mwoyo nokuti hapana achafa pakati penyu kusiya kurasikirwa nechikepe," 
Acts27:23 nokuti ihwo husiku hwanhasi uhu mutumwa waMwari wangu wandinonamata 
Acts27:24 akamira pedyo neni akati, ‘Usatye Pauro, unofanira kundomira pamberi paSiza. Chinzwa Mwari akupa vose vauri kufamba navo nechikepe.’" 
Acts27:25 Naizvozvo tsungai mwoyo varume nokuti ndine chivimbo muna Mwari chokuti zvichangoitika sezvandaudzwa. 
Acts27:26 Asi tichanonzi njo pane chimwe chitsuwa.” 
Acts27:27 Kuzoti hwava usiku hwegumi nehwechina pataive tichingonzi suku nasai mugungwa reAdhiria pavakunge pakati pousiku vafambisi vechikepe vakafungidzira kuti vava kusvika kumahombekombe. 
Acts27:28 Vakaera namaungira vakaona mvura iri mamita makumi matatu namanomwe. Vangoti endei pamberi zvishomanana vakaerazve namaungira vakaona kuti yakanga yava mamita makumi maviri ana manomwe. 
Acts27:29 Pamusana pokutya kuti tingangoroverere pamabwe vakaburitsa zvimwe zvinorema zvokumisisa chikepe zvina necheshure kwechikepe vachinamata kuti dai kwangoedza. 
Acts27:30 Vafambisi vechikepe pavaiedza kutsvaga nzira dzokutiza nadzo muchikepe, vatodzikisa igwa mugungwa nechemberi kwechikepe vachiita sokunge vari kudzikisa zvinorema zviya zvokumisisa nazvo chikepe," 
Acts27:31 Pauro akati kumutungamiri wezana nokumasoja, “Varume ava vakarega kuramba vari muchikepe hamumbopona.”" 
Acts27:32 Masoja akadimbura tambo dzegwa vakarirega richienda zvaro. 
Acts27:33 Mambakwedza, Pauro akavakurudzira vose kuti vadye achiti, “Nhasi izuva regumi nechina makabatira ura mumaoko musina chokudya pasina chamadya." 
Acts27:34 Nokudaro ndinokukumbirisai kuti mudye. Zvichakupai simba nokuti hapana noruvhudzi rwomusoro waani naani zvake wenyu ruchatsakatika.” 
Acts27:35 Paakanga ataura izvi akatora chingwa ndokutenda kuna Mwari pamberi pavo vose akachimedura akatangisa kudya. 
Acts27:36 Vakabva vakurudzirwa vose vakadya chokudya. 
Acts27:37 Takanga tiri mazana maviri anamakumi manomwe ana vanhu vatanhatu. 
Acts27:38 Pavakanga vaguta vakarerutsa chikepe nokutokanda koroni mugungwa. 
Acts27:39 Zvino kwakati kwaedza havana kugona kuziva kuti inyika ipi asi vakaona nzvimbo yaigona kumira chikepe yaiva nejecha pamahombekombe pavakafunga kundosvitsa chikepe kumahombekombe ikoko. 
Acts27:40 Naizvozvo vakadimbura zvinorema zvokumisa chikepe nazvo zviya, vakazvisiya mugungwa vachibva vasunungurawo tambo dzakanga dzakasunga zvokunangisa nazvo chikepe. Vakabva vasimudza machira echikepe epamberi akadziva kunobva mhepo. Vakabva vananga kunzvimbo yaigona kumira chikepe kuya." 
Acts27:41 Vakaroverera chikepe pachiturunhuru chejecha pasi pegungwa ndokubva chikepe chati pfe mujecha ndiye mbetete chisisakwanisi kuzunguzika. Besu rechikepe rikabva ratyorwa tyorwa namasaisai. 
Acts27:42 Pfungwa yamasoja yakanga yava yokuti vauraye vasungwa vose kuti varege kushambira vagotiza nokupunyuka. 
Acts27:43 Asi mutungamiri wezana, pamusana pokuda kuponesa Pauro, akarambidza kuita zvavainge vafunga. Akati avo vanokwanisa kushambira vatange ndivo kusvetukira panze vagoshambira vachienda kunyika." 
Acts27:44 Vamwe vose vozoendawo, vamwe vakabatirira pamapuranga kana pane zvimwe zvidimbu zvechikepe. Nenzira iyoyi vose vakasvika pamahombekombe zvakanaka." 
Acts28:1 Kuzoti tapona kudai takazoziva kuti chitsuwa ichocho chainzi Morota. 
Acts28:2 Vagari vomo vakatibata zvakanakisisa kwazvo. Vakativesera moto vakatigamuchira tose nokuti kwakanga kwatangisa kunaya uye kwaitonhora. 
Acts28:3 Pauro, paakanga aunganidza svinga rehuni akadziisa pamoto, pakabuda chiva pamusana pokupisa chikanamatira paruoko rwake." 
Acts28:4 Vagari vomo pavakaona chipuka ichi, chakarembera paruoko rwake vakataurirana vachiti, “Zvechokwadi munhu uyu imhondi chaiyo. Nyange zvake apunyuka mugungwa. Nyakururama waramba kuti ararame.”" 
Acts28:5 Asi iye akazunzira chipuka chiya mumoto. Haana kukuvara. 
Acts28:6 Vakamirira vachifunga kuti zvimwe achazvimba kana kungowira pasi achibva afa. Asi pavakamirira kwenguva yakareba pasina chakaipa chakaitika kwaari, vakasanduka vavakuti, “Ndimwari.”" 
Acts28:7 Padyo nenzvimbo iyoyo pakanga pane minda yomukuru mukuru wechitsuwa ichocho ainzi Pubhiriosi akatigamuchira akatichengeta zvakanaka kwamazuva matatu. 
Acts28:8 Zvakaitika kuti baba vaPubhiriosi vakanga varere vachirwara, vachipisa muviri uye namanyoka okuburitsa ropa. Pauro akavashanyira akanamata achiisa maoko ake pavari akavaporesa." 
Acts28:9 Izvi pazvakaitika vamwe vanhu vose vapachitsuwa icho vaiva nezvirwere vakauyawo vakaporeswa. 
Acts28:10 Vakatiremekedza nenzira dzakawanda uye patakanga tava kuda kutangisa kuenda nechikepe vakatiisira muchikepe zvinhu zvokutiraramisa nazvo. 
Acts28:11 Mushure memwedzi mitatu takatangisa kuenda nechikepe chakanga chapedzera nguva yechando chiri pachitsuwa ichocho. Chikepe ichocho chaiva chokuArekizandiria chaiva nechiga chinonzi Vamwarimapatya. 
Acts28:12 Takasvika paSirakosi tikagarapo mazuva matatu," 
Acts28:13 ndokutenderera tikazondosvika kuRegiumu. Mushure mezuva rimwechete kwakamuka mhepo yaibva kumaodzanyemba. Pazuva repiri racho takasvika kuPuteri. 
Acts28:14 Ikoko takawana vehama tikakokwa kuti tigare navo kwamazuva manomwe. Ndiwo masvikiro atakaita kuRoma. 
Acts28:15 Ikoko, vehama pavakanzwa nezvedu vakauya zvokutosvika kumusika weApia nokunzvimbo yainzi Hoteranhatu kuzotichingura. Pauro paakavaona akatenda Mwari akabva atsunga mwoyo." 
Acts28:16 Patakasvika kuguta reRoma, Pauro akabvumirwa kugara oga nomusoja aimuchengetedza." 
Acts28:17 Kuzoti kwapera mazuva matatu zvakaitika kuti Pauro akakoka vakuru vakuru vavaJudha. Pavakanga vaungana akati kwavari, “Varume hama, kunyange zvangu pasina chakaipa chandakaita kuvanhu kana kutsika dzamadzitateguru edu asi ndakasungwa kuJerusaremu ndikaiswa mumaoko avaRoma." 
Acts28:18 Pavakandiongorora vakada kundisunungura nokuti ndakanga ndisina mhosva inokodzera rufu. 
Acts28:19 VaJudha vakapokana nazvo zvikandimanikidza kukumbira kusvitsa nyaya iyi kuna Siza kunyange ndakanga ndisina mhosva yokukwirira rudzi rwangu. 
Acts28:20 Ndicho chikonzero chaita kuti ndikumbire kukuonai uye kuti nditaure nemi pamusana pokuti ndakasungwa necheni idzi nokuda kwechitarisiro cheIsiraeri.” 
Acts28:21 Vakati kwaari, “Hapana tsamba dzatakagamuchira dzichibva kuJudhea nezvako. Hapanawo mumwe wehama akauya kuno akatipirawo kana kutaura zvakaipa nezvako." 
Acts28:22 Asi isu tinoda kunzwa kwauri zvaunofunga nokuti zvekabato aka, tinoziva kuti kose kose vanhu vanotaura zvakaipa nezvako.”" 
Acts28:23 Vakaronga zuva rokusangana naye, vakazouya paaigara vakawanda kwazvo iye akavarondedzera nyaya iyoyi kubva mangwanani kusvikira mauro achipa uchapupu kuhumambo hwaMwari achiedza kuti vabvume nezvaJesu sokunyorwa kwazvakaitwa mumutemo waMosesi navaporofita." 
Acts28:24 Vamwe vakabvuma zvaaitaura vamwewo vakaramba kubvuma. 
Acts28:25 Naizvozvo vakapesana pachavo. Vakazobvapo Pauro ataura muromo mumwechete unoti: “Mweya Mutsvene akataura zvazviri chaizvo paakataura kumadzibaba enyu nomuromo Isaya muporofita 
Acts28:26 achiti, “ ‘Enda kuvanhu ava undoti kuteerera nyatsoteererai zvenyu asi kunzwisisa pasina zvamunonzwisisa kutarisisa nyatsotarisisai zvenyu asi kuona pasina kuona chaiko." 
Acts28:27 Nokuti mwoyo yavanhu ava indambakurairwa, nzeve dzavo kunzwa hadzichanzwi; maziso avo vakazarira kuti zvimwe vangadaro vakaona namaziso avo vachinzwa nenzeve dzavo uye vakanzwisisa nemwoyo yavo vakapindukira kwandiri ini ndikavaponesa.’" 
Acts28:28 “Naizvozvo chizvizivai kuti ruponeso urwu rwaMwari rwakatotumirwa kune vechirudzi. Vachateerera.” 
Acts28:29 *** 
Acts28:30 Pauro akagarako makore maviri ose achizvibhadharira. Ainyatsogamuchira vose vaiuya kwaari 
Acts28:31 achiparidza umambo hwaMwari achidzidzisa zvaTenzi Jesu Kristu zviri pachena asina anomudzivisa. 
Romans1:1 Ndini Pauro muranda waJesu Kristu ndakadaidzwa kuti ndive mupositori akatsaurirwa kuparidza Shoko Rakanaka raMwari. 
Romans1:2 Shoko Rakanaka iroro akanga atorivimbisa kare nokuvaporofita vake muMagwaro Matsvene. 
Romans1:3 Rinotaura nezvoMwanakomana wake wechizvarwa chaDhavhidhi panyama. 
Romans1:4 Pane zvokuera kwemweya wake, iye Jesu Kristu Tenzi wedu, akanzi Mwanakomana waMwari pasimba pamusana pokumuka kwaakaita kuvafi." 
Romans1:5 Nokwaari ndakagamuchira nyasha dzebasa rokutumwa somupositori kuti ndiunze vanhu vamarudzi ose mukuteerera kwechitendero muzita rake 
Romans1:6 pamwechete nemi makadaidzwa kuti muve vanhu vaJesu Kristu. 
Romans1:7 Ndinokukwazisai imi mose vadikanwi vaMwari vari muguta reRoma, vakadaidzwa kuti vave varurami. Mwari Baba vedu naTenzi Jesu Kristu ngavakuitirei nyasha nokukupai rugare." 
Romans1:8 Pokutanga ndinotenda Mwari wangu nokuna Jesu Kristu. Ndinoitira izvi imi mose pamusana pokuti chitendero chenyu chiri kutaurwa pasi pose. 
Romans1:9 Ndinodaro nokuti Mwari iye wandinoshandira nomwoyo wangu wose nokuparidza kwandinoita Shoko Rakanaka roMwanakomana wake, ndiye chapupu changu kuti ini ndinoramba ndichingokudomai muminamato yangu" 
Romans1:10 ndichikumbira kuti, zvimwe nokuda kwaMwari, pamwe iye zvino ndipo pandingakwanise kuuya kwamuri." 
Romans1:11 Ndinodisisa kwazvo kukuonai kuti ndikupei chipo chezvomweya kuti chikusimbisei 
Romans1:12 ndichiitira kuti tisimbaradzane nechitendero chomumwe nomumwe wedu, chenyu nechangu." 
Romans1:13 Hama dzangu ndingade kuti, munyatsoziva kuti kazhinji ndichida kuti ndiuye kwamuri, asi kusvika pari zvino, ndakatadziswa kuti ndiwane chandingakohwe pakati penyu uye napakati pavamwe vose vechirudzi." 
Romans1:14 Ndine zvandinosungirwa kuitira vose vechiGiriki navasiri vaGiriki nokunavakangwara nokuna vasina kungwara. 
Romans1:15 Saizvozvo ndinodisa kukuparidzaiwo Shoko Rakanaka imi muri muguta reRoma. 
Romans1:16 Ndinodaro nokuti handinyari neShoko Rakanaka nokuti iro isimba raMwari rokuponesa munhu wose ane chitendero zvichitangisira kuvaJudha kozouya vaGiriki 
Romans1:17 nokuti mariri, kururama kwaMwari kunoratidzwa pachena nechitendero chinobvira pokutanga kusvikira pokupedzisira sokunyorwa kwazvakaitwa zvichinzi, “Munhu anoruramiswa nechitendero achararama.”" 
Romans1:18 Hasha dzaMwari dzinoratidzwa pachena dzichibva kudenga dzakanangana nokusanamata Mwari kose nouipi hwavanhu vanombunyikidza chokwadi vachishandisa zvakaipa zvavo," 
Romans1:19 nokuti zvinogona kuzivikanwa nezvaMwari zviri pachena kwavari nokuti Mwari, akaratidza zvinhu izvozvo kwavari." 
Romans1:20 Kubvira pakusikwa kwakaitwa pasi uMwari hwake husingaonekwi zvichireva simba rake rokugara nokugara nouMwari hwake, zvakanyatsoratidzwa pachena muzvinhu zvakasikwa. Naizvozvo havana chikonzero chokuti vanzi havana mhosva." 
Romans1:21 Chiripo ndechokuti kunyange vaiziva zvavo Mwari havana kumurumbidza saMwari kana kumutenda asi kufunga kwavo hakuna zvakwakabatsira. Pfungwa dzavo dzisina maturo dzakadzimaidzwa. 
Romans1:22 Vaizviti vakachenjera asi vakava mapenzi. 
Romans1:23 Mbiri yaMwari asingafi vakaitsinhanisa nezvifananidzo zvakaita savanhu zvavo vanofa kana seshiri kana somhuka kana sezvinozvova napasi. 
Romans1:24 Naizvozvo Mwari akavarega kuti vaite madiro avo nehavi dzavo dzounzenza zvichivasvitsa mukuitirana zvinonyadzisa nemiviri yavo. 
Romans1:25 Nokuti vakatsinhanisa chokwadi chaMwari nenhema. Vakanamata vakashandira chisikwa panokunamata nokushandira musiki anofanira kurumbidzwa nokusingaperi Ameni. 
Romans1:26 Nokuda kwaizvozvi Mwari akavarega kuti vaite madiro avo votungamirirwa nehavi dzavo dzinonyadzisa. Vakadzi vavo vakasandura maitiro anofambirana nomusikirwo wavakaitwa savanhukadzi voita zvisingafambirani nomusikirwo wavo. 
Romans1:27 Ndozvimwechetezvo navarumewo vakarega kutevedza zviri mumasikirwo avo okuti vatorane nomunhukadzi votsva nehavi yokuchivana pachavo, munhurume achiita zvinonyadzisa nomumwe munhurume vachibva vogamuchira mubayiro unokodzera wokukanganisa kwavo ikoko." 
Romans1:28 Saizvozvo nokuti havana kuona chiri chinhu chinokodzera kuti vazive Mwari; Mwari akavaregawo vachiva nepfungwa yakaora nokusazvibata. 
Romans1:29 Vakazara nouipi hose hunoti umambara ruchiva noutsinye. Vazere nokusafarira zvakanaka zvavamwe noumhondi nounyengedzi, nouipi hwakakomba nokurevana" 
Romans1:30 namakuhwa, nokuva vanhu vanovenga Mwari navanozvikudza navanozvirova dundundu navanozvitutumadza navane rubatabata," 
Romans1:31 navasingateereri vabereki namapenzi avanhu, vanhu vasina chitendero, vasina mwoyo uye vasingakatari." 
Romans1:32 Kunyange zvazvo vachiziva chirevo chaMwari chinoti vanoita zvakadaro vanofanira kufa, havangoita izvozvo chete asi kuti vanotobvumirana navanoita izvozvo." 
Romans2:1 Naizvozvo iwe munhu hauna chingaite kuti unzi hauna mhosva kunyange uri ani zvako kana uchitongera mumwe mhosva asi iwe uchiita zvimwechetezvo. 
Romans2:2 Tinonyatsoziva kuti Mwari, kutongera mhosva kwaanoita vanhu vanoita zvakadai, kuri pamwero." 
Romans2:3 Nhaiwe, munhuwo zvako kudai, unofunga here kuti uchapunyuka kutongerwa mhosva naMwari kana iwe uchitongera vamwe mhosva vanoita zvakadaro asi iwe pachako uchizviitawo?" 
Romans2:4 Kana kuti wavakungoti Mwari zvaakazara nomwoyochena nokuregerera nomwoyo murefu, ndizvozvo? Hauzivi here kuti mwoyochena waMwari unenge uchiitirwa kuti iwe upinduke?" 
Romans2:5 Asi nokuomarara mwoyo kwako uye nokuva nomwoyo usingadi kupinduka uri kutozozvimutsira hasha pamusi wehasha pacharatidzwa kutonga kwaMwari kwakarurama 
Romans2:6 nokuti achapa, mumwe nomumwe maererano namabasa ake." 
Romans2:7 Achapa upenyu husingaperi kuna vanoita mwoyo murefu mukuita zvakanaka vachitsvaka mbiri norukudzo noupenyu husingaperi. 
Romans2:8 Asi kuna vavo vano mweya wokupanduka vasingateereri chokwadi vanotungamirirwa nouipi; chavo kutsamwirwa nokuitirwa zvehasha. 
Romans2:9 Munhu wose anoita zvakaipa achapinda munhamo namatambudziko, kutanga nomuJudha tevere muGiriki." 
Romans2:10 Asi munhu wose anoita zvakanaka achawana mbiri norukudzo norugare zvichitangirawo kumuJudha tevere muGiriki," 
Romans2:11 nokuti Mwari haana rusaruro. 
Romans2:12 Vose vakatadza vasina mutemo vachapararawo kunze kwomutemo. Uye vose vakatadzira Mwari vari pasi pomutemo vachatongwawo nomutemo. 
Romans2:13 Chiripo ndechokuti havasi vanhu vanongonzwa mutemo vakarurama pamberi paMwari asi vanoita zvinorehwa nomutemo ndivo vachanzi vakarurama. 
Romans2:14 Kana vechirudzi, vasiri pasi pomutemo, vachichengeta mutemo, kuri kuita zviri muropa ravo, vachitevedza zvinodiwa nomutemo, ndivo vava kutozvitungamirira somutemo kunyange zvazvo vasiri pasi pomutemo." 
Romans2:15 Vanoratidza kuti zvinodiwa nomutemo zvakanyorwa mumwoyo yavo. Hana dzavowo dzinovatsigira nokuvapupurira izvozvo. Pfungwa dzavo dzinenge dzichirwisana pachadzo pamwe dzichivapa mhosva pamwe dzichivareverera 
Romans2:16 pazuva iroro, Mwari paanenge otonga zvakavandika zvavanhu nokuna Kristu Jesu maererano neShoko rangu Rakanaka." 
Romans2:17 Zvino kana iwe uchizviti uri muJudha uchivimba nomutemo, uchizvikudza noukama hwako naMwari," 
Romans2:18 uchizivawo kuda kwake, uchikwanisa kusarudza chakanaka nokuti unenge wakadzidziswa zvomutemo," 
Romans2:19 uye kana iwe uine chokwadi chokuti unotungamirira mapofu, uri mwenje kuna vari murima;" 
Romans2:20 kana uchigona kudzora mapenzi uye uri murairidzi wavana uchiziva kuti mumutemo ndimo muno ruzivo rwose nechokwadi," 
Romans2:21 zvino iwe kana uri munhu anodzidzisa vamwe kudai haukwanisi here kuzvidzidzisa iwe pachako? Kana iwe uchidzidzisa vamwe kusaba ndiwe woba here? 
Romans2:22 Kana iwe uchiti munhu haafaniri kuita upombwe ndiwe woita upombwe here? Iwe unovenga zvifananidzo ndiwe wondopamba zviri mumaTemberi here? 
Romans2:23 Iwe unozvirova dundundu nezviri mumutemo ndiwe wondoshora Mwari nokutyora mutemo here? 
Romans2:24 Ndinodaro nokuti zvakanyorwa zvichinzi, “Zita raMwari rinoshorwa pakati pevechirudzi pamusana penyu.”" 
Romans2:25 Kudzingiswa kunebasa kana uchichengeta mutemo asi kana uchityora mutemo kudzingiswa kunobva kwava kusadzingiswa. 
Romans2:26 Naizvozvo kana munhu asina kudzingiswa akachengeta zvisungo zvomutemo kusadzingiswa kwake hakuzova kudzingiswa here? 
Romans2:27 Saizvozvo avo vasina kudzingiswa panyama asi vachichengeta mutemo vachakupai mhosva imi mune bumbiro romutemo rakanyorwa uye kudzingiswa asi imi muchityora mutemo. 
Romans2:28 MuJudha chaiye haasi muJudha wapamuromo, ndozvimwechetezvo nokudzingiswa kwechokwadi, hakusi kokuooneka kunze kana panyama." 
Romans2:29 MuJudha chaiye muJudha ari muJudha mukati; saizvozvowo kudzingiswa kwechokwadi chinhu chomumwoyo chezvomweya kwete chokutevedza zvakanyorwa chete. Kurumbidzwa kwake kunobva kuna Mwari kwete kuvanhu. 
Romans3:1 Ko muJudha chaanokunda vamwe nacho chii? Ko kudzingiswa kunobatsirei? 
Romans3:2 Zvakatowanda uye nenzira dzakasiyana — siyana. Pokutanga, vaJudha vakachengeteswa zvirevo zvaMwari." 
Romans3:3 Ko ngatitii vamwe vavo vakanga vasina kutendeka? Kusatendeka kwavo kunoshaisha basa kutendeka kwaMwari here? 
Romans3:4 Kwete, hazvidaro, Mwari anofanira kuva pachokwadi kunyange vanhu vose vakave venhema, sokunyorwa kwazvakaitwa zvichinzi, “Kana motaura, zvinobuda pachena kuti ndicho chokwadi kana mukapinzwa dare munobuda musina mhosva.”" 
Romans3:5 Ko zvino kana uipi huchiratidza ururami hwaMwari, zvino toti kudini? Tingati Mwari akaipa here kana otiranga (ndiri kutaura somunhu?)" 
Romans3:6 Kwete, handizvo, nokuti pakadaro Mwari aizotonga pasi sei?" 
Romans3:7 Ko zvino kana nhema dzangu dzichiita kuti chokwadi chaMwari chinyatsobuda pachena, zvichiita kuti Mwari arumbidzwe, chandinopirwa mhosva yokuti ndiri mutadzi chii?" 
Romans3:8 Vanoti tinoti, “Kana zvakadaro ndingaregerei kuita zvakaipa kuti zvakanaka zvibude mazviri,” sokurasa muromo kunoita vamwe vanhu vachitishora. Kupa vanhu vakadai mhosva kwakarurama." 
Romans3:9 Ko zvino isu vaJudha tiri nani here ipapa? Kwete, napaduku pose. Inga wani tamboti vanhu vose, vaJudha navaGiriki, vari pasi pesimba rechitadzo." 
Romans3:10 Sokunyorwa kwazvakaitwa zvichinzi: “Hakuna akarurama kana mumwechete zvake. 
Romans3:11 Hakuna anonzwisisa hakuna anotsvaka Mwari. 
Romans3:12 Vose vakatsauka, vose zvavo pamwechete vakashata. Hapana anoita zvakanaka kana nomumwechete zvake." 
Romans3:13 Gurokuro ravo iguva rakashama, vanoshandisa rurimi rwavo kunyengedza. Mukanwa mavo mune uturu hwenyoka." 
Romans3:14 Miromo yavo izere nokutuka nokuvava. 
Romans3:15 Tsoka dzavo dzinomhanyirira kudeura ropa. 
Romans3:16 Mavanopfuura namo munosara ava matongo nejemedzanwa. 
Romans3:17 Mugariro worugare havauzivi. 
Romans3:18 Mwari havambomuona kuti chii.” 
Romans3:19 Zvino tinoziva kuti chose chinotaurwa nomutemo chinonanga avo vari pasi pomutemo iwoyo kuti pasave naanombopati bufu kuti pasi pabvume muteto pana Mwari 
Romans3:20 nokuti hapana munhu anoruramiswa pamberi pake nezvisungo zvomutemo pamusana pokuti mutemo, chawo kuzivisa vanhu zvechitadzo." 
Romans3:21 Zvino kururama kwaMwari kwakaratidzwa pachena zvisinei nomutemo kunyange zvazvo mutemo navaporofita zvichiupupurira. 
Romans3:22 Kururama ikoko kwaMwari kunoitika nechitendero muna Jesu Kristu kuna vose vanotenda pasina zvorusaruro 
Romans3:23 nokuti munhu wose akatadza akakundika kusvika panodiwa naMwari kuti aponeswe. 
Romans3:24 Vanoruramiswa nenyasha dzake sechipo nokununura kunowanikwa muna Kristu Jesu. 
Romans3:25 Mwari akaronga kuti neropa rake ave ndiye wokuripira naye zvitadzo zvichiitika pamusana pechitendero. Izvi zvakaitirwa kuti kururama kwaMwari kuratidzwe pachena nokuti pamusana pemwoyo murefu wake zvitadzo zvakare akazviti zvingopfuura zvazvo 
Romans3:26 kuti aratidze iye zvino kuti iye akarurama uye kuti anoruramisa munhu anotenda muna Jesu. 
Romans3:27 Pakadaro kuzvikudza kwedu kunozova papi? Kunobva kwashaya maturo. Kunoshaiswa maturo nei? Nezvisungo namabasa here? Kwete asi pamusana pechitendero. 
Romans3:28 Chikonzero chacho ndechokuti tinoti munhu anoruramiswa nechitendero zvisinei nezvisungo zvinobva mumutemo. 
Romans3:29 Kana kuti tingati Mwari ndiMwari wavaJudha voga here? Haasi Mwariwo wevechirudzi here? Hongu ndiMwariwo wevechirudzi," 
Romans3:30 Mwari zvaari mumwechete; uye anoruramisa nechitendero chavo vakadzingiswa, anoruramisawo nechitendero chavo, avo vasina kudzingiswa." 
Romans3:31 Zvinoreva here kuti naizvozvo tava kuparadza mutemo nokuda kwechitendero. Hazvidaro kwete, asi kuti tiri kutosimudzira mutemo." 
Romans4:1 Ko zvino tichati kudiiko nezvaAbhurahamu tateguru vedu paukama hweropa. 
Romans4:2 Dai kuri kuti Abhurahamu akaruramiswa namabasa, angadai aine chokuzvirumbidza nacho, asi kwete pamberi paMwari." 
Romans4:3 Ko Magwaro Matsvene anotii, “Anoti: Abhurahamu akatenda muna Mwari zvikaita kuti anzi akarurama.”" 
Romans4:4 Zvino kumunhu anoshanda mubayiro wake haunganzi chipo asi chinhu chaanofanira kupihwa. 
Romans4:5 Asi kumunhu asina mabasa asi achivimba nouyo anoruramisa vasiri vanamati vaMwari, chitendero chake chinoita kuti anzi akarurama." 
Romans4:6 Saizvozvo Dhavhidhi anoti akakomborerwa zvake munhu anonzi naMwari akarurama iye asina mabasa aakaita achiti," 
Romans4:7 “Vakakomborerwa zvavo vakaregererwa kukanganisa kwavo, vane zvitadzo zvavo zvakafushirwa." 
Romans4:8 Akakomborerwa munhu asinganzi naTenzi ane chitadzo.” 
Romans4:9 Chikomborero ichi chinonzi ndechavakadzingiswa chete here kana kuti ndechavasina kudzingiswawo? Tamboti chitendero chaAbhurahamu chakaita kuti anzi akarurama. 
Romans4:10 Zvino zvakaitika sei kuti anzi akarurama? Akanzi akarurama asati adzingiswa here kana kuti mushure mokunge adzingiswa. Hazvina kuitika mushure mokudzingiswa asi asati adzingiswa. 
Romans4:11 Akadzingiswa somucherechedzo unosimbisisa kuti mururami. Ururami ihwohwo akahuwana nechitendero asati adzingiswa. Chinangwa chaiva chokumuita baba wavose vanotenda vasina kudzingiswa vakanziwo vakarurama nenzira iyoyo. 
Romans4:12 Nenzira imwecheteyo akave baba wavakadzingiswa vasina kungodzingiswa chete asi vanotevedzerawo muenzaniso wechitendero chaiva nababa vedu Abhurahamu asati adzingiswa. 
Romans4:13 Abhurahamu nezvizvarwa zvake haana kutsidzirwa kuti pasi pose pachava nhaka yake pachingoteverwa zviri pamutemo zvoga asi pamusana pokururama kunobva muchitendero. 
Romans4:14 Asi dai kuri kuti ndavavo vanotevedza zviri pamutemo vaizogara nhaka iyoyo, pakadaro chitendero hachina maturo uye chitsidzo chinobva chashaya basa" 
Romans4:15 nokuti mutemo unounza chirango asi pasina mutemo hapana kudarika mutemo. 
Romans4:16 Saizvozvo chitsidzo ichocho chakaitwa pamusana pechitendero kuitira kuti chive chenyasha uye kuti zvibva zvanyatsosimbisiswa kuti zvizvarwa zvavo zvose zvichachiwana kwete kuna vanochengeta mutemo voga asi kuti kuna avowo vane chitendero chimwechetecho naAbhurahamu, nokuti iye ndibaba vedu tose" 
Romans4:17 sokunyorwa kwazvakaitwa zvichinzi, “Ndakakuita baba wamarudzi mazhinji.” Abhurahamu akava nechitendero pamberi paMwari anomutsa vakafa uye anosika zvinhu zvisati zvambovapo." 
Romans4:18 Akatenda pazvainge zvisingabviri kutarisira kuti achava baba vamarudzi mazhinji sokutaurirwa kwavakanga vaitwa zvichinzi, “Ndiko kuwanda kuchaita zvizvarwa zvako ikoko.”" 
Romans4:19 Chitendero chavo hachina kudzokera shure vachiona muviri wavo wakanga wapera basa sewakafa nokuti vakanga vava namakore anenge zana uye vachifunga kushaya mbereko kwaSara. 
Romans4:20 Hapana kusavimba naMwari kwakamboita kuti vakahadzike nezvechitsidzo chaMwari asi vakasimbiswa muchitendero chavo, vakapa mbiri kuna Mwari." 
Romans4:21 Vainyatsoziva kuti Mwari anogona kuita zvaakatsidza. 
Romans4:22 Ndiko kusaka chitendero chavo chakaita kuti vanzi vakarurama. 
Romans4:23 Asi mazwi aya anoti, “Chakaita kuti vanzi” haana kunyorerwa kuti areve ivo voga" 
Romans4:24 asi kuti areve isuwo. Nesuwo tichanzi takarurama, isu tinotenda maari iye akamutsa Jesu Tenzi wedu kuvakafa, iye akaurairwa" 
Romans4:25 zvikanganiso zvedu akamutsirwa kuti tinzi takarurama. 
Romans5:1 Naizvozvo zvatakaruramiswa nechitendero tine rugare naMwari nokuna Tenzi wedu Jesu Kristu akaita kuti 
Romans5:2 nokwaari tiitirwe nyasha sezvatiri. Tinofara nechitarisiro chembiri yaMwari. 
Romans5:3 Kwete izvozvo zvoga asi kuti tinotofara mumatambudziko edu nokuti tinoziva kuti kutambudzika kunopa munhu kutirira 
Romans5:4 kutirira kunopa munhu chimiro, chimiro chinopa munhu chitarisiro." 
Romans5:5 Chitarisiro hachitinyengedzi nokuti rudo rwaMwari rwakadururwa mumwoyo yedu naMweya Mutsvene watakapiwa. 
Romans5:6 Kristu akatifira panguva kwayo tisina simba isu; ipapo tisiri vanamati vaMwari. 
Romans5:7 Munhu haadi kufira kunyange munhu akarurama. Pamwe munhu angafire zvake munhu akarurama. 
Romans5:8 Asi Mwari akaratidza kuti anotida nokuti Kristu akatifira tichiri vatadzi. 
Romans5:9 Zvino zvatakaruramiswa neropa rake tichanunurwa zvikuru sei kuchirango chaMwari. 
Romans5:10 Saizvozvowo kana taive mhandu, takawadzana naMwari pamusana porufu rwaMwanakomana wake, tichaponeswa zvikuru sei noupenyu hwake zvino patakawadzana naye kudai." 
Romans5:11 Handizvo chete asi kuti tinotopembera kufara naMwari nokuna Tenzi wedu Jesu Kristu akatiwanisa zvino kuwadzana kwedu. 
Romans5:12 Saizvozvo sokuuya kwakaita chitadzo pasi pose nokumunhu mumwechete; rufuwo rukauya nokuchitadzo, saizvozvowo rufu rwakapararira kuvanhu vose nokuti vanhu vose vakatadza." 
Romans5:13 Chitadzo chakanga chatova panyika Mutemo usati wapiwa. Hapana chitadzo kana pasina mutemo. 
Romans5:14 Asi rufu rwaitonga kubvira kuna Adhamu kusvika kuna Mosesi, ruchitonga kunyange vane zvitadzo zvisina kuenzana kukura nezvaAdhamu aiva mumvuri wouyo aizouya." 
Romans5:15 Chipo chenyasha hachina pachingamboenzaniswa napo kukura nechitadzo chiya, nokuti kana vanhu vazhinji vakafa pamusana pechitadzo chomunhu mumwechete, ko kutozoti nyasha dzaMwari nechipo chinopiwa pachena, pamusana penyasha dzomunhu mumwechete uya, Jesu Kristu, chinofashurirwa zvakadii kuvanhu vakawanda." 
Romans5:16 Zvinoitwa nechipo chinopiwa pachena hazvina kufanana nechitadzo chomunhu mumwechete uya. Ndinodaro nokuti mushure mechitadzo ichi chimwechete pakabva patemwa kuti pane mhosva asi mushure mezvitadzo zvizhinji pamusana pechipo chimwechete chinopiwa pachena pakatemwa kuti hapana mhosva. 
Romans5:17 Kana pamusana pechitadzo chomunhu mumwechete rufu rwakatonga nomumunhu mumwechete iyeyo, zvino vachatonga noupenyu zvakanyanya sei nomumunhu mumwechete Jesu Kristu avo vanogamuchira nyasha dzakawanda nechipo chinongopiwa pachena choururami." 
Romans5:18 Saizvozvo pamusana pokuti chitadzo chomunhu mumwechete chakaita kuti vanhu vose vanzi vane mhosva nezvowo chiito chakanaka chomunhu mumwechete chinoitawo kuti panzi hapana mhosva uye chichipa upenyu kuvanhu vose; 
Romans5:19 nokuti nokusateerera kwomunhu mumwechete, vanhu vazhinji vakava vatadzi, nokudaro nokuteererawo kwomunhu mumwechete vanhu vazhinji vacharuramiswa." 
Romans5:20 Mutemo wakapindira kuzowanziridza kutadza asi nokuwanda kwakaita zvitadzo nyashawo dzakabva dzawanda zvikuru kwazvo. 
Romans5:21 Izvi zvakaita kuti sokutonga kunoita chitadzo norufu nyashawo dzitonge nokururama kusvikira kuupenyu husingaperi nokuna Jesu Kristu Tenzi wedu. 
Romans6:1 Zvino totiiko? Toramba tiri muchitadzo here kuti nyasha dzifashukire? 
Romans6:2 Kwete, handizvo. Zvingaitike sei kuti, isu kuchitadzo, tiri vanhu vakafa, tirambe tichirarama machiri." 
Romans6:3 Hamuzivi here kuti isu tose takaombekwa muna Kristu Jesu. Takaombekwa murufu rwake. 
Romans6:4 Naizvozvo takavigwa pamwechete naye nokuombekwa murufu rwake kuti sokumutswa kwakaitwa Kristu kuvafi nembiri yaBaba isuwo tifambe muupenyu hutsva. 
Romans6:5 Kana takabatana naye murufu rwaakaita serwake tichabatanawo naye mukumuka kwaakaita. 
Romans6:6 Tinoziva kuti humunhu hwedu hwakare hwakarovererwa pamuchinjikwa pamwechete naye kuti muviri wezvitadzo uparadzwe uye kuitirawo kuti tirege kuva varanda vechitadzo 
Romans6:7 nokuti munhu anenge afa atosunungurwa kuchitadzo. 
Romans6:8 Asi kana takafa pamwe naKristu kudai tinodavira kuti tichararamawo pamwechete naye. 
Romans6:9 Tinoziva kuti Kristu zvaakamutswa kuvakafa haachazofazve. Rufu haruchamutongazve. 
Romans6:10 Nokufa kwaakaita, kuchitadzo, akava munhu akafa chakamwe asi upenyu hwake iye zvino anoraramira Mwari." 
Romans6:11 Naizvozvo imiwo munofanira kuzviona kuti, kuchitadzo muri vanhu vakafa; asi Mwari ari iye upenyu hwenyu muna Kristu Jesu." 
Romans6:12 Naizvozvo chitadzo ngachirege kukutongai mumiviri yenyu inofa chichiita kuti muteerere havi dzawo. 
Romans6:13 Musape nhengo dzenyu kuti dzishandiswe kutadza semidziyo yokuita nayo zvakaipa asi zvipei kuna Mwari savanhu vakabviswa murufu vachiendeswa kuupenyu mupe nhengo dzenyu kuna Mwari semidziyo yokushandisa mune zvakarurama. 
Romans6:14 Chitadzo hachizokutongai nokuti hamusi pasi pomutemo asi muri pasi penyasha. 
Romans6:15 Ko zvino topara zvitadzo pamusana pokuti hatisi pasi pomutemo asi pasi penyasha here? Handizvo. 
Romans6:16 Hamuzivi here kuti mukazviisa mumaoko omumwe munhu savaranda vanomuteerera, matova varanda vomunhu iyeyo wamunoteerera? Chingave chitadzo chamunoteerera chinosvitsa kurufu kana kuteerera kunotsvitsa mukururama." 
Romans6:17 Asi tinotenda Mwari kuti, imi makambenge muri varanda vechitadzo, mava kuteerera nemwoyo wose chidzidziso chiri pamwero chamakazvipira kwachiri." 
Romans6:18 Madaro kuzvisunungura kuchitadzo, makave varanda voururami." 
Romans6:19 Tava kutaura zvedu savanhu, sezvinhu zvinongowanikawo muvanhu, pamusana poutera. Sezvamakambopa nhengo dzenyu kune zvetsvina uye nokuhuipi hwakaipisisa, saizvozvowo chipai nhengo dzenyu kune zvakarurama kuti muitwe vatsvene." 
Romans6:20 Pamaiva varanda vechitadzo makanga makasununguka kuita zvakarurama noururami. 
Romans6:21 Asi chii chamakawana muzvinhu izvozvo zvamavakutonyara nazvo. Mugumo wazvo rufu. 
Romans6:22 Zvino zvamakasunungurwa muchitadzo mukava varanda vaMwari, mubayiro wamunowana kuitwa vatsvene. Uye mugumo wazvo upenyu usingaperi" 
Romans6:23 nokuti mubayiro wechitadzo rufu. Asi chipo chaMwari chaanopa pachena upenyu husingaperi muna Jesu Kristu Tenzi wedu. 
Romans7:1 Hamuzivi here hama dzangu, apa ndiri kutaura kuna vavo vanoziva mutemo, kuti mutemo unosunga munhu chete panguva youpenyu hwake?" 
Romans7:2 Saizvozvo mukadzi akaroorwa unosungwa nomutemo wokuva akabatana nomurume wake panenge murume wake achiri mupenyu. Asi murume wake akafa atosunungurwa pamutemo kune zvomurume wake. 
Romans7:3 Saizvozvo anonzi chifeve chomukadzi kana akagara nomumwe murume, murume wake achiri mupenyu. Asi murume wake akafa asunungurwa pamutemo iwoyo. Kana akaroorwa nomumwe murume haachisiri chifeve." 
Romans7:4 Saizvozvowo, hama dzangu, imi pamusana pokuva vamwe nomuviri waJesu, kumutemo muri vanhu vakafa, kuti muve womumwe, iye akamutswa kuvakafa kuti tiberekere Mwari muchero." 
Romans7:5 Chinondidariso ndechokuti paya pataigara upenyu hwenyama, havi dzedu dzoutadzi dzaishanda munhengo dzedu dzichimutswa nomutemo kuti tiberekere rufu muchero." 
Romans7:6 Asi iye zvino takasunungurwa kumutemo. Kune chinhu chiya chakanga chakatibata uranda, tave vanhu vakafa, zvokuti hatichashanda tiri pasi pomutemo wakare wakanyorwa asi muupenyu hutsva hwaMweya." 
Romans7:7 Zvino toti kudiiko? Toti here mutemo chitadzo? Kwete. Asiwo dai pasina mutemo, ndingadai ndisina kumboziva chinonzi chitadzo. Ndingadai ndisina kumboziva chinonzi kuchiva dai kuri kuti mutemo hauna kuti, “Usachive.”" 
Romans7:8 Asi chitadzo chakawana mukana mumutemo wokumutsa nawo mandiri nzira dzose dzokuchiva nadzo. Pasina mutemo, chitadzo chakafa." 
Romans7:9 Ndakambenge ndiri mupenyu mutemo usati wavapo. Asi pakazouya mutemo, chitadzo chakabva chamuka, ini ndikabva ndafa." 
Romans7:10 Iwo mutemo chaiwo wakatsidzira upenyu ndiwo wakatova rufu kwandiri," 
Romans7:11 nokuti chitadzo pachakawana mukana nomumutemo chakandinyengedza chikandiuraya nawo. 
Romans7:12 Nezvo mutemo pachawo mutsvene, murawo pachawo mutsvene uye wakarurama uye wakanaka." 
Romans7:13 Ko zvino tingati icho chinhu chakanaka kudai chakaunza rufu kwandiri here? Handizvo kwete, asi kuti chitadzo ndicho chaikonzera rufu mandiri nomune chinhu chakanaka, kuti chitadzo chionekwe zvachiri kuti chitadzo. Uye chashandisa mutemo kudaro chichibva chanyatsobuda pachena kuti chakaipisisa." 
Romans7:14 Tinozviziva kuti mutemo ndewezvemweya asi ini ndiri munhu wenyama. Ndakatengeswa kukamwoyo kokuda kutadza. 
Romans7:15 Handinzwisisi zvandinoita. Ndinodaro nokuti handiiti zvandinoda kuita. Asi ndinoita izvo zvandisingadi kuita. 
Romans7:16 Zvino kana ndichiita zvandisingadi kuita, zvinoreva kuti ndinobvuma kuti mutemo wakanaka." 
Romans7:17 Naizvozvo handisirini ndinozviita asi kamwoyo kokuda kutadza kanogara mandiri. 
Romans7:18 Chandinoziva apa ndechokuti hapana chakanaka chinogara mandiri. Ndiri kureva mumuviri wangu nokuti ndingade zvangu kuita zvakarurama asi handikwanisi kuzviita 
Romans7:19 nokuti zvakanaka zvandinoda kuita handizviiti asi zvakaipa zvandisingadi kuita ndizvo zvandinoita. 
Romans7:20 Zvino kana ndichiita zvandisingadi kuita, handisirini ndiri kuzviita asi kamwoyo kokuda kutadza kanogara mandiri kaya." 
Romans7:21 Saka ndavakutozviona somutemo kuti kana ndichida kuita zvakanaka, chakaipa chinenge chiri pedyo pedyo." 
Romans7:22 Zviripo ndezvokuti, ini mukatikati mangu chaimo, ndinofarira mutemo waMwari." 
Romans7:23 Asi ndinoona kuti mumitezo yangu mune mumwewo mutemo unorwisana nomutemo uri mupfungwa dzangu uchindiita muranda womutemo wakamwoyo kaya kokuda kutadza kanogara mumitezo yangu. 
Romans7:24 Zvino ini, panguwo pano, ndiani achandinunura kumuviri wangu uyu worufu." 
Romans7:25 Ndinotenda Mwari kuti ndinonunurwa nokuna Jesu Kristu Tenzi wedu. Saka zviripo ndezvokuti ini pachangu ndinochengeta mutemo waMwari nepfungwa dzangu asi nenyama yangu ndinotevera mutemo wechitadzo. 
Romans8:1 Nokudaro hapachisina anopiwa mhosva kuna vari muna Kristu Jesu," 
Romans8:2 nokuti muna Kristu Jesu mutemo waMweya woupenyu wakandisunungura kumutemo wechitadzo noworufu. 
Romans8:3 Mwari, nokutumira kwaakaita mwana wake pachake akafanana navanhu venyama uye sechibayiro chezvitadzo, akaita zvisina kukwanisika kuitwa nomutemo pamusana poutera hwavanhu, zvokuti akatongera chitadzo chiri muvanhu mhosva yokuparadzwa." 
Romans8:4 Izvi zvakaitirwa kuti zviri pamwero zvinodiwa nomutemo zvizadzikiswe matiri isu tisingagari upenyu hwenyama asi upenyu hwomweya 
Romans8:5 nokuti vanogara upenyu hwenyama pfungwa dzavo dziri pazvinhu zvenyama asi vanogara upenyu hwomweya pfungwa dzavo dziri pazvinhu zvomweya. 
Romans8:6 Kutorwa mwoyo nezvinhu zvenyama rufu. Asi kuisa mwoyo wako kune zvomweya upenyu norugare 
Romans8:7 nokuti mwoyo wakapindwa nezvenyama unovengana naMwari, hauzviisi pasi pomutemo waMwari. Izvo zviri izvowo, haungakwanisi kuita saizvozvo." 
Romans8:8 Avo vanoda kuzvifadza nyama dzavo havagoni kufadza Mwari. 
Romans8:9 Asi imi hamusipo kuzvifadza nyama yenyu. Imi muina Mweya Mutsvene, kana Mweya waMwari ari mamuri zvechokwadi. Ani nani asina Mweya waKristu, haasi wake." 
Romans8:10 Asi kana Kristu ari mamuri, kunyange miviri yenyu yakafa nokuda kwechitadzo, mweya yenyu mipenyu pamusana poururami." 
Romans8:11 Kana Mweya waiye akamutsa Jesu muvafi achigara mamuri, iye akamutsa Kristu Jesu kuvakafa achapa upenyu kumiviri yenyu inofa nokuna iyewo Mweya anogara mamuri." 
Romans8:12 Saizvozvo, hama, dzangu hatina chikwereti kunyama kuti tigare upenyu hwenyama" 
Romans8:13 nokuti ukagara upenyu hwenyama, uchafa asi kana ukauraya, naMweya, zviito zvomuviri uchararama." 
Romans8:14 Vose vanotungamirirwa naMweya waMwari vana vaMwari 
Romans8:15 nokuti hamuna kugamuchira mweya wouranda kuti mupindezve mukutya asi makagamuchira Mweya wokuti muve vana. Ndiye anotigonesa kudaidza tichiti, “Abha, Baba.”" 
Romans8:16 Iye Mweya pachake anopupurirana nemweya wedu kuti tiri vana vaMwari. 
Romans8:17 Zvino kana tiri vana, tiri vagari venhaka. Tiri vagari venhaka yaMwari uye vagari venhaka pamwe naKristu. Ndokunge tambotambudzikawo pamwechete naye kuti tigozorumbidzwa pamwe naye." 
Romans8:18 Ndinofunga kuti matambudziko enguva ino haangamboenzaniswa nembiri yaticharatidzwa. 
Romans8:19 Zvisikwa zvose zviri kumirira zvichisuwira kwazvo kuratidzwa kwavana vaMwari," 
Romans8:20 nokuti zvisikwa zvakaitwa zvinhu pasina kwete nokuda kwazvo asi nokuda kwaiye akazviita kuti zvidaro asi chitarisiro chiripo. 
Romans8:21 Chikonzero ndechokuti zvisikwa pachazvo zvichasunungurwa muuranda hwokuora zvichiwana rusununguko rune mbiri rwavana vaMwari. 
Romans8:22 Tinoziva kuti zvisikwa zvose zvanga zvichigomera pamwechete mukurwadziwa kusvikira iye zvino. 
Romans8:23 Hazvisi zvisikwa zvoga asi kana iyesuwo tine zvipo zvokutanga zvaMweya, tinogomera mukati medu, tichimirira kuti titorwe savana kuri iko kununurwa kwemiviri yedu." 
Romans8:24 Nokuti takaponeswa nechitarisiro ichocho. Chinhu chaunotarisira kana chichionekwa zvokutarisira hapana nokuti ndiani angatarisire chinhu chaarikuona. 
Romans8:25 Asi kana tichitarisira chatisiri kuona tinochimirira nomwoyo murefu. 
Romans8:26 Ndizvozvowo naMweya, anotibatsira muutera hwedu nokuti hatizivi kuti tinofanira kunamata sei. Asi Mweya pachake anotinamatira achitura femo rakadzama zvisingatauriki." 
Romans8:27 Iye Mwari anoongorora hana dzavanhu anoziva zviri mupfungwa dzaMweya nokuti iye Mweya anonamatira vakarurama maererano nezvinoda Mwari. 
Romans8:28 Tinozivawo kuti muna zvose, Mwari anoshanda kuti zvinakire vanhu vanomuda, vaya vakadaidzwa maererano nezviri pamwoyo pake" 
Romans8:29 nokuti avo vaakafanoziva akafanovarongera kuti vatodzane nechimiro choMwanakomana wake, kuti Mwanakomana iyeyo ave dangwe rehama dzake zhinji." 
Romans8:30 Avo vaakafanoziva akavadaidzawo. Vaakadaidza ivavo akavaruramisa. Navavo vaakaruramisa akavapa mbiri. 
Romans8:31 Ko zvino totiiko nezvakadai izvi. Ko Mwari zvaari kudivi kwedu, ndiani angatirwise" 
Romans8:32 iye asina kuramba noMwanakomana wake waakatopirira isu tose. Haazotipawo here zvinhu zvose pamwechete naye. 
Romans8:33 Zvino ndiani angape mhosva vasarudzwi vaMwari, Mwari zvaari iye anoruramisa." 
Romans8:34 Ndiani angatipe mhosva? NdiJesu Kristu here iye akafa akamutswa muvafi ari kurudyi rwaMwari, iye anototireverera?" 
Romans8:35 Ndiani angatiparadzanise norudo rwaKristu? Kutambudzika here kana kuti nhamo, kana kushushwa here kana nzara kana kushaya zvokupfeka here kana pfumvu kana hondo yebakatwa here:" 
Romans8:36 sokunyorwa kwazvakaitwa, “Tiri kuurairwemi zuva rose, tinoonekwa sehwai dzokubaya?”" 
Romans8:37 Aiwa muna zvose izvi tiri vakundi vokutopfuuridza nokuna iye akatida 
Romans8:38 nokuti ndine chokwadi chokuti hapana rufu kana upenyu kana vatumwa kana vano ukuru ukuru kana zvinhu zviripo iye zvino kana zvichauya kana masimba," 
Romans8:39 kana urefu kana kukwira mudenga kana udziki pasi kana chimwe zvacho muzvisikwa zvose chinogona kutiparadzanisa norudo rwaMwari rwuri muna Kristu Jesu Tenzi wedu. 
Romans9:1 Ndinotaura chokwadi muna Kristu, handirevi nhema uye hana yangu iina Mweya Mutsvene inondipupurira" 
Romans9:2 kuti ndinosuruvara uye ndinoramba ndichishushikana mumwoyo zvikuru. 
Romans9:3 Ndingatoda zvangu kuti iyeni pachangu ndipinde rushambwa uye kuti ndichekaniswe zvangu ukama naKristu pamusana pehama dzangu voukama nemi parudzi. 
Romans9:4 Ivava vaIsiraeri uye ndivo vana vane mbiri, vakaitwa navo zvitenderano vakapiwa mutemo, vanamati vane zvavakapikirwa." 
Romans9:5 Ndivo vechizvarwa chamadzitateguru aya parudzi rwavo uye pamazvarirwo anoitwa vanhu, ndikowo kwakabva Kristu. Iye Mwari anotonga vose ngaarumbidzwe nokusingaperi." 
Romans9:6 Hakusi kuti izwi raMwari rakakundikana nokuti havasi vose vechizvarwa chaIsiraeri vari vaIsiraeri. 
Romans9:7 Havasi vose vechizvarwa chaAbhurahamu vari vana vaAbhurahamu asi kuti zvinonzi, “Zvizvarwa zvako zvichadaidzwa nomuzita raIsaki.”" 
Romans9:8 Zvichireva kuti vana vaMwari havasiri avo vechizvarwa chenyama asi kuti vana vechitsidzo ndivo vanonzi vana vake chaivo. 
Romans9:9 Chitsidzo chacho chaiti: “Ndichadzoka nguva yakaita seino iyi, ipapo Sara achava nomwana mukomana.”" 
Romans9:10 Hazvisizvo zvoga asi kutiwo Rabheka paakabata pamuviri pamapatya nomurume mumwechete tateguru wedu Isaki; 
Romans9:11 kunyange paakanga asati aberekwa asati amboita chakanaka kana chakaipa uye kuri kuti kusarudza kwaidiwa naMwari kuenderere mberi, kwete pamusana pamabasa asi pamusana pokudaidza kwake akataurirwa kuti," 
Romans9:12 “Mukoma achashandira munun'una.” 
Romans9:13 Ndiko kunyorwa kwazvakaitwa zvichinzi, “Jakobho ndiye waiva wapamwoyo pangu asi Esau akanga asiri wapamwoyo pangu.”" 
Romans9:14 Zvino totiiko, zvinoreva kuti Mwari ano rusaruro here? Kwete handizvo" 
Romans9:15 nokuti anoti kuna Mosesi, “Ndichaitira tsitsi wandinenge ndada kuitira tsitsi nokunzwira urombo wandinenge ndada kunzwira urombo.”" 
Romans9:16 Saizvozvo hazvinei nezvinodiwa nomunhu kana zvinoedzwa kuitwa nomunhu asi chinebasa itsitsi dzaMwari. 
Romans9:17 Magwaro Matsvene anoti kuna Faro, “Chandakakuitira mambo ndechokuti ndiratidze simba rangu nemauri, kuti zita rangu riparidzwe pasi pose.”" 
Romans9:18 Naizvozvo anoitira tsitsi kune wose waanenge ada achiita kuti waanenge ada zvake amuaomese mwoyo. 
Romans9:19 Saka muchanditi, ko zvino anozopirei munhu mhosva nokuti ndiani angapikisane nezvaanoda." 
Romans9:20 Asi iwe uri aniwo zvako munhuwo zvako kupindura Mwari. Chiumbwa chingati here kumuumbi wacho: “Wakandiumbirei zvakadai.” 
Romans9:21 Muumbi haana mvumo here yokuita zvaanoda nomunyakwe achiita nechidimbu chawo chimwechetecho mudziyo wokushongedza nawo nomumwe wokushandisawo zvawo. 
Romans9:22 Ndizvozvowo zvina Mwari, ko dai kuri kuti anoda zvake kuratidza hasha dzake nokuranga achiratidza simba rake iye achizvidzora zvake achiitira mwoyo murefu kwazvo midziyo inofanira kuparadzwa" 
Romans9:23 pamusana pokuda kuratidza kukura kwembiri yake kumidziyo inofanira kuitirwa tsitsi yaakafanogadzirira mbiri. 
Romans9:24 Kunyange iyesu takadaidzwa tichibva kwete kuvaJudha voga asi tichibvawo mukati mevechirudzi? 
Romans9:25 Sokutaura kwaanoita muna Hosea achiti: “Avo vakanga vasiri vanhu vangu ndava kuvati vanhu vangu, vandaiti havasi vapamwoyo ndava kuvati vapamwoyo.”" 
Romans9:26 Panzvimbo imwecheteyo pavakambonzi, “Hamusi vanhu vangu, vachanzi vana vaMwari mupenyu.”" 
Romans9:27 Isaya anodaidzirawo nezvavaIsiraeri achiti, “Kunyange zvazvo vaIsiraeri vowanda sejecha rogungwa asi katsama kavo ndiko chete kachaponeswa" 
Romans9:28 nokuti Tenzi achatoranga nyika uye nokukurumidza.” 
Romans9:29 Sokufanotaura kwakaita Isaya achiti, “Dai Tenzi wehondo nehondo asina kutisiira vana tingadai takaita seSodhomu kana kuita seGomora.”" 
Romans9:30 Zvino toti kudiniko? Toti here vechirudzi vasina kutevedza ururami vakahuwana? Zvichireva ururami hunowanikwa nechitendero? 
Romans9:31 Tochitiwo vaIsiraeri vakatevedza urarami hunowanikwa nokuchengeta mutemo vakakundika kudzidzisa mutemo iwoyo here? 
Romans9:32 Pamusana pei? Nokuti havana kuutevedza nechitendero asi vaiita sokunge hunowanikwa namabasa. Vakagumburwa nedombo rinogumbura 
Romans9:33 sokunyorwa kwazvakaitwa zvichinzi: “Hezvo ndaisa dombo muZioni richaita kuti vazhinji vagumburwe ibwe richaita kuti vaputsike. Anotenda maari haazonyadziswi.” 
Romans10:1 Hama dzangu, chandinodisisa mumwoyo mangu chaizvo nomunamato wangu wandinovaitira kuna Mwari, ndowekuti vaponeswe." 
Romans10:2 Ndinovapupurira kuti vane shungu naMwari asi havana ruzivo," 
Romans10:3 nokuti nokusaziva kururamiswa kunobva kuna Mwari vakatsvaka nzira dzavo dzokururamiswa. Havana kutsvaka kururamiswa kunobva kuna Mwari. 
Romans10:4 Kristu ndiye akagumisa mutemo kuti munhu wose ane chitendero aruramiswe. 
Romans10:5 Mosesi akanyora achiti, “Munhu anochengeta ururami hunobva mumutemo achararamawo nawo.”" 
Romans10:6 Asi ururami hunobva muchitendero hunoti, usataure mumwoyo mako uchiti, “Ndiani achakwira kudenga?” (kundounza Kristu pasi pano)" 
Romans10:7 kana kuti, “Ndiani achadzika mugomba rakadzikisisa.” (Kundounza Kristu kubva kuvakafa)." 
Romans10:8 Asi ururami hunotii? Hunoti, “Shoko riri pedyo newe, riri pamuromo pako, uye riri mumwoyo mako,” (tiri kureva shoko rechitendero ratinoparidza)," 
Romans10:9 nokuti kana ukataura nomuromo wako kuti Jesu ndiTenzi uchitenda mumwoyo mako kuti Mwari akamumutsa muvakafa uchaponeswa. 
Romans10:10 Zviripo ndezvokuti munhu anotenda mumwoyo wake naizvozvo anorumiswa, uye anobvuma nomuromo wake, anoponeswa naizvozvo." 
Romans10:11 Magwaro Matsvene anoti hapana anotenda maari achanyadziswa," 
Romans10:12 nokuti hapana rusaruro rwokuti uyu muJudha, kana kuti uyu muGiriki. Tenzi mumwecheteyo ndiye Tenzi wavose uye anopa upfumi hwake kuna vose vanodaidza kwaari," 
Romans10:13 nokuti munhu wose anodaidza zita raTenzi achaponeswa. 
Romans10:14 Zvino vangadaidze sei kwaari ivo vasina kutenda maari? Uye vachatenda sei maari iye vasina kumbonzwa nezvake? Uye vanganzwe sei ivo vasina muparidzi. 
Romans10:15 Vanhu vangaparidze sei ivo vasina kutumwa sokunyorwa kwazvakaitwa zvichinzi, “Hakusi kunaka ikoko, kwakaita tsoka dzavanoparidza Shoko Rakanaka." 
Romans10:16 Asika havasi vose vakateerera Shoko Rakanaka, sezvinotaurwa naIsaya anoti, ‘Tenzi ndiani akatenda zvaakanzwa kwatiri." 
Romans10:17 Saizvozvo chitendero chinobva mune zvatinonzwa. Zvatinonzwa zvinobva mukuparidzwa kwaKristu.’ ” 
Romans10:18 Asi zvandinobvunza ndezvokuti havana kunzwa here? Zvirokwazvo vakanzwa, nokuti izwi ravo rakaenda pasi pose mazwi avo akasvika kwakaperera nyika." 
Romans10:19 Ndinobvunzazve kuti Isiraeri haina kunzwisisa here? Mosesi ndiye anototanga kuti: “Ndichaita kuti muitire shanje vasiri rudzi, mushatirirwe rudzi rusina musoro.”" 
Romans10:20 Isaya anoitawo chivindi chokuti ndakawanikwa navavo vasina kunditsvaka ndakazviratidza kune vasina kundibvunza 
Romans10:21 asi nezveIsiraeri anoti, “Zuva rose ndakatambanudzira maoko angu kuna vanhu vasingateereri, vanhu venharo.”" 
Romans11:1 Zvino ndingati Mwari akaramba vanhu vake here? Kwete handizvo. Iyeniwo ndiri muIsiraeri, chizvarwa chaAbhurahamu, ndiri wedzinza rokwaBhenjamini." 
Romans11:2 Mwari haana kuramba vanhu vake vaakafanoziva. 
Romans11:3 Hamuzivisu zvinotaurwa naMagwaro Matsvene nezvaEriya zvaanokumbira Mwari kuti zviwire Isiraeri achiti, “Tenzi vanhu ava vakauraya vaporofita venyu. Vakapaza atari dzenyu. Ini ndoga ndini ndasara uye vari kuda kutondipedzisa.”" 
Romans11:4 Asi Mwari anomupindura achitii? “Ndakazvichengetera zviuru zvinomwe zvavarume vasina kupfugamira Bhaari. 
Romans11:5 Saizvozvowo iye zvino uno kune chitsama chakasarudzwa nokuda kwenyasha. 
Romans11:6 Zvino kana zviri nokuda kwenyasha, hazvisiri nokuda kwamabasa nokuti nyasha hadzizovi nyasha.”" 
Romans11:7 Zvino toti kudii? Toti, Isiraeri yakakundika kuwana zvayaitsvaka. Vaakasarudza ndivo vakazviwana. Asi vamwe vose vakaomaradzwa mwoyo." 
Romans11:8 Sokunyorwa kwazvakaitwa zvichinzi, “Mwari akavapa mwoyo wenhinhi namaziso okuti vasaone nenzeve dzokuti vasanzwe. Kusvikira pari nhasi.”" 
Romans11:9 Dhavhidhi anotiwo, “Regai mabiko avo makuru ave riva nomusungo kwavari, ave hunza kwavari nomubayiro wavo." 
Romans11:10 Maziso avo ngaakwidibirwe nerima kuti vatadze kuona dzive hotakota musana nokusingaperi.” 
Romans11:11 Ko zvino ndingati vakagumburwa zvokubva vawira pasi zvachose here? Kwete, handizvoba. Asi nokukanganisa kwavo ikoko ruponeso rwakabva rwaenda kune vechirudzi kuti vaIsiraeri vaite shanje." 
Romans11:12 Zvino kana kukanganisa kwavo ikoko kwakapfumisa pasi pose uyewo kana kukundika kwavo kuchitopfumisa vechirudzi, ko kutozoti kana tazara, tava tose pamwechete navo!" 
Romans11:13 Kunemiwo vechirudzi ndinoti, ini somupositori kune vechirudzi ndinokoshesa basa rangu iroro" 
Romans11:14 kuti ndimutse shanje muhama dzangu dzechiJudha. Nenzira iyoyo ndigoponesa vamwe vavo. 
Romans11:15 Kana kurambwa kwavo kuchiita kuti pasi pose payananiswe, ko kugamuchirwa kwavo kucharevei? Kunenge korevawo kumuka kwavafi." 
Romans11:16 Kana chidimbu chomukanyiwa wechingwa chinopirwa somupiro wezvitsva chiri chitsvene, saizvozvo mukanyiwa wose mutsvene. Kanawo mudzi uri mutsvene namapaziwo matsvene" 
Romans11:17 asi kana mamwe mapazi akadimurwa zvino imi bukirwa romuorivhi womusango mukarumatidzwa panzvimbo pawo kuti muwanewo upfumi homuorivhi 
Romans11:18 musadadire mapazi iwayo. Kunyange mukadada zvenyu asi yeukai kuti hamusimi munotsigira mudzi asi kuti mudzi ndiwo unokutsigirai. 
Romans11:19 Pamwe mungati mapazi akadimurwa kuti ini ndirumatidzwe pamugirepisi. 
Romans11:20 Ichokwadi ichocho. Vakadimurwa pamusana pokusatenda kwavo asi choga chinoita kuti iwe umire wakasimba, chitendero. Naizvozvo rega kuzvikudza; unofanira kutotya," 
Romans11:21 nokuti kana Mwari asina kurega mapazi epo aripo haamboregawo iwe uripo. 
Romans11:22 Saka iwe chinyatsoona mwoyochena nokuoma kwaMwari. Kuomesa mwoyo kwake kuna vakatadza nemwoyochena waMwari kwauri, ndokunge chete mwoyochena waMwari waramba uinewe. Pasina izvozvo kana iwe unodimurwawo." 
Romans11:23 Kunyange vaJudha vaya kana vakarega kurambirira mukusatenda kwavo, vanorumatidzwa pakare nokuti Mwari ane simba rokuvarumatidza zvakare." 
Romans11:24 Ndinodaro nokuti kana imi makadimurwa pamuorivhi, muorivhi womusango zvawo muchizorumatidzwa zvisiri zvinoitika pamakuriro ezvinhu uchirumatidzwa nomugirepisi unorimwa mumunda, ko zvinova nyore zvakadii kuti mapazi epo chaiwo arumatidzwezve pamigirepisi yawo. TSITSI DZAMWARI KUVANHU VOSE." 
Romans11:25 Mungadaro mukafunga kuti makachenjera, ndingade kuti muzive chakavandika ichi hama dzangu. Kuomaradza mwoyo kwakapinda muchikamu cheIsiraeri kusvikira huwandu hwevechirudzi vose hwapinda." 
Romans11:26 Naizvozvo Isiraeri yose ichaponeswa sokunyorwa kwazvakaitwa zvichinzi, “Mununuri achabva kuZioni achaparadza kusanamata Mwari kose muna Jakobho." 
Romans11:27 Ichochi ndicho chichava chitenderano changu navo kana ndabvisa zvitadzo zvavo.” 
Romans11:28 Pane zveShoko Rakanaka, imhandu dzaMwari kuitira imi, asi pane zvokusarudzwa ndavapamwoyo, pamusana pamadzitateguru avo" 
Romans11:29 nokuti zvipo zvaMwari nokudaidza kwake ipfirapo. 
Romans11:30 Sezvamakangoita imi kuti makambova vanhu vasingateereri Mwari asi zvino makaitirwa tsitsi pamusana pokusateerera kwavo," 
Romans11:31 saizvozvowo zvino havateereri kuti netsitsi dzamakaitirwa ivo vaitirwewo tsitsi. 
Romans11:32 Ndinodaro nokuti Mwari akaisa vanhu vose mukusateerera kuti anzwire vose tsitsi. 
Romans11:33 Aiwaiwa hakusi kudzama kwakaita upfumi noungwaru noruzivo rwaMwari! Hakusi kusabatika ikoko kwamazano ake nokusarondeka kwakaita nzira dzake! 
Romans11:34 Nokuti ndiani angazive zviri mupfungwa dzaTenzi; uye ndiani akambova mupi wake wamazano. 
Romans11:35 Kana akambomupa chipo chokuti azodzorerwa," 
Romans11:36 nokuti zvinhu zvose zvinobva kwaari uye zvinouya nokwaari uyewo ndezvake. Iye ngaarumbidzwe nokusingaperi. Ameni. 
Romans12:1 Naizvozvo ndinokukumbirisai, hama dzangu, pamusana petsitsi dzakaitwa naMwari, kuti mupire miviri yenyu sechibayiro chipenyu, chitsvene chinofadza Mwari; ndiko kunamata kwezvomweya ikoko." 
Romans12:2 Musatevedzere zvenyika asi vandudzwai muve vatsva mupfungwa dzenyu kuti munyatsoziva kuti zvinoda Mwari ndezvipi uye kuti zvakanaka ndezvipi zvinofadza Mwari uye zvakaruramisisa. 
Romans12:3 Pamusana pechipo chandakapiwa nenyasha dzaMwari ndinoda kudzora munhu oga oga pakati penyu kuti arege kuzvitora soopamusoro kupinda zvaari asi nepfungwa dzakagadzana kuzviera maererano nechitendero chaakapiwa naMwari. 
Romans12:4 Sezvakangoita kuti mumuviri mumwechete mune mitezo mizhinji. Uye mitezo iyoyo yose haishandi basa rimwechete. 
Romans12:5 Ndizvozvowo zvimwechete nesu kunyange takawanda kudai, tiri muviri mumwechete muna Kristu uye mumwe nomumwe mutezo wavamwe vose." 
Romans12:6 Tine zvipo zvakasiyana — siyana maererano nenyasha dzatakapiwa; ngatizvishandisei. Kana chiri chipo chokuporofita, tinofanira kuporofita zvinofambirana nechitendero chedu." 
Romans12:7 Kana chiri chokuitira vamwe mabasa ngatiitei mabasa, iwayo, anodzidzisa, ngaachisevenzese mukudzidzisa." 
Romans12:8 Ane chipo chokusimbisa vamwe, ngaachisevenzese mukusimbisa vamwe. Ane chipo chokupa, ngaave mupanegombe; kana chiri chipo choutungamiri, tungamirira nomwoyo wose kana chiri chamabasa etsitsi chiite nemwoyo unofara." 
Romans12:9 Rudo ngarurege kuva rwokungonyengedzera, vengai chakaipa, rambai makati kwati kwati nezvakanaka." 
Romans12:10 Idanai somukomanomunun'una. Kundai vamwe pakuremekedzana. 
Romans12:11 Rambai uri moto moto pakushandira Mwari; muchinganduma naMweya Mutsvene; shandirai Tenzi. 
Romans12:12 Farai muchitarisiro chenyu, tirirai mumatambudziko enyu. Rambai muchingonamata." 
Romans12:13 Bisawo mugove wako wokubatsira varurami vanenge vasina chokubata. Gamuchiranai mudzimba dzenyu. 
Romans12:14 Itii, Mwari ngaakomborere vanokushushai; vakumbirirei chikomborero, musavarengerere rushambwa." 
Romans12:15 Farai navanofara, muchemewo navanochema." 
Romans12:16 Garai muchinzwanana; Musazvikudze. Fambidzanai navapasi pasi. Musambozvitutumadza. 
Romans12:17 Musatsive chakaipa nechakaipa. Vavarirai kuita chinenge chichinzi navose chakanaka. 
Romans12:18 Kana zvichikwanisika sokugona kwenyu garisanai navanhu vose zvakanaka. 
Romans12:19 Hama dzangu dzadiwa, musatsividze asi zvisiirei kuna Mwari anoranga nehasha dzake nokuti zvakanyorwa zvichinzi, “Kutsividza ndokwangu. Ini ndini ndinodzorera.” Ndizvo zvinotaura Tenzi." 
Romans12:20 Kwete, kana muvengi wako ane nzara mupe chokudya. Kana ane nyota mupe chokunwa. Nokuti ukaita zvakadaro unotounganidza mazimbe omoto pamusoro pake." 
Romans12:21 Usakundwe nezvakaipa asi kunda zvakaipa nokuita zvakanaka. 
Romans13:1 Munhu wose ngaave pasi pehurumende inenge ichitonga nokuti hapana simba rokutonga risingabvi kuna Mwari. Vari kutonga vakatoiswapo naMwari. 
Romans13:2 Saizvozvo munhu anoramba kuteerera vatongi, anoramba kuteerera vakagadzwa naMwari. Vanorambawo kuteerera vacharangwa." 
Romans13:3 Vatongi havasi chinhu chinotyisa kuna vanoita zvakanaka asi kuna vanoita zvakaipa. Unoda here kurega kutya vane simba rokutonga? Kana zvakadaro ramba uchiita zvakanaka. Iye achati kwauri zvakanaka," 
Romans13:4 nokuti iye muranda waMwari kuti zvikufambire zvakanaka. Asi ukaita zvakaipa unofanira kutya nokuti haabatire bakatwa pasina. Iye muranda waMwari wokurangira Mwari munhu anoita zvakaipa. 
Romans13:5 Naizvozvo kuzviisa pasi kuya kunofanira kuitwa kwete kunzvenga chete kuranga kwaMwari asi nokuda kokuterera hana yako. 
Romans13:6 Munoripa mutero nechikonzero chimwechetecho nokuti vatongi vashandi vaMwari vanoita basa irori. 
Romans13:7 Varipei vose zvavanokodzera kuripwa. Kana uri mutero wapamunhu nomunhu ripai mutero iwoyo kana uri mutero wapazvinhu ripaiwo zvinofanira kuripwa muchikudza vanofanira kukudzwa nokuremekedza vanofanira kuremekedzwa. 
Romans13:8 Usave nechikwereti nomunhu kusiya chokudanana nokuti munhu anoda mumwe wake azadzisa mutemo. 
Romans13:9 Mitemo inoti usaite upombwe, usauraye, usabe, usachive nemimwe mitemo yose inobatanidzwa yose mushoko iri rinoti, “Ida mumwe wako sokuda kwaunozviita.”" 
Romans13:10 Munhu worudo haatadziri mumwe wake. Naizvozvo rudo ndirwo runozadzisa mutemo. 
Romans13:11 Uyezve apa munoziva kuti inguva yakadii; kuti nguva yacho yakwana zvino yokuti muchimuka muhope. Ndinodaro nokuti ruponeso rwava pedyo nesu zvino kupinda patakatanga kudavira. 
Romans13:12 Usiku hwaendedzana, kwava kuda kuedza. Saka ngatichikandai pasi mabasa erima tipfeke demautare rechiedza rokuzvidzivirira naro muhondo." 
Romans13:13 Ngatizvibatei sezvatinoita masikati, tisingatambi zvakaipa, nokuraradza noupombwe nokuzviregerera nokukakavadzana nokuitirana shanje." 
Romans13:14 Regai Kristu ave ndiye demautare renyu rokuzvidziirira naro muhondo, murege kuva nehanya nezvenyama kuti mugutse havi dzayo." 
Romans14:1 Garai zvakanaka nomunhu ane chitendero chisina kusimba. Mugamuchirei asi musingaiti gakava naye pane zvaanofunga. 
Romans14:2 Mumwe anotenda kuti anogona kudya chero chinhu asi asina kusimba uya achingodya mirio yoga. 
Romans14:3 Anodya chinhu ngaarege kushora uyo asingadyi. Asingadyi uya ngaarege kupa mhosva uya anodya zvake nokuti Mwari anomugamuchira. 
Romans14:4 Iwe ndiwe ani unopa mhosva muranda womumwe. Kubudirira kwake kana kusabudirira kwake muridzi wake ndiye anokuona. Achabudirira nokuti Tenzi wake ndiye anogona kuti abudirire. 
Romans14:5 Mumwe munhu anofunga kuti rimwe zuva riri nani kupinda rimwe, mumwewo achitora mazuva ose seakangoenzana. Mumwe nomumwe ngaanyatsotendeseka mumwoyo make" 
Romans14:6 nokuti anochengeta zuva anochengeta achikudza Tenzi. Anodyawo anodya achikudza Tenzi nokuti anotenda Mwari. Uyewo uyo asingadyi anorega pamusana pokukudza Tenzi achitenda Mwari. 
Romans14:7 Hapana mumwe wedu anozviraramira iye pachake; hapanawo mumwe wedu anozvifira iye pachake. 
Romans14:8 Kana tiri vapenyu tinoraramira Tenzi. Uye kana tichifa tinofira Tenzi. Saizvozvo kana tikararama kana kufa tiri vaTenzi. 
Romans14:9 Izvozvi ndizvo zvakafira Kristu akava mupenyuzve kuti ave Tenzi wavakafa navapenyu. 
Romans14:10 Unopireiko hama yako mhosva! Ko iwewo unoshorerei mumwe wako! Iyesu tose tichandomira pamberi pechigaro chokutonga chaMwari," 
Romans14:11 nokuti zvakanyorwa zvichinzi, “Hezvino ndakadai, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi, ibvi rose richandigwadamira uye rurimi rwose rucharumbidza Mwari.”" 
Romans14:12 Naizvozvo mumwe nomumwe wedu achandozvidavirira pana Mwari. 
Romans14:13 Saizvozvo ngatiregei kupana mhosva asi ngatitozviitirai chisungo chokuti hatimboisa chinopingiridza kana chinodzivirira panzira yehama yedu. 
Romans14:14 Ndinoziva uye ndinokurudzirwa muna Tenzi Jesu kuti hapana chinhu chakan'ora pachacho asi kuti chakan'orera kuno uyo anochiti chakan'ora. 
Romans14:15 Kana hama yako ichiodzwa mwoyo nezvauri kudya hauchisiri kuita zvine rudo. Usaite kuti chaunodya chiparadze munhu akafirwa naKristu. 
Romans14:16 Saka usaite kuti chakanaka kwauri chizonzi chakaipa 
Romans14:17 nokuti umambo hwaMwari haurevi chokudya kana chokunwa asi hunoreva ururami norugare nokufara muna Mweya Mutsvene. 
Romans14:18 Munhu anoshandira Kristu zvakadai, munhu anofadza Mwari uye anodiwawo navanhu." 
Romans14:19 Naizvozvo ngativavarirei kuita zvinounza rugare nezvinoita kuti tivakane. 
Romans14:20 Musaparadze basa raMwari pamusana pezvokudya. Chokudya chose chakanaka asi hazvina kunaka kuti munhu aite kuti vamwe vatadze pamusana pezvaanodya. 
Romans14:21 Zvakatonaka zvazvo kusadya nyama kana kunwa waini kana kuita chipi zvacho chingaite kuti hama yako itadze. 
Romans14:22 Chitendero chaunacho ngachive chako iwe naMwari pahuviri hwenyu. Akakomborerwa munhu asingazvipi mhosva kana aita zvaanga anyatsofunga kuita. 
Romans14:23 Asi munhu anokahadzika akadya anopara mhosva nokuti kuita kwake hakubvi muchitendero nokuti kuita kose kusingabvi muchokwadi chiri mumwoyo womunhu chitadzo.
