Romans15:1 Isu takasimba tinofanira kuita mwoyo murefu navasina kusimba kwete kungozvifadzawo zvedu. 
Romans15:2 Munhu wose anofanira kuitira mumwe wake zvinomufadza zvinomubatsira nokumusimbisa 
Romans15:3 nokuti Kristu haana kungozvifadza zvake asi sokunyorwa kwazvakaitwa zvichinzi, “Kuzvidza kwaavo vakakuzvidzai kwakauya kwandiri.”" 
Romans15:4 Ndinodaro nokuti zvose zvazvo zvakanyorwa mumazuva akare zvakanyorerwa kuti zvitidzidzise kuti nokushingirira uye nokukurudzira kwaMagwaro Matsvene tiwane chitarisiro. 
Romans15:5 Dai Mwari anotsungisa uye anokurudzira vanhu angoita kuti mugarisane zvakanaka, zvinowirirana naKristu Jesu" 
Romans15:6 kuti pamwechete nezwi rimwechete murumbidze Mwari naBaba waTenzi wedu Jesu Kristu. 
Romans15:7 Naizvozvo gamuchiranai sokugamuchirwa kwamakaitwa naKristu kuti Mwari arumbidzwe. 
Romans15:8 Zvandiri kureva ndezvokuti Kristu akava muranda kuna vakadzingiswa kuratidza chokwadi chaMwari kuti asimbisise zvitsidzo zvakaitwa kumadzitateguru 
Romans15:9 uye kuti vechirudzi varumbidze Mwari nokuda kwengoni dzake, sokunyorwa kwazvakaitwa zvichinzi, “Saizvozvo ndichakurumbidzai mukati mevechirudzi uye ndichaimbira zita renyu.”" 
Romans15:10 Zvinonzizve, “Pemberai nokufara pamwechete navanhu vake, imi vechirudzi.”" 
Romans15:11 Uyewo zvinonzi: “Rumbidzai Tenzi imi mose vechirudzi uyewo vanhu vose murumbidzei.” 
Romans15:12 Isayawo anoti: “Dzinde raJese richauya, iye anomuka kuzotonga vechirudzi, vechirudzi vachatarisira maari.”" 
Romans15:13 Dai Mwari wechitarisiro angokuzadzai norufaro rwose norugare mukutenda kwenyu, kuti nesimba raMweya Mutsvene mangofashukira nechitarisiro." 
Romans15:14 Hama dzangu ini ndinogutsikana nemi kuti imi pachenyu muzere norunako, muzere neruzivo rwose uyezve nokuti munokwanisa kudzidzisana pachenyu." 
Romans15:15 Asi pane dzimwe nyaya dzandakakunyorerai nechivindi chaicho ndichikuyeuchidzai pamusana pechipo chandakapiwa naMwari 
Romans15:16 chokuti ndiri mushandiri waKristu Jesu ndichishanda mukati mevechirudzi uye kuti ndiri mushandiri weShoko Rakanaka raMwari. Ibasa rangu somupristi kupira vechirudzi kwaari sechibayiro chinofadza chakaereswa naMweya Mutsvene. 
Romans15:17 Naizvozvo muna Kristu Jesu, ndinozvidadisa nebasa randinoitira Mwari." 
Romans15:18 Handingafemeri kutaura nezvechimwe chinhu kusiya nezvakaitwa naKristu nemandiri kuti vechirudzi vateerere namazwi nezviito zvangu 
Romans15:19 nesimba rezviratidzo nezvishamiso uye nesimba raMweya Mutsvene. Uku kuri kuti kubvira kuJerusaremu kutenderera nokuIririkumu ndiparidze shoko raKristu, ndichiita kuti ive ndiyo vavariro yangu yokuparidza Shoko Rakanaka kusati kwakambodomwa Kristu." 
Romans15:20 Ndingadaro ndikavaka pahwaro hwomumwe. 
Romans15:21 Asi sokunyorwa kwazvakaitwa zvichinzi, “Vasina kumbotaurirwa nezvake vachaona, vasina kumbonzwa nezvake vachanzwisisa.”" 
Romans15:22 Ndicho chikonzero chakandipingidza kuti ndiuye kwamuri kakawanda. 
Romans15:23 Asi iye zvino zvandisisina mukana wokushanda munharaunda dzino idzi uye pamusana pokuti ndaisuwira kwamakore mazhinji kuuya kwamuri," 
Romans15:24 ndinotarisira kukuonai ndichipfuura pandinenge ndichienda kuSipeini imiwo muchindibatsira parwendo rwangu ikoko pashure pokunge ndambofara kuva nemi kwechinguvana. 
Romans15:25 Pari zvino ndiri kumboenda kuJerusaremu norubatsiro rwavatsvene. 
Romans15:26 Ndinodaro nokuti vokuMasedhonia nevekuAkaya vakafarira kuti vape chipo kuvarombo mukati mavatsvene vokuJerusaremu. 
Romans15:27 Ivo ndivo zvavo vakafarira kuzviita. Asi zviripowo zvazvo ndezvokuti, vanofanira kubatsira varombo ivavo. Nokuti vaJudha vakagoverana zvikomborero zvomweya nevechirudzi saizvozvowo vechirudzi vanofanira kubatsira vaJudha nezvinhu zvenyama." 
Romans15:28 Saizvozvo kana ndapedza izvi ndatsvitsa zviya zvakaunganidzwa ndichapfuura nokwenyu ndichienda kuSipeini. 
Romans15:29 Ndinozivawo kuti kana ndouya kwamuri ndinouya nechikomborero chaKristu chizere. 
Romans15:30 Ndinokukumbirisai hama dzangu, nokuna Tenzi wedu Jesu Kristu, nokurudo runobva kuna Mweya Mutsvene, kuti muvavarire pamwechete neni muminamato yenyu kuna Mwari muchindinamatira" 
Romans15:31 kuti ndinunurwe kuna vasingatendi vari kuJudhea uye kuti ruyamuro rwangu kuJerusaremu rwutambirwe navatsvene ivavo. 
Romans15:32 Izvi kunenge kuri kuti, nokuda kwaMwari, ndizouya kwamuri nomufaro ndimboti zororei pakati penyu." 
Romans15:33 Mwari worugare ngaave nemi mose. Ameni. 
Romans16:1 Ndinoturira kwauri hanzvadzi yedu Febhi mutungamiriri mushandiri wesangano rokuKenikerie kuti mumugamuchire muzita raTenzi zvinokodzerana navatsvene. 
Romans16:2 Mubatsirei muna zvose zvaangade kwamuri nokuti iye akabatsirawo vazhinji kunyange ini. 
Romans16:3 Ndikwazisirei Prisika naAkwira vashandi pamwe neni mubasa raKristu Jesu 
Romans16:4 vakapinda munjodzi yokuda kudimburwa musoro pamusana pangu. Vanotendwa, kwete neni ndoga, asi kunyange namasanganowo ose evechirudzi. Ndikwazisireiwo sangano rinopindira pamba pavo." 
Romans16:5 Ndikwazisireiwo Epenetusi wapamwoyo, akava wokutanga kuAsia kupindukira kuna Kristu." 
Romans16:6 Ndikwazisireiwo Maria akashanda nesimba pakati penyu. 
Romans16:7 Ndikwazisireiwo Andironikusi naJuniasi hama dzangu vakanga vari vamwe vangu muusungwa, varume vanoremekedzeka pakati pavapositori. Vakanditangira kuva naKristu." 
Romans16:8 Ndikwazisireiwo Ambiriatusi shamwari yangu yapamwoyo muna Kristu. 
Romans16:9 Ndikwazisireiwo Urubhanusi mushandi pamwe neni mubasa raKristu naSitakisi, wangu wapamwoyo." 
Romans16:10 Ndikwazisireiwo Aperesi, munhu akatendeka kuna Kristu. Ndikwazisirei vemhuri yaAristobhurusi," 
Romans16:11 mundikwazisirewo hama yangu Herodioni. Ndikwazisireiwo muna Tenzi vemhuri yokwaNarisisusi. 
Romans16:12 Ndikwazisireiwo vashandi pamwe nesu muna Tenzi Tirifena naTirifosa, mundikwazisirewozve Perisi wapamwoyo akashanda zvakaomarara mubasa raTenzi." 
Romans16:13 Ndikwazisireiwo Rufusi mukuru mukuru mubasa raTenzi naamai vake vari amai vanguwo. 
Romans16:14 Ndikwazisireiwo Asingiretusi naFiregoni naHemesi naPatrobhasi naHemasi nevehama vavanawo. 
Romans16:15 Ndikwazisireiwo zvakare Firorogusi naJuria naNereusi nehanzvadzi yake naOrimbasi navatsvene vose vavanavo. 
Romans16:16 Kwazisanai muchitsvodana zvitsvene. Masangano ose aKristu anokukwazisai. 
Romans16:17 Ndinokukumbirisai hama dzangu kuti munyatsoongorora avo vanopesanisa vanhu nokuunza zvimhingamupinyi vachirwisa zvidzidzo zvamakadzidziswa. Siyanai navo. 
Romans16:18 Vanhu vakadaro havasipo kushandira Tenzi wedu Kristu asi havi dzavo. Vanonyengedza vasina kuchenjera nokunatsa mukanwa kwavo namazwi anotapira. 
Romans16:19 Guhu rokuteerera kwenyu rakapararira kose kose zvokuti ndinofara kwazvo nemi. Ini ndingade kuti muve shasha pakuita zvakanaka asi muve samazirema zvenyu pakuita zvakaipa. 
Romans16:20 Ipapo Mwari worugare anobva apwanyira Satani pasi petsoka dzenyu. Dai Tenzi wedu Jesu Kristu angokuitirai nyasha. 
Romans16:21 Timoti wandinoshanda naye, anokukwazisaiwo pamwechete naRukio naJasoni, naSosipata hama dzangu." 
Romans16:22 Ini Tetiusi munyori wetsamba ino ndinokukwazisaiwo muna Tenzi. 
Romans16:23 Gayusi ari kundichengeta mumba make uye ari kuchengeta sangano rose mumba make ari kukukwazisai. Erasitusi sahomwe weguta rino nehama yedu Kwatusi vanokukwazisai. 
Romans16:24 *** 
Romans16:25 Ngatirumbidzei iye anogona kukusimbisai maererano neShoko rangu Rakanaka uye maererano nokuparidza kwaJesu Kristu uye nokuzarurwa kwezvakanga zvakavandika kwenguva ndefu asi zvino zvakazoburitswa pachena. 
Romans16:26 Uye nezvakanyorwa navaporofita zvikazoziviswa kumarudzi ose maererano nezvakanzi naMwari wokusingaperi ngazviziviswe kuti kuve nokuteerera kunounzwa nechitendero. 
Romans16:27 Mbiri ngaipiwe kuna Mwari oga anoungwaru nokuna Jesu Kristu nokusingaperi. Ameni. 
1Corinthians1:1 Ini Pauro ndakadaidzwa kuti ndive mupositori waKristu Jesu, chiri chido chaMwari, ndinokunyorerai ini pamwechete nehama Sositenesi," 
1Corinthians1:2 imi vesangano raMwari riri kuKorinde, rinemi vanhu vakaitwa vatsvene muna Kristu Jesu, imi makadaidzwa kuva varurami pamwechete navose vanodaidzira kose kose muzita raTenzi wedu Jesu Kristu, Tenzi wavo neweduwo." 
1Corinthians1:3 Chikomborero chokuitirwa nyasha nokuwaniswa rugare dai changova nemi chichibva kuna Mwari Baba vedu nokuna Tenzi Jesu Kristu. 
1Corinthians1:4 Ndinotenda Mwari nguva dzose pamusana penyu nokuda kwenyasha dzaMwari dzamakapihwa muna Kristu Jesu," 
1Corinthians1:5 kuti muna zvose makapfumiswa maari zvokuti munogona kutaura uye munoziva zvose. 
1Corinthians1:6 Uchapupu hwaKristu hwakasimbisiswa mamuri," 
1Corinthians1:7 zvokuti hapana chipo chezvomweya chamusina pamunenge makamirira kuratidzwa pachena kwaTenzi wedu Jesu Kristu. 
1Corinthians1:8 Ndiye achakusimbaradzai kusvikira kumagumo kuti munge musina mhosva pazuva raTenzi wedu Jesu Kristu. 
1Corinthians1:9 Mwari akatendeka. Ndiye akakukokai kuti muve noruwadzano naMwanakomana wake Jesu Kristu Tenzi wedu. 
1Corinthians1:10 Ndinokukumbirisai hama dzangu muzita raTenzi wedu Jesu Kristu kuti mose zvenyu munzwanane uye kuti parege kuva namakakatanwa pakati penyu, kuti mose munzwanane mupfungwa nemwoyo mumwechete." 
1Corinthians1:11 Ndinodaro nokuti ndakataurirwa nevemhuri yokwaKurowe kuti pane kupopotedzana pakati penyu, hama dzangu." 
1Corinthians1:12 Zvandinoreva ndezvizvi zvokuti, mose mavakuti ini ndiri waPauro mumwe achiti ndiri waAporosi mumwewo achiti ndiri waKefasi mumwewo achiti ndiri waKristu. Ko iye Kristu akadanzuranwa here?" 
1Corinthians1:13 Ko Pauro akakurovererwai pamuchinjikwa here? Kana kuti zvimwe makaombekwa muzita raPauro here? 
1Corinthians1:14 Ndinotenda Mwari kuti handina mumwe wenyu wandakaombeka kusiya Krisiposi naGayosi 
1Corinthians1:15 kuti pashaye anoti makaombekwa muzita rangu. 
1Corinthians1:16 Ehe, ndakaombekawo vemhuri yaStefanosi. Kunze kwaivava, hameno kana pano mumwezve wandakaombeka." 
1Corinthians1:17 Chikonzero chacho ndechokuti Kristu haana kundituma kuzoombeka asi kuzoparidza Shoko Rakanaka uye kwete namazwi oungwaru kuti muchinjikwa waKristu urege kutorerwa simba rawo. 
1Corinthians1:18 Zvinoreva muchinjikwa, ndezvoupenzi kuna vakananga kundoparadzwa asi kunesu vari kundoponeswa, isimba raMwari" 
1Corinthians1:19 nokuti zvakanyorwa zvichinzi, “Ndichaparadza ungwaru hwavakachenjera uye ndichashaisa maturo ruzivo rwavazivi.”" 
1Corinthians1:20 Mungwaru achazova papi ipapa? Zvino iyo nyanzvi yomutemo ichavapapi? Nyanzvi dzokufunga dzomukore uno dzichazova papi ipapo? Mwari haana kuita kuti ungwaru hwapasi pano, huve upenzi here?" 
1Corinthians1:21 Nokuti ungwaru hwaMwari ihoho hwakaita kuti vanhu vasazive Mwari noungwaru hwavo. Uye zvakafadza Mwari kuponesa vanotenda, vachibatsirwa nezvoupenzi zvatinoparidza." 
1Corinthians1:22 VaJudha vanoda zvishamiso vaGiriki vanotsvaga ungwaru. 
1Corinthians1:23 Asi isu tinoparidza Kristu akarovererwa pamuchinjikwa. Izvi chigumburo kunavaJudha uye upenzi zvahwo kune vechirudzi. 
1Corinthians1:24 Kuna vakadaidzwa zvavo, vangave vaJudha kana vaGiriki, tinoparidza Kristu, iye simba raMwari noungwaru hwaMwari." 
1Corinthians1:25 Upenzi hwaMwari ungwaru kupinda ungwaru hwavanhu uye utera hwaMwari hune simba kupinda ravanhu. 
1Corinthians1:26 Yeukai kuti pamakadaidzwa hama dzangu, havasi vangani venyu vakanga vakangwara sokuona kunoita nyika. Havazi vangani venyu vaiva noukuru kana vaiva vokumba huru." 
1Corinthians1:27 Asi Mwari akasarudza vanoonekwa nenyika samazungairwa kuti anyadzise vangwaru. Mwari akasarudza vanoonekwa nenyika savasina simba kunyadzisa vakasimba. 
1Corinthians1:28 Mwari akasarudza vanoonekwa savapasi pasi navanhu vakazvidzika panyika kuti zvinonzi ndizvo zvinhu kwazvo zvive zvenhando 
1Corinthians1:29 kuitirawo kuti pashaye munhu anozvikudza pamberi paMwari. 
1Corinthians1:30 Kuna Mwari ndiko kunobva upenyu hwenyu muna Kristu Jesu waakaita kuti ave ndiye ungwaru hwedu, uye kuti ave ndiye anotiruramisa, anotiita vatsvene nokuva rudzikinuro rwedu." 
1Corinthians1:31 Saizvozvo, sokunyorwa kwazvakaitwa, “Anozvirumbidza ngaazvirumbidze naTenzi.”" 
1Corinthians2:1 Kunyange ini pandakauya kwamuri hama dzangu, handina kuuya ndichikuparidzai chakavandika chaMwari ndichishandisa mazwi akadzama kana oungwaru hunoshamisa." 
1Corinthians2:2 Zvandaiva pakati penyu, hapana chandakada kunzi ndinoziva, kunze kwaJesu Kristu uye iye akarovererwa pamuchinjikwa." 
1Corinthians2:3 Pandaiva nemi ndakanga ndisina kusimba ndichitya ndichidedera. 
1Corinthians2:4 Shoko rangu nokuparidza kwangu zvakanga zvisiri zvokupwisa vanhu namazwi oungwaru asi kuratidza Mweya nesimba 
1Corinthians2:5 kuti musimboti wechitendero chenyu urege kuva ungwaru hwavanhu asi simba raMwari. 
1Corinthians2:6 Zvakadaro zvazvo, kune vabve zero, tinopa shoko roungwaru. Asi hausi ungwaru hwapanyika pano kana hwavatongi vapasi pano vari pedyo nokupfuura." 
1Corinthians2:7 Tinoparidza chakavandika uye ungwaru hwaMwari hwakavandika hwakatemwa naMwari pasi pasati pavapo kuti tizopenyeswa. 
1Corinthians2:8 Hapana vatongi vapasi pano vakazviziva nokuti dai vakazviziva vangadai vasina kuroverera pamuchinjikwa Tenzi wembiri. 
1Corinthians2:9 Asi sokunyorwa kwazvakaitwa zvinonzi, “Mwari zvaakagadzirira vanomuda hapana ziso rati razviona kana nzeve yati yazvinzwa kana munhu ati ambozviisa mupfungwa." 
1Corinthians2:10 Izvozvo ndizvo zvaakatizivisa nokuna Mweya, nokuti Mweya anotsvagurudza zvose kunyange zvinhu zvoudzamu hwaMwari." 
1Corinthians2:11 Ndiani angazive zviri mupfungwa dzomunhu kusiya mweya womunhu iyeyo uri maari. Saizvozvowo hapana angazive pfungwa dzaMwari kusiya Mweya waMwari. 
1Corinthians2:12 Zvino hatina kugamuchira mweya wapanyika asi Mweya anobva kuna Mwari kuti tizive zvipo zvatinopiwa pachena naMwari.” 
1Corinthians2:13 Hatitauri izvi namazwi atinodzidziswa noungwaru hwavanhu asi atinodzidziswa naMweya tichitsanangura zvinhu zvechokwadi zvomweya kuna avo vana Mweya. 
1Corinthians2:14 Munhu asina Mweya haakwanisi kugamuchira zvipo zvaMweya Mutsvene waMwari nokuti ndezvoupenzi kwaari, uye haagoni kuzvinzwisisa nokuti zvinogona kunzwisiswa nomunhu ana Mweya." 
1Corinthians2:15 Munhu anaMweya anogona kunzwisisa zvose sezvazviri asi iye hapana anogona kumunzwisisa zvaari. 
1Corinthians2:16 Sokutaura kunoita Magwaro Matsvene anoti, “Ndiani angazive pfungwa dzaTenzi zvokuti angamudzidzise? Asi isu pfungwa dzaKristu tinadzo.”" 
1Corinthians3:1 Kana iniwo, hama dzangu, handina kukwanisa kutaura kwamuri savanhu vana Mweya asi savanhu venyama uye savacheche muna Kristu." 
1Corinthians3:2 Ndakakurerai nomukaka kwete nesadza nokuti makanga musati mokwanisana naro. Nyangwe nazvino wose hamusati mokwanisana naro. 
1Corinthians3:3 Chikonzero ndechokuti muchiri vanhu venyama, nokuti kana pachine shanje nokukakavadzana pakati penyu, hamusi vanhu venyama here muchizvibata savanhuwo zvavo?" 
1Corinthians3:4 Ko kana munhu achiti ndiri waPauro mumwe achiti ndiri waAporosi hamusati muchingova vanhu chete here? 
1Corinthians3:5 Ko iye Aporosi chiiwo zvake? Pauro chinyi? Varanda. Imi makawana chitendero chenyu nemavari sokupiwa kwakaitwa mumwe nomumwe wavo. 
1Corinthians3:6 Ini ndakadyara, Aporosi akadiridza asi Mwari ndiye akaita kuti zvikure." 
1Corinthians3:7 Saka anodyara naanodiridza hapana zvavari asi Mwari ndiye chete anoita kuti zvikure. 
1Corinthians3:8 Anodyara naanodiridza vakangoenzana. Mumwe nomumwe wavo achagamuchira mubayiro wake sokushanda kwaakaita nokuti tiri vashandipamwe vaMwari. 
1Corinthians3:9 Imi muri munda waMwari, imba yaMwari." 
1Corinthians3:10 Nenyasha dzandakapiwa naMwari ndakavaka hwaro somuzivi chaiye wokuvaka. Mumwe ndiye ari kuvaka pasoro pahwo. Munhu wose ngaatozvingwarira kuti anovaka sei pahuri. 
1Corinthians3:11 Hakuna humwe hwaro hunogona kuvakwa nomunhu kusiya hwakavakwa ihwohwo. Hwaro hwacho ndiJesu Kristu. 
1Corinthians3:12 Zvino mumwe anogona kuvaka hwaro ihwohwo nendarama, mumwe nesirivha mumwe namatombo anokosha mumwewo namapango mumwe nouswa mumwe namashanga." 
1Corinthians3:13 Basa romumwe nomumwe richaratidzwa pachena zvariri nokuti Zuva iroro richazviburitsa pachena nokuti basa romunhu richaoneswa zvariri nomoto. Moto ndiwo uchaedza basa romunhu nomunhu kuti akariita sei. 
1Corinthians3:14 Kana basa rokuvaka rakaitwa nomunhu pahwaro huya rikagona kuramba riripo, munhu iyeyo achawana mubayiro." 
1Corinthians3:15 Asi basa romunhu rikatsva, acharasikirwa. Iye pachake achaponeswa zvake asi somunhu akapunyuka nomumoto." 
1Corinthians3:16 Handiti munoziva kuti muri Temberi yaMwari here uye kuti Mweya waMwari anogara mamuri? 
1Corinthians3:17 Nezvo ani naani anoparadza Temberi yaMwari, Mwari achamuparadza nokuti Temberi yaMwari inoera. Temberi yacho ndimi." 
1Corinthians3:18 Munhu ngaarege zvake kuzvinyengedza. Kana pano mumwe pakati penyu anozviti ndakachenjera panyika pano ngaatozviita sebenzi zvake kuti ave mungwaru. 
1Corinthians3:19 Ndinodaro nokuti, ungwaru hwapasi pano, kuna mwari hupenzi sokunyorwa kwazvakaitwa zvichinzi, “Anokachikira wakangwara muhumenemene hwavo ihwohwo." 
1Corinthians3:20 Napamwezve panoti Tenzi anoziva kuti pfungwa dzavangwaru hadzina maturo 
1Corinthians3:21 Saizvozvo munhu ngaarege kuzvirumbidza nomunhu nokuti zvinhu zvose ndezvenyu. 
1Corinthians3:22 Angave Pauro kana Aporosi kana Kefasi; ingave nyika kana upenyu kana rufu, ingave nguva ino, kana yamangwana, zvose ndezvenyu;" 
1Corinthians3:23 Imiwo muri vanhu vaKristu Kristu ndewaMwari.” 
1Corinthians4:1 Saizvozvo munhu ngaatitore savaranda vaKristu, vatariri vezvakavanzika zvaMwari." 
1Corinthians4:2 Vataririwo vanotarisirwa kuti vave vanhu vakatendeka. 
1Corinthians4:3 Kwandiri ini chinhu chidukuduku kuti nditongwe nemi kana kutongwa nedare ripi zvaro ravanhu. Hapana chandinozvipa mhosva nacho. 
1Corinthians4:4 Hapana chandinonzwa chinondirovesa hana asi hazvirevi kuti handina mhosva. Anogona kunditonga chete ndiTenzi. 
1Corinthians4:5 Nokudaro regai kupa munhu mhosva nguva isati yasvika, Tenzi vasati vauya. Ndivo vachaburitsa pachena zvinhu zvakavandika murima iye zvino uye vachaburitsa pachena zvinangwa zviri mumwoyo. Ipapo munhu wose achapiwa kurumbidzwa kwake naMwari." 
1Corinthians4:6 Ndichiitira kuti zvikubatsirei hama, ndazvitora ini naAporosi somuenzaniso, ndichiitira kuti imi mudzidze patiri kuti munhu ngaarege kupfuuridza pane zvakanyorwa, kuti pasave naanozvikudza nomunhu uyu kana nouyo." 
1Corinthians4:7 Nokuti akazoti uri mukuru pana vamwe ndiani? Chii chaunacho iwe chausina kutopiwa? Ko kana wakaita zvokutopiwa, unozvikudzireiko sokunge chisiri chipo?" 
1Corinthians4:8 Imika zvenyu mune zvakakwana kare. Makatova vapfumika imi. Munotova madzimambo isu tisiri mazviri. Dai zvaingoitika kuti mutonge, kuti isu titongewo nemi." 
1Corinthians4:9 Ndinofunga kuti Mwari, isu vapositori, akatiisa kokupedzisira achitiratidza kunyika savanhu vanofanira kuuraiwa nokuti tatove chinhu chokuyevewa nenyika yose navatumwa navanhu." 
1Corinthians4:10 Tiri mapenzi zvawo pamusana paKristu asi imi makangwara muna Kristu. Isu hatina simba asi imi makasimba. Munoremekedzwa asi isu tinoshorwa. 
1Corinthians4:11 Kutaura kuno, tine nzara nenyota, uye takapfeka marengenya. Tinorohwa uye hatina musha." 
1Corinthians4:12 Tinozvishandira namaoko edu. Kana tikatukwa, isu tinoti ngavakomborerwe. Tikashushwa tinotirira." 
1Corinthians4:13 Kana tikareverwa makuhwa tinopindura zvinoyananisa. Iye zvino tiri marara zvawo apanyika namagufu azvose. 
1Corinthians4:14 Handisi kukunyorerai izvi kuti ndikunyadzisei asi kuti ndikutsiurei savana vangu vapamwoyo," 
1Corinthians4:15 nokuti kunyange muna vadzidzisi vakazanirana munaKristu asi hamuna vanababa vakawanda. Ini ndakava baba venyu muna Kristu nokuda kweShoko Rakanaka. 
1Corinthians4:16 Naizvozvo ndinokukumbirisai kuti munditevedzere. 
1Corinthians4:17 Pamusana paizvozvo ndiri kukutumirai Timoti, mwana wangu wapamwoyo wakatendeka muna Tenzi kuti akuyeuchidzei mugariro wangu muna Kristu sokuvadzidzisa kwandinoita kose kose musangano rimwe nerimwe." 
1Corinthians4:18 Vamwe venyu vavakuzvitutumadza sokunge ndisisauyeko kwamuri. 
1Corinthians4:19 Asi ndichauya kwamuri nokukurumidza, kana Mwari achida, ndipo pandichanzwa kwete zvinotaurwa navanhu vanozvikudza ava asi kuti ndichaona simba ravanaro," 
1Corinthians4:20 nokuti umambo hwaMwari hakusi kungotaura chete asi kuti isimba. 
1Corinthians4:21 Munodei imi? Ndokuvingai neshamhu here kana kuti mwoyo worudo uno unyoro? 
1Corinthians5:1 Ndiri kunzwa zvechokwadi kuti pakati penyu pari kuitwa unzenza husingatombowanikwi kunyange pakati pavasiri vanamati. Pano murume ari kutorana nomudzimai wababa vake. 
1Corinthians5:2 Asi imi motozvikudza imi, musingatozvichema kuti munhu akaita izvi abviswe pakati penyu." 
1Corinthians5:3 Ichokwadi zvazvo kuti handiko ikoko asi mwoyo wangu uri ikoko, sokunge ndiri ikoko. Munhu akaita izvozvo ndatomubata nemhosva," 
1Corinthians5:4 muzita raTenzi Jesu. Pamunenge maungana ndinemiwo mupfungwa dzangu. Nesimba raTenzi wedu Jesu 
1Corinthians5:5 munofanira kuturira munhu iyeyo kuna Satani kuti muviri wake uparadzwe kuti mweya wake uponeswe nezuva raTenzi Jesu. 
1Corinthians5:6 Kuzvikudza kwenyu hakuna kunaka. Hamuzivi here kuti mbiriso shomanana inofutisa mukanyiwa wose? 
1Corinthians5:7 Bvisai mbiriso yakare kuti muve mukanyiwa mutsva. Izvo zviri izvowo chaizvo zvamuri zvokuti hamuna kufutiswa nokuti Kristu hwayana yedu yePasika yakaitwa chibayiro. 
1Corinthians5:8 Naizvozvo ngatichengetei zuva guru kwete nembiriso yakare, mbiriso yokuipa mwoyo nezviito zvakaipa asi kuva nechingwa chisina mbiriso chokuva pachokwadi uye chine chokwadi." 
1Corinthians5:9 Ndakambokunyorerai mutsamba yangu ndichiti musafambidzane navanhu vounzenza. 
1Corinthians5:10 Hatisi kureva vounzenza vose vose vapanyika kana vanoruchiva namakororo kana vanonamata zvinhu zvisiri Mwari nokuti mungatofanira kubva pasi pano. 
1Corinthians5:11 Asiwo zvandakakunyorerai ndezvokuti murege kufambidzana nani zvake anodaidzwa kunzi hama muna Kristu kana ane mhosva younzenza kana yoruchiva kana kuti munamati wezvisiri Mwari kana munyombi kana chidhakwa kana gororo kana kumbodya nomunhu akadaro. 
1Corinthians5:12 Handinei nokutonga varikunze. Handiti vari musangano ndivo chete vamunotonga. 
1Corinthians5:13 Mwari ndiye anotonga vari kunze. Dzingai munhu uyo akaipa pakati penyu. 
1Corinthians6:1 Kana mumwe wenyu akanganisirwa nomumwe, angafunge here chokwadi kuenda kumatare avanhu vasiri vanamati, panze pokuenda kuna vatsvene?" 
1Corinthians6:2 Hamuzivi here kuti vatsvene ndivo vachatonga pasi pose? Zvino kana pasi pachizotongwa nemi hamugoni here kuenzanisa tunyaya tudiki twakadaro? 
1Corinthians6:3 Hamuzivi here kuti tisu tichatonga vatumwa; kokutozoti nyaya dzoupenyu huno? 
1Corinthians6:4 Zvino kana muine nyaya dzakadaro munodziendeserei kuna vanhu vasingaverengwi nesangano? 
1Corinthians6:5 Ndinotaura izvi kwamuri kuti munyare. Ndizvo here kuti hapana munhu pakati penyu mungwaru anogona kuenzanisa hama nehama? 
1Corinthians6:6 Asi hama iri kutokwirirana matare neimwe hama pamberi pavasiri vatendi. 
1Corinthians6:7 Kukwirirana matare kukundikana ikoko. Zvinodii zvazvo kusva watakura zvako zvaunotadzirwa? Unodii kusva wanyengedzwa zvako? 
1Corinthians6:8 Asi iyemi pachenyu ndimi munoita zvakaipa muchibiridzira, muchitoita izvozvo kunyange kuhama dzenyu." 
1Corinthians6:9 Hamuzivisu kuti vasakarurama havawane nhaka youmambo hwaMwari. Musazvinyengedze kuti hapana unzenza navanamati vezvisiri Mwari, kana mhombwe navarume vanoita zvakaipa navamwe varume," 
1Corinthians6:10 kana mbavha, kana vano ruchiva, kana zvidhakwa kana vanyombi kana makororo vanokwanisa kupinda muumambo hwaMwari." 
1Corinthians6:11 Ndizvo zvakanga zvakaitawo vamwe venyu asi makashambidzwa mukaitwa vatsvene, mukaruramiswa muzita raTenzi Jesu Kristu uye muna Mweya waMwari wedu." 
1Corinthians6:12 Hongu ndinobvumirwa zvinhu zvose asi hazvisi zvose zvinobatsira Hongu ndinobvumirwa zvinhu zvose asi handibvumi kuitwa muranda nechii zvacho. 
1Corinthians6:13 Chokudya chakaitirwa dumbu dumbu rakaitirwa chokudya. Asi Mwari achazviparadza zvose zviri zviviri Muviri hausi wounzenza asi ndowaTenzi, Tenziwo ndewe muviri" 
1Corinthians6:14 Mwari akamutsa Tenzi uye achatimutsawo nesimba rake. 
1Corinthians6:15 Hamuzivi here kuti miviri yenyu inhengo dzaKristu? Zvino ndingatore here nhengo dzomuviri waKristu ndichidziita nhengo dzomuviri wepfambi? Hazvimbofa zvakaitika. 
1Corinthians6:16 Hamuzivi here kuti munhu anozvibatanidza nepfambi anobva ava muviri mumwechete nepfambi? Sokunyorwa kwazvakaitwa zvichinzi, “Vaviri ivavo vachava nyama imwechete.”" 
1Corinthians6:17 Munhuwo anobatana naTenzi anova mweya mumwechete naye 
1Corinthians6:18 Sianayi noupombwe. Zvimwe zvitadzo zvose zvinoitwa nomunhu zviri kunze komuviri asi munhu anoita zvoupombwe anotadzira muviri wake. 
1Corinthians6:19 Hamuzivi here kuti muviri wenyu itemberi yaMweya Mutsvene ari mamuri anobva kuna Mwari? Hamusirimi muridzi wezvamuri. 
1Corinthians6:20 Makatengwa nomutengo. Naizvozvo rumbidzai Mwari mumuviri wenyu. 
1Corinthians7:1 Panyaya dzamakanyora, zvakanaka kuti murume arege zvake kumbobata munhukadzi." 
1Corinthians7:2 Asi pamusana peupombwe huriko, murume oga oga anofanira kuva nomukadzi wake uyewo mukadzi mumwe nomumwe anofanira kuva nomurume wake." 
1Corinthians7:3 Murume anofanira kupa mukadzi wake zvaanofanira kumupa somurume wake, ndizvozvowo nomukadzi kumurume wake." 
1Corinthians7:4 Mukadzi haana simba pamusoro pomuviri wake asi murume wake; murumewo haana simba pamusoro pomuviri wake asi mukadzi wake. 
1Corinthians7:5 Regai kunyimana, kunze kokunge mabvumirana kuregera kwechinguva, kuti mumbonamata, asi mozodzokerana zvakare nokuti Satani angadaro akakuedzai nokutadza kuzvibata." 
1Corinthians7:6 Handisi kutaura izvi kwamuri somutemo asi kukubairai zanhi. 
1Corinthians7:7 Ini ndingatoda kuti dai vanhu vose vakaita zvandakaita ini. Zvakadaro zvazvo, vanhu vose vakapiwa zvipo zvakasiyana — siyana, munhu nomunhu achipiwa naMwari chipo chisina vamwe." 
1Corinthians7:8 Kuna vasina kuroora nechirikadzi, ndinoti zviri nani kwavari kuramba vasina kuwana sezvandiri." 
1Corinthians7:9 Asi kana vasingakwanisi kuzvibata ngavawane nokuti zvirinani kuwana pano kutsva nehavi. 
1Corinthians7:10 Kuna vakaroorana ndinopa murawo, kwete ini asi Tenzi, wokuti mudzimai haafaniri kusiyana nomurume wake." 
1Corinthians7:11 Asi akasiyana naye ngaarambe asina murume, kana kuti ngaadzokerane nomurume wake. Murumewo ngaarege kuramba mukadzi wake." 
1Corinthians7:12 Kuna vamwe imi mose, ini, kwete Tenzi, ndinoti kana hama munamati ino mudzimai asiri mutendi asi anobvuma zvake kugara naye, haafaniri kumuramba." 
1Corinthians7:13 Mudzimaiwo, kana aine murume asiri mutendi anobvuma zvake kugara naye haafaniri kumuramba." 
1Corinthians7:14 Chikonzero chacho ndechokuti murume asingatendi anoitwa mutsvene pamusana pomukadzi wake uyewo mukadzi asingatendi anoitwa mutsvene pamusana pomurume wake. Dai zvisina kudaro vana venyu vangadai vakan'ora asi sezvazviri, vatsvene." 
1Corinthians7:15 Asi kana uyo asingatendi achida kuti vasiyane, ngavasiyane. Pakadaro hama munamati yakasununguka nokuti Mwari akatidanira rugare." 
1Corinthians7:16 Iwe mudzimai ungazive sei kuti zvimwe uchaponesa murume wako? Newewo murume ungazive sei kuti zvimwe uchaponesa mudzimai wako? 
1Corinthians7:17 Chiripo zvacho ndechokuti munhu wose ngaagare upenyu hwaakapiwa naTenzi uye hwaakadaidzirwa naMwari. Iwoyo ndiwo mutemo wangu mumasangano ose. 
1Corinthians7:18 Pano munhu akanga akadzingiswa here panguva yaakadaidzwa? Ngaarege kuvanziridza kudzingiswa kwake. Pana akanga asina kudzingiswa here panguva yaakadaidzwa? Ngaarege kudzingiswa. 
1Corinthians7:19 Kudzingiswa kana kusadzingiswa hakuna zvakunoreva asi kuchengeta mitemo yaMwari. 
1Corinthians7:20 Munhu wose ngaarambe ari zvaakanga ari paakadaidzwa. 
1Corinthians7:21 Wakanga uri muranda here pawakadanwa, hazvina mhosva, asi kana uchigona kuwana rusununguko rwako chawawana batisisa, zvisunungure." 
1Corinthians7:22 Chiripo ndechokuti muranda anenge adaidzwa muna Tenzi, munhu akasununguka waTenzi. Ndizvozvowo nomunhu akadanwa iye akasununguka, muranda waKristu." 
1Corinthians7:23 Imi makatengwa nomutengo, musave varanda vavanhu." 
1Corinthians7:24 Naizvozvo hama dzangu munhu zvaakadaidzwa naMwari akaita, ngaarambe akaita saizvozvo." 
1Corinthians7:25 Kuna vasina kuwana handina mutemo waTenzi asi ndinokupai zvandinofunga somunhu anovimbika chiri chipo chenyasha dzaTenzi. 
1Corinthians7:26 Ndinofunga kuti nenhamo dziriko iye zvino, zviri nani kuti munhu arambe ari zvaari." 
1Corinthians7:27 Wakabatanidzwa nomukadzi here? Usatsvake kusunungurwa. Hauna kuwanana nomukadzi here, usatsvake zvokuwana." 
1Corinthians7:28 Asi ukawana hauna kupara chitadzo. Musikanawo akawanikwa haana kupara chitadzo. Asi vanoroorana, nhamo dzapasi dzoupenyu ndedzavo. Ndingade kuti ndikudzivirirei kunhamo dzakadaro." 
1Corinthians7:29 Zvandinoreva ndezvizvi, hama dzangu, nguva yakatemwa iya yava pedyo pedyo. Kubvira iye zvino zvichienda mberi vana vadzimai ngavagare savasina." 
1Corinthians7:30 Uye vaya vanochema ngavaite savasiri kuchema. Vanofarawo ngavaite sevasiri kufara. Uye vanotenga ngavaite savasina zvinhu. 
1Corinthians7:31 Vane zvokuita nezvenyika ngavaite savasinei nezvenyika nokuti nyika sezvairi iri kupfuura. 
1Corinthians7:32 Ndingade kuti pasave nechinokushungurudzai mumwoyo. Murume asina kuroora ane shungu nezvaTenzi kuti angafadze Tenzi sei. Asi murume akaroora mwoyo wake uri kune zvapanyika kuti angafadze mudzimai wake sei. 
1Corinthians7:33 Munhu ane mwoyo miviri. Mukadzi asina kuroorwa kana kuti mhandara, ano shungu nezvaTenzi kuti ave mutsvene mumuviri nomumweya." 
1Corinthians7:34 Asi mukadzi akaroorwa mwoyo wake uri kune zvenyika kuti angafadze sei murume wake. 
1Corinthians7:35 Ndinotaura izvi kuti ndikubatsirei, kwete kuti ndiwane chandinokurambidzai asi kuti pave nokuita kune mwero uye kuti muve nomwoyo mumwechete kuna Tenzi." 
1Corinthians7:36 Kana murume achiona kuti haasikuzvibata kumusikana wake. Kana havi dzake dzanyanya uye pane zvinofanira kuitwa ngaaite zvaari kuda kuita, ngaaroore. Hapana chakaipa." 
1Corinthians7:37 Asi munhu akanyatsofunga mumwoyo make kurega kuroora asina amumanikidza achinyatsoziva zvaari kuita, anyatsozvironga mumwoyo make kusaroora musikana wake, anoita zvakanaka." 
1Corinthians7:38 Naizvozvo munhu anoroora musikana wake anoita zvakanaka uyewo munhu asingaroori anotoita zviri nani. 
1Corinthians7:39 Kana murume achiri mupenyu mudzimai anosungwa nomurawo wokuramba akabatana nomurume wake, asi murume wake akafa, akasununguka kuroorwa nomurume waanoda asi ngazviitwe muna Tenzi." 
1Corinthians7:40 Asi sokuona kwangu angatova munhu akakomborerwa zvake akaramba ari zvaari izvozvo. Ndinofunga kuti ndina Mweya waMwari. 
1Corinthians8:1 Panyaya yechokudya chakapirwa kuna vamwari vasirivo tinoziva kuti tose tine ruzivo nazvo. Ruzivo runotutumadza munhu asi rudo ndirwo runovaka munhu. 
1Corinthians8:2 Kana munhu achiti ndinoziva, haazivi sokuziva kwaanofanira kuita." 
1Corinthians8:3 Asi kana munhu achida Mwari, anozivikanwawo naye." 
1Corinthians8:4 Saizvozvo pane zvechokudya chakapirwa kunavamwari vasirivo, tinoziva kuti pasi pano chinonzi mwari asiri iye hakuna uye kuti hakuna mumwe mwari kusiya mumwechete." 
1Corinthians8:5 Kunyange variko zvavo vanonzi vamwari kudenga kana panyika varikowo zvechokwadi vanonzi vamwari vakawanda navanonzi vanatenzi vakawanda. 
1Corinthians8:6 Asi kwatiri isu, kunongova naMwari mumwechete Baba kwakabva zvinhu zvose. Ndiyewo watakasikirwa naTenzi mumwechete Jesu Kristu. Zvinhu zvose zvakasikwa nemaari iye kana iyesu takasikwa nemaari." 
1Corinthians8:7 Asi havasi vose vano ruzivo irworwo asi vamwe nokutojairirana navamwari vasirivo, vanodya chokudya ichocho sokunge chakapirwa zvechokwadi kunamwari asiriye. Zvino pamusana pehana dzavo nhete vanobva vasvibiswa." 
1Corinthians8:8 Asi chokudya hachisvitsi munhu pedyo naMwari. Hapana chatinorasikirwa nacho kana tikarega zvedu kudya uyewo hapana chatinowana kana tikadya. 
1Corinthians8:9 Asi chenjerai kuti rusununguko rwenyu irworwo rurege kuva chigumburo kuna vasina kusimba. 
1Corinthians8:10 Ndinodaro nokuti munhu akakuona iwe uno ruzivo uri pakudya mutemberi yavamwari vasiri ivo haazokurudzirwa here kana ari uya wehana nhete kuti adye chokudya chakapirwa kuna vamwari vasiri ivo? 
1Corinthians8:11 Saizvozvo noruzivo rwako, munhu uyu wehana nhete anoparadzwa, hama yakatofirwa naKristu." 
1Corinthians8:12 Nezvo nokutadzira hama dzako kudaro uchikuvadza hana dzadzo kana dziri nhete uri kutotadzira Kristu. 
1Corinthians8:13 Naizvozvo kana chokudya chichikonzera kuti hama yangu iputsike handimbofa ndakadya nyama kuti ndirege kukonzera hama yangu kuputsika. 
1Corinthians9:1 Handisi munhu akasununguka here? Handisi mupositori here? Handina kuona Jesu Kristu Tenzi wedu here? Imi hamusi muchero webasa rangu here muna Tenzi? 
1Corinthians9:2 Kana ndisiri mupositori kuna vamwe asi kwamuri ndiri mupositori nokuti imi ndimi chokuratidza nacho kuti ndiri mupositori muna Tenzi. 
1Corinthians9:3 Izvi ndizvo zvandingazvidzivirire nazvo kana vanhu vavakunditsoropodza. 
1Corinthians9:4 Hatina mvumo here nechokudya chedu nechokunwa chedu? 
1Corinthians9:5 Hatina mvumo here yokuperekedzwa nomukadzi hama savamwe vapositori kana vakomanavanun'una vaTenzi uye Kefasi 
1Corinthians9:6 kana kuti ini naBhanabhasi chete ndisu tisina mvumo yokurega kushandira chokutiraramisa? 
1Corinthians9:7 Ndoupi murwi wehondo anoita basa rake romuhondo iye achizviriritira. Ndiani anosima munda wamagirepisi asingadyi muchero wawo? Ndiani anofudza zvipfuo asingadyi mukaka wazvo? 
1Corinthians9:8 Ko izvi ndiri kungotaura zvokungotaurawo somunhu here? Mutemo haudarowo here? 
1Corinthians9:9 Ndinodaro nokuti zvakanyorwa mumutemo waMosesi zvichinzi, “Usaise dhonza matomu kana richitsokodzera mbeswa.” Mwari anongova nehanya namadhonza chete here?" 
1Corinthians9:10 Haasi kungotaura nezvedu chete here? Zvakanyorerwa isu nokuti murimi anofanira kurima nechitarisiro nomupuri anopura nechitarisiro chokuwana chaanowana pane zvaanokohwa. 
1Corinthians9:11 Zvino kana takadyara zvinhu zvakanaka zvomweya pakati penyu kungave kunyanyisa here tikakohwa zvimwe zvinhu zvenyu? 
1Corinthians9:12 Kana vamwe vane mvumo iyoyo pamuri ko isu hatina mvumo iyoyo kutovapfuura here? Zvakadaro zvazvo isu hatina kushandisa mvumo yedu iyoyo. Tinotirira zvose panze pokuisa chipingidzo munzira yeShoko Rakanaka raKristu. 
1Corinthians9:13 Hamuzivi here kuti vanoshanda muTemberi vanowana chokudya chavo kubva muTemberi. Vanoshandawo paatari vanowana mugove wavo pazvibayiro zvinopirwa izvozvo. 
1Corinthians9:14 Saizvozvowo Tenzi akati vanoparidza Shoko Rakanaka vanofanira kuwana zvinovararamisa kubva kuShoko Rakanaka. 
1Corinthians9:15 Asi ini handina kushandisa mvumo yezvinhu zvose izvozvo. Uye handisi kunyorera kuti ndizviwanire izvozvo. Ini ndingatosarudza kufa pano kuti munhu anditorere chinondipa chacho kuzvirova dundundu. 
1Corinthians9:16 Nokuti kana ndikaparidza Shoko Rakanaka hazvisiri izvo zvinondipa kuti ndizvirove dundundu nokuti ibasa randinofanira kuita. Hameno zvangu kana ndikarega kuparidza Shoko Rakanaka! 
1Corinthians9:17 Dai kuri kuti ndinoita izvi nokuda kwangu ndingadai ndiine mubayiro asi kana kusiri kuda kwangu ndinongoriitawo sebasa randakapiwa. Ko zvino mubayiro wangu ndeweiko? 
1Corinthians9:18 Ndouya wokuti ndiparidze Shoko Rakanaka pasina muripo, ndisingagamuchiri zvandinokodzera pamusana pokuparidza Shoko Rakanaka." 
1Corinthians9:19 Kunyange ndisiri muranda waani zvake, ndakazviita muranda wavose kuti ndiwane vakawanda." 
1Corinthians9:20 KuvaJudha ndakazviita somuJudha kuti ndiwane vaJudha. Kuna vari pasi pomutemo ndakazviita sendiri pasiwo pomutemo kunyange zvazvo ndakanga ndisiri pasi pomutemo kuti ndiwane vakanga vari pasi pomutemo. 
1Corinthians9:21 Kuna vari kunze komutemo ndakaita sendiri kunze komutemo asi kwete somunhu ari kunze komutemo kuna Mwari asi ndiri pasi pomutemo waKristu kuti ndiwane vari kunze komutemo. 
1Corinthians9:22 Kuna vasina simba ndakava munhu asina simba kuti ndiwane vasina simba. Ndakava zvinhu zvose kuna vose kuti napose pandinogona, ndinunure vamwe vavo." 
1Corinthians9:23 Zvose izvozvo ndinozviitira Shoko Rakanaka kuti ndigowanawo zvandinowana muzvikomborero zvaro. 
1Corinthians9:24 Hamuzivisu kuti pamakundano okumhanya vamhanyi vose vanokwikwidzana asi mumwechete ndiye anowana mubayiro? Saizvozvo mhanyai kuti muuwane. 
1Corinthians9:25 Mumhanyi wose anozvibata muna zvose. Vanozviita kuti vawane ndaza inoparara asi isu tinozviitira ndaza isingaparari. 
1Corinthians9:26 Saka handingomhanya chimhanyemhanye. Handirove zvibhakera somunhu anorova mhepo. 
1Corinthians9:27 Ndinorova muviri wangu ndichiutonga ndichiitira kuti ndirege kuraswa, ini ndakamboparidzira vamwe." 
1Corinthians10:1 Hama ndingade kuti muzive kuti madzitateguru edu ose akanga ari pasi pegore. Uye vose vakapfuura nomugungwa. 
1Corinthians10:2 Vose vakabatanidzwa naMosesi nokuombekwa kwavakaitwa mugore nomugungwa. 
1Corinthians10:3 Vose vakadya chokudya chezvomweya; vose vakanwa chokunwa chezvomweya nokuti vakanwa padombo rezvomweya raivatevera. 
1Corinthians10:4 Dombo iroro raiva Kristu. 
1Corinthians10:5 Asi Mwari haana kufadzwa navazhinji vavo nokuti vakaitwa gatakata kuraiwa murenje. 
1Corinthians10:6 Zvino izvi zvinotiyambira kuti tirege kudokwairira zvakaipa sezvavakaita. 
1Corinthians10:7 Musanamate vamwari vasirivo sezvakaita vamwe vavo. Ndokusaka zvakanyorwa zvichinzi: “Vanhu vakagara pasi vachidya nokunwa vakasimuka votamba.” 
1Corinthians10:8 Hatifaniri kuita zvounzenza sezvakaita vamwe vavo pakafa zviuru makumi maviri ane zvitatu pazuva rimwechetero. 
1Corinthians10:9 Hatifaniri kuedza Tenzi sezvakaitwa navamwe vavo vakauraiwa nenyoka. 
1Corinthians10:10 Hamufaniri kunyunyuta sezvakaita vamwe vavo vakaparadzwa noMuparadzi. 
1Corinthians10:11 Izvi zvakaitika kwavari seyambiro asi zvakanyorerwa kuti zvitidzidzise isu tiri panguva yamagumo apasi. 
1Corinthians10:12 Naizvozvo munhu wose anofunga kuti akamira ngaazvingwarire nokuti angadaro akaputsika. 
1Corinthians10:13 Hamuna kumbova nechiedzo chisina kumbowira vamwe. Mwari akatendeka. Haakuregei muchiedzwa zvinopfuura simba renyu. Pamwe nechiedzo anopawo nzira yokupukunyuka nayo kuti ukwanise kuchirwisa. 
1Corinthians10:14 Naizvozvo, hama dzangu, siyanai nokunamata vamwari vasivo." 
1Corinthians10:15 Ini ndiri kutaura kuvanhu vanonzwisisa zvionereiwo pachenyu zvandiri kutaura. 
1Corinthians10:16 Mukombe wokutenda watinokomborera hakusi kunwidzana ropa raKristu here. Ko chingwa chatinomedura hakusi kudyidzana muviri waKristu here? 
1Corinthians10:17 Pamusana pokuti pane chingwa chimwechete, isu takawanda kudai, tiri muviri mumwechete nokuti tinodya chingwa chimwechete." 
1Corinthians10:18 Tarisai muone vaIsiraeri kuti, savanhu vaya vanodya chibayiro havasikubatana here paatari?" 
1Corinthians10:19 Ko zvino ndiri kurevei nazvo? Ndiri kureva kuti chokudya chakapirwa kunavamwari vasivo chinhu chinebasa here? Kana kuti mwari asiriye chinhu here? 
1Corinthians10:20 Kwete, zvandiri kureva ndezvizvi zvokuti zvavanopira vanopira kumweya yakaipa kwete kuna Mwari. Ini handidi kuti mudyidzane nemweya yakaipa." 
1Corinthians10:21 Hamunganwi mukombe waTenzi nomukombe wemweya yakaipa. Hamugoni kudya patafura yaTenzi muchizondodyirawo patafura yemweya yakaipa. 
1Corinthians10:22 Asi tinoda kudenha shanje dzaTenzi here? Takasimba kupinda iye here? 
1Corinthians10:23 Zvinhu zvose zvingave zvazvo zvinobvumirwa asi handizvose zvinobatsira. Zvinhu zvose zvingave zvazvo zvinobvumirwa asi handizvose zvinovaka. 
1Corinthians10:24 Munhu ngaarege kufunga zvinobatsira iye pachake chete asi ngaafunge zvinobatsira mumwe wake. 
1Corinthians10:25 Unogona kudya nyama iri yose inotengeswa pamusika usingabvunzi chinhu kuitira hana yako. 
1Corinthians10:26 Chikonzero chacho ndechokuti nyika ndeyaTenzi nazvose zvirimo mairi. 
1Corinthians10:27 Kana mumwe munhu asiri mutendi akakukoka kundodya iwe uchikwanisa kuenda, idya chose chaanokupa usina kubvunza kuitira hana yako." 
1Corinthians10:28 Asi mumwe munhu akati kwauri ichi chakapirwa sechibayiro, pakadaro apo, pamusana pomunhu akutaurira, uye kuitirawo hana," 
1Corinthians10:29 ndinoreva hana yake kwete yako, rega kuchidya. Ungati, “Rusununguko rwangu rwatadziswa kusvika parunoda here pamusana pehana yomumwe?" 
1Corinthians10:30 Ko kana ndichitenda Mwari pakudya ndinopirwei mhosva chokudya chandinodya ndatenda?” 
1Corinthians10:31 Nokudaro kunyange ukadya kana kunwa kana kuita chimwe chinhu, zviite zvose kurumbidza Mwari." 
1Corinthians10:32 Asi usakanganise vaJudha kana vaGiriki kana Sangano raMwari. 
1Corinthians10:33 Sezvandinoita ini kuedza kufadza vanhu vose muna zvose zvandaiita ndisingazviitire ini asi kubatsira voruzhinji kuti vaponeswe. 
1Corinthians11:1 Nditevedzerei sokutevedzerawo kwandinoita Kristu. 
1Corinthians11:2 Ndinokurumbidzai nokundiyeuka kwenyu muna zvose uye nokuchengeta kwenyu magamuchidzanwa sokukudzidzisai kwandakaita. 
1Corinthians11:3 Asi ndinoda kuti muzive kuti Kristu ndiye musoro womurume oga oga, murumewo ndiye musoro womukadzi wake, Mwari ari iye musoro waKristu." 
1Corinthians11:4 Saka murume anonamata kana kuporofita akafukidza musoro anozvishoresa musoro wake. 
1Corinthians11:5 Asi mukadzi wose anonamata kana kuporofita asina kufukidza musoro anozvishoresa musoro wake. Zvakangofanana nokunge akaveurwa musoro wose. 
1Corinthians11:6 Kana mukadzi asingazvifukidzi musoro ngaaveure vhudzi rake. Zvino kana zviri zvakafumuka kuti mukadzi aguswe kana kuveurwa, ngaazvifukidze musoro nevhoiri." 
1Corinthians11:7 Murume haafaniri kuzvifukidza musoro nokuti iye mufananidzo nembiri yaMwari. Asi mukadzi imbiri yomurume," 
1Corinthians11:8 nokuti murume haana kuitwa achibva pamukadzi asi mukadzi akaitwa achibva pamurume. 
1Corinthians11:9 Uye murume haana kusikirwa mukadzi asi mukadzi akasikirwa murume. 
1Corinthians11:10 Pamusana paizvozvo mukadzi anofanira kuva nevhoiri mumusoro pamusana pavatumwa. 
1Corinthians11:11 Zvakadaro zvazvo, muna Tenzi, mukadzi haagoni kuvapo pasina murume, murumewo haagoni kuvapo pasina mukadzi." 
1Corinthians11:12 Sokuitwa kwakaitwa mukadzi achibva kumurume saizvozvowo murume anoberekwa nomukadzi. Asi vose vanobva kuna Mwari. 
1Corinthians11:13 Munozvionawo sei, zvinokodzera here kuti mukadzi anamate kuna Mwari asina kufukidza musoro?" 
1Corinthians11:14 Ko iwo masikirwo akaitwa zvinhu pachawo haakudzidzisei here kuti, zvokuti murume achengete vhudzi refu, hazvimupi chimiro" 
1Corinthians11:15 asi mukadzi akachengeta vhudzi refu ndizvo zvinotomudadisa nokuti akapiwa vhudzi rakareba kuti chive chokuzvifukidza nacho. 
1Corinthians11:16 Kana pane wenharo ndezvake; asi isu kana masangano aMwari hapana imwe tsika yatinoziva. 
1Corinthians11:17 Pane zvandavakukudzidzisai iye zvino handikurumbidzei nokuti pamunoungana hapana chakanaka asi zvakaipa zvoga zvoga. 
1Corinthians11:18 Ndinodaro nokuti, chokutanga, kana maungana sesangano ndinonzwa kuti pano kukamukana kuita mapato mapato pakati penyu. Ndingangozvibvuma izvozvo," 
1Corinthians11:19 nokuti mapato anofanira kuvapo kuti vakatendeka pakati penyu vaonekwe. 
1Corinthians11:20 Kana pamunoungana hachisi chirariro chaTenzi chamunodya, nokuti pamunenge mava kudya mumwe nomumwe anozvidyira chokudya chake." 
1Corinthians11:21 Mumwe anenge ane nzara asi mumwe akadhakwa. 
1Corinthians11:22 Ndochii ichocho; hamuna dzimba dzokudyira nokunwira kana kuti kushora sangano raMwari here kana kuti kuda kudukupisa vasina chavanacho? Ndoti kudiiko kwamuri? Ndokurumbidzai here? Kwete handingakurumbidzei. 
1Corinthians11:23 Nokuti zvandakagamuchira zvichibva kuna Tenzi Jesu ndizvo zvandakakugamuchidzaiwo zvokuti Tenzi Jesu, usiku hwaakapandukirwa, akatora chingwa," 
1Corinthians11:24 akatenda ndokuchimedura akati uyu muviri wangu unopirirwa imi. Itai izvi kuti mundiyeuke nazvo. 
1Corinthians11:25 Akaita zvimwechetezvo nomukombe mushure mechirariro, akati uyu Mukombe wechitenderano chitsva muropa rangu. Itai izvi panguva dzose dzamunounwa kuti mundiyeuke." 
1Corinthians11:26 Nokuti panguva dzose dzamunodya chingwa ichi nokunwa mukombe uyu munoparidza rufu rwaTenzi kusvikira auya. 
1Corinthians11:27 Naizvozvo, ani naani anodya chingwa ichi nokunwa mukombe waTenzi asingakodzeri achapara mhosva yokun'oresa muviri neropa raTenzi." 
1Corinthians11:28 Saka munhu ngaatange azviongorora ndokuzoti odya chingwa ichocho nokunwa mukombe iwoyo. 
1Corinthians11:29 Nokuti aninani anodya nokunwa asinganyatsoziva kuti muviri anozvidyira nokuzvinwira kutongwa. 
1Corinthians11:30 Ndizvo zvinopa vamwe venyu kuva vanhu vasina simba uye vanorwara; vamwe vakatofa. 
1Corinthians11:31 Asi tikanyatsozviongorora hatizotongwa. 
1Corinthians11:32 Isu tinotongwa nokurangwa naTenzi kuti tirege kuzonzi tine mhosva pamwechete nenyika. 
1Corinthians11:33 Naizvozvo hama dzangu kana moungana kuzodya, miriranai." 
1Corinthians11:34 Kana pane anonzwa nzara ngaadyire kumusha kuti murege kuzopiwa mhosva pamunoungana. Zvimwe zvasara izvi ndichazvigadzira ndauyako. 
1Corinthians12:1 Panyaya yezvipo zvaMweya, hama dzangu, handingadi kuti munge musingazivi." 
1Corinthians12:2 Munonyatsoziva kuti pamakanga muchiri vahedheni makateteretswa kunavamwari vasingatauri zvisinei kuti makaendeswa ikoko sei. 
1Corinthians12:3 Naizvozvo ndinoda kuti munzwisise kuti hapana munhu anotaura ainaMweya waMwari kuti Jesu ngaave norushambwa. Hapanawo angati Jesu ndiTenzi iye asina Mweya Mutsvene. 
1Corinthians12:4 Kune mhando dzakasiyana — siyana dzezvipo asi anozvipa ndiye Mweya mumwecheteyo. 
1Corinthians12:5 Kune mhando dzamabasa dzakasiyana — siyana asi Tenzi ndiye mumwechete. 
1Corinthians12:6 Kune mhando dzokushanda kwakasiyana — siyana asi Mwari ndiye mumwechete anozvifemera muna vose. 
1Corinthians12:7 Mune mumwe nomumwe munoonekwa kuti muna Mweya Mutsvene anoshanda maari kuti zvibatsire ruzhinji. 
1Corinthians12:8 Mumwe anopiwa, nomuna Mweya Mutsvene, kutaura noungwaru; mumwewo achipiwa kutaura noruzivo zvichibva kuna Mweya mumwecheteyo;" 
1Corinthians12:9 mumwewo chipo chechitendero chinobva kuna Mweya mumwecheteyo. Mumwewo chipo chokurapa chinopiwa naMweya mumwecheteyo. 
1Corinthians12:10 Kuno mumwe chipo chokuita zvishamiso; kuno mumwewo chipo chokuporofita; mumwewo achipiwa chipo chokusiyanisa mweya yakaipa neyakanaka; kuno mumwewo chipo chokutaura nendimi dzakasiyana — siyana; mumwewo chipo chokududzira ndimi. 
1Corinthians12:11 Zvose izvozvi zvinofemerwa naMweya mumwecheteyo anogovera munhu nomunhu sokuda kwake. 
1Corinthians12:12 Sezvakangoita muviri kuti mumwechete, asi uine nhengo dzakawanda uye kuti nenhengo dzose idzodzo dzomuviri, kunyange dzakawanda kudaro, muviri mumwechete, ndizvo zvimwechetezvo naKristu." 
1Corinthians12:13 Chikonzero ndechokuti nokuombekwa kwatakaitwa naMweya mumwechete, tose takaombekwa mumuviri mumwechete, vangave vaJudha kana kuti vaGiriki, vangave varanda kana vasununguki tose takanwa Mweya mumwechete." 
1Corinthians12:14 Muviri hausi mutezo mumwechete asi mizhinji. 
1Corinthians12:15 Dai kuri kuti tsoka inoti nokuti handisi ruoko, saka handisi womuviri; hazviiti kuti isave yomuviri." 
1Corinthians12:16 Dai kuri kutiwo nzeve inoti nokuti handisi ziso, handisi womuviri; hazviiti kuti isave yomuviri." 
1Corinthians12:17 Dai muviri wose waingova ziso roga kunzwa, waizonzwa nei? Dai muviri wose waingova nzeve yoga kunhuwidza, waizonhuwidza nei?" 
1Corinthians12:18 Asi sezvazviri, iye zvino, Mwari akaronganisa mitezo yomuviri, mumwe nomumwe wayo sokuda kwake." 
1Corinthians12:19 Dai kuri kuti muviri wose waingova mutezo mumwechete, muviri waizova papi." 
1Corinthians12:20 Sezvazviri, iye zvino, kune mitezo yakawanda asi muviri uri mumwechete." 
1Corinthians12:21 Ziso harigoni kuti kuruoko, “Handina basa newe;” kanawo musoro kuti uti kumakumbo, “Handina basa nemi.”" 
1Corinthians12:22 Asi zvinotovapo ndezvizvi zvokuti mitezo yomuviri inoita seisina kusimba ndiyo isingafaniri kushaika. 
1Corinthians12:23 Uye, mitezo yomuviri yatinoona seisingakudzikani, ndiyo yatinonyatsoremekedza. Mitezo inonyadzisa inoremekedzwa zvakatoti," 
1Corinthians12:24 zvisingadiwe nemitezo yedu isinganyadzisi. Asi Mwari akanyatsogadzira muviri, achipa rukudzo kune mutezo usina basa guru;" 
1Corinthians12:25 izvi kuri kuti parege kuva nokupesana mumuviri asi kuti mitezo ienzane pakuchengetana. 
1Corinthians12:26 Kana mumwe mutezo ukarwadziwa yose inorwadziwa pamwechete. Kana mumwe mutezo ukakudzwa yose inofara pamwechete. 
1Corinthians12:27 Zvino imi ndimi muviri waKristu uye mumwe nomumwe wenyu mutezo womuviri iwoyo. 
1Corinthians12:28 Mwari akapa vanhu mabasa musangano sezvizvi, vokutanga vapositori, vechipiri vaporofita, vetatu vadzidzisi kouya vaiti vezvishamiso koti varapi kozoti vabatsiri navafambisi vamabasa navatauri vendimi dzakasiyana — siyana." 
1Corinthians12:29 Ko vose vapositori here? Ko vose vaporofita here? Ko vose vadzidzisi here? Ko vose vanoita zvishamiso here? 
1Corinthians12:30 Ko vanhu vose here vane zvipo zvokurapa? Ko vanhu vose here vane chipo chendimi? Ko vanhu vose here vanodudzira? 
1Corinthians12:31 Asi disisai kuva nezvipo zvikuru. Ini ndichakuratidzai nzira yakatonyanyonakisisa. 
1Corinthians13:1 Kunyange zvangu ndikataura nendimi dzavanhu kana dzavatumwa asi ini ndisina rudo ndinongova dare rinorira kana makwakwakwa esimbi anorira. 
1Corinthians13:2 Kunyange ndiine chipo chokuporofita ndichinzwisisa zvakavandika zvose, ndiine ruzivo rwose; kunyange dai ndiine chitendero chakaperera chinosudurudza makomo asi ndisina rudo hapana zvandiri." 
1Corinthians13:3 Kunyange dai ndikagovera zvose zvandinazvo uye kunyange ndikapa muviri wangu kuti upiswe asi ndisina rudo hapana chandinowana. 
1Corinthians13:4 Rudo runo mwoyo murefu, rune mutsa; rudo haruna shanje uye haruzvitutumadzi haruzvikudzi." 
1Corinthians13:5 Haruiti zvisina hunhu. Rudo harungongwarira zvarwo bedzi; rudo harungoshatirwa shatirwa nhando, haruna pfundepfunde." 
1Corinthians13:6 Rudo harufariri zvisakarurama asi runofarira zviri pachokwadi. 
1Corinthians13:7 Rudo runotakura zvose. Runoramba ruine chitendero. Runoramba ruine chitarisiro, harurasi mwoyo runotirira zvose." 
1Corinthians13:8 Rudo harumboperi. Kuporofita kuchapera; kutaura nendimi kuchaguma. Ruzivo ruchapfuura," 
1Corinthians13:9 nokuti ruzivo rwedu haruna kuzara. Kuporofita kwedu hakuna kuzara. 
1Corinthians13:10 Zvino kana chakazara chouya, chisina kuzara chiya chinobva chapera basa." 
1Corinthians13:11 Pandakanga ndichiri mwana muduku ndaitaura somwana muduku; ndaifunga somwana mudiki ndairangarira somwana muduku asi pandakazova murume mukuru ndakakanda pasi zvohwana huduku. 
1Corinthians13:12 Pari zvino tinoona muchiringiriro zvamadzerere. Asi mune ramangwana tichaonanazve uso nouso. Iye zvino ndinoziva zvishoma asi mune ramangwana ndichanyatsoziva sokunyatsozivikanwa kwandakaitwa. 
1Corinthians13:13 Saka chitendero nechitarisiro norudo zviripo zviri zvitatu, asi chikuru chazvo rudo." 
1Corinthians14:1 Rudo ngaruve ndicho chinangwa chenyu muvavarire kwazvo kuwana zvipo zvomweya zvikuru kuti muporofite. 
1Corinthians14:2 Chikonzero chacho ndechokuti anotaura norurimi rusingazivikanwi haatauri kuvanhu asi kuna Mwari nokuti hapana anomunzwisisa asi anotaura zvakavandika muna Mweya. 
1Corinthians14:3 Asi uyo anoporofita anotaura kuvanhu zvinovavaka nokuvakurudzira nokuvanyaradza. 
1Corinthians14:4 Anotaura norurimi rusingaziikanwi anozvisimbisa iye pachake asi uyo anoporofita anosimbisa sangano. 
1Corinthians14:5 Zvino ndingade zvangu kuti mose mutaure nendimi asi zvikuru kuti muporofite. Anoporofita mukuru kupinda anotaura nendimi dzisingazivikanwi kusatoti mumwe achiturikira kuti sangano risimbiswe. 
1Corinthians14:6 Ko zvino, nhai hama dzangu, ini ndingakubatsirei sei kana ndikauya kwamuri ndichitaura nendimi dzisingazikanwi kusatoti ndakuunzirai zvakanga zvakavandika kana kuti ruzivo kana kuti zvakaporofitwa kana chidzidziso." 
1Corinthians14:7 Kunyange zvinhu zvokuimbisa zvisina upenyu senyere kana dimbwa kana zvisingasiyanisi maungira azvinoburitsa munhu angazive sei rumbo rwuri kuimbwa? 
1Corinthians14:8 Kana hwamanda ikarira asi kurira kwayo kusina zvakunoreva kuvanhu ndiani angagadzirire kundorwa? 
1Corinthians14:9 Ndizvo zvimwechetezvo nemi kana mukataura nendimi dzisingazivikanwi, kozvino munhu angazive sei zvinotaurwa? Munenge muchitotaura kumhepo zvenyu." 
1Corinthians14:10 Ichokwadi kuti kune mitauro mizhinji yakasiyana — siyana pasi pano asi hapana usina zvaunoreva. 
1Corinthians14:11 Asi kana ndisingazivi zvinoreva mutauro iwoyo ndichava wechirudzi kumutauri uye mutauri achava wechirudziwo kwandiri. 
1Corinthians14:12 Ndizvo zvimwechete nemi, zvamunodisisa kuona zvinhu zvinoratidza kuti Mweya Mutsvene aripo, vavarirai kuvaka sangano." 
1Corinthians14:13 Naizvozvo anotaura nendimi dzisingazivikanwi ngaanamate kuti apiwe simba rokuturikira 
1Corinthians14:14 nokuti kana ndichinamata norurimi rusingazivikanwi, mweya wangu unonamata, asi pfungwa dzangu hadziwane muchero mazviri." 
1Corinthians14:15 Ko zvino ndoita sei? Ndichanamata nomweya uye ndichanamatawo nepfungwa dzangu. Ndichaimba nemweya wangu asi ndichaimbawo nepfungwa dzangu," 
1Corinthians14:16 nokuti ukatenda nemweya ko munhu asina kuzvidzidza angati, “Ameni” sei kumunamato wako wokutenda iye asingazivi zvauri kutaura?" 
1Corinthians14:17 Unogona kutenda zvakanakisisa zvako asi mumwe wako asina chaanobatsirwa nacho. 
1Corinthians14:18 Ndinotenda Mwari kuti ndinotaura nendimi dzisingazivikanwi kupfuura imi mose. 
1Corinthians14:19 Asi musangano ndingatoda kutaura mazwi mashanu ndichishandisa pfungwa dzangu kuti ndidzidzise vamwe pane kutaura mazwi zviuru gumi mururimi rusingazivikanwi. 
1Corinthians14:20 Hama dzangu musaite savana vaduku mukufunga kwenyu. Asi pakuita zvakaipa ivai zvenyu savana vaduku, asi pakufunga ivai vanhu vabve zero." 
1Corinthians14:21 Zvakanyorwa mubhuku romutemo zvichinzi; “Nomuvanhu vendimi dzisingazivikanwi uye nemiromo yeve chirudzi, ndichataura kuvanhu ava. Kunyange ipapo havambonditeerera,” ndizvo zvinotaura Tenzi." 
1Corinthians14:22 Nokudaro ndimi dzisingazivikanwi hachisi chiratidzo chavatendi asi chavasiri vatendi. Kuporofita hakusi kwavasingatendi asi kwavatendi. 
1Corinthians14:23 Dai kuri kuti sangano rose rinoungana vagotaura vose nendimi dzisingazivikanwi; vasina kuzvidzidzira kana vasiri vatendi vakapindamo, havazoti muri kupenga here?" 
1Corinthians14:24 Asi kana vose vachiporofita, asingatendi kana asina kudzidzira akapindamo anobva abaiwa mwoyo navose achibvuma mhosva dzake." 
1Corinthians14:25 Zvakavandika zviri mumwoyo make zvinobuda pachena naizvozvo anowira pasi nouso achinamata Mwari achitaura pachena kuti Mwari ari pakati penyu. 
1Corinthians14:26 Ko zvino poitwa sei hama? Pamunoungana, mumwe anenge ane rwiyo, mumwe ane chidzidzo, mumwewo ane zvaakaoneswa, nomumwewo anenge achitaura rurimi rusingazivikanwi kana kududzira, zvose ngazviitwe kuti zvivake sangano." 
1Corinthians14:27 Kana pane vanotaura nendimi dzisingazivikanwi, ngavave vaviri chete kana kuti vatatu vachiravana. Kana vatowandisa ngavave vatatu, uye vachipana nguva, mumwe achiturikira." 
1Corinthians14:28 Kana pasina anoturikira, vose ngavanyarare musangano, munhu achizvitaurira iye pachake uye achitaura kuna Mwari." 
1Corinthians14:29 Vaporofita ngavataure vaviri kana vatatu. Vamwe vachiongorora zvinotaurwa. 
1Corinthians14:30 Kana mumwe agere pasi akawana zvaanoratidzwa, wokutanga ngaanyarare" 
1Corinthians14:31 nokuti munokwanisa mose kuporofita muchitevedzana kuti vose vawane chavanodzidza; uye vose vakurudzirwe. 
1Corinthians14:32 Muporofita anofanira kuzvibata nemweya waanenge anawo pakuporofita," 
1Corinthians14:33 nokuti Mwari haasi Mwari wenyonganyonga asi worugare somumasangano ose avatsvene. 
1Corinthians14:34 Vakadzi ngavanyarare mumasangano nokuti havabvumirwi kutaura asi vanofanira kuzviisa pasi sokutaura kunoita mutemo. 
1Corinthians14:35 Kana pane chavanoda kuziva ngavabvunze varume vavo kumba, nokuti chinhu chinonyadzisa kuti mukadzi ataure musangano." 
1Corinthians14:36 Ko kutaura here ikoko? Ko iro shoko raMwari rakabva kwamuri here? Rakangosvika kwamuri moga here? 
1Corinthians14:37 Kana kune mumwe anofunga kuti muporofita kana kuti munhu wezvemweya, anofanira kuona kuti zvandiri kukunyorerai mutemo waTenzi." 
1Corinthians14:38 Kana munhu asingagamuchiri izvi naiyewo haagamuchirwi. 
1Corinthians14:39 Naizvozvo hama dzangu vavarirai kuporofita musarambidze kutaura nendimi dzisingazivikanwi. 
1Corinthians14:40 Asi zvinhu zvose ngazviitwe nomutoo kwawo zvakarongwawo zvakanaka. 
1Corinthians15:1 Hama dzangu ndingade kukuyeuchidzai Shoko Rakanaka randakakuparidzai ramakagamuchirawo ramumire naro 
1Corinthians15:2 rinokuponesai kana mukaribatisisa; kusatoti makatenda mariri pasina. 
1Corinthians15:3 Ndakakugamuchidzai sechinhu chikuru kwazvo chokutanga chandakanga ndakagamuchirawo chokuti Kristu akafira zvitadzo zvedu sokutaura kunoita Magwaro Matsvene," 
1Corinthians15:4 uye kuti akavigwa akamutswa nezuva retatu sokutaura kwamagwaro matsvene," 
1Corinthians15:5 uye kuti akazviratidza kuna Kefasi ndokuzozviratidzawo kuna vane gumi navairi. 
1Corinthians15:6 Akazozviratidza kune vehama vanopfuura mazana mashanu panguva imwecheteyo. Vazhinji vavo vachiri vapenyu kunyange zvazvo vamwe vakafa. 
1Corinthians15:7 Akazozviratidza kuna Jemusi ndokuzotevera kuvapositori vose. 
1Corinthians15:8 Pokupedzisira, sokune munhu akazvarwa nguva yake isati yasvika akazviratidzawo kwandiri." 
1Corinthians15:9 Chikonzero chacho ndechokuti ini ndiri wokupedzisira kuvapositori, ndisingakodzeri kudaidzwa kunzi mupositori nokuti ndakashusha sangano raMwari." 
1Corinthians15:10 Asi nenyasha dzaMwari ndiri zvandiri. Nyasha dzake kwandiri hadzina kushaya basa. Zvakatoitika ndezvokuti ndakashanda zvakaomarara kupinda vose. Kunyange zvazvo ndakanga ndisirini asi nyasha dzaMwari mandiri. 
1Corinthians15:11 Hazvina mhosva kuti ndivo here kana kuti ini, zvatinoparidza ndizvozvo uye ndizvo zvamakatenda." 
1Corinthians15:12 Ko zvino kana Kristu achiparidzwa kuti akamutswa kuvafi, ko vamwe venyu vangati hakuna zvokumuka kwavakafa sei?" 
1Corinthians15:13 Zvino kana pasina zvokumuka kwavakafa saka Kristu haana kumutswa. 
1Corinthians15:14 Kana Kristu asina kumutswa, kuparidza kwedu hakuna maturo uye chitendero chenyu hachina basa." 
1Corinthians15:15 Isu tinobva taonekwa kuti tiri kurevera Mwari nhema nokuti takapupurira Mwari kuti akamutsa Kristu waasina kumutsa kana chiri chokwadi kuti vakafa havamutswi. 
1Corinthians15:16 Chiripo ndechokuti, kana vakafa vasingamutswi, saizvozvowo Kristu haana kumutswa." 
1Corinthians15:17 Kana Kristu asina kumutswa, chitendero chenyu hachina basa uye muchiri muzvitadzo zvenyu." 
1Corinthians15:18 Naizvozvowo avo vakafa muna Kristu vakatsakatika. 
1Corinthians15:19 Muna Kristu kana tariro yedu ichingova mune zvoupenyu huno chete, pavanhu vose, ndisu vanhu vanonzwisa urombo zvikuru kwazvo." 
1Corinthians15:20 Asi chokwadi ndechokuti Kristu akamutswa kuvafi semichero yokutanga yaavo varere. 
1Corinthians15:21 Sokuuya kwakaita rufu nokumunhu mumwechete nokumunhu mumwechetewo kwakauya kumuka kwavakafa. 
1Corinthians15:22 Sokufa kunoita vanhu vose muna Adhamu, saizvozvowo muna Kristu vanhu vose vanomutswa." 
1Corinthians15:23 Asi mumwe nomumwe achamuka pachijanha chake, Kristu ari iye muchero wokutanga; kozoti, pakuuya kwake, vanhu vanenge vari vanhu vaKristu." 
1Corinthians15:24 Ndipo panozouya magumo panenge Kristu oturira umambo kuna Mwari Baba apedza kuparadza mweya mikuru mikuru youshe neyoukuru neyavanamasimba. 
1Corinthians15:25 Nokuti Kristu anofanira kutonga kusvikira Mwari aisa vavengi vake vose pasi petsoka dzake. 
1Corinthians15:26 Muvengi wokupedzisa anofanira kuparadzwa, rufu." 
1Corinthians15:27 Nokuti zvinonzi, “Mwari akaisa zvinhu zvose pasi petsoka dzake.” Zvino kana zvichinzi zvinhu zvose zvakaiswa pasi pake, zviri pachena kuti hazvibatanidziri naiye, Mwari akaisa zvinhu zvose pasi pake." 
1Corinthians15:28 Kana zvinhu zvose zvaiswa pasi pake nezvo Mwanakomana pachakewo achava pasi pouyo akaisa zvinhu zvose pasi pake kuti Mwari ave Mwari wazvose muna zvose. 
1Corinthians15:29 Ko kana zvisiri izvo vanoombekerwa vakafa vanenge vachifungei kana vakafa vasingambomutswi? Vanoombekerwei panzvimbo pavo? 
1Corinthians15:30 Ko chatinogarira munhamo nguva dzose chiiko? 
1Corinthians15:31 Hama dzangu ndinopika nemi vandinodada navo muna Kristu Jesu Tenzi wedu kuti kufa ndokwangu zuva nezuva. 
1Corinthians15:32 Kana vakafa vasingamutswi muvafi, ini somunhu ndinowanei nokurwisana kwandakaita nezvikara kuEfesusi. Zviri nani kuti titi, “Ngatidyei tinwe zvedu nokuti mangwana tichafa.”" 
1Corinthians15:33 Musanyengedzwe zvenyu, shamwari dzakaipa dzinoparadza hunhu." 
1Corinthians15:34 Nyatsofungai, musiyane nezvitadzo nokuti vamwe havazivi Mwari. Ndinotaura izvi kuti munyare." 
1Corinthians15:35 Asi mumwe angabvunze kuti, “Ko ivo vakafa vanomutswa sei? Vanenge vano muviri wakaita sei?”" 
1Corinthians15:36 Benzi romunhu! Chaunodyara hachimeri kana chisina kutombofa. 
1Corinthians15:37 Chaunodyara, ingave tsanga yekoroni kana chimwe chakadaro hachisicho chinozobuda chakadaro" 
1Corinthians15:38 asi Mwari ndiye anochipa chimiro chacho pamadiro ake. 
1Corinthians15:39 Nyama haina kufanana yose yose. Pane nyama yavanhu nenyama yemhuka nenyamawo yeshiri neimwe yehove. 
1Corinthians15:40 Kune zvinhu zvomudenga nezvinhu zvapanyika. Kupenya kwezvokudenga kwakasiyana nokupenya kwezvapasi. 
1Corinthians15:41 Kune kupenya kwezuva nokupenya kwomwedzi. Kuno kupenya kwenyenyedzi. Nyenyedzi dzinosiyana pakupenya kwadzo. 
1Corinthians15:42 Ndizvo zvimwechetezvo nokumuka kwavakafa. Chinodyarwa chinoparara asi chinomutswa hachiparari. 
1Corinthians15:43 Chinodyarwa mukuzvidzwa asi chichimutswa chava kupenya; chinodyarwa muutera asi chichimutswa chava nesimba. 
1Corinthians15:44 Chinodyarwa somuviri unobatika asi chinomutswa chava muviri womweya. 
1Corinthians15:45 Zvino kana pano muviri unobatika kuno muviriwo womweya. Ndizvo zvakanyorwa zvichinzi munhu wokutanga, Adhamu akava chinhu chipenyu; Adhamu wokupedzisa akava mweya unopa upenyu." 
1Corinthians15:46 Asi hausi womweya unotanga asi unobatika kozoteverwa nowomweya. 
1Corinthians15:47 Munhu wokutanga akabva kuvhu, munhu wevhu. Munhu wechipiri anobva kudenga." 
1Corinthians15:48 Vanhu vehuruva vakafanana nomunhu uya wevhu, saizvozvowo vanhu vokudenga vakafanana nomunhu wokudenga." 
1Corinthians15:49 Sokutodzana kwatakaita nomunhu wehuruva tichatodzanawo noMunhu wokudenga. 
1Corinthians15:50 Ndinokutaurirai izvi, hama dzangu, zvokuti, chakaitwa nenyama neropa hachikwanisi kuwana umambo hwaMwari uye chinofa hachigoni kuwana kusafa." 
1Corinthians15:51 Chinzwai ndava kukutaurirai, chinhu chakavandika chisingatsananguriki chokuti, hatisi kuzofa tose asi tose tichasandurwa," 
1Corinthians15:52 nenguva isipi, nokubwaira kweziso chaiko pakurira kwehwamanda yokupedzisira. Hwamanda icharira, vakafa vachamutswa vasisafi, isu tobva tasandurwa;" 
1Corinthians15:53 nokuti muviri unofa uyu unofanira kupfeka kusaora uye muviri uyu unofa unofanira kupfeka kusafa. 
1Corinthians15:54 Kana muviri unoora wapfeka kusaora uye muviri unofa wapfeka kusafa ndipo pachazoitika zviya zvakanyorwa zvinoti; 
1Corinthians15:55 Rufu rwakamedzwa nokukurirwa kwarwakaitwa Nhai rufu kukurira kwako kuripi? Iwe rufu rumborera rwako ruripi? 
1Corinthians15:56 Rumborera rwerufu chitadzo. Simbawo rechitadzo mutemo. 
1Corinthians15:57 Mwari ngaatendwe anoita kuti tikunde nokuna Tenzi wedu Jesu Kristu. 
1Corinthians15:58 Naizvozvo, hama dzangu dzadiwa, rambai makasimba musingatsukutsiki musingasiyani kwazvo nebasa raTenzi tichiziva kuti muna Tenzi basa renyu harishai maturo." 
1Corinthians16:1 Panyaya yezvipo zvinounganidzirwa vanhu vaMwari, sezvandakaudza masangano okuGaratia kuti aite, itaiwo saizvozvo." 
1Corinthians16:2 Pamusi weSvondo, svondo rimwe nerimwe munhu oga oga ngaaise zvinhu parutivi azvichengete maererano nokuwana kwake kuti zvirege kuzounganidzwa ndatouya." 
1Corinthians16:3 Pandinosvikako ndichatumira vanhu vamunenge manditumira netsamba vachitakura zvipo zvenyu ndichienda nazvo kuJerusaremu. 
1Corinthians16:4 Kana zvichidikanwa kuti ini ndiendewo vachandiperekedza. 
1Corinthians16:5 Ndichakushanyirai ndambopfuura nokuMasedhonia nokuti ndinoda kupfuura nokuMasedhonia. 
1Corinthians16:6 Pamwe ndichagara nemi kana kutopedza nguva yechando ndiinemi. Imi mozondibatsirawo kuenderera mberi nerwendo rwangu kose kwandinenge ndichienda. 
1Corinthians16:7 Handisi kuda kukuonai zvokungokunyepudzai chete. Ndinotarisira kuva nemi kwechinguva kana Tenzi achida. 
1Corinthians16:8 Ndichagara kuEfesusi kusvika paPendekositi 
1Corinthians16:9 nokuti ndanyatsozarurirwa mukova webasa rakanakisisa asi kune vavengi vakawanda. 
1Corinthians16:10 Kana Timoti auya itomugadzanisai hana pakati penyu nokuti ari kuita basa raTenzi sezvandiri kuita. 
1Corinthians16:11 Ngaparege kuva nomunhu anomushora. Muperekedzei aite rwendo rwake norugare kuti adzokere kwandiri nokuti ndinomutarisira kuno pamwe nevehama. 
1Corinthians16:12 Panyaya yezvaAporosi, hama yedu, ndakamukumbirisa kwazvo kuti azokushanyirai pamwechete navamwe vehama asi chakanga chisiri chido chake kuti auye iye zvino. Achauya kana awana mukana." 
1Corinthians16:13 Rindirai, makasimba nacho chitendero, ivai nechivindi makagwinya." 
1Corinthians16:14 Zvose zvamunoita zviitei norudo. 
1Corinthians16:15 Ndinokukurudzirai hama dzangu, sezvamunoziva kuti mhuri yokwaStefanasi ndiyo yakatanga kupinduka muAkaya vakazvipira kushandira vanhu vaMwari" 
1Corinthians16:16 kuzviisa pasi pavanhu vakadaro napasi pavavo vanobatsirana navo navashandi. 
1Corinthians16:17 Ndinofara nokuuya kwaStefanasi naFotunatusi naAkayakusi nokuti vakakutsivai pamakanga musipo. 
1Corinthians16:18 Vakandipa kufefeterwa mwoyo kunyange nemiwo. Remekedzai vanhu vakadaro. 
1Corinthians16:19 Masangano okuAsia anokukwazisai. Akwira naPrisika neSangano rinopindira pamba pavo vanokukwazisai zvikuru muna Tenzi. 
1Corinthians16:20 Vehama vose vanokukwazisai. Kwazisanai muchiomberana zvakarurama. 
1Corinthians16:21 Iniwo Pauro ndinokukwazisai ndichitonyorawo noruoko rwangu. 
1Corinthians16:22 Kana pane asina rudo naTenzi ngaave norushambwa. Tenzi wedu uyai. 
1Corinthians16:23 Nyasha dzaTenzi Jesu ngadzive nemi. 
1Corinthians16:24 Ini ndinokudai mose muna Kristu Jesu. Ameni. 
2Corinthians1:1 Ndini Pauro mupositori waKristu Jesu, ndakasarudzwa naMwari, ndinokunyorerai ini nehama yedu Timoti, imi vesangano raMwari riri kuKorinde pamwechete navatsvene vose vari muAkaya yose ndichiti" 
2Corinthians1:2 Mwari Baba wedu naTenzi Jesu Kristu ngavakuitirei nyasha nokukupai rugare. 
2Corinthians1:3 Ngaarumbidzwe Mwari Baba vaTenzi wedu Jesu Kristu, Baba vetsitsi, Mwari anonyaradza muna zvose," 
2Corinthians1:4 anotinyaradza mumatambudziko edu ose, kuti tikwanisewo kunyaradza vamwe vanenge vari mumatambudziko api naapi zvawo nokunyaradzwa ikoko kwatinenge taitwa naMwari." 
2Corinthians1:5 Nokuti sokubatana zvakanyanya kwazvo kwatinoita naKristu mumatambudziko ake saizvozvowo nokuna Kristu tinonyaradzwawo zvikuru kwazvo. 
2Corinthians1:6 Kana isu tichitambudzika, ndimi vatinotambudzikira kuti munyaradzwe nokuponeswa. Kana tikanyaradzwa imi munobva mawana kunyaradzwawo kwamunonzwa kana muchitirira nemwoyo murefu matambudziko mamwechetewo atinotambudzika." 
2Corinthians1:7 Chivimbo chedu mamuri hachizunguzuki nokuti tinoziva kuti sokubatana kwatinoita nemi mumatambudziko edu, muchanyaradzwawo pamwechete nesu." 
2Corinthians1:8 Hatidi kuti munge musingazivi, hama dzangu, nezvamatambudziko atakawana kuAsia nokuti takarwadziwa zvokurwadziwa zviya, zvokuti takanga tongoti kwatova kufa uku." 
2Corinthians1:9 Zvaitovapo ndezvokuti takatenge tavakuzviona savanhu vakatongerwa rufu, asi izvi zvakaitika kuti tirege kuvimba nezvatiri asi kuvimba naMwari anomutsa vakafa." 
2Corinthians1:10 Akatinunura munyatwa yorufu uye achatinunura. Chivimbo chedu chiri maari chokuti achatinunurazve. 
2Corinthians1:11 Imi mukatibatsirawo neminamato yenyu, vazhinji vachatenda nezvikomborero zvatinenge tapiwa pamusana peminamato yavazhinji yatinenge taitirwa." 
2Corinthians1:12 Chatinodada nacho uye chinopupurwawo nehana yedu ndechichi chokuti takagarisana navamwe zvakanaka panyika asi zvikuru nemi, tiri vatsvene nokuva pachokwadi chaMwari. Hatina kuzviita noungwaru hwapasi pano asi nenyasha dzaMwari." 
2Corinthians1:13 Hatikunyorerei zvamusingakwanisi kuverenga nokunzwisisa. Ndinotarisira kuti muchanyatsonzwisisa," 
2Corinthians1:14 sokutinzwisisa kwamunoita zvishoma kuti munogonawo kudada nesu sokudadawo kwatinoita nemi pazuva raTenzi Jesu. 
2Corinthians1:15 Ndaiva nechokwadi chaicho nazvo zvokuti ndakanga ndatoronga kuti nditange kuuya kwamuri kuti muve norufaro rwakapetwa kaviri. 
2Corinthians1:16 Ndaida kukushanyirai ndiri parwendo rwangu rwokuenda kuMasedhonia uye pakudzoka kwangu kuMasedhonia kuti mundibatsire parwendo rwangu kuJudhea. 
2Corinthians1:17 Pandaironga izvozvi ndaisandukasanduka here? Ndinoronga zvinhu zvangu mukungozvifunga somunhu, ndichigona kuti, “Hungu” “Nakwete” panguva imwecheteyo here?" 
2Corinthians1:18 NaMwari chaiye akatendeka, shoko redu kwamuri harina kunge riri hungu nakwete," 
2Corinthians1:19 nokuti Jesu Kristu Mwanakomana waMwari watakaparidza pakati penyu, ini naSirivhanusi naTimoti, akanga asiri hungu nakwete. Maari maingova nahungu." 
2Corinthians1:20 Ndinodaro nokuti zvitsidzo zvose zvaMwari zvinowana hungu wazvo maari. Ndokusaka tichitaura kuti, “Ameni” nemaari kuti Mwari arumbidzwe." 
2Corinthians1:21 Mwari ndiye anoita kuti isu nemi tive nechokwadi muupenyu hwedu muna Kristu akatiita vaKristu. 
2Corinthians1:22 Akaisa rupawo rwake patiri akatipa Mweya wake mumwoyo medu sorubatso. 
2Corinthians1:23 Mwari ngaandipupurire kuti chandakaregerera kuuya kuKorinde kwaiva kuti ndirege kukunetsai. 
2Corinthians1:24 Hatisi kukuudzai zvamunofanira kutenda asi tinoshanda pamwechete kuti muve norufaro nokuda kokuti mumire makasimba muchitendero chenyu. 
2Corinthians2:1 Ini ndakafunga pachangu kuti handifaniri kukushanyirai zvingaite kuti imi musuwe 
2Corinthians2:2 nokuti ndikakurwadzisai ndiani achaita kuti ndifare, kusiya iyeyo mumwecheteyo wandinenge ndasuwisa." 
2Corinthians2:3 Kunyora kwandakaita ndakakunyorerai kuti kana ndauya ndirege kurwadziswa navanhu vanofanira kuti vaite kuti ndifare. Ndinonyatsoziva kuti kana ini ndichifara nemiwo mose munofara. 
2Corinthians2:4 Ndakakunyorerai ndakasuwa kwazvo ndichirwadziwa mumwoyo uye ndiine misodzi padama, kwete kuti ndikurwadzisei, asi kuti muzive rudo rukuru rwandinarwo nemi." 
2Corinthians2:5 Kana pane akarwadzisa vamwe mwoyo handisini waakarwadzisa. Neimwe nzira, tisingadi zvedu kumuomesera, tingangoti akakurwadzisai mose." 
2Corinthians2:6 Kumunhu akadai shamhu yamakamupa imi voruzhinji yakakwana 
2Corinthians2:7 zvokuti dai machimuregerera zvenyu muchimunyaradza nokuti angadaro akasvika pakunyanyoodzwa mwoyo nokusuruvara kukuru. 
2Corinthians2:8 Saka ndinokukumbirai kuti munyatsomuratidza kuti munomuda. 
2Corinthians2:9 Ndokusaka ndakanyora kuti ndione ndingozivawo kuti imi munoteerera here muna zvose. 
2Corinthians2:10 Ani zvake wamunoregerera, ndinomuregererawo. Kuregerera ikoko dai kuri kuti pane chandinofanira kuregerera ndakazviita pamusana penyu pamberi paKristu." 
2Corinthians2:11 kuti tirege kudyiwa munyati naSatani nokuti tinoziva dzaanotamba. 
2Corinthians2:12 Pandakasvika kuTiroasi kundoparidza Shoko Rakanaka raKristu, ndakazarurirwa musuo muna Tenzi" 
2Corinthians2:13 asi ndakanga ndisina zororo mumwoyo nokuti handina kuwana hama yangu Titosi ikoko. Saka ndakavaoneka ndikaenda kuMasedhonia. 
2Corinthians2:14 Mwari ngaatendwe anoita kuti, muna Kristu tikurire nguva dzose uye nematiri anoparadzira kose vose kunhuwirira kwokuzivikanwa kwake." 
2Corinthians2:15 Iyesu ndisu kunhuwirira kwaKristu kuna Mwari pakati pavari kuponeswa napakati pavari kuparadzwa. 
2Corinthians2:16 Kune vamwewo, munhuwi unouraya, kune vamwewo munhuwi unopa upenyu. Ndiani angakwanisane nazvo izvi?" 
2Corinthians2:17 Hatina kufanana navamwe vanoita shawo neShoko raMwari, asi tinoita savanhu vakatumwa vanotendeka pamberi paMwari tichitaura muna Kristu." 
2Corinthians3:1 Totangazve here kuzvizuwidza nezvatiri? Tingade here sezvingadiwe navamwe, matsamba okukutaurirai zvatiri kana matsamba akadaro anobva kwamuri?" 
2Corinthians3:2 Iyemi ndimi tsamba yedu inotaura zvatiri, yakanyorwa pamwoyo yenyu kuti izivikanwe nokuverengwa navanhu vose." 
2Corinthians3:3 Imi pachenyu munotoratidza kuti muri tsamba inobva kuna Kristu, muchero webasa redu, isina kunyorwa neingi asi naMweya waMwari mupenyu. Haina kunyorwa pamafendefa amatombo asi pamafendefa emwoyo yavanhu." 
2Corinthians3:4 Ndicho chivimbo chatinacho naMwari nokuna Kristu. 
2Corinthians3:5 Hazvirevi kuti tinokwanisana nazvo pachedu kuti titi isu zvinobva kwatiri. Kukwanisa kwedu kunobva kuna Mwari akatiita kuti tikwanise kuva vashandiri vechitenderano chitsva chisina kunyorwa asi chomweya. 
2Corinthians3:6 Nokuti chakaitwa zvokunyorwa chiya chinouraya asi Mweya anopa upenyu. 
2Corinthians3:7 Zvino kana zvinounza rufu zvakanyorwa zvichiitwa zvokutemerwa pamabwe, zvakauya nokupenya kwakadaro zvokuti vaIsiraeri vakatadza kutarisa uso hwaMosesi pamusana pokubwinya kwahwo kunopera," 
2Corinthians3:8 ko kutozoti zvaMweya zvinopenya zvakadii? 
2Corinthians3:9 Zvino kana zviya zvinopa mhosva zvaiva nokupenya, zvinopa ururami zvinofanira kuzvikunda kure kure." 
2Corinthians3:10 Saizvozvo apa chaimbova nokupenya kukuru hachichambopenya zvacho pamusana pokupenya kunochikunda. 
2Corinthians3:11 Kana chino kupenya kunopera chakauya nokupenya kukuru, chinokupenya kusingaperi chinofanira kuva nokupenya kwakatokurisisa." 
2Corinthians3:12 Zvatiine chitarisiro chakadaro, tine chivindi." 
2Corinthians3:13 Hatiiti saMosesi aizvifukidza uso nejira kuti vaIsiraeri varege kuona magumo okupenya kukuru kwakanga kwava kupera. 
2Corinthians3:14 Mwoyo yavo yakabva yaomarara nokuti nanhasi wose pavanoverenga chitenderano chakare, jira rimwechetero rinoramba rakafukidza nokuti rinobviswa chete muna Kristu." 
2Corinthians3:15 Kunyange nanhasi, pose panoverengwa Mosesi, jira rinenge rakafukidza pfungwa dzavo," 
2Corinthians3:16 asi kana munhu akapindukira kuna Tenzi, jira riya rinobva rabviswa." 
2Corinthians3:17 Zvino Tenzi wacho ndiMweya. Pana Mweya waTenzi pano rusununguko. 
2Corinthians3:18 Isu tose takabviswa jira riya, mbiri yaTenzi inopenya matiri uye tiri kusandurwa tichitodzana naye, kupenya kwedu kuchingoramba kuchikurakura nokuti izvi zvinobva kuna Tenzi, Mweya." 
2Corinthians4:1 Naizvozvo, Mwari, nenyasha dzake, zvaakatipa basa iri hatirasi mwoyo." 
2Corinthians4:2 Takasarudza kusamboita zvinhu zvinonyadzisa nezvomuchivandevande. Takaramba kuita zvoujarijari kana kushatisa shoko raMwari. Asi tinozviratidza zvatiri kuhana yomunhu wose zvake takamira pachokwadi chizere pamberi paMwari. 
2Corinthians4:3 Kunyange zvazvo Shoko redu Rakanaka rakafukidzwa, rakafukidzwa chete kuna vari kuparara." 
2Corinthians4:4 Pane zvaivava, mwari wapasi pano akapofomadza pfungwa dzavasingatendi kuti varege kuona mwenje weShoko Rakanaka rembiri yaKristu, iye akatodzana naMwari." 
2Corinthians4:5 Isu hatizviparidzi asi watinoparidza ndiJesu Kristu saTenzi, isu tiri varanda venyu pamusana paJesu," 
2Corinthians4:6 nokuti iye Mwari ndiye akati, “Chiedza ngachivheneke murima,” ndiye akavhenekawo mumwoyo yedu, kuti atipe mwenje woruzivo rwembiri yaMwari iri muuso hwaKristu." 
2Corinthians4:7 Asi upfumi uhu tinaho huri muhari dzevhu, kuratidza kuti simba ramasimba ose nderaMwari, kwete redu." 
2Corinthians4:8 Tinotambudzwa nenzira dzakasiyana — siyana asi hatishai pokupunyuka napo, tinoshaiswa mazano asi hatirasi mwoyo;" 
2Corinthians4:9 tinoshushwa asi hatisiiwi tiri toga; tinorigirwa pasi asi hatiparadzwi. 
2Corinthians4:10 Tinogara takaberekana narwo rufu rwaJesu kuti upenyu hwaJesu huratidzwewo mumiviri yedu. 
2Corinthians4:11 Paupenyu hwedu, tinogara takangotarisana narwo rufu pamusana paJesu kuti upenyu hwaJesu huratidzwe munyama yedu inofa." 
2Corinthians4:12 Naizvozvo, isu tinogara takafudzwa narwo rufu asi imi muri muupenyu." 
2Corinthians4:13 Zvino zvatino mweya mumwechetewo wechitendero wakanga uine uyo akanyora achiti, “Ndakatenda ndikataura, saizvozvo,” isuwo takatenda tinotaura saizvozvo" 
2Corinthians4:14 tichiziva kuti iye akamutsa Tenzi Jesu achatimutsawo naJesu achizotiunza pamwechete nemi paari. 
2Corinthians4:15 Zvose izvi kuitira imi, kuti nyasha nokupararira kwadzinoita kuvanhu vakawanda kutendawo kuwande, kuti Mwari agorumbidzwa nazvo." 
2Corinthians4:16 Nezvo hatirasi mwoyo. Kunyange tavakuchembera, umunhu hwedu hokunze; hwomukati huri kutovandudzwa zuva nezuva," 
2Corinthians4:17 nokuti tunhamo tunopera utwu, twuri kutigadzirira mbiri isingaperi, inoremerera, isina chokuienzanisa nacho." 
2Corinthians4:18 Chikonzero chacho ndechokuti ziso redu harisi pazvinhu zvinoonekwa asi kuzvinhu zvisingaonekwi nokuti zvinhu zvinoonekwa zvinopfuura asi zvinhu zvisingaonekwi zvinogara nokusingaperi. 
2Corinthians5:1 Isu tinoziva wani kuti kana muviri uno womusasa wapasi pano watigere wapazwa, tinowana imba inobva kuna Mwari isina kuvakwa namaoko avanhu inogara nokusingaperi kudenga." 
2Corinthians5:2 Zvino imomu tinotura befu tichisuwira kuti imba yedu yokudenga itifukidze 
2Corinthians5:3 kuti taifuka, tirege kuonekwa tisina kufuka." 
2Corinthians5:4 Nokuti patinenge tichiri mumusasa uyu tinotura befu takaremerwa, kwete kuti tipfekenurwe, asi kuti titopfekedzwa, kuti chinofa chinyatsosandurwa noupenyu." 
2Corinthians5:5 Iye akatigadzirira izvi ndiMwari akatipa Mweya sorubatso. 
2Corinthians5:6 Naizvozvo takatsunga mwoyo nguva dzose. Tinoziva kuti patinenge takaita musha mumuviri wedu, tinenge tichitova kure naTenzi" 
2Corinthians5:7 nokuti pakufamba kwedu tinotungamirirwa nechitendero, kwete nezvatinoona." 
2Corinthians5:8 Takatsunga mwoyo kwazvo zvokuti tinoona zviri nani kuti titosiya musha womumuviri tichindoita musha wedu naTenzi. 
2Corinthians5:9 Naizvozvo kunyange tiri pamusha kana kure nawo chatinovavarira kumufadza 
2Corinthians5:10 nokuti tose zvedu tinofanira kuuya pamberi pechigaro chokutonga chaKristu kuti munhu wose atambire zvakanaka kana zvakaipa maererano nezvaakaita ari mumuviri. 
2Corinthians5:11 Saizvozvo, sokuziva kwatinoita kuti kutya Mwari kunorevei, tinokurudzira vanhu; asi zvatiri zvinozivikanwa naMwari uye tinotarisira kuti zvinozivikanwawo nehana dzenyu." 
2Corinthians5:12 Uku hakusi kuda kukutaurirai zvatiri zvakare asi kuti muwane chikonzero chokuti mudade nesu kuti mukwanise kupindura avo vanozvikudza pamusana pechimiro chomunhu panze pokuzvikudza nounhu hwomunhu. 
2Corinthians5:13 Kana tichiita setinorasa njere, tinozviitira Mwari uye kana tichiita savanhu kwavo tinoitira imi." 
2Corinthians5:14 Chikonzero chacho ndechokuti rudo rwaKristu ndirwo runotimanikidza kuita zvinhu nokuti zvatakatoona ndezvokuti, munhu mumwechete akafira vanhu vose, naizvozvo vanhu vose vakafawo." 
2Corinthians5:15 Iye akafira vanhu vose kuti vanorarama varege kuzviraramira asi kuti vararamire iye akavafira akamutswa. 
2Corinthians5:16 Saizvozvo kubvira zvino hatichaona munhu sokuonekwa kwaanoitwa navanhu; kunyange zvazvo takamboona Kristu sokuonekwa kwaanoitwa navanhu, hatichamuona saizvozvo." 
2Corinthians5:17 Saizvozvo kana munhu ari muna Kristu ava chisikwa chitsva. Zvakare zvakapera, zvitsva zvakauya." 
2Corinthians5:18 Zvose izvi zvinobva kuna Mwari akatiwadzanisa naye nokuna Kristu akatipawo basa rokuwadzanisa 
2Corinthians5:19 zvinoreva kuti muna Kristu, Mwari akaita kuti pasi pawadzane naye, achirega kuvapa mhosva uye achitipawo shoko rokuwadzanisa." 
2Corinthians5:20 Naizvozvo tiri vamiririri vaKristu. Mwari anoisa chikumbiro chake nokwatiri. Tinokutetererai, takamirira Kristu tichiti, wadzanai naMwari." 
2Corinthians5:21 Pamusana pedu akaita kuti iye ave chitadzo uyo akanga asingazivi chinonzi chitadzo kuti maari tive noururami hwaMwari. 
2Corinthians6:1 Tinokukumbirisai tichishanda pamwechete naMwari kuti murege kungogamuchira nyasha dzaMwari pasina 
2Corinthians6:2 nokuti anoti, “Nenguva yakafanira ndakakunzwa, nezuva reruponeso ndakakubatsira, chinzwa, ino ndiyo nguva yacho yakafanira, irori ndiro zuva roruponeso.”"
