2Corinthians6:3 Hatiisi chinopingidza munzira yaani nani zvake, kuti muushandiri hwedu musave nechakaipa," 
2Corinthians6:4 asi isu savaranda vaMwari tinoratidza izvi nenzira dzose nokutirira kwakaomarara nomukutambudzika mune zvinonetsa nomupfumvu 
2Corinthians6:5 mukurohwa nokuiswa mujeri nomunyonganyonga nomumabasa anorema nokuvata takasvinura nomunzara 
2Corinthians6:6 uye tinoratidza izvi noutsvene noruzivo nokutirira nomutsa naMweya Mutsvene norudo rwechokwadi 
2Corinthians6:7 nokutaura zviri pachokwadi nesimba raMwari nezvombo zvoururami kurudyi nokuruboshe," 
2Corinthians6:8 mukuremekedzwa nomukusaremekedzwa, mukushorwa nomukukudzwa. Tinotorwa savanhu vanonyepera kuva zvavasiri asi tiri pachokwadi," 
2Corinthians6:9 tichiitwa setisingazivikanwi asi tichinyatsozivikanwa. Tinoitwa setiri kufa asi tarisai muone tiri vapenyu. Tinoitwa setiri kurangwa asi hatisati tafa. 
2Corinthians6:10 Tinonzi tinosuruvara asi isu tichifara nguva dzose. Tinonzi tiri varombo asi tichipfumisa vazhinji. Tinonzi hatina chinhu asi tiine zvose. 
2Corinthians6:11 Vakorinde imi, takutaurirai zviri pachena uye nomwoyo wose." 
2Corinthians6:12 Hatisisu tinoita kuti musungikane mwoyo asi imi ndimi muri kuita kuti musungikane zvenyu. 
2Corinthians6:13 Sekandiro kanoenda kunobva kamwe, ndinotaura somunhu ari kutaura kuvana, sunungukaiwo mwoyo." 
2Corinthians6:14 Musasungwe pajoko navanhu vasingatendi nokuti ururami hunei nouipi? Kana kuti chiedza chine ukama hwei nerima? 
2Corinthians6:15 Kristu anganzwanane sei naBheriari? Kana kuti mutendi ane mugove wei naasingatendi. 
2Corinthians6:16 Temberi yaMwari inowirirana papi nezvifananidzo zvinonamatwa saMwari. Zvino isu tiri Temberi yaMwari mupenyu sokutaura kwakaita Mwari achiti, “Ndichagara mavari ndichifamba pakati pavo uye ndichava Mwari wavo ivowo vachava vanhu vangu.”" 
2Corinthians6:17 Saka ibvai mukati mavo mupararane navo, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi. Musawane chakan'ora chamunobata. Pakadaro, ini ndichakugamuchirai." 
2Corinthians6:18 Ini ndichava Baba kwamuri, imi muchiva vanakomana vangu navanasikana vangu. Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi Samasimbaose." 
2Corinthians7:1 Zvatiine zvitsidzo izvi hama dzangu ngatizvichenesei kune zvose zvinon'oresa muviri kana mweya uye hutsvene hwedu huve hwakaruramisisa mukutya Mwari. 
2Corinthians7:2 Tigamuchireiwo nomwoyo wose, inga hapana watakatadzira wani. Hatina watakarunzira kuti atiitire zvechioko muhomwe. Hapana watakabiridzira." 
2Corinthians7:3 Handisi kutaura izvi kuti ndikupei mhosva. Sezvandambokutaurirai, ndimi vapamwoyo, zvokuti tinofa tose uye ticharamba tigere tose." 
2Corinthians7:4 Ndinovimba nemi zvikuru. Ndinodada nemi kwazvo. Munondipa manyawi. Tine matambudziko edu akawanda zvawo kudai asi tinonzwa kufara zvikuru kwazvo. 
2Corinthians7:5 Kunyange patakasvika kuMasedhonia, isu nyama yedu haina kuwana zororo, takapoteredzwa nenhamo kumativi ose, kunze yakanga iri hondo yokurwiswa, mukati iri hondo yokutya." 
2Corinthians7:6 Asi, Mwari anonyaradza vanenge varasa mwoyo, akatinyaradza nokuuya kwaTitosi;" 
2Corinthians7:7 kwete nokuuya kwake chete asi nokunyaradzwa kwaakawana mamuri sokutitaurira kwaakaita nezvekundisuwa kwenyu nokundirwadzirwa mwoyo kwenyu neshungu dzenyu neni zvokuti ndakatofarisisa kwazvo. 
2Corinthians7:8 Chiripo ndechokuti kunyange zvangu ndakakurwadzisai netsamba yangu, handina urombo nazvo; (kunyange zvangu ndakave nourombo nazvo.) Ndinozviziva zvangu kuti tsamba iyoyo yakakurwadzai kunyange zvazvo kwaiva kwechinguvana chete." 
2Corinthians7:9 Sezvazviri ndinofara, kwete, nokuti makarwadziwa, asi pamusana pokuti makarwadziwa zvakakuitai kuti mupinduke nokuti kurwadziwa kwenyu kwaiva nohumwari makuri zvokuti hapana chatakaita kuti murasikirwe nacho." 
2Corinthians7:10 Kurwadzirwa mwoyo zvaMwari kunoita kuti munhu apinduke zvinosvitsa kuruponeso uye hazvirwadzise mwoyo; asi kurwadzirwa zvenyika kunounza rufu. 
2Corinthians7:11 Tarisai muone kuti shungu dzokurwadzirwa zvaMwari dzakakuberekerai chii mamuri, kuti makaita shungu dzakaita sei kuzvisasamura mhaka, kuti zvakakugumburai sei uye kuti zvakakutyisai zvakadii. Ndoda kudisisa kwenyu neshungu dzenyu uyezve chirango chacho! Aiwa, makaratidza, muna zvose, kuti hamuna mhosva panyaya iyi." 
2Corinthians7:12 Naizvozvo, kunyange ndakakunyorerai zvangu, handina kukunyorerai pamusana pewakatadza uya kana kuti pamusana pouyo akatadzirwa asi kuti shungu dzenyu kwatiri dzibude pachena kwamuri pamberi paMwari." 
2Corinthians7:13 Nokudaro isu zvinotinyaradza. Pamusoro pokunyaradzwa kwedu ikoko, takatofara zvikuru kwazvo nokufara kwaTitosi, nokuti imi mose makamugadzanisa hana." 
2Corinthians7:14 Ndakakuzuwidzai kwaari, imi mukasandinyadzisa pamusana pokuti zvatakataura zvakanga zviri zvedi, naizvozvo kuzuwa kwedu kuna Titosi kwaiva kwechokwadi." 
2Corinthians7:15 Anobva atorwa mwoyo chaizvo nemi kana oyeuka kuteerera kwenyu mose uye kumugamuchira kwamakaita muchimuremekedza nokumukudza zvakaperera. 
2Corinthians7:16 Ndinofara kwazvo nokuti ndinovimba nemi. 
2Corinthians8:1 Tingade kuti muzive, hama dzangu, nezvenyasha dzaMwari dzakaratidzwa mumasangano okuMasedhonia" 
2Corinthians8:2 nokuti vakayedzwa zvinorwadza kwazvo asi mufaro wavo wakafashukira vakava vanamupanegombe kunyange zvavo vakanga vava varombo vokupedzisira. 
2Corinthians8:3 Vakapa vakasununguka sokugona kwavo zvandingatopupurawo uye zvaitopfuura zvavaikwanisa 
2Corinthians8:4 vachititeterera kwazvo kuti vabatsire vatsvene. 
2Corinthians8:5 Izvozvo zvakanga zviri zvinhu zvatakanga tisingambotarisira asi vakatanga vazvipira kuna Mwari, mushure maizvozvo nokuda kwaMwari, vakazvipirawo kwatiri." 
2Corinthians8:6 Saizvozvo takakurudzira Titosi, somunhu akanga atanga basa iri rakanaka pakati penyu, kuti anofanira kuripedzisa." 
2Corinthians8:7 Zvino sezvo makabudirira zvikuru muzvinhu zvose izvi zvinoti: chitendero, kwouya kutaura zvakanaka kwoti ruzivo kwozoti shungu dzenyu huru dzokuda kubatsira uyezve rudo rwenyu kwatiri, chibudiriraiwo zvakanyanya pabasa iri renyasha." 
2Corinthians8:8 Handitauri izvi kwamuri somurau asi kuti neshungu dzavamwe ndizvionere kuti rudo rwenyu nderwe chokwadi here 
2Corinthians8:9 nokuti imi munoziva nyasha dzaTenzi wedu Jesu Kristu kuti kunyange akanga akapfuma asi akazova murombo nokuda kwenyu kuti nourombo hwake imi mugova vapfumi. 
2Corinthians8:10 Uye panezvizvi ndinokubairai zanhi ndichiti, zviri nani kwamuri kuti mupedzise zvamakatanga kuita gore rakapera, kusiri kungoita chete asi kuva nechido chokuzviita." 
2Corinthians8:11 Zvino, chipedzisai basa iroro kuti kuripedzisa kwenyu kuenzane neshungu dzenyu dzokuda kuriita maererano nezvamunazvo." 
2Corinthians8:12 Kana chido chokupa chiripo, chipo chomunhu chinogamuchirika maererano nezvaanazvo, kwete maererano nezvaasina." 
2Corinthians8:13 Handisi kuti vamwe varerukirwe imi muchiremerwa 
2Corinthians8:14 asi kuti pave nokuenzana, panguva ino zvamuine zvakawanda movabatsirawo pavasina chokubata kudai, kuti ivo kana vava nezvakawanda imi musina pokubata vagokubatsiraiwo kuti pave nokuenzana." 
2Corinthians8:15 Sokunyorwa kwazvakaitwa zvichinzi uyo akakohwa zvakawanda haana kuva nezvakapfurikidza, uyowo akakohwa zvishoma haana chaakashaiwa." 
2Corinthians8:16 Mwari ngaatendwe akaita kuti Titosi ave nomwoyo wakaita sowangu pakuva nehanya nemi. 
2Corinthians8:17 Hakusiri kuti akanzwa chete chikumbiro changu asi kuti iye pachake aiva neshungu zvokuti iye pachezvake akada kuuya kwamuri. 
2Corinthians8:18 Tinomutuma nehama inozivikanwa pamasangano ose pamusoro pokuparidza kwake Shoko Rakanaka. 
2Corinthians8:19 Hazvisiri izvo zvoga, asi kuti akatosarudzwa namasangano kuti atiperekedze mubasa iri romwoyochena ratiri kuitira mbiri yaTenzi uyewo kuratidza mwoyo unoda." 
2Corinthians8:20 Taichenjererawo kuti pasave naanotipa mhosva kuti tinobata sei chipo chakakura kudai. 
2Corinthians8:21 Chinangwa chacho chiri chokuti tiite zvinoremekedzwa kwete naTenzi chete asi kuti navanhuwo. 
2Corinthians8:22 Pamwechete naivava tiri kutumira hama yedu yatakaedza kazhinji tikaona ari munhu ane chido chokuita zvinhu mune zvizhinji asi ava nechido chakatonyanya zvino kupfuura kare pamusana pokuvimba kukuru kwaanako nemi. 
2Corinthians8:23 Kana zviri zvaTitosi, ndomumwe wangu, mushandipamwe neni mubasa ratinokuitirai, asi dzimwe hama idzi, inhumwa dzamasangano uye vanopa mbiri kuna Kristu." 
2Corinthians8:24 Naizvozvo ratidzai masangano rudo rwenyu uye kuti isu tinodada nemi zvakadii kuvarume ava. 
2Corinthians9:1 Kungangova kupedza nguva kuti ndikunyorerei nezvechipo chokupa kuvatsvene," 
2Corinthians9:2 nokuti ndinoziva kuzvigadzirira kwenyu kwandinozvizuwidza nako kuvanhu vokuMasedhonia ndichiti, “VokuAkaya vakagadzirira kubvira gore rakapera.” Shungu dzenyu dzakamutsa mwoyo yavazhinji vavo." 
2Corinthians9:3 Asi ndiri kutumira hama idzi kuti kudada nemi kwedu kurege kuva kusina maturo kuitirawo kuti, sokutaura kwandakaita, kuti munge makagadzirira." 
2Corinthians9:4 Zvingadaro zvikaitika kuti ndinouya navamwe vokuMasedhonia tichizoona kuti hamuna kugadzirira tikazonyara nazvo, tisingatauri zvedu kuti imi muchanyara sei, isu tichivimba nemi kudai." 
2Corinthians9:5 Ndokusaka ndakafunga kuti ndikurudzire hama idzi, kuti dzifanotungamira ndisati ndauya, kuti dzifanogadzirira chipo chiya, chamakavimbisa, kuti chinge chakagadzirirwa, kwete zvokumanikidzira asi chinopiwa nechido." 
2Corinthians9:6 Chiripo ndechokuti munhu anodyara zvishoma achakohwawo zvishoma; anodyarawo zvakawanda achakohwawo zvakawanda. 
2Corinthians9:7 Mumwe nomumwe anofanira kuita sokuzvisarudzira kwaakaita mumwoyo make, kwete seasingadi kana seanomanikidzwa, nokuti Mwari anoda munhu anopa achifara." 
2Corinthians9:8 Mwari anogona kukupai makomborero ose akawanda kwazvo kuti nguva dzose muve nezvinokwana muchikwanisawo kuwana zvinhu zvinodiwa pamabasa ose akanaka. 
2Corinthians9:9 Sokunyorwa kwazvakaitwa zvichinzi, “Kuvarombo ndimupanegombe ururami hwake hunogara nokusingaperi.”" 
2Corinthians9:10 Iye Mwari anopa mbeu kumudyari nechingwa chokudya ndiye achakupa mbeu dzose dzaunoda uye achaitawo kuti dzikure dzibereke zvokukohwa zvakawanda zvichibva muururami hwako. 
2Corinthians9:11 Muchapfuma muna zvose kuti mukwanise kuita mabasa makuru omwoyochena anoita kuti Mwari atendwe pamusana pezvatinenge taita. 
2Corinthians9:12 Kuita basa irori, hakungagutsi zvinodiwa navatsvene chete asi kuti kunowanziridza kutendwa kwaMwari." 
2Corinthians9:13 Nezvinobuda mukuita basa iri, mucharumbidza Mwari nokuteerera kwenyu Shoko Rakanaka raKristu nemwoyochena mukudyidzana kwenyu navo uye navamwe vose." 
2Corinthians9:14 Ivo vachikusuwai nokukunamatirai pamusana penyasha dzinoshamisa dzaMwari mamuri 
2Corinthians9:15 Mwari ngaatendwe pamusana pechipo chake chisingatauriki. 
2Corinthians10:1 Ini Pauro ndinokukumbirisai, nounyoro nokupfava kwaKristu. Iyeni ndakawota kana ndakatarisana nemi uso nouso asi munhu ane chivindi kwamuri kana ndisipo." 
2Corinthians10:2 Ndinokukumbirai kuti kana ndauyako, ndirege kuita zvakaomarara sokufunga kwandinoita kune vamwe vanhu vanofunga kuti tinoita zvinhu tichitungamirirwa namafungiro ezvenyika." 
2Corinthians10:3 Kunyange zvedu tichigara panyika, hatisi kurwa hondo yapanyika" 
2Corinthians10:4 nokuti zvombo zvatinorwisa nazvo, hazvisi zvapasi pano asi kuti zvine simba raMwari rinoparadza nhare dzokuzvidzivirira nadzo muhondo." 
2Corinthians10:5 Isu tinoparadza nharo uye pfungwa dzokuzvikudza dzinopingidza vanhu kuziva Mwari uye tinotora vanhu pfungwa dzavo tichidziisa muutapwa, tichivaita kuti vateerere Kristu" 
2Corinthians10:6 takagadzirira kuranga kusateerera kose kana kuteerera kwenyu kwakwana. 
2Corinthians10:7 Onai zvinhu sezvazviri. Kana pane anonyatsovimba kuti ndewaKristu, ngaayeukewo kuti sezvaari waKristu, nesuwo ndizvo zvatiri." 
2Corinthians10:8 Kunyange ndingazvikudze zvinenge zvakati nyanyisei noukuru hwandinahwo, hwandakapiwa naTenzi, ndakahupiwa kuti ndikuvakei kwete kuti ndikuparadzei, saka handinyari nazvo." 
2Corinthians10:9 Handingadi kuita sokunge ndinoda kukutyityidzirai namatsamba 
2Corinthians10:10 nokuti zvinonzi, “Matsamba ake akaomarara kwazvo uye ane simba asi kana aripo imbwende yomunhu uye pakutaura idera chairo.”" 
2Corinthians10:11 Vanhu vakadaro ngavazive kuti zvatinotaura netsamba tisipo tinogonawo kuzvitaura tiripo. 
2Corinthians10:12 Hatingazviisi zvedu mubato kana kuzvienzanisa navavo vanozviisa pamusoro, vanozvitora ivo vozviita mwero wokuzviera nawo vachizvienzanisawo nezvavari." 
2Corinthians10:13 Isu hatidi kuzvirova dundundu zvinopfuuridza asi tichamirira pamiganhu yatakaisirwa naMwari. Imi muri mukati memiganhu iyoyo. 
2Corinthians10:14 Pamusana pokuti imi muri mukati memiganhu yedu hatisi kupfuuridza miganhu yedu. Ndisu takatotanga kuuya neShoko Rakanaka raKristu kwamuri. 
2Corinthians10:15 Naizvozvo, hatipindiridzi tichizvirovera dundundu mubasa ravamwe. Chitarisiro chedu ndechokuti chitendero chenyu pachinokura, munda wedu unobva wakurakurawo pakati penyu." 
2Corinthians10:16 Pakadaro tinobva takwanisa kuparidza Shoko Rakanaka munyika dziri mberi kweyenyu kuti tirege kuzozvikudza nebasa rakaitwa kare muminda yavamwe. 
2Corinthians10:17 Anozvirumbidza ngaazvirumbidze naTenzi 
2Corinthians10:18 nokuti haasi munhu anozviti ndakanaka asi anonzi naTenzi akanaka. 
2Corinthians11:1 Dai mukambondiregererawo ndichimboti pengerekei zvangu zvishomanana, mundiitirewo mwoyo murefu." 
2Corinthians11:2 Ndine shanje yaMwari nemi nokuti ndakakuroodzai kuna Kristu, ndichida kukuperekai semhandara tsvene kumurume wayo mumwechete oga." 
2Corinthians11:3 Zvino ndavakutotya kuti sokunyengedza kwakaita nyoka Eva nokusvinuka kwayo pfungwa dzenyu dzingadaro dzatsautswa pautsvene hwenyu nokutendeseka kwenyu kuna Kristu. 
2Corinthians11:4 Ndinodaro nokuti kana mumwe munhu akauya achiparidza mumwe Jesu akasiyana newatakaparidza muchigamuchira mumwe mweya wakasiyana newamakagamuchira kana kuti mukagachira Shoko Rakanaka rakasiyana neremakagamuchira muri kutomugamuchira namaoko maviri. 
2Corinthians11:5 Sokuona kwangu hapana chandinopfuurwa naivo vapositori vapamusoro vacho ivavo. 
2Corinthians11:6 Kunyange zvangu ndisingakwanisi kunyatsotaura asi ruzivo ndinarwo. Izvi akanyatsokujekeserai nenzira dzose muna zvose. 
2Corinthians11:7 Ndakatadza here nokuzvidukupisa kwandakaita kuti imi mukudzwe zvandakaparidza Shoko Rakanaka raMwari pasina chamakaripa? 
2Corinthians11:8 Ndaiita sokubira mamwe masangano ndichitambira rutsigiro rwavo kuti ndikushandirei. 
2Corinthians11:9 Pandakanga ndiinemi ndisina chokubata, hapana wandakaremedza. Zvandaida ndakapiwa nehama dzedu dzakabva kuMasedhonia. Saizvozvo ndakaramba uye ndichangoramba ndichiramba kukuremedzai nenzira ipi zvayo." 
2Corinthians11:10 Sokuti nechokwadi chaicho chaKristu chiri mandiri, kuzvizuwidza kwangu uku hakumbofa kwakanyaradzwa mudunhu reAkaya." 
2Corinthians11:11 Nemhosva yeiko? Pamusana pokuti handikudei here? Mwari ndiye anoziva kuti ndinokudai. 
2Corinthians11:12 Ndichangoramba ndichiita zvandiri kuita, kuti nditadzise kubudirira avo vanoda kuzvizuwidza vachiti vanongoshandawo sezvatinongoita." 
2Corinthians11:13 Vanhu vakadaro vapositori venhema, vashandi vanonyengedza, vanobata vanhu kumeso vachizviti vapositori vaKristu." 
2Corinthians11:14 Hazvishamisi izvozvo nokuti kunyange Satani anonyengedza achizviita somutumwa wechiedza. 
2Corinthians11:15 Naizvozvo hazvishamisi kana varanda vake vachinyengedza sokunge varanda voururami. Mugumo wavo uchaenderana nezviito zvavo. 
2Corinthians11:16 Ndinodzokororazve kuti ngaparege kuva nomunhu anofunga kuti ndiri benzi romunhu; asi kunyange mukafunga zvenyu kudaro, nditorei zvenyu sebenzi kuti ndiwanewo mazvikudziro zvishomanene." 
2Corinthians11:17 Zvandiri kutaura hazvina Tenzi mukati, asi sebenzi, mukuzvirova dundundu kwangu uku kune chivindi," 
2Corinthians11:18 sezvo vazhinji vachizvikudza nezvinhu zvenyika, neniwo ndichazvirumbidza," 
2Corinthians11:19 nokuti munoitira mwoyo murefu mapenzi muchifara asi imi muri vanhu vakangwara. 
2Corinthians11:20 Munoitiraka imi mwoyo murefu munhu akakuitai varanda kana akakudyai nomunyati achikushandisai kana kuzvikudza kana kutokurovai nembama kumeso. 
2Corinthians11:21 Ndinonyara kutaura kuti hwaiva humbwende kuita izvozvo. Asi kana pane munhu angade kuzvikudza nechii zvacho, ndava kutaura zvangu sebenzi, ndingatoitawo chivindi chokuzvikudza saizvozvo." 
2Corinthians11:22 Ivo vaHebheru here? Kana neniwo ndiri muHebheru. Ivo vaIsiraeri here kana neniwo. Ivo zvizvarwa zvaAbhurahamu here? Kana neniwo. 
2Corinthians11:23 Ivo vashandi vaKristu here? Ini ndinotova mushandi wake ari nani. Zvino ndava kutaura zvangu somunhu anopenga. Ndakashanda zvakaomarara kupinda ivo. Ndakaiswa mujeri kakatowanda kutovapfuura. Ndakarohwa kakawanda, ndikatarisana norufu kakawanda." 
2Corinthians11:24 Ndakarohwa ndiri mumaoko avaJudha shamhu dzinosvika makumi matatu nepfumbamwe kanosvika kashanu. 
2Corinthians11:25 Ndakarohwa nemibhadha kanosvika katatu. Ndakatakwa namatombo kamwechete. Ndakakudubuka nechikepe katatu. Ndakaita siku nesikati ndakayangarara mugungwa. 
2Corinthians11:26 Panzendo dzangu dzakawanda ndakapinda njodzi dzenzizi nenjodzi dzamakororo, uye njodzi dzaibva kuvanhu vokwangu uyewo nenjodzi dzaibva kunevechirudzi kwozoti njodzi muguta, kwoti njodzi musango, kwouya njodzi mugungwa nenjodzi dzaibva kuhama dzenhema" 
2Corinthians11:27 mubasa rakaoma nomuzvinhu zvinotambudza nomukushaiswa hope kakawanda; munzara nenyota uye kazhinji ndisina chokudya; muchando nomukushaya chokufuka 
2Corinthians11:28 tisingatauri zvedu nezvezvimwe izvi, mazuva ose ndinogara ndakaremerwa nokufunga masangano ose." 
2Corinthians11:29 Ndiani anorukutika ndikasarukutikawo. Ndiani anopinzwa mukutadza ndikasagumbuka nazvo. 
2Corinthians11:30 Dai kuri kuti ndinozvirova dundundu ndingatozvirovera dundundu utera hwangu," 
2Corinthians11:31 Mwari naBaba waTenzi Jesu, iye anofanira kurumbidzwa nokusingaperi anoziva kuti handitauri nhema." 
2Corinthians11:32 KuDhamasikosi mutongi aiva pasi paMambo Aretasi akagaririra guta reDhamasikosi kuti andibate 
2Corinthians11:33 asi ndakaburutswa ndiri mutswanda napaburi raiva parusvingo ndikamupunyuka. 
2Corinthians12:1 Hazvina zvazvo zvazvinobatsira asi ndinofanira kuenderera mberi nokuzvirumbidza. Ndava kuenda kune zvezvioneso nezviratidzo zvaTenzi. 
2Corinthians12:2 Ndinoziva mumwe munhu muna Kristu akatututswa kuenda kudenga rechitatu makore gumi namana apfuura. Kuti akaendako nomuviri wake here kana kuti asina muviri wake, handizivi, Mwari ndiye anoziva." 
2Corinthians12:3 Chandinoziva ndechokuti munhu uyu akatututswa kuenda kuParadhiso. Kuti akaendako nomuviri wake here kana kuti asina muviri wake, handizivi, asi Mwari ndiye anoziva." 
2Corinthians12:4 Ikoko akanzwa zvinhu zvisingatauriki zvisingabvumirwi kuti munhu ataure. 
2Corinthians12:5 Munhu iyeyo ndinodada naye asi ini pachangu handizvidadisi. Chandinodada nacho utera hwangu. 
2Corinthians12:6 Dai kuri kuti ndinozvidadisa zvangu, handingavi benzi nokuti ndinenge ndichitaura chokwadi asi handizvidadisi kuti vanhu varege kundiona sowokumusoro kupinda zvavanoona mandiri kana zvavanonzwa kwandiri." 
2Corinthians12:7 Asi kuti ndirege kuita zenze nezviratidzo zvakawanda ndakapiwa munzwa munyama, nhumwa yaSatani yokundishusha kuti ndirege kuva nezenze." 
2Corinthians12:8 Ndakateterera Tenzi katatu kose nezvawo kuti ubviswe 
2Corinthians12:9 asi akati, “Nyasha dzangu dzinokwana kwauri nokuti simba rangu rinoonekwa muutera kushanda kwaro kuzere.” Naizvozvo ndinotofara kudada noutera hwangu kuti simba raKristu rigare pandiri." 
2Corinthians12:10 Nezvo pamusana paKristu, ndinofara noutera nokutukwa nezvinonetsa nokushushwa nenhamo nokuti kana ndiino utera ndipo pandine simba." 
2Corinthians12:11 Ndaita benzi chairo asi ndimi maita kuti ndidaro. Imi ndimi maifanira kutozivisa vanhu zvandiri nokuti hapana chandinopfuurwa naivo vapositori vapamusoro vacho ivavo kunyange zvangu ndiri chinhu pasina. 
2Corinthians12:12 Zviratidzo zvomupositori wechokwadi zvakaitwa pakati penyu nomwoyo murefu chaiwo nezviratidzo nezvishamiso namabasa makuru. 
2Corinthians12:13 Ko chamusina kuitirwa chakaitirwa mamwe masangano ndechipi kusiya kuti hapana, ini pachangu, chandakakuremedzai nacho. Mundiregererewo kukukanganisirai kudai." 
2Corinthians12:14 Ndakagadzirira kukushanyirai kechitatu, asi hapana chandichakuremedzai nacho nokuti handisikutsvaka zvinhu zvenyu asi imi nokuti vana havasiri ivo vanofanira kuriritira vabereki asi vabereki ndivo vanofanira kuriritira vana vavo." 
2Corinthians12:15 Ndingafare kupedzera imi zvinhu zvangu kana kupera iyeni ndichiitira imi. Zvino kana ndichikudai zvakanyanya kudai, ndicho chingave chikonzero chokundida kwenyu zvishoma here?" 
2Corinthians12:16 Ngatitii ini handina kukuremedzai asi imi mungati kungwarisaka kwangu ikoko kwaita kuti ndikudyei nomunyati? 
2Corinthians12:17 Ndakakunyengedzai here nokuno mumwe wavandakatumirai kwamuri? 
2Corinthians12:18 Ndakakurudzira Titosi kuenda ndikamutumira neimwe hama yedu. Titosi akakunyengedzerai here? Hatina here kushanda nomweya mumwecheteyo tichitevera gwara rimwechete? 
2Corinthians12:19 Manga muchifunga here, pose apa, kuti tanga tichizvidzivirira kwamuri? Takanga tichitaura muna Kristu pamberi paMwari tichida kukuvakai, hama dzangu." 
2Corinthians12:20 Ndavakutotya kuti pamwe ndichauya ndikasvikokuwanai musiri zvandinoda kuti munge muri uye kuti muchandiwana ndisiri zvamunoda kuti ndinge ndiri. Zvichida pano kutukana kana shanje kana hasha kana kuzvifunga kana kurevana kana makuhwa kana kuzvikudza kana nyonganyonga. 
2Corinthians12:21 Ndiri kuzeza kuti pandichauyazve, Mwari wangu achandininipisa pamberi penyu, ndavakuungudza ndichichema vazhinji vaya vakatadza vasati vapinduka kune zvakan'ora nounzenza noupombwe zvavakaita." 
2Corinthians13:1 Aka kava kechitatu ndichiuya kwamuri. Nyaya yose inofanira kutsigirwa nezvapupu zviviri kana zvitatu. 
2Corinthians13:2 Ndakayambira avo vakambotadza navamwe vose uye ndiri kuvayambira, iye zvino, ndisipo sezvandakamboita ndiripo, pandakakushanyirai rwechipiri, kuti kana ndouyazve handivaregi vasina kurangwa." 
2Corinthians13:3 Zvamunoda chinhu chinoratidza nacho kuti Kristu anotaura mandiri, iye ndiye achaonana nemi, haasi dera ane simba pakati penyu." 
2Corinthians13:4 Iye akarovererwa pamuchinjikwa muutera asi mupenyu nesimba raMwari. Nokudaro muchaona kuti isu tine utera pamwechete naye asi tichararama pamwechete naye nesimba raMwari. 
2Corinthians13:5 Zviongororei muone kuti muchiri pachokwadi nechitendero chenyu here? Zvionei pamumire. Hamuoni here kuti Jesu Kristu ari mamuri kusatoti makundika mukuzviongorora kwenyu! 
2Corinthians13:6 Ndinotarisira kuti imi muchaona kuti isu hatina kukundika. 
2Corinthians13:7 Tinonamata Mwari kuti murege kukanganisa, kwete kuti zvioneke kuti isu takabudirira asi kuti muite zvakarurama kunyange isu tichiita sokunge takakundika." 
2Corinthians13:8 Hatigoni kuita chii zvacho kurwisana nechokwadi asi kutorwira chokwadi chacho. 
2Corinthians13:9 Tinotofara kana tine utera imi muine simba. Chatinonamatira ndechokuti imi mururamiswe. 
2Corinthians13:10 Ndiri kunyora izvi ndiri kure nemi kuti kana ndouyako, ndirege kuva munhu akaomarara pandinoshandisa simba randakapiwa naTenzi rokuvaka kwete kupaza." 
2Corinthians13:11 Pokupedzisira, hama dzangu, ndinoti chisarai. Gadziridzai nzira dzenyu. Teererai zvandinotaura, wiriranai, garisanai zvakanaka. Mwari werudo norugare achava nemi." 
2Corinthians13:12 Kwazisanai nokutsvodana kunoera. 
2Corinthians13:13 Vatsvene vose vanokukwazisai. Chikomborero chokutirwa nyasha naTenzi wedu Jesu Kristu norudo rwaMwari nokuwadzanisa kwaMweya Mutsvene ngachive nemi. 
Galatians1:1 Ndini Pauro mupositori asina kutumwa basa iri nomunhu kana kuripiwa nomunhu asi akaripiwa naJesu Kristu uye naMwari Baba vakamumutsa muvafi," 
Galatians1:2 ndinokunyorerai pamwechete nehama dzandinadzo kuno imi masangano okuGaratia ndichiti: 
Galatians1:3 chikomborero chokuitirwa nyasha necherugare ngachigare nemi chichibva kuna Mwari Baba nokuna Tenzi Jesu Kristu. 
Galatians1:4 Ndiye akazvipa pamusana pezvitadzo zvedu kuti atinunure kunyika youipi iripo iye zvino maererano nezvaidiwa naMwari naBaba vedu. 
Galatians1:5 Ivo ngavarumbidzwe narini narini. Ameni. 
Galatians1:6 Munondishamisa kuti mavakusiya nokukurumidza kudai iye akakudaidzai nenyasha dzaKristu muchipindukira kune rimwewo Shoko Rakanaka. 
Galatians1:7 Zvisingarevi zvazvo kuti kuna rimwezve Shoko Rakanaka asi kuti kune vamwe vanokutambudzai vachida kuminamisa Shoko iroro Rakanaka raKristu. 
Galatians1:8 Kunyange dai tirisu kana mutumwa anobva kudenga achikuparidzai Shoko rinopesana neratakakuparidzai ngaave nerushambwa. 
Galatians1:9 Sezvatakambotaura kare ndinotaurazve zvino ndichiti kana pano munhu ari kukuparidzai Shoko Rakanaka rinopesana neramakambogamuchira ngaave norushambwa. 
Galatians1:10 Asi munofunga kuti iye zvino ndiri kutsvaka kufadza vanhu here kana kuti ndiripo pakufadza Mwari? Kana kuti munoti ndiri kuvavarira kufadza vanhu? Kana ndichiripo kufadza vanhu handifaniri kuva muranda waKristu. 
Galatians1:11 Nokuti ndingade kuti muzive hama dzangu kuti Shoko Rakanaka rakaparidzwa neni harisi Shoko ravanhu 
Galatians1:12 nokuti handina kurigamuchira richibva kumunhu uye handina kuri dzidziswa. Rakauya kwandiri nokuzviratidza kwaJesu Kristu kwandiri. 
Galatians1:13 Inga makanzwa wani nezvoupenyu hwangu hwakare muchiJudha, kutambudza zvakaipisisa kwandaiita sangano raMwari ndichiedza kuriparadza." 
Galatians1:14 Ini ndakabudirira mune zvechiJudha kupfuura vazhinji vezera rangu mukati mavanhu vokwangu. Ndaisimbirira chaizvo mune zvamagamuchidzanwa amadzitateguru angu. 
Galatians1:15 Zvino iye zvaakanga andisarudza ndisati ndaberekwa akandidaidza nenyasha dzake. 
Galatians1:16 Akafara kuratidza Mwanakomana wake kwandiri kuti ndimuparidze kune vechirudzi, handina kumbobvunza munhu." 
Galatians1:17 Uye handina kuenda kuJerusaremu kuna vakanga vakanditangira kuva vapositori asi ndakaenda kuArabhia. Ndakazodzokerazve kuDhamasikusi. 
Galatians1:18 Mushure memakore matatu ndakakwira kuJerusaremu kundoshanyira Kefasi ndikagara naye kwamazuva gumi namashanu. 
Galatians1:19 Handina kuona vamwe vapositori kusiya Jemusi mukomanomunun'una naTenzi. 
Galatians1:20 NaMwari chaiye, zvandiri kukunyorerai handisi kunyepa." 
Galatians1:21 Ndakazoendawo kumatunhu eSiria neekuKirikia. 
Galatians1:22 Izvozvo, kuJudhea hapana aiziva uso hwangu mumasangano aKristu okuJudhea." 
Galatians1:23 Vaingonzwa zvichinzi uya aimbotitambudza avakuparidza chitendero chaaimboda kuparadza. 
Galatians1:24 Vakarumbidza Mwari nokuda kwangu. 
Galatians2:1 Shure kwamakore gumi namana ndakakwirazve kuJerusaremu naBhanabhasi. Ndakatorawo Titosi ndikaenda naye. 
Galatians2:2 Ndakakwirako ndatozviratidzwa, ndokundoturira kuna ivavo vainzi vakuru vakuru asi zviri zvepachedu toga Shoko Rakanaka randinoparidza mukati mevechirudzi, kuti zvimwe ndingadaro ndichishandira pasina kana kuti ndaishandira pasina." 
Galatians2:3 Kunyange Titosi akanga aneni haana kumanikidzwa kuti adzingiswe kunyange zvazvo aiva muGiriki. 
Galatians2:4 Asi nokuda kwehama dzechipameso dzakapinzwa muchivande kuzosora rusununguko rwedu rwatinarwo muna Kristu Jesu kuti dzitipinze muuranda. 
Galatians2:5 Hatina kubvuma zvavaida kunyange napaduku zvapo, tichiitira kuti chokwadi cheShoko Rakanaka chichengeterwe imi." 
Galatians2:6 Avo vainzi ndivo vakuru vakuru, zvavaiva zvakanga zvisina basa kwandiri nokuti Mwari haana rusaruro. Kwavari ndinoti ivavo vainzi ndivo vakuru vakuru hapana chavakandiwedzera," 
Galatians2:7 asi kuti pavakaona kuti ndakapiwa basa rokuparidza Shoko Rakanaka kuna vasina kudzingiswa sezvakangoitawo Pita akapiwa basa rokuparidza Shoko Rakanaka kuna vakadzingiswa; 
Galatians2:8 chikonzero chiri chokuti iye aishanda nomuna Pita basa rokuva mupositori akatumwa kuna vakadzingiswa akashandawo nemandiri basa iroro kune vechirudzi; 
Galatians2:9 Jemusi naKefasi naJohani vainzi vakuru vakuru vacho, vaona kuti ndakapiwa chikomborero chebasa iri, vakaratidza kuva vamwe neni naBhanabhasi nokukwazisana kwatakaita navo noruoko rworudyi; izvi zvikareva kuti isu ndisu toenda kunevechirudzi ivo vachienda kuna vakadzingiswa." 
Galatians2:10 Asi vaida kuti tiyeuke varombo, chiri icho chinhu chandaitodisisa kuita." 
Galatians2:11 Asi Pita paakauya kuAntioku ndakamutsiura pachena nokuti akanga akanganisa. 
Galatians2:12 Zvaivapo ndezvokuti, vamwe varume vasati vauya kubva kuna Jemusi, aidya nevechirudzi. Asi pavakangouya akabva aregera avakuzvitsaura pamusana pokutya vebato rokudzingiswa." 
Galatians2:13 Vamwe vaJudha vakava nokusatendeka ikoko pamwe naPita. Kunyange Bhanabhasi akafurirwawo mukusatendeka kwavo ikoko. 
Galatians2:14 Asi pandakaona kuti vakanga vasingaiti zvinowirirana nechokwadi cheShoko Rakanaka, ndakataurira Pita navamwe vose vakanga varipo ndichiti, “Zvino kana imi muJudha kudai muchigara somunhu wechirudzi musingaiti somuJudha, mungagomanikidza sei vechirudzi kuti vagare savaJudha?”" 
Galatians2:15 Isu iyesu, zvizvarwa zvechiJudha, tisiri vechirudzi, vatadzi," 
Galatians2:16 tinoziva kuti munhu haaruramiswi nezvisungo zvomutemo, asi nechitendero muna Jesu Kristu. Kunyangewo isu takatenda wani muna Kristu Jesu kuti tiruramiswe nechitendero muna Kristu kwete nezvisungo zvomutemo nokuti hapana anoruramiswa nezvisungo zvomutemo." 
Galatians2:17 Zvino kana isu mukushingairira kuti tiruramiswe muna Kristu; kana iyesu pachedu towanikwa tava vatadzi, ko zvino Kristu ava honzeri yechitadzo here? Hazvisizvo, kwete." 
Galatians2:18 Zvino kana ndava kuvakazve zvinhu zvandambopaza ndinobva ndazviita mudariki womutemo. 
Galatians2:19 Kuno mutemo, ndakangoita somunhu akafa kwauri kuti ndiraramire Mwari. Ndakarovererwa pamuchinjikwa pamwechete naKristu." 
Galatians2:20 Handichisiri ini ndiri mupenyu asi kuti Kristu ndiye avakugara mandiri. Upenyu hwandinahwo somunhu ndinohugara pamusana pechitendero chandinacho muMwanakomana waMwari akandida akapira upenyu hwake nokuda kwangu. 
Galatians2:21 Handisi kuramba nyasha dzaMwari nokuti kana kururamiswa kuchiitwa nomutemo Kristu akafira pasina. 
Galatians3:1 Imi vaGaratia mava kupenga here imi? Asi makaroiwa? Inga wani makanyatsotsanangurirwa pachena nezvokurovererwa pamuchinjikwa kwaJesu. 
Galatians3:2 Ndingade kumbokubvunzai izvi chete zvokuti iyemi makagamuchira Mweya pamusana pezvisungo zvomitemo here kana kuti nokudavira zvamakanzwa? 
Galatians3:3 Kuzungairai kwakadai? Vanhu vakatangisa muMweya, ndimi mavakupedzesera munyama here?" 
Galatians3:4 Kutambudzika kose uku makatambudzikira pasina here? Kana kunganzi chaizvoizvowo kutambudzikira pasina," 
Galatians3:5 ko iye anokupai Mweya Mutsvene achiita zvishamiso pakati penyu, anozviita pamusana pezvisungo zvomutemo here kana kuti nokunzwa nechitendero?" 
Galatians3:6 Abhurahamu akatenda muna Mwari zvikamupa kunzi akarurama. 
Galatians3:7 Naizvozvo munozvionawo kuti vanhu vechitendero ndivo vana vaAbhurahamu. 
Galatians3:8 Magwaro Matsvene paakaona kuti Mwari anoruramisa marudzi nechitendero akafanoparidza Abhurahamu Shoko Rakanaka achiti, “Ndudzi dzose dzichakomborerwa pamusana pako.”" 
Galatians3:9 Saizvozvo vanhu vechitendero vanokomborerwa pamwechete naAbhurahamu aiva nechitendero. 
Galatians3:10 Zviripo ndezvokuti vose vanovimba nezvisungo zvomutemo, vakarengererwa rushambwa nokuti zvakanyorwa zvichinzi, “Ngaawirwe norushambwa munhu wose asingarambe achichengeta zvose zvakanyorwa mubhuku romutemo achizviita.”" 
Galatians3:11 Zvino zviri pachena kuti hapana munhu anoruramiswa nomutemo pamberi paMwari nokuti munhu anenge akaruramiswa pamusana pechitendero achararama. 
Galatians3:12 Asi mutemo haunei nechitendero nokuti munhu anotevedza mitemo anofanira kuraramiswa nayo. 
Galatians3:13 Asi Kristu nokuva anenge akarengererwa rushambwa akatinunura kurushambwa rwomutemo nokuti muMagwaro Matsvene makanyorwa kuti: “Akarengererwa anorushambwa munhu wose anoturikwa pamuti.” 
Galatians3:14 Izvi zvakaitirwa kuti muna Kristu Jesu, chikomborero chaAbhurahamu chiuyewo kune vechirudzi kuti tigamuchire chivimbiso chaMweya nechitendero." 
Galatians3:15 Hama, houno muenzaniso wezvinongowanika muvanhu, hakuna munhu anopfudza chibvumirano chomunhu kana angawedzera pachiri kana chanyoreranwa pasi." 
Galatians3:16 Zvino zvitsidzo izvi zvakaitwa kuna Abhurahamu nokumwana wake. Chibvumirano ichocho hachisi kuti, “Kuvana vake” chichireva vana vazhinji asi kuti chinotaura nezvomumwechete chichiti, “NokuMwana wako,” zvichireva Kristu." 
Galatians3:17 Izvi ndizvo zvandinoreva, kuti mutemo wakazouya mushure memakore mazana mana anamakumi matatu haudzimi chitenderano chakambonyoreranwa naMwari zvinoita kuti chitenderano ichocho chishaye basa." 
Galatians3:18 Chandinodariro ndechokuti, kana nhaka iyoyo iri yokutevedza zvomumutemo haichisiri yechitsidzo. Asi Mwari akapa kuna Abhurahamu zviri zvechitsidzo." 
Galatians3:19 Ko mutemo ndowei? Wakapamhidzirwa pamusana pokukanganisa uchinzi uvepo kusvikira mwana uya akanga aitirwa chitsidzo ichocho auya. Mutemo iwoyo wakaziviswa nokuvatumwa uye pakanga paino munhu aiva munyai. 
Galatians3:20 Pano mumwechete asingadi munyai, Mwari chete." 
Galatians3:21 Ko zvinoreva kuti mutemo unorwisana nezvitsidzo zvaMwari here? Hazvisizvo kwete. Dai kuri kuti pane mutemo wakatemwa unogona kupa upenyu, pakadaro ururami hungadai huchitounzwa nomutemo." 
Galatians3:22 Magwaro Matsvene anoti zvinhu zvose zviri pasi pechitadzo kuti zvinhu zvakatsidzirwa nokuda kwechitendero muna Jesu Kristu zvipiwe kuna vanotenda. 
Galatians3:23 Chitendero chisati chauya takanga takaiswa pasi pomutemo, tiri parumananzombe kusvikira chitendero chaburitswa pachena." 
Galatians3:24 Ipapo mutemo wakanga uri mureri wedu kusvikira Kristu auya kuti tiruramiswe nechitendero. 
Galatians3:25 Zvino chitendero pachakadai kuuya, hatichisiri pasi pomureri." 
Galatians3:26 Nokuti muna Kristu Jesu, imi mose muri vana vaMwari nokuda kwechitendero." 
Galatians3:27 Mose imi makaombekwa muna Kristu, makatopfeka Kristu." 
Galatians3:28 Hapachisina muJudha kana muGiriki, hapachisina muranda kana musununguki, hapachisina murume kana mukadzi nokuti mose mava chinhu chimwechete muna Kristu Jesu." 
Galatians3:29 Zvino kana muri vanhu vaKristu mava chizvarwa chaAbhurahamu vagari venhaka maererano nechitsidzo. 
Galatians4:1 Zvino ndinoti mugari wenhaka paanenge chete achiri mwana muduku, haana zvaanosiyana nomuranda nyangwe zvazvo ari iye muridzi wezvinhu zvenhaka zvose izvozvo." 
Galatians4:2 Asi achiri mumaoko avabereki navatariri kusvikira pazuva rakatarwa nababa. 
Galatians4:3 Ndizvozvowo zvinesu, pataiva vana vaduku takanga tiri varanda vemweya yomudenga'mu nezvapasi pano." 
Galatians4:4 Nguva payakakwana Mwari akatuma Mwanakomana wake akaberekwa nomukadzi. Akaberekwa ari pasi pomutemo 
Galatians4:5 kuti anunure vanhu vakanga vari pasi pomutemo kuti tiwane nhaka savana. 
Galatians4:6 Pamusana pokuti muri vana, Mwari akatuma Mweya woMwanakomana wake mumwoyo yedu watinokwanisa naye kudaidza tichiti, “Abha, Baba.”" 
Galatians4:7 Nezvo nokuna Mwari, hauchisiri muranda, wava mwana. Zvino kana uri mwana naizvozvo uri mugari wenhaka." 
Galatians4:8 Kare pamakanga musingazivi Mwari maiva varanda vezvinhu zvisiri Mwari. 
Galatians4:9 Asi zvino, pamavakuzivana naMwari, kana kuti pamavakuzivikanwa naMwari, mungapindukire seizve kumweya yezvinhu zvisina simba uye isina chayo yamavakuda kuva varanda vayozve." 
Galatians4:10 Munochengeta mazuva makuru, nemwedzi nemwaka namakore." 
Galatians4:11 Inga ndinokaronge ndakashandira pasina. 
Galatians4:12 Hama, ndinokukumbirisai kuti ivai sezvandiri nokuti iniwo ndakava sezvamuri. Imi hapana chamakanditadzira" 
Galatians4:13 sezvamunongozivawo kuti pamusana pezvaindirwadza munyama'mu zvakaita kuti ndiparidze Shoko Rakanaka kwamuri pakutanga paya. 
Galatians4:14 Kunyange zvazvo zvandaiva chaiva chiedzo kwamuri, hamuna kundisema kana kundishora asi makatondigamuchira sokunge ndaiva mutumwa waMwari, saKristu Jesu." 
Galatians4:15 Ko kufara kwenyu kuyazve kuripi? Ndinokupupurirai kuti dai zvaikwanisika mungadai makatosvukunura maziso enyu muchiapa kwandiri. 
Galatians4:16 Ko zvino ndava muvengi wenyu pamusana pokukutaurirai chokwadi here? 
Galatians4:17 Vamwe vanhu vaya vanoratidza savanokudai kwazvo. Asi chinangwa chavo chaicho hachina kunaka. Chavari kungoda kukuparadzanisai neni kuti muvadewo ivo. 
Galatians4:18 Chinhu chakanaka nguva dzose kuva nechido chakakura kudaro kana chinangwa chacho chakanaka kwete kana ndiinemi chete. 
Galatians4:19 Vanangu, ndinorwadziwazve saamai vave panguva yokuda kusununguka kusvikira Jesu aumbwa mamuri." 
Galatians4:20 Ndinodisa chaizvo kuti dai ndanga ndiinemi iye zvino. Ndaibva ndasandura maitiro andiri kuita, nokuti ndiri kushaya kuti ndokutaurirai ndichiti kudii." 
Galatians4:21 Ndiudzei, imi munoda kuva pasi pomutemo, hamunzwi here zvinorehwa nomutemo" 
Galatians4:22 nokuti zvakanyorwa kuti Abhurahamu akanga aina vanakomana vaviri. Mumwe akamubereka nomuranda, mumwe akamubereka nomudzimai asiri muranda." 
Galatians4:23 Mwana womuranda akaberekwa sezvinongoitwawo chero munhu. Mwana womusununguki akaberekwa nokuda kwechitsidzo. 
Galatians4:24 Zvino iri raiva dimikira. Vakadzi vaviri ava vanomirira zvitenderano zviviri. Chimwe chitenderano ndechokugomo reSinai chinobereka vana vouranda, ndiye Hagari." 
Galatians4:25 Zvino Hagari ndiro gomo reSinai kuArabhia. Rinomirira guta reJerusaremu riripo nhasi uno nokuti riri muuranda pamwechete navana varo. 
Galatians4:26 Asi guta reJerusaremu rokumusoro riri murusununguko uye ndiro amai vedu," 
Galatians4:27 nokuti zvakanyorwa zvichinzi, “Fara zvako iwe mukadzi asina mbereko asingabereki, pururudza uchidaidzira kwazvo iwe usina kumbonzwa kurwadza kwemimba nokuti mukadzi akarambwa ana vana kupinda anomurume.”" 
Galatians4:28 Zvino, hama dzangu, isu, saIsaki tiri vana vechitsidzo." 
Galatians4:29 Sapanguva iyoyo, uya akaberekwa maererano nenyama akatambudza uyo akaberekwa maererano naMweya. Ndizvozvo nanhasi." 
Galatians4:30 Ko Magwaro Matsvene anoti kudiiko? Anoti dzinga mukadzi muranda nemwana wake nokuti mwana womuranda haafaniri kudya nhaka nomwana womukadzi wakasununguka. 
Galatians4:31 Saizvozvo, hama dzangu, hatisi vana vomukadzi muranda asi vomukadzi wakasununguka." 
Galatians5:1 Kristu chaakatisunungurira kuti tive vanhu vakasununguka, nokudaro mirai zvakasimba murege kuzvipinzazve mujoko rouranda." 
Galatians5:2 Chinzwai, ini Pauro ndinoti kwamuri, kana mukadzingiswa Kristu anenge asisina chimuko kwamuri." 
Galatians5:3 Ndinonyatsokutaurirai pachena zvakare kuti munhu anobvuma kudzingiswa anofanira kuchengeta zvisungo zvose zvomutemo. 
Galatians5:4 Imi munoda kururamiswa nezvisungo zvomutemo makatochekana ukama naKristu, nyasha dzakatokupesai." 
Galatians5:5 Nokuna Mweya Mutsvene uye nechitendero, isu tinotarisira kururamiswa kwatiri kumirira." 
Galatians5:6 Nokuti muna Kristu Jesu kudzingiswa kana kusadzingiswa hakuna basa asi chitendero chine rudo. 
Galatians5:7 Inga maimbomhanya zvakanaka wani! Ko ndiani akakupingidzai kuteerera chokwadi. 
Galatians5:8 Kufurirwa ikoko hakusi kwaiye akakudaidzai. 
Galatians5:9 Mbiriso shomanana inofutisa mukanyiwa wose. 
Galatians5:10 Muna Tenzi kudai ndinovimba kuti imi hamuzovi nedzimwe pfungwa dzinosiyana nedzangu uye kuti iye ari kukushushai achawana mubayiro wake, kunyange ari ani zvake." 
Galatians5:11 Hama, kana ndichiri kuparidza zvedzingiso, chandiri kushushirwa chitendero chii? Kana zvakadaro kugumbura kunoita muchinjikwa kunobva kwabviswa." 
Galatians5:12 Ndingatoda kuti dai vari kukutambudzai ivavo vatozvigadzira ivo pachavo. 
Galatians5:13 Chandinodariro hama dzangu, ndechokuti makadanirwa rusununguko. Asi rusununguko rwenyu ngarurege kuva nzira yokuzvifadza. Asi shandiranai murudo" 
Galatians5:14 nokuti zvisungo zvose zvomutemo zvinozadziswa nechirevo chimwechete chinoti: “Ida mumwe wako sokuda kwaunozviita.” 
Galatians5:15 Kana basa renyu rava sezvikara kurumana nokudyana munofanira kuzvingwarira nokuti mungatosvika pakupedzana. 
Galatians5:16 Zvandinoreva ndezvizvi, zvokuti tungamirirwai naMweya murege kufadza havi dzomuviri" 
Galatians5:17 nokuti zvinodiwa nomuviri zvinorwisana nezvinodiwa naMweya. Zvinodiwawo naMweya zvinorwisana nezvinodiwa nehavi dzomuviri nokuti izvi zviri zviviri zvinorwisana zvichikutadzisai kuita zvamunoda. 
Galatians5:18 Asi kana muchitungamirirwa naMweya hamuchisiri pasi pomutemo. 
Galatians5:19 Zvino mabasa enyama anooneka pachena, ndeaya anoti: upombwe nokuita zvakaora, kwouya kusazvibata" 
Galatians5:20 nokunamata zvinhu zvisiri Mwari kwoti kuroya nokuvengana kwozoti kunetsana, nokuitirana shanje kwouyawo hasha, nokungozvifunga, kwozotiwo kupesana nokuita mapato anovengana" 
Galatians5:21 uye kusafarira zvakanaka zvavamwe, uyezve kuraradza nokusazvibata kwezvidhakwa nezvimwe zvakadaro. Ndinokuyambirai sokukuyambirai kwandakamboita ndichiti vanoita zvakadai havawani nhaka youmambo hwamwari." 
Galatians5:22 Asi Mweya anobereka muchero wokuti tive norudo norufaro norugare, tive nemwoyo murefu nomutsa nemwoyo wakanaka nokutendeka" 
Galatians5:23 uye unyoro nokuzvibata. Hakuna mutemo unorwisana nezvakadai sezvizvi. 
Galatians5:24 Avo vanenge vari vanhu vaKristu Jesu vakaroverera pamuchinjikwa humunhu hwavo nehavi dzahwo nezvido zvahwo. 
Galatians5:25 Kana Mweya ari iye anoita kuti tirarame; saizvozvo ngatichitungamirirwawo naMweya. 
Galatians5:26 Ngatiregei kuzvikudza kana kudenhana kana kuitirana shanje. 
Galatians6:1 Hama dzangu, kana mumwe wenyu apindwa nokukanganisa kwakadii zvako, imi vanamati, vanaMweya, mudzorei zvakapfava zvinyoro asi muchizvichenjererawo nokuti imi mungadaro mukaedzwawo." 
Galatians6:2 Batsiranai mukutakura mitoro yenyu. Saizvozvo munobva mazadzisa mutemo waKristu. 
Galatians6:3 Kana munhu achizviti ndini pano iye pasina zvaari anozvinyengedza. 
Galatians6:4 Munhu wose ngaazviongorore mabasa ake. Pakadaro chaanozozvirovera dundundu zvinhu zvinenge zviri maari pachake kwete zvokuzvienzanisa navamwe 
Galatians6:5 nokuti mumwe nomumwe ane zvinomuremera zvaanofanira iye pachake kutakurana nazvo. 
Galatians6:6 Munhu anenge achidzidziswa nomumwe shoko ngaagoverane zvinhu zvose zvakanaka nomudzidzisi wake. 
Galatians6:7 Musazvinyengedze nokuti Mwari haaitwi chiseko. Munhu zvaunodyara ndizvo zvaunokohwa. 
Galatians6:8 Munhu anodyara zvinonangana nomuviri wake, mumuviri iwoyo anozokohwamo kuora kwawo. Anodyarawo zvinonangana nemweya wake anokohwawo mumweya wake upenyu usingaperi." 
Galatians6:9 Ngatiregei kuneta kuita zvakanaka nokuti nenguva yacho tichazokohwa kana tikarega kurasa mwoyo. 
Galatians6:10 Naizvozvo patinenge tangowaniswawo nguva yacho ngatiitei zvakanaka kumunhu ari wose wose, asi zvikuru kune vemhuri yechitendero chedu." 
Galatians6:11 Tarisai muone kuti ndiri kukunyorerai namabhi akakura sei uye ndichikunyorerai noruoko rwangu. 
Galatians6:12 Vanhu vanoda kuzvionesa nezvinoonekwa pamuviri ndivo vanokumanikidzai kudzingiswa vachingoitira chete kuti varege kutambudzirwa muchinjikwa waKristu. 
Galatians6:13 Kunyange ivo vacho vanodzingiswa havachengeti zvisungo zvomutemo. Asi vanoda kuti imi mudzingiswe kuti vawane mukurumbira nezvakaitwa pamuviri penyu. 
Galatians6:14 Kana ndirini, hazvifaniri kumbopinda mupfungwa dzangu kuti ndizvirovere dundundu chimwe chinhu kunze kwomuchinjikwa waTenzi Jesu Kristu wakaita kuti nyika ishaye maturo kwandiri sokurovererwa kwayo pamuchinjikwa uye kuti ini ndishaye maturo kwairi sokuroverwawo kwayo pamuchinjikwa." 
Galatians6:15 Kudzingiswa kana kusadzingiswa hakurevi chinhu asi chisikwa chitsva. 
Galatians6:16 Rugare nengoni ngazvive kune vose vanofamba nenzira iyi nekune vaIsiraeri vaMwari. 
Galatians6:17 Kubvira zvino ngaparege kuwana anonditambudza nokuti ndine mavanga aJesu. 
Galatians6:18 Chikomborero chokuitirwa nyasha naTenzi wedu Jesu Kristu ngachive nemi hama dzangu. Ameni. 
Ephesians1:1 Ndini Pauro ndakaitwa mupositori waKristu Jesu chiri chido chaMwari, ndinokunyorerai imi vatsvene uye vanhu vakatendeka muna Kristu Jesu." 
Ephesians1:2 Mwari Baba vedu naTenzi Jesu Kristu ngaakuitirei nyasha akupei rugare. 
Ephesians1:3 Ngaarumbidzwe Mwari naBaba vaTenzi wedu Jesu Kristu akatikomborera muna Kristu; akatikomborera namakomborero ose ezvomweya okumatenga. 
Ephesians1:4 Akatisarudza maari pasi pasati pasikwa kuti tive vatsvene vakarurama pamberi pake. 
Ephesians1:5 Mwari, nechido chake, zvakamufadza kufanotisarudza nokuna Jesu Kristu kuti tive vana vake murudo," 
Ephesians1:6 kuti Mwari arumbidzwe pamusana penyasha dzake dzisingatauriki dzaakatiitira nokuMwanakomana wake wapamwoyo pasina muripo. 
Ephesians1:7 Nokwaari takawana ruponeso neropa rake rwokuregererwa zvikanganiso zvedu, maererano nokuwanda kwenyasha dzake" 
Ephesians1:8 dzaakatipavhurira. 
Ephesians1:9 Noungwaru hwose uye zviri pachenawo, akatizivisa zvinhu zvakavandika, maererano nechinangwa chake chaakanga anacho muna Kristu" 
Ephesians1:10 chourongwa hwake hwokuti kana nguva yakwana, abatanidze zvinhu zvose, zviri kudenga nezviri pasi agozviisa pasi paKristu." 
Ephesians1:11 Maari, sokutemwa kwazvakaitwa muurongwa huri kushanda muna zvose, nokuti chakanga chiri chido chake," 
Ephesians1:12 isu takatanga kuva nechitarisiro muna Kristu, takasarudzwa tikapiwa basa rokurumbidza mbiri yake." 
Ephesians1:13 Zvino, kana imiwo, muna Kristu, makanzwa shoko rechokwadi neShoko Rakanaka roruponeso rwenyu, mukatenda maari, makaiswa rupawo rwaMweya Mutsvene wechivimbiso." 
Ephesians1:14 Mweya Mutsvene ndiye rubatso rwenhaka yedu kusvikira taiwana, mbiri yaMwari ichibva yarumbidzwa." 
Ephesians1:15 Naizvozvo kana iniwo pandakanzwa zvechitendero chenyu muna Tenzi Jesu uye rudo rwenyu kuna vatsvene vose 
Ephesians1:16 handizorori kutenda Mwari pamusana penyu ndichikuyeukai muminamato yangu ndichiti," 
Ephesians1:17 “Dai Mwari waTenzi wedu Jesu Kristu, Baba vembiri vangokupai Mweya woungwaru anozarurira vanhu kuti mumuzive" 
Ephesians1:18 uye kuti mwoyo yenyu ivhenekerwe kuti muzive chitarisiro chaakakudanirai uye upfumi hwenhaka yake inomukurumbira inowanikwa navatsvene 
Ephesians1:19 uye hakusi kukura ikoko kwakaita simba rake matiri isu tinotenda sokushanda kwakaita simba rake guru 
Ephesians1:20 raakashandisa munaKristu paakamumutsa kuvakafa akaita kuti agare kurudyi rwake kunzvimbo dzokumatenga. 
Ephesians1:21 Kristu akaiswa pamusoro pavose zvavo vane ukuru ukuru, pamusoro pamadzishe navabati vezvigaro uye pamusoro pavane umambo, akapiwawo zita rinomukurumbira kupfuura mazita ose pasi pano nokudenga." 
Ephesians1:22 Mwari akaisawo zvinhu zvose pasi petsoka dzake akamuita musoro wezvinhu zvose musangano 
Ephesians1:23 riri iro muviri wake rinomuzadzisa iye azere pasi pose muna zvose.” 
Ephesians2:1 Nokudaro akaita kuti imi muve vapenyu pamakanga muri vanhu vakafa pamusana pezvikanganiso nomuzvitadzo mamakambogara 
Ephesians2:2 muchitevedza maitiro apanyika pano muchiteverawo changamire womweya inesimba iri mumhepo, mweya uri kushanda muvanhu vasingateereri." 
Ephesians2:3 Isuwo tose takambogarawo mukati mazvo tichitevera havi dzomuviri wedu, tichitevera zvinoda muviri nepfungwa dzedu. Naizvozvo takanga takazvarirwa shamhu sezvakanga zvangoitawo vanhu vose." 
Ephesians2:4 Asi Mwari, azere netsitsi, pamusana porudo rwake rukuru rwaakatida narwo," 
Ephesians2:5 kunyange patanga takafa nokuda kokutadza kwedu, akatiita kuti tive vapenyu pamwe naKristu. Makaponeswa nenyasha." 
Ephesians2:6 Akatimutsa pamwechete naye akaita kuti tigare naye mumatenga tiri muna Kristu Jesu," 
Ephesians2:7 kuti mumazuva achauya, norudo rwake, aratidze upfumi husingaverengeki hwenyasha dzake kwatiri muna Kristu Jesu." 
Ephesians2:8 Pamusana penyasha makaponeswa nechitendero, asi musiri imi munozviponesa; chipo chaMwari," 
Ephesians2:9 kwete pamusana pamabasa kuti pasave nomunhu anozvikudza 
Ephesians2:10 nokuti tiri basa ramaoko ake, takasikwa muna Kristu Jesu kuti tiite mabasa akanaka akafanogadzirwa naMwari kuti tiatevedze." 
Ephesians2:11 Naizvozvo, imi vechirudzi panyama, yeukai kuti maimbonzi vanhu vasina kudzingiswa navaya vakadzingiswa chiri chinhu chinoitwa panyama namaoko." 
Ephesians2:12 Yeukai kuti panguva iyoyo imi makanga makaparadzana naKristu, muri vatorwa kumhuri yeIsiraeri makatsaurwa kuzvitenderano zvechipikirwa musina chitarisiro uye musina Mwari panyika." 
Ephesians2:13 Asi iye zvino, muna Kristu Jesu, imi maimbova kure makaunzwa padyo neropa raKristu." 
Ephesians2:14 Nokuti Kristu ndiye rugare rwedu akaita kuti tive vamwe akaputsa munyama yake chidziro chaiparadzanisa vanhu choruvengo 
Ephesians2:15 nokudzima mutemo wemirao nezvirevo kuti aumbe maari iye munhu mumwechete mutsva panzvimbo yavaviri. Nokudaro akaunza rugare. 
Ephesians2:16 Uye kuti nomuchinjikwa, atiwadzanise naMwari mumuviri mumwechete, nezvo achibva aparadza ruvengo." 
Ephesians2:17 Akauya akaparidza rugare kwamuri imi maiva kure kure. Akaparidzawo rugare kune vakanga vari padyo 
Ephesians2:18 nokuti nokwaari uye naMweya mumwechete tinowana masvikiro kuna Baba. 
Ephesians2:19 Nezvo hamuchisiri vaenzi kana vatorwa asi mava vagari vomo pamwe navatsvene nenhengo dzemhuri yaMwari. 
Ephesians2:20 Makavakwa pahwaro hwavapositori navaporofita, Kristu Jesu pachake ari iye ibwe rapakona." 
Ephesians2:21 Paari ndipo pakabatanidzwa imba yose ichizokura muna Tenzi kuva Temberi inoera. 
Ephesians2:22 Maari imiwo makavakwa mairi kuva nzvimbo yokugara yaMwari muna Mweya. 
Ephesians3:1 Nokuda kwaizvozvi ini Pauro, musungwa waKristu Jesu pamusana penyu imi vechirudzi, ndinonamata kuna Mwari." 
Ephesians3:2 Ndinofunga kuti makanzwa zvebasa renyasha dzaMwari routariri randakapirwa imi," 
Ephesians3:3 rokuti zvakavandika zviya zvakaziviswa kwandiri muchiratidzo, sokunyora kwandakaita muchidimu." 
Ephesians3:4 Mukazviverenga muchaona kunzwisisa kwandinoita zvakavandika zvaKristu 
Ephesians3:5 zvisina kuziviswa kuvanhu mune zvimwe zvizvarwa sokuziviswa kwazvakaitwa naMweya iye zvino kuna vapositori vake vatsvene navaporofita 
Ephesians3:6 zvokuti pamusana peShoko Rakanaka vechirudzi vavawo vagari venhaka navaJudha, uye vava nhengo dzomuviri mumwechete navo uyewo vanhu vanogoverana navo zvakapikirwa muna Kristu Jesu." 
Ephesians3:7 Ini ndakaitwa mushandiri weShoko Rakanaka iroro maererano nechipo chenyasha idzodzo dzaMwari dzandakapiwa nokushanda kwesimba rake. 
Ephesians3:8 Kunyange zvangu ndiri mudukuduku wokupedzisirira kuna vatsvene vose, nyasha idzi dzakapiwa kwandiri kuri kuti ndiparidze vechirudzi upfumi husingatauriki hwaKristu" 
Ephesians3:9 uye kuti ndionese vanhu vose urongwa hwezvakavandika zvakanga zvakavanzwa kwezvizvarwa nezvizvarwa naMwari akasika zvinhu zvose 
Ephesians3:10 kuitirawo kuti nomusangano, ungwaru hwaMwari hwakasiyana — siyana huratidzwe zvino kune mweya mikurukuru neino ushe yomumatenga." 
Ephesians3:11 Izvi zvaifambirana nezvirongwa zvavo zvokugara nokugara zvakazozadzikiswa muna Kristu Jesu Tenzi wedu," 
Ephesians3:12 anotipa kuti tive nechivindi nechivimbo chokusvika pana Mwari nokuda kwechitendero chedu maari. 
Ephesians3:13 Naizvozvo ndinokukumbirai kuti musarase mwoyo pamusana pezvandiri kutambudzikira imi. Inga ndizvo zvinokupai kuti murumbidzwe wani. 
Ephesians3:14 Nokuda kwaizvozvi ndinopfugama namabvi angu mberi kwaBaba 
Ephesians3:15 kunobva chose chinotumidzwa kuti mhuri, chingave kudenga kana kuti pasi pano." 
Ephesians3:16 Ndinonamata kuti kubva muupfumi hwavo hune mbiri akusimbaradzei nesimba nokuna Mweya, umunhu hwenyu hwomukati" 
Ephesians3:17 uye kuti nechitendero chenyu Kristu aite musha wake mumwoyo yenyu kuti imi mudzike midzi yenyu uye kucherera hwaro hwenyu murudo," 
Ephesians3:18 kuti muwane simba rokunzwisisa pamwechete navatsvene vose upamhi nourefu nokukwira kumusoro mudenga noudzamu uye kuti muzive 
Ephesians3:19 rudo rwaKristu runopfuura ruzivo kuti muzadzwe naMwari wose sezvaari. 
Ephesians3:20 Zvino iye ane simba rinoshanda matiri anokwanisa kuita zvakawandisisa kupfuura zvose zvatingakumbire kana zvatingafunge 
Ephesians3:21 iye ngaarumbidzwe musangano uye muna Kristu Jesu kuzvizvarwa nezvizvarwa narini narini wose Ameni. 
Ephesians4:1 Naizvozvo ini musungwa akasungirwa Tenzi ndinokukumbirai kuti mugare upenyu hunowirirana noupenyu hwamakadaidzirwa. 
Ephesians4:2 Ivai nemwoyo wokuzvirereka nemwoyo munyoro nemwoyo murefu muchitirirana zvine rudo 
Ephesians4:3 muine shungu dzokuchengetedza Mweya wokubatana kwamakaita makasunganidzwa norugare. 
Ephesians4:4 Kunongova nomuviri mumwechete naMweya mumwechete sokudaidzirwa kwamakaitwa chitarisiro chimwechete pamakadaidzwa. 
Ephesians4:5 Kuna Tenzi mumwechete nechitendero chimwechete noruombeko rumwechete. 
Ephesians4:6 Kuna Mwari mumwechete Baba vedu tose vari pamusoro pavose vanoshanda nomuna vose uye muna vose. 
Ephesians4:7 Mumwe nomumwe wedu akapiwa nyasha zvichienderana nokukura kwechipo chaakapiwa naKristu. 
Ephesians4:8 Saizvozvo zvinonzi, “Paakakwira kumusoro akatungamirira gurusvusvu ravasungwa akapa zvipo kuvanhu.”" 
Ephesians4:9 Ko, kuti akakwira kumusoro kunoreva kuti kudii? Kunorevawo kuti akambodzika pasi pasi penyika." 
Ephesians4:10 Iye akadzika ndiyewo akakwira kumusorosoro kwamatenga ose kuti azadze zvinhu zvose. 
Ephesians4:11 Zvipo zvake zvaiva zvokuti vamwe vave vapositori, vamwewo vave vaporofita uye vamwe vave vaparidzi veShoko Rakanaka, vamwe vari vafudzi, vamwe vari vadzidzisi" 
Ephesians4:12 kuti vatsvene vawaniswe ruzivo rwebasa rezvokwaMwari kuti muviri waKristu uumbwe 
Ephesians4:13 kusvikira tose tave vamwechete muchitendero nomukuziva Mwanakomana waMwari kusvikira tave vanhu vabve zano kusvikira tava nechimiro chaKristu chizere. 
Ephesians4:14 Izvi zvinoita kuti tirege kuramba tiri vana vanoitwa sukunasai vanongopeperetswa kose kose nechidzidziso chipi nechipi choujarijari hwavanhu nokusvinuka kwavo muunyengedzi. 
Ephesians4:15 Asi, zvirinani kutaura chokwadi murudo. Tinofanira kukura muna zvose maari iye musoro, Kristu." 
Ephesians4:16 Ndiye anoita kuti muviri wose ukure uchizviumba murudo wakabatana uye wakarukana nenhengo dzose dzauinadzo chero nhengo imwe neimwe ichiita basa rayo zvakanaka. 
Ephesians4:17 Zvino izvi ndizvo zvandinotaura ndichisimbisisa kwazvo muzita raTenzi kuti hamufaniri kunge muchagara savahedheni nepfungwa dzavo dzisina maturo. 
Ephesians4:18 Pfungwa dzavo dziri murima. Vakaparadzaniswa noupenyu hwaMwari pamusana pokushaya ruzivo kuri mavari nokuda kokuomarara kwavo komwoyo yavo. 
Ephesians4:19 Havasisina nyadzi; kana kuzvibata uye vanamakaro. 
Ephesians4:20 Hazvisiri izvo zvamakadzidza pana Kristu. 
Ephesians4:21 Makanzwaka imi nezvake mukadzidziswa maaari chokwadi sezvachiri muna Jesu. 
Ephesians4:22 Chibvisai humunhu hwenyu homugariro wenyu wakare hwakaodzwa nehavi dzounyengedzi," 
Ephesians4:23 muvandudzwe patsva mumweya nomupfungwa dzenyu," 
Ephesians4:24 mupfeke unhu hutsva hwakasikwa hwakatodzana naMwari muururami noutsvene huri pachokwadi. 
Ephesians4:25 Naizvozvo chikandai pasi nhema, munhu oga oga ataure chokwadi kuno mumwe wake nokuti tiri mutezo womumwe nomumwe wedu." 
Ephesians4:26 Kushatirwa mungashatirwe zvenyu asi musapare chitadzo. Musavidze zuva makashatirwa 
Ephesians4:27 muchipa Dhiabhori mukana. 
Ephesians4:28 Mbavha ngaachirega kuba ichiita basa kwaro namaoko ayo [rinoiraramisa] kuti ibatsire vasina chokubata. 
Ephesians4:29 Mumuromo menyu ngamurege kubuda mazwi akaora asi mazwi ayo chete anovaka anofambirana nezviripo kuti ape chikomborero vanenge vakateerera. 
Ephesians4:30 Muregewo kutsamwisa Mweya Mutsvene waMwari nokuti ndiye wamakapiwa naye rupawo kuitira zuva reruponeso. 
Ephesians4:31 Bvisai mamuri nduramwa dzose nokutsamwa, nehasha nokupopota namakuhwa nouipi hwose." 
Ephesians4:32 Itiranai zvakanaka muve nomwoyo murefu muchiregererana sokuregererwa kwamakaitwa naMwari muna Kristu. 
Ephesians5:1 Naizvozvo savana vaMwari vapamwoyo, tevedzai zvinoita Mwari." 
Ephesians5:2 Garai upenyu hworudo sokutida kwakaita Kristu akazvipirira isu ari mupiro unonhuwirira nechibayiro kuna Mwari. 
Ephesians5:3 Sechinhu chinokodzerana navatsvene, pakati penyu hapafaniri kana kudomwa zvako upombwe nezvinhu zvose zvakaora kana makaro." 
Ephesians5:4 Ngaparege kuva nezvinhu zvisingakodzeri nezvetsvina zvose kana tunyaya tusina maturo kana kushaya hunhu asi chinofanira kuvapo kutenda. 
Ephesians5:5 Chamunofanira kuva nechokwadi nacho ndechichi chokuti hakuna anowana nhaka youmambo hwaKristu nohwaMwari kana ari mhombwe kana anoita zvakaora kana munhu ana makaro, iyeyo ndiye munhu anonamata mwari asiri iye." 
Ephesians5:6 Musanyengedzwe nomunhu ana mazwi asina maturo nokuti pamusana paizvozvi Mwari anoitira hasha vanhu vasingateereri. 
Ephesians5:7 Nezvo musafambidzane navo 
Ephesians5:8 nokuti maimbova verima asi muna Tenzi mava vechiedza. Naizvozvo fambai savana vechiedza. ( 
Ephesians5:9 Muchero wechiedza unowanikwa mune zvakanaka zvose nomune zvakarurama nezviri pachokwadi.) 
Ephesians5:10 Edzai kudzidza zvinofadza Tenzi. 
Ephesians5:11 Musave nechii chokuita namabasa asina muchero erima asi imi afumurei 
Ephesians5:12 nokuti zvinotonyadzisa kutaura zvinhu zvavanoita muchivande. 
Ephesians5:13 Asi kana chinhu chose chaburitswa pachena nechiedza chinobva chaonekwa. Zvino, chinhu chinenge chavakuoneka chinobva chava chiedza." 
Ephesians5:14 Ndokusaka zvichinzi; “Muka iwe uvete, muka muvakafa, Kristu achakuvhenekera.”" 
Ephesians5:15 Naizvozvo fambai makachenjera kwete savanhu vasina kungwara asi savanhu vakangwara. 
Ephesians5:16 Nyatsoshandisai nguva yenyu nokuti kwaipa mazuva ano. 
Ephesians5:17 Naizvozvo musave mazirema asi nzwisisai zvinoda Tenzi 
Ephesians5:18 uye musararadze newaini nokuti unzenza hwakapfuuridza ihwohwo, asi ini zadzwai naMweya." 
Ephesians5:19 Tauriranai muchiimbirana nziyo nedzimbo nezvimbo zvaMweya muchiimba muchiita mumhanzi kuna Tenzi nemwoyo yenyu yose 
Ephesians5:20 muchitenda Mwari Baba muzita raTenzi wedu Jesu Kristu nguva dzose uye muna zvose. 
Ephesians5:21 Zviisei pasi pomumwe nomumwe wenyu pamusana pokuremekedza Kristu. 
Ephesians5:22 Imi vadzimai zviisei pasi pavarume venyu sokuna Tenzi 
Ephesians5:23 nokuti murume ndiye musoro womudzimai sezvakangoita Kristu ari musoro wesangano iro riri muviri wake uye iye ari mununuri waro. 
Ephesians5:24 Sangano sezvariri pasi paKristu, vadzimaiwo ngavave pasi pavarume vavo muna zvose." 
Ephesians5:25 Imi varume idai vadzimai venyu sokuda kwakaita Kristu sangano akazvipira 
Ephesians5:26 iye pamusana paro kuti ariite dzvene, mushure mokunge ari shambidza mumvura neshoko" 
Ephesians5:27 kuti aritsvitse kwaari rakanaka kwazvo risina kana kavara kana pakaunyana kana chimwe chakadaro kuti rive dzvene risina chinoshoreka. 
Ephesians5:28 Saizvozvo varume vanofanira kuda vadzimai vavo sokuda kwavanoita miviri yavo. Munhu anoda mudzimai wake ari kutozvida iye pachake 
Ephesians5:29 nokuti hapana munhu anovenga muviri wake. Asi anotoupa chokudya nokunyatsouchengetedza sezvinoita Kristu kusangano. 
Ephesians5:30 Izvi pamusana pokuti tiri nhengo dzomuviri wake. 
Ephesians5:31 Nokuda kwaizvozvi murume anosiya baba vake naamai vake achibatanidzwa nomudzimai wake. Vose vari vaviri vachiva nyama imwechete. 
Ephesians5:32 Ichi chinhu chikuru chakavandika. Ndiri kureva nezvaKristu nesangano. 
Ephesians5:33 Asi izvi zvinorevawo imi. Mumwe nomumwe wenyu ngaade mudzimai wake sokuzvida kwaanoita iye pachake. Mudzimai ngaaremekedzewo murume wake. 
Ephesians6:1 Imi vana, teererai vabereki venyu muna Tenzi nokuti ndizvo zvakanaka." 
Ephesians6:2 “Remekedza baba naamai vako.” Uyu ndiwo mutemo unotanga kutaura uine chitsidzo 
Ephesians6:3 kuti zvikufambire zvakanaka uye kuti ugare nguva ndefu panyika. 
Ephesians6:4 Imi vabereki musashatirise vana venyu asi vayarutsei mukuzvibata nechidzidziso chaTenzi. 
Ephesians6:5 Imi varanda teererai vanatenzi venyu vapano pasi muchivaremekedza nokuvateerera zvakaperera sokunge muri kuzviitira Kristu 
Ephesians6:6 kwete zvechipameso zvokufadza vanhu asi savaranda vaKristu muchiita zvinodiwa naMwari nomwoyo wose. 
Ephesians6:7 Munofanira kuita basa renyu nechido sokunge muri kuriitira Tenzi kwete sokunge muri kuriitira vanhu. 
Ephesians6:8 Zivai kuti munhu anoita zvakanaka achapiwa zvakanaka naTenzi kunyange ari muranda kana musununguki. 
Ephesians6:9 Imi vana tenzi itaiwo zvimwechetezvo kwavari. Musavatyisidzire. Zivai kuti Tenzi wavo ari kudenga ndiye Tenzi wenyuwo uye kuti iye haana rusaruro. 
Ephesians6:10 Pokupedzisira itosimbai muna Tenzi uye nokusimbarara kwesimba rake. 
Ephesians6:11 Pfekai zvose zvokurwisa nazvo zvaMwari kuti mukwanise kumirisana namazano akaipa aDhiabhori 
Ephesians6:12 nokuti hatisi kurwisana navanhu asi nomweya ine ukuru ukuru, neino ushe nemweya inotonga pasi pose pano pane rima riripo iri uye tiri kurwisana nehondo nehondo dzomweya youipi iri mumatenga'mu." 
Ephesians6:13 Naizvozvo torai zvose zvokurwisa nazvo zvaMwari kuti mukwanise kumira pazuva iroro rinenge rakaipa. Kana marwisa zvakaomarara zvazvo kudaro imi mucharamba makamira. 
Ephesians6:14 Saizvozvo mirai makazvisunga zviuno zvenyu nechokwadi sebhande makapfeka demautare rapaditi rokururama. 
Ephesians6:15 Mutsoka dzenyu pfekai shangu dzokuda kuparidza Shoko Rakanaka rorugare 
Ephesians6:16 uyewo garai nguva dzose makabata nhoo yechitendero yamunogona kudzima nayo miseve yose yomoto yewakaipa. 
Ephesians6:17 Dzikai mumusoro ruponeso senguwani muine bakatwa raMweya zvichireva Shoko raMwari. 
Ephesians6:18 Namatai nguva dzose muina Mweya. Itai minamato nemikumbiro. Nechikonzero ichochi garai makangwaririra musingamborasa mwoyo muchikumbirira vatsvene vose. 
Ephesians6:19 Ndikumbirireiwo ini kuti ndiwaniswe mashoko pandinenge ndave kuda kutaura kuti ndiparidze nechivindi chakavandika chiya chezveShoko Rakanaka 
Ephesians6:20 randiri nhume yaro iri muusungwa kuti ndiriparidze ndakashinga sezvandinofanira kuita. 
Ephesians6:21 Zvino kuti imi muzivewo kuti ndakadii uye kuti ndiri kuitei, Tikikusi achakutaurirai zvose. Iye ihama yedu yapamwoyo uye mushandi wedu akatendeka muna Tenzi." 
Ephesians6:22 Ndamutumira ikoko nechikonzero ichochi kuti muzive kuti takadii kuno uye kuti akusimbaradzei mwoyo. 
Ephesians6:23 Hama Mwari Baba naTenzi Jesu Kristu ngaakuwanisei rugare norudo nechitendero. 
Ephesians6:24 Dai vose vanoda Tenzi Jesu Kristu norudo rusingaperi vangoitirwa nyasha. 
Philippians1:1 Ndini Pauro naTimoti varanda vaKristu Jesu ndinokunyorerai imi mose vatsvene muna Kristu Jesu vari kuFiripi namabhishopi namadhikoni. 
Philippians1:2 Mwari Baba vedu naTenzi Jesu Kristu ngavakuitirei nyasha vakupei rugare. 
Philippians1:3 Ndinotenda Mwari wangu pose pandinokufungai uye nguva dzose 
Philippians1:4 pose pandinokunamatirai mose, ndichikunamatirai nomufaro" 
Philippians1:5 ndichitenda Mwari norubatsiro rwenyu muShoko Rakanaka, kubvira pazuva rokutanga kusvikira pari nhasi." 
Philippians1:6 Ndine chokwadi chokuti iye akatangisa basa iri rakanaka mamuri, acharipedzisa pazuva raKristu Jesu." 
Philippians1:7 Munogara muri mumwoyo mangu mose zvenyu. Naizvozvo zviri pamwerowo kuti ndifunge kudai nezvenyu nokuti tinogoverana nyasha muusungwa hwangu uye mukurwira kusimbisa Shoko Rakanaka. 
Philippians1:8 Mwari angatondipupurirawo kuti ndinokusuwai sei mose ndiine rudo runa Kristu Jesu. 
Philippians1:9 Chandinokunamatirai ndechokuti dai rudo rwenyu rwangoramba rwuchifashukira kuwanda muine ruzivo nechipo chokugona kuona zvinhu nemazvo 
Philippians1:10 kuti mukwanise kusarudza chakanakisisa uye kuti muve vatsvene vasina chinoshoreka pamuri pazuva raKristu," 
Philippians1:11 makazadzwa nemichero yoururami inouya nokuna Jesu Kristu zvichipa mbiri norukudzo kuna Mwari. 
Philippians1:12 Hama dzangu ndingade kuti muzive kuti zvakaitika kwandiri zvakatobatsira kuenderera mberi kweShoko Rakanaka 
Philippians1:13 zvokuti zvavakutozivikanwa nevokuchengetedza mumuzinda navamwe vose kuti kuva mujeri kwangu, pamusana paKristu." 
Philippians1:14 Kuva mujeri kwangu kwakapa kuti ruzhinji rwevehama ruve nechivindi muna Tenzi uye vatova vanhu vasingambokatari zvavo kutaura Shoko raMwari. 
Philippians1:15 Ichokwadi kuti vamwe vanoparidza Kristu pamusana peshanje uye zvamakakatanwa asi vamwe vanozviita nemwoyo wakanaka. 
Philippians1:16 Ava vanozviita pamusana perudo vachiziva kuti ini ndiripo kurwira Shoko Rakanaka. 
Philippians1:17 Vamwe ava vanoparidza Kristu nomwoyo wokungozvifunga ivo pachavo kwete nokutendeka, asi vachida kundirwadzisa ndiri mujeri." 
Philippians1:18 Hazvinei hazvo. Chiripo chete ndechokuti Kristu anoparidzwa nenzira dzakawanda, dzingave nzira kwadzo kana dzisina kunaka asi Kristu ari kuparidzwa. Izvozvo ndizvo zvinondifadza zvikuru. Aiwa! Zvinofadza kwazvo" 
Philippians1:19 nokuti ndinoziva kuti neminamato yenyu uye norubatsiro rwaMweya waJesu Kristu ndichanunurwa. 
Philippians1:20 Chido changu nechitarisiro changu ndechokuti ndirege kumbofa ndakanyara asi ndive nechivindi chizere zvino uye samazuva ose Kristu acharumbidzwa mumuviri wangu noupenyu hwangu kana norufu rwangu 
Philippians1:21 nokuti kwandiri kurarama kwangu ndiKristu; kufa kupfuma. 
Philippians1:22 Dai kuri kuti ndinoramba ndiri mupenyu ndingatoita basa rine chimuko. Zvino chokuti ndisarudze ipapa ndachishaya. 
Philippians1:23 Ndakamanikwa pakati pazvo. Chido changu ndechokuti ndibve ndiende kuti ndindova naKristu nokuti ndizvo zvinotova nani kwazvo. 
Philippians1:24 Asiwo kuva mupenyu kunotodikanwa zvikuru pamusana penyu. 
Philippians1:25 Ndine chokwadi nezvizvi zvokuti ndichange ndiripo ndigoenderera mberi ndinemi mose kuti mukwanise kufambira mberi muine rufaro muchitendero chenyu 
Philippians1:26 kuti muwane chikonzero chokupa mbiri kuna Kristu Jesu pamusana pangu nokuti ndiri kuuyazve kwamuri. 
Philippians1:27 Chete, mugariro wenyu ngaufambirane neShoko raKristu, kuitira kuti kunyange ndikauya ndichizokuonai kana kuti ndisiko zvangu ndinzwe kuti makamira zvakasimba muine mwoyo nepfungwa imwecheteyo muchiita chirwirangwe pachitendero cheShoko Rakanaka." 
Philippians1:28 Mune chii nechii zvacho musatye mhandu dzenyu. Ichi chinobva chava chiratidzo chokuparadzwa kwavo asi chiri chiratidzo chokununurwa kwenyu chinobva kuna Mwari. 
Philippians1:29 Chikonzero ndechokuti pamusana paKristu makapiwa, kwete kuti mungodavira chete maari, asi kuti mumutambudzikirewo." 
Philippians1:30 Tiri muhondo imwecheteyo yamakandiona ndichirwa uye yamunonzwa kuti ndichiri kungorwisa. 
Philippians2:1 Zvino kana imi muine chinokukurudzirai muna Kristu, muine rudo runokugadzanisai mwoyo, muina Mweya uye muine rudo nomutsa," 
Philippians2:2 chiitai kuti ndinyatsofara nokuva nomwoyo mumwechete kwenyu muchidana zvimwechetezvo, muchinzwana muine mweya mumwechete." 
Philippians2:3 Musaite chii zvacho pamusana pokungozvifunga kana pamusana pokuzvikudza. Asi zvirerekei mutore vamwe savari nani kwamuri. 
Philippians2:4 Munhu ngaarege kungoisa ziso pane zvake chete asi ngaaite hanya nezvavamwe. 
Philippians2:5 Pakati penyu ivai nemwoyowo uyu mamuri waiva naKristu Jesu wokuti: 
Philippians2:6 Kunyange zvake akanga ari zvimwechetezvo naMwari, haana kuti ndoramba ndakangoomerana nokuenzana naMwari ikoko." 
Philippians2:7 Asi akazvidurura zvokuzvikwengura iye pachake akatora chimiro chomuranda akaberekwa akangoitawo zvakangoita vanhu. 
Philippians2:8 Ava munhu kudaro akazvidukupisa akateerera kudzamara pakufa, rufu rwomuchinjikwa." 
Philippians2:9 Naizvozvo Mwari akamusimudzirawo pamusorosoro akamupa zita rapamusorosoro kupfuura mazita ose; 
Philippians2:10 zvokuti kuremekedza zita raJesu, mabvi ose avari kudenga navari pasi pano navari pasi penyika, anofanira kumupfugamira" 
Philippians2:11 uye kuti rurimi rumwe norumwe rutaure pachena kuti Jesu ndiTenzi kuitira kuti Mwari Baba varumbidzwe. 
Philippians2:12 Naizvozvo hama dzangu dzadiwa, savanhu vanoteerera nguva dzose, nezvo nyatsoshandirai ruponeso rwenyu muchitya uye muchidedera kwete kana ndiripo chete asi zvikuru kana ndisipo" 
Philippians2:13 nokuti Mwari anoshanda mamuri kuti mude uye kuti mumushandire zvaanoda. 
Philippians2:14 Itai zvose musinganyunyuti kana kuita nharo 
Philippians2:15 kuti muve vanhu vasina mhosva vasina chakaipa pavari, vana vaMwari vasina chavanopomerwa mukati mechizvarwa chavanhu vakakombama, vakashata mamunopenya sezviedza panyika." 
Philippians2:16 Kubatisisa kwenyu shoko roupenyu ndiko kuchaita kuti ndizvikudze pazuva raKristu kuti handina kumhanyira pasina kana kushandira pasina. 
Philippians2:17 Kunyange zvazvo ndikadururwa somuteuro pamusoro pemupiro wechibayiro chechitendero chenyu ndinofara nokupembera pamwe nemi mose 
Philippians2:18 nemiwo munofanira kufara nokupembera pamwechete neni. 
Philippians2:19 Kana Tenzi Jesu ari mazviri, ndinotarisira kutuma Timoti kwamuri kuti ndifaranutswe kunzwa nezvenyu." 
Philippians2:20 Handina mumwe ane mwoyo wakaita sowake, ane hanya chaidzo noupenyu hwenyu." 
Philippians2:21 Vose vari kungotsvaka zvavo bedzi, kwete zvaJesu Kristu." 
Philippians2:22 Asi hunhu hwaTimoti munohuziva kuti akashanda neni pane zveShoko Rakanaka somwana nababa. 
Philippians2:23 Naizvozvo ndinotarisira kumutumira kana ndangoona kuti zviri kundifambira sei. 
Philippians2:24 Ndinovimba naTenzi kuti iyeni pachangu ndichauya nokukurumidza. 
Philippians2:25 Ndinofunga kuti ndinofanira kutumira Epafurodhitosi, hama yangu nomushandipamwe neni, iye musoja pamwe neni. Ndiyewo mutumwa wenyu, kwandiri uye munhu anondibatsira mune zvandinoshaya." 
Philippians2:26 Iye akanga achisuwira kwazvo kukuonai mose. Zvakamurwadza kwazvo kuti imi makanzwa kuti iye airwara. 
Philippians2:27 Ichokwadiwo kuti airwara, zvokutoda kufa asi Mwari akamuitira tsitsi, kwete iye chete asi kana iniwo kuti ndirege kuva nenhamo pamusoro peimwe nhamo." 
Philippians2:28 Nezvo ndinodisisa kwazvo kumutumira kuti mufare kwazvo kumuonazve uyewo kuti ndinge ndinoti gadzanei mwoyo. 
Philippians2:29 Nezvo mugamuchirei nomufaro muna Tenzi. Remekedzai vanhu vakadai 
Philippians2:30 nokuti akaisa upenyu rwake parumano zvokutoda kufira basa raKristu kuti andipe rubatsiro rwamakanga musingakwanisi kundipa. 
Philippians3:1 Pokupedzisira hama dzangu ndinoti farai muna Tenzi. Hachisi chinhu chinondinetsa kukunyorerai zvakare zvinhu zvandakambokunyorerai zvinotokuchengetedzai. 
Philippians3:2 Chenjererai imbwa dzavanhu dziya, chenjererai vanhu avo vanoita zvakaipa. Chenjererai vanhu ivavo vanodzingisa" 
Philippians3:3 nokuti isu ndisu vedzingiso yechokwadi, vanonamata Mwari muMweya uye tinovimba naKristu Jesu. Hativimbi nezvinoitwa panyama" 
Philippians3:4 kunyange zvazvo ini ndichigona kuvimba nezvakaitwa pamuviri wangu. Kana pane munhu angafunge kuti ane chikonzero chokuvimba nezvakaitwa panyama, ini ndinazvo zvakatopfuura izvozvo kuwanda." 
Philippians3:5 Ini ndakadzingiswa pazuva rorusere uye ndiri werudzi rwechiIsiraeri. Ndiri wedzinza rokwaBhenjamini, muHebheru chaiye akaberekwa ari muHebheru. Kune zvokuzochengeta mutemo ndiri muFarisei." 
Philippians3:6 Kunezveshungu nezvinhu, ndaitova mutambudzi weSangano. Pane zvoururami pakuchengeta mutemo, ndakanga ndisina chandinopomerwa." 
Philippians3:7 Asi zvandaiona sezvine basa kwandiri, ndava kuzvitora sokutorasikirwa kwandakaita pamusana paKristu." 
Philippians3:8 Ichokwadi chaicho kuti ndavakuzviona zvisina basa kwandiri pamusana pechinhu chakanakisisa kwazvo chokuziva Kristu Tenzi wangu. Nokuda kwake ndakarasikirwa nezvinhu zvose uye ndinozviona samarara kuti ndiwane Kristu 
Philippians3:9 kuti ndiwanikwewo muna Kristu ndisina ururami hwangu pachangu hunobva mukuchengeta mutemo asi hunobva mukutenda kwangu muna Kristu, ururami hunobva kuna Mwari nechikonzero chechitendero ichocho." 
Philippians3:10 Ndinoda kuziva Kristu uye simba rokumuka kwake uyewo kuti ndigoverane naye matambudziko ndichivawo saiye murufu rwake 
Philippians3:11 kuti, kana zvichigoneka, ndizomukawo panomuka vakafa." 
Philippians3:12 Hakusi kuti ndakatowana kare izvi kana kuti ndava munhu azere paururami asi ndinongoramba ndichivavarira chete kuti ndiwane mubayiro iwoyo nokuti Kristu Jesu akandiita wake. 
Philippians3:13 Hama dzangu, ini handingati mubayiro iwoyo ndakatouwana kare asi chinhu chimwechete chandinoita ndechokuti, ndinokanganwa zveshure ndoramba ndichivavarira zviri mberi." 
Philippians3:14 Ndinoramba ndichingovavarira kusvika pakatarwa kuti ndiwane mubayiro wokumusoro unodaidzirwa naMwari muna Kristu Jesu. 
Philippians3:15 Isu tabve zero ngativei nemwoyo iwoyo asi kana musina mwoyo wakadaro, Mwari achakuratidzaiwo pachena izvozvo." 
Philippians3:16 Zvakadaro zvazvo ngatirambei takabatisisa zvatinazvo. 
Philippians3:17 Hama dzangu, batanai mukunditevedzera, muongorore vanogara zvakadaro, maererano nomuenzaniso watakakupai." 
Philippians3:18 Vamwe vazhinji vandaigara ndichikutaurirai, vandinokutaurirai zvakare nemisodzi padama, vanogara semhandu yomuchinjikwa waKristu." 
Philippians3:19 Mugumo wavo kuparara. Mwari wavo inhumbu uye vanozvirumbidza nezvavanofanira kunyara nazvo, mwoyo yavo iri pane zvapano pasi." 
Philippians3:20 Nyika yedu isu iri kudenga. Ndiko kwatinotarisira kuti kuchabva mununuri Tenzi Jesu Kristu. 
Philippians3:21 Ndiye achasandura muviri wedu uno wenhando achiuita semuviri wake wembiri nesimba rinomugonesa kuisa zvinhu zvose pasi pake. 
Philippians4:1 Naizvozvo hama dzangu dzandinoda dzandinosuwa, ndimi rufaro rwangu nechidadiso changu. Rambai makasimba muna Tenzi saizvozvo, hama dzangu dzapamwoyo." 
Philippians4:2 Ndinokukumbirisai imi vaYuodia navaSindike kuti munzwanane muna Tenzi. 
Philippians4:3 Hongu ndinokumbirawo, iwe mumwe wangu akatendeka kuti ubatsire madzimai aya nokuti vakashanda pamwechete neni mubasa reShoko Rakanaka pamwechetewo naKeremendi navamwe vose vandaishanda navo vana mazita ari mubhuku roupenyu." 
Philippians4:4 Farai kwazvo nguva dzose muna Tenzi. Ndinotizve farai kwazvo. 
Philippians4:5 Vanhu vose ngavazive kuva nemwoyo wakanaka kwenyu. Tenzi wava pedyo. 
Philippians4:6 Musazvidye mwoyo nechii chose zvacho; asi muna zvose, isai zvichemo zvenyu kuna Mwari nokunamata, nokuteterera nokutenda." 
Philippians4:7 Rugare rwaMwari runopfuura kunzwisia kose ruchachengeta mwoyo yenyu nepfungwa dzenyu muna Kristu Jesu. 
Philippians4:8 Pokupedzisira hama dzangu, chinhu chose chinenge chiri chechokwadi kana chinoremekedzeka kana chakarurama kana chitsvene chose nechinoyevedza kana chinoyemurika nechino runako rwakanyanya kwazvo kana chinorumbidzika, nyatsozvidzamisai izvozvo mundangariro dzenyu." 
Philippians4:9 Itai zvamakadzidza mukagamuchira nokunzwa nokuona mandiri. Mwari worugare achava nemi. 
Philippians4:10 Ndinofara zvikuru kwazvo muna Tenzi kuti zvazoitika zvino kuti mazondifungazve. Maindirangarira zvenyu asi makanga musina kuwana mukana wacho. 
Philippians4:11 Handisi kutaura izvi pamusana pokushaya chokubata nokuti ini ndakadzidza kugutsikana namamiriro anenge akaita zvinhu kwandiri. 
Philippians4:12 Ndinoziva kuva murombo, ndinozivawo chinonzi kupfuma. Mune chipi nechipi uye muna zvose ndakadzidza kuva nezvakawanda nokuva nenzara, kuva nezvakawandisisa nokuva noushai." 
Philippians4:13 Ndinogona kuita zvinhu zvose maari iye anondisimbisa. 
Philippians4:14 Asi imi makaita zvakanaka kwazvo pamakabatana neni mumatambudziko angu. 
Philippians4:15 Imi vanhu veFiripi, sokuziva kwenyu, imi pachenyu, kuti pakutangisa kweShoko Rakanaka, pandakabva kuMasedhonia, hakuna rimwe sangano rakabatana neni ndichiita kandiro enda kandiro dzoka navo kusiya imi moga." 
Philippians4:16 Kunyange kuTesaronika makanditumira rubatsiro kaviri kose. 
Philippians4:17 Hakusi kuti kungoda zvipo asi kuti ndinoda muchero unowedzerwa kwamuri. 
Philippians4:18 Makandiripa zvizere uye zvakapfuurikidza. Ndava nezvose pandadai kugamuchira kuna Epafurodhitusi zvipo zvamakanditumira, mupiro chaiwo, chibayiro chinogamuchirika chinofadza Mwari." 
Philippians4:19 Mwari wangu achakupai zvose zvamunenge musina maererano noupfumi hwake husingatauriki muna Kristu Jesu. 
Philippians4:20 Mwari wedu naBaba ngavarumbidzwe narini narini. Ameni. 
Philippians4:21 Ndikwazisirei vatendi vose muna Kristu. Hama dzandinadzo dzinokukwazisai. 
Philippians4:22 Vatendi vose vanokukwazisai asi zvikuru vemba yaSiza. 
Philippians4:23 Jesu Kristu ngaakuitirei mose nyasha. 
Colossians1:1 Ndini Pauro akaitwa mupositori waKristu Jesu nokuda kwaMwari naTimoti hama yedu 
Colossians1:2 takunyorerai imi vokuKorose, vatsvene uye hama dzakatendeka muna Kristu. Mwari Baba wedu ngavakuwanisei nyasha norugare." 
Colossians1:3 Tinotenda Mwari Baba vaTenzi wedu Jesu Kristu nguva dzose dzatinokunamatirai. 
Colossians1:4 Tinodaro nokuti takanzwa nezvechitendero chenyu muna Kristu Jesu uye nezvorudo rwamunarwo kuvatsvene vose 
Colossians1:5 pamusana pechitarisiro chezvamakachengeterwa kudenga. Izvi makazvinzwa kare mushoko rechokwadi, Shoko Rakanaka" 
Colossians1:6 rakasvika kwamuri. Sezvariri kungoitawo pasi pose kubereka muchero richipararira, ndozvariri kuitawo pakati penyu kubvira pazuva ramakarinzwa mukanzwisisa nyasha dzaMwari nechokwadi chezvariri" 
Colossians1:7 sokuzvidzidza kwamakaita kuna Epafurasi mushandipamwe nesu wapamwoyo. Mushandi akatendeka waKristu anomirira isu," 
Colossians1:8 iye akatizivisawo rudo rwamakawana muna Mweya. 
Colossians1:9 Naizvozvo kubvira musi watakazvinzwa hatimborega kukunamatirai tichikumbira kuti muve noruzivo ruzere rwezvaanoda muungwaru nokunzwisisa kwezvomweya 
Colossians1:10 kuitira kuti mugare upenyu hunokodzerana naTenzi, hunomufadza zvizere huchibereka michero yakanaka mumabasa ose uyewo muchikurakura mukuziva kwenyu Mwari." 
Colossians1:11 Dai mukasimbaradzwa nesimba rose maererano nesimba rake rinomukurumbira kuti muve nokutirira nemwoyo murefu. 
Colossians1:12 Norufaro, tendai Baba, vakatikodzeresa kuva nomugove wavarurami, muchiedza." 
Colossians1:13 Vakatinunura kuumambo hwerima vakatiendesa muumambo hwomwanakomana wavo wapamwoyo. 
Colossians1:14 Maari ndimo matakawana ruponeso rwokuregererwa zvitadzo. 
Colossians1:15 Ndiye mufananidzo waMwari asingaonekwi. Dangwe — rume rechisikwa chiri chose 
Colossians1:16 nokuti maari, Mwari ndomaakasika namo zvinhu zvose, zviri pasi nezviri kudenga, zvinoonekwa nezvisingaonekwi, kunyange vezvigaro zvokutonga kana voumambo kana kuti vane ukuru — ukuru kana madzishe. Zvinhu zvose zvakasikwa nemaari uyewo ndiye wazvakasikirwa." 
Colossians1:17 Ndiye nyakutangira zvinhu zvose uye maari zvinhu zvose zvinobatanidzwa zviri mumaoko ake. 
Colossians1:18 Ndiye musoro womuviri, musoro wesangano. Ndiye wokutanga dangwerume revakabva kuvafi, kuti muna zvose ave ndiye wokutanga — tanga" 
Colossians1:19 nokuti maari umwari huzere hwakafadzwa kuita musha wahwo 
Colossians1:20 uye kuti nemaari, ayananise zvinhu zvose naye. Achizviwadzanisa neropa romuchinjikwa wake, zvingave zviri pasi pano kana zviri kudenga." 
Colossians1:21 Zvino imi makambenge makatsauka, makapanduka mwoyo, muri vezviito zvakashata," 
Colossians1:22 akakuyananisai nomuviri wake wenyama nokufa kwaakaita kuti akutsvitsei kwaari muri vatsvene, vasina chinoshoreka uye vasina mhosva yavangapiwe." 
Colossians1:23 Anogona kuzviita chete kana imi mukaramba muine chitendero makadzika midzi musingazunguziki, musingakande pasi chitarisiro chamunowana muShoko Rakanaka ramakanzwa rakaparidzwa kuzvisikwa zvose zviri pasi pedenga. Ini Pauro ndakave mushandiri waro." 
Colossians1:24 Zvino, ndinofara namatambudziko angu andinotambudzikira imi. Mumuviri wangu ndinozadzisa zvakasara pakutambudzika kwaKristu achitambudzikira muviri wake, sangano." 
Colossians1:25 Sangano iroro, ndiro randakava mushandiri waro maererano nomugove webasa randakapirwa imi naMwari kuti Shoko raMwari rizivikanwe zvizere." 
Colossians1:26 Ndicho chakavandika chiya kubvira pasichigare kwezvizvarwa nezvizvarwa asi iye zvino chavakuburitswa pachena kuvatsvene vake. 
Colossians1:27 Mwari akada zvake kuzivisa vechirudzi kuwanda kwakaita upfumi hwembiri yechakavandika chiya. Chakavandika chacho ndiKristu ari mamuri iye chitarisiro chembiri. 
Colossians1:28 Ndiye watinoparidza, tichichiyambira munhu wose tichidzidzisa munhu wose muungwaru hwose kuti akutsvitsei mava vanhu vabva zano muna Kristu." 
Colossians1:29 Izvozvi ndizvo zvandakashingairira ndikatamburira nesimba rake rose rinoshanda mandiri zvakanyanya kwazvo. 
Colossians2:1 Ndingade ini kuti imi novokuRaodhesia navamwe vose vasati vandiona uso nouso, muzive kuti ndinokutamburirai zvakakura sei."
