Colossians2:2 Ndinoita izvi kuti vakurudzirwe mwoyo vari murudo kuti vawane upfumi hwose hwokunzwisisa hunogadzanisa mwoyo uye kuti vawane ruzivo rwechakavandika chaMwari zvichireva iye Kristu. 
Colossians2:3 Maari ndimo mune upfumi hwose hwoungwaru noruzivo zvakavandika. 
Colossians2:4 Ndinodaro kuti pasave nomunhu anokunyengedzai namashoko anotapira 
Colossians2:5 nokuti kunyange zvangu ini mbune ndisiko ikoko asi ndinemi mumwoyo, ndichifarira kuona kuzvibata kwenyu nokusimbarara kwechitendero chenyu muna Kristu." 
Colossians2:6 Sezvo makagamuchira Kristu Jesu Tenzi naizvozvo fambai maari," 
Colossians2:7 mudzike midzi maari makavakwa paari makanyatsosimba kumira muchitendero sokudzidziswa kwamakaitwa muchiwanzotenda. 
Colossians2:8 Ngwarirai kuti pasave nomunhu anokuitai chinhu chokutamba nacho achisevenzesa ungwaru nounyengedzi husina maturo achitevedza magamuchidzanwa avanhu uye achitevedza zvemweya yapanyika asingatevedzi zvaKristu. 
Colossians2:9 Chikonzero ndechokuti umwari huzere hunogara maari sechinhu chaicho. 
Colossians2:10 Maari, imi makauya kuupenyu huzere, kuna iye mutongi wavatongi nomukuru wavakuru — vakuru." 
Colossians2:11 Mukudzingiswa kwaKristu maari imi makadzingisawo, kwete nokudzingiswa kwakaitwa namaoko muchibvisa muviri wenyama mukudzingiswa kwaKristu." 
Colossians2:12 Makavigwa pamwechete naye mukuombekwa, imomo makamuka naye pamusana pechitendero chenyu mukushanda kunoita Mwari akamumutsa kuvafi." 
Colossians2:13 Imi makanga makafa pamusana pezvikanganiso zvenyu nokusadzingiswa kwenyama yenyu, Mwari akaita kuti tive vapenyu pamwechete naye, iye atiregerera zvikanganiso zvedu zvose." 
Colossians2:14 Izvozvo ainge adzima chiga chemhosva yakanga yakanangana nesu nomutemo waitiroverera, iwoyu akaubvisa akauroverera pamuchinjikwa." 
Colossians2:15 Akabvutira veukuru ukuru vaya namadzishe aya zvombo zvavo zvokurwisa achivaita ivo muenzaniso unoonekwa nani nani zvake achivakurira pachiri. 
Colossians2:16 Naizvozvo musave nomunhu anokutongerai munezvokudya, kana zvokunwa, kana mune zvamazuva makuru, kana zvokugara kwomwedzi kana nezveSabata." 
Colossians2:17 Izvi zvinongova mubvuri zvawo wezvichauya asi zvinhu chaizvoizvo zvinhu zvina Kristu. 
Colossians2:18 Musabvumire munhu kuti akutii hamukodzeri pamusana pokuvavaridza panyaya dzokuzvirwadzisa kana kunamata vatumwa achiti anoona zviratidzo achinyunduma zvisina musoro nepfungwa dzamanyawi chete asingasimbi 
Colossians2:19 nokubatirira kumusoro unopa muviri wose chokudya uye unoubatanidza nenhengo namarunda unokura uchikuriswa naiye Mwari. 
Colossians2:20 Kana makafa pamwechete naKristu kunezvemweya yenyika munogarirei sokunge muri venyika, munozviisirei pasi pemitemo inoti," 
Colossians2:21 “Zvinoera kugunzwa ichi,” “Zvinoera kuravira ichi,” “Zvinoera kubata icho?”" 
Colossians2:22 Izvozvo vachitaura nezvezvinhu zvinopera pazvinoshandiswa muchitevera mirau nezvidzidziso zvavanhu. 
Colossians2:23 Izvi zvinotarisika soungwaru mukuzviomesera kwavanoita pakunamata kwavo vachizvininipisa uye kuzvirwadzisa kwavanoita muviri asi zvisina chazvinobatsira pakudzora munhu pahavi dzomuviri wake. 
Colossians3:1 Zvino kana makamuka pamwechete naKristu kudai tswakai zviri kumusoro kuna Kristu kwaagere kurudyi rwaMwari. 
Colossians3:2 Isai mwoyo yenyu kune zvokudenga, kwete zvapasi pano." 
Colossians3:3 Ndinodaro nokuti makafa uye kuti upenyu hwenyu hwakavigwa pamwechete naKristu muna Mwari. 
Colossians3:4 Panenge iye Kristu, upenyu hwedu, azozviratidza, ipapo, imiwo muchazoratidzwa muinaye mumbiri." 
Colossians3:5 Naizvozvo urayai zvenyika zviri mamuri izvi zvinoti: ufeve, zvisina kuchena, havi dzakaipa, nokudokwairira uipi nokukarira upfumi zvinongova zvimwechetezvo nokunamata zvifananidzo." 
Colossians3:6 Pamusana paizvozvi Mwari ari kuuya akashatirwa. 
Colossians3:7 Makambofamba mazviri pamaigara mazviri. 
Colossians3:8 Zvino chisiyanai nazvo zvose zvinoti: hasha, noukasha, nouipi nokureva vamwe nokutaura zvinonyadzisa." 
Colossians3:9 Musareverane nhema sezvamunongozvionawo kuti makabvisa upenyu hwenyu hwakare namaitiro ahwo 
Colossians3:10 mukapfeka upenyu hutsva huri kuvandudzwa noruzivo kuti hufanane nomusiki warwo. 
Colossians3:11 Pano apa hapana zvokuti uyu muGiriki here kana kuti muJudha; kana kuti uyu akadzingiswa here kana kuti haana kudzingiswa; kana kuti uyu ndewechirudzi here kana kuti muSitia, kana kuti muranda here kana kuti munhu anorusununguko rwake asi kuti Kristu ndiye zvose uye kuti ari muna vose." 
Colossians3:12 Naizvozvo imi vasarudzwi vaMwari, vatsvene vapamwoyo, pfekai tsika yemwoyo wetsitsi, nomwoyo wokuzvirereka, nomwoyo munyoro nomwoyo murefu," 
Colossians3:13 nokutirirana uye kuti kana mumwe ane nhuna nomumwe vachiregererana, sokuregererwa kwamakaitwa naTenzi imiwo munofanira kuregererana." 
Colossians3:14 Pamusoro paizvozvi pfekai rudo runobatanidza zvose pamwechete mukuwirirana chaiko. 
Colossians3:15 Rugare rwaKristu ngarwutonge mumwoyo menyu. Ndizvo chaizvo zvamakadaidzirwa kuti muve mumuviri mumwechete muchitenda. 
Colossians3:16 Shoko raKristu noupfumi hwaro ngarinyatsoti tindindi mamuri muchidzidzisana nokurairana noungwaru muchiimba nziyo nedzimbo nezvimbo zvaMweya muchitenda Mwari mumwoyo menyu. 
Colossians3:17 Chiri chose chamunoita, kungave kutaura kana kuita, zviitei muzita raTenzi Jesu, muchitsvitsirwa naye kutenda kwenyu kuna Baba." 
Colossians3:18 Madzimai zviisei pasi pavarume venyu sezvazviri izvo zvinokodzerana nomunhu muna Tenzi. 
Colossians3:19 Imi varume idai vakadzi venyu musave norushusho kwavari. 
Colossians3:20 Imi vana, teererai vabereki venyu muna zvose nokuti ndizvo zvinofadza Tenzi." 
Colossians3:21 Vanababa musashatirise vana venyu, vangadaro vakarasa mwoyo." 
Colossians3:22 Imi varanda teererai muna zvose vanhu vanenge vari vatenzi venyu pasi pano, kwete zvokubata vanhu kumeso savanhu vokungoda kufadza vanhu. Zviitei nomwoyo mumwechete mutye Tenzi." 
Colossians3:23 Chipi nechipi chamunoita chiitei nomwoyo wose sokunge munoshandira Tenzi, kwete vanhu," 
Colossians3:24 sezvamunoziva kuti muchagamuchira nhaka somubayiro wenyu, nokuti Tenzi Kristu ndiye wamuri kushandira." 
Colossians3:25 Ndinodaro nokuti muiti wezvakaipa achawana mubayiro wake, pasina zvorusaruro." 
Colossians4:1 Vanatenzi batai varanda venyu zvino ruenzaniso uye zvakarurama muchizivawo kuti imi muna tenzi kudenga. 
Colossians4:2 Rambai muchinamata, mungwarire kunamata muchitenda." 
Colossians4:3 Mutinamatirewo kuti Mwari atizarurire musuo weshoko kuti tiparidze zvakavandika zvaKristu. Ndiri muno mujeri pamusana pazvo 
Colossians4:4 kuti ndiri tsanangure zviri pachena sezvandinofanira kuti ndiite. 
Colossians4:5 Fambidzanai noungwaru navasiri mubato renyu. Pane zvenguva, mototi chawawana batisa." 
Colossians4:6 Matauriro enyu ngaave matauriro akanaka kuti muzive kunyatsodavira anenge akubvunzai. 
Colossians4:7 Tikikusi achakuzivisai nezvangu zvese. Ihama yapamwoyo, mushandiri akatendeka mushandipamwechete muna Tenzi." 
Colossians4:8 Izvozvi ndizvo zvakaita kuti ndimutumire kwamuri kuti imi muzive kuti isu takadii uye kuti, agokukurudzirai" 
Colossians4:9 Ndamutumira pamwechete naOnesimo hama yakatendeka yapamwoyo, mumwe wenyu. Vachakutaurirai zvose zvakaitika kuno." 
Colossians4:10 Muri kukwaziswa naAristakusi, musungwa pamwechete neni uye Mariko munun'una wamakarairirwa nezvake. Kana auya kwamuri mugamuchirei" 
Colossians4:11 naJesu anonzi Jusutusi ivava ndivo chete vokudzingiswa pakati pavashandipamwe neni muumambo hwaMwari, ndivo vaindinyaradza." 
Colossians4:12 Epafurasi, mumwe wenyu, muranda waKristu Jesu, ari kukukwazisai. Anokuyeukai nguva dzose mumunamato kuti muve vanhu vabve zano uye muchinyatsoziva zvose zvinodiwa naMwari." 
Colossians4:13 Ini ndinomupupurira kuti akakushandirai zvakaoma imi nevokuRaodhesia nevokuHeraporisi. 
Colossians4:14 Ruka, chiremba wapamwoyo naDhemasi vanokukwazisai." 
Colossians4:15 Ndikwazisireiwo hama dziri muRaodhesia naNipfa nesangano riri pamusha pake. 
Colossians4:16 Kana tsamba iyi yaverengwa pakati penyu, ngaiverengwewo musangano rovokuRaodhesia. Imiwo munofanira kuzoverenga yokuRaodhesia." 
Colossians4:17 Muti kuna Achipusi, “Unofanira kuita basa rawakagamuchira kuna Tenzi.”" 
Colossians4:18 Ndini Pauro ndinonyora noruoko rwangu ndichikukwazisai. Yeukai ngetani dzangu. Nyasha ngadzive nemi. 
1Thessalonians1:1 Ndini Pauro naSirivhanusi naTimoti tinokunyorerai imi sangano rokuTesaronika muna Mwari Baba naTenzi Jesu Kristu. Nyasha norugare ngazvive nemi. 
1Thessalonians1:2 Tinotenda Mwari nguva dzose pamusana penyu mose. Tinogara takakudomai muminamato yedu 
1Thessalonians1:3 tichiyeuka pana Mwari naBaba vedu basa renyu rechitenderano, nebasa renyu rorudo uye kutirira kwenyu muchitarisiro chamuinacho muna Tenzi wedu Jesu Kristu." 
1Thessalonians1:4 Tinoziva, hama dzangu, imi vadiwa vaMwari kuti Mwari akakusarudzai" 
1Thessalonians1:5 nokuti Shoko redu Rakanaka rakauya kwamuri, kwete zvepamuromo chete asi nesimba naMweya Mutsvene uye nechivimbo chizere. Imi munoziva kuti takaratidza kuti tiri vanhuyi zvataiva pakati penyu tichizviitira imimi." 
1Thessalonians1:6 Imi makatitevedzera mukatevedzerawo Tenzi nokuti makagamuchira shoko irori muri munhamo huru asi makarigamuchira norufaro muchifemerwa naMweya Mutsvene," 
1Thessalonians1:7 zvokuti makava muenzaniso kuvatendi vose vokuMasedhonia nokuAkaya. 
1Thessalonians1:8 Shoko raTenzi richibva kwamuri harina kungonzwika kuMasedhonia nokuAkaya koga asi chitendero chenyu muna Mwari chakasvika kose kose zvokuti hapana chatingataure. 
1Thessalonians1:9 Chiripo ndechokuti ivowo pachavo vanotaura kuti makatigamuchira zvakadii pakati penyu uye kuti makasiya zvokunamata mifananidzo muchipindukira kuna Mwari kuti munamate Mwari mupenyu wechokwadi," 
1Thessalonians1:10 uye kumirira kwamunoita Mwanakomana wake kubva kudenga iye waakamutsa kuvakafa, Jesu anotinunura kuhasha dzaMwari dziri kuuya." 
1Thessalonians2:1 Hama dzangu imi pachenyu munoziva kuti kukushanyirai kwedu kwakanga kusiri kusina maturo. 
1Thessalonians2:2 Kunyange zvedu takambenge tatambudzika uye tanyadziswa kuFiripi, sokuziva kwenyu, takaita chivindi muna Mwari wedu; takakuparidzai Shoko Rakanaka raMwari pakati pavanhu vairwisana zvikuru nezvataiita." 
1Thessalonians2:3 Kukukurudzirai kwedu hakubvi mune zvemanomano kana mune zvisina kuchena kana kuda kunyengedza. 
1Thessalonians2:4 Asi sokuonekwa kwatakaitwa naMwari kuti takakodzera kuti Shoko Rakanaka riiswe mumaoko medu, naizvozvo tinotaura kwete kuti tifadze vanhu, asi kuti tifadze Mwari anoongorora zvatiri." 
1Thessalonians2:5 Sezvamunoziva, hatina kushandisa mazwi okubata vanhu kumeso kana mazwi okufukidza kuda upfumi kwedu. Mwari angatipupurirewo." 
1Thessalonians2:6 Hatina kutsvaka mbiri inobva kuvanhu, kungave kwamuri imi kana kunavamwe. Kunyange zvedu taigona, savapositori vaKristu, kunge takakuremedzai nezvokuita," 
1Thessalonians2:7 asi taiva vanhu vanyoro pakati penyu saamai vanoyamwisa vari kuchengeta vana vavo. 
1Thessalonians2:8 Saizvozvo pamusana pokukudai zvakanyanya kwatinoita, hatina kungoda kuti tigoverane chete zveShoko Rakanaka raMwari, asi kuti tiitewo upenyu hwedu nemi nokuti imi makanga mava vapamwoyo chaivo kwatiri." 
1Thessalonians2:9 Hama, imi munoyeuka kushanda nokushingaira kwedu. Takashanda siku nesikati kuti tirege kuwana nomumwe wenyu watinoremedza patainge tichiparidza Shoko Rakanaka raMwari." 
1Thessalonians2:10 Imi, pamwechete naMwari, munotova zvapupu zvokuti maitiro edu kwamuri vatendi, takanga tiri vatsvene zvakadii, takarurama zvakadii tisina chatingapomerwe zvakadii." 
1Thessalonians2:11 Imi munoziva kuti ini, sababa ana vana vake," 
1Thessalonians2:12 ndakakukurudzirai mumwe nomumwe wenyu ndichikunyaradzai nokukukurudzirai kuti mugare upenyu hunokodzerana naMwari anokudaidzirai kuti mupinde muumambo hwake nomumbiri yake. 
1Thessalonians2:13 Tinotendawo Mwari nguva dzose pamusoro pezvizvi zvokuti pamakagashira shoko raMwari ramakanzwa kwatiri, hamuna kurigamuchira seshoko ravanhu, asi sezvariri, seshoko raMwari riri kushanda mamuri imi vatendi." 
1Thessalonians2:14 Imi hama, makasanganawo nezvakawira masangano aMwari okuJudhea muna Kristu Jesu nokuti imi makarwadziwawo nezvinhu zvakabva kuvanhu vomunyika menyu sezvavakaitwawo navaJudha." 
1Thessalonians2:15 Vakauraya Tenzi Jesu navaporofita uye vakatitandanisa; vanotsamwisa Mwari vachiita zvinorwisana navanhu vose 
1Thessalonians2:16 nokutidzivisa kutaura kune vechirudzi kuti vaponeswe. Naizvozvo vanotozadzikisa ukuru hwezvitadzo zvavo. Asi pokupedzisira Mwari avakuvavinga nehasha dzake. 
1Thessalonians2:17 Hama, patakamboti paradzaniswei kwechinguva pakuonana kwete mupfungwa, taitodisisa kwazvo tikaita shungu dzokukuonai uso nouso." 
1Thessalonians2:18 Taida kuuya kwamuri. Iyeni Pauro ndaida kuuya kakatowanda, asi Satani akatidzivisa." 
1Thessalonians2:19 Ko chitarisiro chedu chii norufaro rwedu chii kana chiremba chedu chokudada nacho pamberi paTenzi wedu Jesu paanouya chii? Hamusirimi here," 
1Thessalonians2:20 nokuti imi ndimi mbiri yedu norufaro rwedu? 
1Thessalonians3:1 Patakanga tisisakwanisi kutirira izvi takasarudza kusiiwa tiri toga kuAteni. 
1Thessalonians3:2 Takatumira hama yedu Timoti muranda waMwari nomubatsiri wedu munezve Shoko Rakanaka raKristu kuzokusimbisai muchitendero chenyu uye kuzokukurudzirai. 
1Thessalonians3:3 Uku kwakanga kuri kuti pasave nomumwe wenyu anodzokera shure nokuda kwamatambudziko iwaya. Imi pachenyu munoziva kuti iwoyu ndiwo mugove wedu 
1Thessalonians3:4 nokuti patanga tinemi, takanga takuudzai kuti, tichazotambudzika sokuitikawo kwazvakazoita, sokuzivawo kwamunoita." 
1Thessalonians3:5 Pamusana paizvozvi, pandakanga ndisisakwanisi kutirira, ndakatumira munhu kuti ndizive pamuri nechitendero chenyu ndichityira kuti zvimwe muedzi angadaro akakuedzai, basa redu rikashaya maturo." 
1Thessalonians3:6 Zvino nokudzoka kwakaita Timoti achibva kwamuri akatiunzira dama rakanaka nezverudaviro rwenyu norudo rwenyu. Akatitaurira kuti imi munogara muchitifunga munezvakanaka nguva dzose uye kuti munokarira kutiona sokusuwirawo kwatinoita kukuonai. 
1Thessalonians3:7 Nechikonzero ichochi, hama dzangu, munhamo namatambudziko edu, takanyaradzwa nechitendero chenyu." 
1Thessalonians3:8 Zvino tasimbaradzwa upenyu kana mukasimba kudaro muna Tenzi. 
1Thessalonians3:9 Mwari tingamutende neiko nezvenyu pamusana perufaro rwose rwatinonzwa pamusoro penyu pamberi paMwari wedu 
1Thessalonians3:10 siku nesikati tichibva tanyatsonamatawo kuti tizoonana uso nouso tichizokupai zvimwe zvamusina mukutenda kwenyu. 
1Thessalonians3:11 Dai Mwari wedu naBaba vedu pachavo naiye Tenzi wedu Jesu angotitungamirirawo nzira yedu kwamuri. 
1Thessalonians3:12 Dai Tenzi vangoita kuti kudana kwenyu kuwande kufashukire uye kusvike kuna vanhu vose sokukudai kwatinoita 
1Thessalonians3:13 kuti asimbaradze mwoyo yenyu ive isina chinoshoreka pautsvene uye iri mitsvene pamberi paMwari wedu naBaba vedu pakuuya kwaTenzi wedu Jesu navatsvene vake vose. 
1Thessalonians4:1 Pokupedzisira hama dzangu, isu muna Tenzi Jesu tinokukumbirai tichikukurudzirai kuti sokudzidza kwamakaita kwatiri, mugariro wamunofanira kuita, mufadze Mwari, sezvamuri kungoita. Itai saizvozvo zviri zvakatowandisisa." 
1Thessalonians4:2 Imi munoziva zvatakakutaurirai musimba raTenzi Jesu. 
1Thessalonians4:3 Izvi ndizvo zvinoda Mwari zvokuti imi muve vatsvene musiane noupombwe. 
1Thessalonians4:4 Mumwe nomumwe wenyu ngaazive kuchengeta muviri wake muutsvene nomukuuremekedza 
1Thessalonians4:5 kwete nehavi dzomuviri dzoruchiva sezvinoita vechirudzi vasingazivi Mwari 
1Thessalonians4:6 uye kuti panyaya iyoyi hapafaniri kuva nomunhu anonyengedza kana kukanganisira mumwe wake. Nokuti sezvatakambokuyambirai, Tenzi anotsividza mune zvose izvi, uye nokuti" 
1Thessalonians4:7 Mwari haana kutidaidzira zvetsvina izvi asi zvoutsvene. 
1Thessalonians4:8 Naizvozvo munhu anoramba izvi haasi kuramba vanhu asi ari kuramba Mwari anopa Mweya Mutsvene wake kwamuri. 
1Thessalonians4:9 Panyaya yorudo navamwe vanamati, hazvimboda kuti munhu akunyorerei, nokuti imi pachenyu makadzidziswa naMwari kudana." 
1Thessalonians4:10 Ichokwadi kuti munoda vehama vose vari muMasedhonia yose asi chatinokukurudzirai, hama, kuita izvozvo zvakatowanda kwazvo" 
1Thessalonians4:11 uye kuvavarira kugara upenyu hwenyu chinyararire, muzive zvenyu, muchizvishandira namaoko enyu sokukuudzai kwatakaita" 
1Thessalonians4:12 kuti vokunze vakuremekedzei murege kupona nokubatsirwa navo. 
1Thessalonians4:13 Hama hatidi kuti munge musingazivi nezvavakafa kuti murege kusuwa sezvinoita vamwe vasina chitarisiro. 
1Thessalonians4:14 Sezvatinotenda kuti Jesu akafa akamukazve saizvozvowo, nokuna Jesu, Mwari achadzosa pamwe naye vakafa." 
1Thessalonians4:15 Izvi tinokutaurirai zviri pachena, iro ririwo shoko raTenzi kuti isu vapenyu, takasara kusvikira kuuya kwaTenzi, hatitangiri vaya varere" 
1Thessalonians4:16 nokutiwo Tenzi pachake achaburuka achibva kudenga pachidaidzirwa. Pachanzwika izwi romutumwa mukuru uye pacharira hwamanda yaMwari. Vakafa muna Kristu ndivo vachatanga kumuka. 
1Thessalonians4:17 Zvino isu vapenyu takasara tichatorwa pamwechete navo tichiendeswa kumakore kundosangana naTenzi mumhepo. Naizvozvo ticharamba tiina Tenzi. 
1Thessalonians4:18 Naizvozvo potai muchinyaradzana namashoko iwaya. 
1Thessalonians5:1 Hama dzangu, kana zviri zvemisi nenguva hazvina chazvinokubatsirai kukunyorerai nezvazvo" 
1Thessalonians5:2 nokuti imi pachenyu munonyasozviziva kuti zuva raTenzi richauya sembavha usiku. 
1Thessalonians5:3 Vanhu pavanenge voti kune rugare uye hakuna chinotiwana, pakare pakarepo ndipo pavanobva vavingwa nokuparadzwa sokuuya kunoita kurwadziwa pamukadzi ana pamuviri. Hapana zvokupukunyuka." 
1Thessalonians5:4 Asi imi hamusi murima hama dzangu, kuti zuva iroro riyerekane rakunyangirai sembavha." 
1Thessalonians5:5 Chikonzero chacho ndechokuti imi mose muri vana vechiedza uye muri vana vamasikati. Hatisi vanhu vousiku kana verima. 
1Thessalonians5:6 Naizvozvo ngatiregei kukotsira sezvinoita vamwe. Asi ngatirambei takasvinura, pfungwa dzedu dziri pamwechete" 
1Thessalonians5:7 Vanokotsira, vanokotsira usiku. Vanoraradzawo vanoraradza usiku." 
1Thessalonians5:8 Zvino isu zvatiri vamasikati, ngatichengetedzei hunhu hwedu tipfeke demautare rechitendero norudo uye nguwani iri chitarisiro choruponeso." 
1Thessalonians5:9 Mwari haana kutisikira kuti azotipa nhamo asi kuti tiwane ruponeso nokuna Tenzi wedu Jesu Kristu 
1Thessalonians5:10 akatifira kuti kunyange tichiri kubwaira kudai kana kuti tatsinzinya tigare naye. 
1Thessalonians5:11 Nezvo kurudziranai muchiumbana sezvamuri kungoita iye zvino. 
1Thessalonians5:12 Hama dzangu, tinokukumbirisai kuti muremekedze vanoshanda pakati penyu vanokurairai uye vari ivo vakuru vari pamusoro penyu zvichibva muna Tenzi vanokurairai." 
1Thessalonians5:13 Vakudzei kwazvo muine rudo navo pamusana pebasa ravo. Imi garisanai zvakanaka. 
1Thessalonians5:14 Tinokukurudziraizve, hama, kuti rayirai nyope muchimutsa mwoyo yavakaneta. Batsirai vasina simba. Itai mwoyo murefu navo vose." 
1Thessalonians5:15 Onai kuti hapana anodzorera chakaipa nechakaipa, asi rambai muchingoedza kuitirana zvakanaka uye muitirewo vamwe vose zvakanaka." 
1Thessalonians5:16 Farai nguva dzose. 
1Thessalonians5:17 Namatai nguva dzose 
1Thessalonians5:18 uye muna zvose rambai muchingotenda nokuti uku ndiko kuda kwaMwari muna Kristu Jesu. 
1Thessalonians5:19 Musadzimure Mweya Mutsvene. 
1Thessalonians5:20 Musashore chiporofita," 
1Thessalonians5:21 asi munofanira kuongorora chokwadi chezvinhu zvose. Zvinenge zvakanaka zvibatisisei. 
1Thessalonians5:22 Siyanai nouipi hupi nohupi zvahwo. 
1Thessalonians5:23 Iye Mwari worugare pachake ngaakuitei vatsvene muna zvose zvamuri akuchengetei zvakanaka mutumbi wose unoti, mweya nemwoyo nomuviri zvisina chinoshoreka pazviri pakuuya kwaTenzi wedu Jesu Kristu." 
1Thessalonians5:24 Iye anokudaidzai, akatendeka uye achazviita." 
1Thessalonians5:25 Hama tinamatireiwo. 
1Thessalonians5:26 Kwazisanai savanhu vemhuri nokutsvodana kutsvene. 
1Thessalonians5:27 Ndinokukomeresai muzita raTenzi kuti tsamba iyi inofanira kuverengerwa vehama vose. 
1Thessalonians5:28 Tenzi Jesu Kristu ngaakupei chikomborero chenyasha dzake. 
2Thessalonians1:1 Ndini Pauro naSirivhanusi naTimoti tinokunyorerai imi sangano rokuTesaronika muna Mwari Baba vedu naTenzi Jesu Kristu. 
2Thessalonians1:2 Nyasha norugare ngazvive nemi zvichibva kuna Mwari Baba nokuna Tenzi Jesu Kristu. 
2Thessalonians1:3 Tinosungirwa kutenda Mwari nguva dzose pamusana penyu, hama dzangu, sechinhu chinokodzera kuitwa nokuti chitendero chenyu chiri kuramba chichingokura kwazvo uye kudanana kwenyu kuri kukura." 
2Thessalonians1:4 Naizvozvo isu pachedu tinodada nemi mumasangano aMwari nokuda kwokutsungirira kwenyu pakutenda mukutambudzwa kwenyu kose nenhamo dzamunotakurana nadzo. 
2Thessalonians1:5 Zvose izvozvi zvinoratidza kugona kutonga kwaMwari kuti imi munokodzera kupinda muumambo hwaMwari hwamuri kutamburira 
2Thessalonians1:6 uyewo nokuti Mwari anozviona chiri chinhu chinokodzera kutsividza nenhamo avo vanokutambudzai. 
2Thessalonians1:7 Achakupai zororo pamwechete nesu imi muri kuoneswa nhamo kana Tenzi Jesu oratidzwa achibva kudenga navatumwa vake vane simba 
2Thessalonians1:8 mumoto unonganduma. Achatsividza avo vasingazivi Mwari navavo vasingateereri Shoko Rakanaka raTenzi wedu Jesu. 
2Thessalonians1:9 Vachatambura neshamhu yokuparadzwa zvisina mugumo uye vachabviswa pana Tenzi nekumbiri yesimba rake 
2Thessalonians1:10 paanouya musi iwoyo kuzorumbidzwa muvatsvene vake uye kuzoyemurwa pamusana pavavo vakatenda kwaari nokuti makagamuchira kupupura kwedu. 
2Thessalonians1:11 Pamusana paizvozvi tinonamata nguva dzose kuti Mwari wedu aite kuti imi muve vanhu vakakodzera kukudaidzai kwaakaita uye kuti aite kuti zvakanaka zvamunoda kuita zvechitendero zvibudirire nesimba rake," 
2Thessalonians1:12 izvi kuri kuitira kuti zita raTenzi wedu Jesu rirumbidzwe mamuri imiwo murumbidzwe maari maererano nenyasha dzaMwari wedu nedzaTenzi Jesu Kristu. 
2Thessalonians2:1 Panyaya yezvokuuya kwaTenzi wedu Jesu Kristu nezvekuungana kwatichaita tichimuchingura, tinokukumbirai hama" 
2Thessalonians2:2 kuti musabva mapengereka nazvo kana kuita manyawi nazvo zvichibva kumweya kana kushoko kana kutsamba zvinoita sezviri kubva kwatiri zvichiti zuva raTenzi rasvika. 
2Thessalonians2:3 Ngaparege kuva nomunhu anokunyengedzai nenzira ipi zvayo nokuti zuva iroro harisikuzouya kupanduka kusati kwatanga kuuya uye munhu asina mutemo uya akatemerwa kuraswa atoratidzwa pachena," 
2Thessalonians2:4 uya anozvikudza achirwisana nechose chinonzi mwari kana chipi zvacho chinonamatwa atoita chigaro chake mutemberi yaMwari. 
2Thessalonians2:5 Hamurangariri here kuti pandakanga ndichinemi ndakakutaurirai izvi. 
2Thessalonians2:6 Asi imi munoziva kuti pane chimwe chiri kurambidza kuti izvi zviitike zvino kuti aratidzwe panguva yake 
2Thessalonians2:7 nokuti chakavanzika chiya chisina mutemo chavakutoshanda asi uyo arikumbodzivirira — dzivirira achamboita kusvikira abviswa. 
2Thessalonians2:8 Ipapo asina mutemo uya achaburitswa pachena. Tenzi Jesu achamuuraya nezwi rimwechete romuromo wake achimuparadza nokuzviratidza kwake uye nokuuya kwake. 
2Thessalonians2:9 Kuuya kouya asina mutemo kunoonekwa nomubasa raSatani anoshandisa simba nezviratidzo nezvishamiso zvokunyepera 
2Thessalonians2:10 nouipi hwose hokunyengedza varikundoparadzwa nokuti vanoramba kuda chokwadi uye vanoramba kuponeswa. 
2Thessalonians2:11 Naizvozvo Mwari anovatumira zvinovabata kumeso kuti vatende zvenhema 
2Thessalonians2:12 kuti vose vapihwe mhosva vasina kutenda chokwadi vachifarira zvisina kururama. 
2Thessalonians2:13 Isu tinosungirwa kutenda Mwari pamusana penyu, hama dzangu vadiwa vaTenzi nokuti Mwari akakusarudzai kubvira pakutanga kuti muponeswe nokuitwa vatsvene naMweya nokutenda muchokwadi." 
2Thessalonians2:14 Izvi ndizvo zvaakakudaidzirai nokuparidza kwedu Shoko Rakanaka kuti muwane mbiri yaTenzi wedu Jesu Kristu. 
2Thessalonians2:15 Naizvozvo hama dzangu mirai makasimba makabatisisa magamuchidzanwa amakadzidziswa nesu nomuromo kana kuti netsamba. 
2Thessalonians2:16 Zvino Tenzi wedu Jesu Kristu pachake naMwari Baba vedu vakatida vakatipa kunyaradzwa kusina mugumo nechitarisiro chakanaka 
2Thessalonians2:17 nenyasha ngaakunyaradzei mwoyo yenyu aisimbise mumashoko nomumabasa ose akanaka. 
2Thessalonians3:1 Pokupedzisira hama dzangu, tinamatireiwo kuti shoko raTenzi rirambe richingomhanya kuenda mberi uye kuti rikunde sezvarakaita pakati penyu" 
2Thessalonians3:2 uye kuti tinunurwe kuvanhu vakaipa vanyangadzi. Havasi vose vose vane chitendero," 
2Thessalonians3:3 asi Tenzi akatendeka achakudzivirirai kumuipi. 
2Thessalonians3:4 Isu tine chivimbo muna Tenzi kuti muri kuita uye mucharamba muchiita zvinhu zvatakati muite. 
2Thessalonians3:5 Dai Tenzi angotungamirira mwoyo yenyu kurudo rwaMwari uye kuno kutirira kwaKristu. 
2Thessalonians3:6 Zvino tinokuudzai hama muzita raTenzi Jesu Kristu kuti siyanai nehama inenge iri nyope isingatevedzi magamuchidzanwa amakagamuchira kwatiri. 
2Thessalonians3:7 Imi munoziva wani kuti munofanira kutitevedzera zvakadii. Isu takanga tisingagari maoko patanga tiinemi. 
2Thessalonians3:8 Hatina kudya chokudya chomunhu mahara, asi taishanda zvakaoma tichifondoka siku nesikati kuti tirege kuwana watinoremedza." 
2Thessalonians3:9 Hazvirevi kuti isu hatina mvumo yokubatsirwa nemi asi kuti tikupei muenzaniso wokuti mutevedzere. 
2Thessalonians3:10 Kunyange pataiva tiinemi takakuudzai kuti kana munhu asingadi kushanda ngaarege kudya. 
2Thessalonians3:11 Nokuti tinonzwa kuti vamwe venyu vari kugara zvavo maoko; basa ravo riri rokunekaira chete pasina chavanoita. 
2Thessalonians3:12 Zvino tinokomera vanhu vakadaro tichivakurudzira muna Tenzi Jesu Kristu kuti vaite basa ravo chinyararire vachizviwanira zvokurarama nazvo. 
2Thessalonians3:13 Hama dzangu musanete mukuita zvakanaka. 
2Thessalonians3:14 Kana pane anoramba kuteerera zvatiri kutaura mutsamba ino nyatsomuzivai murege kuva nechii chamunoita naye kuti anyare. 
2Thessalonians3:15 Musamutore semhandu asi muyambirei sehama. 
2Thessalonians3:16 Zvino Tenzi worugare pachake ngaakupei rugare nguva dzose nenzira dzakasiyana — siyana. Tenzi ngaave nemi mose. 
2Thessalonians3:17 Ndini Pauro ndiri kunyora kwaziso iyi noruoko rwangu. Aya ndiwo masainiro andinoita tsamba dzangu dzose ndiwo manyorero andinoita. 
2Thessalonians3:18 Tenzi Jesu Kristu ngaakupei mose chikomborero chenyasha dzake. 
1Timothy1:1 Ndini Pauro mupositori waKristu Jesu sokutemwa kwazvakaitwa naMwari mununuri wedu uye naKristu Jesu, tariro yedu," 
1Timothy1:2 ndinokunyorera iwe Timoti mwana wangu chaiye muchitendero. Dai Mwari Baba naKristu Jesu Tenzi wedu akukomborera nenyasha nengoni norugare. 
1Timothy1:3 Sokukukurudzira kwandakaita pandakanga ndichienda kuMasedhonia, ramba uri kuEfeso kuti uudze vamwe vanhu kuti varege kukudzidzisa zvidzidziso zvisina akambodzidzisa;" 
1Timothy1:4 kana kudzidzisa ngano dzisina kwadzo nemirongorongo yamazita amadzitateguru nehurukuro dzisina kwadzinosvitsa panze pezvinangwa zvaMwari zviri muchitendero. 
1Timothy1:5 Asi icho chinangwa chebasa redu ndecherudo runobva mumwoyo wakanaka nehana yakachena nechitendero chisina unyengedzi. 
1Timothy1:6 Vamwe vanhu vakazotetereka pamusana pokutsauka pazviri vopinda muhurukuro dzisina maturo 
1Timothy1:7 vachida kuva vadzidzisi voMutemo asi vasinganzwisi zvavanotaura kana kuziva zvinhu zvacho zvavanenge vachitaura nezvazvo. 
1Timothy1:8 Zvino chatinoziva ndechokuti mutemo wakanaka kana ukausevenzesa zviri pamutemo. 
1Timothy1:9 Asi chatinozivawo ndechokuti mutemo hauisirwi vakarurama asi unoisirwa vanhu vasina mutemo nenhubu navasina Mwari navatadzi, navasinei naMwari navanhu vasina matyira nezvinhu zvinoera nemhondi dzinouraya madzibaba" 
1Timothy1:10 nemhondi dzinouraya amai navanouraya vanhu navanoita upombwe uyewo ngochani namatasvuramwoyo navarevi venhema navanopika zvenhema navanoita zvinopesana nechidzidziso chechokwadi 
1Timothy1:11 maererano neShoko Rakanaka rembiri raMwari wamakomborero rakaiswa mumaoko mangu. 
1Timothy1:12 Ndinotenda Kristu Jesu Tenzi wedu akandipa simba rokuita izvi. Kundisarudza kwaakaita mubasa rake kuona kwaakaita kutendeka kwangu. 
1Timothy1:13 Kunyange pakutanga ndakambomushonha ndikamutambudza ndikamutuka asi ndakaitirwa tsitsi nokuti ndakazviita mukusaziva nomukusatenda. 
1Timothy1:14 Nyasha dzaTenzi dzakawodzvorerwa pandiri nokutenda norudo rwatinarwo muna Kristu Jesu. 
1Timothy1:15 Ishoko rinotendeseka uye rinokodzera kunyatsogamuchirwa rokuti Kristu Jesu akauya panyika kuzoponesa vatadzi. Ini ndini mutadzi mukuru wacho. 
1Timothy1:16 Asi ndakaitirwa tsitsi kuti mandiri somukuru mukuru wacho, Jesu Kristu aonese mwoyo murefu wake wakazara somuenzaniso kuna vakanga vachizodavira maari kuitira upenyu husingaperi." 
1Timothy1:17 Kukudzwa uye mbiri ngazvipiwe kuna Mambo wapasichigare narini narini kuna iye asingafi asingaoneki, anongova ndiye Mwari oga. Ameni." 
1Timothy1:18 Zvakatemwa izvi ndinozviturira mumaoko mako itwe Timoti, mwanangu, maererano nezvakaporofitwa zvakanga zvakananga iwe, kuti unyatsorwisa uchifemerwa naizvozvo," 
1Timothy1:19 urambe wakabatisisa chitendero uye uine hana yakachena. Vamwe vanhu vakaramba kuteerera hana dzavo vakaparadza chitendero chavo. 
1Timothy1:20 Vamwe vavo ndavana Humenaosi naArekizanda vandakaturira kuna Satani kuti vadzidze kusashonha Mwari. 
1Timothy2:1 Nokudaro pokutanga ndinokurudzira kuti mikumbiro neminamato nezvichemo nokutenda zviitirwe vanhu vose vanoti: 
1Timothy2:2 madzimambo navose vari pazvinzvimbo zvapamusoro kuti tigare upenyu hune runyararo norugare, upenyu huna Mwari mukati uye hunoremekedzwa mativi ose." 
1Timothy2:3 Izvi zvakanaka uye zvinogamuchirika pamberi paMwari noMununuri wedu 
1Timothy2:4 anoda kuti munhu wose aponeswe uye kuti azive chokwadi. 
1Timothy2:5 Nokuti kuna Mwari mumwechete uye kuno munhu mumwechete anobatanidza isu vanhu naMwari, munhu iyeyo ndiJesu Kristu." 
1Timothy2:6 Akazvipira kuti ave chokutinunura nacho tose. Izvi zvakazopupurirwawo panguva yazvo. 
1Timothy2:7 Izvozvi ndizvo zvandakasarudzirwa kuti ndive muparidzi nomupositori nomudzidzisi wevechirudzi muchitendero nomuchokwadi. Ndiri kutaura chokwadi handisi kureva nhema. 
1Timothy2:8 Munzvimbo dzose ndinoda kuti varume vanamate vakasimudza maoko matsvene vasina hasha kana gakava 
1Timothy2:9 uye kuti vakadzi vazvishongedze zvine mwero zvino hunhu vaine hanzu dzine chimiro vasingagadziri vhudzi ravo zvokunanisira kana kurishongedza nendarama kana namatombo anokosha amapera kana hanzu dzinodhura 
1Timothy2:10 asi zvishongo zvavo ngazvive mabasa akanaka sezvinokodzerana navakadzi vanotya Mwari. 
1Timothy2:11 Mukadzi ngaadzidze chinyararire nokuzvidukupisa kose. 
1Timothy2:12 Handibvumiri mukadzi kudzidzisa kana kuva nesimba pamusoro pomurume; anofanira kunyarara 
1Timothy2:13 nokuti Adhamu ndiye akatanga kusikwa ndokuzouya Evha. 
1Timothy2:14 Adhamu haasiriye akafurirwa asi mukadzi ndiye akafurirwa akava mutadzi. 
1Timothy2:15 Mukadzi anonunurwa zvake nokubereka vana kana akaramba ari muchetendero uye aine rudo noururami. 
1Timothy3:1 Shoko iri nderechokwadi rinoti kana munhu akavavarira kuva mubhishopi ari kuda basa rakakosha kwazvo. 
1Timothy3:2 Mubhishopi haafaniri kuva nechaanoshorwa nacho. Anofanira kuva murume womukadzi mumwechete asiri muraradzi, munhu anonzwisisa ane chiremera anoziva kugamuchira vaenzi uye mudzidzisi kwaye;" 
1Timothy3:3 asi chidhakwa chomunhu kana munhu anoda zvokurwa asiri munhu ane mwoyo munyoro kwete munhu wenharo kana anokarira mari. 
1Timothy3:4 Anofanira kuva munhu anofambisa mhuri yake zvakanaka ana vana vanoteerera, ano rukudzo muna zvose." 
1Timothy3:5 Zviripo ndezvokuti kana munhu asingazivi kufambisa mhuri yake, angachengete sei sangano raMwari." 
1Timothy3:6 Haafaniri kuva mutendi mutsva nokuti angadaro akazvitutumadza nokuzvikudza achizowana chirango chaDhiabhori. 
1Timothy3:7 Uyewo anofanira kuva nezita rakanaka kune vokunze angadaro akafumurwa akapinda muriva raDhiabhori. 
1Timothy3:8 Ndizvo zvimwechetezvo navaDhikoni, vanofanira kuva vanhu vakadzikama kwete tsukukuviri dzavanhu kana zviradza zvewaini kana vanhu vanokarira upfumi." 
1Timothy3:9 Vanosungirwa kuchengetedza zvakavandika zvechitendero nehana yakachena 
1Timothy3:10 uye ngavatange vaongororwawo. Kana vabudirira kuti havana chinoshoreka vangapinde zvavo mubasa roudhikoni. 
1Timothy3:11 Vakadziwo ngavave vakatsiga vasina makuhwa vasiri zvidhakwa, vakatendeka muna zvose." 
1Timothy3:12 Madhikoni anofanira kuva murume womukadzi mumwechete uye vanhu vanochengeta vana vavo nemhuri dzavo zvakanaka. 
1Timothy3:13 Avo vanoita basa ravo zvakanaka samadhikoni vanozviwanira zita rakanaka uye chivimbo chikuru muchitendero chavo muna Kristu Jesu. 
1Timothy3:14 Ndiri kukunyorera tsamba iyi ndichitarisira kuuya kwauri nokukurumidza. 
1Timothy3:15 Asi kana ndikanonotswa, iwe unenge waziva kuti munhu anofanira kuzvibata sei mumhuri yaMwari, iro sangano raMwari mupenyu, musimboti nehwaro hwaicho chokwadi." 
1Timothy3:16 Tinopupura kuti zvakavandika zvechitendero chedu zvikuru kwazvo zvokuti: akaonekwa akaratidzwa pachena aine muviri akapembedzwa naMweya akaonekwa navatumwa akaparidzwa kumarudzi akatendwa pasi pose akazokwira kudenga aine mbiri. 
1Timothy4:1 Mweya Mutsvene anotaura pachena kuti pamazuva okupedzisira vamwe vachakanda pasi chitendero pamusana pokuteerera mweya inonyengedza nezvidzidziso zvemweya yakaipa 
1Timothy4:2 zvinodzidziswa navarevi venhema vanobata vanhu kumeso vane hana dzakadhindwa nomuchiso 
1Timothy4:3 vanoti vanhu ngavarege kuroorana varege kudya zvimwe zvokudya zvakasikwa naMwari zvinofanira kugamuchirwa nokutenda navanhu vanodavira vachiziva chokwadi. 
1Timothy4:4 Chikonzero ndechokuti chinhu chose chakasikwa naMwari, chakanaka uye hapana chinofanira kurambwa asi ngachigamuchirwewo nokutendwa" 
1Timothy4:5 pakadaro chinenge chatoyereswa neShoko raMwari nomunamato. 
1Timothy4:6 Izvi ukazvidzidzisa vehama unenge wava mushandi wakanaka waKristu Jesu akapiwa chokudya chamazwi echitendero norudzidziso rwakanaka rwawakatevera. 
1Timothy4:7 Siyana nengano dzisina Mwari uye dzisina musoro. Zvidzidzise kuita zvina Mwari mukati. 
1Timothy4:8 Kuzviswatudza muviri kune basawo asi kuzviswatudza kune zvaMwari kunobatsira nenzira dzose nokuti kunotsidzira mubayiro paupenyu hwapasi pano noupenyu hwokudenga. 
1Timothy4:9 Iyi itsumo yakanaka uye inonyatsogamuchirika. 
1Timothy4:10 Izvozvi ndizvo zvatinobindukira tichishingairira nokuti chitarisiro chedu chiri muna Mwari mupenyu, mununuri wavanhu vose zvikuru avo vanotenda." 
1Timothy4:11 Unofanira kutaura uchidzidzisa zvinhu izvi. 
1Timothy4:12 Ngaparege kuva nomunhu anokushora pamusana pokuti uri muduku asi iwe iva muenzaniso wakanaka kuna vatendi mukutaura nomuzviito nomurudo nomuchitendero nomuutsvene. 
1Timothy4:13 Kusvikira ndauya, verengera vanhu Magwaro Matsvene uchiparidza uye uchidzidzisa." 
1Timothy4:14 Usarege kuita hanya nechipo chaunacho chawakapiwa nezwi rechiporofita, dare ravakuru vakuru vesangano pavakaisa maoko avo pauri." 
1Timothy4:15 Ita zvinhu izvi uzvipire mazviri kuti vose vaone kubudirira kwako. 
1Timothy4:16 Zvichenjerere iwe pachako uchichenjererawo zvaunodzidzisa. Zvibatisise izvozvo nokuti nokuita izvozvo unozviponesa iwe pachako navanokunzwa. 
1Timothy5:1 Usatsiure munhu mukuru zvehasha asi nyatsotaura naye sababa, varume vadiki vabate savanun'una vako," 
1Timothy5:2 vakadzi vakuru savanamai vako navakadzi vechidiki sehanzvadzi dzako pasina kana zvokumbotsaudzira mune zvoutsvene. 
1Timothy5:3 Remekedza chirikadzi, dzinenge dziri chirikadzi chechokwadi." 
1Timothy5:4 Kana chirikadzi iina vana kana vazukuru ngavatange vadzidza basa ravo savanamati ravanofanira kuita kumhuri yavo vawane zvavanodzorerawo kuvabereki vavo nokuti izvi ndizvo zvinofadza Mwari. 
1Timothy5:5 Chirikadzi chaiyo yakasiiwa ichingova yoga yoga, inotarisira kuna Mwari, inoramba ichingokumbira ichinamata siku nesikati." 
1Timothy5:6 Asi chirikadzi inoda zvokuzvifadza, ichirikadzi yakatofa iyo ichiri mhenyu." 
1Timothy5:7 Dzidzisa zvinhu izvozvi kuti dzirege kuwana chadzinoshorwa nacho. 
1Timothy5:8 Kana munhu asingachengeti hama dzake, zvikuru vemhuri yokwake, munhu akadaro atorasa chitendero chake uye akatoipa kupinda asingatendi." 
1Timothy5:9 Kana chirikadzi isati yasvitsa makore makumi matanhatu ngairege kunyoreswa zita uye inofanira kunge iri chirikadzi yakangoroorwa kamwechete. 
1Timothy5:10 Anofanira kuva munhu anopupurirwa pamusoro pamabasa ake akanaka nokurera kwaakaita vana vake anogamuchira vaenzi zvakanaka uye anoshambidza tsoka dzavatsvene achiyamura vatamburi uye ari mudzimai anofarira kuita zvakanaka nenzira dzose. 
1Timothy5:11 Asi ramba kunyoresa chirikadzi dzechidiki nokuti kana dzotadziswa kushandira Kristu nechikonzero chehavi dzadzo, dzinoda kuroorwa." 
1Timothy5:12 Saizvozvo dzobva dzazvipisa mhosva pamusana pokutyora chitsidzo chadzo chokutanga. 
1Timothy5:13 Pamusoro paizvozvo dzinodzidza kuva tsimbe dzinotevedza nedzimba, dzisiri nyope chete asi kuti vanhu vamakuhwa vanongwarira zvamashiripiti vachitaura zvavasingafaniri kutaura." 
1Timothy5:14 Nezvo ini ndinoti chirikadzi dzechidiki ngadziroorwe dzibereke vana dzichengetedze mhuri dzadzo dziregewo kupa muvengi mukana wokutaura zvakaipa nezvedu. 
1Timothy5:15 Vamwe vavo vakatotetereka vachitevera Satani. 
1Timothy5:16 Kana mukadzi mutendi ane hama chirikadzi ngaadzibatsire kuti zvirege kuremedza sangano kuti ribatsire chirikadzi chaidzo. 
1Timothy5:17 Vakuru vakuru vanotungamirira sangano zvakanaka ngavaremekedzwe zvakapetwa kaviri zvikuru avo vanoita basa rokuparidza nerokudzidzisa 
1Timothy5:18 nokuti Magwaro anoti, “Usaise mombe matomu painenge ichipura mbeswa,” uye kuti, “Mushandi anofanira kuwana mubayiro wake.”" 
1Timothy5:19 Usagamuchire kuti mumwe wavakuru vakuru ane mhosva kusatoti pane umboo hwezvapupu zviviri kana zvitatu. 
1Timothy5:20 Asi kune avo vanorambirira vari muchitadzo vatsiure pamberi pavose kuti vamwe vose vatye. 
1Timothy5:21 Pamberi paMwari uye pamberi paKristu Jesu napamberi penhumwa dzakasarudzwa, ndinokukomeresa kuti uchengete mitemo iyoyi usina kwaunorerekera kana rusaruro." 
1Timothy5:22 Usamhanyirire kuisa maoko okugadza munhu kana kudziya moto wembavha muchitadzo chomumwe uye chengetedza utsvene hwako. 
1Timothy5:23 Chirega kuramba uchingonwa mvura chete asi inwa waini shoma kuitira mudumbu mako uye nokurwara rwara kwaunoita. 
1Timothy5:24 Zvitadzo zvavamwe vanhu zvinooneka pachena zvinofanotaura kuti munhu uyu anotongwa achinzii asi zvitadzo zvavamwe zvinozobuda pachena gare gare. 
1Timothy5:25 Ndizvozvowo zvina mabasa akanaka mamwe anoonekwa pachena uye kunyange aya asingaoneki pachena haagoni kuramba akangovanzika. 
1Timothy6:1 Vose vari mujoko rouranda vanofanira kuziva kuti vatenzi vavo vanofanira kupiwa rukudzo rwose kuti zita raMwari uye chidzidziso ichochi chirege kushorwa. 
1Timothy6:2 Avo vana vatenzi vanotenda havafaniri kusaremekedzwa pamusana pokuti vave hama nehama navo asi vavakutofanira kuvashandira zviri nani nokuti ivo vanobatsirwa nezvavanoshanda vatendi uye vadikanwi. Izvi unofanira kuzvidzidzisa vanhu nokuvakurudzira kuita. 
1Timothy6:3 Kana munhu akadzidzisa zvimwewo asingawirirani namashoko ezvirokwazvo aTenzi wedu Jesu Kristu nechidzidziso chinowirirana nezvaMwari 
1Timothy6:4 anozvitutumadza nokuzvikudza, munhu asina zvaanoziva. Munhu ana kamwoyo kokuda gakava nenharo dzezvamazwi anokonzera shanje nokusawirirana namakuhwa nokufungirana kusina kana namaturo ose" 
1Timothy6:5 nokukakavadzana pakati pavanhu vasina musoro vasina chokwadi vanofunga kuti kuitira Mwari basa chinhu chokuzvipfumisa nacho. 
1Timothy6:6 Hongu kuitira Mwari kunopfumisa ndokunge munhu achigutsikana nezvaanazvo 
1Timothy6:7 nokuti hatina kuuya nechinhu panyika uyewo hatikwanisi kubva nechinhu panyika 
1Timothy6:8 asi kana tiine chokudya nechokupfeka; naizvozvo tinofanira kugutsikana. 
1Timothy6:9 Asi avo vana kamwoyo kokuda kupfuma vanopinda muchiedzo nomuriva uye mukuda zvinhu zvisina maturo zvinotokuvadza zvinoisawo vazhinji mukupera basa nokuparadzwa 
1Timothy6:10 nokuti kudisisa mari ndiwo mudzi wouipi hwose. Pamusana pokukara mari ikoko vamwe vakazosiya chitendero zvikazovarwadza mumwoyo zvikuru. 
1Timothy6:11 Asi iwe munhu waMwari siyana nezvinhu izvi. Vavarira ururami, kuzvipira kuna Mwari nechitendero norudo nokuva nemwoyo mumwechete nounyoro." 
1Timothy6:12 Rwira chitendero zvakanaka uve noupenyu husingaperi hwawakadanirwa pawakapupura zvakanaka pamberi pezvapupu zvizhinji. 
1Timothy6:13 Pamberi paMwari anopa upenyu kuzvinhu zvose uye pamberi paKristu Jesu akapupura zvakanaka paumboo hwake pamberi paPontio Pirato," 
1Timothy6:14 ndinokukomeresa kuti uchengete mutemo usina kusvibiswa uye pasina chaunopomerwa kusvikira kuzviratidza kwaTenzi wedu Jesu Kristu. 
1Timothy6:15 Izvi zvichazoratidzwa panguva yakakodzera naiye wamakomborero, Mambo wamadzimambo naTenzi wavatenzi" 
1Timothy6:16 iye oga chirambakusakara; asingafi anogara muchiedza chisingasvikiki; asina kumboonekwa nomunhu uye asingagoni kuonekwa. Iye ngaarumbidzwe noutongi husingaperi. Ameni. 
1Timothy6:17 Vapfumi vapasi pano, vataurire kuti varege kuzvitutumadza kana kuvimba noupfumi husina paho. Asi ngavavimbe naMwari anotifashurira zvose zvinotifadza." 
1Timothy6:18 Vanofanira kuita zvakanaka vavevo vapfumi mumabasa akanaka vanopa vachida vavewo vanamupanegombe vasingapi vachikonyodza. 
1Timothy6:19 Saizvozvo vachazvivakira ugaro hwakanaka hweramangwana ravo vachizozviwanira upenyu ihwohwo hwezvirokwazvo. 
1Timothy6:20 Iwe Timoti chengetedza zvakaiswa mumaoko mako kuti uchengete. Siyana nokutaura kusinei naMwari zvinopesana nezvinenge zvichinzi ichokwadi izvo zvisiri chokwadi. 
1Timothy6:21 Vamwe vakatevera izvozvo vakarasika gwara rechitendero. Chikomborero chenyasha ngachive nemi. 
2Timothy1:1 Ndini Pauro mupositori waJesu Kristu nokuda kwaMwari maererano nechitsidzo choupenyu huri muna Kristu Jesu 
2Timothy1:2 ndinokunyorera iwe Timoti mwana wangu wapamwoyo ndichiti: Dai Mwari angokupa chikomborero chenyasha nengoni norugare zvichibva kuna Mwari Baba naKristu Jesu Tenzi wedu. 
2Timothy1:3 Ndinotenda Mwari wandinoshandira nemwoyo wakachena sezvakaitwa namadzibaba angu pandinokuyeuka nguva dzose muminamato yangu. 
2Timothy1:4 Pandinoyeuka misodzi yako ndinosuwira siku nesikati kukuona kuti ndizadzwe norufaro. 
2Timothy1:5 Ndinoyeuka chitendero chako chiri pachokwadi, chitendero chakatanga muna ambuya vako Roisi naamai vako Yunisi chandine chokwadi kuti chavawo mauri." 
2Timothy1:6 Naizvozvo ndinokuyeuchidza kuti ukuchidzirezve chipo chaMwari chiri mauri chawakawana nokukuisa maoko pamusoro kwandakuita 
2Timothy1:7 nokuti Mwari haana kutipa mweya woumbwende asi mweya wesimba norudo nowokuzvibata. 
2Timothy1:8 Saizvozvo usanyare kupupurira Tenzi wedu kana kundipupurirawo ini musungwa wake, nesimba raunopiwa naMwari. Chikonzero chiri chokuti utambudzikewo pamwechete neni pamusana peShoko Rakanaka" 
2Timothy1:9 raiye akatinunura akatidaidza nokudaidza kunoera, kwete nokuda kwamabasa edu asi pamusana pezvirongwa zvake uye pamusana penyasha dzake dzaakatipa muna Kristu Jesu karekareko." 
2Timothy1:10 Asi iye zvino akaratidzwa pachena nokuzvionesa kwomununuri wedu Kristu Jesu akaparadza rufu akaunza upenyu ndokuratidza pachena, nokuShoko Rakanaka, upenyu nokusafa." 
2Timothy1:11 Ndakasarudzwa kuva muparidzi nomupositori nomudzidzisi weShoko Rakanaka iroro," 
2Timothy1:12 nokuda kwaizvozvi ndinotambudzika kudai, asi handinyari nokuti ndinoziva wandakatenda maari uye ndine chokwadi chokuti anokwanisa kuchengetedza zvakaiswa mumaoko mangu kusvikira Zuva iroro." 
2Timothy1:13 Nyatsochengetedza mashoko ezviro kwazvo awakanzwa kwandiri somuenzaniso waunofanira kutevera uri muchitendero norudo zvinowanikwa muna Kristu Jesu. 
2Timothy1:14 Chengetedza chokwadi chakaiswa mumaoko ako naMweya Mutsvene anogara matiri. 
2Timothy1:15 Iwe unoziva kuti vose vari muAsia vakandisiya. Vamwe vavo ndavana Figerasi naHerimoganesi. 
2Timothy1:16 Dai Mwari angoitira veimba yaOnesiforusi tsitsi nokuti akandinyaradza kazhinji. Hazvaimbomunyadzisa kuti ini ndaiva muusungwa. 
2Timothy1:17 Zvokuti paakasvika kuRoma akanditsvaka nemeso matsvuku akandiwana. 
2Timothy1:18 Dai Tenzi angomuitira tsiye nyoro dzinobva kuna iye Tenzi Pazuva Iroro. Iwe unonyatsoziva basa rose raakaita kuEfesusi. 
2Timothy2:1 Naizvozvo iwe mwanangu chisimba uchibatsirwa nenyasha dzatinowana muna Kristu Jesu. 
2Timothy2:2 Zvawakanzwa kwandiri pamberi pezvapupu zvizhinji, zviturire kuvanhu vakatendeka vanokwanisa kudzidzisawo vamwe." 
2Timothy2:3 Tirira chikamu chako chamatambudziko zvakanaka somurwi waKristu Jesu. 
2Timothy2:4 Hakuna musoja achiri pabasa anozvipinza mumabasa amazuva ose kana achida kugutsa akamunyora pabasa. 
2Timothy2:5 Hakunawo munhu wamapitse omutambo anopiwa chiremba kusatoti achengeta mitemo yacho. 
2Timothy2:6 Murimi anoshanda zvakasimba ndiye anofanira kuwana mukoho wokutanga wembeswa. 
2Timothy2:7 Rangarira zvandinotaura nokuti Tenzi achakupa kunzwisisa muna zvose. 
2Timothy2:8 Yeuka Jesu Kristu akamuka muvafi, wedzinza raDhavhidhi sokuparidzwa kwazvinoitwa muShoko rangu Rakanaka" 
2Timothy2:9 randiri kutambudzikira ndakasungwa makechemi somunhu anotyora mitemo yenyika. Asi Shoko Rakanaka harisungwi. 
2Timothy2:10 Naizvozvo ndinotirira zvose pamusana pavasarudzwi kuti naivowo vawane ruponeso rwuri muna Kristu Jesu nembiri yarwo inogara narini narini. 
2Timothy2:11 Izvi ndezvechokwadi zvokuti “Kana takafa pamwechete naKristu tichararama pamwechete naye. 
2Timothy2:12 Kana tikatirira tichatonga pamwe naye kana tikamuramba iye achatirambawo. 
2Timothy2:13 Kana tikasatendeka iye anoramba akatendeka nokuti haagoni kuva zvaasiri.” 
2Timothy2:14 Vayeuchidze izvi uvakomerese pamberi paTenzi kuti varege kuitirana nharo nezvamazwi zvisingavabatsiri asi zvinotouraya vanenge vakateerera. 
2Timothy2:15 Edza napose paunogona kuva munhu anogamuchirika pana Mwari, mushandi asina chaanganyare nacho anoziva kushanda namagwaro matsvene echokwadi zvakanaka." 
2Timothy2:16 Siyana nehurukuro dzisina zvoumwari mukati nokuti zvinoramba zvongotungamirira vanhu mune zvisina umwari. 
2Timothy2:17 Hurukuro dzavo dzinonyenga seronda risingapori. Vamwe vavo ndavana Himenayosi naFiretusi 
2Timothy2:18 vakatsauka pachokwadi, vanoti zvokumuka kuvafi zvakatoitika. Vari kudzongodza chitendero chavamwe." 
2Timothy2:19 Asi hwaro hwaMwari hwakasimba hunoramba huripo hwakanyorwa kuti, “Tenzi anoziva avo,” uye kuti, “Munhu wose anodaidza zita raTenzi, ngaasiyane nouipi.”" 
2Timothy2:20 Muzimba hombe hamuna midziyo yendarama neyesirivha chete asi mune yemiti neyevhu. Mimwe ndeyamazuva makuru, imwewo ndeyamazuva ose." 
2Timothy2:21 Munhu akazvichenura kune zvinoshoreka anobva ava mudziyo wakakosha wamazuva makuru achiva mudziyo wakayereswa une basa, kumuridzi wemba, wakagarira basa ripi neripi rakanaka." 
2Timothy2:22 Naizvozvo siyana nehavi dzevechiduku unangane noururami nechitendero norudo norugare pamwechete navanodaidza kuna Tenzi nemwoyo wakanaka. 
2Timothy2:23 Siyana nenharo dzoupenzi dzisina musoro. Iwe unoziva kuti dzinomutsa gakava. 
2Timothy2:24 Muranda waTenzi haafaniri kuva munhu wenharo asi kuva nomutsa kuvanhu vose ari mudzidzisi kwaye ano mwoyo murefu," 
2Timothy2:25 anodzora vanorwisana naye nounyoro. Zvichida Mwari anovasvitsa pakutendeuka vakasvika pakuziva chokwadi 
2Timothy2:26 vachigona kutopunyuka riva raDhiabhori ivo vambobatwa naye kuti vaite zvaanoda. 
2Timothy3:1 Nzwisisa izvi zvokuti kumazuva okupedzisira kuchauya nguva yenhamo 
2Timothy3:2 nokuti vanhu vachava vanhu vanozvida vanokara mari, vanozvikudza, vanozvitutumadza, vanotuka, vasingateereri vabereki, vasingatendi, vasina hanya naMwari" 
2Timothy3:3 vasingamboona kuti munhu chii, vasingagoni kuyanana navamwe, vana makuhwa, madzenga avanhu, namagandanga zvawo, vavengi vezvinhu zvakanaka" 
2Timothy3:4 navanhu vasingavimbiki, vanhu vasingabatiki pavo, vanozvitutumadza, vanoda mafaro kupinda Mwari" 
2Timothy3:5 vanechitendero chechipameso ivo vachiramba simba racho. Siyana navanhu vakadaro. 
2Timothy3:6 Pakati pavo ndipo pana vamwe vanopinda mudzimba dzavanhu vachikachikira vakadzi vakaneta neta uye vakaremerwa nezvitadzo, vanopeperetswa nezvinhu zvose, zvose" 
2Timothy3:7 vanotevera munhu wose wose vasingagoni kusvika pakunzwisisa chokwadi. 
2Timothy3:8 Sezvakaita Janesi naJamburesi vakapikisa Mosesi, saizvozvo vanhu ava vanopesanawo nechokwadi. Vane pfungwa dzakaora. Vanhu vakakundika muchitendero chavo." 
2Timothy3:9 Asi hapana kwavanosvika nokuti munhu wose achaziva upenzi hwavo sezvakangoitika kuna varume vaviri ava. 
2Timothy3:10 Asi iwe wakanyatsoongorora zvandinodzidzisa, nomugariro wangu, nechinangwa changu muupenyu nechitendero changu nomwoyo murefu wangu norudo rwangu uye kuramba ndakatsungirira kwangu" 
2Timothy3:11 nokutambudzwa kwangu uye nhamo dzangu nezvakandiwira kuAntioku nokuIkoniyo nokuRisitira nokutambudzwa kwandakatirira, asi Tenzi akandinunura kune zvose izvozvi." 
2Timothy3:12 Vose vanoda upenyu hwokuzvipira kuna Mwari muna Kristu Jesu vachatambudzwa 
2Timothy3:13 asi vanhu vakaipa navanobata vanhu kumeso vanoramba vachinyanya kutadza vachinyengedza vamwe ivowo vachinyengedzwa. 
2Timothy3:14 Asi iwe ramba uri munezvawakadzidza uye zvawadavira nemwoyo wose uchiziva kuti wakazvidzidza kuna vanaani. 
2Timothy3:15 Unofanira kuziva kuti waiziva kubvira pauduku hwako Magwaro Matsvene anokwanisa kukudzidzisa kuti uponeswe nechitendero chako muna Kristu Jesu. 
2Timothy3:16 Magwaro Matsvene ose akafemerwa naMwari uye ane basa pakudzidzisa napakutsiura napakugadziridza munhu uye pakudzidzisa kuita zvakanaka 
2Timothy3:17 kuti munhu waMwari ave akakwana akagadzirira basa ripi neripi rakanaka. 
2Timothy4:1 Ndinokukomeresa pamberi paMwari uye pamberi paKristu Jesu achazotonga vapenyu navakafa, pamberi paiye achazozviratidza muumambo hwake." 
2Timothy4:2 Paridza shoko. Ramba uchingoriparidza panguva yarinofanira kuparidzwa kana panguva isiri yokuriparidza. Vataurire vazvinzwe; tsiura; uye vakurudzire. Usanete kuva nomwoyo murefu uye usanete kudzidzisa. 
2Timothy4:3 Nokuti nguva iri kuuya vanhu pavanenge vasisadi chidzidziso chechokwadi vave nenzeve dzinovava vachizviunganidzira vadzidzisi vanowirirana nezvavanoda. 
2Timothy4:4 Vachafuratira chokwadi votendeukira kune zvengano. 
2Timothy4:5 Iwe ramba wakasimba, tirira matambudziko. Ita basa romuparidzi weShoko Rakanaka. Ita basa rako." 
2Timothy4:6 Kana ndiri ini ndatosvika pokuti ndichiitwa chibayiro. Nguva yangu yokuenda yasvika. 
2Timothy4:7 Ini ndakarwisa zvakanaka; ndakapedza mujaho, ndakachengeta chitendero." 
2Timothy4:8 Kubva zvino ndakachengeterwa chiremba choururami, chandakagadzirirwa naTenzi mutongi wakarurama chaachandipa paZuva riya riya, kwete ini ndoga asi vose vanofarira kuzviratidza kwake." 
2Timothy4:9 Edza napaunogona kuuya kwandiri nokukurumidza 
2Timothy4:10 nokuti, Dhemasi, pamusana pokuda zvapanyika pano, akanditiza akaenda kuTesaronika. Kiresenzia akaenda kuGaratia. Titosi akaendawo Dharimatia." 
2Timothy4:11 Ruka chete ndiye aneni. Tora Mariko uuye naye nokuti anobatsira kwazvo nokundishandira kwaanoita. 
2Timothy4:12 Tikikusi ndakamutuma kuEfeso. 
2Timothy4:13 Kana wouya ndivigirewo bhachi randakasiya naKariposi kuTiroasi uye mabhuku zvikuru amatehwe ose okunyorera. 
2Timothy4:14 Arekizanda, mupfuri wesimbi akandiitira zvakaipa zvikuru. Tenzi achamutsividza zviito zvake." 
2Timothy4:15 Kana iwewo muchenjerere nokuti anopikisana kwazvo neshoko redu. 
2Timothy4:16 Pakutongwa kwangu kwokutanga hapana akamira neni, vose vakanditiza. Dai vangorega kupihwa mhosva nazvo." 
2Timothy4:17 Asi Tenzi ndiye akanditsigira akandipa simba kuti ndiparidze shoko zvizere kuti vechirudzi vose varinzwe. Ndizvozvo ndakanununurwa mukanwa meshumba. 
2Timothy4:18 Tenzi achandinunura kumabasa ose akaipa achindichengetedzera umambo hwake hwokudenga. Iye ngaarumbidzwe narini narini. Ameni. 
2Timothy4:19 Ndikwazisirewo Pirisika naAkwira nevemba yaOnesiforosi. 
2Timothy4:20 Erasitosi akasara Kukorinde. Tirofimosi ndakamusiya achirwara kuMiretusi. 
2Timothy4:21 Edza kuuya mwaka wechando usati wauya. Yubhurosi anokukwazisa naPudhenzi naRinusi naKiraudhia nevehama vose. 
2Timothy4:22 Tenzi ngaave newe. Chikomborero chenyasha ngachive newe. 
Titus1:1 Ndini Pauro; muranda waMwari nomupositori waJesu Kristu kuti ndiendese mberi chitendero chavasarudzwi vaMwari uye kuti ndiendese mberi kuziva kwavo chokwadi chinowirirana nokunamata Mwari. 
Titus1:2 Ndinoita izvi pamusana pechitarisiro choupenyu husingaperi hwakatsidzirwa pasichigare naMwari asingarevi nhema. 
Titus1:3 Hwakazoratidzwa pachena mushoko rake, panguva kwayo nokuparidza kwandakaturirwa maererano nokukudzwa kwandakaitwa naMwari mununuri wedu." 
Titus1:4 Ndiri kunyorera iwe Titosi mwana wangu chaiye muchitendero chimwetecho neni. Dai wangowana chikomborero chenyasha norugare zvichibva kuna Mwari Baba nokuna Kristu Jesu mununuri wedu. 
Titus1:5 Ndizvo zvandakakusiira kuKiriti kuti unyatsoronga zvisina kurongeka uye kuti usarudze nokugadza vakuru vesangano mumaguta ose sokukuudza kwandakaita. 
Titus1:6 Anofanira kunge munhu asina chaangashorwe nacho, murume womukadzi mumwechete ana vana vatendi vasiri nhunzvatunzva dzavana kana tsvuuramuromo." 
Titus1:7 Mubhishopi somutariri wezvaMwari anofanira kuva munhu asina chaanopomerwa. Haafaniri kuva munhu ano mukundo kana chinya kana chiradza chedoro kana munhu wedzivo kana kuti anokarira pfuma. 
Titus1:8 Asi anofanira kuva munhu anogamuchira vaenzi zvakanaka nomunhu anoda zvakanaka ane hunhu akamira pachokwadi, mutsvene anozvibata." 
Titus1:9 Anofanira kubatisisa kushoko rechokwadi sokudzidziswa kwazvakaitwa kuti agone kudzidzisa chidzidziso chechokwadi uye kugona kupwisa vanopesana naro. 
Titus1:10 Nokuti kune tsvuuramuromo dzakawanda dzisingamharwi muromo nenhunzi, vanyengedzi zvikuru vebato rokudzingiswa." 
Titus1:11 Vanofanira kunyararidzwa nokuti vanonyonganisa mhuri nemhuri vachidzidzisa kuti vangozvipfumisa nezvinhu zvavasingafaniri kudzidzisa. 
Titus1:12 Mumwe wavo, muporofita wavo pachavo akati vaKiriti vatauri venhema nguva dzose, zvikara zvakaipa, nyope dzavanhu dzina makaro." 
Titus1:13 Uchapupu uhu ndewechokwadi; naizvozvo vatsiure zvakasimba kuti vave nechitendero chezvirokwazvo," 
Titus1:14 panze pokuteerera ngano dzechiJudha kana mitemo inoiswa navanhu vanoramba chokwadi. 
Titus1:15 Kuna vakachena, zvose zvakachena asi kuno munhu ane tsika dzakaora asingatendi hapana chakachena. Pfungwa dzavo chaidzo nehana dzavo dzakaodzwa." 
Titus1:16 Vanoti vanoziva Mwari asi vanomuramba nezviito zvavo. Vanosemesa, havateereri, havakodzeri basa ripi neripi zvaro rakanaka." 
Titus2:1 Chako iwe kudzidzisa chidzidziso chinovaka. 
Titus2:2 Taurira varume vakuru kuti vazvibate pakunwa, vave vanokudzikana, vakangwara vane chitendero kwacho vave norudo kwaro nemwoyo mumwechete." 
Titus2:3 Taurira vakadzi vakuru kuti vave vakatsiga vasina makuhwa kana kuva varanda vedoro; vanofanira kudzidzisa zvinhu zvakanaka, nenzira iyoyo" 
Titus2:4 vagodzidzisa madzimai echidiki kuda varume vavo navana vavo 
Titus2:5 vakangwara vari vatsvene, vanochengeta dzimba dzavo, vano mutsa vanoteerera varume vavo kuti shoko raMwari rirege kushorwa." 
Titus2:6 Saizvozvo, taurira varume vechidiki kuti vazvibate." 
Titus2:7 Mune zvinhu zvose, iwe pachako vape muenzaniso wezviito zvakanaka uye mukudzidzisa kwako varatidze kuva pachokwadi uine chiremera" 
Titus2:8 nechidzidziso chakakwana chisina chingatsoropodzwe kuti vanopikisana newe vanyare vasina chakaipa chavangataure nezvedu. 
Titus2:9 Taurira varanda kuti vateerere vatenzi vavo vavafadze muna zvose, kwete kuvapindura" 
Titus2:10 uye varege kuvabira, asi kutoratidza kuti vakanaka uye vanogona kuvimbwa navo zvechokwadi uyewo zvizere kuti muna zvose vayemurise chidzidziso chaMwari Muponesi wedu." 
Titus2:11 Chikonzero chacho ndechokuti nyasha dzaMwari dzakaratidzwa pachena kuti vanhu vose vaponeswe 
Titus2:12 dzichitidzidzisa kusiyana nezvisina chitendero nehavi dzezvenyika uye kuti tigare upenyu hokuzvibata huri pachokwadi hune chitendero panyika pano 
Titus2:13 tichimirira chitarisiro chedu chine rufaro chokuoneka kwembiri kwaMwari wedu mukuru nomununuri wedu Jesu Kristu. 
Titus2:14 Akazvipira pamusana pedu kuti atinunure kuuipi hwose uye kuti azvichenurire vanhu vake pachake vane shungu dzokuita mabasa akanaka. 
Titus2:15 Taura zvinhu izvi pachena uchikurudzira nokutsiura nesimba rose usabvumire kuti pave neanozvikudza. 
Titus3:1 Yeuchidza vanhu ivavo kuti vazviise pasi pavatongi navabati venyika kuti vave vanhu vanoteerera uye kuti vave vakagadzirira kuita basa ripi neripi zvaro rakanaka; 
Titus3:2 vasingatauri zvakaipa zvaani nani zvake, vanzvenge kupopotana navanhu; vave vanhu vakanyorova uye varatidze rukudzo rwakaperera kuna vanhu vose." 
Titus3:3 Nokuti iyesuwo pachedu, takambenge takazungaira, tiri vanhu vasingateereri vakatetereka tiri varanda vehavi vanamafaro akasiyana — siyana tichipedzera mazuva edu muuipi neshanje tichivengwa navanhu uye isu tichivengana." 
Titus3:4 Asi pakazoratidzwa mutsa norudo rwaMwari Mununuri wedu 
Titus3:5 akatinunura kwete nezvatakaita isu muururami asi pamusana pengoni dzake nokushambidzwa kokuzvarwa patsva 
Titus3:6 nokuvandudzwa naMweya Mutsvene waakawodzworera matiri nokuna Jesu Kristu Mununuri wedu 
Titus3:7 kuti tiruramiswe nenyasha dzake tichiva vagari venhaka nechitarisiro choupenyu husingaperi. 
Titus3:8 Izvi ndezvechokwadi. Ndinoda kuti iwe usimbisise zvinhu izvi, kuti avo vakatenda kuna Mwari vachenjerere kuzvipira kumabasa akanaka. Izvi zvakanakisa kwazvo uye zvinobatsira vanhu." 
Titus3:9 Asi iwe nzvenga nharo dzoupenzi dzezvemirongorongo yamazita amadzinza nokusawirirana nokuitirana nharo nezvomutemo nokuti hazvina chimuko kana maturo. 
Titus3:10 Munhu anoparadzanisa vanhu ukamutsiura kamwechete kana kaviri, chirega kuva nechii zvacho chokuita naye." 
Titus3:11 Zvinobva zvakuzivisa kuti munhu akadaro ahedhuka uye mutadzi akatozvipa mhosva. 
Titus3:12 Kana ndatumira Aritemasi kana kuti Tikikusi kwauri, edza nokwaunogona nako kose kuuya kwandiri kuNikoporisi; nokuti ndafunga zvokundopedza mwaka wechando ikoko." 
Titus3:13 Edza nokwaunogona kubatsira gweta, Zenasi naAporosi parwendo rwavo kuti varege kuva nechavanoshaya." 
Titus3:14 Vanhu veduwo ngavadzidze kuzvipira mumabasa akanaka kuti vabatsire pazvinhu zvinenge zvichifanira kuti zviitwe, kwete kungogara maoko." 
Titus3:15 Vose vandinavo vanokukwazisa. Ndikwazisirewo vaya vanotida muchitendero. Chikomborero chenyasha ngachive nemi mose. 
Philemon1:1 Ndini Pauro musungwa akasungirwa Kristu Jesu, tinokunyorera tiri pamwechete naTimoti hama yedu iwe Firimoni" 
Philemon1:2 mushandipamwe nesu wapamwoyo naApiya hanzvadzi yedu naAchipusi musoja pamwechete nesu nesangano rinonamatira pamba pako. 
Philemon1:3 Nyasha norugare ngazvive nemi zvichibva kuna Mwari Baba vedu nokuna Tenzi Jesu Kristu. 
Philemon1:4 Ndinotenda Mwari nguva dzose pandinokuyeuka muminamato yangu 
Philemon1:5 nokuti ndinonzwa nezvorudo rwako kuvanhu vaMwari vose uye nechitendero chako chauinacho muna Tenzi Jesu. 
Philemon1:6 Dai mubatirapamwe wako muchitendero wangobereka muchero wokuti iwe uzive zvakanaka zviri matiri kuitira Kristu 
Philemon1:7 nokuti ndakawana rufaro rwakawanda nokusimbaradzwa zvichibva murudo rwako, iwe hama yangu nokuti wakaita kuti mwoyo yavanhu vaMwari ifaranuke." 
Philemon1:8 Nezvo kunyange zvangu, muna Kristu, ndiine simba, rokukuudza zvokuita," 
Philemon1:9 asi pamusana porudo, zviri nani kuti ndiite zvokukukumbira, iyeni Pauro harahwa kudai uyewo musungwa akasungirwa Kristu Jesu." 
Philemon1:10 Ndinokuteterera ndichikumbirira mwana wangu Onesimo wandakabereka muusungwa hwangu. 
Philemon1:11 Iye akanga ari munhu asina maturo kwauri asi iye zvino ave munhu ane basa kwauri nokwandiri. 
Philemon1:12 Zvino ndava kumudzorera kwauri ndichimutumira somunhu wapamwoyo pangu chaiye," 
Philemon1:13 Ndingadai ndakatosarudza kuramba ndiinaye kuno kuti andishandire panzvimbo pako nguva yandiri muusungwa kudai pamusana peShoko Rakanaka. 
Philemon1:14 Asi ndakasarudza kuti ndirege kuva nechandinoita ndisina mvumo yako kuitira kuti kundiitira zvakanaka kwako kurege kuva kokumanikidzwa asi kuti kuve kwaunosarudza wakasununguka. 
Philemon1:15 Pamwe ndizvo zvakaita kuti amboparadzaniswa newe kwekachinhambo kuti azodzorerwa kwauri zvachose," 
Philemon1:16 kwete senhapwa asi atokosha kupinda nhapwa, ava munun'una wapamwoyo zvikuru kwandiri, ko kutozoti kwauri, inga mwana womumusha wani uyewo akakosha muna Tenzi." 
Philemon1:17 Zvino kana iwe uchindiona sasahwira wako, mugamuchire sokundigamuchira kwaungandiite." 
Philemon1:18 Kana pane chii zvacho chaakakunganisira kana kuti ane chikwereti newe chinyore pazita rangu sechikwereti. 
Philemon1:19 Iyeni Pauro ndinosaina izvi noruoko rwangu kuti ndichachibhadhara tisingatauri zvedu zvechikwereti chako, chokuti iwe unotova nechikwereti kwandiri." 
Philemon1:20 Hongu, hama ndinoda rubatsiro kwauri zvichibva muna Tenzi. Chindifaranutsawo mwoyo muna Kristu." 
Philemon1:21 Pane zvokuteerera kwako ndine chivimbo newe. Ndinokunyorera ndichiziva kuti uchatoita zvinopfuura zvandiri kutaura. 
Philemon1:22 Chimwezve ndechokuti ndigadzirirewo imba yavaenzi nokuti ndinotarisira kuti, ndichibatsirwa neminamato yenyu, ndichadzorerwa kwamuri." 
Philemon1:23 Epafurasi musungwa pamwe neni muna Kristu Jesu anokukwazisa," 
Philemon1:24 uyewo Mariko naAristakusi naDhemasi naRuka vashandipamwe neni. 
Philemon1:25 Tenzi Jesu Kristu ngaape chikomborero chenyasha kumweya wenyu. 
Hebrews1:1 Karakare, Mwari aitaura kumadzitateguru edu kazhinji — zhinji, nenzirawo dzakasiyana — siyana nemiromo yavaporofita," 
Hebrews1:2 asi mumazuva ano okupedzisira akazotaura kwatiri nomuromo woMwanakomana wake, waakaita mugari wenhaka yezvinhu zvose. Ndiyewo waakasika naye pasi pose." 
Hebrews1:3 Ndiye anoratidza pachena mbiri yaMwari, ndiyezve mufananidzo chaiwo wamamiriro akaita Mwari, anochengetedza mumaoko ake zvisikwa zvose nezwi rake rinesimba. Paakapedza kuita basa rokuchenesa vanhu kuzvivi, akandogara kurudyi rwaSamasimbaose ari kumusorosoro," 
Hebrews1:4 aitwawo mukuru kuvatumwa vedenga sezita raakanga apiwa rakanyanya kunaka kupfuura ravo. 
Hebrews1:5 Ndoupi mutumwa akambonzi naMwari; “Iwe uri Mwanakomana wangu, nhasi ndakubereka?” Kana kuti; “Ndichave baba kwaari, iye agove Mwanakomana kwandiri?”" 
Hebrews1:6 Uyezve paakaunza dangwe rake pasi pose anoti, “Vatumwa vose vaMwari ngavamupfugamire kumunamata.”" 
Hebrews1:7 Nezvavatumwa anoti; “Anoita vatumwa vake kuti vave mhepo, varanda vake kuti vave rimi romoto.”" 
Hebrews1:8 NezvoMwanakomana anoti; “Chigaro chenyu choushe, imi Mwari, chinozoramba chiripo nokusingaperi. Uye tsvimbo yoruenzaniso ndiyo tsvimbo youmambo hwenyu." 
Hebrews1:9 “Imi makada ururami mukavenga unyangadzi, “Ndosaka Mwari, iye Mwari wenyu, akakugadzai ukuru pamusoro pavamwe venyu nokukuzodzai namafuta orufaro." 
Hebrews1:10 Imi Tenzi makawarika ugaro hwapasi pose uye matenga ibasa ramaoko enyu. 
Hebrews1:11 Izvi zvichaparara asi imi mucharamba muripo. Zvose zvichasakara sehanzu. 
Hebrews1:12 Muchazvipeta sejasi, sechipfeko zvichasanduka asi imi munoramba makangodaro, makore enyu haagumi.”" 
Hebrews1:13 Ndoupi mutumwa waakamboti, “Gara kurudyi rwangu, kusvikira ndaita vavengi vako chitambarariko chetsoka dzako?" 
Hebrews1:14 Handiti Mweya yose inebasa rokushanda here? Yakatumwa kuti indoitira basa avo vose vachazogara nhaka yoruponeso here?” 
Hebrews2:1 Naizvozvo tinofanira kunyatsobatisisa zvatanzwa, kuti tirege kurasika, tonanga mutome." 
Hebrews2:2 Nokuti kana shoko riya rakarehwa navatumwa riri rechokwadi, uyezve kana kukanganisa kose nokusateerera kwakapihwa chirango chakaenzanirana nazvo," 
Hebrews2:3 ko, isu tichazopunyuka napapi kana tisina kuita hanya noruponeso rwakakomba kudai? Ndirwo rwakataurwa naTenzi pokutanga, rwukatsinhirwa kwatiri navavo vakamunzwa." 
Hebrews2:4 Mwari akarupupurirawo nezvioneso, nezvishamiso, nezviratidzo, zvorudzi norudzi nezvipo zvaMweya Mutsvene zvaaipa samadiro ake." 
Hebrews2:5 Mwari haana kuisa pasi pavatumwa nyika ichauya, yatiri kutaura nezvayo." 
Hebrews2:6 Zvakapupurirwawo kumwe zvichinzi, “Iye munhu chiikowo zvake wamunorangarira? “Iye munhuwo zvake wamunochengeta." 
Hebrews2:7 Kwechinguvana mukamuita kuti ave mudiki kuvatumwa, mukamupfekedza ndaza nembiri norukudzo." 
Hebrews2:8 Makaisawo zvinhu zvose pasi petsoka dzake.” Pamakaisa zvinhu zvose pasi pake, haana kusiya nechinhu chose chisiri mumaoko ake. Iye zvino hatisati zvedu toona zvinhu zvose zviri pasi pake." 
Hebrews2:9 Asi tinoona Jesu, iye akamboitwa muduku panavatumwa kwechinguvana achidzikwa chiremba chembiri nokukudzwa, pamusana pamarwadzo erufu kuti anzwe chinonzi rufu nenyasha dzaMwari, achifira munhu wose." 
Hebrews2:10 Zvaikodzera kuti muridzi wezvinhu zvose, iye nyakuita kuti zvivepo, zvaaida kuendesa vana vazhinji mumbiri, aite kuti namatambudziko, mutungamiriri wavo ave wakaruramisisa." 
Hebrews2:11 Nokuti iye munatsi wavanhu, naivo vakanatswa, vanobva padzinde rimwechete. Ndokusaka asinganyari kuvati hama," 
Hebrews2:12 paya paanoti, “Ndichaparidza zita renyu kuhama dzangu, ndichakurumbidzai ndiri mukati meSangano.”" 
Hebrews2:13 Napamwezve paanoti; “Ndichaisa chivimbo changu maari.” Pamwezve achiti; “Ndiri pano navana vaakandipa Mwari.” 
Hebrews2:14 Naizvozvo, pamusana pokuti vana vedzinza inyama imwechete neropa rimwechete, ndokusaka iyewo akava nyama imwechete neropa rimwechete nesu, kuti norufu rwake agoparadza simba rouyo ainge aine simba rorufu, Satani." 
Hebrews2:15 Uyezve kuti agozosunungura avo vose vakagara upenyu hwavo hwose vari nhapwa dzokutya rufu. 
Hebrews2:16 Zviri pachena wani kuti vaakatora akabatsira havasi vatumwa asi vana vechizvarwa chaAbhurahamu. 
Hebrews2:17 Naizvozvo, aifanira kuva sehama dzake muna zvose, kuti ave mupristi mukuru ane tsitsi, anotendeseka mubasa raMwari, anoripirawo zvitadzo zvavanhu." 
Hebrews2:18 Nokuti iye pachake akatambudzika akaedzwa, anokwanisawo kubatsira avo vanoedzwa." 
Hebrews3:1 Naizvozvo, imi hama varurami, vechikwata chavakadaidzirwa denga, chimbofungai nezvaJesu, mupositori nomupristi mukuru wechitendero chedu." 
Hebrews3:2 Aiva munhu wakatendeka kuna iye wakamusarudza; sokutendekawo kwakanga kwakaita Mosesi mumba maMwari. 
Hebrews3:3 Asi Jesu akakodzera kukudzwa kupinda Mosesi sezvinoitwa muvaki wemba; anokudzwa kupinda imba. 
Hebrews3:4 Nokuti imba ipi neipi ine wakaivaka asi muvaki wezvinhu zvose ndiMwari. 
Hebrews3:5 Zvino Mosesi, somuranda akanga akatendeseka muimba yose yaMwari, achipa uchapupu hwezvinhu zvakanga zvichazotaurwa." 
Hebrews3:6 Asi Kristu, iye mukuru wemba yaMwari akatendeseka somwana. Ndisu iyesu imba yake, chero tikaramba tichingovimba chete, nokudada nechitarisiro chedu." 
Hebrews3:7 Naizvozvo sokutaura kwaMweya Mutsvene anoti: “Nhasi kana monzwa izwi rake," 
Hebrews3:8 musazoomesa mwoyo yenyu sapachimurenga paya, pazuva riya rokuedzwa murenje," 
Hebrews3:9 madzibaba enyu pavakandiedza, asi ivo vakaona mabasa angu kwamakore makumi mana." 
Hebrews3:10 Naizvozvo ndakashatiriswa nechizvarwa ichocho; ndikazoti vanogarokanganisa mumwoyo yavo. Havasati vamboziva nzira dzangu. 
Hebrews3:11 Sokupika kwandakaita ndakashatirwa, havachazombopinda muzororo rangu.”" 
Hebrews3:12 Chenjerai, hama dzangu, kuti munaani — nani wenyu murege kuva nemwoyo wakaipa usingatendi, ungadaro ukamutsautsa muna Mwari mupenyu." 
Hebrews3:13 Asi kurudziranai mumwe nomumwe mazuva ose kana chete kuchiri kunzi, “Nhasi” kuti kusave nomumwe wenyu anoomeswa mwoyo nounyengedzi hwechivi." 
Hebrews3:14 Nokuti tinogoverana muna Kristu, chero chete tikaramba takabata zvakasimba ruvimbo rwedu rwapakutanga, kusvika pakupedzisira." 
Hebrews3:15 Zvazvinonzi: “Nhasi kana monzwa izwi rake musazoomesa mwoyo yenyu sapachimurenga paya.” 
Hebrews3:16 Ndavanani vakazvinzwa asi vakazopanduka, handiti ndivo here vaya vakabva kuIjipiti vachitungamirirwa naMosesi?" 
Hebrews3:17 Ndivanani vakamutsamwisa pamakumi mana amakore? Havasi ivo here vaya vakaita zvivi, zvitunha zvavo zvikazoti rakata murenje." 
Hebrews3:18 Ko akapika kuna vanaani kuti havasi kuzombopinda muzororo rake asi kuna ivavo vakanga vasingateereri. 
Hebrews3:19 Naizvozvo tinoona kuti havana kukwanisa kupinda nemhaka yokusadavira. 
Hebrews4:1 Naizvozvo, chivimbiso chokupinda muzororo rake zvachichiripo kudai, ngatichenjerei, kuti mumwe wenyu angadaro akaonekwa akundikana kupinda muzororo iri." 
Hebrews4:2 Nokuti Shoko Rakanaka rakaparidzwa kwatiri sezvarakaitwa kwavari asi Shoko iri harina zvarakabatsira, nokuti harina kusvikowana chitendero muna ivavo vakarinzwa." 
Hebrews4:3 Isu takatenda tinopinda muzororo iroro sokureva kwaakaita achiti, “Sokupika kwandakaita, ndakashatirwa, ndichiti havachazombopinda muzororo rangu,” kunyange zvazvo mabasa ake akapera kubvira pakuvamba kwapasi." 
Hebrews4:4 Paripo pamwe paakataura nezvezuva rechinomwe achiti, “Zvino Mwari akazorora mabasa ake ose pamusi wechinomwe.”" 
Hebrews4:5 Pamwechetepo anotizve, “Havachazombopinda muzororo rangu.”" 
Hebrews4:6 Naizvozvo pamusana pokuti pane vamwe vachiri kukwanisa kupindamo, pagoti vaya vakaparidzirwa Shoko vasina kupinda nemhaka yokusateerera," 
Hebrews4:7 anomisa rimwe zuva racho achitori doma kuti, “Nhasi uno,” achitaura nomuromo waDhavhidhi, iko kwapera nguva yakati rebei kudai namazwi aya akamborehwa atinodzokorora anoti, “Nhasi kana monzwa izwi rake Musazoomesa mwoyo yenyu.”" 
Hebrews4:8 Nokuti dai Joshuwa akanga avapa zororo, Mwari angadai asina kuzotaura pashure nezverimwe zuvazve." 
Hebrews4:9 Naizvozvo kuna vanhu vaMwari kuchine zororo rokusabata basa," 
Hebrews4:10 nokuti uyo anopinda muzororo raMwari anomira kuita mabasa ake sezvakaitwawo naMwari. 
Hebrews4:11 Naizvozvo, ngativavarirei kupinda muzororo iroro, kuti pasave naanoputsika pamusana pokusateerera kwakaita sokuku." 
Hebrews4:12 Shoko raMwari ibenyu uye rine simba, rinopinza kupinda bakatwa ripi neripi zvaro romuchekakose. Rinobaya zvokupinda mukati — kati chaimo richisvika pakarundana munhu nemweya wake: richisvikawo pakasangana nhengo nomwongo. Rinopatsanurawo pfungwa nezvinovavarirwa nemwoyo." 
Hebrews4:13 Kwaari hakuna chisikwa chakavandika, zvose zvakangoti pachena yacha, zvisina chazvakapfeka, zvichinyatsoonekwa kwaari nemeso ake kuna iyeyo kwatichanozvidavirira zviito zvedu." 
Hebrews4:14 Naizvozvo, zvatiino mupristi mukuru wakapinda nomumatenga, iye Jesu Mwanakomana waMwari, ngatichibatisisai chitendero chedu." 
Hebrews4:15 Nokuti hatina mupristi mukuru asingakwanisi kutinzwira tsitsi noutera hwedu. Asi mupristi akamboedzwa nenzira dzakawanda sokuedzwa kwatinoitwa asi haana kumboita chivi. 
Hebrews4:16 Naizvozvo ngatiswederei nechivimbo pedyo nechigaro choumambo chenyasha, kuti tinzwirwe ngoni tigowanawo nyasha dzinotibatsira nenguva yatinenge toda rubatsiro." 
Hebrews5:1 Nokuti mupristi mukuru mumwe nomumwe anosarudzwa achibva mukati mavanhu kuti ashande akamirira vanhu pane zvinhu zvaMwari. Anogadzwa upristi kuti apire zvipo nezvibayiro zvekuripira zvitadzo. 
Hebrews5:2 Anogona kubata zvakapfava avo vasina chavanoziva navanotsauka munzira kwayo nokuti naiyewo akakomberedzwa noutera. 
Hebrews5:3 Ndokusaka achifanira kuti apire zvibayiro zvokuripira zvitadzo zvake pachake nezvitadzo zvavanhu. 
Hebrews5:4 Hakuna munhu anoita zvokuzvipa hukuru ihohu iye pachake, asi kuti anotodaidzwa naMwari sezvakaitwa Aroni." 
Hebrews5:5 Saka naKristuwo haana kuita zvokukambira kugadzwa upristi hukuru, asi kuti akagadzwa nouyo akamuti, “Iwe uri Mwanakomana wangu nhasi ndakubereka.”" 
Hebrews5:6 Sokutaura kwaanoita zvakare pane imwe ndima achiti, “Iwe uri mupristi nokusingaperi wegovero raMerekizedheki.”" 
Hebrews5:7 Pamazuva ake paakanga achinomuviri wake, Jesu akanamata nokuteterera achichema kwazvo nezwi guru aine misodzi padama kuna iye aigona kumununura kurufu. Chichemo chake chakanzwika, nokuti aive ari anotya Mwari." 
Hebrews5:8 Kunyange akanga ari Mwanakomana, nokutambudzika kwaakaita, akadzidza kuti chinonzi kuteerera chii." 
Hebrews5:9 Paakanga zvino, aitwa munhu akaruramisisa akazova musakisi woruponeso kuna vose vanomuteerera," 
Hebrews5:10 nokuti anotumidzwa naMwari kunzi mupristi mukuru wegovero raMerekizedheki. 
Hebrews5:11 Pane zvizvi tine zvinhu zvizhinji zvokureva asi zvakaoma kutsanangura nokuti zvavakukuomerai kunzwisisa," 
Hebrews5:12 nokuti kunyange zvazvo, parinhasi, muchifanira kunge matova vadzidzisi, mavakutoda mumwe anokudzidzisaizve zvidzidziso zvokutanga zvamashoko aMwari. Mavakutofanira kupihwa mukaka panze pokupihwa chokudya chakasimba." 
Hebrews5:13 Nokuti wose anorarama nomukaka haasati aziva shoko roururami pamusana pokuti mwana muduku. 
Hebrews5:14 Chokudya chakasimba ndechevabve zano, vanepfungwawo dzakapingudzwa nokuramba vachiita zvinhu kuti vazive kutsaura zvakanaka kune zvakaipa." 
Hebrews6:1 Naizvozvo ngatichimbosiyai zvidzidzo zvechikristu zvokutanga, tiende mberi kuzvidzidzo zvechikuru, tirege kunge tichadzokerazve mukuvaka ugaro hwezvokupinduka kubva kumabasa akafa, nehwezvechitendero kuna Mwari kana kuti" 
Hebrews6:2 nezvidzidzo zvoruombeko rwakasiyana — siyana, kana nezvokuisa vanhu maoko pamusoro, kana kutiwo nezvokumuka kwavakafa, kana nezvokutongwa kunogara nokusingaperi." 
Hebrews6:3 Izvi tichazviita zvedu kana Mwari achitibvumira. 
Hebrews6:4 Nokuti hazvikwanisiki kudzora vanhu vakambovhenekerwa, vakaravira chipo chedenga, vakagoveranawo Mweya Mutsvene," 
Hebrews6:5 vakaravira kunaka kweShoko raMwari nesimba roupenyu huchauya," 
Hebrews6:6 asi vakazorasika; nokuti vanoroverera mavari ivo Mwanakomana waMwari pamuchinjikwa, vachimunyadzisa pachena." 
Hebrews6:7 Zvinodaro nokuti ivhu rinonwa mvura inowanzorinaya richizobereka zvirimwa zvinobatsira vazvakarimirwa, rinokomborerwa naMwari." 
Hebrews6:8 Asi kana robereka minzwa nedonzvambeva nesosowori, harina maturo. Ratova padyo nokunyobwa; mugumo waro kupiswa." 
Hebrews6:9 Kunyange zvedu tichitaura nomutowo iwoyu, asi kwamuri, vadikanwi, tinechokwadi chokuti munezvinhu zviri nani zvoruponeso." 
Hebrews6:10 Mwari haakundiki paruenzaniso. Hazviitiki kuti akanganwe basa renyu norudo rwamakatira vatsvene pamusana pake, sezvamuchiri kungoita." 
Hebrews6:11 Tinodisisa kuti mumwe nomumwe wenyu aratidze shungu dzimwechetedzo dzokuti zvatinotarisira izvi zviitike, uye agoramba achingodaro kusvikira kumagumo," 
Hebrews6:12 kuti murege kungoneta — neta, asi kuti murambe muchingotevedzera avo vanowana nhaka yezvakavimbiswa pamusana pechitendero chavo nokusarasa mwoyo kwavo." 
Hebrews6:13 Ndinodaro nokuti zviya, Mwari zvaakatsidzirana naAbhurahamu akapika naiye pachake nokuti pakanga pasina mukuru pana iye waaigona kupika naye," 
Hebrews6:14 zviya zvaakati, “Zvirokwazvo ndichakukomborera chaizvo nokuita kuti uwande.”" 
Hebrews6:15 Saka nokutirira kwake Abhurahamu akawana chaakanga atsidzirwa chiya. 
Hebrews6:16 Vanhu vanopika nomukuru kupinda ivo. Naizvozvo, kana pane gakava pakati pavanhu, vanozopedzisira nokupika, kuti vasimbisise zvavanotaura." 
Hebrews6:17 Naizvozvo Mwari paakanga achida kunyatsosimbisisa, kuvadyi venhaka yechipikirwa kuti zvaanenge atema hazvipinduki — pinduki akazvitsinhira nemhiko." 
Hebrews6:18 Uku kwaiva kuti nezvinhu zviviri zvisingasanduki isu vapoteri tiwane chingatikurudzire kubatisisa chitarisiro chatakapiwa nokuti mune zvizvi zviviri Mwari haagoni kutinyengedza kwete. 
Hebrews6:19 Ichi ndicho chitsigiro chomweya chezvirokwazvo, chitarisiro chinopinda munzvimbo tsvene iri seri kwejira rokudzikatirisa," 
Hebrews6:20 kwakafanopindwa naJesu nokuda kwedu zvaakanga ava Mupristi mukuru nokusingaperi wegovero raMerekizedheki. 
Hebrews7:1 Nokuti iye Merekizedheki uyu, mambo weSaremu, mupristi waMwari Wokumusororo, akachingurana naAbhurahamu akanga achidzoka kubva kwaakanga andouraya madzimambo. Merekizedheki akakomborera Abhurahamu." 
Hebrews7:2 Abhurahamu akamupa chegumi chezvinhu zvake zvose. Kana zita rake rotsanangurwa, pokutanga rinoreva kuti ndiMambo woururami, rinorevawo kuti ndiMambo weSaremu, zvichireva kuti Mambo worugare." 
Hebrews7:3 Haana baba; haana amai; haana dzinza; mazuva ake haana mavambo; upenyu hwake hauna mugumo; asi wakafanana noMwanakomana waMwari anoramba ari mupristi nokusingaperi. 
Hebrews7:4 Tarisai muone mukuriro waakaita! Abhurahamu, iye zitateguru, vakamupa chegumi chezvavakapamba mukurwa." 
Hebrews7:5 Vechizvarwa chaRevhi vanogamuchira upristi hwedzinza. Vano murau unovabvumira kutora, zviri pamutemo, chegumi kubva kuvanhu, ndokuti kubva kuhama dzavo, kunyange vari vana vedzinza rimwechete raAbhurahamu." 
Hebrews7:6 Asi munhu uyu asiri wedzinza iri akapiwa chegumi naAbhurahamu, iye akakomborera Abhurahamu, wakareyo aive nezvivimbiso." 
Hebrews7:7 Hazvina angarambe kuti mudiki ndiye anokomborerwa nomukuru kwaari. 
Hebrews7:8 Apa zvegumi, zvinopiwa kuvanhu vanofa, pamwe apo, zvinopiwa kune anopupurirwa kuti mupenyu." 
Hebrews7:9 Zvichida mumwe angatoti iye Revhi pachake, anopiwa zvegumi, akabvisa chegumi pakabvisa Abhurahamu chegumi," 
Hebrews7:10 nokuti akanga ari muchiuno chatateguru wake paakasangana naMerekizedheki. 
Hebrews7:11 Zvino kana dai ururami huzere hwaiwanikwa pamusana poupristi hwaRevhi, nokutika panguva yahwo ndopakapiwa vanhu mutemo; ko paizodirwei kuti pamuke mumwe mupristi wegovero raMerekizedheki panze pomupristi anodaidzwa nezita regovero raAroni," 
Hebrews7:12 nokuti kana upristi hukasanduka nomutemowo unofanira kutosanduka. 
Hebrews7:13 Ari kurehwa panyaya iyi akanga ari werimwewo dzinza risina ati amboshanda paAritari. 
Hebrews7:14 Zviri pachena kuti Tenzi wedu wakabva kudzinza raJudha, nezvedzinza irori panyaya yezvavapristi, Mosesi haana chaakamboreva." 
Hebrews7:15 Izvi zvinobva zvanyatsobuda pachena — chena kana mumwe mupristi wakafanana naMerekizedheki womuka 
Hebrews7:16 asina kuitwa mupristi maererano nomurawo womutemo womuzvarirwo wenyama asi pamusana pesimba risingagoni kuparadzwa. 
Hebrews7:17 Anopupurirawo kuti, “Iwe uri mupristi wegovero raMerekizedheki nokusingaperi," 
Hebrews7:18 nokuti zvinoti, uku murairo wakare wakabviswa pamusana pokushaya simba nokushaya maturo kwawo," 
Hebrews7:19 (nokuti mutemo hauna chaunoruramisa) ukuwo uku kwakauya chitarisiro chitsva chiri nani chinotibatsira kuswedera kuna Mwari.” 
Hebrews7:20 Izvi hazvina kuitwa pasina mhiko. 
Hebrews7:21 Vamwe vakave vapristi pasina mhiko asi iye akave mupristi zvine mhiko. Uye akati kwaari nemhiko, “Mwari akapika uyezve haachasanduka, akati, ‘Uri mupristi nokusingaperi.’ ”" 
Hebrews7:22 Izvi zvinoita kuti Jesu ave chivimbiso chinotsigira chitenderano chiri nani. 
Hebrews7:23 Vapristi vokutanga vaive vazhinji nokuti vaitadziswa norufu kuti vaenderere mberi nebasa ravo. 
Hebrews7:24 Asi iye anoramba ainoupristi hwake nokuti anoramba aripo nokusingaperi. 
Hebrews7:25 Naizvozvo, anogona kuponesa nguva dzose avo vanouya kuna Mwari nokwaari, nokuti mupenyu nguva dzose kuti avakumbirire." 
Hebrews7:26 Nokuti zvakanga zvakakodzera kuti tive nomupristi mukuru wakadai, akarurama, asina chinoshoreka, asina kun'oreswa, akatsaurwa achibviswa panavatadzi, akasimudzirwa pamusoro, kupfuura matenga." 
Hebrews7:27 Haasungirwi, sezvinoita vapristi vakuru vaya, kuti zuva roga roga apire chibayiro, pokutanga achizvipirira iye pachake, ozopirirawo zvitadzo zvavanhu, nokuti iye akaita izvi chakamwe paye paakazvipira iye pachake." 
Hebrews7:28 Hongu, Mutemo unogadza vanhu vane utera kuti vave vapristi vakuru, asi izwi remhiko, rakazouya mushure moMutemo, rakagadza Mwanakomana, akaita mururami nokusingaperi." 
Hebrews8:1 Chikuru chatiri kutaura apa ndechichi chokuti, tine mupristi mukuru agere kurudyi rwechigaro choumambo choukuru — ukuru chokudenga." 
Hebrews8:2 Ndiye mushandiri womuNzvimbo Tsvene, tendhe rechokwadi risina kumiswa navanhu asi naTenzi." 
Hebrews8:3 Mupristi mukuru oga oga anogadzwa kuti apire zvipo nezvibayiro. Naizvozvo mupristi iyeyo anofanira kuva nezvipo zvaanopira. 
Hebrews8:4 Zvino dai kuri kuti aripo pasi pano haaizombova mupristi zvapane vapristi vanopira zvipo maererano nomutemo. 
Hebrews8:5 Vanonamata muNzvimbo inoera inongova somufananidzo nomumvuri weiri kudenga nokuti Mosesi paakanga ava kuvaka tendhe akataurirwa naMwari achinzi, “Ona kuti waita zvose maererano nezvawakaratidzwa pagomo.”"
