Hebrews8:6 Asi zvino Jesu akawana basa rakatonakisisa kupinda rakare. Pamusana paizvozvo ndiye ava muyananisi wechitenderano chiri nani chakaitwa nezvitsidzo zviri nani. 
Hebrews8:7 Dai kuri kuti chitenderano chokutanga chakanga chisina chakaipa pachiri pangadai pasina zvokuchitsiva nechechipiri. 
Hebrews8:8 Mwari anovapa mhosva paanoti, “Zvanzi naTenzi chionai mazuva achasvika andichaita chitenderano chitsva nemba yokwaIsiraeri nevemba yokwaJudha." 
Hebrews8:9 Chichange chisina kufanana nechitenderano chiya chandakaita namadzitateguru avo, pazuva randakavabata ruoko ndichivaburitsa munyika yeIjipiti nokuti havana kuenderera mberi nechitenderano changu navo nokudaro handina kuzoita hanya navo.” Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi." 
Hebrews8:10 Ichi ndicho chitenderano chandichaita neveimba yokwaIsiraeri mushure mamazuva iwayo ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi. Ndichaisa mitemo yangu mupfungwa dzavo ndigoinyora mumwoyo mavo, ini ndichava Mwari wavo, ivowo vachava vanhu vangu." 
Hebrews8:11 Hapana achadzidzisa mumwe achiti kuna mumwe, “Ziva Tenzi” nokuti vose zvavo vachandiziva kubvira pamuduku — duku wavo chaiye kusvikira pamukuru wavo chaiye" 
Hebrews8:12 nokuti ndichavanzwira nyasha pazvitadzo zvavo uye zvitadzo zvavo handichazombozvirangaririzve. 
Hebrews8:13 Nokutaura nezvechitenderano chitsva, Mwari ari kutoita kuti chakare chinzi chitsaru. Chinhu chinenge chava kusakara, chavakuchembera chinobva chazorova." 
Hebrews9:1 Kunyange chitenderano chokutanga chaivewo nemirau yezvokunamata uye Nzvimbo Tsvene pasi pano. 
Hebrews9:2 Nokuti tende yakagadzirwa, yokunze, mairi maiva nechigadzikiro chemwenje netafura, nezvingwa zvakapirwa kuna Mwari, yainzi NzvimboTsvene." 
Hebrews9:3 Seri kwejira rokudzikatirisa rechipiri kwaiva netendhe inonzi Nzvimbo Tsvene Inoeresesa," 
Hebrews9:4 yaiva neAtari yorusenzi yendarama, nebhokisi rechitenderano rakanamirwa nendarama. Maivawo nomudziyo wendarama wakanga uine Mana; kozouya tsvimbo yaAroni iya yakambotungira mashizha; kozoti mafendefa echitenderano." 
Hebrews9:5 Pamusoro pebhokisi rechitenderano paiva namakerubhu embiri akanga akahwamira hwidibiro yebhokisi rechitenderano. Panguva ino iyi hapasiripo patingagone kutaura pamusoro pezvizvi tichinyatsotsetsenura. 
Hebrews9:6 Marongerwo ezvinhu izvi akamira akadaizvi: vapristi vanopinda nguva dzose muNzvimbo Tsvene yokunze vachiita basa ravo asi mutendhe yechipiri 
Hebrews9:7 munopindwa nomupristi mukuru chete, kamwechete pagore. Kuti apindemo anofanira kuti atakure ropa raanopirira zvikanganiso zvake nezvavanhu." 
Hebrews9:8 Namamiriro ezvinhu akadai, Mweya Mutsvene anoratidza kuti nzira inopinda muNzvimbo Inoeresesa haisati yazarurwa kana tendhe yokunze ichiripo." 
Hebrews9:9 Uyu waiva muenzaniso wakananga zvenguva ino. Samamiriro akaita zvinhu izvi, zvipo nezvibayiro zvinopirwa asi hazvigone kunatsa hana yaanopira wacho," 
Hebrews9:10 nokuti izvi zvakangorerekera kunezvokudya nezvokunwa, nezvokushamba kwakasiyana — siyana, nezvomirau yakananga zvemuviri yakaiswa kusvikira nguva yokuvandudzwa kwezvinhu kuti zvive zvitsva yasvika." 
Hebrews9:11 Asi pakazouya Kristu, mupristi mukuru wezvinhu zvakanaka zvakauya, akapfuura nomutendhe rine ukuru huri nani norunako irinani, isina kuitwa namaoko avanhu zvichireva kuti haisi yapanyika pano." 
Hebrews9:12 Akapinda muNzvimbo Inoeresesa chakamwe. Haana kupinda neropa rembudzi kana remhuru asi kuti nerake pachake, akatiwanira kununurwa kusingaperi." 
Hebrews9:13 Kana ropa rembudzi nerenzombe nedota retsiru zvinomwaiwa vanenge van'ora zvichivachenura mukun'ora kwenyama," 
Hebrews9:14 ko kutozoti ropa raKristu asina chinoshoreka akazvipira nokuna Mweya nyakugara aripo, rinochenesa zvakadii hana dzenyu kubva kumabasa akafa kuti mushandire Mwari mupenyu." 
Hebrews9:15 Naizvozvo Kristu ndiye mukumbanidzi panyaya yechitenderano chitsva kuti avo vakadaidzwa vagamuchire chivimbiso chenhaka isingaperi nokuti pakafiwa rufu apa runovanunura kumhaka dzavakapara vari pasi pechitenderano chechiposhi. 
Hebrews9:16 Kana pane zvakanyorwawo nomufi zvenhaka, panotofanira kuzivikanwa kuti akanyora zvenhaka akafa here kana kuti kwete." 
Hebrews9:17 Nokuti zvakanyorwa zvenhaka zvinotanga kuva nebasa pakufa. Hazvigoni kuva nebasa iye akazvinyora achiri mupenyu. 
Hebrews9:18 Nokudaro kunyange chitenderano chokutanga chakatosimbiswa neropa. 
Hebrews9:19 Ndokusaka, Mosesi paakapedza kutaurira vanhu vose mirao iri mumutemo, akatora ropa remhuru nerembudzi pamwe nemvura akazvisasa pagwaro roMutemo napavanhu vose achisevenzesa wuru tsvuku nekasanzu kemuhisopo; achiti," 
Hebrews9:20 “Iri iropa rechitenderano chamakatemerwa naMwari.” 
Hebrews9:21 Nenzira imwecheteyo akamwaya ropa tendhe nemidziyo yose yaishandiswa pakupira. 
Hebrews9:22 Uye maererano nomutemo tingangoti zvinhu zvose zvinochenurwa chete neropa. Pasina kudeurwa kweropa hapana kuregererwa kwezvitadzo. 
Hebrews9:23 Naizvozvo mifananidzo yezviri kudenga yakanga ichifanira kuchenurwa nemipiro iyi, asi izvo zvinhu zvokudenga pachazvo zvakanga zvichifanira kuchenurwa nezvibayiro zviri nani." 
Hebrews9:24 Nokuti Kristu haana kupinda munzvimbo tsvene yakagadzirwa namaoko yakanga iri mufananidzo weiya yechokwadi asi akapinda mudenga chaimo imomo kuti iye zvino ave pana Mwari achimiririra isu. 
Hebrews9:25 Kristu haana kupinda ruzhinji — zhinji muNzvimbo Inoeresesa kundozviita chibayiro sezvinoita mupristi mukuru anopindamo gore rimwe nerimwe neropa risiri rake. 
Hebrews9:26 Dai zvakadaro aifanira kunge akatambudzika kazhinji — zhinji kubvira kumavambo apasi. Asi sezvazviri, akauya chakamwe, pakupera kwenguva kuzoparadza chitadzo nokuzvipira kwake." 
Hebrews9:27 Izvi zvakangogara zvakatemwa kuti munhu anofanira kufa kamwechete; mushure mokufa kunouya kutongwa. 
Hebrews9:28 Ndozvimwechetezvo naKristu akaitwa chibayiro kamwechete kuti atakure zvitadzo zvavazhinji. Achazouyazve kechipiri. Apa anenge asisinei nezvechitadzo asi kuzoponesa avo vakamumirira. 
Hebrews10:1 Pamusana pokuti mutemo mumvuri chete wezvinhu zvakanaka zvichauya, panze pokuva nezvinhu zvacho chaizvo, kuchingova kupira zvibayiro zvimwechetezvo zvinoramba zvichingopirwa gore negore, haumbofa wakaruramisa vanamati." 
Hebrews10:2 Dai mutemo waigona, zvibayiro zvingadai zvisina kuregerwa kupirwa here? Dai kuri kuti vanamati vakanatswa chakamwe vangadai vasinganzwe kuti vane chitadzo." 
Hebrews10:3 Asi zvibayiro izvozvi zvinoyeuchidza zvitadzo gore negore 
Hebrews10:4 nokuti hazvigoneki kuti ropa rehandira nerembudzi ribvise zvitadzo. Naizvozvo Kristu paakauya panyika akati," 
Hebrews10:5 “Zvibayiro nemipiro hazvisizvo zvamakafarira asi makandigadzirira muviri. 
Hebrews10:6 Mupiro wokupisa nomupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo hamuna kuufarira. 
Hebrews10:7 Ndipo pandakati, ‘Mwari, tarisai muone ndauya kuzoita kuda kwenyu, sokunyorwa kwazvakaitwa nezvangu mubhuku rokumononora.’ ”" 
Hebrews10:8 Paanoti pamusoro apo: “Hamuna kuda kana kufarira zvibayiro nemipiro nemipiro yokupisa nemipiro yokupfupira zvitadzo.” (Izvi zvinopirwa maererano nomutemo). 
Hebrews10:9 Ndokuzoti: “Tarirai ndauya kuzoita kuda kwenyu.” Arikudzima chokutanga achiisa chechipiri. 
Hebrews10:10 Nokuda kwaizvozvo takaitwa vatsvene pamusana pechibayiro chomuviri waJesu Kristu chakamwe. 
Hebrews10:11 Uyewo mupristi mumwe nomumwe anomira achiita basa rake achipira zuva nezuva zvibayiro zvimwechetezvo zvisingambokwanisa kubvisa zvitadzo. 
Hebrews10:12 Asi Kristu paakapira nokusingaperi chibayiro chimwechete chokupfupira zvitadzo akandogara kurudyi rwaMwari 
Hebrews10:13 achimirira kuti vavengi vaitwe chitambarariko chetsoka dzake. 
Hebrews10:14 Naizvozvo nechibayiro chimwechetecho akanatsa nokusingaperi avo vakaitwa vatsvene. 
Hebrews10:15 Mweya mutsvene anotipupurirawo paanomboti," 
Hebrews10:16 “Ichi ndicho chitenderano chandichaita navo mumashure mamazuva iwayo ndozvinotaura Tenzi. Ndichaisa mitemo yangu mumwoyo yavo uye ndichainyora mundangariro dzavo.” 
Hebrews10:17 Anotizve handichazorangarirazve zvitadzo zvavo nezviito zvavo zvakaipa. 
Hebrews10:18 Zvino pane ruregerero rwezvizvi panenge pasisina chibayiro chezvitadzo. 
Hebrews10:19 Saizvozvo hama dzangu, zvatiine chivimbo chokuti tichapinda munzvimbo inoeresesa nokuda kweropa raJesu" 
Hebrews10:20 nenzira itsva mhenyu yaakatizarurira nokupinda kwaakaita napajira rokudzikatirisa, zvichereva muviri wake," 
Hebrews10:21 uye zvatino mupristi mukuru mutariri wemba yaMwari," 
Hebrews10:22 ngatiswederei pedyo nomwoyo uri pachokwadi norudaviro rwakasimba mwoyo yedu yakasaswa isina chinorovesa hana nemiviri yakashambidzwa nemvura yakachena. 
Hebrews10:23 Ngatichengetedzei zvakasimba chitendero chezvatinotarisira tisingazungunutswi nokuti iye akatsidza anotendeka. 
Hebrews10:24 Ngatinyatsofungisisai nzira dzokukurudzirana rudo namabasa akanaka. 
Hebrews10:25 Tisaregere kusangana setsika inoitwa navamwe asi kuti tikurudzirane, zvikuru sei sezvamunoona kuti Zuva riya ravakusvika." 
Hebrews10:26 Nokuti tikaramba tichingotadza zvedu isu tichiziva, isu takambogamuchira ruzivo rwechokwadi, hapazovezve nechibayiro chezvitadzo" 
Hebrews10:27 asi kungotarisira kutonga kunotyisa nomoto unotyisa uchaparadza mhandu. 
Hebrews10:28 Munhu anotyora Mutemo waMosesi anouraiwa zvisina tsitsi paine zvapupu zviviri kana zvitatu. 
Hebrews10:29 Ko kutozoti munhu anotsokodzera Mwanakomana waMwari achin'oresa ropa rechitenderano rakamuita mutsvene achishatirisa Mweya wenyasha, acharangwa zvakaipisisa sei?" 
Hebrews10:30 Inga tinoziva wani iye akati “Kutsiva ndokwangu, ndichatsividza.” Uyezve anoti, “Tenzi achatonga vanhu vake.”" 
Hebrews10:31 Chinhu chinotyisa kuwira mumaoko aMwari mupenyu. 
Hebrews10:32 Asi yeukai, mazuva akare kuti mushure mokunge mavhenekerwa mukatirira matambudziko akaomarara." 
Hebrews10:33 Dzimwe nguva maipinda mukutukwa nokutambudzwa pazere vanhu kana kubatanidzirwa navanenge vachiitirwa zvakadaro. 
Hebrews10:34 Pamusana pokuti imi maiva netsitsi navasungwa uye maigamuchira nomufaro kupambwa kwezvinhu zvenyu nokuti imi pachenyu munoziva kuti mune chamuinacho chiri nani chinogara nokusingaperi. 
Hebrews10:35 Nokudaro musarase chivimbo chenyu chino mubayiro mukuru. 
Hebrews10:36 Munofanira kutirira kuti muite kuda kwaMwari kuitirawo kuti mugamuchire zvakatsidzirwa zvinoti: 
Hebrews10:37 “Kwangosara kanguva kaduku duku uya anonzi achauya ari kuuya, haachanonoki;" 
Hebrews10:38 asi mururami wangu achararama nokutenda asi akadzokera shure handimufariri.” 
Hebrews10:39 Asi isu hatisi vaya vokudzokera shure vanoparadzwa asi isu tiri vanhu vane chitendero vanoponesa mweya yavo. 
Hebrews11:1 Chitendero chine chivimbo chezvinhu zvinotarisirwa uye chine chokwadi chezvinhu zvisingaoneki 
Hebrews11:2 Nokuti nechitendero vanhu vakare vakanzi naMwari vanhu kwavo. 
Hebrews11:3 Pamusana pechitendero tinonzwisisa kuti nyika yakasikwa nezwi raMwari zvokuti zvinooneka zvakaitwa zvichibva mune zvisingaoneki. 
Hebrews11:4 Pamusana pechitendero Abhero akapira kuna Mwari chibayiro chinogamuchirika kupinda Kaini chakaita kuti anzi munhu akarurama Mwari achipupurira izvozvo nokugamuchira zvipo zvake. Akafa zvake asi nechitendero chake achiri kungotaura. 
Hebrews11:5 Pamusana pechitendero Enoki akatorwa achiendeswa kudenga nokuti Mwari akanga amutora nokuti asati atorwa akanga apupurirwa kuti akafadza Mwari. 
Hebrews11:6 Pasina chitendero hazvikwanisiki kumufadza nokuti munhu wose anouya anofanira kudavira kuti Mwari ariko uye kuti Mwari anopa mubayiro kune anomutsvaka. 
Hebrews11:7 Pamusana pechitendero, Nowa paakayambirwa naMwari nezvezvinhu zvakanga zvisati zvaoneka, akatirimuka akavaka ngarava kuti aponese mhuri yake. Naizvozvi akapa nyika mhosva. Akava mugari wenhaka yoururami inouya pamusana pechitendero." 
Hebrews11:8 Pamusana pechitendero Abhurahamu akateerera paakadaidzwa kuti aende kunzvimbo yaainzi anozogamuchira senhaka. Pamusana pechitendero akabuda achienda kwaakanga asingazivi 
Hebrews11:9 akagara munyika yechipikirwa somunhu anogara munyika isiri yake achigara mumatendhe naIsaki naJakobho, vagari venhaka pamwechete naye vechipikirwa chimwechetecho." 
Hebrews11:10 Chikonzero ndechokuti aitarisira guta rine ugaro hwakasimba rakavakwa naMwari rakarongwa noumhizha hwake. 
Hebrews11:11 Pamusana pechitendero Sara pachake akagamuchira simba rokubata pamuviri kunyange akanga apfuura pazera rokubereka nokuti akati iye akanga avatsidzira akatendeka. 
Hebrews11:12 Nokudaro kubva pamunhu mumwechete uye akanga aita somunhu akafa akabereka vana vakawanda senyenyedzi dzedenga uye vasingaverengeki sejecha rapamahombekombe pegungwa. 
Hebrews11:13 Ava vose vakafa vachitenda vasati vagamuchira zvavakanga vatsidzirwa asi vakanga vazviona vakazvikwaziza vachiri kure. Vakanga vazviona kuti vaenzi navatorwa panyika. 
Hebrews11:14 Vanhu vanotaura vachidaro vanoratidza pachena kuti vari kutsvaka nyika yavo. 
Hebrews11:15 Dai vakanga vachifunga nenyika yekwavakabva vangadai vakakwanisa kuwana mukana wokudzokerako. 
Hebrews11:16 Asi sezvazviri vari kutosuwira nyika iri nani zvichireva nyika yokudenga. Ndokusaka Mwari asinganyari kunzi Mwari wavo nokuti akavagadzirira guta. 
Hebrews11:17 Pamusana pechitendero Abhurahamu paakaedzwa akapira Isaki; nezvo munhu akanga atsidzirwa akanga oda kupira mwanakomana wake mumwechete oga 
Hebrews11:18 iye akanga ambonzi zvizvarwa zvako zvichatumidzwa zita nokuna Isaki. 
Hebrews11:19 Akafunga kuti Mwari anokwanisa kumutsa vanhu kunyange kurufu. Naizvozvo pakutaura, tingati akamugamuchirazve." 
Hebrews11:20 Nechitendero Isaki akakumbirira Jakobho naEsau zvikomborero mune ramangwana. 
Hebrews11:21 Pamusana pechitendero, Jakobho paakanga ava kufa akakomborera vana vaJosefi vose vari vaviri akakotamira pamusoro petsvimbo yake achinamata." 
Hebrews11:22 Pamusana pechitendero Josefi, pakuguma koupenyu hwake akataura nezvekubuda kwavaIsiraeri akavaraira nezvamapfupa ake." 
Hebrews11:23 Pamusana pechitendero Mosesi paakaberekwa akavanzwa navabereki vake kwemwedzi mitatu nokuti vakaona kuti aitarisika zvakanaka. Havana kutya chirevo chamambo. 
Hebrews11:24 Pamusana pechitendero Mosesi paakanga akura akaramba kunzi mwanakomana womukunda waFarao. 
Hebrews11:25 Akatosarudza kuitirwa zvakaipa pamwechete navanhu vaMwari panze pokunakidzwa namafaro echitadzo. 
Hebrews11:26 Akafunga kuti kuzvidzirwa Kristu upfumi hukuru kupinda upfumi hweIjipiti nokuti mwoyo wake wakanga uri kumubayiro. 
Hebrews11:27 Pamusana pechitendero akasiya Ijipiti asingatyi hasha dzamambo achiita somunhu ari kuona iye Asingaoneki. 
Hebrews11:28 Pamusana porudaviro akachengeta Pasika akasasa ropa kuitira kuti muparadzi wamatangwe arege kumbovabata — bata. 
Hebrews11:29 Pamusana porudaviro vanhu vakayambuka Gungwa Dzvuku sokunge vari pasi pakaoma asi vaIjipiti pavakaedza kuita zvimwechetezvo vakanyura. 
Hebrews11:30 Pamusana pechitendero rusvingo rweJeriko rwakaputsikira pasi mushure mokuritenderera mazuva manomwe. 
Hebrews11:31 Pamusana pechitendero Rahabhu haana kuparara pamwepo navakanga vasingateereri nokuti akanga agamuchira zvakanaka vasori vaya. 
Hebrews11:32 Ko ndotaura zvimwe zvipiko? Nguva haimbondibvumira kuti nditaure nezvaGidheoni naBharaki naSamusoni naJefuta nezvaDhavhidhi naSamueri uye nezvavaporofita 
Hebrews11:33 vakakurira umambo noumambo pamusana pechitendero vakamanikidzira kuti pave noruenzaniso; vakagamuchira zvakanga zvatsidzwa. Vazarira 
Hebrews11:34 miromo yeshumba vakadzima moto unoririma vapunyuka hondo yebakatwa vakawana simba muutera. Vakava nechivindi muhondo. Vakadzvamutsa hondo dzevechirudzi. 
Hebrews11:35 Vakadzi vakagamuchira vakafa vavo vamuka muvakafa. Vamwe vavo vakaoneswa nhamo vachitoramba rusununguko kuti vazomuka vava noupenyu huri nani. 
Hebrews11:36 Vamwe vavo vakatambura kunyombwa nokurohwa vakasungwa nengetani nokuiswa mujeri. 
Hebrews11:37 Vakatakwa namatombo vakachekwa napakati vakauraiwa namapakatwa. Vakafamba vakapfeka matehwe ehwai neembudzi vasina chokubata. Vakaoneswa nhamo vachiitirwa zvakaipa. 
Hebrews11:38 Nyika yakanga isingakodzeri kuva navo nezvo vakadzungaira mugwenga nomumakomo muzviro nomapako enyika. 
Hebrews11:39 Ivava vose kunyange zvavo vakanzi vanhu kwavo pamusana perutendo rwavo havana zvavo kugamuchira zvakatsidzirwa 
Hebrews11:40 nokuda kokuti Mwari akanga afanoona zviri nani kwatiri kuti havakwanisi kururamiswa vasinesu. 
Hebrews12:1 Naizvozvo zvatakakomberedzwa negore rezvapupu zvakawanda kudai, ngatichikandai pasi mitoro yose nezvitadzo zvinoramba zvakati nesu namata, timhanye nhangemutange yatakatarirwa" 
Hebrews12:2 takatarisa kuna Jesu muvambi akaita kuti chitendero chedu chive chakakwana. Iye, pamusana pemufaro waakanga anzi achawana, akatirira muchinjikwa achiona kunyadziswa sechinhu pasina, iye zvino agere kurudyi rwechigaro choumambo chaMwari." 
Hebrews12:3 Fungai nezvake, iye akatirira ruvengo rwakadai rwaakaitirwa navatadzi kuti imi murege kuneta kana kurasa mwoyo." 
Hebrews12:4 Mukurwisana kwenyu nechitadzo hamusati marwisa kusvika pakurasikirwa neropa. 
Hebrews12:5 Ko munokanganwa here kukurudzirwa kuya; mukukurudzirwa mamunonzi vana? Mwanangu kana Mwari achikudzora rega kuzviona sechinhu chisina maturo kana kurasa mwoyo kana warangwa naye. 
Hebrews12:6 Chikonzero chacho ndechokuti Tenzi anodzora uyo waanoda uye anoranga mwana wese waanotora somwana. 
Hebrews12:7 Tirirai zvinokutambudzai nokuti kana muchirangwa, Mwari anenge achikubatai savana. Nokuti ndibaba vapi vasingarangi mwana wavo." 
Hebrews12:8 Kana musingarangwi sokurangwa kunoitwa vamwe vose, muri voufambi hamusi vana chaivo." 
Hebrews12:9 Chimwewo ndechokuti tina vanababa vapasi pano vaitiranga asi isu taingovaremekedza. Ko isu hatingatozviisa zvakatonyanya here pasi paBaba vezvemweya kuti tirarame. 
Hebrews12:10 Nokuti vakatiranga kwechinguvana samaonero avo asi vanotiranga kuti tigoverane utsvene hwavo. 
Hebrews12:11 Panguva iyoyo kurangwa kwose kunorwadza panze pokufadza asi pashure kunoberekera vadzidziswa nako muchero worugare wokururama. 
Hebrews12:12 Naizvozvo chisimudzai maoko enyu akarengwendeka, mugwinyise mabvi enyu asina simba." 
Hebrews12:13 Ruramisai nzira dzenyu kuti vakaremara varege kusvodogoka asi kuti varapwe. 
Hebrews12:14 Vavarirai kuva norugare navanhu vose uye kuva noutsvene hwokuti kana munhu asinahwo haakwanisi kuona Tenzi. 
Hebrews12:15 Chenjerai kuti pasava nomunhu anotadza kuwana nyasha dzaMwari kuti parege kuva nomudzi unovava ungakure ukakonzera nhamo uchikonzera vazhinji kun'oreswa; 
Hebrews12:16 kuti pasave naani zvake anoita zvounzenza kana asina hanya nokunamata Mwari sezvakaita Esau akatengesa utangwe hwake nokuda kwechokudya, chokudya kamwechete." 
Hebrews12:17 Sezvamunoziva kuti mushure, paakanga oda kuwana nhaka yamakomborero, akarambwa nokuti akashaya nguva yokusandura mwoyo nyangwe akaitsvaka nemisodzi padama." 
Hebrews12:18 Hamuna kuswedera pane chisingabatwe, kana kumoto unon'anduma kana kurima dema rakati kwirindindi kana kudutu remhepo," 
Hebrews12:19 nokurira kwebhosvo namaungira amazwi akaita kuti vaizvinzwa vakumbire kuti pasataurwezve kwavari 
Hebrews12:20 nokuti vakanga vasingakwanisi kuchengeta zvakanga zvarayirwa zvaiti, “Kunyange mhuka ikangogunzva gomo inofanira kutemwa namabwe.”" 
Hebrews12:21 Zvakaonekwa zvaityisa zvokuti Mosesi akazoti, “Ndinodedera nokutya.”" 
Hebrews12:22 Asi imi makaswedera kugomo reZioni nokuguta raMwari mupenyu, kuJerusaremu rokudenga, nokuvatumwa vasingaverengeki vari pagungano rokufara" 
Hebrews12:23 uye kuungano yamatangwe akanyorwa kudenga nokumutongi ari Mwari wavose nokumweya yakanaka yakaruramiswa 
Hebrews12:24 uye nokuna Jesu mukumbanidzi pachitendero chitsva nokuropa rakasaswa rinoreva zvinhu zviri nane kupinda raAbheri. 
Hebrews12:25 Onai kuti musarambe kuteerera iye ari kutaura. Kana avo vakanyeverwa nomunhu wapasi pano vasina kupunyuka pavakaramba kuteerera iye aivayambira ko kutozoti isu tichapunyuka sei kana tikaramba kunyeverwa kunobva kudenga. 
Hebrews12:26 Izwi rake rakazungunutsa pasi. Asi iye akatsidza kuti haachazozungunutsa zvake nyika chete asi nedengawo. 
Hebrews12:27 Izwi iri rokuti, “Zvakare” raratidza kubviswa kwezvinozungunutswa kuti zvisingazungunutswi zvirambe zviripo." 
Hebrews12:28 Saka ngatitendei kugamuchira kwatakaita umambo husingazunguniki. Nokudaro ngatipirei kuna Mwari kunamata kunogamuchirika kuno rukudzo nokutya 
Hebrews12:29 nokuti Mwari wedu moto unoparadza. 
Hebrews13:1 Rambai muchingodana sehama nehama. 
Hebrews13:2 Musarege kugamuchira vaenzi zvakanaka nokuti nokuita izvozvo vamwe vakachengeta vatumwa vasingavazivi kuti vatumwa. 
Hebrews13:3 Rangarirai vasungwa vari mujeri muite sokunge munavo mujeri uye navanenge vasiri kubatwa zvakanaka nokuti nemiwo muchiri mumuviri. 
Hebrews13:4 Kuwanana ngakuremekedzwe pakati pavanhu vose uye bonde ravawanani ngarirege kusvibiswa nokuti Mwari achatonga pfambi navanoita upombwe. 
Hebrews13:5 Usakarire mari. Gutsikana nezvaunazvo nokuti Mwari akati, “Handimbokushaisa chokubata kana kukusiya.”" 
Hebrews13:6 Naizvozvo tinogona kutaura nemwoyo wose tichiti, “Mwari ndiye muyamuri wangu. Handimbotyi munhu angandiitei?”" 
Hebrews13:7 Yeukai vatungamiri venyu vakakutaurirai shoko raMwari murangarire zvakaburwa muupenyu hwavo, mutevedzere chitendero chavo. Jesu Kristu ndiye mumwecheteyo nezuro nanhasi uno uye nokusingaperi." 
Hebrews13:8 Musarasiswe nezvidzidziso zvakasiyana — siyana uye zvisingazivikanwi. 
Hebrews13:9 Chinhu chakanaka kusimbiswa mwoyo nenyasha kwete nemitemo yezvokudya isina kumbobatsira vanoichengeta. 
Hebrews13:10 Isu tine atari yedu. Saka avo vanoshanda mutendhe inoera havana mvumo yokudya zvapaatari iyoyo. 
Hebrews13:11 Mitumbi yemhuka dzine ropa raiunzwa nomupristi mukuru muNzvimbo Inoera yaipiswa kunze kwomusasa wamatendhe sechibayiro chokupfupira zvitadzo. 
Hebrews13:12 Saizvozvo Jesu akatambudzikawo kunze kweguta kuti aruramise vanhu neropa rake. 
Hebrews13:13 Naizvozvo ngatiendei kwaari kunze kwomusasa tindotakurawo kuzvidzwa kwake 
Hebrews13:14 nokuti pasi pano hatina guta rinogara nokusingaperi asi tinotsvaga guta richauya. 
Hebrews13:15 Ngatirambei tichingopira nokwaari chibayiro chokurumbidza Mwari. Ndiwo muchero womuromo unopupura nezvezita rake. 
Hebrews13:16 Usakanganwe kuita zvinhu zvakanaka uye kugoverana navamwe zvaunazvo nokuti zvibayiro zvakadaro zvinofadza Mwari. 
Hebrews13:17 Teererai vatungamiriri venyu muchizviisa pasi pavo nokuti vari kufudza mweya yenyu savanhu vachazozvidavirira kana vobvunzwa. Regai vaite izvi vachifara, kwete vakasuwa nokuti hazvina zvazvinokubatsirai." 
Hebrews13:18 Tinamatireiwo nokuti tine chokwadi chokuti hana dzedu dzakachena. Tine mwoyo unoda kuita zvinhu zvose nemazvo. 
Hebrews13:19 Ndinokukumbirisai nemwoyo wose kuti muite izvi kuti ndidzorerwe kwamuri nokuchimbidza. 
Hebrews13:20 Iye Mwari worugare akamutsa Tenzi wedu Jesu kuvakafa akava mufudzi mukuru wehwai pamusana peropa rechitenderano chinogara nokusingaperi. 
Hebrews13:21 Ngaakurongedzerei nezvose zvakanaka kuti mukwanise kuita kuda kwake achiita zvaanoda mamuri nokuna Jesu Kristu. Iye Kristu ngaarumbidzwe narini narini. Ameni. 
Hebrews13:22 Ndinokukumbirisai hama dzangu kuti mungotirirawo zvenyu mashoko angu okukurudzira nokuti ndanyora kwamuri muchidimu dimu chete. 
Hebrews13:23 Ndingade kuti muzive kuti hama yedu Timoti yakasunungurwa. Ndiye wandichakuonai ndiinaye kana akurumidza kuuya. 
Hebrews13:24 Ndikwazisirei vatungamiri venyu vose navanamati vose. Vanhu vokuItari vanokukwazisai. 
Hebrews13:25 Chikomborero chenyasha ngachive nemi mose. Ameni. 
James1:1 Ndini Jemusi muranda waMwari uye waTenzi Jesu Kristu. Ndinokunyorerai imi marudzi gumi namaviri akapararira ndichiti kwaziwai. 
James1:2 Hama dzangu, onai sechinhu chinofadza pose pamunowirwa nemiedzo yakasiyana — siyana" 
James1:3 nokuti imi munoziva kuti kuedzwa kwechitendero chenyu kunobereka kutirira. 
James1:4 Kutirira ngakuve kwakaperera kuti muve vanhu vakakwana vanezenge vasina chavasina. 
James1:5 Kana pane asina ungwaru ngaakumbire kuna Mwari, mupanegombe kuvanhu vose, anopa asingakonoreri; huchapiwa kwaari." 
James1:6 Asi ngaakumbire nechitendero asingakahadziki, nokuti munhu anokahadzika akafanana namasaisai egungwa anopeperetswa achiitwa suku nasai nemhepo." 
James1:7 Munhu akadaro ngaarege kufunga kuti achawana chinhu chinobva kunaTenzi," 
James1:8 nokuti munhu ane pfungwa mbiri, asina pake muna zvose zvaanoita." 
James1:9 Kana hama mutendi, munhuwo zvake, akasimudzirwa pamusoro ngaafare" 
James1:10 ndizvozvowo nomupfumi kana akaninipiswa nokuti achapfuurawo seruva romusango. 
James1:11 Sezvinongoita zuva kubuda nokupisa kwaro richiunisa uswa, neruva rahwo richikuhumuka norunako rwaro rwuchiparara ndozvichaita mupfumi kuparara mukati mebasa rake." 
James1:12 Akakombererwa zvake munhu anotirira chiedzo nokuti kana achinge akunda chiedzo anowana ngundu youpenyu yakatsidzirwa naMwari kuna vanomuda. 
James1:13 Ngaparege kuva nomunhu anoti kana aedzwa oti, “Mwari akandipinza muchiedzo” nokuti Mwari haagoni kuedzwa nouipi. Iyewo pachake haapinze munhu muchiedzo." 
James1:14 Asi munhu wose anoedzwa kana achitorwa mwoyo nokufurirwa noruchiva rwake. 
James1:15 Kana ruchiva rwabata runobereka chitadzo. Kana chitadzo chadzika midzi chinounza rufu. 
James1:16 Musanyengedzwe, hama dzangu dzadiwa." 
James1:17 Chinhu chose chine munhu chakanaka nechipo chose chakaruramisisa chinobva kudenga kuna Baba vezviedza vasina mupindu kana mumvuri zvawo wokusanduka. 
James1:18 Nokuda kwake akatibereka neshoko rechokwadi kuti tive semichero yokutanga yezvisikwa zvake. 
James1:19 Zivai izvi hama dzangu dzadiwa zvokuti munhu wose ngaakurumidze zvake kunzwa asi ave anononoka kutaura uye ave anonoka kushatirwa 
James1:20 nokuti kushatirwa kwomunhu hakubatsiri kuti mugariro wohumwari wakarurama uitwe. 
James1:21 Naizvozvo bvisai zvetsvina zvose nezvakawandawanda zvakaipa mugamuchire makazvidukupisa shoko rakadyarwa mamuri rinokwanisa kuponesa mweya yenyu. 
James1:22 Naizvozvo ivai vaiti vezvinorehwa neshoko kwete vanzwi chete muchizvinyengedza 
James1:23 nokuti kana munhu achingova munzwi bedzi weshoko, asi asingaiti zvarinoreva akaita somunhu anotarira huso hwake hwaakaberekwa nahwo muchiringiriro;" 
James1:24 nokuti anozviongorora zvake oenda asi obva akanganwa zvaari. 
James1:25 Asi uyo anotarisa mumutemo uzere worusununguko oramba achingoshingirira asiri munhu anongonzwa chete achizokanganwa asi muiti webasa; achakomborerwa mune zvaanoita. 
James1:26 Kana munhu achizviona somunamati asingadzori rurimi rwake asi iye mumwoyo make achizvinyengedza, unamati hwomunhu iyeyo hauna maturo." 
James1:27 Unamati hwakanyatsoti tsvikiti husina kusvibiswa pamberi paMwari naBaba, ndohuhu: kushanyira nherera nechirikadzi munhamo dzadzo uye kuzvibata usingasvibiswi nenyika." 
James2:1 Hama dzangu musave norusarura, imi muine chitendero muna Tenzi wedu Jesu Kristu, Tenzi wembiri." 
James2:2 Ngatitii munhu ane mhete dzendarama, akapfeka hanzu dzakanakisisa anouya pasangano penyu. Munhu murombo akapfeka marengenya ouyawo" 
James2:3 imi motarira uya akapfeka hanzu dzakanakisisa moti kwaari, “Uya ugare napapa,” asi muchiti kumurombo, “Mira uko” kana kuti, “Uya ugare pasi pedyo nechitambarariko chetsoka dzangu.”" 
James2:4 Hamuna here kuita rusaruro pakati penyu muchiva vatongi vane pfungwa dzakaipa. 
James2:5 Teererai, hama dzangu dzadiwa. Mwari haana kusarudza here varombo panyika kuti vave vapfumi muchitendero uye vagari venhaka youmambo hwaakatsidzira vanomuda." 
James2:6 Asi imi munoshora murombo. Vapfumi havasirivo here vanokudzvanyirirai uye havasirivo vanokukwekweretserai kumatare here? 
James2:7 Havasirivo vanoshonha here zita rinoremekedzwa ramunodaidzwa naro? 
James2:8 Kana mukazadzisa mutemo woumambo maererano namagwaro matsvene unoti, “Ida mumwe wako sokuda kwaunozviita.” Munoita zvakanaka." 
James2:9 Asi mukaratidza rusaruro, munopara chitadzo uye munopihwa mhosva nomutemo savatyori vomutemo" 
James2:10 nokuti munhu anochengeta mutemo wose asi okundika pamwe pawo ane mhosva yokutyora wose. 
James2:11 Chikonzero ndechokuti iye akati, “Usaite upombwe,” ndiye akatiwo, “Usauraye.” Kana ukarega zvako kuita upombwe asi iwe uchiuraya watodarika mutemo." 
James2:12 Kutaura nokuita kwenyu zviitei savanhu vachatongwa nomutemo worusununguko 
James2:13 nokuti kutonga hakuna tsitsi kune munhu asinawo kuratidza tsitsi. Asi kune vakaratidza tsitsi kutonga hakuna zvakunovaita. 
James2:14 Zvinobatsireiko nhai hama dzangu, kana munhu achiti ane chitendero asi iye asina mabasa? Chitendero chingamuponese here?" 
James2:15 Ngatitii hamarume kana hamakadzi haina chokupfeka isina chokudya chamazuva ose," 
James2:16 mumwe wenyu oti kwavari, “Endai zvenyu norugare mudziirirwe uye mugute” asingavape zvinodikanwa nomuviri zvinobatsirei." 
James2:17 Nokudaro chitendero pachacho chisina mabasa chakafa. 
James2:18 Mumwe angati “Iwe une chitendero ini ndina mabasa. Ndiratidze chitendero chako iwe usina mabasa ini namabasa angu ndikuratidze chitendero changu.” 
James2:19 Unotenda kuti Mwari mumwechete unoita zvakanaka. Kunyange mweya yakaipa inotendawo kudaro ichitodedera. 
James2:20 Nhaiwe benzi romunhu, unoda here kuziva kuti chitendero chisina mabasa hachina muchero?" 
James2:21 Abhurahamu baba vedu havana kururamiswa namabasa here pavakapira mwanakomana wavo Isaki paatari. 
James2:22 Unozviona kuti chitendero chavo namabasa avo zvaishanda pamwechete, chitendero chakazadzikiswa namabasa." 
James2:23 Magwaro Matsvene akabva azadziswa anoti, “Abhurahamu vakatenda muna Mwari zvikaita kuti anzi akarurama akanzi shamwari yaMwari.”" 
James2:24 Munozvionawo kuti munhu anoruramiswa namabasa kwete nechitendero choga. 
James2:25 Handizvo zvimwechetezvo here nepfambi Rahabhu yakaruramiswa namabasa payakagamuchira vasori ikavaendesa neimwe nzira? 
James2:26 Nokuti ndizvo zvakaita muviri, kana usina mweya wakafa; saizvozvowo chitendero chisina mabasa chakafa." 
James3:1 Hama dzangu, vazhinji venyu ngavarege kuva vadzidzisi nokuti munoziva kuti isu tinodzidzisa tichatongwa zvakatonyanya kuomarara." 
James3:2 Nokuti tose tinokanganisa kakawanda. Kana munhu asinganganisi mune zvaanotaura, munhu iyeyo, munhu akakwana anogona kuita kuti muviri wake wose umuteerere." 
James3:3 Kana tichiisa matomhu mukanwa memabhiza kuti atiteerere, tinotungamirira miviri yawo yose." 
James3:4 Tarisai muonewo zvikepe. Kunyange zvakakura zvazvo kudaro uye zvichisundwa nemhepo dzine simba, zvinotungamirirwa nekadiki kokudzoresa chikepe kunenge kwadiwa nomutyairi." 
James3:5 Saizvozvo rurimi kanhengo kadikidiki kanozvikudza nezvinhu zvikuru. Sango guru rinoririmiswa wani nakamoto kadikidiki. 
James3:6 Rurimi moto. Rurumi inyikawo pachayo nokwayo youipi mukati menhengo dzomuviri wedu. Runosvibisa munhu wose sezvaari ruchingandutsa nomoto nzira youpenyu hwose hwomunhu. Irwowo runobatidzwa nomoto warwo negehena. 
James3:7 Mhuka dzamarudzi ose neshiri nezvose zvinozvova napasi nezvinhu zvomugungwa zvinogona kupingudzwa uye zvinopingudzwa navanhu. 
James3:8 Asi hapana munhu anogona kupingudza rurimi, rwakaipa uye haruna parwo uyezve rune chepfu." 
James3:9 Tinorumbidza narwo Tenzi naBaba uye narwo tinorengerera vanhu rushambwa, vanhu vakasikwa vakafanana naMwari." 
James3:10 Mukanwa mumwechetemo munobuda chikomborero nokurengerera rushambwa. Hama dzangu hazvifaniri kudaro. 
James3:11 Chisipiti chingaburitse, napaburi rimwechete, mvura yakanaka nemvura inovava here?" 
James3:12 Muonde ungabereke maorivhi here, nhai hama dzangu, kana kuti mugirepisi ungabereke maonde here? Saizvozvowo mvura inovava haigoni kuburitsa mvura yakanaka." 
James3:13 Ndiani akangwara uye anonzwisisa pakati penyu? Ngaaratidze izvozvo nomugariro wake wakanaka unoitwa muungwaru hwokuzvidukupisa. 
James3:14 Zvino kana muine shanje yakaipisisa noundingoveni hwakaipa mumwoyo yenyu musazvirumbidze muchirevera chokwadi nhema. 
James3:15 Ungwaru hwakadai haubvi kudenga asi ndehwapasi pano hwomuberekerwo womunhu uye wohusatani. 
James3:16 Nokuti pane shanje noundingoveni hwakaipa, panoita nyonganyonga nokuita kose kwakashata." 
James3:17 Asi ungwaru hunobva kudenga, pokutanga hutsvene kwouya kuti ndehwerugare nemwoyo murefu, hunonzwisisa, uye huzere tsitsi, hune michero yakanaka husina chinokahadzisa kana chinonyengedza." 
James3:18 Muchero woururami unodyarwa murugare navawadzanisi. 
James4:1 Chii chinokonzera hondo uye chii chinokonzera kurwisana pakati penyu? Hadzisi havi dzenyu here dzinokonzera kurwisana mukati memitezo yenyu? 
James4:2 Munoda chinhu motadza kuchiwana nezvo munobva monouraya. Munochiva chinhu asi motadza kuchiwana nezvo morwa zvokuita hondo. Hamuwani chinhu nokuti hamukumbiri. 
James4:3 Kana mukakumbira hamuwane nokuti hamukumbiri nenzira kwayo muchitoda zvenyu kuzvipedzera muhavi dzenyu. 
James4:4 Vanhu vasingatendeki! Hamuzivi here kuti kushamwaridzana nenyika kunoita kuti muvengane naMwari? Naizvozvo munhu anoda kuva shamwari yenyika anozviita mhandu yaMwari. 
James4:5 Kana kuti munofunga here kuti Magwaro Matsvene anotaura pasina paanoti, “Mwari anorwadziwa mumwoyo neshanje pamusoro paMweya waakati agare matiri" 
James4:6 asi anopa nyasha dzakatowanda.” Ndosaka Magwaro Matsvene achiti, “Mwari anopikisana navanozvikudza achipa nyasha dzake kune vanozvininipisa.”" 
James4:7 Naizvozvo zviisei pasi paMwari. Rwisai Satani iye achakutizai. 
James4:8 Swederai kuna Mwari iyewo achaswederawo kwamuri. Shambai maoko enyu imi vatadzi muchenese mwoyo yenyu, imi vanhu vemwoyo miviri." 
James4:9 Suwai muungudze mucheme. Kuseka kwenyu ngakusanduke kuve kuungudza; kufara kwenyu kuve kusuruvara. 
James4:10 Zvirerekei pamberi paTenzi iye achakukwidziridzai. 
James4:11 Hama dzangu musataure zvakaipa nezvavamwe. Munhu anotaura zvakaipa nezvehama kana kutsoropodza hama yake anotaurawo zvakaipa nezvomutemo uye anotsoropodza mutemo. Zvino kana uchitsoropodza mutemo hausi kuchengeta mutemo watova mutsoropodzi. 
James4:12 Kunongova nomupi mumwechete womutemo nomutongi anogona kuponesa nokuparadza. Ko iwe uri aniwo zvako iwe, unotsoropodza mumwe wako?" 
James4:13 Ko zvino imi munoti, “Nhasi kana mangwana tichaenda kuguta rakati tondopedza gore tiriko tigoshava tiwane upfumi”" 
James4:14 asi zvamangwana musingambozviziva? Upenyu hwenyu chii? Nokuti muri mhute inongooneka kwechinguva yobva yanyangarika. 
James4:15 Zvamunotofanira kutaura ndezvokuti: “Kana Tenzi achida tichararama uye tichaita ichi nechocho.” 
James4:16 Asi sezvazviri munotozvitutumadza mukuzvikudza kwenyu. Kuzvitutumadza kose kwakadaro kwakashata. 
James4:17 Munhu anoziva zvinofanira kuitwa zvakarurama, asi asingazviiti, kwaari chitadzo." 
James5:1 Zvino imi vapfumi chemai muridze mhere nokuda kwenhamo dzichakuwirai. 
James5:2 Upfumi hwenyu huri kuora uye hanzu dzenyu dziri kudyiwa nezviundudzi. 
James5:3 Ndarama yenyu neSirivha zviri kuita ngura. Ngura yazvo ndiyo ichakuwanisai mhosva. Ichakudyai nyama yenyu somoto. Makazviunganidzira upfumi kuitira mazuva okupedzisira. 
James5:4 Chinzwai munzwe kuchema kuri kuita mibayiro yavashandi vaikohwa minda yenyu yamakachengeta zvokubiridzira, uye kuchema kwavakohwi kwakasvika munzeve dzaTenzi wehondo nehondo." 
James5:5 Makagara panyika mumutambaratede nomumafaro. Makazvikodza nezvapamwoyo kuitira zuva rokubaiwa. 
James5:6 Makapa mhosva mukauraya mururami asi haana kukudzivisai. 
James5:7 Itai zvenyu mwoyo murefu hama dzangu kusvikira Tenzi auya. Tarisai muone murimi anorima michero inokosha yenyika. Anoita mwoyo murefu nazvo kusvikira yawana mvura yomunhuruka neyokupedzisira. 
James5:8 Imiwo munofanira kuita mwoyo murefu; mutsunge mwoyo nokuti Tenzi ava pedyo nokuuya. 
James5:9 Musanyunyutirane, hama dzangu, kuti murege kutongwa. Hoyo mutongi wotosvika, ava pamisuo." 
James5:10 Hama dzangu, torai; vaporofita vaitaura muzita raTenzi somuenzaniso wokutambudzika uye wokuita mwoyo murefu." 
James5:11 Inga wani tinoti vakakomborerwa vakatirira. Inga makanzwa kutirira kwaJobhu mukaona chinangwa chaTenzi kuti Tenzi ane ngoni netsitsi zvakadii. 
James5:12 Asi kupfuura zvose, hama dzangu musapike nedenga kana nenyika kana nokupika kupi zvako. Regai hongu wenyu angova, hongu uye, kwete wenyu angova kwete kuti murege kupiwa mhosva." 
James5:13 Pakati penyu pane ari kutambudzika here? Ngaanamate. Pane ari kufara here? Ngaaimbe nziyo dzokurumbidza. 
James5:14 Pane anorwara here pakati penyu. Ngaadaidze vakuru vakuru vesangano vazomunamatira vachimuzora mafuta muzita raTenzi. 
James5:15 Munamato uyu wechitendero uchaponesa murwere. Tenzi achamumutsa uye kana akapara zvitadzo acharegererwa. 
James5:16 Naizvozvo reururai zvitadzo zvenyu mumwe kunomumwe muchinamatirana kuti muporeswe. Munamato womunhu akarurama une simba pakushanda kwawo. 
James5:17 Eriya akanga ari munhu akangoitawo sesu pamuzvarirwo wake. Akanamata nomwoyo wose kuti kurege kunaya. Kwamakorewo matatu nemwedzi mitanhatu hakuna kunaya panyika. 
James5:18 Akazonamatazve, denga rikanaya mvura, nyika ikabereka muchero wayo." 
James5:19 Hama dzangu pakati penyu mumwe akatsauka pachokwadi, mumwewo akamudzora, iyeyo" 
James5:20 ngaazive kuti ani nani anodzora mutadzi mukurasika kwake gwara achaponesa mweya wake kurufu uye zvitadzo zvizhinji zvichafukidzwa. 
1Peter1:1 Ndini Pita mupositori waJesu Kristu, ndinokunyorerai imi vatorwa venguva yoKutekeshera kunyika dzePondusi neGaratia neKapaudhosia neAsia nokuBhetinia" 
1Peter1:2 imi makasarudzwa mukanzi naMwari Baba mururamiswe naMweya kuitira kuti muteerere Jesu Kristu uye kuti musaswe neropa rake. Dai mangowaniswa chikomborero chenyasha dzakawanda norugare ruzere. 
1Peter1:3 Ngaarumbidzwe Mwari naBaba waTenzi wedu Jesu Kristu! Nokuda kwengoni dzake dzakawanda takaberekwa patsva kuchitarisiro chezvirokwazvo pamusana pokumuka kwakaita Jesu Kristu kuvakafa. 
1Peter1:4 Uye kuti tive nenhaka isingaperi isina kuipiswa, isingabhuruvari yamakachengeterwa kudenga," 
1Peter1:5 imi makachengetedzwa nesimba raMwari uye nokuda kwechitendero kusvikira ruponeso rwakagadzirirwa kuburitswa pachena panguva yokupedzesera. 
1Peter1:6 Munofanira kufara kwazvo munezvizvi, kunyange zvazvo iye zvino, kwekanguva kaduku, munogona kupindana nezviedzo zvakasiyana — siyana." 
1Peter1:7 Izvi kuti chitendero chenyu chechokwadi, chinokosha kupfuura ndarama inoedzwa nomoto, kunyange iri chinhu chinopera, kurumbidzwe zvikuru uye kuve nembiri norukudzo pachazooneswa Jesu Kristu." 
1Peter1:8 Kunyange musina kumuona munomuda. Kunyange musingamuoni iye zvino, munotenda maari muchifara norufaro rusingatauriki rukuru kwazvo." 
1Peter1:9 Somubayiro wechitendero chenyu, munowana ruponeso rwemweya yenyu." 
1Peter1:10 Vaporofita vakaporofita nezvenyasha dzaizova dzenyu, vakatsvagisisa vakafeya — feya nezvoruponeso irworwu." 
1Peter1:11 Vakatsvagisisa nozvomunhu iyeyo uye nezvenguva yakaratidzwa naMweya waKristu mavari pavaifanotaura nezvedambudziko raKristu nembiri yaizotevera. 
1Peter1:12 Zvakaratidzwa kwavari kuti vakanga vasingazvishandiri asi vaishandira imi muzvinhu zvamakataurirwa navaiparidza kwamuri Shoko Rakanaka nokuna Mweya Mutsvene akatumwa kubva kudenga. Vatumwa vaitosuwira kuona zvinhu izvozvo. 
1Peter1:13 Mupfungwa dzenyu, sungai dzisimbe. Zvibatei; isai chivimbo chenyu chizere panyasha dzichauya kwamuri pacharatidzwa Jesu Kristu." 
1Peter1:14 Savana vanoteerera musatevedzere mapangiro enyu amaiva nawo pamakanga musina ruzivo. 
1Peter1:15 Pamusana pokuti anokudaidzai mutsvene, imiwo ivaiwo vatsvene muzviito zvenyu zvose." 
1Peter1:16 Sezvazvakanyorwa zvichinzi, “Ivai vatsvene nokuti ini ndiri mutsvene.”" 
1Peter1:17 Mukamudana saBaba, iye anotonga munhu wose pasina rusaruro maererano nezviito zvake, ivai nokumuremekedza kukuru pakugara kwenyu panguva yenyu youtorwa." 
1Peter1:18 Imi munoziva kuti makadzikinurwa kunzira dzisina maturo dzamakawana kumadzibaba enyu, kwete nezvinhu zvinoparara sesirivha kana ndarama" 
1Peter1:19 asi neropa rinokosha raKristu serehwayana isina chinoshoreka kana kavara. 
1Peter1:20 Akasarudzwa pasi pasati pavapo, akazoratidzwa pokupedzisira kwenguva kuri kuitira imi." 
1Peter1:21 Nokuna iye, munechivimbo muna Mwari akamumutsa kuvafi akamupa mbiri kuti chitendero chenyu nechitarisiro zvive muna Mwari." 
1Peter1:22 Zvino zvamakachenesa mweya yenyu nokuteerera kwenyu chokwadi kuti muve norudo rwechokwadi kune vehama; idanai zvechokwadi nemwoyo wose. 
1Peter1:23 Makazvarwa patsva kwete nembeu dzinofa asi dzisingafi nokuShoko benyu raMwari risingafi rinogara nokusingaperi 
1Peter1:24 nokuti, “Vanhu vose uswa mbiri yavo yakaita samaruva omusango uswa hunouna,” ruva rinodonha" 
1Peter1:25 asi Shoko raTenzi rinogara nokusingaperi. Shoko iroro ndiro Shoko Rakanaka rakaparidzwa kwamuri. 
1Peter2:1 Saizvozvo chibvisai uipi hwose nokunyengedza kose nokubata vanhu kumeso neshanje nokunyomba kose. 
1Peter2:2 Savacheche vatsva vachangoberekwa suwirai mukaka chaiwo wezvemweya kuti nawo mukure kusvika kuruponeso. 
1Peter2:3 Nokuti “Makaravira mutsa waTenzi.” 
1Peter2:4 Uyai kwaari, iye Dombo Benyu rakarambwa navanhu asi pana Mwari rakasarudzwa uye rinokosha," 
1Peter2:5 imiwo uyai samatombo mapenyu muvakwe kuva Temberi yemweya, muve vapristi vatsvene kuti nokuna Jesu Kristu mupire zvibayiro zvemweya zvinogamuchirika pana Mwari nokuna Jesu Kristu." 
1Peter2:6 Nokuti zvakanyorwa muMagwaro Matsvene kuti: “Tarisai muone ndava kuisa dombo muZioni dombo rapakona rakanyatsosarudzwa uye rinokosha. Munhu anodavira maari haambonyadziswi. 
1Peter2:7 Kunemi munotenda, akakosha asi kune vasingatendi, dombo iroro rakarambwa navavaki, ndiro rava dombo rine basa guru rapakona." 
1Peter2:8 Pamwewo panoti, ‘Iri ndiro dombo richagumbura vanhu, ibwe richaita kuti vaputsike.’ ” Vanogumburwa nokuti havateereri shoko sokurongerwa kwavakaitwa." 
1Peter2:9 Asi imi muri rudzi rwakasarudzwa, vapristi vokumba huru, rudzi runoera, vanhu vaMwari kuti muparidze mabasa anoshamisa ouya akakudaidzai kuti mubve murima muchipinda muchiedza chake chinoshamisa." 
1Peter2:10 Makambenge musiri rudzi, asi iye zvino mava rudzi rwaMwari. Makambenge musina kuitirwa tsitsi asi zvino makaitirwa tsitsi." 
1Peter2:11 Vadikanwi ndinokukurudzirai savauyi navatorwa kuti musiyane nehavi dzomuviri dzinorwisana nemweya wenyu. 
1Peter2:12 Ivai nomugariro wakanaka mukati mevechirudzi kuti kana vakakurevai savanhu vanoita zvakaipa vazoona mabasa enyu akanaka vagorumbidza Mwari paanokushanyirai. 
1Peter2:13 Pamusana paTenzi, zviisei pasi pavanhu vakagadzwa ukuru pakati pavanhu, pangave pasi pamambo somukuru mukuru," 
1Peter2:14 kana kumasadunhu vaanenge atuma kundoranga vanoita zvakaipa nokurumbidza vanoita zvakanaka. 
1Peter2:15 Chikonzero chacho ndechokuti, nokuita zvakanaka munopwisa kutaura kusina maturo kwavanhu vasina zvavanoziva. Garai savanhu vanerusununguko, asi musingasevenzesi rusununguko rwenyu sechinhu chokuhwanda nacho mukuita zvakaipa," 
1Peter2:16 asi garai savaranda vaMwari. 
1Peter2:17 Remekedzai vanhu vose, idanai navose nevehama. Ityai Mwari, muremekedze mambo." 
1Peter2:18 Vashandi zviisei pasi pavatenzi venyu norukudzo rwose, kwete kune vane mwoyo wakanaka chete kana kuna vane mwoyo munyoro asi kunyange kune vakaoma mwoyo," 
1Peter2:19 nokuti chikomborero kuti munhu anotirira zvake nhamo, iye achitambudzika zvisina ruenzaniso, pari pamusana pokuti anoziva kuti kuna Mwari." 
1Peter2:20 Unowana mubayiro wei kana ukatirira iwe waroverwa kuita zvakaipa? Asi kana ukaita zvakanaka iwe ugotambudzika nokuda kwazvo iwe ukatirira zvako, chikomborero ichocho pana Mwari." 
1Peter2:21 Izvi ndizvoka zvamakadaidzirwa nokuti Kristu akakutambudzikiraiwo achikusiirai muenzaniso kuti mutevere makwara ake. 
1Peter2:22 Haana kumbopara chitadzo. Hapana unyengedzi hwakambowanikwa pamuromo pake. 
1Peter2:23 Paakanyombwa haana kudzorera nokunyombawo. Paakarwadziwa haana kuti muchazviona asi akavimba naiye anotonga zvino ruenzaniso. 
1Peter2:24 Iye akatakura zvitadzo zvedu mumuviri wake pamuti kuti isu zvokutadza tisiyanenazvo tigare upenyu hwoururami. Makarapwa namaronda ake 
1Peter2:25 nokuti makanga muchitetereka sehwai asi iye zvino makadzokera kuMufudzi noMuchengeti wemweya yenyu. 
1Peter3:1 Ndizvo zvimwechetewo nemi madzimai zviisei pasi pavarume venyu kuti vamwe vavo kunyange vasingateereri shoko, vanogona kubatwa mwoyo nomugariro wavakadzi vavo pasina chataurwa," 
1Peter3:2 kana vaona kuremekedza kwenyu noupenyu hwenyu hwakachena. 
1Peter3:3 Kuzvishongedza kwenyu ngakurege kuva kokunze zvakaita sokugadzira vhudzi nokuzvishongedza nendarama nokupfeka hanzu dzamandiriri. 
1Peter3:4 Runako rwenyu ngaruve rwohunhu hwakavandika rwomumwoyo nechishongo chisingaparari chomweya wakapfava worunyararo wakakosha kwazvo pana Mwari. 
1Peter3:5 Saizvozvo ndizvo zvaiitwa navakadzi vakare vatsvene vaiva nechitarisiro muna Mwari. Vaizvishongedza nokuzviisa pasi pavarume vavo 
1Peter3:6 sokuteerera Abhurahumu kwakaita Sara achimuti Tenzi. Zvino imi ndimi vana vake kana mukaita zvakanaka musina chamunotya. 
1Peter3:7 Ndizvozvowo nemi varume, munofanira kugara navakadzi venyu nokunzwisisa muchivaremekedza savanhu vasina simba serenyu. Varemekedzei nokuti vachagamuchira pamwechete nemi chipo choupenyu kuti minamato yenyu irege kupingidzwa." 
1Peter3:8 Pokupedzisira, mose zvenyu ivai nomwoyo mumwechete muchinzwirana urombo muchidanana sehama nehama nokuva nomwoyo munyoro nomwoyo wokuzvirereka." 
1Peter3:9 Musadzorere chakaipa nechakaipa kana kurengerera nokurengerera asi chenyu imi itotii ngavakomborerwe nokuti ndizvo zvamakadaidzirwa kuti muwane chikomborero. 
1Peter3:10 “Uyo anoda upenyu, anoda kuwana upenyu hwakanaka, ngaazvidzore rurimi rwake kuuipi nomuromo wake urege kutaura nhema." 
1Peter3:11 Ngaasiane nouipi aite zvakanaka ngaatsvake rugare arutevere," 
1Peter3:12 nokuti maziso aTenzi ari pavarurami nzeve dzake dzakarerekera kuzvichemo zvavo. Uso hwaTenzi hunonangana navanoita zvakaipa.” 
1Peter3:13 Ndiani angakukuvadzei kana muine shungu nezvakanaka? 
1Peter3:14 Asi kunyange zvazvo mukatambudzikira ururami muchakomborerwa. Musavatye uye musazvidye mwoyo. 
1Peter3:15 Asi imi mumwoyo menyu remekedzai Kristu saTenzi. Garai makagadzirira kupindura munhu anokubvunzai nezvechitarisiro chiri mamuri, asi zviitei nemwoyo munyoro norukudzo" 
1Peter3:16 muchengetedze hana dzenyu dzakachena kuti kana votaura zvakaipa nezvenyu, vanonyomba mugariro wenyu wakanaka muna Kristu, vanyadziswe" 
1Peter3:17 nokuti zviri nani kutambudzikira kuita zvakanaka kana zviri izvo zvinoda Mwari pano kuita zvakaipa," 
1Peter3:18 nokuti Kristu akafira zvitadzo chakamwe, munhu akarurama achifira vasina kururama kuti atiunze kuna Mwari. Mumuviri akauraiwa, mumweya akamutswa." 
1Peter3:19 Muupenyu hwomweya ihwohwo akaenda akandoparidza kumweya yaiva muusungwa 
1Peter3:20 vasina kunge vateerera; Mwari paakamirira nomwoyo wake murefu, pamazuva aNowa ngarava ichavakwa, makazoponeswa vanhu vashoma vanokwana vasere chete, vakaponeswa nemvura." 
1Peter3:21 Ruombeko rwakaita saizvozvo. Runokuponesai zvino, kwete nokubvisa tsvina pamuviri asi sechichemo kuna Mwari kuti hana icheneswe pamusana pokumuka kwaJesu Kristu" 
1Peter3:22 akaenda kudenga, zvino ari kurudyi rwaMwari. Vatumwa neveushe navanamasimba vari pasi pake." 
1Peter4:1 Naizvozvo, sezvo Kristu akatambudzika mumuviri make, torai pfungwa imwecheteyo sezvombo zvokurwisa nazvo nokuti munhu wose akarwadziwa mumuviri akatoregera zvokutadza." 
1Peter4:2 Izvi kuti kuti, nguva yasara yamunenge muine muviri, mugare muchitungamirirwa kwete nehavi dzomuviri asi nokuda kwaMwari." 
1Peter4:3 Chiregai nguva yakapfuura ichiva yakakwana yokuita zvinodiwa nevechirudzi zvinoti unzenza, kutevera havi dzomuviri, nokuraradza nokusazvibata kwavararadzi nokutamba kwakaipa nokunamata zvisiri Mwari kwakafumuka." 
1Peter4:4 Iye zvino vavakutoshamiswa kuti imi hamuchabatana navo muupenyu hwerurasademo mukuita zvinhu zvisina kana namaturo ose saka vachikunyombai. 
1Peter4:5 Vachandozvidavirira kwaari iye akagadzirira kutonga vapenyu navafi. 
1Peter4:6 Ndokusaka Shoko Rakanaka rakaparidzwa kunyange kuvakafa kuitira kuti kunyange vakatongwa vaine muviri savanhu, vagare mumweya saMwari." 
1Peter4:7 Kuguma kwezvinhu zvose, kwava pedyo, naizvozvo dzikamai muzvibate kuti mukwanise kunamata." 
1Peter4:8 Kupfuura zvimwe zvose rambai muchingodana nokuti rudo runofukidza zvitadzo zvakawanda. 
1Peter4:9 Gamuchiranai mudzimba dzenyu pasina kunyunyuta. 
1Peter4:10 Mumwe nomumwe wenyu zvaakagamuchira chipo, chishandisiranei savanhu vakapiwa basa rezvikomborero zvakasiyana — siyana naMwari." 
1Peter4:11 Wokuparidza ngaataure somunhu anotaura zvirevo zvaMwari. Anoitira vamwe mabasa ngaaite somunhu anopiwa simba naMwari kuitira kuti muna zvose Mwari arumbidzwe nokuna Jesu Kristu, muridzi wembiri nesimba narini narini Ameni." 
1Peter4:12 Vadikanwi musashamisike nenhamo inopfuta moto inokuwirai kuti ikuedzei; zvinoita sokunge chimwe chinhu chinoshamisa chiri kuitika kwamuri. 
1Peter4:13 Asi itofarai nokutambudzika kwenyu pamwechete naKristu kuitira kuti muzofarawo nokupembera kufara pacharatidzwa pachena mbiri yake. 
1Peter4:14 Kana mukanyombwa pamusana pezita raKristu makakomborerwa nokuti Mweya wembiri, Mweya waMwari ari pamuri." 
1Peter4:15 Ngaparege kuva nomumwe wenyu anotambudzika nokuda kokuva mhondi kana mbavha kana kuva munhu anoita zvakaipa kana nokuva nhunzvatunzva. 
1Peter4:16 Asi munhu akatambudzika somuKristu ngaarege kunyara asi ngaatorumbidza Mwari nezita iroro. 
1Peter4:17 Chikonzero chacho ndechokuti kutongwa kwatotanga kuchitangisa nemhuri yaMwari. Zvino kana kuchitanga nesu kudai, ko kune avo vasingatendi Shoko Rakanaka raMwari zvichaperera kupi?" 
1Peter4:18 Kana mururami, kuponeswa kwake kuri kokubuda napaburi retsono ko asiri munamati nomutadzi achamira papi?" 
1Peter4:19 Saizvozvowo avo vanotambudzika sokuda kwaMwari ngavazviturire mumaoko aMwari musiki akatendeka. 
1Peter5:1 Naizvozvo ndinokurudzira vakuru — vakuru pakati penyu somumwe wavakuru — vakuruwo uye somupupuri wamatambudziko aKristu uyewo somumwe waavo vachawana mugove mumbiri icharatidzwa. 
1Peter5:2 Fudzai danga raMwari rakaiswa mumaoko menyu, kwete sokunge munomanikidzwa asi nomwoyo unoda, kwete pamusana pokuda kuzvipfumisa zvinonyadzisa asi muchitozvifarira." 
1Peter5:3 Musaite zvechisimba navari pasi penyu asi mukutova muenzaniso kudanga iroro. 
1Peter5:4 Kana mufudzi mukuru wooneswa, muchawana ndaza isingabhuruvari yembiri." 
1Peter5:5 Naizvozvowo nemi vadiki vacho ivai pasi pavakuru — vakuru. Pfekai mose kuzvidukupisa mumwe achizvininipisa kune mumwe nokuti Mwari anorwisana navanozvikudza achitsigira nenyasha vanozvininipisa. 
1Peter5:6 Nokudaro zvininipisei pasi poruoko rwaMwari rune simba kuti nenguva yakafanira azokupembedzai zvikuru. 
1Peter5:7 Turirai zvinokudyai mwoyo zvose kwaari nokuti anehanya nemi. 
1Peter5:8 Garai makagadzikana makarindira, mhandu yenyu Satani anobvongodza kose kose seshumba inodzvova ichitsvaka waingadye." 
1Peter5:9 Murwisei, makasimba muchitendero chenyu, muchiziva kuti kutambudzika kumwecheteko kunofanira kutirirwa nevehama pasi pose." 
1Peter5:10 Mushure mokunge mambotambudzika kwechinguva, Mwari wenyasha dzose, iye akakudaidzai kumbiri yake isingaperi muna Kristu, iye pachake achakudzorerai kuva zvamunofanira kunge muri, mudzike midzi, achikusimbisai." 
1Peter5:11 Iye ngaave noumambo narini narini. Ameni. 
1Peter5:12 Ndakunyorerai muchidimbu ndichibatsirwa naSirivhanusi, hama yakatendeka sokuona kwangu, ndichikukuridzirai ndichitaura pachena kuti idzi inyasha dzaMwari chaidzo; rambai makasimba madziri." 
1Peter5:13 Sangano revekuBhabhironi rakasarudzwawo semi rinokukwazisai uyewo Mako mwana wangu anokukwazisai. 
1Peter5:14 Kwazisanai nokutsvodana kworudo rwechikristu. Rugare ngaruve nemi mose muna Kristu. 
2Peter1:1 Ndini Simoni Pita muranda nomupositori waJesu Kristu, ndinokunyorerai imi makagamuchira chitendero chakakosha chakangoita sechedu nesimba roururami hwaMwari wedu nomuponesi wedu Jesu Kristu." 
2Peter1:2 Dai mangowana chikomborero chenyasha dzakawanda norugare ruzere mukuziva kwamunoita Mwari uye Jesu Tenzi wedu. 
2Peter1:3 Simba rake rouMwari rakatiwanisa zvinhu zvose zvinopa upenyu uye unamati hwechokwadi pamusana pokuziva iye akatidaidza kumbiri yake nokurunako rwake. 
2Peter1:4 Nenzira iyoyi akatipa zvitsidzo zvakakosha uye zvakakura kwazvo kuti nazvo mupunyuke kuora kuri panyika pamusana pehavi muchiva nomugove muumwari. 
2Peter1:5 Nokuda kwechikonzero ichochi edzai nokwamunogona kose kuwedzera chitendero nezviito zvakarurama, pazviito zvakanaka wedzerai ruzivo," 
2Peter1:6 paruzivo wedzerai kuzvibata, pakuzvibata wedzerai kutsungirira, pakushingirira kwenyu muwedzere unamati" 
2Peter1:7 paunamati muwedzere kudana sehama nehama, pakudana sehama nehama muwedzerewo rudo." 
2Peter1:8 Chikonzero ndechokuti kana zvinhu izvi muinazvo zvakawanda hamuzoshaya chimuko kana kushaya muchero mukuziva Tenzi wedu Jesu Kristu," 
2Peter1:9 asi ani naani zvake anenge asina zvinhu izvi, ibofu, munhu asingaoni zvinhu nemazvo uye atokanganwa kuti akacheneswa pazvitadzo zvake zvakare." 
2Peter1:10 Naizvozvo hama shingairai zvikuru kuti musimbaradze kudaidzwa kwenyu nokusarudzwa kwenyu nokuti mukadai hamuzoputsiki.

Jude1:1 Ndini Judha muranda waJesu Kristu munun'una waJakobho ndinokunyorerai imi makadaidzwa, vapamwoyo paMwari Baba imi makachengeterwa Jesu Kristu." 
Jude1:2 Dai mangoramba muchingoitirwa tsitsi muchidiwa zvikuru kwazvo. 
Jude1:3 Vadikanwi pandaiva neshungu dzokukunyorerai nezvoruponeso rwedu tose, ndakaona chiri chinhu chinofanira kuitwa chokuti ndikunyorerei ndichikukumbirai kuti murwirewo chitendero chakapiwa chakamwe kuvatsvene." 
Jude1:4 Pana vamwe vanhu vakapinda pakati penyu zvomuchivande. Vanhu ivavo vakatemerwa kare kare kurangwa kwavo ikoko. Vanhu vasiri vatendi vaMwari vanosandura nyasha dzaMwari wedu kuti vawane maitiro ounzenza vachiramba Changamire naTenzi wedu mumwechete, Jesu Kristu." 
Jude1:5 Zvino ndinoda kukuyeuchidzai, kunyange makambonyatsozviziva kwazvo kuti iye akambonunura rumwe rudzi kubva kunyika yeIjipiti akazoparadza vakanga vasingatendi." 
Jude1:6 Uye vatumwa vaya vakasiya chinzvimbo chavo choukuru ukuru vakasiya nzvimbo yavo chaiyo vakasungwa nengetani dzinogara nokusingaperi munzvimbo yerima kusvikira pakutongwa kwezuva guru. 
Jude1:7 Sezvakangoita Sodhomu neGomora namaguta akaatenderedza, akaita zvimwechetezvo kuita upombwe vakaitawo zvisina maturo vakave muenzaniso nokurangwa kwavakaitwa nokurohwa nemoto usingaperi." 
Jude1:8 Nenzira imwecheteyo, vanhu ava, mune zvavanorotswa, vanon'oresa miviri yavo vachiramba kuteerera vakuru nokushonha vaya vembiri." 
Jude1:9 Kunyange Mikaeri mutumwa mukuru paaikakavadzana naDhiabhori, pavaiitirana nharo kuti ndiani achatora chitunha chaMosesi, haana kutaura namazwi okushora achimupa mhosva asi akati, “Tenzi ndiye achakupa mhosva.”" 
Jude1:10 Asi vanhu ava vanoshora zvose zvavasinganzwisisi uye vanoparadzwa nezvinhu zvavanonzwa mavari sezvinongoita mhuka dzisingafungi. 
Jude1:11 Hameno zvavo! Vakatevera gwara raKaini vakazvipinza mukukanganisa kwaBhiriamu pamusana pokuda kuzvipfumisa vachizoparadzwa mukupanduka kwaKora. 
Jude1:12 Vanhu ivava munzwa mundove pamabiko enyu orudo vanosasana pamwechete zvisina nyadzi. Chavo kuzvifunga ivo pachavo. Makore zvawo asina mvura anongopeperetswa nemhepo, miti yokupera kwamatsutso isina muchero yakafa kaviri, yakadzipurwa." 
Jude1:13 Mafungu egungwa asina pawo vanopupuma furu renyadzi dzavo, inyenyedzi dzinodzungaira dzamisirwa nokusingaperi, nyika yerima iri pasi penyika." 
Jude1:14 Ndivava vakaporofitwa naInoki muchizvarwa chechinomwe kubva kuna Adhamu achiti, “Hoyo Tenzi ari kuuya achiperekedzwa nezviuru zvavatsvene vake"

Jude1:16 Vanhu ivava vanhu vokunyunyuta vasingagutsikani, vanoita zvinoda havi dzavo, vanamupoperi vokuzvikudza, vanorumbidza vanhu zvokuvabata kumeso vachida zvavanoda kuwana.”" 
Jude1:17 Asi munofanira kuyeuka hama dzangu zvakafanotaurwa navapositori vaTenzi wedu Jesu Kristu.

Revelation2:28 Uye ndichamupa nyenyedzi yorungwanani.
