Revelation3:1 “Nyorera mutumwa wesangano rokuSadhisi “Mazwi ouyo ane mweya minomwe yaMwari uye ane nyenyedzi nomwe uti: ‘Ndinoziva mabasa ako, une kambiri kokunzi uri mupenyu asi iwe wakafa." 
Revelation3:2 Muka usimbaradze zvasara uye zvava pedyo nokufa. Nokuti mabasa ako handina kuaona akakwana pamberi paMwari wangu. 
Revelation3:3 Naizvozvo yeuka zvawakagamuchira nezvawakanzwa. Chengeta izvozvo utendeuke. Kana usina kumuka ndichauya sembavha uye haumboziva kuti ndichauya nenguva ipi. 
Revelation3:4 Zvakadaro zvazvo uchine mazita mashoma muSadhisi avanhu vasina kusvibisa hanzu dzavo, vachafamba pamwechete neni vakapfeka zvichena nokuti vakakodzera." 
Revelation3:5 Uyo anokunda achapfeka saizvozvo hanzu chena uye zita rake mubhuku roupenyu handizoripfudzi. Pamberi pababa vangu napamberi pavatumwa vake, ndichapupurira zita rake kuti ndowedu." 
Revelation3:6 Ane nzeve ngaanzwe zviri kurehwa naMweya kumasangano.’ 
Revelation3:7 “Nyorera mutumwa wesangano rokuFiradhefia. Herino shoko reanoera wechokwadi ane kii yaDhavhidhi anoti akazarura hapana anogona kuzarira wokuti akazarira hakuna anogona kuzarura. 
Revelation3:8 Ndinoziva mabasa ako, tarira uone ndaisa pamberi pako mukova wakazaruka usina anogona kuzarira. Ndinoziva kuti unongova nesimba shomanana asi wakachengeta shoko rangu ukasaramba zita rangu." 
Revelation3:9 Vesangano raSatani, vanozviti vaJudha asi ivo vasiri, vachireva nhema; ndichaita kuti vauye vachizokugwadamira patsoka dzako vadzidze kuti ndakakuda," 
Revelation3:10 nokuti wakachengeta shoko rangu rokutirira, ndichakuchengeta panguva yokuedzwa iri kuuya pasi pose kuzoedza vose vagere panyika." 
Revelation3:11 Ndiri kuuya nokukurumidza. Batisisai zvamuinazvo kuti parege kuva nomunhu anokubvutirai chiremba chenyu. 
Revelation3:12 Anokunda ndichamuita musimboti muTemberi yaMwari wangu. Haachazobvamo. Ndichanyora paari zita raMwari wangu uye zita reguta raMwari wangu, Jerusaremu itsva inobva kuna Mwari wangu kudenga, uyewo zita rangu idzva." 
Revelation3:13 Ane nzeve ngaanzwe zviri kurehwa naMweya kumasangano. 
Revelation3:14 “Nyorera mutumwa wesangano rokuRaodhekia uti zvanzi naAmeni, “ ‘Iye chapupu chinotendeka chechokwadi, iye mavambo ezvisikwa zvaMwari.’" 
Revelation3:15 “Ndinoziva mabasa ako, hautonhori kana kupisa, dai waitotonhora zvako kana kupisa." 
Revelation3:16 Asi nokuda kokuti uno rudziirakure usingatonhori kana kupisa ndichakusvipa mukanwa mangu. 
Revelation3:17 Nokutika unoti ndiri mupfumi, ndakapfuma, handina chandinoda iwe usingazivi kuti uri rombe rinotonzwisa tsitsi, uri murombo, uri bofu uye hauna kupfeka." 
Revelation3:18 Saizvozvo ndinokubaira zanhi rokuti utenge kwandiri ndarama yakanatswa nomoto kuti uve mupfumi nehanzu chena dzokuti upfeke kuti urege kuonererwa ubunun'unu hwako namafuta okuzora maziso ako kuti uone. 
Revelation3:19 Vandinoda ndinovatsiura nokuvaranga. Naizvozvo ita shungu utendeuke. 
Revelation3:20 Tarisa uone ndimire pamusuo ndichigogodza, kana munhu akanzwa izwi rangu akazarura musuo ndichapinda maari ndigodya naye iye achidya neni." 
Revelation3:21 Anokunda ndichamuti agare neni pachigaro changu choumambo sokukundawo kwandakaita ini pachangu ndikagarawo naBaba vangu pachigaro chavo choumambo. 
Revelation3:22 Ane nzeve ngaanzwe zvinorehwa naMweya kumasangano.” 
Revelation4:1 Mushure maizvozvi ndakatarisa onei mudenga mune musuo wakazaruka. Izwi rokutanga riya randakanga ndanzwa richitaura kwandiri sebhosvo rakati, “Kwira kuno ndikuratidze zvichaitika mushure mezvizvi.”" 
Revelation4:2 Pakarepo ndakanga ndazadzwa naMweya onei chigaro choumambo chakati dzi kumira mudenga nomumwe akanga akagara pachiri. 
Revelation4:3 Iye akanga akagara ipapo akanga achipenya sedombo rinokosha rejasipa uye seresadhiso, uye chigaro chacho chakanga, chakatenderedzwa nomuraraungu waiita sedombo reemaradhi." 
Revelation4:4 Chigaro choumambo chiya chakanga chakatenderedzwa nezvigaro zvoumambo makumi maviri ane zvina. Pazvigaro izvozvo pakanga pagere, vakuru vakuru makumi maviri ana vana uye vakapfeka hanzu chena nendaza dzendarama pamisoro yavo." 
Revelation4:5 Pachigaro choumambo chiya paipenya mheni nokudhiriridza namabhanan'ana. Pamberi pechigaro choumambo paibvira mwenje minomwe yomoto. Iyoyo ndiyo mweya minomwe yaMwari. 
Revelation4:6 Pamberi pechigaro ichocho choumambo pakanga paine rinenge gungwa regirazi rakaita sezvimedu zvedombo romusarasara. Kumativi kwose kutenderedza chigaro choumambo ichocho, kwakanga kuine zvisikwa zvina zvizere maziso mberi neshure." 
Revelation4:7 Chisikwa chipenyu chokutanga chakanga chakaita seshumba; chisikwa chipenyu chechipiri chakanga chakaita semombe; chisikwa chipenyu chechitatu chakanga chiine uso hwemunhu chisikwa chipenyu chechina chakanga chakaita segondo rinobhururuka. 
Revelation4:8 Zvisikwa zvipenyu zvina zviya, chimwe nechimwe chazvo chaiva namapapiro matanhatu zvizere maziso kumativi ose mukati nokunze. Siku nesikati hazvaimbomira kuimba zvichiti: “Munoera, munoera, munoera, imi Tenzi Mwari Samasimbaose, makanga muripo, muripo, uyewo muchazovapo.”" 
Revelation4:9 Zvisikwa zviya zvipenyu pazvaipa mbiri norukudzo nokutenda kuna akanga agare pachigaro choumambo, iye anoramba aripo narini narini," 
Revelation4:10 vakuru vakuru makumi maviri ana vana vaya vaiti pasi wareware pamberi paiye akanga agere pachigaro choumambo vachimunamata iye anoramba aripo narini narini. Vaiwarika zviremba zvavo pamberi pechigaro choumambo vachiimba vachiti," 
Revelation4:11 “Munokodzera imi Tenzi naMwari wedu kupiwa mbiri norukudzo nesimba nokuti ndimi makasika zvinhu zvose. Kuda kwenyu kuti zvivepo uye kuti zvisikwe.” 
Revelation5:1 Zvino ndakaona murudyi mouya akanga agere pachigaro choumambo, bhuku rokumononora rakanyorwa seri neseri rakanamwa nenamo nomwe." 
Revelation5:2 Ndakaonawo mutumwa akasimba achidaidzira nezwi guru achiti, “Ndiani anokodzera kuzarura bhuku rokumononora nokukwatanura namo dzaro.”" 
Revelation5:3 Hapana kana mumwechete, kudenga kana pasi pano kana pasi penyika aigona kuzarura bhuku rokumononora iroro kana kutarisa mukati maro." 
Revelation5:4 Ipapo ini ndakachema zvikuru nokuti aikodzera kuzarura bhuku rokumononora iroro kana kutarisa mariri; haana kuwanikwa. 
Revelation5:5 Mumwe wavakuru vakuru vaya akati kwandiri, usacheme zvako, inga shumba yedzinza rokwaJudha, Dzinde raDhavhidhi, akakunda, kuti akwanise kuzarura bhuku rokumononora iroro nenamo dzaro nomwe dziya." 
Revelation5:6 Ipapo ndakaona Hwayana ichitarisika seyakambouraiwa; yakanga yakamira nechapakati pechigaro choumambo yakatenderedzwa nezvisikwa zvipenyu zvina zviya uye navakuru vakuru vaya. Yakanga iine nyanga nomwe namaziso manomwe. Ndiyo mweya minomwe yaMwari yakatumwa pasi pose. 
Revelation5:7 Yakaenda ikatora bhuku rokumononora murudyi rwaiye akanga agere pachigaro choumambo. 
Revelation5:8 Payakatora bhuku rokumononora iroro, zvisikwa zvipenyu zvina zviya navakuru vakuru makumi maviri navana vaya vakati pasi wareware pamberi peHwayana. Mumwe nomumwe aine dimbwa mumaoko nekadhishi kazere rusenzi ndiyo minamato yavatsvene." 
Revelation5:9 Vakaimba rumbo rutsva vachiti, “Munokodzera kutora bhuku rokumunonora nokukwatanura namo dzaro nokuti makauraiwa mukanunurira Mwari vanhu kubva kumarudzi ose nendimi dzose navanhu vose nendudzi dzose." 
Revelation5:10 Makavaita umambo navapristi vaMwari wedu uye vachatonga pasi.” 
Revelation5:11 Ndakazotarisa ndikanzwa kumativi ose kupoteredza chigaro choumambo nezvisikwa zvipenyu zviya navakuru vakuru vaya izwi ravatumwa vazhinji vakawanda zvokuita zviuru nezviuru namazana akazanirana kwazvo; 
Revelation5:12 vachiti nezwi guru, “Hwayana yakauraiwa yakakodzera kugamuchira simba roupfumi noungwaru noukuru norukudzo nembiri nechikomborero.”" 
Revelation5:13 Ndakanzwa zvisikwa zvose zviri kudenga napasi napasi penyika nomugungwa nazvose zvirimo zvichiti, “Ngaarumbidzwe, narini narini apiwe rukudzo nembiri noukuru iye agere pachigaro choumambo uyewo kuHwayana.”" 
Revelation5:14 Zvisikwa zvipenyu zvina zviya zvakati, “Ameni,” vakuru vakuru vaya vakabva vati wareware pasi vachinamata." 
Revelation6:1 Ndipo pandakaona Hwayana ichikwatanura namo yokutanga, imwe yenamo nomwe dziya. Ndakanzwa chimwe chezvisikwa zvipenyu zvina zviya chichitaura nezwi rinenge mabhanan'ana richiti, “Uya.”" 
Revelation6:2 Ndakatarisa, onei bhiza jena, mutasvi waro aine uta. Akagadzwa chiremba choumambo. Akabuda ari mukundi ari kundokunda." 
Revelation6:3 Paakakwatanura namo yechipiri ndakanzwa chisikwa chipenyu chechipiri chichiti, “Uya.”" 
Revelation6:4 Pakabva pabuda rimwe bhiza rakati piriviri kutsvuka. Mutasvi waro akabvumirwa kubvisa rugare panyika. Akapiwa bakatwa guru kuti vanhu vaurayane. 
Revelation6:5 Paakakwatanura namo yechitatu, ndakanzwa chisikwa chipenyu chechitatu chichiti, “Uya.” Ndakatarisa onei bhiza dema mutasvi waro aine chikero muchanza." 
Revelation6:6 Ndakazonzwa chimwe chainge izwi pakati pezvisikwa zvipenyu zviya chichiti, “Rita yekoroni ndiwo muripo uchapiwa munhu pazuva marita matatu ebhari ndiwo muripo uchapiwa munhu pazuva asi mafuta newaini usazvibate — bate.”" 
Revelation6:7 Paakakwatanura namo yechina ndakanzwa izwi rechisikwa chipenyu chechina richiti, “Uya.”" 
Revelation6:8 Ndakatarisa, onei bhiza rakabhuruvara, zita romutasvi waro rainzi Rufu Nzvimboyorufu ichimutevera mushure. Chikamu chenyika chechina chakaiswa mumaoko avo kuti vauraye vanhu nehondo yebakatwa nenzara nedenda nezvikara zvapasi." 
Revelation6:9 Paakakwatanura namo yechishanu, ndakaona pasi peatari mweya yavanhu vakaurairwa shoko raMwari nouchapupu hwavakaita." 
Revelation6:10 Vakadaidzira nezwi guru vachiti, “samasimba changamire mutsvene wechokwadi, kuchazova riniko musati matonga nokutsividza ropa redu kuna vavo vanogara panyika?”" 
Revelation6:11 Mumwe nomumwe wavo akapiwa gemenzi jena, vachiudzwa kuti vambozorora kashoma kusvikira uwandu hwavashandi pamwe navo nehama dzavo vaifanira kuuraiwa saivo hwakwana." 
Revelation6:12 Hwayana iya payakakwatanura namo yechitanhatu ndakaona kundengendeka kukuru. Zuva rakasvipa sesaga, mwedzi wejenaguru wakatsvuka ropa." 
Revelation6:13 Nyenyedzi dzedenga dzakakuhumukira pasi pano sokudonhedza kunoita muonde muchero wawo wapachando kana wavhuvhutwa nedutu remhepo. 
Revelation6:14 Denga rakanyangarika sebhuku rokumunonora ramoneredzwa. Makomo ose nezvitsuwa zvakabviswa panzvimbo dzazvo. 
Revelation6:15 Ipapo madzimambo apanyika navakuru vakuru vavanhu navakuru vakuru vehondo navapfumi navakasimba navavo vose vanoti nhapwa navasununguki vakavanda mumapako napasi pamabwe mumakomo. 
Revelation6:16 Vaidaidzira kumakomo namabwe vachiti “Tiwirei mutivandise tirege kuonekwa nouyo agere pachigaro choumambo mutihwandise kuhasha dzeHwayana. 
Revelation6:17 Nokuti zuva guru rehasha dzavo rauya, pakadaro ndiani angapamire.”" 
Revelation7:1 Mushure mezvo ndakazoona vatumwa vana vakamira pamativi mana enyika vakadzivirira mhepo ina dzapasi kuti pasave nemhepo inovhuvhuta panyika kana pagungwa kana kuvhuvhuta muti zvawo. 
Revelation7:2 Ndipo pandakazoona mumwe mutumwa achikwira mudenga kumabvazuva aine chidhindo chaMwari mupenyu. Akadaidzira nezwi guru kuvatumwa vana vaya vakanga vapiwa simba rokuondonga nyika negungwa 
Revelation7:3 achiti, “Musaondonge nyika kana gungwa kana miti, kusvikira taisa mucherechedzo pahuma dzavaranda vaMwari wedu.”" 
Revelation7:4 Ndakanzwa uwandu hwavakaiswa mucherechedzo vaiva zviuru zana namakumi mana ane zvina ndivo vakaiswa mucherechedzo mudzinza roga roga ravana vaIsiraeri. 
Revelation7:5 Mudzinza rokwaJudha zviuru gumi nezviviri mudzinza rokwaRubheni zviuru gumi nezviviri mudzinza rokwaGadhi zviuru gumi nezviviri. 
Revelation7:6 Mudzinza rokwaAsheri zviuru gumi nezviviri mudzinza rokwaNafutari zviuru gumi nezviviri mudzinza rokwaManase zviuru gumi nezviviri. 
Revelation7:7 Mudzinza rokwaSimioni zviuru gumi nezviviri mudzinza rokwaRevhi zviuru gumi nezviviri mudzinza rokwaIsakari zviuru gumi nezviviri. 
Revelation7:8 Mudzinza rokwaZebhuroni zviuru gumi nezviviri mudzinza rokwaJosefi zviuru gumi nezviviri mudzinza rokwaBhenjamini zviuru gumi nezviviri. 
Revelation7:9 Mushure mezvi ndakatarisa ndikaona manyoremanyore avanhu vasingaverengeki, vamarudzi ose, namadzinza ose navanhu vose nendimi dzose vamire pamberi pechigaro choumambo napamberi peHwayana vakapfeka magemenzi machena vaine mirara mumaoko vachidaidzira nezwi guru vachiti," 
Revelation7:10 “Ruponeso runobva kuna Mwari wedu agere pachigaro choumambo uye runobva kuHwayana.” 
Revelation7:11 Vatumwa vose vakanga vamire vakatenderedza chigaro choumambo vakatenderedzawo vakuru vakuru vaya vakatenderedzawo zvisikwa zvipenyu zvina zviya. Vatumwa vakati kotakota nouso pamberi pechigaro choumambo vachinamata Mwari 
Revelation7:12 vachiti, “Ameni. Kurumbidzwa nembiri noungwaru nokutendwa norukudzo noukuru nesimba ngazvive kuna Mwari wedu narini narini Ameni.”" 
Revelation7:13 Mumwe wavakuru vakuru vaya akanditi, “Ko ava vakapfeka magemenzi machena ndivanani? Uye vabva kupi?”" 
Revelation7:14 Ndakati kwaari, “Changamire inga ndimi munoziva wani.” Iye akati kwandiri, “Ava ndivo vakabuda mupfumvu huru vakasuka magemenzi avo vakaachenesa muropa reHwayana." 
Revelation7:15 Ndokusaka vari pamberi pechigaro choumambo chaMwari vachimushandira siku nesikati muTemberi yake. Iye anogara pachigaro choumambo achavafukidza netendhe rake. 
Revelation7:16 Havazonzwi nzara kana kunzwazve nyota zuva harichazovapisizve kana kunzwa kupisa kunobvuraudza 
Revelation7:17 nokuti Hwayana iya iri pakati pechigaro choumambo ndiyo ichava mufudzi wavo. Iyo ichavatungamirira kuzvisipiti zvemvura mhenyu. Mwari achapukuta misodzi yose pamaziso avo.” 
Revelation8:1 Hwayana payakakwatanura namo yechinomwe kwakanyararwa kudenga kwehafu yeawa. 
Revelation8:2 Ndipo pandakaona vatumwa vanomwe vaya vanomira pamberi paMwari. Vakapiwa mabhosvo manomwe. 
Revelation8:3 Mumwe mutumwa akauya akasvikomira kuatari. Akanga aine bisiro rendarama akapiwa rusenzi rwakawanda kuti arusanganise neminamato yavatsvene vose paatari yendarama iya, pamberi pechigaro choumambo." 
Revelation8:4 Utsi hwerusenzi hwakakwira pamwechete neminamato yavatsvene ichibva mumaoko omutumwa aiva pamberi paMwari. 
Revelation8:5 Mutumwa akazotora bisiro riya akarizadza nomoto waibva paatari akarikanda panyika pakava nokudhiriridza kwemheni namabhanan'ana nokupenya kwemheni nokundengendeka kwapasi. 
Revelation8:6 Zvino vatumwa vanomwe vaya vakanga vaina mabhosvo manomwe, vakagadzirira kuaridza." 
Revelation8:7 Mutumwa wokutanga akaridza bhosvo rake kukabva kwaita chimvuramahwe nemoto zvakasanganiswa neropa zvainaya panyika. Chikamu chechitatu chenyika chakatsva, chikamu chechitatu chemiti chakatsva uye uswa unyoro hwakatsva." 
Revelation8:8 Mutumwa wechipiri akaridza bhosvo rake ndokubva chimwe chinenge gomo guru raibvira moto, chakandwa mugungwa." 
Revelation8:9 Chikamu chechitatu chegungwa chakasanduka kuva ropa. Chikamu chechitatu chezvisikwa zvomugungwa chakafa. Chikamu chechitatu chengarava chakaparadzwa. 
Revelation8:10 Mutumwa wechitatu akaridzawo bhosvo rake ndokubva nyenyedzi huru yawa kubva kudenga ichipenya sezhenje ikawira pachikamu chetatu chenzizi uye pazvisipiti zvemvura. 
Revelation8:11 Zita renyenyedzi iyoyo rainzi Gavakava. Chikamu chechitatu chemvura chakava gavakava kuvava. Vanhu vazhinji vakafa nemvura iyoyo nokuti yakaitwa gavakava kuvava. 
Revelation8:12 Mutumwa wechina akaridzawo bhosvo rake chikamu chechitatu chezuva chakarohwa nechikamu chechitatu chemwedzi nechikamu chechitatu chenyenyedzi zvokuti chikamu chechitatu chechiedza chazvo chakaitwa rima. Chikamu chechitatu chamasikati chakarega kuvheneka, ndizvozvo nechikamu chechitatu chousiku." 
Revelation8:13 Ndopandakatarisa, onei gondo richichema nezwi guru paraibhururuka mudenga richiti, “Heyo nhamo, heyo nhamo heyo nhamo iyo kune vagere panyika pacharidzwa mamwe mabhosvo anofanira kuridzwa navamwe vatumwa vatatu.”" 
Revelation9:1 Mutumwa wechishanu akaridza bhosvo rake. Ndakabva ndaona nyenyedzi yakawira pasi kubva kudenga yakanga yapiwa kiyi yeziburi regomba risina parinoperera. 
Revelation9:2 Akazarura ziburi riya regomba risina parinoperera. Muziburi iroro makatogoka utsi hunenge hwevira guru romoto. Zuva nomunga'mu zvakabva zvati ndindo kusvipa noutsi hwomuziburi riya. 
Revelation9:3 Muhutsi ihwohwo makabuda mhashu panyika dzakapiwa simba rinenge ramarize apanyika. 
Revelation9:4 Dzakaudzwa kuti dzisaparadze uswa hwenyika kana chii zvacho chinyoro kana muti zvawo, asi kuti dziparadze vanhu vasina mucherechedzo waMwari pahuma dzavo." 
Revelation9:5 Dzakabvumirwa kuvaonesa nhamo kwemwedzi mishanu dzisingavaurayi. Kurwadza kwadzo kwaiita sokurwadza kwerize kana raruma munhu. 
Revelation9:6 Pamazuva iwayo vanhu vachatsvaka rufu vasingaruwani vachasuwira kufa, asi rufu ruchatiza." 
Revelation9:7 Mhashu idzodzo dzakanga dzakaita samabhiza aronganirana hondo. Pamisoro yadzo pakanga paine zvairatidzika sendaza dzendarama. Zviso zvadzo ungati vanhu. 
Revelation9:8 Mvere dzadzo ungati ivhudzi ravakadzi, mazino adzo, ungati mazino eshumba chaiwo." 
Revelation9:9 Makwakwambi adzo waitoti zvidemautare zvesimbi zvokuzvidzivirira nazvo muhondo. Irwo ruzha rwamapapiro adzo waiti ingoro dzehondo dzina mabhiza ava kumhanyira muhondo 
Revelation9:10 dziine miswe inenge yamarize inoruma uye simba radzo rokukuvadza vanhu kwemwedzi mishanu riri mumiswe yadzo iyoyo. 
Revelation9:11 Mambo wadzo aiva mutumwa uya wegomba risina parinoperera. Zita rake muchiHebheru rinonzi Abhadhoni muchiGiriki richinzi Aporioni. 
Revelation9:12 Nhamo yokutanga ndipo painoperera apa. Dzimwe nhamo mbiri dziri kuuya. 
Revelation9:13 Mutumwa wechitanhatu akaridza bhosvo rake ndikanzwa izwi robva kune zvinenge nyanga zvina zviya zvapaatari yendarama iri pamberi paMwari 
Revelation9:14 richiti kumutumwa wechitanhatu uya ainge ane bhosvo, “Sunungura vatumwa vana vakasungwa parwizi rukuru rwaYufuratesi.”" 
Revelation9:15 Vatumwa vaya vana vakasunungurwa vakanga vakamisirwa nguva nezuva nemwedzi negore rokuuraya naro chikamu chechitatu chavanhu. 
Revelation9:16 Varwi vamabhiza vaiva gumi ramazana rakapetwa kaviri rigopetwazve kanosvika gumi ramazana; ndakanzwa uwandu hwavo. 
Revelation9:17 Uku ndiko kuona kwandakaita mabhiza iwayo muchiratidzo changu. Vatasvi ivavo vakanga vakapfeka mademautare okuzvidzivirira nawo muhondo oruvara rwomoto nesafaya nesarufa. Misoro yamabhiza iwayo yainge misoro yeshumba, mumiromo yawo muchitogoka moto noutsi nesarufa." 
Revelation9:18 Chikamu chechitatu chavanhu chakauraiwa nepfumvu idzodzi nhatu dzomoto noutsi nesarufa zvichibva mumiromo yawo 
Revelation9:19 nokuti simba ramabhiza iwayo raiva mumiromo yawo nomumiswe yawo. Miswe yawo yakanga yakaita senyoka ine misoro inokuvadza. 
Revelation9:20 Vamwe vanhu vose vakasara vaya, vasina kuuraiwa namatenda iwayo havana kuregera rubatabata rwavo rwuya rwokunamata mweya yakaipa nokunamata zvifananidzo zvendarama nezvesirivha nezvendarira nezvamatombo nezvemiti zvisingakwanisi kuona kana kunzwa kana kufamba." 
Revelation9:21 Havana kuregera humhondi hwavo nouroyi hwavo noupombwe hwavo kana umbavha hwavo. 
Revelation10:1 Ndakazoona mumwe mutumwa ane simba achibva kudenga akaputirwa negore aine muraraungu pamusoro pake. Uso hwake hwakanga hwakaita sezuva; makumbo ake akanga akaita semisimboti yemoto. 
Revelation10:2 Akanga aina kabhuku kokumononora kakazaruka muruoko rwake. Akaisa rutsoka rworudyi rwake pagungwa, rutsoka rwake rworuboshe akaruisa panyika." 
Revelation10:3 Akadaidzira nezwi guru seshumba iri kudzvova. Paakadaidzira mheni nomwe dzakabva dzadhiriridza. 
Revelation10:4 Pakadhiriridza mheni nomwe dziya ndakanga ndava kuda kunyora, asi ndakanzwa izwi richibva kudenga richiti, “Ingochengetedza zvataurwa nemheni nomwe usazvinyoreba.”" 
Revelation10:5 Mutumwa uya wandakaona akamira pagungwa napanyika akasimudzira ruoko rwake kudenga. 
Revelation10:6 Akapika naiye anogara narini narini; akasika denga nezvirimo nenyika nezvirimo negungwa nezviri mariri, zvechinono hapachisina." 
Revelation10:7 Asi mutumwa wechinomwe, panguva yaacharidza bhosvo rake, Mwari achabva azadzisa zvirongwa zvake zvaakataurira varanda vake vaporofita." 
Revelation10:8 Ipapo izwi randakambenge ndanzwa mudenga rakataurazve kwandiri richiti, “Enda undotora bhuku rokumononora rakazaruka riri muruoko rwomutumwa akamira akatsika pagungwa napanyika.”" 
Revelation10:9 Zvino ndakaenda kumutumwa ndikamuti andipe kabhuku kaya kokumononora. Iye akanditi, “Tora ukadye. Kachavava munhumbu mako, asi iko kachitapira souchi mukanwa mako.”" 
Revelation10:10 Ndakatora kabhuku kaya mumaoko omutumwa uya ndikakadya. Kaitapira souchi mukanwa mangu, asi pandakanga ndakadya, mudumbu mangu makaita chirungurira." 
Revelation10:11 Ndakaudzwa kuti, “Unofanira kuporofita zvakare nezvendudzi dzavanhu vazhinji nezvamarudzi nezvendimi nezvamadzimambo.”" 
Revelation11:1 Ndakapiwa karutanda kokueresa kanenge mudonzvo ndikanzi, “Simuka uyere Temberi yaMwari neatari uverengewo vanonamatamo." 
Revelation11:2 Asi usayere chivanze chiri kunze kweTemberi, siya chakadaro, nokuti chakapiwa kune vechirudzi vachatsikatsika guta rinoera guta rinoera kwemwedzi makumi mana nemiviri." 
Revelation11:3 Ndichapawo simba kuzvapupu zvangu zviviri kuti zviporofite kwamazuva churu namazana maviri ana makumi matanhatu vakapfeka masaga.” 
Revelation11:4 Ivava ndivo miorivhi miviri nezvigadzikiro zviviri zvemwenje zviri pamberi patenzi wapasi. 
Revelation11:5 Kana munhu akavakuvadza, moto uchabva mukanwa mavo uchiroromesa vavengi vavo. Kana munhu akavakuvadza anouraiwa." 
Revelation11:6 Vane simba rokupfiga denga kuti mvura irege kunaya pamazuva ukuporofita kwavo. Vane simba pamusoro pemvura rokuipindura kuva ropa uye rokurova nyika namatenda pavanenge vangodira zvavo. 
Revelation11:7 Pavanopedza uchapupu hwavo chikara chiya chinobuda mugomba risina parinoperera chichavarwisa chigovakurira chigovauraya. 
Revelation11:8 Zvitunha zvavo zvichati rakata mumugwagwa weguta guru, rinonzi namadimikira, Sodhomu kana kuti Ijipiti makarovererwa Tenzi wavo pamuchinjikwa." 
Revelation11:9 Kwamazuva matatu ane chidimbu vanhu vanobva muvanhu vose nomumadzinza nomundimi nomumarudzi vachatarisa zvitunha zvavo vachiramba kuti zvivigwe muguva. 
Revelation11:10 Vanogara panyika vachafara vachipembera, vachitopana zvipo nokuti vaporofita vaviri ava vachange vaonesa vagari vapanyika ndondo." 
Revelation11:11 Asi mushure memazuva aya matatu ane chidimbu mweya woupenyu unobva kuna Mwari uchavapinda vachizomira namakumbo avo kutya kukuru kuchizowira vanovaona. 
Revelation11:12 Vakazonzwa izwi guru richibva kudenga richivati, “Kwirai kuno.” Vakakwira kudenga vari mugore vavengi vavo vakatarisa." 
Revelation11:13 Panguva iyo pakava nokundengendeka kukuru chikamu chavanhu chimwechete pazvikamu gumi zvakaenzana chakati rakata pasi. Vanhu vaisvika zviuru zvinomwe vakauraiwa mukundengendeka kwapasi vamwe vose vakabatwa nokutya vakapa mbiri kuna Mwari wedenga. 
Revelation11:14 Dambudziko rechipiri ndipo parinoperera pano. Dambudziko rechitatu riri kuuya iye zvino. 
Revelation11:15 Mutumwa wechinomwe akaridza bhosvo rake kukava namazwi okudaidzira mudenga aiti, “Umambo hwapasi hwava humambo hwaTenzi naMesia wake. Achatonga narini narini.”" 
Revelation11:16 Vakuru vakuru makumi maviri ana vana vaya vagere pazvigaro zvavo zvoumambo vakati kota kota nouso pamberi paMwari vachinamata Mwari 
Revelation11:17 vachiti, “Tinokutendai Tenzi Mwari Samasimbaose. Imi muripo, makanga muripo kuti makatora ukuru hwenyu mukatangisa kutonga." 
Revelation11:18 Vechirudzi vakaita bope asi makavavirukira nehasha uye nguva yokutongwa kwavakafa neyokupa mubayiro kuvaranda venyu, vaporofita navatsvene navanotya zita renyu vakuru navadiki yasvika, nguva yokuparadza mharadzi dzapasi.”" 
Revelation11:19 Temberi yaMwari yokudenga yakazarurwa Bhokisi rake reChitenderano rakaonekwa muTemberi make pakavaima mheni, pakadhirima, mheni ikadhiriridza pakaita kundengendeka kwapasi nechivhuramahwe chakawanda." 
Revelation12:1 Zvino mudenga makaonekwa chiratidzo chinokatyamadza chomudzimai akatenderedzwa nezuva mwedzi uri pasi petsoka dzake, aine ndaza mumusoro yenyenyedzi gumi nembiri." 
Revelation12:2 Akanga akazvitakura achichema nokurwadziwa ava kupona achitambudzika pakusununguka. 
Revelation12:3 Kwakaonekwa chimwe chiratidzo mudenga chezigaranyanya guru dzvuku rine misoro minomwe negumi renyanga nengundu nomwe pamisoro yaro. 
Revelation12:4 Muswe waro wakakumba chikamu chechitatu chenyenyedzi dzedenga ukadzikanda pasi. Zigaranyanya riya rakandomira pamberi pomudzimai akanga ava kuda kusununguka mwana kuti ridye mwana wake paanongomupona. 
Revelation12:5 Akasununguka mwana mukomana aizotonga marudzi ose avanhu netsvimbo yesimbi. Mwana akabva anzi hwetu kuendwa naye kuna Mwari nokuchigaro chake choumambo. 
Revelation12:6 Mudzimaiwo ndokuti ware kutizira kurenje kune nzvimbo yaakanga agadzirirwa naMwari maaizoriritirwa kwamazuva ane chiuru namazana maviri namakumi matanhatu. 
Revelation12:7 Mudenga makamuka hondo Mikaeri navatumwa vake vachirwisa zigaranyanya riya. Zigaranyanya navatumwa varo rakarwisawo. 
Revelation12:8 Zigaranyanya navatumwa varo rakakurirwa; pakanga pasisina nzvimbo yavo kudenga. 
Revelation12:9 Zigaranyanya guru riya rakakandidzirwa pasi, ndiyo nyoka iya yapasichigare inonzi Dhiabhori kana kuti Satani munyengedzi wapasi pose. Akakandidzirwa pasi; vatumwa vake vakakandidzirwawo pasi pamwechete naye." 
Revelation12:10 Ndakazonzwa izwi guru mudenga richiti, “Zvino ruponeso nesimba noumambo hwaMwari wedu noukuru hwaMesia wake zvauya nokuti mupomeri wehama dzedu akakandidzirwa pasi; ndiye uya anovapomera mhosva siku nesikati pamberi paMwari wedu." 
Revelation12:11 Vakamukurira neropa reHwayana uye neshoko rokupupura kwavo nokuti vakazvipira upenyu hwavo kusvika pakutofa. 
Revelation12:12 Fara iwe denga nemi mugere mariri. Une nhamo iwe nyika negungwa nokuti Dhiabhori aburukira kwauri nehasha huru nokuti anoziva kuti nguva yake ipfupi.” 
Revelation12:13 Zigaranyanya parakaona kuti rakandidzirwa pasi rakaronda mudzimai uya akanga asununguka mwana mukomana. 
Revelation12:14 Asi mudzimai akanga apiwa mapapiro maviri egondo guru kuti abhururukire kugwenga achitiza nyoka iya kunzvimbo yaaizoriritirwa kwamakore matatu ane hafu. 
Revelation12:15 Nyoka iya yakawodzvora mvura serwizi ichibva mukanwa mayo yakananga kumudzimai uya kuti imueredze neboporodzi iroro. 
Revelation12:16 Asi nyika ndiyo yakazobatsira mudzimai uya. Nyika yakashama muromo wayo ikamedza rwizi rwuya rwakanga rwaodzvorwa nezigaranyanya rwuchibva mumuromo maro. 
Revelation12:17 Zigaranyanya rakashatirirwa mudzimai uya ndokuenda kundorwisa vamwe vana vake vose vanochengeta mitemo yaMwari nouchapupu hwavo kuna Jesu. 
Revelation12:18 Rakamira pamahombekombe egungwa. 
Revelation13:1 Ndakaona chikara chichibuda mugungwa chine nyanga gumi uye chine misoro minomwe nengundu gumi panyanga dziya nezita rokushonha Mwari pamisoro yacho. 
Revelation13:2 Chikara chandakaona chakanga chakaita sembada matsimba acho waiti ndeebere chiine muromo weshumba. Zigaranyanya rakapa simba raro kuchikara ichocho rakachipawo chigaro charo choumambo noukuru hwakakura. 
Revelation13:3 Mumwe musoro wacho waiita soune ronda rakaipisisa asi ronda racho rakapora. Pasi pose pakashamiswa nazvo pakatevera chikara ichocho. 
Revelation13:4 Vanhu vakagwadama vachinamata zigaranyanya riya nokuti rakanga rapa simba raro kuchikara uye vakagwadama vachinamata chikara chiya vachiti, “Ndiani angaenzaniswe nechikara uye ndiani angarwisane nacho?”" 
Revelation13:5 Chikara chakabvumirwa kutaura chikataura mazwi okuzvikudza nookushonha Mwari chakabvumirwa kutonga kwemwedzi makumi mana nemiviri. 
Revelation13:6 Chakazarura muromo chichitaura mazwi okushonha Mwari Chichishonha zita rake napaanogara zvichireva avo vanogara kudenga. 
Revelation13:7 Chakabvumirwa kurwisa vatsvene nokuvakurira; chakapiwa ukuru pamarudzi ose navanhu vose nendimi dzose nendudzi dzose. 
Revelation13:8 Vose vanogara panyika vachachigwadamira vachichinamata, vose zvavo vana mazita asina kunyorwa pasi pasati pavapo, mubhuku roupenyu reHwayana yakauraiwa." 
Revelation13:9 Ane nzeve ngaanzwe. 
Revelation13:10 Anenge achifanira kutapwa anotapwa anouraya munhu nebakatwa, anofanira kuuraiwawo nebakatwa. Ndikoka kutirira uye chitendero chinodiwa pavatsvene." 
Revelation13:11 Zvino ndakaona chimwe chikara chakabuda pasi chakanga chiine nyanga mbiri sehwayana uye chaitaura sezigaranyanya. 
Revelation13:12 Ichi chaiva namasimba ose echikara chokutanga chichiita kuti pasi navagari vapo vagwadamire vachinamata chikara chokutanga chakanga chiine ronda rakaipisisa rakanga rapora. 
Revelation13:13 Chaiita zviratidzo zvinoshamisa zvikuru, kunyange kutozomotsa moto mudenga uchiuya pasi vanhu vakatarisa." 
Revelation13:14 Nezvishamiso izvozvo zvachaibvumirwa kuita pamberi pechikara chiya chainyengedza vagari vapasi, chichivati vaite chifananidzo chechikara chakakuvadzwa nebakatwa chiya, asi chikararama." 
Revelation13:15 Chakabvumidzwa kupa chifananidzo chechikara chiya mweya unofema zvokuti chifananidzo chechikara chaitogona kutaura. Uye kuti vanenge vasina kugwadama vachinamata chifananidzo chechikara vauraiwe. 
Revelation13:16 Uye chinoitawo kuti vose vakuru navaduku, vapfumi navarombo vose vakasununguka navarandawo, vaiswe mucherechedzo paruoko rworwudyi kana pahuma." 
Revelation13:17 Zvokuti hapana anogona kutenga kana kutengesa kunze kokunge anomucherechedzo, zvichireva zita rechikara ichocho kana kuti nhamba yezita racho." 
Revelation13:18 Pano apa panodiwa ungwaru. Munhu anonzwisisa ngaatsvage azive zvinorehwa nenhamba iyoyo yechikara nokuti ari kurehwa nenhamba iyoyo munhu. Nhamba yacho mazana matanhatu namakumi matanhatu nenhanhatu. 
Revelation14:1 Ndakati tarisei ndikaona pagomo reZioni pakamira Hwayana iina vanhu zviuru zana namakumi mana ane zvina vakanga vakanyorwa pahuma dzavo zita rayo nezita raBaba wayo. 
Revelation14:2 Ndakanzwa izwi richibva kudenga samapopopo emvura zhinji uye sokudhiriridza kwemheni kukuru. Izwi randakanzwa rainge vanhu vari kuridza madimbwa avo 
Revelation14:3 vachiimba rumbo rutsva pamberi pechigaro choumambo pamberiwo pezvisikwa zvipenyu zvina zviya napamberi pavakuru vakuru vaya. Hapana aikwanisa kudzidza rumbo irworwo kunze kwavaya zviuru zana namakumi mana ane zvina vakanunurwa panyika. 
Revelation14:4 Ava ndivo vasina kuzvisvibisa navakadzi vakachengeta utsvene hwavo ivava ndivo vanotevera Hwayana kose kwainoenda, ivava ndivo vakanunurwa muvanhu somuchero wokutanga kuna Mwari nokuHwayana." 
Revelation14:5 Mumuromo mavo hamuna kumbobuda nhema nokuti havana chinoshoreka pavari. 
Revelation14:6 Ndakazoona mumwe mutumwa achibhururuka mudenga aine Shoko Rakanaka rokugara nokugara rokuparidza vanhu vanogara pasi pano munyika dzose, namarudzi ose nendimi dzose navanhu vose." 
Revelation14:7 Akadaidzira nezwi guru achiti, “Ityai Mwari mumupe mbiri nokuti nguva yake yokutonga yasvika. Munamatei iye akasika denga napasi negungwa nezvisipiti zvemvura.”" 
Revelation14:8 Mumwewo mutumwa wechipiri akatevera achiti, “Guta guru reBhabhironi raparara, raparara. Raparara iro rainwisa nyika dzose waini yehavi dzaro dzakaipa.”" 
Revelation14:9 Mumwezve mutumwa wechitatu akavatevera achiti nezwi guru, “Kana munhu akanamata chikara nechifananidzo chacho achiiswa mucherechedzo pahuma yake kana paruoko rwake," 
Revelation14:10 achanwawo waini yehasha dzaMwari inodirwa isina kudirwa mvura mumukombe wehasha dzake. Acharwadziswa nomoto nesarufa pamberi pavatumwa vatsvene napamberi peHwayana. 
Revelation14:11 Utsi hokurwadziwa kwavo hucharamba huchingotogoka kudenga nokusingaperi uye havana zororo siku nesikati, ivava vanonamata chikara nomufananidzo wacho navavo vanogamuchira mucherechedzo nezita racho.”" 
Revelation14:12 Ndikoka kutirira kunodiwa pavatsvene uku! Vanochengeta mitemo yaMwari nechitendero chaJesu. 
Revelation14:13 Ndakanzwa izwi richibva kudenga richiti, “Nyora izvi zvokuti: ‘Vakakomborerwa vanofira muna Tenzi, kubvira zvino zvichienda mberi.’ “Vakakomborerwa zvechokwadi, ndozvinotaurwa naMweya. Vachazorora pamabasa avo, nokuti zviito zvavo zvinovatevera.”" 
Revelation14:14 Ndakatarisazve ndokuona gore jena, ndakaona mumwe akanga agere pagore akaita soMwanakomana womunhu aine chiremba chendarama mumusoro nejeko rakapinza muruoko." 
Revelation14:15 Mumwe mutumwa akabuda muTemberi achidanidzira nezwi guru kuna uya akanga agere pagore achiti, “Shandisa jeko rako ukohwe nokuti nguva yokukohwa yasvika, kukohwa pasi kwasvika.”" 
Revelation14:16 Uya akanga agere pagore akavheesa jeko rake panyika nyika ikabva yakohwewa. 
Revelation14:17 Mumwezve mutumwa akabuda muTemberi kudenga. Naiyewo akanga aine jeko rinopinza. 
Revelation14:18 Mumwe mutumwa akabuda achibva kuatari; aiva nesimba rokutonga zvomoto akadanidzira nezwi guru kuna uya akanga ane jeko rinopinza achiti, “Shandisa jeko rako uunganidze zvisumbu zvamagirepisi apanyika nokuti magirepisi ayo aibva.”" 
Revelation14:19 Naizvozvo mutumwa akavheesa jeko rake panyika akaunganidza magirepisi apanyika, akaakanda muguvi guru rokusvinira waini rehasha dzaMwari." 
Revelation14:20 Muguvi makakanywa kunze kweguta ropa rakapopoma richibva muguvi zvokusvika pamatomhu ebhiza kukwira namazana matatu amakiromita kureba. 
Revelation15:1 Ndakazoona chimwe chiratidzo mudenga chikuru chinoshamisa chavatumwa vanomwe vaine pfumvu nomwe dzokupedzesera dzaiva nzira dzaMwari dzokupedzisira dzokuratidza nadzo hasha dzake. 
Revelation15:2 Ndakazoona chainge gungwa regirazi rakatsvuka moto navavo vakakurira chikara nechifananidzo chacho nenhamba yezita racho vakamira pedyo negungwa riya regirazi vaine madimbwa aMwari mumaoko. 
Revelation15:3 Vakanga vachiimba rumbo rwaMosesi muranda waMwari norumbo rweHwayana vachiti, “Tenzi Mwari Samasimbaose mabasa enyu makuru, anoshamisa, nzira dzenyu dzakarurama uye ndedzechokwadi. Imi Mambo wapasi chigare." 
Revelation15:4 Ndiani angarege kukutyai nokurumbidza zita renyu Tenzi nokuti imi ndimi munoera marudzi ose achauya ozokugwadamirai achikunamatai nokuti zviito zvenyu zvakarurama zvakaoneswa.” 
Revelation15:5 Mushure maizvozvi ndakatarisa onei Temberi yeTendhe reChitenderano chokudenga yakazuruka. 
Revelation15:6 MuTemberi makabuda vatumwa vanomwe vaya vaine pfumvu nomwe; vakanga vakapfeka hanzu dzerineni yakanakisisa inopenya. Pachipfuwa chavo vakanga vakasunga tambo dzendarama. 
Revelation15:7 Chimwe chezvisikwa zvina zvipenyu zviya chakapa vatumwa vanomwe ndiro nomwe dzendarama dzizere nehasha dzaMwari anogara narini narini. 
Revelation15:8 Temberi yakazara noutsi huchibva mukupenya kokuvapo kwaMwari nokusimba rake. Hapana aikwanisa kupinda muTemberi kusvikira pfumvu nomwe dzavatumwa vanomwe vaya dzapera. 
Revelation16:1 Ndakazonzwa izwi guru richibva muTemberi richiti kuvatumwa vanomwe, “Endai mundodurura panyika ndiro nomwe dzehasha dzaMwari.”" 
Revelation16:2 Saizvozvo mutumwa wokutanga akaenda akadururira ndiro yake panyika. Vanhu vaya vakanga vaine mucherechedzo wechikara vakagwadama vachinamata chifananidzo chacho, vakaita maronda anonyeka akaipisisa." 
Revelation16:3 Mutumwa wechipiri akadururira ndiro yake mugungwa rikaita seropa romunhu afa, zvipenyu zvose zvaiva mugungwa zvikafa." 
Revelation16:4 Mutumwa wechitatu akadururira ndiro yake munzizi nomuzvisipiti zvemvura zvikapinduka zvikava ropa. 
Revelation16:5 Ndakazonzwa mutumwa anotonga zvemvura achiti, “Imi muri mutsvene kutonga kwenyu kwakarurama imi muripo uye makanga muripo." 
Revelation16:6 Vanhu vakadeura ropa ravatsvene neravaporofita imi mukavapa ropa kuti vanwe. Toko waro! Ndomubayiro wavo.” 
Revelation16:7 Ndakanzwa izwi kuchema paatari richiti, “Hamuoneka Tenzi Mwari Samasimbaose, kutonga kwenyu ndekwepachokwadi uye kwakarurama.”" 
Revelation16:8 Mutumwa wechina akadururira ndiro yake pazuva rikabvumirwa kupisa vanhu nomoto. 
Revelation16:9 Vanhu vakapiswa nokupisa kunotyisa kwazvo. Vakashonha zita raMwari aiva nesimba pamusoro pepfumvu uye havana kupinduka kuti vamurumbidze. 
Revelation16:10 Mutumwa wechishanu akadururira ndiro yake pachigaro choumambo chechikara chiya. Umambo hwacho hwakava murima, vanhu vakazvirumaruma rurimi mukurwadziwa." 
Revelation16:11 Vakashonha Mwari wedenga pamusana pokurwadziwa kwavo uye pamusana pamaronda avo asi havana kutendeuka pazviito zvavo. 
Revelation16:12 Mutumwa wechitanhatu akadururira ndiro yake parukova rukuru rweYufuratesi mvura yarwo ikabva yapwa kugadzirira madzimambo okumabvazuva nzira. 
Revelation16:13 Ndakaonawo mumuromo mezigaranyanya riya nomumuromo mechikara chiya uye nomumuromo womuporofita wenhema muchibuda mweya mitatu yakaipa yakaita samatatya. 
Revelation16:14 Iyoyi mweya yakaipa inoita zvishamiso inofamba nenyika yose kumadzimambo apasi pano ichivakokorodzera hondo yapazuva guru raMwari Samasimbaose. 
Revelation16:15 “Tarisai muone ndichauya sembavha; akakomborerwa munhu anenge akasvinura, achichengeta hanzu dzake kuti arege kufamba akadaro ari mutwi achionererwa.”" 
Revelation16:16 Mweya iyoyo ichaunganidza madzimambo aya kunzvimbo inonzi Amagedhoni muchiHebheru. 
Revelation16:17 Mutumwa wechinomwe akadururira ndiro yake mumhepo, izwi guru rikabva muTemberi pachigaro choumambo richiti, “Zvaitika!”" 
Revelation16:18 Mheni yakavaima kukadhiriridza, kukaita mabhanan'ana kukava nokundengendeka kwapasi kusati kwamboitika kubvira kuvapo kwavanhu panyika. Hakusi kukura ikoko kokundengendeka kwacho." 
Revelation16:19 Guta guru riya rakabva rakamurwa muzvikamu zvitatu maguta evechirudzi akaparara. Mwari haana kukanganwa guta guru reBhabhironi kuti rinofanira kunwa mukombe wehasha dzake huru. 
Revelation16:20 Zvitsuwa zvose zvakatiza, kana makomowo akanyangarika." 
Revelation16:21 Chivhuramahwe chairema makirogiramu makumi mana anamashanu chakawira vanhu chichibva mudenga kusvikira vanhu vashonha Mwari pamusana pepfumvu yechivhuramahwe, hakusi kutyisa ikoko kwepfumvu iyoyo." 
Revelation17:1 Zvino mumwe wavatuma vanomwe vaya vakanga vane ndiro nomwe, akauya akanditi, “Uya ndikuratidze chirango chichatemerwa chifeve chembiri chiya chigere pamvura zhinji" 
Revelation17:2 chakaitwa ufeve nacho namadzimambo apanyika chine waini youfeve yakararadzisa vagari vapanyika.” 
Revelation17:3 Ndiina Mweya mandiri akaenda neni kugwenga ndikaona mukadzi akatasva pachikara chitsvuku chakanga chazara namazita okushonha Mwari chakanga chiine misoro minomwe nenyanga gumi. 
Revelation17:4 Mukadzi iyeyo akanga akapfeka hanzu dzinokosha dzoruvara rwohute norutsvuku akashongedzwa nendarama, nezvishongo zvinokosha namatombo anokosha amapera akabata kapu yendarama izere zvisingadiwi naMwari nezvakan'ora zvoufeve hwake." 
Revelation17:5 Pahuma pake pakanga pakanyorwa zita rakavandika rokuti, “BHABHIRONI GUTA GURU, ZIMAI REPFAMBI uye ZIMAI REZVISINGADIWI NAMWARI PASI POSE.”" 
Revelation17:6 Uye ndakaona mukadzi uya akararadza neropa ravatsvene uye neropa rezvapupu zvakafira Jesu. Pandakamuona ndakashamiswa kwazvo. 
Revelation17:7 Asi mutumwa akati kwandiri, “Ko uri kushamiswa nei? Rega ndikutaurire zvakavandika zvomukadzi uyu uye nezvechikara chine misoro minomwe nenyanga gumi chinomutakura." 
Revelation17:8 Chikara chawakaona chaivapo iye zvino hachisisipo chichabuda mugomba risina parinoperera chichindoparadzwa. Vanhu, panyika, vasina kunyorwa mazita avo mubhuku roupenyu pasi pasati pavapo, vachashamiswa vachiona chikara chiya, kuti chaimbovapo zvino hachichisipo asi chichavapozve." 
Revelation17:9 Izvi zvinoda munhu anofunga anoungwaru. Misoro minomwe zvikomo zvinomwe zvakagarwa nomukadzi; 
Revelation17:10 uyewo kune madzimambo manomwe. Vashanu vavo vakatofa. Mumwe wavo ndiye ari kutonga mumwe haasati atouya asi kana auya achatonga kwechinguvana. 
Revelation17:11 Chikara chiya chakanga chiripo asi chisisipo ndiye mambo wechisere. Asi ari pamwechete navanomwe vaya; bva achaparadzwa. 
Revelation17:12 “Nyanga gumi dzawaona, madzimambo gumi vasati vagadzwa umambo asi vachapiwa simba roumambo kweawa imwechete pamwechete nechikara chiya." 
Revelation17:13 Vane mweya wechirwirangwe uye vakapa simba ravo noukuru hwavo kuchikara. 
Revelation17:14 Vacharwisa Hwayana asi Hwayana ichavakurira nokuti ndiTenzi wavanatenzi naMambo wamadzimambo. Uye vaainavo vanhu vakadanwa vakasarudzwa uye vakatendeka.” 
Revelation17:15 Mutumwa akanditi, “Mvura yawaona panga pagere chifeve chiya, vanhu nemhomho yavanhu namarudzi nendimi." 
Revelation17:16 Nyanga gumi dzawaona, idzo nechikara zvichavenga chifeve chiya. Zvichachitorera zvose zvachinazvo zvichichisiya chisina kupfeka chinhu. Zvichadya nyama yacho zvichachipisa nomoto" 
Revelation17:17 nokuti Mwari akaisa mumwoyo yavo pfungwa yokuti vaite zvaanoda nomwoyo mumwechete nokupa umambo hwavo kuchikara nokuombera vachiteerera chikara kusvikira mashoko aMwari azadzikiswa. 
Revelation17:18 Mukadzi wawaona ndiro guta guru rinotonga madzimambo apasi pano.” 
Revelation18:1 Mushure maizvozvi ndakaona mumwe mutumwa achibva kudenga ane simba guru rokutonga, pasi pakapenyeswa nembiri yake." 
Revelation18:2 Akadaidzira nezwi guru achiti, “Raparara, raparara Bhabhironi guta guru rava musha wemweya yakaipa; rava dambiro remweya yose yakan'ora nechirugu cheshiri dzose dzakan'ora necheshiri dzisingadiwi navanhu." 
Revelation18:3 Ndudzi dzose dzakanwa waini yehavi dzaro dzakaipa, madzimambo ose akaita upombwe naro. Vashambadzi vapasi vakapfumiswa noupfumi nounzenza hwaro.”" 
Revelation18:4 Ndakanzwazve rimwe izwi richibva kudenga richiti, “Budai mariri vanhu vangu. Mungadaro mukazoitawo zvitadzo zvaro mukapinda mupfumvu dzaro" 
Revelation18:5 nokuti zvitadzo zvaro zvakaita murwi unosvika kudenga. Mwari akayeuka huipi hwaro. 
Revelation18:6 Achariitira zvarakaitirawo vamwe achiridzorera kakapetwa, zviito zvaro. Riitirei zvarakakuitirai muridzorere kakapetwa zviito zvaro muripe waini inokaripa zvakapetwa kaviri." 
Revelation18:7 Rionesei nhamo murirwadzise zvakaenzana nembiri namafaro arakazvipa. Zvarinozviti nechomumwoyo, ‘Ndigere zvangu samambokadzi, handisi chirikadzi, kuchema handimbofa ndakachema.’" 
Revelation18:8 Pfumvu dzaro dzichariwira nezuva rimwechete, dzinoti rufu, kuchema rufu, neshangwa yenzara uye richapiswa nomoto nokuti Mwari anoritonga ane simba guru.”" 
Revelation18:9 Madzimambo apanyika akaita upombwe nounzenza naro vacharichema vachiungudza pavachaona kutogoka utsi hwokutsva kwaro. 
Revelation18:10 Vachamira kure uko nokutya matambudziko aro vachiti, “Maiwe! Maiwe! Nhaiwe guta guru, iwe guta rakasimba, Bhabhironi zvakuwana neawa imwechete.”" 
Revelation18:11 Veshawo dzokutengeserana vapanyika vanorichema vachiungudza nokuti hapana achatenga zvinhu zvavo; 
Revelation18:12 zvinhu zvavo izvi zvinoti: ndarama nesirivha nezvishongo namapera kwoti machira erineni yakanakisisa neeruvara rwohute neesirika namatsvuku, kwouya mapuranga anonhuwirira akasiyana — siyana, kozouya mhando nemhando yezvinhu zvakavezwa nenyanga dzenzou; kozoti zvinhu zvakagadzirwa nemiti inokosha zvakaitwa nendarira nesimbi kana namatombo anokosha;" 
Revelation18:13 kuchizoti chinamoni, netwekubikisa tunonhuwirira; kotiwo rusenzi nemura norusenzi rune kakunhuwirira kakanakisa kwazvo; kuchizouya waini namafuta noupfu hwekoroni hwakatsetseka uye nekoroni kuchiuyawo mombe nehwai namabhiza nengoro dzehondo ndokuchizouyawo nhapwa zvichireva vanhu." 
Revelation18:14 Vanoti zvawaida kuwana namafaro ako zvakusiya, hudobori hwako namafaro ako zvakupesa hauchambozviwanazve." 
Revelation18:15 Veshawo dzokutengeserana ivava vakawana upfumi mariri vachamira kure uko nokutya nokuoneswa nhamo kwaro vacharichema vachiungudza zvinonzwika vachiti," 
Revelation18:16 “Maiwe! Maiwe guta guru kudai rakanga rakapfeka rineni yakanakisisa nehanzu dzoruvara rwohute netsvuku rakashongedzwa nendarama nezvishongo namapera.” 
Revelation18:17 Neawa imwechete, upfumi hwose uhu hwaparara. Vatungamiriri vengarava navanhu vanofamba nzendo nengarava navafambisi vengarava navose vanoshava mari vachishandisa nyanza, vakamira kure uko," 
Revelation18:18 vakachema zvinonzwisa tsitsi pavakaona utsi hwokutsva kwaro. “Nderipi guta ringaenzaniswe neguta iri guru?” 
Revelation18:19 Vakazvidira ivhu mumusoro vachichema vachiungudza vachiridza mhere vachiti, “Maiwe! Maiwe guta guru kudai rakapfumisa vose vaiva nengarava munyanza, neawa imwechete raparara." 
Revelation18:20 Imi matenga nemi vatsvene nemi vapositori nemi vaporofita ritii, ‘Tsvatu waro.’ Itii nomufaro kwariri, ‘Tsvatu waro.’ Nokuti Mwari akaripa chirango pamusoro pezvarakakuitirai.”" 
Revelation18:21 Mutumwa ane simba guru akatora dombo rakakura seguyo akarikanda mugungwa achiti, “Ndiko kukundwa zvine utsinye kuchaitwa Bhabhironi guta guru marisingazombowanikwazve.”" 
Revelation18:22 Mumhanzi wevemadimbwa newavaimbi newevenyere newevemabhosvo hauchazombonzwiki mauri uyewo mhizha youmhizha hupi zvaho, hauchazombowanikwamo uyezve mauri hamuchazombonzwika ruzha rwokukuya." 
Revelation18:23 Kana mwenje werambi hauchabvirazve mauri. Mauri hamuchazombonzwikazve izwi romukuwasha kana romuroora nokuti veshawo dzokutengeserana vako vanga vari madzichangamire apanyika. Marudzi ose akanyengedzwa nouroyi hwako. 
Revelation18:24 Mariri makawanikwa ropa ravaporofita neravatsvene neravose vakauraiwa pasi pano. 
Revelation19:1 Mushure maizvozvi ndakanzwa izwi guru rainge remhomho huru yavanhu mudenga vachidaidzira vachiti, “Areruya! Ruponeso nembiri nesimba ndezvaMwari wedu." 
Revelation19:2 Kutonga kwake kuri pachokwadi uye kwakarurama. Akatonga chifeve chikuru chiya chakaodza pasi noupombwe hwacho akatsividza pachiri ropa ravaranda vake.” 
Revelation19:3 Vakadaidzirazve vachiti, “Areruya! Utsi hwaro heko kutogoka nokusingaperi.”" 
Revelation19:4 Vakuru vakuru makumi maviri ana vana vaya nezvisikwa zvipenyu zvina zviya zvakati pasi kota kota zvichinamata Mwari agere pachigaro choumambo zvichiti, “Ameni. Areruya!”" 
Revelation19:5 Pakanzwika izwi richibva pachigaro choumambo richidaidzira richiti, “Rumbidzai Mwari wedu imi mose varanda vake nemi vanomutya, vakuru navadiki.”" 
Revelation19:6 Ndakazonzwa chainge izwi remhomho yavanhu richinge ruzha rwemvura zhinji uye sokudhiriridza kwemheni ine simba richidaidzira richiti, “Areruya! Nokuti Tenzi Mwari wedu Samasimbaose anotonga." 
Revelation19:7 Ngatipemberei tichifara timuwanise mbiri nokuti muchato wehwayana wasvika uye mwenga azvigadzirira. 
Revelation19:8 Akabvumidzwa kupfeka jira jena rakachena rerineni rakanakisisa jena. Jira rerineni yakanakisisa ndiwo mabasa akarurama avatsvene.” 
Revelation19:9 Mutumwa akati kwandiri, “Nyora izvi zvokuti, ‘Vakakomborerwa zvavo vakakokwa kuchirariro chomuchato weHwayana.’ Akanditizve, ‘Aya mazwi chaiwoiwo aMwari.’ ”" 
Revelation19:10 Ipapo ndakabva ndati pasi gwadagwa patsoka dzake ndichimupfugamira. Asi iye akanditi, “Rega kudaro, ini ndiri mushandipamwe newe uye ndiri mushandipamwe nehama dzako dzino uchapupu hwaJesu. Mwari ndiye waunofanira kupfugamira uchimunamata; uchapupu hwaJesu ndiwo mweya unavaporofita.”" 
Revelation19:11 Zvino ndipo pandakaona denga razarurwa ndikaona bhiza jena. Akanga akaritasva ainzi Kutendeka uye Chokwadi anotonga noururami uye anorwa hondo. 
Revelation19:12 Maziso ake akaita serimi romoto pamusoro wake pane ngundu dzakawanda uye akanga ane zita rakanyorwa risingazivikanwi nani zvake asi iye oga. 
Revelation19:13 Akanga akapfeka gemenzi rakanyikwa muropa zita raanodaidzwa naro rinonzi, “Shokoramwari.”" 
Revelation19:14 Hondo dzokudenga dzakanga dzakarongana dzakapfeka jira jena rakachena rerineni yakanakisisa; dzaimutevera dzakatasva mabhiza machena. 
Revelation19:15 Mumuromo make makabuda bakatwa rinopinza rokukurira naro marudzi. Achavatonga netsvimbo yesimbi; achakanya waini muguvi rewaini rehasha dzaMwari Samasimbaose. 
Revelation19:16 Pagemenzi rake napachidya chake akanyorwa zita rokuti, “Mambowamadzimambo naShewamadzishe.”" 
Revelation19:17 Ndakazoona mutumwa akamira muzuva akadaidzira nezwi guru kushiri dzose dzinobhururuka muchadenga achiti, “Uyai muunganire chirariro chikuru chaMwari," 
Revelation19:18 uyai muungane mudye chirariro chezvitunha zvamadzimambo nezvitunha zvavatungamiri vehondo nezvitunha zvamagamba nezvitunha zvamabhiza nezvavatasvi vawo nezvitunha zvavanhu vose, vakasununguka nenhapwa, vakuru navaduku.”" 
Revelation19:19 Ndakaonawo chikara chiya naMadzimambo apasi nehondo dzavo vaungana kurwa hondo naiye akanga akatasva pabhiza uye nehondo yake. 
Revelation19:20 Chikara chiya chakabatwa pamwechete nomuporofita wenhema uya akaita zviratidzo pamberi pacho zvaakanyengedza nazvo vaya vaiva nomucherechedzo wechikara navaya vainamata chifananidzo chacho. Muporofita uya akakandwa ari mupenyu mudziva rinobvira moto wesarufa pamwechete nechikara chiya. 
Revelation19:21 Vamwe vose vakauraiwa nebakatwa romutasvi webhiza raibuda mumuromo make uye shiri dzose dzichatozvimbirwa zvadzo nenyama yavo. 
Revelation20:1 Ndakazoona mumwe mutumwa achiburuka kudenga akabata muruoko rwake kiyi yegomba risina parinoperera nengetani huru. 
Revelation20:2 Akabata zigaranyanya riya, zinyoka rapasichigare riya rinonzi Dhiabhori kana kuti Satani ndokumusunga kwamakore ane chiuru ndokumukanda mugomba riya." 
Revelation20:3 Akarizarira ndokumunamiriramo kuti aregezve kunyengedza marudzi kusvikira makore ane chiuru aya apera. Mushure maizvozvo anofanira kumbosunungurwa kwenguva diki. 
Revelation20:4 Zvino ndakazoona zvigaro zvoumambo. Vakanga vagere pazviri ndivo vakapiwa simba rokutonga uye ndakaonawo mweya yavavo vakanga vadimburwa musoro pamusana pokupupurira kwavo Jesu uye pamusana peshoko raMwari uye pamusana pokuti havana kunamata chikara kana kunamata chifananidzo chacho kana kuiswa mucherechedzo wacho pahuma dzavo kana pamaoko avo. Vakamukazve vakatonga naKristu kwechiuru chamakore. 
Revelation20:5 Vamwe vafi vose havana kumuka kusvikira chiuru chamakore chiya chapera, uku ndiko kumuka muvafi kokutanga." 
Revelation20:6 Akakomborerwa zvake uye mutsvene munhu uyo anenge ari mumwe waavo vapakumuka kokutanga ikoko. Pane vakadai, rufu rwechipiri haruna simba asi vachava vapristi vaMwari naKristu, vachatonga naiye kwechiuru chamakore." 
Revelation20:7 Panopera chiuru chamakore Satani achasunungurwa mujeri rake. 
Revelation20:8 Achabuda kundonyengedza marudzi ari kumativi mana enyika, Ndivo vana Gogu nanaMagogu achavaunganidzira kurwa hondo vakawanda sejecha regungwa." 
Revelation20:9 Vachafamba nenyika yose, vakakomberedza musasa wavatsvene neguta rapamwoyo asi moto uchatozomoka mudenga uchivaroromesa." 
Revelation20:10 Dhiabhori akanga avanyengedza achakandwa muzidziva romoto nesarufa mune chikara chiya nomuporofita wenhema uya, vachaoneswa nhamo siku nesikati narini narini." 
Revelation20:11 Ndakazoona chigaro chikuru chichena choumambo naiye akanga agerepo. Nyika nedenga zvakatiza kubva paari zvakabva zvava zvinhu pasina. 
Revelation20:12 Ndopandakazoona vafi, vakuru navaduku vakamira pamberi pechigaro choumambo. Mabhuku akazarurwa. Kwakazarurwawo rimwe bhuku. Iroro ndiro bhuku roupenyu. Vakafa vakatongwa maererano nezvakanga zvakanyorwa mumabhuku iwayo zvichifambirana nezvavakanga vaita." 
Revelation20:13 Gungwa rakaburitsa vakafa vaiva mariri. Rufu nenzvimbo yavafi zvakaburitsawo vakafa vakanga vari mazviri; vose vakatongwa maererano nezvavakanga vaita. 
Revelation20:14 Rufu nenzvimbo yorufu zvakakandwa muzidziva romoto. Urwu ndirwo rufu rwechipiri; dziva romoto. 
Revelation20:15 Kana zita romunhu rikashaikwa risina kunyorwa mubhuku iroro roupenyu, munhu iyeyo anokandwa mudziva riya romoto." 
Revelation21:1 Ipapo ndipo pandakazoona denga idzva nenyika itsva nokuti denga rakare nenyika yakare zvakanga zvapfuura uye gungwa pakanga pasisina. 
Revelation21:2 Ndakazoona guta dzvene Jerusaremu idzva richiburuka mudenga richibva kuna Mwari rakagadzirirwa semwenga, mwenga akashongedzerwa murume wake." 
Revelation21:3 Ndakanzwa izwi guru richibva pachigaro choumambo richiti, “Tarisai muone kuti Mwari ava kuzoita musha wake pakati pavanhu. Achagara navo; ivo vachava vanhu vake iyewo Mwari pachake achava navo." 
Revelation21:4 Achapukuta misodzi yose pamaziso avo. Rufu haruchazovapozve, hapachazova nokuungudza kana kuchema kana kurwadziwazve, nokuti zvinhu zvakare zvinenge zvapfuura.”" 
Revelation21:5 Uya akanga agere pachigaro choumambo akati, “Tarisai muone ndava kuita kuti zvinhu zvose zvive zvitsva.” Akatizve, “Nyora izvi nokuti mazwi aya mazwi anovimbika uye ndeechokwadi.”" 
Revelation21:6 Uya akanditi, “Zvaitika. Ndini Arifa naOmega ndini mavambo namagumo ezvinhu kune vane nyota ndichavapa mvura pasina muripo ichibva mukasipiti kemvura youpenyu." 
Revelation21:7 Uyo anokunda achawana mugove wenhaka yezvinhu izvi ini ndichava Mwari wake iye achivawo mwana wangu. 
Revelation21:8 Asi mbwende, navanohedhuka navakapara zvitadzo nemhondi nemhombwe navaroyi, navanamati vezvinhu zvisiri Mwari, navarevi venhema, chavo ivo zidziva riya rinobvira moto nesarufa. Ndirwo rufu rwechipiri.”" 
Revelation21:9 Ndipo pakazouya mumwe wavatumwa vanomwe vaya vakanga vane ndiro nomwe dzakanga dzizere pfumvu nomwe dzokupedzisira. Akati kwandiri, “Uya ndikuratidze mwenga, mudzimai weHwayana.”" 
Revelation21:10 Ndiina Mweya, akanditakura akaenda neni kuGomo refurefu akandiratidza guta dzvene reJerusaremu richiburuka richibva mudenga, richibva kuna Mwari" 
Revelation21:11 riine kupenya kokuvapo kwaMwari. Rain'aima sechishongo chinokosha kwazvo uye seemeradhi rakachena sezvimedu zvedombo romusarasara. 
Revelation21:12 Rakanga riine rusvingo rukuru rwakareba kuenda mudenga ruine misuo mikuru gumi nemiviri. Pamisuo mikuru iyoyo paiva navatumwa gumi navaviri. Pamisuo mikuru iyoyo pakanga pakanyorwa mazita amadzinza gumi namaviri avaIsiraeri. 
Revelation21:13 Kumabvazuva kwaiva nemisuo mikuru mitatu; kuchamhembe kuine misuo mikuru mitatu; kumaodzanyemba kuine misuo mikuru mitatu kumadokerowo kuine misuo mikuru mitatu. 
Revelation21:14 Rusvingo rweguta iroro rwakanga ruina matombo ohugaro gumi namaviri. Paugaro ipapo pakanga pakanyorwa mazita gumi namaviri avapositori veHwayana. 
Revelation21:15 Uyo aitaura neni akanga aino rutanda rwendarama rwokueresa guta iroro nemisuo mikuru yaro namasvingo arwo. 
Revelation21:16 Guta iroro raiva namativi mana akaenzana. Urefu hwaro hwakanga hwakaenzana noupamhi hwaro. Akaera urefu hweguta norutanda rwake hukaita makiromita zviuru zviviri zvina mazana maviri urefu hwaro noupamhi hwaro nokukwira kwaro mudenga zvakanga zvakaenzana. 
Revelation21:17 Akaerawo rusvingo rwaro rukaita mamita makumi matanhatu ana mashanu namaerero anoita vanhu asi iye ari mutumwa aiera. 
Revelation21:18 Rusvingo irworwo rwakanga rwakavakwa namatombo ejasipa. Iro guta riri rendarama yoga yoga rakachena segirazi. 
Revelation21:19 Ugaro hwerusvingo rweguta iroro hwakanga hwakashongedzwa nezvishongo zvemhando nemhando. Chishongo chokutanga chakanga chiri chejasipa chechipiri chiri chesafaya chechitatu chiri cheagati chechina chiri cheemeradhi 
Revelation21:20 chechishanu chiri cheonikisi chechitanhatu chiri chekaneriani chechinomwe chiri chekirisoriti chechisere chiri cheberi chechipfumbamwe chiri chetopazi chegumi chiri chekirisopurasi chegumi nechimwe chiri chejasindi chegumi nechipiri chiri cheemetisiti. 
Revelation21:21 Misuo mikuru gumi nemiviri iya yakanga iri yamapera gumi namaviri. Suo guru rimwe nerimwe rakaitwa nePera rimwechete. Migwagwa yeguta iroro yakanga iri yendarama yakanakisisa inoonekera segirazi. 
Revelation21:22 Asi handina kuona Temberi muguta iroro nokuti Temberi yaro ndiTenzi Mwari, Samasimbaose neHwayana." 
Revelation21:23 Guta iroro haridi zuva kana mwedzi zvokurivhenekera nazvo nokuti kupenya kokuvapo kwaMwari ndicho chiedza charo, Hwayana iri iyo rambi rayo." 
Revelation21:24 Marudzi ose achafamba achivhenekerwa nechiedza charo uye madzimambo apasi achauisa mariri zvinovapa mbiri. 
Revelation21:25 Misuo yaro mikuru haichazombopfigwa masikati uye hakuzombovi nousiku ikoko. 
Revelation21:26 Vachaunzamo mariri zvinhu zvinopa marudzi mbiri nomukurumbira. 
Revelation21:27 Hakuna chakan'ora chichapinda mariri kana ani zvake anoita zvisingadiwi naMwari kana anonyengedza kusiya chete vakanyorwa mubhuku roupenyu reHwayana. 
Revelation22:1 Zvino mutumwa akazondiratidza rwizi rwemvura youpenyu yakachena sezvimedu zvedombo romusarasara rwuchierera ruchibva pachigaro choumambo chaMwari necheHwayana 
Revelation22:2 napakati pomugwagwa weguta. Kumativi ose erwizi, kwaiva nomuti woupenyu unobereka muchero gumi nakaviri uchibereka muchero mwedzi woga woga; mashizha awo anorapa ndudzi dzavanhu." 
Revelation22:3 Hapachazovapo nokurengererwa rushambwa asi chigaro chaMwari choumambo necheHwayana zvichava muguta iroro; varanda vake vachamugwadamira vachimunamata. 
Revelation22:4 Vachaona uso hwake uye zita rake richava pahuma dzavo. 
Revelation22:5 Hapachazovazve nousiku, havazoda kuvhenekerwa nomwenje kana nezuva; nokuti Tenzi Mwari ndiye achava chiedza chavo uye vachatonga narini narini wose." 
Revelation22:6 Mutumwa akati kwandiri, “Mazwi aya mazwi anovimbika uye ndeechokwadi Tenzi Mwari wemweya yavaporofita akatuma mutumwa wake kuti azoratidza varanda vake zvichaitika zvino uno.”" 
Revelation22:7 “Chinzwa ndiri kuuya nokukurumidza. Akakomborerwa zvake anochengeta mazwi okuporofita ebhuku rino. 
Revelation22:8 Ini Johani ndini iye ndakanzwa ndikaona zvinhu izvi.” Pandakazvinzwa nokuzviona, ndakati pasi gwadagwa kupfugamira patsoka dzomutumwa akandiratidza zvinhu izvi." 
Revelation22:9 Asi iye akanditi, “Usadaro, ini ndiri mushandipamwe newe uye pamwe navaporofita, hama dzako navanochengeta mazwi ebhuku rino iri. Mwari ndiye waunofanira kugwadamira uchinamata.”" 
Revelation22:10 Akatizve kwandiri, “Usavige mazwi okuporofita aya, nokuti nguva yavakutosvika." 
Revelation22:11 Muiti wezvakaipa angangoita zvake zvakaipa wetsvina angangorambawo zvake achiita zvetsvina izvozvo; woururami achiitawo zvake zvakarurama nomutsvene achiitawo zvoutsvene. 
Revelation22:12 “Asi ndiri kuuya nokukurumidza ndakatakura mubayiro wangu kuti ndizopa munhu wose zvakaenzanirana nezvaakaita. 
Revelation22:13 Ndini Arifa naOmega ndini wokutanga nowokupedzisira ndini mavambo namagumo ezvinhu. 
Revelation22:14 “Vakakomborerwa vanogeza magemenzi avo kuti vave nemvumo yokudya muti woupenyu uye kuti vave nemvumo yokupinda napamisuo mikuru yeguta. 
Revelation22:15 Kunze uku kunenge kuine imbwa dzavanhu navaroyi nemhombwe nemhondi navanamati vezvinhu zvisiri Mwari navanofarira uye vanoita zvamanyepo. 
Revelation22:16 Ini Jesu ndini ndatumira mutumwa wangu kwamuri nouchapupu uhu kumasangano. Ndini dzinde nebukira raDhavhidhi ndini hweva yamangwanani.” 
Revelation22:17 Mweya nemwenga vanoti, “Uya.” Anenge azvinzwa ngaati, “Uya.” Anenge ane nyota ngaauye; anoda ngaatore zvake mvura youpenyu pasina muripo." 
Revelation22:18 Ndinoyambira munhu wose anonzwa mazwi okuporofita omubhuku rino. Munhu anoawedzera, Mwari achamuwedzerawo pfumvu dzakatsanangurwa mubhuku rino." 
Revelation22:19 Munhu anobvisawo mamwe mazwi okuporofita uku Mwari achabvisa mugove wake uri mumuti woupenyu nomugove wake muguta dzvene zvinotsanangurwa mubhuku rino iri. 
Revelation22:20 Iye ari kutaura zvinhu izvi anoti, “Chokwadi ndiri kuuya zvino uno.” Ameni uyai Tenzi Jesu."
